title: Local Food Experiance
review:
I was picked up punctually at the address I had given. After Min and Lisa welcomed me, we first went to the local market. They showed me and explained everything about Vietnamese fruits and vegetables and what kinds of dishes they are used for. We strolled through the alleys and halls, and they also explained local customs, which taught me a lot about the culture. After we had negotiated the price of some food at the market, we continued on to the restaurant where the cooking class was held. I had the honor of being the only participant. We were welcomed with a specialty coffee and a foot bath. Then we got to work. There were three dishes on the menu: Hue's famous beef noodle soup, dumpling cake, and fried spring rolls. It quickly became clear that the young girls are passionate about what they do! They love their local dishes, their heritage, and their job. Afterwards, I ate the prepared dishes together with Min. An authentic cooking class for anyone who wants to get to know Vietnamese cuisine better or for anyone who simply enjoys cooking and good food. Thank you very much for the great day and the delicious food.
Miriam

title: A One-Stop Showcase of Hue’s Best Dishes
review:
Madam Thu was recommended by one of our guides, and with two locations in Hue—one geared a bit more toward groups and cooking classes—I initially expected a very tourist-oriented trap as opposed to a true local experience. And yes, at first glance it looks exactly like that but in reality, it was far from it. So much so that we dine here twice! The food is excellent, thoughtful, and a fantastic introduction to Hue’s rich culinary landscape.

The menu is designed so you can explore the city’s most iconic dishes without hopping around to multiple stalls. You can order individually, or go straight for the Hue Sample Platter, which brings together all the greatest hits: Banh Khoai, Banh Uot, Nem Lui, Banh Nam, Banh Beo, Banh Loc, Banh It, Nem Ran, and Cuon Tom Thit. It’s essentially a guided tour of Hue’s street food classics, all in one place.

We also added one of Hue’s most famous dishes, Bun Bo Hue, and it was spot on—aromatic broth, bold flavors, and plenty of depth.

Service ties everything together. The staff is warm, friendly, and genuinely enthusiastic about sharing Hue cuisine. You can feel their pride as they introduce each dish and explain its origins. That aligns with the fact that they offer Vietnamese cooking classes at both locations as well.

Whether its hands-on instruction or just stopping in for a meal, Madam Thu delivers an outstanding meal and an excellent snapshot of Hue’s culinary identity. It’s absolutely worth a visit.

review:
Amazing authentic Hue cuisine!
The food was incredibly fresh and full of authentic flavours. We had such a tasty meal here. Khoi was amazing — super friendly and helpful throughout our visit. Highly recommend!

title: Great Huế local dinner
review: We were in Huế for a brief stay. This restaurant was recommended by our guide and we were certainly not disappointed. The setting is charming, the waiter, Khôi, was very polite and attentive. He helped us navigating the expansive menu from which our stomach is too small to try them all. We settled to the ‘one person sample meal’ and a family set menu. Totally enjoyed both. Right portion and excellent quality. Highly recommended !!

title: Very good!!!
review:
The food was delicious! And at a good price!
Laura was super friendly and looked after us very well.
I recommend this place, one of the best I have tried in Hue.

title: Excellent
review: Nora attended us at dinner and was lovely. The food is very good. We tried fried and souped rice noodles and a kind of prawn with sauce that is the best thing I have ever tasted on my trip in Vietnam. For dessert mango creps with chocolate. All from 10.

title: Highly recommended
review: The food very good and the girl Min very good knew a little Spanish and helped us a lot the food thanks a hug I recommend

title: Min an excellent canarera
review: The very good food with a special Service of MIN , the best waitress in all Vietnam, we advised very well on the dishes we should order, with a kindness and an eternal smile.

title: Best Vietnamese dishes
review: Everything was delicious. We tried 7 different dishes and each one more good and surprising. We ordered veal soup, prawns with passion fruit sauce, pork rolls, noodles with meat and noodles and prawns and cuttlefish. I would repeat without hesitation. The terrace is very nice at night. Excellent Service, especially Min, who attended us in Spanish and recommended us dishes from the menu.

title: A wonderful experience in Hue
review: We loved everything we ate. We’ve been traveling all over Vietnam for several days and I would say it’s my favorite place to eat of the ones I tried. Min in particular was a super attentive waitress and endeavoured to help us in everything (including speaking Spanish). 10/10

title: Very authentic
review: The Service of Long is just outstanding, very attentive always on hand and the food mercilessly cheap and very delicious. We would love to come back

title: Perfect
review:
The menu was excellent, the service by Min very competent and informative.
Highly recommended, great atmosphere.

title: Good Vietnamese food restaurant
review:
Great Vietnamese food and very good price.
All the employees treated us phenomenal, especially Ziy Ry who tried to explain to me in Spanish how to eat the menu he had ordered.
I recommend this place to anyone who visits Hue

title: Lovely treatment and exceptional food
review: Exquisite food. The rice with shrimp excellent. Attention by all the staff very carefully and especially Ziy Riy lovely. They teach you how to make the rolls. No doubt to repeat and very remind you.

title: Great!
review: Great restaurant, you can choose to order only a few pieces of each kind that allows you to taste several things is great! The staff is very welcoming. I was served especially by Nin who was great! I recommend!

title: The right choice
review: In the nightlife street of Hue' you will be welcomed with kindness and attention and guided not only to the choice of food but also to the way to consume it. It offers excellent local cuisine for all tastes. Excellent fried fish in tomato sauce and pork skewers with vegetables to be wrapped in rice paper. All the dishes are intriguing and many to share like rice flour cakes with chopped shrimps while watching people pass in the street. Good call.

title: With great pleasure this review!!
review: I want to thank Candy for allowing me and my friend to discover Hue. As for the restaurant's cuisine, it is absolutely delicious ✋🏻!

title: Great food, wonderful treatment
review: The delicious food, but even better the attention, Nin and Nhu, were lovely, explained everything perfectly and also strived to speak to us in Spanish.

title: Dinner
review:
Great Vietnamese restaurant, absolutely recommended! Dishes are treated in detail, with quality ingredients and authentic flavors. Each course is a small trip to Vietnam.

Service is impeccable: Leo, the waiter, was just fantastic — kind, attentive and very professional.

In addition, the price is very honest for the quality offered, which makes the experience even more enjoyable.

Cozy atmosphere, relaxed atmosphere... definitely a place to come back!

Leo number one!

title: A pleasant evening
review: Great choice : varied and traditional menu . Well received by NU who speaks Italian and was very kind to us. We recommend the place.

title: Top Food and Service
review: Great food. Excellent and fast Service. Nhu conversed with us in Italian, explaining how to eat Vietnamese food. Really good, kind and professional.

title: Looking forward to coming back
review:
Very good food, excellent service and Nhu is a very nice person and she is learning Spanish I recommend it 100%.

The area is very clean the place is very well located.

title: Great restaurant highly recommend
review: Nin the tasting plate was fantastic and really fresh highly recommend. The staff where very helpful explaining how to enjoy the meal

title: Hue food
review:
Amazing food.
Ziy Ry our waitress was fantastic.
I like Vietnamese food. This time I really loved it.
We ordered the Hue sample plate. Totally worth it.

title: Tasty food and great staff.
review: This restaurant was recommended to us for lunch and we were not disappointed. Delicious food and wonderful staff. Ry and Ziy looked after us and we enjoyed trying to speak Vietnamese with them. Might go back for dinner another time!

title: Good and nice
review: Very good and cheap food, there is not much variety but you can try typical Vietnamese dishes. In addition, they are very friendly and pleasant as our waitress Nu, who invited us to a passion fruit for dessert. He also spoke a little Spanish.

title: Professional Service
review: I was recommended from the hotel that Madam Thu restaurant was the best place in Hue to discover local specialties and that was absolutely true! Candy kindly suggested several kinds of typical cupcakes that we tasted, and the peanut sauce was really delicious. Despite the fact that he handled several tables, Candy remained very attentive and considerate, which touched me a lot. I will definitely return on my next trip to Vietnam with my husband.

title: Delicious food and outstanding service
review: We had a wonderful dinner at Madam Thu! The food was absolutely delicious – full of flavor and beautifully presented. A special thanks to our waiter Long, who provided outstanding service: friendly, attentive, and always with a smile. We felt truly welcomed and cared for. Highly recommended!

title: Local restaurant to do
review:
Chau served us very warmly by explaining all the little tricks to enjoy the food.
We highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Awesome service and food
review: Service was fantastic especially Min. Food was extremely tasty and well priced. Great atmosphere. Friendly staff. Great amenities

title: Delicious !
review: We take Com Ga and it was delicious, in great quantity and really tasty ! We had a good moment, thanks to Ry Ziy for this kindness 😘

title: Great central Vietnam cuisine
review: Very good food and very good service. Recommended the sharing platter for 190k. Prices are good and food tasty. I will be back

title: Excellent Service
review: Restaurant perfect to discover the gastronomy of Hue. There is a tasting plate that brings together the main local specialties. We were served by Laura who was very attentive and who explained to us each of the items on the plate with the side sauces. I highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Tasty and excellent service.
review: The food was authentic and delicious. Min is really nice and helps with the selection of dishes, excellent and fast service, all cute and sweet.

title: Great food and service.
review: Great food and service. We've been well helped by Chau. She gave a good explanation of how to eat certain dishes. Thanks for the Great Service.

title: Very good!
review:
Very good restaurant, good explanation of dishes!
Tnx @Min who was very clear how to combine the dishes. Highly recommended!

title: Delicious and cozy, partly due to the service of dear Min
review: Going to eat here via tripadvisor, and it was indeed delicious. I had the menu with specialities from Huế and for dessert the sweet soup with lotus seeds, a dessert from Huế. Both delicious. Min helped us very well and explained everything. Sweet spontaneous girl like most Vietnamese. It was, thanks in part to her, a pleasant evening!

title: Great experience
review: Super fast Service, we ate very well. The menu is full of local specialties and Nox advised us very well.

title: A very beautiful discovery
review: It is a very nice experience and Bie recommended us so well. The food is excellent, as in my childhood or at home. Thank you again, Bie, for Welcoming us.

title: Friendly and good food
review: Stopped by for dinner before our flight. Was our only meal in Hue and it didn't disappoint! Min was lovely and very knowledgeable of all the dishes ☺️

title: Delicious authentic Vietnamese food, also vegetarian!
review: Very good food in a really authentic Vietnamese restaurant. Very good Service from Ry Ziy, without asking she realized if we needed an extra tray for the rice or an extra tray of sauce. I would highly recommend the vegetarian dish (vegetarian rice).

title: Hue Dinner
review: This restaurant was recommended by our taxi driver, the food was great, especially the platter! We had some great tourist advice from Tam and lovely service all round.

title: Huè honeymoon
review:
Cin is a special host, she is professional and very kind, she also speaks a bit of Italian, very good!
Food is good and cheap!

title: I highly recommend
review: Traditional Vietnamese Food.. Perfect Service, Fast.. Nu the girl who served us professional, friendly and explained the dish ordered in detail .. advice to come

title: Lovely food
review:
The food was very good and the service for Min was excellent.
Would definitely recommend and we will will return before leaving Hue

title: Great service and amazing local food
review: Amazing food and great service from Chau! We got the set menu and it was a great way to try the Hue specials- definitely recommend and Chau explained how it’s best to eat each dish which was super helpful!

title: Great restaurant
review: Very good service! Alex Nhu en his collegues where very friendly and helpfull. They sang a birthday song for my girlfriend.

title: amazing flavours and extremely friendly staff
review: Huyen, was such a lovely young lady.She explained the menue to me. The food was amazing, the best that I have eaten in Vietnam. Such amazing flavours and realy good presentation

title: My experience at madame Thu Restaurant
review: Our waitress Ziy Ry was great and really kind. She also asked some questions about us and was trying to speak German. The food was really delicious.

title: Great!
review:
Delicious food and great Service.
We had fruit for free in the desert which adds a touch of sympathy.
Thanks to zuy re for his smile.

title: Excellent!
review: Great meal typical of the Hue region! Very welcoming team and Zuy Ri was very kind and attentive throughout the meal. I recommend ☺️

title: Typical restaurant in the country that perfectly meets 3 B.
review:
Restaurant with local food, and very good value, quantity and price, with a varied menu.
Very well served by the lovely and friendly Hannah.

title: Rich food and friendly people.
review: Very good food, the price is affordable and the waitresses are very friendly and friendly. They usually put a fruit tapa for dessert for free.

title: Great food. Great atmosphere.
review: The vegetarian food was amazing! I had the vegetarian rice and spring rolls. The staff were so friendly and helpful. Would eat here again.

title: All very good, very attentive staff
review: We have eaten very well, quality food and good price. We were attended by a girl, Cin, who spoke Spanish, very friendly and attentive. When we left, he gave me a bracelet. I recommend it!

title: Great experience
review:
No, we have a new restaurant, and the truth is we've been ripped off!
We have eaten the typical dishes of the area and in each dish the waitress, Cin, has explained how to eat correctly!
Cin has been very friendly and helpful, explaining each dish and its way of eating!

title: Great Vietnamese restaurant, with tasty food and attentive Service
review: Madam thu was a beautiful find, the food is really very good and tasty. The place is very clean and the staff is very attentive. Thanks to the waitress Nhu for the great Service and explanations on the dishes!

title: A delicious local restaurant in Hue
review: I had an unforgettable trip to Hue with my parents when we visited this restaurant. From the dishes to the attention of the staff, everything was completely worth it. Thank you very much to our waitress Candy, who helped us quickly choose the most recommended local specialties 😸🥳

title: The food was excellent and the Service even better!
review: Khoi was a real treat at the restaurant! He always satisfied us, who were new to Hue. He presented each section of the menu in as much detail as possible in French. It is really difficult to find a Vietnamese restaurant we have been to that speaks both French and him. Congratulations to you, Khoi! We easily had a hearty menu with cakes (you can order individually instead of the large portion) and dessert with fresh fruit. We were delighted ✅

title: Perfect Service
review: Min was very nice and helpful with us, she thoughts us how to eat each of the foods and everything was really tasty!! They offer complementary watermelon

title: Great restaurant and lovely staff
review: The food very good, and the waitress who attended us Nu very friendly and attentive and also spoke Spanish. Delighted with everything, a pleasure, we'll probably be back.

title: High recommendation
review:
We really enjoyed it in the restaurant. The platter with all local specialties is a great recommendation.
And Tem our waitress was super friendly. Always happy

title: A good place to dine
review: All perfect, especially the nhu Service which also speaks very good Spanish. A good place to eat or dine. Plus they give you a free dessert.

title: Great food , even better staff!
review: Great experience at this restaurant. The staff are all so friendly especially their supervisor Min who talked to me about the local dishes. Highly recommended to anyone coming to Hue. Thank you!

title: Very nice restaurant!
review: Ver nice food and nice ambience. Chau was very nice and helpful. We had the hue menue and could try a lot of nice foods special from hue.

title: 8/14 Nguyễn Công Trứ
review:
Amazing food and really nice staff:)
Hoang waa our server , he was really nice and was trying to learn English woth the international guests.

title: Super delicious food, 5 stars!
review: Super delicious food, also a very good selection of vegetarian dishes. It was so good that we came 2 days in a row. The Service is also great. Thanks in particular Nox!

title: Very good
review: We had dinner here at night and Cin attended. He spoke Spanish and he attended us wonderfully. Thank you very much

title: Yummy food
review: Great service from Tem and a delicious meal also with lovely place to eat. We stumbled on this place and enjoyed the taste all platter. And banana pancakes.

title: Great food and service
review: The local food was delicious and Tam was a wonderful waitress, highly recommend visiting here! Lots of locals recommended we ate here and we’re so glad we did

title: Excellent meal
review: Fantastic meal at Madam Thu's! TG was so helpful explaining the dishes on the mixed sharers, gives you a real insight into Hue's cuisine right in the centre of town and at such good value!

title: Great food and great service
review: Great experience at Madam Thu. Really big menu full of traditional Vietnamese food. Tran, our waitress took the time to explain the dishes and the best sauce combos for each. She was great and a real credit to the place. Can't recommend highly enough.

title: Very delicious
review: Very good food and we were very nicely served by Min and Chau! Absolutely recommended if you are in Hue! To greet you even get a damp cloth and goodbye fresh fruit!

title: Amazing food, great service and 1 more point to Tam! :)
review: The food was so delicious and the people were so friendly. I tired the set menu and I recommend to try the local food. Shout out to Tam who was super friendly and happy to chat as wants to improve her English to connect with the tourists further :)

title: All right.
review: The food was great, traditional recipes and very well priced. Chau, our waitress, very friendly at all times. Best of Hue, we'll be back for sure!

title: Very good traditional food
review: Excellent food and best service by Nhu waiter. Many different dishes of traditional Vietnamese cuisine, all that we tasted was delicious

title: Very good
review: Huyen thank you and you will always be part of the Menu family! The restaurant was very good:). Take the discovery tray.

title: ‘Best food of the trip’ level of restaurant - must try!
review: Amazing food, best of our trip!! You HAVE to try this food, I had the set menu which is a 10-piece dish of local food, all of which was absolutely incredible, genuinely not a single thing that was less than amazing. Nu was an amazing waitress, and she gave my partner a homemade bracelet at the end which is the sweetest thing that may have ever happened to us in a restaurant 😂

title: Very good!
review: Very nice restaurant ! You are very warmly received, the food is very delicious and vividly arranged. the service is also very friendly. Thank you ( Su ) :)

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review: Great restaurant with very good value for money. We ate very well in a nice and friendly environment. We were served with kindness and professionalism by Su una ragazza molto gentile.

title: Fabulous
review: A great pleasure that we passed, a family kitchen, light, fresh with the attentive Service of Thuyen. I recommend

title: A Delight... in the Dishes and Service
review:
We ate very well and Tuyen was very nice. Everyone came to tell us a nice little word, waitress, manager M,...
I recommend all spring movies type dishes to eat like tapas. Fresh and very good

title: Very good, thank you Hannah!
review:
Very good restaurant, the dishes are not very expensive and of good quality.
Our waitress Hannah received us very well, we will come back:)

title: I recommend, Food and Excellent Service
review:
A very good place to eat without fear and with pleasure.
Our waitress Hannah was very nice and gave us very good advice.
Thank you very much to her.

title: Great food, good service
review: Second time eating at this place, food was very good, and Su service was helpful and efficient. If you’re looking for a place to eat, this is the place.

title: Great service and excellent Hue food
review: Su provided excellent service. The food was superb. Will come again and recommend to anyone in Hue. The spring rolls were excellent and the stir fried beef noodles brought in a covered pot, kept warm until I finished rolls. Also enjoyed the seafood pancake and the banana chocolate crepe.

title: Tam!
review: Tam was a great host! Very friendly & informative about the area and its food choices! Amazing food - especially the passion fruit prawns!

title: Very delicious
review: It was really delicious and authentic Vietnamese food and Laura was a super waitress. Anytime again.

title: Magnificent dinner in Hue
review:
We were attended by Nhu, a lovely waitress who made us enjoy the food. He spoke Spanish perfectly.
The food was very varied and good. We ordered the combined dish of several tastings.
Fully recommended.
Don't stop coming

title: Really good
review:
Khoa was a really nice waiter 🤞🏻 really recommend the food and nice service.

We had the deep fried spring rolls and vegetarian fried noodles, and we got maracuja as a desert for free. Everything was really good!

title: Amazing authentic food
review: Food was amazing, so delicious. Service from Chau was great - gave us great recommendations and explained the Vietnamese dishes to us very well. Thank you!!
Amazing place, Chau was very nice and helpful. The food was delicious and fresh and they took the time to explain how to eat it properly.

title: Good restaurant with a lot of life around it
review: We ate very well. The staff is very friendly. You sit outside on a busy street, off the main road.

title: Min is the BEST!!!!
review: A very good local restaurant, Min ea the best waitress, speaks Spanish perfectly and recommended all the food and was a success. Min the best!!!!!

title: Highly recommended to taste Hue specialties here! Go for the mixed dish! Hugely friendly people.
review: This place was tipped off to us by our hotel. We chose the mixed dish, so we could taste all the specialties of Hue. Each one of them very tasty snacks. It was delicious. We got a clear explanation from Laura (not her Vietnamese name of course) which sauce went with what. In addition, she was also very friendly and interested in our culture, she really made an effort to talk to us and that also felt very nice. Definitely a place you should go when you are in Hue.

title: Hue Visit
review: Excellent food. Thao Nhi is very nice 😊 The best Hue food. Worth to visit here. Its an authentic experience. Hue food is amazing

title: Experience at MaDamThue
review:
Delicious and very friendly atmosphere, to recommend.
A good memory of Hue and Min!
See you in the near future.

title: Good local food.
review: Fast cheerful service and tasty food. Chau did a great job. On the walking street. Recommended by the Melia. Had the tasting platter.

title: Local Gem
review: Min - wonderful young lady. She knows how to sell in the English language! Great food and even tasted the local vino! Would recommend to all who visit Hue. Great prices as well.

title: Boss food place
review: This is one of the best food places I have been Chau has been lovely from as soon as I sat down really kind and friendly highly recommend

title: Hue capital of hospitality
review:
Very warm Welcoming at Madame Thu 2’s restaurant by a young waiter named Khõi who made the effort to express himself in French. He guided us in choosing the dishes according to our tastes.
Thank you for this taste discovery!

title: Great food
review:
Food was excellent with a good description in English.
The prawn in passionfruit sauce was delightful.
Min our waitress was fantastic with very good English.
Thoroughly recommend a visit

title: Great servoce and excellent food
review:
Chau did a great service tonight making the dinner an amazing experience.
The food was excellent and good price too! Would repeat!

title: Good Vietnamese food and friendly waitress
review:
The food is very good and the waitress, Min, is nice, nice, helpful and speaks Italian and Spanish!
The menu offers a choice of the best Huè dishes and the most recommended dishes

title: Very good experience!!
review: We went to dinner and all the food was great!!! We loved it. Laura has attended us and helped us decide the food depending on our tastes! It has been super nice 🥰🥰

title: Food was amazing, and Ynu helped us a lot with the menu and made us feel like home.
review: Great dinner experience if you want to try authentic Hue cuisine in a one stop shop. Our waitress Ynu was very welcoming and helpful. Highly recommend.

title: Good food
review: Amazing food with amazing people like our waitress Chau!!! The workers are very nice people and can speak English very well!

title: Great place to eat in Hue
review:
The food is excellent! It is one of the best typical food places in Hue and I can simply say it is the best! The waiters, especially from Min who took pains to give the Best Service, were very kind to help me with the selection of dishes and my drink.
I recommend this place and try its excellent menu

title: Great experience
review: We had a wonderful Dinner with lovely Food and a great service by Sue. Highly recommend this place especially the Huda Beer!

title: Great place to try typical food from Hue region.
review: I had the Set Menu with 10 different sampler and 3 sauces. The waiter came to the table and explained witch food combines with each sauce. Great experience to try Hue's typical food.

title: Thank you Min!
review: We had a nice evening with tasty food, cold beers and atmospheric night live scenery. Min was was a very great host and we'd love to come back!

title: Authentic Local Experience in Huế
review: A truly local restaurant in Huế that is absolutely worth visiting. The food was very authentic and incredibly delicious, with traditional flavors that feel homemade. The atmosphere is simple yet welcoming, perfect for anyone looking for a genuine local experience rather than a tourist spot. Min was wonderful – always friendly, kind, and very attentive, which made the visit even more special. Great value for money, definitely a place to recommend and return to.

title: Great
review: Very good food and thanks very much to Nu for being so sweet and kind. Definitely will be back next time. Thank you very much

title: Excellent, Sue, excellent excellent service very friendly
review: On a one night visit to Hue we decided to pop in to this restaurant as we passed by. The food was absolutely amazing and the staff were exceptional in their service and friendliness. Would highly recommend his restaurant to anyone visiting the area. Our waiter Long it’s very friendly and very helpful and his English was excellent.

title: Madam Thu Great local Vietnamese Cuisine highly recommend this nice restaurant
review:
We had a very nice lunch here then returned for dinner the next evening
Great selection of local cuisine nice entrees and mains .
Nice cold Huda beers and service was excellent
Special thanks to all the team at the restaurant who assisted us
Ngan our server was very pleasant and helpful assisting us with our selections from the menu we appreciated her assistance and knowledge of the different dishes available thank you Ngan .
We enjoyed our stay at the restaurant thank you for the great service ,meal ,and expertise
We appreciate it .
Kind Regards
Paul and Tania Australia

title: Amazing food and service!
review: We had an amazing experience in this restaurant. The food was EXCELLENT. But the service was even better!! We had a waitress named Chau. She was outstanding. She made sure we knew which sauce each food should be paired with. She was so kind. I would highly recommend!

title: Madam Thu’s platter
review: We had a wonderful dinner at Madam Thu’s. I got the set menu platter and it was out of this world. Wonderful service by Chau as well

title: Amazing!
review:
We really enjoyed our experience here! The experience was amazing the platter was so
Good and I really enjoyed trying all the different foods! Chau was very welcoming and friendly
As soon as we walked in very bubbly personality and made our experience! Thank you would definitely come again!

title: Tasty food good service 10/10
review: We came here for dinner and ordered the set menu and it was so good but we didn’t know how to eat it but Chau our server guided us through it all and she was amazing very friendly and helpful would definitely recommend for a dinner

title: Tue best waitress!!
review: Tue was an excellent waitress! So lovely and explained the different dishes and how to eat them. She was very patient as well!

title: Attention, price with excellent product
review: We wanted to dine 6 people in Hue and searched the internet. They attended us phenomenal, Min and his girls offered us different dishes. We dined wonderfully and still fantastic price. Thank you Min for your attention and advice.

title: Hue's food very good.
review:
Great dinner and well advised by Min. All restaurant staff very attentive and with explanations of how to eat typical food.
Very good food

title: Best meal in Vietnam so far!
review: Chau was amazing! The food was the best that we had in Vietnam. chau helped us understand how to eat certain dishes we had not had before.

title: Very helpful, easy to talk to.
review:
Thank you Min! Great tastes & helpful explaining the menu for us! Cant wait to return. We will be back!!!
Moar characters....

title: Must try when in Hue
review: Came here on recommendation and the food was great. amazing service by Min as well! The spring rolls in particular were bomb

title: Great food.
review: I talked to Mr. nox, who was very nice and guided about cooking classes and the food was really delicious.

title: Nice place to eat all
review: Looking for all in one place of Hue food. Looking for Nox Her very helpful, they offer your cooking experience class also

title: good service
review: Nox was wonderful and the food unbeatable. Service certainly, was also very good. I definitely recommend this restaurant.

title: Amazing food, amazing service, great experience
review: Had a absolutely lovely meal! The food was excellent, and the waitress Chau was fantastic! . I ordered the tofu and aubergine. The tofu was flavourful and fragrant but not dry and the aubergine was deliciously cooked in a rich tomato sauce! I would highly recommend.

title: Delicious food
review: It is an excellent place with delicious Vietnamese food options, especially the attention of Nox is very friendly and attentive

title: Really good
review: Really enjoyed our food here, staff so friendly and loved our waitress Chau!!!! Would definitely recommend here xxxxx

title: A must try in Hue. Fantastic dinner
review: Amazing dinner and fantastic service from Min :) food is fresh and delicious, even our kids loved it. Lovely atmosphere. Will be back!

title: Pick Madam Thu for your dinner
review: Khoi was so friendly and showed us how to eat Hue food right. The food was delicious, the portions plentiful, especially the soup and set menu was great. There was a lot of crowds when we entered the restaurant, but he and other employees were always attentive. We always felt welcome!!!

title: The heart of Hue’s signature flavors
review: The food was absolutely delicious, and I recommend trying it while in Hue. Central Vietnam’s traditional cuisine is rich in flavors and we savored all the dishes we tried. Thanks to khoi for their attentive service.

title: Great local restaurant
review: Great spot to taste local food with fantastic staff. Recommend the set menu to try all local specialities from Hue in a ‘tapas’ style. Our waitress Chau was lovely

title: Hue food
review:
Very good Food. Chau was very Nice and we loved the service here.
Food is so fresh and made with love.
Hope to come here again.

title: Delicious food
review: Good food at relatively cheap prices. We got BBQ pig with rice noodles and rice noodles with tofu, it was good. Super good service from Chao.

title: Local diversity in a restaurant
review:
We had a great dinner at the restaurant! The class if everyone wants to try the mixed food plate a great option.

Min was a very good and dear service and provided us with the evening very well. Thank you ☺️

title: Amazing food experience
review: Food is amazing, fresh and tasty. It was well recommended rightly so. Staff were very friendly, attentive. Shout out to Min for her knowledge to making our food experience next level.

title: Great food and service! Extremely satisfied.
review:
Had two consecutive nights' dinner at this place, as the food was so good!
Ordered Nem Lui (grilled chopped pork with lemongrass) and Bun Bo Hue (Hue beef noodle soup) on our first night and Banh Beo (Beo cake with minced shrimp), Nem Ran (fried spring rolls) and Bun Thit Nuong (grilled pork with vermicelli) on second. All taste so good! Texture and flavour were just right.
Staff (Ty) was extremely friendly and helpful in explaining and recommending the dishes to us.
Restaurant was cosy and nice too.

title: Min the best
review:
It was a beautiful dinner, in this place recommended by our host we found home air. Welcoming at the entrance and Service. But above all the food was great, we took the fried pork rolls, delicious melted in the mouth.
As main course we decided to try Com Gà and Bun Bo Hue, both really special dishes, light and tasty. Special praise to our waitress Min, made us feel at home and delighted in trying to speak Italian. Super recommended!

title: Excellent, casual, good English speaking and helpful service by Nox. Highly recommended.
review: Great food, friendly service that helps you and explains how to best combine the different dishes and sauces

title: Madam Thu - 10/10!
review: Fantastic food, we are here 2 nights and both nights we cleared our plates! Chai was a joy when serving us, couldn’t recommend enough!!!

title: An essential place
review: Min is a charming and very professional and the food very varied and very rich. In addition to helping you and advising you to order what you like

title: Good Restaurant
review: I highly recommend this restaurant. The food was delicious and well-priced. The service was very friendly. The waitress, Chau, was kind and helpful.

title: Great food
review: 5 star service from Chau & excellent food! On a relatively busy street but a nice calm atmosphere! Loved the free passion fruit desert too!

title: Quintessential Hue food!
review: Madam Thu Restaurant in Huế impresses with richly flavored dishes like bún bò Huế, bánh khoái, and crispy nem lụi, served in beautifully plated portions with authentic local flair and vegetarian-friendly options . The friendly, English‑speaking staff offer attentive service and helpful recommendations, making it easy for first‑time visitors to explore Hue cuisine . Set‑menu samplers offer great variety and value, though some find prices slightly higher than street‑food options . Clean, comfortable, and centrally located, it’s ideal for travelers seeking a welcoming introduction to the flavors of central Vietnam. My commendations to Lan and her team!

review: This restaurant was great, nice food and friendly waiters. Nhat was great and advised us on our further travels in hue. I recommend it to everyone

title: Quality Vietnamese Food. Didn’t know much about it. A taxi driver recommended it. Upon arrival here, was wowed by Lan!
review: The food is so nice…I signed up for the cooking class! Lan helped me with this. The chef Fleur was a wonderful teacher. Met madame Thu as well, a successful entrepreneur with a family of smaller entrepreneurs! This was definitely an experience that was very personal & positive! Will recommend eating here as also the cooking class!

title: Great!!
review: Great culinary experience!! Thank you to LAN LAN for his explanations and kindness! Everything was very very very good!!! We highly recommend!!! If you are in Hue, do not hesitate!

Fine place to eat. Friendly staff and good value for money. Delicious ice coffee. The springrolls and the fries rise are also good in taste. Don't forget to add the sauce to the rice, it will be even better

title: Do yourself a favour
review: Recommended by our motel, this would definitely be the best meals we've had on our trip. So good we went for dinner one night and lunch the next day. Absolutely fresh delicious food, friendly and attentive staff (thank you Min and Len), quick service and cozy atmosphere. The plate of selected dishes is a must and then let the staff pick for you until you're full!!! Suggest you book (online via their website) as there's not a lot of tables and it's very popular. A++++++++

title: Dinner Restaurants in Hue
review: Excellent restaurant with very fine cuisine and a wonderful and very smiling Welcoming of Min who starts in French but only asks to learn with his customers.

Lam was brilliant helping us with the menu. She was happy to modify ingredients to suit our food preferences..
The fried spring rolls were a real highlight.
Brilliant Food and very great service. Lan was a great server and was very kind and welcoming. The food felt local and authentic. Would recommend.

title: Great food and service
review: Food was good, service was amazing! I enjoyed the sampler plate, and my server An was so attentive, she checked on my order for me and showed me how to eat the different items, and was great to talk to!

title: Excellent I recommend the soups are delicious!!
review: Thank you very much to Long for the excellent Service, the food was super good and his kindness was very appreciable thank you to him and good luck to him:)

title: Restaurant Madam Thu is highly recommended!
review: Great Vietnamese food with the family. Possibly the best Vietnamese food so far. Very well helped by " Dijk". Varied menu and good Mood. It's worth repeating.

title: A taste of Hue
review: Recommended by chat GPT as best restaurant so off I went and the restaurant delivered fast and delicious small portions at very reasonable price. Tran my server was very friendly, attentive and efficient, I will recommend.

title: The Story about Madam Thu
review:
Zo and Long were our hosts to a sumptuous Vietnamese banquet. We ordered Bun Thit Nuong, grilled pork with vermicelli, and the taste was so good. The noodles were cooked to perfection, the pork soft and tender, and the accompanying vegetables flavoursome. We also had spring rolls, which tasted like Greggs Sausage Rolls, and we had Morning Glory. What's the Story? Well, Morning Glory in Vietnam is a vegetable similar to spinach. It was deliciously served in a garlic sauce.

I washed this down with the local beer, Huda, which at just 20,000 VND a bottle was a steal.

'Madam Thu' is a must place to go in the vibrant city of Hue. I hope that you enjoy this place as much as we did.

Thanks again to Zo and Long... 'So long' and hope to see you again

title: A taste of Vietnam
review: Naha was brilliant at helping us choose from the menu. We had a taste of everything and Naha guided us through how to eat everything. The food was so fresh. Best meal so far in Vietnam.

title: Madam Thu for lunch
review: LAN and the team provided great service. Food is delicious. Great for lunch with family or friends. It also has toilet. Thank you

title: Great place to dine!
review: Our food came to the table quickly and was super fresh and tasty. The staff are so friendly and the restaurant is located in a very convenient location.

title: Good place to dine in
review: An amazing dining experience at Madam Thu restaurant. The vegetarian options are notable and the service was so friendly. Thumbs up to Dinh for giving great help and guiding us how to eat properly with all the dips. Really appreciated!!.

title: Perfect!
review:
Today we stopped at Madame Thu's. We ordered a mixed plate of different starters, everything was extremely delicious. Waitress Tran explained exactly which dip went with which food and so the experience was much, much better. We also got support from Tran in choosing the dessert. Perfect. It's as good as it gets.
Clear recommendation! Great restaurant! Excellent Service!

title: Excellent local food with friendly staff.
review: We had a lovely evening in madam Thu. The vegetarian options were great and 10 out of 10 for the rice pancakes. Staff were very friendly and helpful, Min was very accommodating and friendly as were all the staff. Definitely recommend for anyone visiting Hue.

title: Best vegetarian meal
review: Wow! Hands down the best vegetarian food I’ve had in Vietnam (potentially ever!). I got the tofu and eggplant rice. The flavours were phenomenal and nothing like I’ve had before. Lovely family restaurant atmosphere also. Definitely recommend.

title: great place with amazing food and atmosphere
review: great place with amazing food, the host was amazing, very friendly and kind. The food is cheap and high quality, definitely recommend!!

title: Amazing
review: Delicious food and fabulous service. Our waiter nin was a legend and made us feel at home. Would 100% come back! This was a great experience.

title: Worth to visit
review: Days ago we saw the fantastic reviews on google maps, I must say that you need to try the food here, our waitress was LAN a lovely girl that speaks Spanish 😱🥹(un poquito) we ordered "Nam cake" and "Banh beo" she explained how to eat those delicious dishes and OMG!! The food it's so light and sabrosa, we definitely come back another time to try some other dishes, Thank you LAN.

title: An experience for the palate
review: Local located in the center of Hue, very nice, along one of the main streets of the city. The staff is super friendly and the food was really good (nice also they explain how to enjoy it)😋

title: Guided culinary journey
review:
We had dinner here tonight and we had a great time, they welcomed us with a smile and guided us from the choice of dishes to how to enjoy them in the correct way...
A special mention for Min who made us smile by speaking our language in Italian

title: A little culinary trip to Hue
review: Great food and very friendly and polite staff, we took the set menu to taste a range of typical dishes and Min guided us in tasting this little culinary journey. Would stay again!

title: Great food!
review: Beautiful food lovely staff especially Lan our beautiful hotess. Authentic Vietnamese. Generous servings.Great value

title: Tasty Vietnamese Food and Super Friendly Service!
review: Madam Thu is a lovely Vietnamese restaurant with a cozy and relaxed atmosphere, perfect for a casual lunch or dinner. The place feels friendly and inviting, with a nice balance of traditional touches and a modern feel. The staff are very friendly, and our waitress Lina was especially kind and welcoming – she took time to explain everything and made sure we felt at home. Overall, a great spot with delicious food, fair prices, and truly outstanding service.

title: Excellent place for a great meal
review: 5 out of 5. Lan was our waitress. She was amazing. The food was excellent. If you're looking for a reasonably priced restaurant with great staff this place could be for you.

title: Delicious
review:
Very good local cuisine. We had the pancakes and it was amazing.
The staff is very nice.
The place is clean and situated in the center of Hue.

title: Fantastic lunch spot, lovely service
review: Fantastic food and incredible service, this place was recommended by our hotel. The small touches matter- the wet, cool towels to freshen up, the wonderful recommendations for local food, the watermelon to finish our meal. Lan was amazing. Our whole family loved the meal. Highly recommended.

title: authentic Vietnamese food
review: We looked for an authentic restaurant in Hue and found Madam Thu. we were not disappointed. The food was fresh and very tasty, different to food we have had in other parts of Vietnam. It came quickly and was plentiful. Our server Tran was excellent- giving us advice about the food and how to eat it! We would definitely recommend Madam Thu.

title: Vietnamese experience
review:
Great culinary experience in Hue.

We ordered the set menu and tried a little bit of everything. Our waitress Min was wonderful, and she even practiced her Spanish and Vietnamese with us.

Highly recommended

title: Excellent restaurant
review:
Great restaurant in the center of Hue. You eat very well and you spend little.
Special thanks to Min very kind waitress who helped us in choosing the dishes

title: Restaurant not to be missed!
review: This restaurant was recommended by a Vietnamese and we were not disappointed! Excellent cuisine and the service is really nice. Thanks to Xee for helping us taste the traditional dishes 👍🏾

title: Tasty and warm
review: Very good restaurant, I loved coming to eat here. The restaurant is a warm place. The waitress who served me is called Lan, positive: she speaks English and French (for those who do not speak English or live...). She's gentle, kind and patient. It’s nice to be able to eat in a restaurant where you feel comfortable and when it’s especially good! Thanks again.

title: Lunch.
review:
I've seen blogs.
At lunch, we had a delicious noodle with a pho-ish seafood stock!
And finally, watermelon service? I'm happy you did.
Lan was very courteous in his response!

title: Excellent dinner
review: Excellent dinner at Madam Thu's. The staff is very friendly and the food was really good. Nice Hue atmosphere. Thanks to Lan

title: Delicious and very friendly staff
review:
The food was absolutely delicious! Especially the Banh Kuaic and stir fry chicken with lots of fresh lemongrass 💚
Our waitress Lan was very helpful and friendly and made some great recommendations

title: Amazing!!!
review: This place is incredible. My husband and I ate here twice on our quick two night stay in Hue. All of the food was delicious. The staff was welcoming and super helpful. Our waitress Lan made our experience enjoyable. She is the best!

title: Great food , great drinks , great service
review:
Staff were amazing and extremely friendly , Loan was a young lady that looked after us and was very welcoming 5⭐️ service.

Nin was also very welcoming and was able to accomodate slight changes in the menu with no problems. If you like cold beers and great Vietnamese food at great prices this is the place to come.

⭐️⭐️🍺🍺🥘🥘🦘🐨🇦🇺🇦🇺

title: Amazing restaurant
review: We loved this restaurant. The food was amazing value and so delicious. Offering Hue specialties and also great vegetarian options.

title: Hue speciality
review: Good spot for lovely food and service in Hue. Vietnamese Traditional food. Our waiter Lan was so helpful. Our kids also loved the food

title: Fab place for lunch
review: Delicious food, especially the lem nui. The peanut sauce is better than the sauce at Madame Thu 2!! Lan was our waitress was great. Thanks Lan 😁

title: Amazing experience
review: We had an amazing experience at Madam Thu! The food was excellent and the staff were super friendly. Special shoutout to Dinh for giving us a great rundown of the local dishes - really appreciated the insight!.

title: Delicious food and wonderful service
review:
We came in search of trying some local Hue specialties and found just what we were looking for.
Our family tried 4 different things and each dish was full of flavour and delicious.
Our waitress Min was so helpful teaching us how to eat the different things we chose and also giving us suggestions for sightseeing the next day.
Definitely worth stopping in if you are in Hue.

title: Madam Thu Restaurant- a must do
review: We first came here in June 2024 and had dinner here 2 out of the 3 nights we were in Hue. We had 2 young children with us and everyone left very happy. The food is incredibly fresh and flavourful and the menu includes all of the signature dishes of Hue. We have returned to Vietnam this year and returned to Hue for the food, our first place to eat was back at this restaurant and it was once again outstanding. The staff are very friendly and engaging, Min in particular was very attentive and wonderful to talk to, she enjoyed practicing her English with us (which was very good) and could answer all of our questions regarding Hue and Vietnam in general. The food is also very reasonably priced, we were actually surprised with the bill when it came time to pay.

title: Delicious!
review: We had a fantastic meal at Madam Thu. Our server, Lan, was outstanding – friendly, attentive, and made us feel so welcome. We ordered the nem rán and they were absolutely delicious – perfectly crispy and packed with flavour. Great food, great service, lovely atmosphere. Highly recommend!

title: My favourite!
review: I live in.Hue and it's my favourite Vietnamese restaurant. They have a great menu, they speak English and they are well located. Michael

title: Very good dinner with min
review:
Very welcome from Min who speaks a little French,
Very warm atmosphere and excellent food
I really recommend

title: Great authentic Vietnamese food and great service
review: This place is great for authentic Vietnamese and especially for Hue specialities. We got the Bun Bo Hue, Banh Khoai and Nem Lui and the food was incredible and so affordable. Lan was a wonderful server, efficient and friendly and explained the proper way to eat each dish when she delivered it to our table.

title: Excellent dinner
review: The food was excellent and the service superb. The waitress, Min, was attentive, friendly and helpful in recommending dishes. Good value.

title: Best Restaurants in Vietnam
review: The best restaurant we could visit in our 3 1/2 weeks Vietnam. Incredibly delicious food (also vegetarian) and great staff: We had very nice and informative conversations with Min and can really recommend this restaurant to anyone who fancy excellent food.

title: Exquisite Vietnamese food
review: Really delicious Vietnamese food. We arrived in Hue not knowing where to go TripAdvisor took us, and did not disappoint, everything was delicious. And the girl who attended us explained kindly how to eat the typical dishes. Apart from the fact that they offer you wet towels with an exquisite smell, please don’t ever stop doing that. Definitely a place not to be missed!!

title: Madam thu
review:
Great service by Lau- friendly, great recommendation for food and was very lovely
Food was delicious, full of flavour, and highly recommend

title: Madam Thu, a must visit!
review: This is our go to place when visiting Hue. Great menu and atmosphere. We had the set menu to have a little taste of everything. Our server Lan, was a delight and made our evening very special. Would highly recommend.

title: Amazing food and service
review: This restaurant had many good dishes to try out, from the Bun Soup, the spring rolls, the Pancake, and the crepes. My first time in Vietnam, and I really enjoyed the variety! Also, special shout out to our Server Loan, she made the experience incredible, and she was super friendly and professional! I will recommend to my friends who visit.

title: Thanks to Lan
review:
A warm place with good food I recommend!
Lan has been lovely, whether it's for his kindness or to advise us

title: Holidays in Vietnam with family
review:
The restaurant very nice but most importantly the food was spectacular. They have attended us very well, especially Min who has recommended some dishes and at all times explained how we had to prepare the dishes.
I'd definitely eat there again. We loved:-)

title: Fine food
review:
Fine food and great service, will recommend this place to family and friends.
hoping to getting back there in near future.

Lan was a special waitress

title: Holidays in Vietnam
review: We were some friends who were on holiday in the city advised by our guide..The spectacular food the exquisite soup and the spectacular tasting menu The very friendly service explained how we had to eat the different sauces. I loved eating there I recommend it.

title: Best arrival in Hue
review: Lan is a very hospitable sweet woman and has helped us well! She even spoke a little Dutch. The food was very good!

title: Try a bunch of stuff and you won’t be disappointed
review: Just delicious. Simple traditional food at a great price with good service and cold beer. This place gets busy so would recommend booking a table of you are planning a visit at peak dinner time. Right in the heart of Hue city.

title: As good as my grandma’s
review:
Delicious authentic food
Amazing service from Min and the very friendly staff
Must go if in Hue
Reminds me of my grandmother’s cooking

title: Authentic food in Hue
review: Excellent service and delicious food! Reminded me of my grandmas cooking. We came back the next day and ordered more. Thank you to Min for the warm welcome.

title: Great restaurant and great cooking class
review:
I had a meal there and did the cooking class. The meal was first class. They do so many local dishes. I tried the Bun Bo Hue.

The cooking class was amazing! I was whisked off to the markets in the morning and given some great information by my guide (Phu) on the local produce.

Then, back at Madam Thu HQ we cooked up a feast.

I felt like I was a TV Chef!

title: Well, not surprisingly
review: We dined here based on the references on Tripadvisor. We were not immediately excited about the food. The food is good but we found better restaurants in Hue if you want to taste the specialties.

title: Good food,
review: We had a great meal here. The staff was very friendly and we got a nice explanation on how to eat each dish best. Definitely recommended!

title: Top
review: Very nice culinary experience for a quite reasonable price. The service was great and we were even offered passion fruit for dessert. Please note that if you make an appointment with someone at Madame Thu, there are 2 establishments with the same name offering the same menu and located close to each other

title: Typical Vietnamese
review:
The best Vietnamese meal of the stay, everything is done on site. Nothing wrong.
Fast and pleasant service.
Here, no Western dishes at all.

title: That “Madame” sure knows how to cook...
review: Our tour group was directed here. That “Madame” sure knows how to cook – The food was authentic and tasty. Our selection included spring rolls, pancake wraps, very tasty shrimp, fish and chicken dishes and something called Bun Bo Hue (the only one I could remember). Served in platters, it was well received by most. The colourful restaurant has a good ambience and provides great service. I don’t know how reasonably priced it was as it was included in the tour.

title: Lovely food and great price
review: Wondeful food with very kind service, defo recommend. Our tofu and beef were fantastic, really great prices on all food and drink.

title: Eyes closed... SUCCESS
review: Excellent meal even more. A very derisory price, a staff at the top. And they are there to explain everything and zn plus they told us to take less because it would be too much. So besides, they're not thieves. Go there with your eyes closed, the external aspect does not represent the excellence of the place and the meal... thank you

title: Food
review: I think local food great, I like bun bo hue and spring rolls . Staff friendly and very nice. Thank you so much. I will come back

title: Great Local Food
review: This restaurant has two branches near each other. Our waiter here was the brother of the owner, & he guided us thru the dishes & how to eat them. Two of us had Bun Bo Hue, very tasty. We also had a specialty dish of Béo Cakes, little rice dumplings with shrimp pieces on top. Interesting, unusual, & tasty.

title: Disappointing first night in Hue
review: This restaurant came highly recommended and we were very disappointed. We choose a set menu with a selection of local specialities which were generally underwhelming. We have tasted some of them at other places and they were much nicer. The atmosphere is nothing special either. After leaving we passed another place called Madame Thu 2…. Which looked much nicer … perhaps this where we should have been

title: Taste of Vietnam
review: Delicious food in a chilled ambiance. Very much enjoyed the taster platter and some fresh fruit. Very good service, freshly made food in the middle of a beautiful city 😊

title: Avoid this tourist trap
review: Very poor food. Comes out cold from kitchen. Place packed but everyone not eating everything. I left half my platter. Group of 4 and we all felt underwhelmed. Ate authentic Vietnamese food in Hanoi, Hoi An, Ninh binh, Halong and all much better than this place. Avoid this tourist trap. Do your research!

title: Good experience
review: Had the sample menu which was lovely and interesting. Staff great. We were in the overspill section which is a bit rough but the place had a great atmosphere and food was good

title: Great food and company
review: The food was amazing. We did a sampling platter. The staff was courteous friendly patient and very helpful. They explained what everything was, how to eat it and what sauces to use. It was a great way to be introduced to Hue cuisine.

title: Overrated
review:
Looked nice on the outside, inside seating not so great. Ordered the signature dish which was totally disappointing, too much starch, too fat and some of them tasteless.
Ordered springrolls to share, also too fat and no taste.
Going on reviews it looked okay but 2 stars only.

title: Among the best in town
review: Small restaurant with well-made, tasty and refined dishes. Lots of choice. Nice setting, fast and smiling service. Average prices and English spoken (not obvious). I recommend roll 3 soups.

title: Understand dietary requirements
review: Good selection of food and drink, coping well with vegetarian and Gluten Free needs. Spoke good English and fully understood GF requirements. Service was a little slow at times but the food was delivered quickly when the order was taken. This restaurant was recommended by the hotel we were staying at (and there are HEAPS of cafes and restaurants in the surrounding area).

title: Best Hue delicacies
review: This restaurant was recommended by our driver during a quick visit to Hue. We are so lucky for his kindness in telling us about it. The place was packed when we arrived for a late lunch but they were very prompt to make space and helped us out with the menu & our choices. The food was outstanding and it was so great to try local foods like famous Bún bò Huế and the delicious Bánh khoái, Bánh bèo, nem rán and Bánh khoái. Lovely service, great food and good price.

title: Really good food at reasonable prices.
review: We were recommended to go to Madam Thu restaurant for good food and drinks, and can say we were. not disappointed and all at reasonable prices.

title: Good.
review: Personally, I didn't like the food served in this restaurant, it's a shame. So I didn't eat much, my husband finished. Maybe I should have taken something else.

title: Crab and delicious!
review: Delicious fresh food, with plenty of variation. The staff explained how we rolled the rice paper packs ourselves. Tasty and uncomplicated.

title: Great food
review: Recommended by our guide. Had to wait 10 minutes for a table but worth the wait. Good Vietnamese food at great prices. Very good service too. BBQ pork with peanut sauce was delicious along with the fresh spring rolls.

title: In the heart of Hue
review: Small restaurant in the center with typical dishes , almost all the menu is gluten free, we took 3 dishes all good a bottle of water and a beer , we spent less than 9 euros.

title: Amazing
review: Madam Thu is absolutely amazing. The platter of all different food is stunning, really recommend this restaurant to anyone

title: Best food in Hue.
review: In my opinion, the best restaurant in Hue. The Hue chicken dish was so delicious that I visited the restaurant twice during my visit. Definitely recommend.

title: We eat well there
review: We landed for lunch. We settled on the terrace because the weather was beautiful. The dishes ordered are typical Vietnamese and tasty. You eat right there.

title: Good food, good time
review: Friendly, courteous staff, clean surroundings with mixture of Vietnamese and other cuisines. A bustling place that does not allow you to be forgotten.

title: Definitely worth a visit
review:
Madam Thu - Taste of Hue is very highly rated, lots of YouTube & other coverage. This sometimes makes me slightly dubious, is everyone just jumping on the band wagon?
More by luck than judgement, it was just a few doors from our hotel, so after a couple of Happy Hour beers, we called in.
Super friendly staff & not too busy as low season.
We chose Banh Khoai (stuffed pancake), Nem Ran (fried spring roll), Nem Lui (minced pork steamed on lemongrass), & Bun Boe Hue (a spicy meat, vegetable, & noodles soup).  It was all amazing.  The best food this trip & possibly the best I've ever eaten.... until I wake up hungry tomorrow.  But it was phenomenally good.  The servers show you how to eat the foods in the local way, the whole 'do it yourself' thing with the rice paper is super fun & delicious.
It was incredibly good value too. Don't miss it 😎🇻🇳😉🍻👍

title: Lovely meal in Hue
review: Excellent food, great service, really good value for money if you are European - just do not bother with the local wine - it’s shocking, but the food is superb

title: Quick meal
review: We went here on the walking street night. It was very loud on the street and everyone was in good spirits. The meal was nice but there is better food available elsewhere. Meal was very quick. Busy restaurant.

title: Worst meal in Vietnam
review: Such a dreadful experience. Madam Thu & Madam Thu 2 appears on google/trip advisor as recommended restaurant. Our GetYourGuide guide also recommended as top restaurant for tourists. Awful food, arrived seconds after ordering, main course came half way through starter, really poor quality. This is disgraceful to advertise this food as authentic Vietnamese dining experience, it is the worst I’ve experienced anywhere and could not recommend to any of my fellow tourists,

title: Great staff
review: Good restaurant recommended by our hotel. Great atmosphere. Sat outside. Good value for food and drink. The big thing was the staff - they were great. Friendly and very helpful.

title: Great place for night out
review:
Great meal all presented well and explained by Thu our waitress who was very friendly
More expensive than street food but still great value and cheap by western standards

title: Authentic local food with great service and atmosphere
review: Wonderful authentic dishes, welcoming, nice atmosphere. Very personal service from Thu who was very friendly, helpful and ensured we knew about the local dishes.

title: Yummy food to give you a taste of traditional vietnamese
review: Food was great and so was service!! Quick in and out. Minh Tam was so lovely and helpful

title: Wonderful Dinner at Chan
review: We stumbled across Chan on our way to a bar so came back for dinner. The food was exceptional. It was traditional Hue cuisine so very different from what we had already eaten in Vietnam so far. A special thank you has to go to Minh Tam who couldn’t have done more for us, she turned the fan in our direction when we were hot and recommended dishes that were superb. Thank you Minh Tam and Chan!

title: Perfect experience
review: Our experience was absolutely positive, the food was genuinely divine. The rolls set was the perfect start for this gastronomic journey. We also had the fig and jackfruit salad, which was very good and definitely exalted by the sauce. We also tried the oyster mushrooms with lemongrass and chilly, a perfectly tasty and balanced dish. I loved the lightly smoky taste. What was really heavenly was the braised red tilapia with galangal and lemongrass. OH MY GOD. It was incredibly delicious. Very tasty. Luscious. Mouth-watering. And we must mention the kindness of the staff. Linhb always showed us the correct pairings of food and sauces/dressings and cuddled us cleaning the fish, and answering our curiosities. Finally, their cold drinks are a must-have. They are from another planet.

title: Beautiful restaurant in Hue
review: Beautiful food and service at this restaurant. We had dinner on our 2nd and last night here and wish we had gone on the first night as well. The food is amazing and very reasonably priced. The service is exceptional and would return here in a heartbeat.

title: Incredible Food and Wonderful Service - A Must-Visit in Hue!
review:
Incredible Food and Wonderful Service - A Must-Visit in Hue!
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
If you are visiting Hue, do yourself a favor and eat at Chan Restaurant. We loved it so much that we actually went twice during our stay!
The food here is absolutely fantastic. They serve incredibly delicious local dishes (their specialty claypot rice is amazing), but what really impressed us was the sheer variety on the menu. They have a huge range of dishes that cater to literally everyone—whether you are looking for fresh seafood, hearty meat plates, or dedicated vegetarian and vegan options. Everything we ordered across our two visits was packed with flavor and beautifully prepared.
Beyond the great food, the staff truly made our experience special. They are so lovely, genuinely welcoming, and speak very good English, which made ordering and asking for recommendations an absolute breeze.
If you want a memorable meal in a beautiful setting with top-notch service and a menu that accommodates any dietary need, Chan Restaurant is the place to go. Highly recommended!

title: Best Vietnamese food !!!
review: The food was absolutely amazing and so tasteful, our host Kieu vy was really nice and helpful.

title: Delicious food and lovely staff.
review: We had a warm welcome from the team and Tran was fantastic looking after our table. And the food was delicious!

title: Very nice place
review: Restaurant was highly recommended when we arrived in the city. The food was amazingly good, our waitress Thu was very helpful because we wanted to order way too much food and she was totally right in slowing us down. She had lots of advice for us and we thank her very much for that.

title: An excellent experience. Do give it a try if you are in Hue.
review: Linh, our waiter, was wonderful. He helped us in several respects, and even demonstrated how to eat our dessert, which is apparently a Vietnamese delicacy, The restaurant is great and very authentic. Indeed most of the diners seemed to be locals. Well worth a visit if you are in Hue.

title: Excellent dîner découverte
review: The restaurant was recommended by our private local driver, the food was amazing ! We had a great time. Special thanks to Thu for her service and kindness ♡

title: Best Restaurants in Hue
review:
We took 2 tasting dishes and the flavors were incredibly good. Our waitress Nguyen was dedicated to us and brought us supplements to our meal for free to introduce us to new flavors.
We recommend 100%.

title: Great and yummy family visit in Hue
review: Truly deserved best restaurant when you want to try authentic local food. Dishes are delicious, totally affordable and worth it. Service is excellent and especially Thu gave us a really great experience.

title: Great food & excellent service
review: We had a really lovely meal, with excellent service provided by Thu. She talked us through what we were eating and how to eat it as some things were completely new to us! We will be recommending to our friends.

title: Had dinner and drinks
review: Our waiter, Thu was great. The food was excellent. There was a slight language barrier b/c we speak English but Thu and the rest of the staff did everything to make sure our experience was good.

title: Be sure to try it out!
review: We were sent here by our hotel on recommendation and did not regret it! Delicious Vietnamese food, menu for two in different variations. Thu, our waitress took great care of us, explained everything, showed, sensational!

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review:
Very nice experience in this restaurant! The dishes were really delicious, and special mention for fried squid: perfectly crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, and absolutely tasty. A real treat!

The service was just perfect: welcoming, attentive and professional from start to finish.

A special mention for Thu, thank you for your kindness and professionalism 🙏

I recommend without hesitation!

title: Wonderful food & service
review:
Excellent food . We tried a taster menu recommended by our waitress Kieuvy , it was delicious and I would highly recommend the restaurant.
Kieuvy was lovely, very smiley and chatty but efficient. She deserves recognition for her great service

What a nice evening we had !

title: What an amazing meal.
review: We had a taster menu. A bit over everything. The food was delicious, plenty to eat. Some dishes we didn’t recognise. All was all wonderful

title: Great meal
review: Delicious food and great service by Thu! Thank you!!

title: Great Hue Restaurant at chan's

title: Chan is a must try in Hue!
review:
We were looking for a Vietnamese restaurant to try close to the Hotel Saigon Morin during our first stay in Hue. This place popped up on the radar - photos of the restaurant looked interesting - and it had good reviews.

Needless to say this was one of the top five meals we experienced during the prior two and a half months in Vietnam. We tried the set menu #3. Just a fantastic meal to remember!

Special shout out to our server Mai Huong. She spoke perfect english and guided us through the courses. Thank you Mai for looking after us at Chan!

title: Thanks for this lovely evening
review: We have been traveling in Vietnam for a few days now. We have not experienced such a friendly service and extremely typical food. Our service Ngan was especially friendly and attentive thank you for this delicious food and the beautiful evening

review: Great food , lots of choice but we went for the set menu . Really authentic delicious food . Busy place with lots of character . Good service and very reasonable in cost . Definitely a place to go

title: Here the locals eat too = recommendation
review:
We visited the Chan restaurant based on the fine reviews, and the first thing that struck us was how many Vietnamese were among the guests in the almost crowded restaurant. It's usually a good sign that the locals are eating at a restaurant, and so was it here.
We received a very nice and welcoming service from Nguyen, who inter alia asked how strongly we wanted the food.
Their spring rolls are really delicious, and our main dish with chicken was also excellent.
We also got a fresh passion fruit juice, which was created to become addicted to - it was absolutely brilliant!
That we then got fresh fruit and local cake on the house for dessert, did not make the experience worse!
The price level is also extremely reasonable, so a BIG recommendation from here!

title: Perfect introduction to Vietnamese cuisine
review:
A great restaurant to get a really good impression of Vietnamese cuisine. Especially the different plates are great because you can try several dishes at the same time and get a nice overview of the variety of Vietnamese cuisine.

A special thank you to Thu, who served us very friendly and went to great lengths to provide us with the best possible service.

Everything was freshly prepared, very aromatic and with delicious spices. Whether meat, fish or vegetarian, everyone will find something here.

Clear recommendation for anyone who wants to taste authentic Vietnamese food.

title: Fantastic meal and service

A special thank you goes to our service Thu, who was extremely friendly, attentive and accommodating.

Clear recommendation. We would definitely come back!

title: A must-see in Hue

All the local specialties were delicious-morning glories stir fried with garlic, whole fried snake fish with rice paper and fish sauce; several delicious soups and tropical fruit to finish our meal. The food was very reasonably priced given the many dishes we sampled
And quality of the food. We all really enjoyed dining here and highly recommend.

I must admit that the city of Hue has disappointed me too much too loud, too much traffic and pollution and a few more or less quality activities makes me regret the choice to come there. This restaurant saves the day. The duck is excellent, pork salad and shrimp super Imperial rolls very good and a bottle of wine all for $45 Canadian wow

title: It's worth trying a different dish a second time.
review:
Thank you very much for your kind service and recommendation!
My father and I ate the recommended grilled fish, which was very crisp and crunchy. With fish sauce and ginger and lollies, it tasted very good, and a spring roll platter. You can eat spring roll sauce in all flavors. There are three options. Vegetable shrimp soup, which is also good.

title: Best Vietnamese food!
review: I came here from a local’s suggestion and this was just amazing dining right in the center of Hue. Hanh with a perfect English was very nice and helped me during my dinner. I immediately understood that I would have ordered more than one dish because everything seemed delicious. The menu (also in English) showed all of the pictures. I took a small plate of Chan’s special duck set and it was just amazing. The smoked duck was tasty and its crust was also incredible: crunchy and delicious with a Hue herb. The plate also contained duck fried spring rolls that were just an explosion of flavour especially with the fish sauce that was on the side. Not only, but the duck summer rolls were also just stunning and fresh. Hanh also asked me if I liked fish and suggested braised cobia fish with tomato and pineapple which was cooked perfectly and it was so smooth in the mouth with the sauce. The rice sauces and the fried tofu either soy sauce were the perfect companion for this experience. Just sensational! I’ll always recommend this restaurant to whoever is going to visit Hue!

review:
This restaurant was recommended by the hotel staff, and it turned out to be an excellent choice.
Chan is a wonderful place to enjoy authentic Vietnamese food in Hue.
The staff were incredibly friendly, cheerful, and welcoming. Mai Huong, who served us, was especially amazing — she was very sweet, attentive, and made the experience truly memorable. Her recommendations were excellent, and every dish we tried was absolutely delicious.
The atmosphere was relaxed and pleasant, making it a perfect place to enjoy a meal.
If you're visiting Hue and looking for great Vietnamese food with outstanding service, I highly recommend Chan.

title: One of our best dining out experience
review:
From the moment we sat down, Toan made the entire dining experience exceptional. His energy, professionalism, and genuine warmth set the tone for what turned out to be a flawless meal. Every recommendation he made was spot-on—he knew the menu inside out and guided us toward dishes that were absolute standouts.

The food arrived perfectly timed, beautifully plated, and bursting with flavor. But what took the experience from “great” to “unforgettable” was Toan’s attention to detail. He checked in at just the right moments, anticipated what we needed before we even asked, and delivered service that was both attentive and effortless.

Toan treated us like valued guests rather than just another table. That level of care is rare, and it elevated the entire evening.
