review: Good authentic food. We tried the tasty menu nr 1 and the springroll platter with different sauces and the shrimps vere excellent. All in all good experience, and the waitress, Nguyen, was very nice and helpful explaining the different courses.

title: Authentic and tasty cuisine
review: A superb experience with tasty local cuisine ❤️. Come with your eyes closed, thanks to My Tam for its impeccable service 👍

title: Great place if you are visiting Hue
review:
Food was excellent , it’s full of locals which is a good sign.
At the end they brought a complimentary dessert for us. The service was great too, specially Ms, Thuy Linh

title: A Taste of Hue's Culinary Culture
review:
We went several times for our Hue trip. The overall experience were always excellent.

Atmosphere: Chill and homey with both locals and tourists dining.
Food: Delicious and perfect serving quantity
Service: Great service by Nguyen. She is cheerful and enthusiastic. All the staff were attentive to other customers as well.
Value: Worth every penny
Wait time: minimal (10-15mins)

title: Great local food with excellent service
review:
The food is very balanced and authentic. We love the fried duck spring roll, fried fish with mango and fish sauce, and the mixed vegetable soup with crab cakes.

The service is top notch. Tran is such a lovely girl. She gave us really good recommendations on what locals eat.

title: Top notch
review: Amazing food and service. Our waitress, Ngan, provided an outstanding service worthy of the best establishment. Overall I would totally recommend this restaurant if you want to try refined and more traditional dishes that are hard to found elsewhere.

title: Great tasting experience!
review:
We had tasting menu 1 and a great meal with different tastes and combinations, including the wine. With good tips from our waiter Thu, we added some of the local spices for an ever better experience.

Everything was clean and fresh. It was a very good choice!

title: Great vegan options
review: Everything was delicious. Truong was kind and spoke good English. Check out the end of the menu to find the plentiful vegan options.

title: Definitely worth a visit - good excellent fresh and great service 10/10!!!
review: Great food and ambience - restaurant appeared full of local families plus visitors from across the globe. would defo recommend - I’m a vegetarian and Husband a confirmed meat eater and we both dined very well. service excellent.

title: Go!
review: Straight out the top drawer! Trinh was so lovely, polite and informative. The food was healthful, plentiful and delightful. It's perhaps a little more pricey than other places but it's definitely worth it, and still incredible value for money. I just did the conversion and I paid about £8 including a fancy drink! (And I'm full to the brim!)

title: Wonderful Vietnam Restaurant in Hue
review: The Chan Restaurant in Hue is nicely decorated with local Vietnam style and has a good selection of Vietnam dishes. We are a couple from England, a little unsure of what to order and Miss Huong made us feel very welcome. Chan is the perfect dinner before or after visiting ‘the beer street’ which is just behind the restaurant.

title: Fresh local food, great fish
review: We had a very delicious dinner at Chan. The fish with tomato sauce was delightful and the vegetables were so fresh. We also very much enjoyed the fruit. Thanks for taking care of us, Mai!

title: Good restaurant in Hue
review: Excellent restaurant with a mix of local people and tourist. Traditional delicious food from Vietnam. Great experience in Hue. Minh Tam who took care of us was of great help to select our food. I strongly recommend this restaurant. Philippe from France.

title: Great place
review: The place and the food were both amazing and Mai Huang was very kind and friendly! Highly recommended!

title: Very tasty
review: The atmosphere is a great tied with incredibly tasty food. Hanh offered incredible service being very friendly to my family. Food was also served incredibly quick.

title: Best!
review: Food was so good! Service was exceptional! Huygen was our server and she was great! I ordered the tofu and it was so good!

title: Authentic Vietnamese food but very welcoming to tourists
review: We enjoyed our meal. The restaurant offered authentic Vietnamese food and most of the other customers were Vietnamese, yet our waitress, Mai Huong, spoke perfect English. She was very kind and helpful.

title: Top restaurant in Hue
review: Very nice place. Good food, nice service, nice decor. An experience in Hue. Highly recommended.

title: Great Dinner
review: The food was excellent and the atmosphere was cozy, with a thoughtful balance of modern and traditional touches. Our server, Dung, provided attentive and friendly service.

title: Great food and wide choice
review:
Great food - I had a tasting menu and it was excellent!!
Linhb has been very helpful and kind with us, telling what we were eating and making sure that all was good

title: Outstanding cuisine and service
review:
Typical Hue cuisine restaurant with amazing service, presentation and great interiors.

The soft drinks are also exceptionally tasty.
Our friendly Huyen was very helpful at helping us choosing traditional Hue dishes.

title: Very good
review: As soon as I walked into the restaurant I was greeted so nicely by Mr. Tuan. All the staff were had great customer service and the food taste amazing with loads of flavor. They give you real fruit for dessert. Great food for an affordable price and music was calming.

title: Dinner in Hue
review: Really nice place, great food and the waitress Huyen very nice, very kind and extremely available. I highly recommend the restaurant

title: A must
review: Unmissable address for quality and typical cuisine very reasonable price and service very well A typical local restaurant with typical dishes and not a tourist trap! You must eat absolutely😉😋👍👍👍

title: Discover the gastronomy of Hue
review: Excellent downtown restaurant authentic cuisine the staff is very kind

title: Great food and calm ambiance!
review: Food and ambience were awesome! Staff Thu was very friendly and welcomed us very well. It was a pleasure to have a family meal here 😍

title: AMAZING
review: We have been it Vietnam for just under a month and this has been our favourite meal! Every single dish was delicious. We were served my My Tam and she was brilliant. Very friendly, polite and helpful. Really enhanced our meal. Would 100% recommend Chan.

title: Home cook style food in Hue
review: The restaurant ambiance is cozy and homely. Food is fantastic just like home cook food from a Vietnamese mother. Thu was our waitress and she gives good recommendation on choice of dishes.nice for a group of family so you can try multiple dishes

title: Excellent food with special friendly environment and staff
review: Really excellent food with plenty of different dishes. The building is really cosy and mainly wood made. As usual, staff was very welcoming and smiling. Special mention goes to Truong that took my reservation giving us a nice table close to the window. He also welcomed us at our arrival, explained us the main dishes and gave us advices on drinks and food. It was a really nice experience. Thank you

title: Great dinner place
review: The food was exquisite and Tuan’s service was very friendly and nice.

title: Great food
review:
Delicious fooooood and taste of home.
Service was also great,our server Thu was very polite and recommended us the dishes.All of them tasted great.Highly recommended to eat in centre of Hue.

title: Dinner with friends
review: We went to this restaurant for first time.. Food was delicious and Thu’s service was exceptional!! Proper Vietnamese food.

title: Great service by Thu
review: Very good experience the food was amazing. Thu was very friendly and attentive. Highly recommended.

title: Great vegetarian options
review: I'm a vegetarian, and this was one of my best meals in Vietnam. Fresh ingredients and great service - very grateful to Tuan for being so accommodating.

title: A must visit for home style Vietnamese food
review: We had a delicious meal here! There’s so many options to choose from, but everything we tasted felt home-style, which is my favourite. Will be back for more. The service was also great - we were looked after by Mr Tuan 🙂

title: Recommended Place!!
review:
The food at this restaurant was sooo yummy and delicious. We were served by Thu, she was super friendly and helpful, as she helped served our rice into our bowls and laid out our cutlery for us. The atmosphere of the restaurant was lovely and giving cultural vietnam nature vibes. The restaurant was super cosy with access to free wifi here.
Overall, i recommend visiting this restaurant!!

title: Excellent dinner
review: Very good food , excellent service , especially from the girl Nguyen that speaks a very good english . She helped me to choose the right sauce to match the food

title: Excellent restaurant in Hue
review:
Excellent food! Linhb very patiently helped us choose some very tasty local dishes from a big menu.
The restaurant is frequented by tourists and locals.

title: Local Hue star
review: Chan’s plate and duck roll platter are a must order! Lots of classic dishes done well. Delicious iced tea mocktails. Minh Tam and the team took great care of us. Complementary dessert was a nice touch. Very sweet little souvenir shop inside too.

title: Great!
review: Good service from Huyen, very enthusiastic service and very friendly. Food was great! Cozy atmosphere and clean restaurant.

title: Good food, nice place, excellent service.
review: Magnificent place to have dinner and enjoy traditional Vietnamese food. The food was really taste, and the service amazing. Special mention to My Tam who made our evening even better.

title: Amazing surprise
review: We chose it because it was close to our hotel and we were tired from the day, but I am so glad we did! The food was amazing, though we ordered too much. Tam, our server, was lovely and gifted us dessert and fruit after our dinner. A 100% recomend from us

title: Minh tam thank you
review: Minh tam recommended us excellent quality local dishes, he was very friendly in his service. Fresh and delicious food

title: Excellent dinner
review:
The food was amazing, with super local and authentic flavors.
The place has a spectacular setting and everything was really wonderful.
Our waitress Minh Tam helped us choose typical dishes and was key to enjoying the experience. Thank you so much!!

title: Cracker spot
review: Was recommended by hotel staff as authentic local food. Staff very friendly and helpful. Good atmosphere. Food was very tasty. Mr Tuan was great and attentive offering descriptions of foods

title: Best food in Vietnam!
review: This is the best food we have had on our Vietnam trip so far. Our family doesn’t eat super spicy so we ordered salt roasted chicken, sweet and sour pork ribs and slow cooked duck along with some vegetables and rice and they were so good - beautifully fresh and full of rich flavour. The drinks were also delicious - we had one of the signature non-alcoholic drinks plus some juices and teas and they were all excellent. The food was presented so well. We are grateful to the staff, especially Thanh Phuc who was so gracious and kind with us, particularly with our lack of Vietnamese language. He took time to talk to us and explain dishes when we had questions. We would highly recommend.

title: Super!
review:
Excellent food and service. Sally, the waitress, was very kind in suggesting the dishes and pampered us.
Super recommended restaurant!

title: Nice surprise.
review: Good restaurant, with a tasting menu at a very reasonable price, you can taste a variety of Vietnamese food, in a good atmosphere with vintage decor. Very well attended by My Tam

title: An amazing restaurant :)
review: My tam was our waitress for the night. Her service was wonderful and we had an amazing night. Many thanks to the chef as well, the food was AMAZING.

title: Amazing food, attentive staff
review:
Incredible food, great service. Our server My Tam made great recommendations.
Tasting menu 3 was amazing.
Especially the snakehead and the porkstuffed squid were sumptious ans flavoursome.

title: We ate extremely delicious and had a wonderfully friendly waitress, My Tam.
review:
A wonderful, very authentic, Vietnamese restaurant with super delicious cuisine!
Also priced perfectly fine. Very cheap by German standards.

title: Very good
review:
Excellent experience,
Good place to try typical Vietnamese dishes!
The staff is friendly and very helpful. They can help you to select dishes on the menu.
I recommend if you're in Hue.

title: Charming meal
review: Thu was extremely helpful and gave us excellent, caring guidance throughout. We loved the little mussels especially. Thu also gave us some fruit and a local dessert. Thank you!

title: Excellent restaurant
review: The food was excellent. We particularly enjoyed the tiny mussels. We were served by Thu who was fantastic - very attentive.

title: Great food, service and vibe in Hue
review:
Me and my husband had a wonderful evening at Chan. The food was authentic and tasted great (we chose menu 4). The prices were more than affordable, big recommendation on the home made ice tea as well.

Great service from My Tam helped us with all our questions and requests and was fluent in English, which helped a lot.

Summarized we can only recommend going here to get the true Huè vibe with a buzzing atmosphere.

title: Stumbled across this gem of a place
review:
Unexpected Gem in Hue – 5 Stars All the Way!
We stumbled upon My Tam by pure chance, and it turned out to be the culinary highlight of our Vietnam trip. The food was absolutely phenomenal—fresh, vibrant, and bursting with authentic flavor. Every dish was a delight, beautifully presented and full of character.

What truly elevated the experience was the service. Our waitress, Hien, was warm, attentive, and genuinely passionate about making our visit special. She made us feel like honored guests and added a personal touch that we won’t forget.

If you're in Hue, don’t miss this place. It’s a hidden treasure.

title: Top quality and delicious hue specialities
review: Food bursting with flavour and delicious range of hue specialities on offer. The mini muscles salad and banana flower salad particularly tasty. Highly recommend if passing through Hue. Impeccable service from Nguyen too.

title: Evening in Hue
review: Great food! Choice of varied fish. Excellent advice and kindness of Linhb! Super recommended Combia fish and squid!

title: Fabulous Food
review: The food was delicious, we had the tasting menu #1. Very enjoyable. Staff were great, our waitress Nguyen was sweet, friendly and very helpful with a big smile.

title: Great Hué food, relaxed atmosphere.
review: Very good food, relaxed atmosphere, friendly staff (waitress Th Bot was very helpful) and very well located.They serve typical Hué food. It is a place where you can stay a bit longer after diner, which is not always common in Vietnam.

title: Elegant and cozy restaurant in Hue
review:
Very elegant restaurant in Hue center, cozy ambiance and music. The menu offers a huge choice, perhaps too huge - as a foreigner, it can be overwhelming! We selected 2 fixed menus and they were quite good, also quantitywise.
Staff is superfriendly, and our waitress Thu has been perfect, very nice and ready to attend all our needs and answer all our questions!

Everything great
Tried the menu ‘n2
Very tasty fish
Fabulous eggplant
Really Hue is the home of good food!
Thu the girl who served us attentive and talented

title: Authentic Vietnamese restaurant
review: Our hotel recommended this restaurant and we really enjoyed it. Thu our waitress explained all the dishes to us and recommended what to eat fit a true Vietnamese experience

title: Perfect experience
review:
We went to Nha Hang Kinh Do 2 restaurant in Huế (Vietnam), and the experience was unbeatable. From the start, Linh B.’s attention was excellent: he was always watching us and made us feel at home.

The food was delicious, from start to finish, and the atmosphere of the place is very pleasant, with background music that allows to talk without problem.

In short, a highly recommended place: a 10 in all aspects.

title: Very good food and atmosphere
review: Although the menu may seem a little overwhelming from first to other places in Vietnam, we ordered broccoli with prawns, rice, pork rolls and juices, it was all great and the staff, especially Linhb's. Thank you so much for everything!

title: Amazing traditional food
review: We ordered the spring rolls and a meal of shrimps. Everything was excellent, and Hanh’s service was perfect! I highly recommend this place if you want to eat traditional Vietnamese food.

title: Great food in a great place!
review: amazing service with Hanh! The spring rolls, the salt chicken and garlic shrimps were delicious. Very nice ambience! We will recommend to our friends

title: Super traditional food with best service
review: This Restaurant ist recommend by our Tour guide. It is a very tradinal vietnam restaurant, a lot local family are here too. Food arevso good, especially their staff Mrs Nguyen helped us a lot to find the right dishes we prefer. I'd love to recommend it strongly!

title: Recommended
review: Good food and well explained by both the staff and the menu. Really great service, all very friendly and helpful.

title: Great food, quick service
review:
The food was delicious and reasonably priced. Considering how busy it was, the food still came out very quickly as they have ample staff.

Recommend!

title: Holiday
review: We had a great time, exquisite food and menus for two people are well plentiful. We were followed by Mai Huong who advised well

title: Best in town
review:
Lovely restaurant, excellent food, the menù fot 600k with pork was delicious.
I would totally recommend the Place.
The kindness of Mai was unexplainable.

title: Great place for a family night out
review: Great vibes and really well cooked food. Wide menu for sampling hue cuisine. Our host Mai Huong was really attentive and explained the dishes to us well

title: A must try restaurant
review: Service was excellent, the food was delicious. We ordered the sampler plate and it was enough for 2 people. A must try restaurant if you are in Hue!

title: Great local restaurant - great food, friendly service
review:
This restaurant was recommended by a local. We enjoyed a delicious authentic local meal. So fresh, tasty & generous portions. The waitress (Thu), was great - so polite and made recommendations.
Would definitely come back and would recommend this restaurant.

title: Rich traditional food
review:
Very good food at good prices
Mr Tuan attended me very well and was attentive at all times

Local wine is okay but it's the highlight

title: Best food in Hue!
review: Some of the most amazing food we’ve had whilst exploring this beautiful city. Served by the lovely Huong, we couldn’t have been more looked after. She was extremely helpful and catered to our every request, explaining dishes to us and helping us select some incredible food.

title: Great spot for traditional cuisine
review: Delicious traditional Vietnamese foods. We loved every dish. Quick serving. Highly recommend for families and couples.

title: Unbeatable dining experience
review: Excellent experience both for the authenticity of the atmosphere and the variety and quality of the food, and for the kindness of Miss. Nguyen who attended us with great diligence and kindness. Definitely the best restaurants we have tasted on our trip through Vietnam from south to north. Highly recommended.

title: Hue dinner
review: Great local Vietnamese food of Hue. Mr Tuan made sure that we enjoyed our experience and gave advice how to mix some of the ingredients together.

title: Amazing foof
review:
Great discovery. Foosd was amazing. Our waiter Ninh Tam was really friendly. She brought us free tee and a traditional dessert.
Amazing!!!

title: A culinary experience to discover
review:
We enjoyed a very tasty Vietnamese cuisine.
My Tam our waitress was smiling, caring and very kind to us.

title: Perfect.
review: A very beautiful and lively place. A kitchen to fall. Many thanks to Minh Tam for his kindness. What to do if you boo.

title: Experience super
review: Dung served us, very good and super helpful in our requests. The food was all delicious. Thanks a lot for the experience.

title: good food
review: The food was great, the portions of the set menu are a bit too big; we are taking a full doggy bag back home. Dung took good care of us

title: The best restaurant in Vietnam
review: The best food I had till now here in Vietnam… We are already traveling several weeks and here we found our favourite food spot. THU was serving us delicious food and gave us the feeling of a home… So its not just a restaurant its a real experience. Yummi food and THU reading all your wishes from your lips before saying them. We will always come back to Chan restaurant.

title: Best restaurant on our trip
review:
nice and cleaned location
cozy atmosphere
very tasty food
very friendly and professional service.
THU was very polite ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

title: Delicious and Ambient
review: The ambience was great and food very delicious. Service by Thu was exceptional. The location of the restaurant is quite central.

title: Excellent food
review: Excellent food, we tried a variety of dishes and all were great. The service was also great, especially from our waitress Nguyen.

title: Great restaurant
review: The food was really super good and fresh. The service from Nguyen was really great and fast and the rest of the service was of course also super nice❤️

title: Super bar restaurant
review: Great food and very nice service from Nguyen. She gave great recommendations to the whole family that we followed and everyone was sooooo satisfied❤️

title: Favorite
review: Favorite for this typical restaurant. Located in a former colonial house, the atmosphere is simple and friendly in a Chinese decoration. Very attentive welcome from Sally and delicious and hearty menu testing at very sweet prices. A very nice address in Hue that I highly recommend!

title: Great dinner, amazing testing menus!
review: We loved our dinner. The testing menus are very rich and delicious. Many thanks to Sally who was very good advice for our great dinner.

title: Great experience
review: Great dinner at Chan, we were served by Sally who was very good advice and kindness. We were able to take many things to share, all for a more than reasonable price! Go ahead!

title: Great experience
review: Typical decor. Very generous dishes (we were even advised to take less!) and very good. Impeccable service. Thanks Sally!

title: Great food and friendly staff in Hue
review: We had a great experience at Ghan in Hue, amazing food and the sweet waiter, Hanh made sure we were taken good care off - the whole family recommend this place for tasty food and friendly staff

title: Incredible
review: Best food in Vietnam. Spicy, beautifully plated and so many fresh herbs and flavors. Many thanks to Sally, our lovely waitress.

title: Great food and service
review: Food was very tasty, fresh, well presented and came out quickly. Our server Huyen, was very friendly and attentive. Lovely meal. ☺️

title: Would come again
review:
Great tasting food relaxing atmosphere our food was served quick and fresh.
Huyen was super friendly and attentive. If I’m ever back in the area I’ll be back again

title: Best restaurant and meal in Vietnam
review: This is a beautiful and romantic place. Easy the best meal we had all week in Vietnam. Very tasty! The sampler menu 1 was out choice along with some tofu with shrimp and pork and all was really pleasant. And Dung, our server, did a perfect job!

title: Great food and service!
review:
Quynh Anh was a great server.

Great food, great recommendations, and very accommodating of the vegan in our party.

Authentic Hue cooking and very delicious.

title: Delicious and delicious again
review: Great and delicious food with very friendly service from Mo. We enjoyed the food very much and were advised in the selection good and detailed. We had three meals. Spring rolls, a deep-fried fish and roasted or grilled duck. Super delicious.

title: The best place to eat in Hue
review: The place and the service is exceptional, beyond and above. Food is amazing, probably just found the best place to eat in Vietnam. I had an amazing service during the dinner and during the daytime, big thanks to my waitress Vi, since she was so helpful with every concern, recommendations included.

title: Dinner time
review: It was a perfect dinner and a wonderful service! Thank you, and especially Truong for care. Details and taste was amazing

title: Awesome food and atmosphere!
review: Amazing food! There were tons of vegan options and more food than we could eat! The wait staff was very attentive and patient with helping us order.

title: Perfect gastronomic experience
review: Amazing food and service, probably for now the best place to eat in Vietnam! Big thanks to waiter Troung for help, service, kidness, must visit this place!

title: Excellent restaurant
review:
We had one of our best meals in Hue here . The restaurant itself was charming ,clean and welcoming . Service wonderful . We ordered mostly traditional dishes, and everything was delicious . Portions just right .
My Tam was our server and she was outstanding .
Highly recommend!

title: Great food and service.
review:
Great food in a cozy restaurant, good and friendly service.
We were served by ngijes and she was good and very friendly.
Apologized for delaying some dishes.
In this restaurant you can order a full menu including House wine.

title: Best Vietnamese restaurant in Hue
review: Absolutely fantastic food. A really helpful and knowledgeable waitress in Nguyen. Would recommend to anyone visiting Hue. Big thank you to Nguyen for making us so comfortable.

title: A lovely meal at Chan
review: Our dining experience at Chan was fantastic. Huyen, our waitress, was incredibly friendly, helpful, and efficient. She even went above and beyond by providing me with a half portion of the tomato tofu, which was the perfect size and delicious. The stir-fried broccoli in garlic was my favourite dish and I highly recommend it. The fresh fruit for dessert was a lovely touch. Overall, the food was very delicious and we thoroughly enjoyed our time at Chan.

title: The best food in Hue.
review:
What a lovely place,the food is the very best to date we have had in Vietnam ( we are here 3 weeks)
Huyen looked after us so well, she explained every dish to us,super lady. Mary O'Reilly Ireland 🇮🇪

title: From the relaxing atmosphere to the Metz on the plate...
review: What happiness! Minh Tam greeted us with a smile and patiently explained to us some dishes we did not know. Thank you for this moment of serenity! See you soon! 🙏🏻

title: A brilliant atmosphere
review: We had lunch right here and it was really great.Thuy Linh took care of us well.We appreciated it so much.Thank you guys!Definitely tecommend it.🤗🤗🤗

title: Delish!
review: Incredible food! My daughter and I shared the tasting set… lots of variety! Fried seafood spring rolls and egg plant were delicious. Nguyen was super attentive, polite and professional. Highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Nice traditional dinner.
review: Enjoyed our traditional meal here quite a bit. Nguyen served us and was tolerant of our ignorance of the items. She was very concerned that we had a good time. The food was good the sauces were terrific. The atmosphere felt authentic and it appears to be a favorite of many local folks.

title: Great choice
review: Fantastic experience, restaurant frequented by locals where you can taste the authentic and typical dishes of Huè!! I was really lucky to be accompanied to this restaurant. We were served by Hanh who served and advised us throughout lunch impeccably and professionally.

title: Nice experience
review: Thu served us with a smile and did his best to make us understand each other. The meal was very good and the setting clean and neat. I recommend

title: Good authentic Vietnamese food in friendly restaurant.
review: Great food and great service. It was recommended by our travel advisor as a place to go for authentic Vietnamese food, and it fulfilled our expectations. A special shout out to our waitress Mai Huong who advised & looked after us.

title: Sophisticated Vietnamese Traditional Cuisine Now Reasonable
review: It's a high-end restaurant with a very traditional and sophisticated interior. I thought there were many tourists, but it was crowded with locals. There's a set menu of several dishes for one person, and the duck dish set is pretty reasonable at 130k, with fresh spring rolls, fried spring rolls, and thinly sliced roasted herbs and noodles. There are several tasting menus, and I wanted to try them, but this one is for two. The staff were always paying attention to the seating area and were friendly and very courteous. I wouldn't be surprised if it was listed in Michelin.

title: Lunch at Chan restaurant Hue
review: Very nice yummy food, suited everyone in the family, reasonable price. Superb and friendly customer service. Would defenitely come back again.

title: A Hue local food dining experience worth your time!
review: Tried the platters and they were amazing. Also, got the jasmine drink and black tea drinks - they are refreshing. A restaurant that is popular amongst locals. Friendly, helpful staff!

title: Great restaurant
review:
The vegan food was great and the atmosphere was friendly and our waitress Vi was very nice and helpful
Great for our family of 5
Highly recommend

title: One of the best downtown restaurant in Huê
review: This year is the second year that we return to this restaurant which is so authentic. The Huê local dishes are exquisite. Our table is occupied by the waiter named Tuấn, a gifted boy dedicated to his customers. An address to recommend.

title: Amazing
review:
Mr Tuan was incredible! I work in customer service back in UK and I was amazed by his level of service.
He was very friendly and gave his recommendations on what dishes we would like.
The food was amazing and we tried some traditional Vietnamese spices with the rice which was incredible! The food here is beautiful. Very friendly staff and great venue and atmosphere.
He also gave us some local desert to try.
5 star service!

title: Delicious food and service
review: I came here after a recommendation from my taxi driver and I had delicious food, caramelised pork with stir fried greens in lemongrass and garlic, great portion size and very tasty especially the condiments with the pork. The prices are slightly higher than I’ve paid in other parts of Vietnam but the atmosphere and service more than makes up for that. Mr Tuan, my waiter, was so friendly and very helpful with my food allergy. Definitely pay them a visit if you’re in Hue.

title: Recommended
review:
Walking through the streets of Hue, we found this beautiful place, full of life, we tasted some delicious dishes that we would certainly request again, but far the best was the attention of My Tam.
100% recommended place

title: A must for eating Hue specialities
review: Fantastic place! We had Sunday lunch and got good guidance from Mai Huong who explained the different dishes and how to eat them. Everything was delicious. Mai Huong was very nice and accommodating. Highly recommend a visit to this restaurant. We will gladly come back again.

title: Wonderful dinner with my wife
review: I went to have dinner with my wife and My Tam made our experience really nice. She’s been very kind and has paid lots of attention to us.

title: Wrapping our trip up with a refined comforting family style cooked meal
review:
This is a beautiful establishment, a mixture of traditional styles with modern refinement. Mum and I have been craving com gia Dinh (family home style meal) and we waited 4 weeks (our final week!) traveling around Vietnam to finally satisfy our tastebuds with comforting dishes.

We were served and guided by Huyen, her adorable and gentle energy made our experience very welcoming and pleasant. She provided us with a lot of attention and care as we were asking extra stuff. Such a radiant and delightful character.

We chose the set menu 01 which was 565k VND, SO WORTH IT!!! All the dishes were unfamiliar yet familiar compared to Australian flavours.

The signature tea mocktails were delisssshhh! The banana flower soup with mussels and braised cobia in claypot were my favourite however all the dishes hit the spot. I rarely had rice this whole trip, and the simple details of rice cooked in claypot style, added the extra level of depth I didn’t know I needed. Everything was excellent, we couldn’t finish everything so we’re taking the dessert home with us.

Simple and polished. We couldn’t ask for a better last dinner and night in Hue for the time being.

title: Dining experience
review:
So friendly and warm welcome !!!!!!!!!!!!!
The food and drink is nice~~~~~
Also, the restaurant has the soft music background

title: Wonderful
review: Great experience! Especially My Tam gave us wonderful service, you can share food with your friends, that’s pretty nice for tourists!

title: Very good restaurant
review: Trinh is an excellent waitress, very nice and smiling. Very good meal. Warm atmosphere, very well placed. I recommend.

title: Great food, lovely stuff and nice atmosphere
review: Lovely atmosphere and Truong our waiter was really attentive, helpful and patient! The menu is great and the food was excellent. Even got some complementary appetisers and watermelon for dessert. Slightly on the pricier side but good value for the quality :)

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review:
Hotel front desk staff recommended this restaurant and it’s a great choice if you want to enjoy the typical Hue cuisine.

Nguyen was superb , she recommended excellent dishes and we had a great time

title: Great food with excellent service
review:
Nguyen's attention was great and the food very good.
Good atmosphere, quiet despite being next to the pedestrian street.

review:

title: MR.TUAN IS THE BEST
review: Mr.Tuan provided great service. Great food and atmosphere. Place was recommend to us and I highly recommend for a nicer dining experience.

title: We came to Vietnam for our 30 year ann0ivesary. We wanted to do something special, and it did not disappoint.
review: Very central. Lovely atmosphere. Food excellent. Service very good Ngiyen was excellent waitress. Very attentive. Great value for excellent food. Got table straight away.

title: A great place to!
review: Wonderful place with amazingly friendly waiters like Truong. Service was fast and excellent. I will definitely go there again.

title: Most Authentic Hue Food
review:
Mai Huong was our staff who attend to the 5 of us on a lovely 9th December 2025 dinner. We prebooked our dinner a few hours in advance! She was attentive in serving us & constantly explained to us the small various plates of sauces!

The Dia Lon (Normal plate : Pork & seafood platter) was the highlight of the day!
The platter consist of mushroom rolls with lotus roots , fresh shrimp rolls with pork , rice cake roll with white pork belly , deep fried seafood spring rolls & triangular pork spring rolls!

🙂🙂

title: Amazing food. Beautiful Vietnamese decor. Excellent service

The restaurant is a beautiful space to eat traditional Vietnamese food and the staff were very attentive, and especially the service from our hostess, Dung, was 5 stars! Excellent all round, the food was served quickly with great presentation, and I would eat here 7 days a week.

Thanks to Nhi!

title: Chan in Hue

The restaurant had a very relaxed atmosphere, the food was delicious and Huyen, our waitress, was the nicest person.

We also got the eggplant which was great, and a chicken dish we loved. I would not recommend the roasted duck. Other than that dish we loved our meal
and the staff.

If you are exploring the Imperial City, be sure to stop by this lovely restaurant for an authentic and enjoyable dining experience.

title: Very very good

Huyen gave us some great recommendations as we were ordering and was super attentive! Also the restaurant is beautiful. After dinner I walked around and took pics of the ceramics and tiles.

We had the lychee and the Jasmin ice tea - delic.

title: Culinary experience in Hué with great service

We took the menu tasting three which is more than enough for two people and very fine. The best food we've had so far in Vietnam.
HUYEN has served us really top and very attentive and also advised well in the wine Vaal. We were allowed to taste the wines before the election and chose the Italian wine that tastes better to us. All in all a very good experience for a dinner.

review: We had a phenomenal meal ! We ordered Salt-roasted chicken, Semi fried pork ribs with sweet and sour sauce, stir fried morning glory with garlic and rice. Everything was delicious and Minh Tam was a very gracious host. Thank you !

title: Real Vietnamese food
review: Great Vietnamese food. With the good recommendations of our waitress Thu, my portion but also the level of spiciness was just right. Nice atmosphere in the restaurant!

title: Amazing Dinner Experience
review:
I had thought that Vietnamese food is mostly street eatery - sandwich, pho, bun cha… I was so wrong when I had the delicious 3-course meal at Chan in Hue.

The restaurant is very cozy and with local decorations, even the porcelain they chose. The food… is simply delicious.

Try the roast duck - it’s a bit on the chewy side but very flavorful if you enjoy glazed meat in onion and scallion sauce.

The tiny mussels with glass noodle plus peanut is a very interesting dish! They don’t taste like mussels, but little pods of freshness. So good when mixed with peanuts and with rice cracker! Very sophisticated experience on your taste bud.

The veggie dish of poached gourd with shrimp & pork paste is also a great salad / side dish.

Lastly, their service is so friendly, attentive and warm. The waitress THU helped me with ordering and suggesting local flavors, while steering me away from ordering the same tastes. Thanks to her, I was able to get as many food experiences as possible!

An utterly pleasant experience. Would love to come back next time I’m in Hue, hopefully when it stops raining!

title: Perfect for a quick bite!
review:
Looking for a quick bite because we still had to catch the night train, we ended up in this restaurant, with Vietnamese cuisine. So we were not able to take an extensive menu here, but each chose a small dish. Tastes were good, service was also fine. It's not super cozy sitting there, but that didn't matter to us.

We ate the springrolls and the tofu in tomato sauce, got a few snacks in advance and a free dessert (fruit and Vietnamese cake).

We were helped by My Tam, she was extremely friendly and helpful in choosing the dishes.

title: Meal with family
review: I went for a meal with my family here in the evening, the food was amazing. Our server was Mai Huong who was super attentive and very helpful with everything. The resturant had a great atmosphere and the cost was great value for money. Would recommend coming here.

We had a vegetarian option which was absolutley outstanding. There were about 5 different main dishes ( we struggled to get through them all) , all incredibly fresh and flavoured to perfection. Thu and all the staff were really attentive and helpful. I can honestly say it was the best vegetarisn meal I have ever had - I would definitley recommend.

title: My taste buds say Hue has the best VN foods!
review: I was served by My Tam a super friendly and generous staff at Chan restaurant in Hue, Vietnam. I really appreciate My Tam's brief explanations about my selected menu items both the main and side dishes and drinks. Although the price of the food is a bit higher than normal restaurants, the quality is top notch and honestly one of the best among the restaurants I have visited/ordered throughout my trip in Vietnam (Hanoi, Da Nang and Hue). Vietnamese cuisine in Hue overall is mostly delish - everything I've tried from Singapore-style frog, pandan leaf congee, fish noodles soup, (spicy) fried chicken and spaghetti to vegan food near the imperial palace tastes so good! Highly recommend Hue for the food and historical/cultural tours!

title: Special tiny mussel dish from hue
review:
Lovely experience in this local food restaurant. I took the special dish Hen xao xuc banh Trang (stir fried tiny mussels) and it was very tasty.
Hanh was very welcoming. I appreciate the iced tea and sticky rice dessert gifts.
Comfortable place :) I recommend

title: Delicious Chan after.
review: It tastes good and especially the server vgc was friendly. Hanhman was also friendly. chan the food is very delicious.

title: Great food and lovely staff
review:
If you are in Hue can completely recommend this restaurant. We saw the locals were dining there and the staff were brilliant recommending what to have from the menu and were very attentive but not intrusive. Made
To feel very welcome by M Huong Thank you xx

title: yummy
review:
Thanks for recommendations from waitress named Nguyen.

The meal was absolutely delicious! Every dish was fresh, colorful, and full of authentic Vietnamese flavors. The spring rolls were crisp and light, while the grilled pork and rice noodles were perfectly seasoned. The presentation, with beautiful carrot flowers and dipping sauces, made the meal even more enjoyable. Highly recommended for a true taste of Vietnam!

title: Good food to eat
review: Nguyen is very friendly to recommend us the good dishes. The food is very authentic. We enjoy the vibe here and highly recommend tourists to come can ask friendly staff for advice for all the cuisines.

title: A lovely evening meal in Hue
review: Probably our most enjoyable meal out in Hue. Lovely atmosphere, amazing staff and delicious food. A wide range of choices. Very reasonable prices. Our waiter, Cuong, was terrific. We woukd be happy to return if staying longer in Hue.

title: A great way to sample different dishes!
review:
We had a delicious lunch here, choosing tasting menu 3 for the two of us. There was plenty of food and each plate was as tasty as the last!!
Our server Hong Vy was helpful and friendly and showed us how to pair the right sauces to the right dishes for the best experience.
Would recommend!

title: Wonderful
review: The food was fabulous and super delicious. We were a group of 9 people, and Hahn was so patient with us. She was very kind and helpful. We’ll definitely come back when we’re in Hue again.

title: Super Vietnamese cuisine
review: Had a menu for two including wine and dessert. It all tasted great. Very nice staff. I highly recommend it.

title: Best food & service!
review:
We’ve visited several cities since arriving in Vietnam, and our dinner at Chan has been the food highlight of our trip so far!
The caramelized pork belly, sweet & sour chicken, and our duck entrée starter were all absolutely delicious. A big thank you to our wonderful hostess, Mai Huang, for being so friendly and helpful. If you’re in Hue, this restaurant is an absolute must-visit!

title: Food excellent. Service great.
review: So you’re in Vietnam and you made your way to Hue You need to get to Chan for some Great food and service by Nguyen! Excellent food and priced very reasonably This is a choice in Vietnam that you will not regret Thanks team and chef for a great time

title: Delicious! Great service.
review: Amazing food! So flavourful. Nguyen our waitress was absolutely amazing. Such great service! The complimentary watermelon was so lovely.

title: Très bonne cuisine, bonnes portions !
review:
Spring rolls are exquisite (duck too)
Very good cuisine, beautiful plates and good portions
Staff is kind and explain how to eat everything
Thx My Tam !

title: Lunch at Nha Hang Kinh Do 2
review: The food was delicious and the restaurant had ample fans so that it was nice and comfortable after a long day in the heat . Minh Tam also provided excellent service

title: Expectacular food and swrvice
review: Spectacular local food, everything was great. We came recommended by the grab driver and it was a hit. Minh Tam attended us phenomenal, recommended everything we had to ask for and providing us with an especially good meal. We will repeat without a doubt.

title: Very good place!
review: We went to eat and everything was great!!!!😍😍 has been attended by Minh Tam, super friendly and attentive. We have eaten amazing 🥰

title: Amazing food
review: The restaurant was recommended to me by a Vietnamese friend, and I don't regret my choice. The food was very, very good and traditional. It's the real thing from my childhood, and the waitress, Ngan, was helpful and gentle. I'll definitely be back.

title: Food & Mr.Tuan
review:
We got a free desert and it was very good and tasteful. Mr.Tuan was kindly and friendly.
The food was good and it looks beautiful.

title: Must try
review: Amazing service, the food was so authentic and flavors incredible good and different from other parts of Vietnam. 🇻🇳

title: Great food
review: Great food and great taster plates! Mr Tlian was very friendly and helpful staff would highly recommend for anyone looking for tasty food in Hue

title: Good local food
review: We had a really nice dinner at Chan. We enjoyed good local food. There were tourists and local in the restaurant. The staff was friendly, we got helped by Phue.

title: Perfect experience in Hue
review: Food was awesome, and our waitress Vy C was really nice and so kind, she did everything to make us feel confortable. The restaurant is also super clean and has a really nice Atmosphere

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review: Very good restaurant in the heart of Hue. We shared different dishes and had a great time! Thanks again to Vy C for his kindness and Quality Service!

title: Delicious Food
review: Had a terrific lunch of beef with vegetables, sweet and sour calamari which was cooked to perfection, omelette with ground pork and two beers for 425,000dong. A little pricey for here but well worth it. Also came with complimentary sweet cakes and fruit tray. Everything was delicious. Staff are friendly and helpful and our server Minh Tam was lovely. Highly recommend this restaurant. Great food and great service!!!

title: The Last Dinner in Vietnam
review:
My wife and I visited for dinner.
The first order seemed to be too much for the two of us, and with the sound advice of our staff THU, we were able to have a satisfying meal that was just right in quantity and spiciness. I had a fish called cedar, and it was delicious.

title: Great restaurant in Hue to try!
review:
We had dinner in this restaurant because it is close to our hotel, in a very central area of Hue, a few steps from the New walking street.

The food is great and plentiful: we soon have fried eggplants in fish sauce, Vietnamese rolls and meatballs, all accompanied by the classic steamed rice!

All delicious and quality!

We were followed by Nguyen who was very kind and friendly!

Good value for money!

If you pass through Hue, we recommend this place!!

title: Menu with authentic Vietnamese
review:
Delicious genuine Vietnamese food in Hue.
We ate a menu, well, plenty and deliciously cheap.
KIEU VY looked after us beautifully.

title: Traditional Vietnamese cuisine, delicious and inexpensive
review: This restaurant was recommended to us by our driver who took us on a field trip. When he heard that we wanted to taste Vietnamese cuisine, he took us to this place and said that he himself often dined here. We ordered meat, rice and salads, everything was delicious and fresh. The Linhb waiter helped to choose the dishes from the menu and was very polite to us 👍🏻 our order came quickly, we enjoyed eating and went on to get to know the beautiful country of Vietnam 🇻🇳 thank you for your hospitality ♥️

title: Awesome spring rolls!
review: Delicious fried pork spring rolls and morning glory!! Nguyen our server was very friendly with great recommendations! We will be back.

title: Delicious!
review: Wonderful, tasty meal served by very friendly and attentive staff (shout out to My Tam). Particularly liked the tasting plate, very delicious.

title: A lovely Lunch in Hue
review: We have a wonderful food, local, friendly and Nguyen do it fell me like in home she is a wonderful professional. I recommend to everyone.

title: Good and hearty dinner
review:
Good dinner with very extensive menu!
Served free rice with typical sauces as an appetizer and fruit after dinner. Staff really very friendly and welcoming!
Welcomed and served by the waitress My Tam, really courteous and prepared!

title: Superb meal
review: Tasting menu was superb and a real taste of local Vietnamese cuisine. Thu made sure we had an excellent dinner experience

title: Great spot to try Hue food
review: The food was delicious. We tried some of the Hue Specialties and they were great. Phuc was a really nice and friendly server! All the servers were really nice.

title: Incredibly good
review: Inbelievable good. Lots to choose from. I recommend mixing and matching instead of choosing the menu. We were a group of 8 and we got 9 different dishes with some double to have more vegetables. We finished every bit of it. Phuc was a great service! To be fair I speak vietnamese so it was easy to communicate

title: Authentic Vietnamese cuisine
review: Excellent value for money, we came back 2 nights in a row. We are immediately upon arrival. Never two without three, we will definitely come back tomorrow. VI. our hostess was very caring.

title: Friendly staff and delicious food
review:
I've been visiting a lot of recommended restaurants on TripAdvisor or Google Navigator and it's delicious. Morning glory fries are really delicious and they're also delicious.
My Tam staff is very friendly!
If you visit later next time, I recommend it.

title: Don't miss this, it's fantastic food and very good value
review: We stumbled on this restaurant on our first night in Hue. It was full of Vietnamese families, a good sign. Trang took care of us. She explained the menu to us in perfect English and recommended a tasting menu. The food was exceptional and included things we would never have ordered individually. Service was polite and fast. Will definitely return.

title: Lunch in Hue
review: We just had lunch at Chan. Great selection of dishes, good price and lovely service. We had the spring roll, the duck and the scrimp. All of them were fabulous. Hanh was our waitress and she was amazing, explaining the dishes and offering advice on which sauces or condiments to use.

title: Very Good with reasonable prices
review: Nice place very Good food and prices reasonable. It is worthy to visit and the Service is also very Good. Clean, Well decorated

title: Very successful evening in Hue
review: Excellent restaurant. Countless and delicious local specialties. Very attentive Service. A young woman, Thu, perfect, very kind, went out of her way for us. We'll be back tomorrow night!

title: great time
review: delicious food and incredible service, Nguyen was a wonderful hostess. we were given great portions for a good price, can't wait to come back

title: Great service ( Thu in particular) and very tasty food
review: We were very looked after by Thu tonight. Thu understood us (we’re Australian) and gave us some samples of local cuisine. The dishes we chose were very tasty, in particular the braised chicken with lemon grass. We recommend and it is easy to find in the ‘eatery ‘ area of Hue near many hotels.

title: Best food in Hue
review: Absolutely delicious local food. Our waiter Mr Juan was very attentative and ensured we were well looked after. Definitely recommend.

title: Awesome coffee, awesome food!
review: We got coffee every morning because it was close to our hotel. The coffee and service was excellent!! They had us try a special breakfast wrapped in a banana leaf, which was tasty. However, we didn’t realize until our last day that they also do a full service dinner. There were so many things we wanted to try… we got the pork ribs and the braised jackfruit. It was one of our best meals in Vietnam!

title: A great experience
review: The food was amazing, My Tam served us and was excellent. There was a big selection of dishes. We had the fish, pork belly and beef.

title: Amazing food, amazing service
review:
We went with family for a dinner, at it was amazing. Everything was extremely tasty, and Mihn Tam was our waiter who helped us tremendously with the choice in a very large menu. Food wasn't very expensive, but was very varied, and we've tried things we've not seen elsewhere - shrimp paste pork and fried fish (can't remember the name). One of our tastiest dinners in Vietnam.

Thanks to to the Chan place for a delicious experience, and to Mihn Tam for being welcoming and helpful!

title: Good food,
review:
On recommendation went here, a tasting (menu 1) taken... absolutely recommended!! Again nice service, took time for you, explained everything to us!!

Compliments to Trang!!

title: Trang
review: We were looked after by Trang and she was very friendly and attentive. He knew the whole letter by heart and with this he made us very good food recommendations. The food was very good and we were very satisfied.

title: THANKS TRANG !
review: We had a super great experience food was very good. Additionally relation quality price was very good too. Trang helped us a lot she was very nice gave us good advise and spoke good English that made our experiences as foreign better.

title: Chan
review:
Great experience!!!!
Trang provided us with excellent service, being highly professional and attentive. Very good food.

title: Absolutely beautiful experience.
review: Excellently food for a fair price. Wonderful service by Miss Trang. She gave us the right recommendations and helpful advice. We had a good time there.

title: thx
review: mr Tuan was perfect for our service, the food was good and we were happy to try local sweets at the end :) Thanks Mr Tuan !!!!

title: Meals with Tuan
review: Great meal with Tuan who was very kind and attentive with us. Thanks again. I highly recommend this restaurant in Hue

title: Great authentic cuisine
review: This restaurant was recommended by the hotel and it didn’t disappoint. Enjoyed all the dishes we had at Chan. The stand for us was the spring rolls and the squid (sweet n sour) was delicious 🤤 but we also enjoyed the prawns in coconut and the pork belly. Service was excellent and food came out very quickly. Very busy restaurant with locals and tourists. Highly recommend!! Special mention to Thu. Thank you!

title: Wonderful experience
review:
We went to Hue City for a day trip, and our hotel concierge recommended Chan for lunch. When we arrived, we noticed many families and large groups dining there—it makes sense, as the menu is perfect for sharing a variety of dishes. Since it was just the two of us, we ordered a pork and shrimp rice set, fig salad with pork and shrimp, and a duck platter.

Our favorite dish was definitely the fig salad—so unique, refreshing, and full of flavor! The service was excellent as well. Our server, Ngoc, was incredibly friendly and even recommended some local spots for us to try later for dinner.

As we were leaving, it started to rain, and Ngoc ran out to hand us two raincoats. Such a thoughtful and sweet gesture that left us with a warm impression of both the restaurant and the people of Hue.

title: Lovely, authentic, Vietnamese dining experience
review: Good food and lovely, friendly staff! Really enjoyed the roasted duck and the pack Choi with mushrooms. Lots of garlic though!

title: Fantastic experience
review:
The food was good and the portions were more than enough.
The wine was fine.
Your waitress, Thu, was not only nice, she gave us a free dessert.

title: Worth a visit for local food
review:
Out 1st time. The servixe and food are Great..authentic local cuisine
Attentive service by this lady named thu.........

title: Perfect Dinner in Hue
review: We were on a trip along the whole Vietnam and a night in Hue we saw this beatiful restaurant. The waitress Thao Nguyen was pretty kind, the service Is quite fast and the food Is really authentical and good.

title: Super
review: Super food super service! Suggest duck and catfish. Thu especially was very nice and she helped a lot. Consiglio a tutte e tutti soprattutto le famiglie e le coppie. W Ho Chi Minh

title: Traditional hue food
review: Absolutely fabulous meal (with wine) for £10 per person . Nguyen was an attentive waitress and really helpful. Particularly loved the vegan food.

title: Wonderful taste and service
review: Wonderful and varied traditional food ! Excellent and attentive service. Particularly from Mai Huong ! Thanks for the very good expérience.

title: Delicious!
review: The food is delicious, the setting is beautiful, the staff are welcoming, especially Miss. My Tam. She advised me on food and drinks! Top!

title: Good place to try Vietnamese food
review:
Services it awesome and the traditional food i interesting.
Nguyen very helpful and friendly waiter. Thanks to her we tried Vietnamese taste🫶🏻

title: Very Good Food and Exceptional Service
review: Very good dinner, abundant and exceptional Service. My Tam’s advice was to be appreciated both in the tips to choose menu and in the Service.

title: Just amazing!
review: Just amazing! Each bite transported us on an unforgettable culinary journey. The flavors are exceptionally rich, and the staff is very caring (thank you 1000 times My Tam🤩). Chan deserves the Michelin guide’s credit for his exceptional talent. A restaurant that surpasses all expectations!

title: Simply sublime
review:
Just the culinary slap of my life.
We took the pork with caramel, I have never tasted a dish of such accuracy.
A special mention to My Tam who took care of us with gentleness, kindness and kindness.

title: Beautiful experience
review: Very good food, friendly local and great Service. We derma Tam that we thank for his kindness and attention! Must try absolutely!

title: Very good
review:
Very good Service by Minh Tam. We had a really good lunch.
The dishes were very hearty and delicious.
The place is clean and nice

title: A 100% recommended restaurant in Hue
review: Delicious food, a variety of dishes typical of Vietnamese cuisine. We were attended by Trang, who guided and advised us to make our experience much better.

title: Great Vietnamese food. Waitress Trang, a wonder
review:
High quality Vietnamese food at great prices. All very good. Service from professional and friendly staff.
Especially Trang, a very nice girl who helped us in our orders.

title: Amazing!
review: Absolutely incredible food, kind wait staff (Mai hueng) and a lovely atmosphere. Will be telling all our friends to visit!

title: Explosion of flavours
review:
Excellent cuisine, tasty , hearty and very reasonable price. We went back because we were so satisfied. I also recommend jasmine tea
Thank you for the good times

title: Marvelous food!
review: We had on of our best food during our travel in Vietnam here at Chan. It is a positively busy place with very helpful waiters. Kreu Vy was our waitress and so friendly. Food came fast and we loved it. Thank you for the possibility to get to know this wonderful place!

title: Great experience!
review:
Stayed 10 days in Vietnam 🇻🇳
A friend advised us this address....
It is a total success!
There were people because we arrived at 12:15, many locals which is already a nice guarantee of quality for us. There was a bit of waiting, but the line is very well managed...
Once at the table, Service is professional and friendly from start to finish.

The dishes are delicious, everything is fair , with great seasonings and sauces! Divine, my best restaurant in Vietnam right now!
I loved it, I’ll be back and I highly recommend this address.

Thanks a lot to Minh Tam in charge of our Service.

Superbe!

title: Super expérience !
review:
Beautiful lunch, everything is excellent. Thanks Minh Tam for the service.
Beautiful place too !!
See you soon !!!!!!!

title: Dinner at Chan
review: Fabulous dinner not expensive by western standards. Banana flower salad, broccoli and shrimp and mushroom rice rolls. Trang spoke good English and steered us to the right meal choices considering we are pescatarians. Definitely eat here

title: Close to the hotel and not very expensive
review: The treatment very good, the price of drinks very well, the food varied and good dishes, the waitress Trang super lovely. They gave us dinner at 9:15 on a Tuesday.

title: Mr. Tuan will be missed till next time
review: Service is perfect. Mr. Tuan helps us alot to order. We dont speak vietnamese so he patiently translate every meal we asked him to. Taste were very delicious! Hard to find a very good restaurant like this in vietnam for me.

title: Nice try
review: The food were amazing… mr.tuan recommend to what we should try and its so good ! Love the service and vibe ! Very clean n planting also very nice !

title: Good food, and central locale.
review: Very central location. We were followed by a very nice girl with great English,Trang, suggested the best dishes and was available to every request. Good and plentiful food, prices in the norm of Vietnam. I recommend it.

title: Good experience
review: We really liked it. Very good food. Thu is very nice and helpful. Highly recommended if you want to try Vietnamese food.

title: A nice experience
review: The food was good !!!!!!!!!!!!🤗🤗🙏👍😀😊 The location was beautiful !!!!!!!!The staff was very kind 👌I will return !!!!!👍😀🙏👍

title: Meals in Hue
review:
Minh TAM welcomed us with great kindness and attention.
A delicious meal, Service with little care!
The menu to share is really the best way to feast together.

title: Good food
review:
The waitress My Tam is very professional, kind and wellcoming
Restaurant is excellent and with good food and also very clean.

title: Excellent
review: Great food and service, definitely will recommend. Apparently I have to write more words here so I'll add some filler. Atmosphere was great too.

title: Excellent
review:
The dishes are excellent and authentic.
I enjoyed it, with the caramel pork and rice cooked in a terracotta pot. I really loved the dishes are well presented and the taste goes with it. I recommend this address if you come to Hue. I think I'll be back before I leave.

title: Delicious local food!
review:
This place was recommended by a receptionist from Hoi An. Local food for locals not only foreigners.
It was really delicious. The Menü ha so many opportunities. And they offer kind of taste Menüs. We enjoyed one of those!!!
Superb!
Please visit this place.

title: Greta home cooked food
review: Huyen was a great server who gave us some good recommendations! The food felt home cooked which was a nice change of pace from the heavy street food would definitely come back!

title: Wonderful dinner
review: The waitress who attended us TRAN was very friendly and advised us phenomenal, the dinner was wonderful. A place to know if you're in Hue

title: Food Experience in Hue
review: Amazing local experience. The food is delicious. Great attention, my waitress Tran lovely. The price is very affordable. To repeat without a doubt!

title: Very nice restaurant in Hue with delicious local food
review: Very good restaurant with very nice people, Trang who was in charge of our table gave us very good advices to select the food and is really nice

title: Amazing
review:
Amazing food amazing stuff. Trang was very nice and have us very good recommendation. We loved the caramalized pork belly.
Thank you so much :))

title: Recommended site
review:
Good place to eat at a very good price we have dined well and with bottle of wine for 15€
Thank you for advising us so kindly Trang and for inviting us to fruit.
We will definitely be back!

title: Very good restaurant in Hue
review: We really enjoyed our dinner here. The food was really good and there was enough choice. The even had a lot of vegan options. Our waiters was very sweet and social! Thanks for having us here. We are definitely coming back!

title: Chan Hue Deli
review: Great experience and perfect value for money. I highly recommend this restaurant. Fantastically helped by Mr. TUAN.

title: Good ambience and friendly atmosphere
review: Quality of food was excellent, service was excellent too. The lady who was serving me her name was NGOC. Her smile was infectious. Giving a good service in a fully crowded place really needs skill, and she has got that.

title: Excellent
review: Very good food and service, enough quantity at very good prices and quality. Many Locals Eating and Very Good Place with Own Mood

title: Great food and an amazing service
review: Great food and service. Really quick and very friendly. Special thanks goes to Mr. Tuan. He had some great recommendations.

title: best food
review: Best food we’ve had in vietname, so flavorful, big recommendation do go here! Great service from THU, thank you i’ll definitely come back soon

title: Amazing dinner spot with authentic food
review: Thu was a very nice and great server. We felt very comfortable with amazing food. Many vegan options, free fruits and quick service!

title: Recommended!
review: Super Good Food with Good Service ('s Huyen)! We ate part of the dish together with the eggplant. Really good taste. Only downside is that you can't eat outside.

title: Fast and delicious
review:
Very nice Vietnamese restaurant. The food is served very fast and it's delicious !
Thanks Hongvy for your advice on the menu.

title: Highly recommended
review: Superb traditional Vietnamese food, excellent value for money and the best, Service. Thu was very helpful. Highly recommended ☺️

title: Good food
review: The food there was one of the best we’ve had in Vietnam so far, truly authentic. Our waitress, Huyen, was very kind and spoke good english, was able to help us navigate the menu and allergens in the food. Big thank you for the nice exerience!

title: Great food and service!
review:
We ate here for dinner and had one of the tasting menus and the tofu with tomato sauce.
The food was absolutely great and Thu's service was very kind and attentive.
Only one thing: the tasting menus are labled for 2 persons, but we think it would be more fitting for 3 persons.

title: Great place to eat in Huè
review: A great taste of vietnamese food in a nice atmosphere. Aubergines eith fish sauce are deliciuos!! We’d like to thank Thu for her suggestione and her help!

title: Exquisite meal in Hue - great for vegans
review:
The food was outstanding, the setting was beautiful and we had a wonderful waitress called Ntrinh who was so helpful and explained the dishes to us.

From a vegan perspective there was a huge amount of choice, the food was some of the best we’ve had in Vietnam.

title: Very good 😋 experience!
review:
We very much enjoyed our dinner at this restaurant with Vietnamese specialties.
They offer menus that allow you to test several specialties. We tested an assortment with duck. Very good.
We also enjoyed the Welcoming and Service of Ngàn who took care of us with professionalism kindness and always smiling.
All this for very reasonable prices.
We recommend.

title: Worthy Experience at the Heart of Hue
review: Mr. Tuan and Ms. Vy are the best. They accommodated me to the best of their ability. And the food? It was so good. Ordered omelette with minced pork, spring roll, and caramelized pork belly. It was a sumptuous dinner afterall. Must visit at the heart of Hue.

title: Excellent
review: Excellent food and Service at a very good price. Tran attended us and was very nice and with a smile throughout. We'll be back tomorrow.

title: Amazing authentic Vietnamesse food in a pleasant restaurant
review: I went with my couple for the first time on this restaurant while on a trip across Vietnam, and the experience could not be better. There was a lot of local food to choice, but our waitress Trang help us a lot to select delicious dishes. We were hearing piano music while enjoying our dinner and also granted with some fruit as free-dessert, whitout and doubt a restaurant to be highly recommended.

title: Great
review:
Thu served us. A wonderful representation of Vietnamese hospitality, She was very helpful and I would highly recommend this restaurant.
Food very good

title: Good proposal to eat
review:
Very Good Local Food, Untouristic Mood. Minh Tam's attention was delicious.
Extensive hours and air-conditioned.

title: Very good restaurant
review: Beautiful. We feasted in this traditional Vietnamese restaurant. Many thanks also to mr. Tuan for a great Service!

title: Excellent Service and Exquisite Food
review:
Mai Huong was lovely. I went to dinner alone and recommended everything perfect. Very attentive and helpful.
The food was delicious and the Service was excellent.
Highly recommended!

title: Best Vietnamese food for now
review: We had dinner with my wife and I at the restaurant and not only is it a very nice place inside, the food and staff is amazing. They have many dishes and at first we didn't know what to order and finally our waitress Trang recommended a caramelized pig that was crazy , some prawns with vegetables and garlic that are the best we have eaten also ordered a set of duck rolls that were very good and some small mussels with vegetables and peanuts that we would definitely order again. Really if you come to this area go eat here because my wife and I have loved it and the treatment of the staff is incredibly friendly. 100% recommended

title: Lovely local cuisine and atmosphere
review: We really enjoyed tasting some of the delicious local dishes. The service was great and the portions generous . Also liked the complimentary fruit and peanut chilli salt

title: Delicious food and perfect service
review: A wonderful dinner. The food was exquisite, thanks to Trang we ordered the right amount and were able to order different dishes than we had been ordering throughout the trip. It was an absolute success to choose this restaurant for our visit in Hue. The place is nice and the Mood totally local and very very nice. If you want to eat delicious and live an authentic experience this is the place.

title: A traditional and unique place.
review:
A magnificent dinner in a very special place. Very Tasteful and Local Mood. He attended to the thousand wonders Trang and helped us choose. All the exquisite dishes but I highlight the stewed eggplants and sweet and sour pork.
A place to remember for its warm treatment and for its delicate taste.

title: Delicious and authentic food
review: Here they serve authentic Vietnamese food from this region. Very big plus is that they have different tastings for 1-2 people or for 3-4. And it was so good!!! Tried two different ones and almost licked the plate off. Also very friendly staff, Mr Tuan was a top host!! Definitely recommended

title: Best experience
review:
I have been travelling around Vietnam for more than a week by now and this was genuinely the best food I’ve had so far, the restaurant looks nice and is very comfortable and clean. The staff is also really friendly like our waiter mr.tuan
I would definitely recommend this place!

title: Wonderful food and service- perfect for vegans!
review: The food and service here were excellent! We came with a vegan and vegetarian and the options offered were really good and properly vegan! We were served by Kieu Vy who ensured all our requirements were met and was helpful in her recommendations! Would definitely recommend this to all especially vegans looking for Vietnamese food! The best meat we’ve had in Vietnam so far!

title: Beautiful surprise!
review: Fantastic experience in Hue! Trang was very kind and super hospitable, making us feel immediately at home. The food is authentic, tasty and really delicious. A must-see if you are in the area!

title: To be redone
review:
Exceptional setting
Very good food
Were served by Linh B what it is shown very professional and charming
Experience to be renewed

title: Really good restaurant
review:
I had a really great experience at Chan restaurant ! The waiter Trinh was really attentive, caring and kind with us.
Also, the food was delicious.
Super place and we would like ro point out Minh Tam, she was so nice!. The restaurant is really charming and you can taste Hue food.

title: Top service and food
review: Incredible for sophistication and choice options. Mai HUONG treated us excellently recommending us dishes appropriation To our wishes

title: Cham
review: Great food we had two menus and had more than enough. Our waitress trang was great. fair prices and great food.

title: Great fish!
review: Great service from Mr. Tuan and delicious braised fish! Very nice that they brought us watermelon after the meal in addition to the pork with lemongrass before the meal.

An excellent experience in every way

Everything at Chan Hue Deli has seemed very good, but we want to highlight especially the treatment of waitress My Tom, who was lovely and made us feel at home from the first moment. Even though the restaurant was full, the Waiting time was surprisingly short, even without a reservation.

The food is homemade, typical Vietnamese, with authentic and well prepared flavors. In addition, they have a selection of very special teas that are worth trying.

A highly recommended restaurant, both for the Quality of food and the Excellent Service. We would come back without hesitation!

title: Good food and great service!
review:
I had one of the chef's plates (the one with duck). It was reasonably priced for a busy restaurant in the tourist area and really quite delicious!
My server, Ly, was incredibly helpful and showed me what to do with the condiments. :) She's was also very attentive.
I would definitely recommend a dinner here.

title: Delicious food and friendly staff
review: Food was unique and delicious and the environment was lovely. We were assisted by Thu who was super friendly and helpful.

title: A great experience. Very good food
review:
We found this place through Tripadvisor and we were pleasantly surprised. A room where a lot of people come but everything is very well organized. The food is very good. There is a choice of different menus so you can eat varied without choice stress.
Our waitress Trang was very helpful and explained in detail how we combined everything best. Superb Service!

title: Best Dinner in Hue
review: We had the best dinner - have been multiple times. The food is fantastic. Special mention to our waitress My Tam who was so most attentive and helpful. Would recommend to everyone who visits Hue!

title: Great food, service and experience in Hue
review: This restaurant was outstanding, food was so good and our waitress Tran was very helpful. Definitely come here, highly recommend.

Typical dishes very well made
Warm Welcoming and Satisfied Guests
I recommend stopping occasionally

title: Authentic tasty food
review: I went there today to have dinner, and it was delicious! Everything was perfect, every dish was tasty. The atmosphere was pleasant and full of local people. We were served by Truong, who was very kind and professional when we asked him some questions about the menu. I'd definitely recommend it !

title: Perfect Food and Service!
review:
Mr.Tuan is the best responsible, he treated us like a king, very helpful and very attentive..
Recommended 100% Loved all the food

title: Great meal
review:
This foodbwas great with my tam.

Good atmosphere. We loved the service, and the food was here pretty quickly.

Was a good time

title: One dinner in Vietnam
review: This spot is very good, confortable. Mr Twan is very professional and courteous. The food is typical of Vietnam’s cousine.

title: To try absolutely!
review: Really delicious! All the dishes were delicious! (See photo for details). Excellent Service from Thu, who saw that we were not familiar with the dishes so she took the time to explain. She also seriously considered my allergies. When she realized that she had brought us a chicken dish with the bones, she offered to change it for a boneless one. Since we wanted to eat like the locals, we tasted the dish and she showed us the wet towels to wash our hands. One of the best restaurants we have tried since our arrival in Vietnam!

title: Amazing restaurent!
review: Incredible service! Amazing dishes and big variety, everything was delicious and our waitress, Thù was really helpful and sweet. 100% recommended!

title: Best dinner in Hue
review: Service is good and staff is friendly. They also have staff who can understand English and it’s really helpful for tourists!

title: Great.
review: The waitress My Tam is a very caring, lovely, gentle lady, this restaurant blends Chinese cuisine, the music is also comfortable, and the harmonization is essential.

title: Best food of Vietnam!
review:
We just walked by the place looking for food. The restaurant look very cozy en was full of families.

The moment we walked in the staff was very friendly helping us with choosing the food. We've got 3 tasting bowls to try when we chose what we wanted to eat.

Thu was our waitress. She was very friendly, asked a couple of times if we needed anything en made sure our experience here was perfect.

Thank you for the fantastic food. It was the best we had in Vietnam so far.

title: Not to be missed
review: This place did not disappoint! We walked past Chan's the night before and dismissed it however went in tonight after looking at the menu. As a couple travelling with one vego and one anything goes I have found it hard to find food that really satisfied us both. We opted for the vegan set menu which had an amazing amount of food. The flavor profiles and quality are some of the best food we have had in our entire trip. I strongly recommend.

title: Lekker eten in Hué
review: Took a menu and that was delicious! Service was great too! Ngoe helped us super and explained what everything was. Top experience!

title: A nice dinner experience in Hue
review: The restaurant surpassed our expectations even though we had been recommended to come here. We left with full stomachs and big smiles on your faces. Our waitress, Thu, did an excellent job. She was friendly, swift and very professional.

title: Very tasty food
review: Food was great, very tasty. Best food I had in Vietnam. We had pork and chicken dishes. My Tam was helpful with explaining the dishes.

title: Great meal for typical Hue food
review: This restaurant was specifically recommended by hour hotel and it was an amazing experience. Great food, of the local area and we were all the way taken great care of by Mr. Tuan. Thank you for a great meal!

title: Very good restaurant
review:
Very good food. All the dishes were tasty and original. Welcome and impeccable service. The place is very frequented so necessarily a little noisy, but the tables are well spaced.
Our waitress THU was great.

title: We ate there and were served by a super friendly lady My Tam who always served us with the smile
review:
The lady My Tam who served us has always served us with the smile and she also helped us with ordering to explain what it all was.
The food was super tasty and would recommend it to anyone.
If you are also served by My Tam, your evening can no longer go wrong.
