title: My Tam super sweet waitress and super good food.
review:
Super smooth service and a very sweet and competent waitress. My Tam.
We have been in Vietnam for 4 weeks but this was really the best so far. We recommend Chan to everyone.

title: Delicious
review: Best food and service in Hué. Verry friendly (My Tam) explaining what we ordered and which saus was with what dish. Excellent.

title: Delicious restaurant with great service and gluten free options
review: Huge menu with lots of delicious Hue delicacies. Thu was an amazing waitress and helped us choose dishes that were appropriate for me/gluten free. They were very careful and took my gluten free card to the chef. We have been twice with different dishes each time and all were very good. The jasmine iced tea is delicious. Highly recommend. Thank you for your care and attention Thu!

title: I’ll come back!
review: Amazing food and service! I was here with friends and we tried a lot of tipical dishes. Thanks to Mintam for the service!!!

title: Amazing :)
review: Great dinner. I came back after 4 years and it did not disappoint. Great food and amazing staff. My Tam was the best, she helped us chose the dishes and her suggestions were really valuable! Thank you :)

title: Great food, friendly staff and good atmosphere
review: Great spot to try many different Vietnamese dishes-My Tam was very helpful and friendly- she recommended some great picks!

title: Great experience at Chan!
review: Excellent food and My Tam was a great waitress! Would recommend to anyone visiting Hue! The menu is extensive and rich in variety.

title: Great good!
review: We had a great meal at Chan - we were pretty late choosing where to go but went to Chan based on the reviews. We weren’t disappointed. Our server Thu was super helpful and even helped scrape the crispy rice out of our clay pot!!

title: Incredible
review: This restuarant was recomended to us by a local. We dined in on a Sunday evening and the place was full. There was a bit of a wait to get in but it was worth it. The menu is very comprehensive with options for everyone. Me and my partner tried the set menu 2 whitch was an assortment of local dishes. Everything from the apetizers to the drinks that we ate were amazing. The prices are fair for the quality and quantity of the dishes. Our waitress was Thu and she was very professional. She spoke English fluently and described the menu for us. We highly recomend this restuarant! Thank you!

title: A great place to have dinner
review:
Was in table of 7 so had a broad overview thanks to food sharing.
Everything was tasty, smooth pure tastes no corners cut, but would definitely highlight the tofu (best I had so far, especially in tomato and lemongrass sauce) and the iced teas! Service was excellent, thank you Thu ;)

title: Too good 😋👍
review: Tham our waitress was really friendly to our well advised listening I even believe it is our best meal in Vietnam!! Only flat too much noise

title: Ambitious and extremely well executed dishes. Clay pot rice for the win.
review: Spectacular Vietnamese cuisine. Came here twice because the food was so good. Every dish is healing and balanced. The kitchen probably has around 20 sauces and ferments in their repertoire. Our server My Tam was kind, attentive, and very knowledgeable on every dish. I would eat here everyday if I could.

title: Great food, better service
review: The food was very tasty and the had plenty of options for everyone. The Hue Chicken salad was my favourite, my server Thu was so helpful! Would definitely recommend

title: Authentic Vietnamese food that isn’t touristy
review: This was the best Vietnamese food of my life. The ingredients were very fresh and delicious. My boyfriend had plenty of vegan options. Also our server My Tam really looked out for us. She made recommendations for us and made our dining experience more special

title: Good taste
review: Very nice restaurant for trying vietnamese food and local food. Good prizes . Good environment. Nice food. Thu, the waitress was very nice and helpful.

title: Delicious food and attentive staff
review:
We ordered spring rolls, roasted shrimp, beef omelet and more, all delicious!
The staff in charge, Mr. Trang, was very kind and polite in explaining the food.
I want to go again.

title: Nice place for dinner
review:
Nice spot for dinner. Nhan looked after us really well, helping recommend some dishes to go with those we wanted to try.

Would recommend a visit.

title: Chan Hue
review: Great food and service. The salted chicken and the Tilapia in lemon grass were delicious. Service was friendly and welcoming. Thanks to our host Thu.

title: Great dinner
review:
The food was incredible, very flavourful and generous portions. Would recommend the salt roasted chicken.
The staff were very friendly including My Tam who gave us great recommendations. All round lovely visit.

title: For someone who wants local Hue food
review: My husband and I loved the food! This was our first time Hue, so we are very impressed! My Tam was severing us, she’s incredible. Very authentic Vietnamese cousin, good portion and good price. Free local dessert is also gooood!

title: Pretty authentic!
review: Good food! My family was originally from here and they liked the food. The staff was very accomodating, especially Tuấn. We wiped the place.

title: highly recommended
review:
typical authentic food
friendly and nice service
we came twice because it was really very delicious
we hopefully return once a time

title: Big menu has everything
review: I need just a simple garden salad, which came with thin strip of beef, which exactly what I need for a light meal. Waiter tuần was friendly and helpful. Btw location was within walking distance to the pedestrian tourist area

title: Great spot to tick all your local cuisine boxes
review: Excellent spot, fantastic variety of food. Anything with duck or pork it should be your best friend. One of the view places I got a decent glass of wine too. One small thing - personal preference but if you don't have a very fishy palate, then don't get anything with shrimp paste, it's very powerful! :)

title: Amazing service best restaurant.
review: Excellent service by LinhB . Absolutely hands down the best food we’ve had in Hue. Cannot wait to come back. Make sure you don’t miss out on this restaurant when you’re in Hue.

title: Good food, good friendly service
review: Great food, good friendly service. Easy that many dishes with photos are depicted on the menu. It is always exciting what you end up with on your plate....

title: Authentic Hue Dishes
review:
Authentic Hue food!..If local Vietnamese willing to wait. You bet it's good. The menu comes with choices in a la carte or set .I chose the set. If you are not use to bony fish or spicy dishes it's best to ask for recommendations . Thanks to Hong vy who serves me .
The dishes was very well balance.
The pork with shrimp paste was great . The clam soup with bamboo shoots n herbs was delicious .. The goby fish cooked with lard n tofu was tasty.spicy, . The only problem was I don't really know how to eat with many fish bones. Comes
with 2 juices 2rice, dessert .Will come again

title: Worth eating here
review: The food was super tasty. We really saw here among the locals. Our waitress Sally really tried very hard to explain everything to us. Highly recommended

title: Highly recommended local restaurant in Hue
review: This restaurant is local food and highly recommended to try typical Vietnamese dishes. We were attended by Mr Tuan, very friendly and professional, he explained in detail the characteristics of the different dishes we ate. We had a very good experience.

title: Yum
review: Lots of locals here which is always a good sign. Food was excellent and Mr Tuan really took care of us which made the dinner experience that much better.

title: Wonderful restaurant
review: Lovely restaurant with friendly staff and delicious food. Highly recommend for a stay in Hue. Our best food in Vietnam so far (and it's all been v good!). We were well looked after by LINHB.

title: Excellent traditional inn restaurant in an old house
review:
An authentic place therefore original, hostel style restaurant with an incredible menu of varied, beautiful and tasty local dishes.
The mainly local customers and prices are very reasonable.
We were admirably served with kindness by Kieu Vy

title: Lovely
review: The food was absolutely delicious, with a rich variety of flavors that delighted my palate. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, creating the perfect backdrop for a memorable meal. A huge thank you to Tham for the exceptional service and for making the experience truly enjoyable! 🤍

title: The real deal.
review: A really authentic spot. The service was excellent and the food was outstanding. Delicious flavours and Tham our waitress was able to help us with our choices. We went back a second time it was so good!

title: Food was great, great atmosphere, great device, etc.!
review: The food and service were great! Quynh Anh was my waitress and she did an amazing job with explaining the menu to me. I would definitely recommend Chan to anyone!

title: Must try for traditional Hue food!
review: We ordered set menu 1, the food was delicious and a generous portion for two people. The staff especially Tham was friendly and welcoming. Definitely recommend if you're in Hue.

title: Great Hue welcoming by good food!
review: This was so good!!! We had set menu 1 for 2 ppl, great money worth value, enjoy every bite of food. Atmosphere is great! Highly recommend for anyone looking for a home meal style !

title: So good we went twice
review:
We've had 2 excellent experiences at this restaurant.

This was an excellent place to stop for lunch.

As we walked in at 1pm it was heaving with locals and we were warmly welcomed and seated upstairs.
Upstairs was just as busy but the service was just as efficient

We picked our food from the menu, which had images that were really helpful.

One of the waitresses recommended another dish as the one we had chosen wasn't the best in her opinion so we swapped.

The food arrived within 15 minutes despite it being busy and the Peach Iced tea was delicious

The food quality was justified by just how busy it was and the prices were reasonable. There are set menu options available on the back. When we went for dinner the following day the waitress Ly suggested we'd ordered too much. She was right, so thanks for the great service.

title: Ask for Trang and enjoy. The best profissional
review: "Great professionals build great homes. Ask for Trang — a skilled expert who truly knows how to recommend. I'm a fan!. One day, i Will be back for sure

title: Great place for food
review: Great food and lovely place, would recommend for anyone visiting Hue. Staff were lovely and had no issues. Served by Ngoc who was great.

title: Dinner
review: Very delicious Vietnamese/Hue food. We went there together and received Very good service from Minh Tam! I would recommend this to everyone.

title: Delicious food & outstanding service by Mr. Tuan!
review:
I had a wonderful dining experience here – the spring rolls and rice were super tasty! Since Vietnamese cuisine is still a bit new to me, Mr. Tuan took the time to kindly explain which utensils to use and made me feel very welcome.
As a lovely surprise, I was even served a free mochi dessert at the end.
The atmosphere was great, the food full of flavor, and the service truly exceptional. Big thanks to Mr. Tuan – I highly recommend this place to anyone visiting!

title: Super food and staff
review: Very positive experience, very nice environment, very good food. Hllong the girl who served us at the table was super nice and even taught us how to make rolls with mango fish and mint. Highly recommended

title: True Vietnamese experience
review: Absolutely amazing food. Clearly a favourite of the locals, and so it should be. I don’t think I have ever had such an amazing meal in my life. Highly recommend any day of the week.

title: Highly recommended!
review:
Best food and ambiance! An authentic Vietnamese restaurant, If you are looking to explore viet food, Chan is the place.
Thank you, Nean, very friendly, happy to explain to newcomers!

title: Good place to try variety of local food
review:
Very large selection of nice food. We tried a set for 2, and were very happy with the size and quality.
There is a lot of people inside, but it's quite cozy.
Waitress Thu was very helpful!
Will return to try another set

title: Delicious Hue food, huge variety, and kind hosts.
review: The food there is absolutely delicious, there’s a huge variety to pick from, the presentation is great and good balance of flavors. I finally got to try Hue food that I was often recommended, and apparently this is one of the great places to try it ! I would like to also thank our waitress Thủ for taking care of us and the staff overall for their friendliness.

title: Top place for lunch or dinner in Hue
review: Excellent spot to taste local delicacies! Too much food for solo travelers (but I took some home). Tham was such a helpful and attentive server — speaking good English to recommend dishes for me. I had the Chan tasting plate and butter melon with egg and lemongrass chicken — all stellar. Their shrimp paste side dish is also not to be missed.

title: Unmissable
review:
Delicious food, very well served.
Excellent service, especially Thû who was very friendly and explained every dish we wanted.

title: Nice Vietnamese cuisine
review:
Very nice service from waitress Ngoc.
Food was very good. Tasty and lot of choices.
Very well located in Hué touristic centre. We did book, perhaps necessary.
Maybe a little bit too noisy.

title: Great Restaurant
review:
Lovely food and great service by Ngoc.
Would highly recommend it. Great location in walking distance of most hotels. Really reasonable prices. The set menu offered is the chance to try a lot of different foods

title: Delicious
review: Really delicious - we were recommended this spot on Curious About Vietnam instagram and it did not disappoint at all. Truly sensational - all of it! And special thank you to Cuong who was a wonderful waiter

title: I recommend!
review: We had a great time in Chan: the place is nice and air conditioned, the food was delicious and the waitress, Tham, cared for. I recommend!

title: Excellent food and amazing staff in the middle of Hue
review: Our hotel receptionist recommended this place to us. My friend and I had Tasting Menu 03, which surprised us with some fantastic dishes we haven’t had before. I especially liked the stuffed calamari and the snakehead. The Chan staff is amazing snd very helpful. Especially our server Thu looked after us very attentively. Try this restaurant when you’re in Hue - you will not regret it!

title: Beautiful discovery
review:
Nice surprise.
We have chosen menu n°4 for 2 people. Everything was delicious and very hearty.
We were served and accompanied by My Tam who was very professional and particularly caring for us.

title: Great local cuisine
review: We were recommended this restaurant by our hotel receptionist and it didn't disappoint. It serves traditional Hue cuisine such as fish from the local Perfume River and the menu has extensive choice. We had one of the several tasting menus which was amazing value. The service was friendly and warm and our server Thu was great

title: Lunch between brothers
review:
Very good food in Chan. I recommend! And thank you to Thu for his support.
I tasted the typical local juice of Hue (you can ask).

title: Typical meal super good!
review:
Cuong received us well, he was adorable!
And the food was very good! Leave was super smiling and listening! A beautiful address for foodies!

title: Vietnamite cousine very excellent
review:
Food Excellent and service on the table very high!
I suggest this restaurant for everyone. The food was delicious, texture and flavors fantastic.
The menu offers a large options.
Duck, sauces and other spices very appreciate.

title: Duck and nems
review: Food was delicious (we took duck plate and some nems ) and service from Kieu Vy was professional and warming. We recommend this address

title: Awesome Vietnamese authentic lunch
review:
Awesome Vietnamese authentic lunch I ever had. Big thanks to Trang for the quick, friendly support during the visit.
Must-try restaurant in Hue

title: Yummmy, Ngon!
review: Really good food here, cool environment. Minh Tam helped us a lot with ordering, really good recommendation, and gave us free dessert and tastes pretty good also. we all enjoyed it very much! Highly recommended👍

title: Great dinner
review: This was a great spot for traditional Vietnamese food. We got a tasting menu which was very reasonably priced and had plenty of food. Kieu Vy was a great server and was very helpful and kind!

title: Excelent
review: This rrstaurant serve trafitional vietnamese food. The food has many varieties and is very delicious. Kieu Vy was very helpgil and attentive.

title: Excellent local restaurant!
review: Awesome local food! Shrimp/garlic stir fry with yummy rice. Also eggplant with minced pork Service was great! Minh Tam was an excellent server! Thank you!

title: Very good
review: Found by chance in internet, fabulous restaurant! Very good dishes. The waitresses speak English and understand you, My Tam recommended some delicious dishes

title: Wow!
review: It was amazing, the dinner and the service. My tam, our waitress, suggested us the best plates and she let taste the wine before drinking. We will return!

title: Great place
review:
We had the vegan menu #2. It was really tasty! It was just a little bit much for us.
Our server, Tran, was really kind and helpful.

title: Great experience
review: Yummy food, very nice atmosphere, good prices and especially our waitress Minh Tam was very accommodating. I can highly recommend

title: Top
review: Thanks to My Tam and the stuff! Nice people, beautiful location, great food! Will be back soon, probaly tomorrow, yes!!!

title: Superb
review: Great experience, superb food. A large variety of dishes on the menue is the only challenge you have here. Every single dish we had was excellent. The service (special thanks to Trang) Matches the quality of the Food. A Must when you are in Hue.

title: Everything was great!
review: We choose different dishes and everything was really good. Our waitress My Tam helped us to choose for our tastes. The ambience of the restaurant was nice and if we stay again in Hue we would like to come back again.

title: Excellent and delicious food. Perfect service
review: Delicious food, very fine, the Vietnamese atmosphere was very warm and Tham’s service excellent and explanatory.

title: Wonderful local dinner
review: We are from France. This restaurant was recommanded by the hotel and it was really delicious and friendly, with Hue food, vietnamese and tourists guests. The waitress, My Tam, was very helpul choosing the food. I warmly recommand this restaurant.

title: Highly recommended
review:
Ambiente ++
Essen +++
Service +++
Recommendation +++
Immediately again, very hard staff, defective cash machine was replaced immediately

title: A typical place
review:
We came here under the suggestion of our guide.
The food is typical Vietnamese.
The menu has pictures and descriptions.
The staff very friendly and the times very fast.
Thanks to our waitress My Tam for explaining the dishes and how to taste them!
Recommended!

title: Nice place and good food
review:
Very good vietnamese tipical food! Expecially seafood! We will came back....
Thank you My Tam for your kindness !!!!!!

title: Best food in Hue!
review: Fantastic food and service. My Tam was our server and she was very friendly and attentive. One of the best meals we have had in Vietnam!

title: Very tastfull restaurant in Hué
review: This restaurant was recommended by our guide in Hué. She sure was right. The menu was very tastfull, lot of different plates and the waitress, My Lam, who served us deserves a 5--star rating. When you are in Hué, don't miss this place!

title: Great food
review: Excellent food. The best we have had in Vietnam so far. Our server, Vy, was exceptional and very gracious. A great atmosphere overall, with a good mix of locals and tourists.

title: Huong is the best waitress and so helpful!
review: Huong was very friendly and catered to our dietary needs. She was super helpful and talked through all the dishes to make sure we knew what was coming! The food was some of the best we’ve had in Vietnam, the restaurant was full of Vietnamese families enjoying the food and the atmosphere was really fun and authentic. Definitely recommend, you will not be disappointed!

title: Different experience, great food
review: Pls dont be put off that you may be the only tourist in this redtaurant, it really is great good at wonderful prices. The menu is extensive and really great. This is a great place to eat

title: Great local food
review: Several people had suggested this place, so we gave it a go, and really glad we did. Lots of yummy local dishes to choose from. The menu is quite extensive, but the lovely staff made some great recommendations. We particularly liked the fried fish with mango. Even their simple stir fried broccoli was super tasty and cooked to perfection.

title: Hue dining
review: Great food and service! Ngan was our server and she was very helpful with menu suggestions. Hue is a very interesting place to visit. I love Vietnam and its people.

title: You must come here!
review:
We were impressed by the outstanding customer service we received at this restaurant.
You must come and visit Quy he speaks english and has superb service. Do not miss out, awesome dishes and you are shown how to eat.

title: Gem of a restaurant near the weekend night market
review: Excellent food. Speedy service. The complimentary sauce for the rice which was served in an earthen pot was delicious.

title: Delicious lunch at Chan
review: Delicious meal with a variety of Hue specific cuisine. Our waitress Tham was very attentive and helpful. We had a fantastic time. Thank you!

title: A great traditional and fast breakfast
review:
Great lunch.
The restaurant was full but we only waited 15 minutes on a Saturday.
Than, our waitress was adorable and very efficient.
We enjoyed it. The nems. Salt chicken. Shrimp. Everything was delicious.

title: A great restaurant with a varied menu
review: This was our first visit but won't be the last if we have chance to go again. The menu was exciting and different to so many other restaurants we looked at. Our waitress 'Huong' was extremely helpful, friendly and attentive. The food arrived quickly and was delicious. Definitely recommended

title: Tasty traditional vietnamese food
review: We had a tasty dinner with Linbh, very friendly and courteous. Local specialities and traditional vietnamese food. Definitely a recommendation!

title: Good dinner!
review: Good traditional food, a lot of options. Nice place in the city center. Lovely staff! Thanks Huong, I wish you to fulfill your dreams. Hen gap lai!

title: A must visit
review: An amazing Vietnamese Restaurant recommended by our concierge. Lots of choice, we had a set menu which was incredible. Staff really friendly especially Trang who gave us a warm welcome and looked after us

title: Great dinner experience in Hue Vietnam
review:
The food was very interesting, and good quality.
But what made the experience fantastic was Trang you was extremely attentive and professional with us !
Thank you Trang !

title: Recommended Vietnam Local Food in Hue
review: Very good service, nice place and delicious local food in Hue, we order ca dia hap mong toi very suite me and my family taste.

title: Nice spot to try Hue’s food!
review: The food was really nice to try Hue’s specialities and My Tam was really friendly and helpful to answer all our questions on the food. The restaurant itself could be a bit busy and noisy.

title: Great dinners in a traditional environment courtesy and professionalism. Quality traditional dishes at low cost. Thank you Tra
review: Out of the confusion fella most tourist area fi Hue but always central a restaurant with traditional Viernamite cuisine quiet and elegant

title: Luck
review: Very nice restaurant with local food, we enjoyed it. Food, drink, service and prices are very pleasing. Thank you very much.

title: Delicious food and friendly service
review:
We had a lovely evening at Chan Hue Deli. The restaurant is centrally located and the food we liked. The portions were just right, the fish and squids were very delicious.

The service was friendly, the waitresses smiled and were polite. Especially our waitress NGAN was very nice and attentive.

A good restaurant for those who want to enjoy a pleasant meal in Hue.

title: Excellent
review:
Very good place and very good food in Hue
The service is good
The waiters are incroyable
And Lin HB amazing waiter..
I recommend this place

title: Absolutely fantastic! Best Vietnamese food in Hue!!
review: Absolutely fantastic! For someone who loves Vietnamese food, this is the best place in Hue! Super quality and taste! It doesn't get any better! 10 out of 10!

title: Best Vietnamese food in Hue
review: Great food and very friendly service, especially by Ngoc. All at a very reasonable price. This was a great recommendation by our tour guide.

title: Very delicious Vietnamese food in the middle of Hué
review: Very delicious authentic Vietnamese food in the middle of Hué. Our waiter Mr. Tuan took care of us very carefully. 100 percent recommendation.

title: Excellent dinner
review:
The food was fantastic!
We spent our last evening in Hue, and this dinner will be a memorable one. Our waiter, Cuong, was very attentive, courteous, and friendly.
100% recommended!

title: Excellent restaurant
review: Really enjoyed our visit. Good food. Excellent service. Nhung looked after us. Charming girl could not have been more helpful

title: Great service by My Tam and excellent local food. Highly recommend!
review: Nice restaurant with good atmosphere and great local food. Many thanks to My Tam for her service and attention. Highly recommend.

title: Delicious food and wonderful staff!
review: This place has delicious food in a really nice space. Great local dishes as well as Vietnamese overall. The staff are amazing! I loved Nhung because she was so friendly and happy. I can't wait to come back!

title: Go for it without hesitation!!!! Thank you Tham !
review:
We were served by Tham who was really Nice with us and very kind. The food IS REALLY GOOD with high quality of products.
If you came to Hue, don’t miss this opportunity.

title: I want to eat here every day!
review: We came here after a recommendation from a lovely barista we met in Hue, and I'm so delighted we did. We mainly eat vegetarian and there was a whole vegan menu at the back of the regular menu which was exciting for us! This place is clearly popular with locals, and had such a wonderful buzz. We had the hot and sour soup, a salad plate and tofu with lemongrass. They also brought us some small complementary side dishes at the start too, and a couple of mochi at the end. The food was unique, flavourful and very nourishing. If I could eat here every day I think I would. Hanh looked after us so well and made sure we were happy with our meal - thank you so much!

title: Great Day
review: Great place, with super food. Mr. Tuan was super nice! We enjoed the perfect food and the day. Always again we will visit this place.

title: Very good experience!
review: We were served by Ngan, very smiling and available whenever we needed! The dishes are hearty and very good for more than reasonable prices! No regrets about staying here we recommend this property!

title: A great place for dinner!
review: We had the most delicious meal. Traditional foods from the Hue region. Our server was Ngoc and she was so hospitable and helpful, teaching us about the dishes.

title: Very good
review: Meal super good very nice staff I had dealing with NGOC a real pleasure. I highly recommend this restaurant

title: Delicious and varied lunch
review: Ninh Tam has served us very delicious food jerk! Highly recommended to visit and taste delicious Vietnamese food!

title: Lee and Mandy
review: Food was excellent and staff were friendly and helpful. NGAN was so helpful, made easier with google translate. She helped us navigate the menu as we are definitely novices to Vietnamese food.

title: Fantastic food and great food
review: This restaurant offers everything your heart desires. Luckily, we were almost the only long noses here, but the visit here was worth it. The somewhat noisy, child-friendly restaurant shows the full range of this culture. A great experience to recommend to anyone. Just great.

title: Experience to try
review: Experience to try, very intense and special flavors for me who am Italian. But it is good to open your mind and palate to new perspectives. Food and environment spotless. Courteous and honest staff (I was going to order too many things and Mr.Tuan told me to take the small portion instead of the large portion that is for two people, also explained the dishes he brought me and was very nice and kind)

title: To do
review:
It's good but it's a bit the factory .... Bcp world.
The dishes are tasty but I didn't get that little crush.
Our waitress was however very kind and attentive.

title: Local restaurant with specialties
review: This restaurant serves regional cuisine. Service is good and fast. Affordable price. Right in the heart of Hue. Extremely Recommendation!

title: MUST VISIT!!!
review: This was the best meal I have had in the whole of South East Asia! The restaurant is beautiful, full of local people and amazing staff. We had a wide variety of dishes and all of them were amazing. There is something here for everyone, definitely visit if you are in Hue.

title: Excellent Vietnamese food.
review:
The first evening we were advised by David and he immediately taught us to eat with chopsticks. The food itself was excellent. Vietnamese dishes with a small piece of European flavor. We went back two nights after that.
We also got to know Sarah who gave us an explanation of local products that were also used in the restaurant.
Sarah and David thank you for the 3 cozy, atmospheric and excellent food in your restaurant Chan.

title: We can stop there without worry.
review:
Nicely decorated establishment and very professional staff.
The menu is rich and the dishes ordered were quality. Many thanks to My Tam for his kindness and considerateness. Not to mention his nice smile.

title: Dinner in Chan
review: We just had a delicious dinner in Chan, we were served by Hanh who was lovely & very welcoming. Highly recommend this restaurant when visiting Hue.

title: Excellent exceptional I recommend.
review: We discovered this wonderful place when we arrived on Hue. Extraordinary and exceptional flavours. What to say about the warm welcome of My Tam a big thank you for these tips and especially his kindness and smile. We will be back with great pleasure.

title: When in Hue, eat at Chan‘s.
review:
Excellent, copious and diverse food. Probably the best we‘ve had since starting our trip through Vietnam.
The service is impeccable and our server, My Tam, was courtious, forthcoming and very nice.
Two thumbs up.

title: Francine et Diego switzerland
review:
The dishes are succulent, a wonder of Vietnamese gastronomy.
The welcome was perfect, no waiting time. Our waitress so nice.
Cô THAM, side phục vụ của chúng tôi, rất tốt bụng, luôn giúp đỡ và cho chúng tôi lời khuyên.

title: Great food and service. Recommend and will Return
review: Fantastic food, very reasonably priced. We were served by Vy, who was great in explaining ingredients and what dips to have with what. It's a popular place and although we were seated without a reservation it's probably a good idea to book. Definitely go back as the menu was huge

title: Incredible food and service
review: The food was delicious and the service was great. Our server My Tam was always attentive and nice. Best spring rolls we had in our two weeks in Vietnam

title: Simply the best!
review: We were so lucky to find this amazing restaurant in Hue! An authentic Vietnamese experience with a good mix of locals and tourists. The food was excellent, so tasty and beautifully presented. The service delivered by our waitress Minh Tam also superb!

title: Thank you minh tam
review:
Excellent food and service was great.
Great value for money and the small tasting offered is great. Very complete map for Vegans.
Thanks to Minh Tam for her kindness

title: Local restaurant Hue
review:
Minh tam welcomed us and accompany wonderfully over the whole meal
Tasty and quality local dishes
Good price

title: Perfect Lunch
review:
"I had the most delicious lunch today! The fried fish and pork were cooked to perfection and flavorful vegetables. The portion was generous, and the price was very reasonable.

The service was also top-notch. The staff , “THAM”was friendly and attentive, making sure we had everything we needed.

Thank you for your service!!

title: Simply the Best!
review:
This was our last night in Hue and our first time at Chan. If only we'd discovered it sooner!
For two weeks we've been enjoying Vietnamese food but this was the best we've had anywhere.
The whole place buzzes and it has to be a good sign it's a favourite with local families. The menu has page after page of options and the food is delicious.
The Spring Rolls here are in a class by themselves and 3 surprise little add-ins were brought just for the rice.
The whole place buzzes and it's got to be a good sign that it was full of local families. The servers - like our waitress My Tam - are helpful and welcoming.
It clearly matters to everyone involved here that you enjoy your meal.

title: Delicous dinner
review: Our hotel recommended this restaurant and we are very satisfied. It is our third visit here and we love the local food, especially the mixed starter plate and tofu with tomato sauce, very delicious. Ngan served us very kindly.

title: Very good traditional restaurant
review: Traditional house in Hue for Vietnamese food. Many locals are guests here. Very good, very good quality and friendly service. On the map a lot of things are stored with photos, this also helps ;-) with the selection.

title: Positively affected
review: Found on TripAdvisor by chance, we simply booked with facebook, arrived we received Cuong, who with his sympathy and helpfulness also helped us in the choice of dishes, among other things facilitated by the photos of the menu. Shrimp with coconut, fabulous, very spicy, good fried squid, and fish with mango and fabulous sweet and sour sauce!!! They also offered us watermelon at the end of the meal. We would stay there again safe. Thank you Cuong!!

title: Tasty and cozy food at Chan in Hue
review: We have been served by Minh Tam, a very friendly and attentive hostess. Nice and cozy busy restaurant, where locals also come. Very good food. Very attentive: on departure it rained and we were given a poncho. Really worth it.

title: A night out in Vietnam
review: We have chosen this place on the recommendation of the reception of our hotel. Upon arrival were very kindly received by My Tam. She's really a reason to come back. She recommended the tasting menu and we are very satisfied with that. The meal was exquisite and certainly more than adequate. This is definitely recommended to visit. With friends from the Netherlands.

title: Nice dinner
review:
Great food and super nice staff. I great middle ground between fine dining and Vietnamese Cousine.
My Tam was serving us and she told us which sauced to go with each food.

Super nice dinner

title: Goog food, great service in Hue
review: Amazing food, one of the best in our vacation. Great service from Tham, she is frirndly and sweet. We enjoyed our visit very much

title: A hidden gem
review: This is a hidden gem. Authentic , colourful and a marvelous experience. Great food , fantastic combinations and original approach. We were served by Minh Tam , with a smile and fluent in English. Keep on the good work !!!

title: Nice evening - gladly again
review: Our visit we liked very much, super friendly staff, always cared for and helpful. Rich assortment of local food, all delicious and fresh. This is how we wished for it- definitely recommended

title: I recommend it.
review:
It's a lively and very nice place.
The staff, My Tom, has been very helpful. My-san I took a picture but lost it. I'm sorry. Please go and see them all.
The food was very good.

title: Great experience
review: The food was very good and our waitress My Tam very helpful in selecting the best dishes to try from the Hue region. We will come again ;)

title: Fabulous food
review: Amazing food, so delicious! The salt and sauce was fantastic. We had the spring roll plate, duck, beef and aubergine and loved everything. Highly recommend coming here.

title: Great authentic Vietnamese food
review: Great authentic Vietnamese food. Service was quick and the place is clean. Our server My Tam was sweet and observant. I recommend the grilled pork and morning glory !! Also, it is the perfect location to go the night market and river walk afterwards.

title: Chan restaurant, Hue
review: Recommended by our hotel, Silk Path Grand, as local Vietnamese restaurant and it truly was. It was full of locals and not so many westerners. Food was great. We ordered 6 dishes plus rice and spring rolls and 6 local beers (Huda) between 2 people and it came to £26.31. Try it and see.

title: Authentic delicious local restaurant
review:
This restaurant is a wonderful find
We were served by sally (Hien) who spoke brilliant English and was really helpful with our choices and the quantities required which is always difficult as the portions vary so much from one restaurant to another
The food was the best we experienced in our three week trip in Vietnam and also one of the most reasonably priced
We discovered that we were sitting next to the owners and the fact that they eat there speaks volumes
There was a really good mix of tourists and locals eating there
We would recommend this restaurant to any wanting to eat Vietnamese and specifically Hue style food

title: An assault on the senses
review:
Today I communicated several senses and the result was a pleasant surprise. I ordered a red tilapia with mango and some leaves that accompanied it. The first impression is that the photo of the menu was not the same, this was a tilapia fried upright , its meat, separated and placed neatly around it, green leaves, very thin strips of mango and a dish containing a sauce with mango as well. There was also a thinly tied roll of rice paper. Well to tell me I did not know what to do to what Mr Tlian very gently showed us the procedure, you take the rice leaf and at the end of it you put the green leaves, the mango and the fish and it is wrapped like a taco and then one of the tips is introduced to the sauce and you give the connection of all those flavors with your palate and what results is really good.
The service with Mr. Tlian at the helm is really good. Very nice atmosphere. The value for money is very very good.

title: Wonderful service and food.
review: Wow! A wet day in Hue, thought we would have a nice lunch, so chose Chan based on Tripadvisor reviews and we were not disappointed. A very traditional Vietnamese restaurant, thankfully not pandering to our Western tastes, we were the only Westerners present. Staff were friendly and welcoming and enough English to help us chose our food, though menu does have English descriptions. Our server Ngoc was an angel, took such good care of us. We travel to Vietnam regularly, this was one of our best meals and most certainly incredible value for money.It was all delicious.

title: Super restaurant- clean food...Also a lot vegetarian...you sit among Vietnamese..pretty furnished.
review: This was our best meal during our 3-week trip through Vietnam. We got there in 3 nights. Delicious food and very nice service. Popular with the Vietnamese...it was always well attended...

title: Delicious dinner!
review: Absolutely outstanding food and service! We ordered the “set menu, #2.” Delicious lemon grass chicken and a delicious white fish. Our English-speaking server, Lien, was amazing-explained everything and how to eat the bean cake delicious dessert. Highly recommend!

title: Amazing and Authentic Vietnamese meal with outstanding service at very reasonable price.
review:
Our server Lien was so helpful and kind and served us an awesome meal. We had the Set menu number 2 and it was so delicious. Everything is so fresh and prepared to perfection. My wife and I could not be more thrilled with Chan restaurant in Hue, Vietnam!
If you have any chance to visit we cannot recommend it more highly!

title: Genuine Vietnamese food.
review:
Authentic Vietnamese restaurant, With great food and super cheap.
Service as it should be very friendly and attention to detail.
In short👍

title: Great food, great vibe
review: A great restaurant with lots of different local dishes and flavours. Nice atmosphere and friendly, helpful staff. Especially big thank you to our server My Tam who was super helpful and attentive. She showed us how best to eat each dish and with which sauces. Also noticed what we liked and served us accordingly. Would recommend!

title: Great food and great value
review: Great food and very friendly staff . Very reasonably priced also . Would revisit again for sure and can’t recommend enough

title: Lovely restaurant with great vegan choices
review:
Lovely good! Very well looked after by MINH TAM
Beautiful flavours
I would recommend. As very clean
Great service and great food! Great veggie choices and so nicely presented

title: Hue super restaurant
review: Super good food. The team is very friendly and a lot of locals are coming to have dinner too. I recommend to come here if you are in Hue, you will love it

title: Great food, reasonable prices, outstanding service.
review: My Tam is an excellent server and her suggestions were perfect. The Tilapia with lemongrass and galangal was especially good.

title: First time!
review: First time visiting Vietnam and this place is amazing. Great service by Mr. Tlian! Must try when visiting! The restaurant is clean and very friendly.

title: Very fresh food
review:
Fantastic food, great service and a very friendly environment
Server was Mr. Tlian
When I visit again this will be one of my top picks

title: Nice and good restaurant traditional cuisine
review:
Excellent fine cuisine.
Large selection of meat, fish, vegetables and vegan.
Nicely presented and hearty.

title: Mr Tuan at Chan
review:
Joey from the Indochine Palace Hotel, recommended Chan Restaurant. He suggested a taxi, but it was a 10 minute walk from our hotel.

The food was excellent and we were the only none local people in there. We had lots to eat and Mr Tuan was very helpful, knowledgeable and generous. He even brought us local deserts.

Highly recommend you visit Chan and ask for Mr Tuan!

title: Excellent good local food with character!
review: Local good food. Service exceptional. I am so sorry I could not finish all my main meal - but I truly enjoyed my beef with onions and celery. Husband had stuffed squid which he really liked. The spring rolls were the best we have eaten. Thank you.

title: Amazing!
review: Absolutely amazing food! A must visit in Hue. Thank you so much to My Tam for serving us, so attentive and made sure our experience was perfect.

title: Excellent
review: Delicious and impeccable service, great value for money, super nice decor, very well placed , I highly recommend!

title: Excellent welcome and very succulent meals. Very nice staff availability and especially Sally.
review: In a very lively area frequented by youth looking for entertainment, well located and easy to find.

title: Excellent meal at Chan
review: Just enjoyed a wonderful meal at Chan, great menu tried dishes new to us. The staff were all very helpful, friendly and efficient. We were helped by the lovely My Tam.

title: Delicious Vietnamese cuisine.
review:
Great atmosphere, very popular with the local populous.
Food and service excellent. Served by Minhtam.
Very reasonable prices. A hearty meal with a couple of beers for the equivalent of £15!

title: Great food and service!
review: Excellent restaurant in Hué! The food was very nice and the service perfect. Thank you very much to My Tam in particular for being so good to us and helpful.

title: Discover Hue's cuisine in an excellent restaurant.
review: Superb experience and very nice discovery of Hue's cuisine. Minh Tam, our waitress, accompanied us in our choices with unfailing kindness. Try tasting menus, a treat.

title: A joyful and delicious treasure in the heart of Hue
review:
What a fun, tasty dinner we had at Chan here in Hue! The food selection is unique, with various options for enjoying either a set menu or individual items, all at an incredibly reasonable price. Everything we had was delicious, from the soup, chicken, fish, vegetable dishes to the drinks. The whole experience was made even more delightful thanks to Trang, who (with a great sense of humour and enthusiasm!) looked after us and even helped us with our Vietnamese pronunciation.
😂👍 I feel that Trang set the tone for all the staff at Chan, as I have never encountered such a smiling, happy staff during my stay in Vietnam…and that is saying something! My son and I will go back today, this time for lunch, and I highly recommend a visit to Chan for anyone looking for a unique dining experience in Hue, Vietnam. Thank you, Trang, and all staff!

title: Good
review: Typical restaurant. Nice place. Excellent squid and soup. We were pampered by Ngoc Linh and Trang nice and professional.

title: Dinner with friends at CHAN in Hue
review:
We had dinner with Great food and
Great service. Ngoc linh eTrang very nice.
We had a great time. We will recommend it to friends

title: Amazing food and service
review: Amazing food at a very good price, we ordered a vegan tasting set menu and everything was delicious with very large portions. Our host My Tam was so lovely and helpful.

title: GOOD & VERY NICE
review: We had dinner tonight with my wife. Lots of locals..a good sign. Thanks to Trang for her patience and great kindness.She advised us well.and thanks to her we had a great time. Very sweet addition. Thanks again.

title: Exciting and amazing place to eat.
review:
Good service from Miss my Tam. The food is so tasty and amazing.. The environment suit to our taste.
Recommended to my friends.

title: Tasty food, foreigner friendly
review: Great tasty local food! Our server, My Tam, was very nice and recommended good dishes for us to try. The salted fried chicken & the morning glory with garlic were our favorite. We even got free dessert after :) highly recommend!

title: Great local restaurant
review: Great local food and hospitality! The restaurant with lively and busy with locals as well as visitors. Minh Tam provided us with great service, as well. Would definitely recommend!

title: Cannot be missed!
review: I’d seen this place recommended on lonely planet & trip advisor- it didn’t let us down. Sally was super. She helped us with the menu and we thoroughly enjoyed the meal. The restaurant is frequented by locals and tourists. The staff are attentive. A fab place!

title: Authentic, friendly and delicious. Cheap
review: Great food. Tremendous atmosphere. Mainly locals. Astonishing value for money. Very friendly service from Hoa who helped us interpret the menu

title: Excellent experience
review:
We enjoyed our Vietnamese dinner in this very local, family restaurant with a very lively and warm atmosphere.
The reception and the service were also perfect!
Excellent evening to complete our stay in Hue!

title: Very good address
review: Very good food, very attentive staff, quick service , and restaurant full of locals (Vietnamese) ... so quality guarantee

title: Dinner at Chan Restaurant
review: We went to the restaurant in the evening. Despite the fact that it was completely filled, the service of My Tam was excellent and friendly. The food was excellent. Just great.

title: A great Vietnamese experience
review: I agree with the latest reviews. Arrived by reading the ratings on TA. And I confirm the very good impression. Refreshment not touristy, but open and understanding vs foreign guests. Really attentive service, great food (the best for now in these first 4 days of Vietnam), affordable prices. We will be back and anyway: Highly recommended.

title: Hué specialities
review: The food here is delicious! Wonderfull flavours and you can really try all specialties of Hue! We took 2 separate dishes but you can also do a lot of sharing dishes! My Tam and the other employees were friendly and helpfull. We definitely recommend and will come back.

title: The best of what Hue has to offer
review: A very wet dismal day was finished off by a delightful evening meal in this fabulous restaurant. Such freshness and exquisite tastes , yes it is way up there on reviews and it deserves this accolade ,and we where served through our meal by very attentive young lady called My Tam.

title: A beautiful experience
review: Very good tasty meal, lots of choices in dishes, My Tam our waitress was very smiling and very nice. Thank you.

title: Nice food
review:
Great lunch in Hue! The service is perfecte… tipical food of Vietnam…
This restaurant is one of the best in our trip in this incredible country!

title: EXCELLENT VIETNAMESE RESTAURANT
review: EXCELLENT FOOD, NICE STAFF AND VERY GOOD PRICE. Wecan strongly recommand this restaurant. For us it was the second time but we will for sure be back again

title: Restaurants in Hue
review:
Great service, great choice of Vietnamese food.
Well surrounded by locals, which proves the fame of this establishment

title: Must Visit
review: This restaurant is amazing, great food and atmosphere. The staff were very friendly and helpful, particularly Minh Tam, she was extremely pleasant and professional.

title: Good cuisine in a nice setting
review: Nice address in the center of Hue serving well made Vietnamese dishes. Very pleasant decor, lots of atmosphere.

title: Wonderful holiday
review: Vietnamese place with exceptional cuisine Friendly waiters and cheap drinks offer good dessert after meal

title: Amazing food experience
review:
The spot, service and the food are top notch.
When the locals are also seen in the place, you can’t go wrong.
Chan fully delivered on providing us with an excellent meal… no flaws!
A must stop when in Hue.

title: Delicious Home Cook Style
review: Absolutely delicious food. I was recommended this place by a friend who would eat here during her high school years and I must admit I would do the same had this place existed where I lived. A wide range of both general Vietnamese and more local specificalties served here so fear not you are bound to find something for you! ( I recommended the Huế style pork 😊)

title: Not to hesitate
review: It is a very popular restaurant with a terrace overlooking the street. Cordial welcome, waitresses always smiling. The dishes ordered are delicious and the prices very affordable. Don't hesitate to feast.

title: Delicious food
review: We all loved the food, the decor and the service. My wife is Vietnamese and she was very impressed. Miss My Tam served us well with a lovely smile and helped us to choose the food.

title: The best!
review: Koreans come unconditionally! All foods are delicious. Cheap and good service. If you come later, come unconditionally. Strap.

title: Chan, Hue
review: Excellent food, friendly service: this restaurant with local specialties is highly recommended! Happy New Year!

title: Locals eating local food in a super restaurant!
review: We found this place by chance - and loved it. Easily understood menu with plenty of choices. We shared the duck platter (Chans special duck set) which was perfect for lunch. Served by Tham who explained everything perfectly! Sadly we leave Hue today, otherwise we’d be back there again. Maybe next time in Vietnam!!

title: Simply the best
review:
You don't need to say a whole lot except, Simply "the best".
A visit to this Hue will be incomplete without trying the cuisine of Hue.

title: Highly recommended
review:
We had dinner with my wife. We had stuffed squid and lacquered duck as well as a plate of sautéed vegetables. All dishes were excellently cooked; the staff is all very kind and affable. At the end of the meal they brought us fresh pineapple as dessert. We recommend a dinner at this place.
Giuseppe

title: New culinary experience
review:
Pleasant service from Thuy Linh and very good food with taste!
We had the chance to taste a local dessert, that’s a try!

title: Go on!
review: Nice place for a meal. Welcoming and friendly staff who explain the dishes and sauces that go with it. Quiet meals unlike the "restaurants" around.

title: The richness of Hue cuisine
review:
Is it useful to publish a review to indicate that Chan is clearly the best restaurant we have discovered in Hue? many others have done it before us.
The diversity of dishes and the quality of flavors, the kindness of the service and the very moderate level of prices charged make this restaurant an exquisite place.
We'll go a number of days in a row before we've exhausted the options.

title: Excellent food and service
review:
The food was excellent and our waitress My Tam was lovely and very efficient. I can recommend it 100%
Also the price was absolutely justified. All in all a very good experience!

title: Great food and super service
review: Great food and fantastic service! We were super friendly helped by Trang. She helped us choose the right (local) dishes and it all tasted great. Top restaurant.

title: Great selection of local dishes for a good price
review: Great food with a nice selection of local dishes. I particularly enjoyed the tofu with passion fruit sauce and the chicken cooked in salt. The service is also excellent and the price is very reasonable. Highly recommend.

title: Lovely restuarant in Hué
review: We loved it! You need to visit this restuarant. It has great food, phenomenal coffee and amazing staff especially, Huong, she is very nice. I recommend going here with all my heart.

title: 100% Recommended, exceptional location
review:
100% recommended. Very nice restaurant with variety of Vietnamese food. They also have menu sets, ideal for trying different dishes.

To highlight the attention of Minh Tam, who has been watching at all times that our evening was perfect.

title: Great Vietnamese/ Central food
review: Great food. Friendly and attentive service from My Tam. This is the 2nd time I visited, first was with my family. All positive dining here

title: Would recommend
review: Delicious food and lovely service! Thank you. Would recommend to order one of the set menus to try lots of dishes from the local area

title: Great choice for a dinner of true Vietnamese flavors
review:
At the restaurant we arrived following the directions of the community and we did very well.
The room is large but not noisy, the staff was very considerate and advised us well. We had two mixed appetizers, different from each other, among the proposals presented, a real relief for those of us who approach Vietnamese cuisine for the first time, and two main dishes, chicken and duck, really tasty.
I highly recommend it

title: Fantastic restaurant for authentic dinner
review: Foods are wonderful - the roasted pork with pickle was the highlight of the meal - everything was amazing as well - customer service is friendly and efficient - thank you Hong Vy for your recommendations - one of the best meal I have in Vietnam

title: Good service
review: The girl who served us Hong Vy was very kind, but all the staff, good dishes and cared for. Nice place, they bring a welcome trio and a sweet at the end of the meal. Very good

title: Chan
review: Nice restaurant that was recommended by a Vietnamese friend and it did not disappoint. Excellent service, and lots of option.

title: A great taste of Hue style cuisine
review:
We saw Chan on trip advisor after checking out a few other places recommended by our hotel.

We were not disappointed!! Our server Hoa was amazing and talked us through the menu choices we made and made some recommendations.

A thoroughly enjoyable meal with excellent service. Highly recommended

title: Great meal
review: Lovely meal , very friendly and helpful staff . Good value for money . Huong was great , helping us choose and explained the local dishes.

title: Fantastic dinner!
review: I visited Chan with my dad, who’s quite the foodie, and we both absolutely loved it! The eggplant dish with pork was a standout—truly amazing and a must-try. Our waiter, Ngoc, was fantastic—so friendly and attentive, which made the experience even more enjoyable. Highly recommend!

title: A wonderful dinner
review: A person leaved a review, said this is the best food of Vietnam. Honestly, he is absolutely right. The food is tasty and richful. The staff are kind and helpful, especially Sally. This is a place will be missed.

title: EXCELLENT
review:
A meal of 10!! We came recommended by a friend and we loved it.
Tham, the waitress who has attended us, has been very helpful and has attended us very well.
We recommend it 100%

title: Authentic Vietnamese restaurant
review: Vietnamese cuisine, recommended by a local and frequented by locals. Great food (special and unusual fried squid, duck dish and caramelized pork). Very kind staff, especially Huong, nice helpful and smiling and spoke good English. Great value for money.

title: Authentic and delicious
review: Delicious vegetarian option, super friendly staff especially the female manager in the blue dress! They took great care to help us enjoy the meal just like the locals do. Would highly recommend. A very authentic local experience

title: Sublime feast in Hue
review: The food was exceptional. The service was fabulous. Fast and attentive. Trang was friendly and efficient. We would come again. One of the best meals in Vietnam.

title: A delightful dinner at Chan
review: We had a delicious dinner at Chan. The fish with lemongrass and ginger, the roast duck with Hue sauce, and the bok choy with mushrooms were all full of flavour. Our waitress My Tam looked after us superbly and was very charming, including patiently helping us find the tea we wanted but couldn't find on the menu.

title: The restaurant was amazing
review: The food was excellent and the hospitality was great. We had an awesome time in the restaurant with a very local vibe restaurant was amazing.

title: Amazing food
review: Great spot! Food was incredible! Great way to experience hue food. Every dish we had was spectacular. Would def recommend to anyone visiting

title: Dinner with friends in Hue
review: Vietnamese cuisine, frequented by locals. Very kind staff, served us the waitress Lian. I ate the duck dish cooked in different ways and the squid stuffed with pork

title: Great!
review:
Yummy food, yummy drinks and very friendly staff! Sally is a sweetheart :)
We had a tasting menu and it was more than enough.
Would definitely recommend.

title: Amazing vietnamese dinner
review: We had a great dinner and got service from amazing Huong which knew english and really helped us, and gave us an amazing vietnamese cuisine :)

title: Delicious Vietnamese food
review: Delicious tasting menu eaten springrolls porkbelly pak choi and stuffed squid very friendly staff special Tra....

title: Exquisite meals
review:
We were received by Ms TRANG of extreme friendliness and very well advised on the menu of speciality dishes of Hue
We went back three times to taste more dishes
We really recommend this restaurant for its cuisine and very authentic atmosphere
The taste of Vietnam has Hue at Chan
The crab-scented soup is of perfect subtlety

We were received by Mile TRANG with extreme kindness and very well advised on the menu of Hue specialty dishes
We returned three times to taste more dishes
We really recommend this restaurant for its cuisine and its very authentic atmosphere
The taste of Vietnam in Hue at Chan's
The fragrant crab soup is perfectly subtle

title: Best of the best
review:
Great lunch!
Proper Vietnamese food in a beautiful space! Our waiter Tham was great and very attentive. Very much recommended.
The foods and the vibes were amazing. Taste is authentic to the region here. Our serve Thắm is very nice and friendly. Highly recommended!

title: Great service!
review: Loved the atmosphere here, great food and very polite staff. Sally guided us through the menu and recommended the best. If you visit Hue, gotta come by here!

title: Lovely Dinner Spot!
review: Lovely spot for dinner near Hue Walking Street recommended to us by our homestay hosts! Plenty of options for vegetarians and my tofu and mushroom dish, although it was quite salty for my tastes, was tasty and flavourful with chilli. Minh Tam, our waitress, was so cheerful. Would recommend!

title: A save bet in Hue !
review: It was an excellent typical dishes, good presentation, and a wonderful service ! I advise to take the typical plate to taste the different flavors

title: Fantastic food and perfect service
review: Great food and service. One of the best dinners in Vietnam. The whole fried fish to make you own spring rolls was to die for.

title: Wonderful spot
review: Great food and service. A lot of traditional food, I loved the spring roll tasting platter. Tham has provided a lovely service.

title: It's worth it!
review: The entourage is nice, advised by our guide. Great food, friendly service by Trang who spoke to us in English. Delicious dishes and the wine served to us was surprising!

title: A must visit!!
review: Such a lovely meal all the dishes were so yum!! Had a nice vibe inside a good mix of locals and foreigners. The service was also 5/5 with our server Liên who was friendly and served our dishes with a smile!!

title: Original Vietnamite
review:
Recommended by locals, this restaurant is located a stone's throw from Hue Citadel.
Do not be fooled by the size of the restaurant and if in a tourist place you see almost only Vietnamese diners then you are in the right place.
Wide choice of traditional single dishes and full menus. Welcome sauces and rice and typical dessert at the end free.
Exquisite girl, very young, who followed us to the table with a unique kindness and refinement, her name is Huong.
Amount paid for one course each plus 4 beers , for 4 people 870.000 V (just over 30 euros in 4).
Highly recommended.

title: Great restaurant- excellent value!
review:
Excellent restaurant - Ngoc was great in helping select our ‘tasting menu’, which was fantastic
Great service - would recommend to everybody!

title: Excellent food and very friendly service
review: Really very good authentic vietnamese food in a really nice atmosphere and with a great service. The dishes were special and they offered typical sauces and a small dessert as a gift.

title: Best restaurant to eat authentically fine Vietnamese
review:
Authentic Vietnamese food excellently prepared and very fine. Operation very accommodating
Price very fair, average
Ambience cozy
Best restaurant in Hue.

title: Delicious local cuisine in a nice restaurant with welcoming service
review: We were looking for a restaurant that served the local Hué dishes and where we could also sit down and have a good time. Chan has exceeded our expectations in this, eaten delicious local food, top and friendly service by Sally and cozy to sit. If you are in Hue definitely recommended.

title: Very impressed!
review:
Tham was a very attentive and pleasant waitress. The food was delicious and speedy, but it came in 2nd place to her warm smile.
We will definitely be back again. What a fantastic place ☺️

title: Dinner at Chan Restaurant
review: I had a very pleasant evening at this restaurant. The food was delicious, and the staff was very attentive. I was mainly attended to by Miss Ngoc.

title: An amazing meal and evening
review:
We had an amazing meal! Trang took very good care of us and it was one of our best meals in Vietnam.

Get the stuffed bitter gourd soup. It is delicious.

title: Good place to explore
review: Warm atmosphere, traditional Vietnamese food and nice staffs. The staff takes care to customer all the dishes . Highly recommended!

title: Delicious , authentic, family style comfort food.
review: Chan is the best restaurant in Hue. Authentic family style food that’s perfectly prepared and comforting. The ambiance is charming, the staff are attentive, professional, and friendly. Hong Vy, our server, was lovely and provided excellent service. We visited three times during our four days stay in Hue city. Highly recommend Chan.

title: Plentiful local food options in a central location
review: Our server Cuong helpfully guided us through the menu and recommended some tasty local food options. Bill was on the expensive side (440k for 3 main meals, rice, and 3 drinks) but it felt reasonable given the central downtown location!

title: Great food, great service
review: The food was wonderful, with rich flavours. Our waitress, My Tam, gave us great advice on the choice of the dishes. Great experience! Highly recommended.

title: Highly recommended for local Hue food
review: The food is awesome, we tasted the local food recommended by the staff Huyen. She is very fluent in English, friendly and helpful.

title: It was great :)
review: It was very delicious. We liked it sooooo much. It was so good and the stuff was also friendly and great. We will definitely come back. Thank you Huyen :)

title: Tasty Vietnamese food
review: Dropped in very late for dinner after a full day tour & was served by the lovely Quynh Anh who helped us decide on our dishes...all with a gorgeous smile. The food was fresh & tasty. Quynh Anh also gave use some smaller dishes of flavour bombs to try with our rice. After dinner we were served a small plate of fruit which was delish.

title: Definitely worth a visit

title: Very nice local
review: very good «meal ! The Waitress Quynh Anh is very nice and helpful to chose ! Would recommend ! Thanks !

title: Upscale restaraunt with good food and family friendly. Good value.
review: Wide array of both traditional and modern Vietnamese dishes. Well executed. Friendly and helpful staff. Nice restaurant and very clean. Upscale but still reasonably priced. Kids enjoyed it too. Nice mix of local Vietnamese and tourists. Got in right away for lunch.

title: Great times in Hue.
review:
Delicious and affordable.

review:
Recomnended to us.
Great food selection.

Highly reconmend

title: Unforgettable restaurant!
review: The dishes were excellent, the produce very fresh with fruit for dessert offered. The concept of the plate with typical Vietnamese starters is well thought out. Our waitress Huyen was very attentive from beginning to end.

title: Great food
review: Thank you for the great food 😋 and warm atmosphere! Special thanks to Huyen for her kind and attentive service

title: CHAN RESTAURANT
review: I had a wonderful dining experience at this restaurant. The staff Vi were attentive and friendly, making us feel welcome from the moment we walked in. I highly recommend!!!

title: Hue Traditional Restaurant
review:
I visited this restaurant twice during my short stay in Hue, and it quickly became a favourite.

The interior is beautiful, with high ceilings and a lovely sense of space, and there’s a coffee shop at the front serving excellent coffee. The food is impeccable, and what impressed me most was that it was full of local people—my friend and I were the only foreigners, which is always a great sign.

What really made the experience special was Mo, our server. She was kind, attentive, and genuinely warm throughout, and her presence added a lot to the visit.

I can highly recommend this restaurant.

title: So Good
review:
"The food here is absolutely fantastic! 😋 Fresh ingredients, perfectly cooked. Each dish is a delight. Highly recommend DUCK . Overall, a wonderful dining experience!"
The staff, Vi, provided great service!

title: Great place
review: Great food and nice attention from Mo. Very nice place.

review: Best meal we had in Vietnam. A delicious selection of foods, the spring rolls are to die for. Really lovely juices and teas too.

I will definitely be back, I’m ecstatic 🤍

review: We wanted a memorable dinner for our last night in Hue and we certainly found the perfect place. Our server Huyen was lovely and explained our dishes for us. The service was excellent and the atmosphere lively. I can definitely recommend eating here when in Hue. Thank you Huyen.

title: Excellent Late Lunch
review: 5 out of 5. Just had a late lunch at Com nieu Chan and it was 5 STARS! Plus it was our 1st meal in Hue. We ordered "Chan's Plate (traditional Hue rice plate with melon salad, carmelizedpork belly & shrimp, omelet, roasted pork belly and vegetable soup) & Chan's special Duck Set (smoke duck roll with Hue herbs, Duck fried spring rolls, Rice cake with fried smoked duck breast)...comes with sweet & sour fish dipping sauce & ginger fish dipping sauce. Served with 3 dip bowls (pickled veg, dry spice, spicy pork sauce)...cant get enough if the pickled veg!!! Congratulations Chef...a job well done. Dung served us and was excellent...friendly, helpful, efficient. We will be back

title: Excellent Lunch at Chan!
review: Extremely flavourful food with lots of options. Service provided by Dung was excellent. Would go back in a heartbeat.

title: Again and again

Staff Vi

title: CHAN
review:
We had a fantastic experience. We were served by a very friendly waitress “Thanh Huong Vi”who made us feel welcome from the very first moment. Her service was warm, attentive, and professional throughout the meal.

Highly recommended place❤️❤️ We would definitely come back! ❤️

title: Great Vietnamese culinary experience
review: A superb culinary experience of local Vietnamese food. We were served by a very polite and experienced lady by the name of Huyen who spoke great English and was very helpful is selecting the best courses for us. We especially enjoyed the soups and duck dishes. We highly recommend this restaurant when visiting Hue, Vietnam.

title: Great tasting menu and lovely service
review: We enjoyed our meal and our server Huyen was lovely! Attentive and friendly service and she recommended how to eat dishes we were unfamiliar with. The tasting menu was a great option for us.

Best place we visited in Hué. Our waitress “Dung” was the very best. Polite, nice, just perfect.

review: Great restaurant , delicious food, very good service. Our cellar "Dung" was very nice and friendly, we were nowhere better served in Hué. There can only be the highest score here.

review: I really enjoyed the food here. Everything was fresh and full of flavor, and the staff were very attentive and friendly.(Thanh Huong)

title: Chan is a Great Restaurant in Hue
review: Chan is a lovely restaurant with a charming interior decorated with Hue-style furnishings. The food is delicious and high-quality. We greatly enjoyed our assorted selection of various types of spring rolls, salt-roasted chicken, and simmered shrimp with coconut. Furthermore, the wait-staff are wonderfully friendly and helpful and provide efficient service. This restaurant is a great experience.

title: Exceptional Customer Service!
review: Everything from start to finish was a great experience. Our server Moon was exceptional and worked with a family of 10. We did not speak the same language but she managed to get everything we needed. She was the best part of the experience. Made the dinner pleasant! Would highly recommend especially if you go with a large group.
Lovely food and great service from Huyen. Food came out a few minutes after ordering. Recommend the pork belly!

title: Delicious food
review: Fried aubergine, pork belly and morning glory and it was all absolutely delicious. Huyen served us and was great.

title: Great neighborhood restaurant for Vietnamese food.
review: Duck special I had was great. Good mix of 4 duck options. Friendly and quick service by Huyen. Neighborhood feeling and will likely come back.

title: Hué local taste good
review:
Good food, good taste and the waitress Huyen was really nice and smiling !
Cannot not recommend !
Really good pmace in Hué tp get a taste of local good food

Excellent meal, nice dishes. Good music. In short, a faultless one.
Good job.

title: Vietnamese food at its best.
review: A fabulous meal in a truly authentic Vietnamese restaurant. We chose one of the tasting menus and were not disappointed. 5 dishes all for 650 000 dong which is less than £19 and included a glass of wine. Frequented mostly by locals always a good sign. Really well looked after by Dung who spoke excellent English and always with a smile.

title: Excellent food, great staff
review: Great food, we had a tasting menu which included stuffed squid, spring rolls, fish, beef stir fry. The staff were excellent, special thanks to our waitress Dung, Would definitely recommend.

title: Excellent
review:
Thanks to Nocen for his sympathy,
French, the different menus allowed us to taste Vietnamese dishes.
Very friendly staff

title: Perfect Dinner
review: The Food was amazing, our waitress Huyen was super nice and kind. The atmosphere was also beautiful. We will come again.

title: Very good Vietnamese restaurant
review: Really good Vietnamese restaurant. Went here twice during our stay in Hue. All meat and vegetable dishes were very good together with the rice. Especially the Hue style pork was exceptional. Good serving too, a lot of the staff speak English very well (Huyen in our case)

title: Great diverse Vietnamese menu and kind staff
review: Had a wonderful dinner here. Very diverse menu, great vegetarian/vegan options as well. Staff was very kind and knowledgeable— especially our server Troung. The grilled snakefish was amazing! Great fresh juices and cute interior. Good choice for a group who wants to try lots of different authentic Vietnamese dishes.

title: Really lovely food
review: Food was really lovely! It was some of the best that we had whilst in Vietnam. Thanks to Dung for serving us who was lovely too!

title: Made tourists feel like locals
review: Best food we found in Hue. Open plan eating but with amazing atmosphere. Staff were amazing and helpful especially Huyen who explained everything. Didn't feel like tourists even though we were.

title: Best in Hue

title: Wonderful meal in Hue

My partner and I enjoyed a delicious meal here, we can’t fault the food and our waitress Huyen was exceptional. Highly recommended if you are visiting Hue

title: Perfecta
review: All great local food fantastic atmosphere and especially the impeccable service of Huyen very polite and professional Thank you

title: Great experience and food
review: Amazing fresh food and very good portion sizes. A great way to wind down after seeing the sites. Huyen our waitress was very helpful and friendly to talk to. Over all a very good experience

title: Excellent Vietnamese cuisine
review:
Excellent cuisine, menus for tasting Vietnamese cuisine, as well as the possibility to order a la carte. We were courteously served by Huyen. Finally, we had stiff , delicious passion fruit and watermelon!
We would definitely come back!

title: Great place!
review:
Food was just fabulous!
Huyen looked after us really well, best food so far in Vietnam😋 would highly recommend to anyone 👍

title: Sooooo tasty!

This is a good place great food service atmosphere and most importantly full of locals so it felt like you were more

The restaurant is located in the new part of the city, a little further from the historical monuments. The neighborhood is very lively. At night. There are many restaurants and relatively few tourists.
This makes it possible to make friendly meetings with the Vietnamese.

Very very tasty refined Vietnamese cuisine, delicious fresh fruit juices, friendly service by Trinht nothing was too much for her, she helped in the choice of our meal, all with a big smile.
Great!

review: Excellent service, A-MA-ZING food ! The best I ate in Hue, it's a must ! Even just the egg salad was fantastic and the platter of nem, noodles and duck was awesome ! And the prices are very cheap too !

Amazing!
Food is gorgeous, compliments from kitchen were so unexpected and pleasant!
Thank you for kind service and such a great experience 😍
