review:
By far the best restaurant and best service from staff I have ever seen in all of Vietnam.Our server was Quynh Anh and she paid attention to every detail.
I recommend this place as the best
Nice calm and relaxed atmosphere in a beautiful setting
Came here with my daughter and grandkids
The menu as well as the food was amazing and very affordable
I will be back

title: Not to be missed
review:
A very good restaurant with a lot of charm where we were really treated as in a gourmet restaurant. The service and staff were very quick and smiling.
We tasted the special Hue pork that was delicious (a little fat for those who don’t like it too much) and a pork stir-fry with pad choi just as good.
Very inexpensive. There is a lot of space in this restaurant, very well located at one of the entrances to the pedestrian zone of the weekend...
Do not hesitate!

title: Loved it!
review: This was a wonderful restaurant with delicious food and a cozy, delightful atmosphere. Our server, Tran was lovely and made the time special.

title: Very good food
review:
Very good restaurant. To do absolutely.
Thanks to Tran , a very friendly young waitress who had the patience and kindness to explain how to enjoy a particular dish.

title: Great nothing to say
review: I recommend very good, the waitress No to the top efficient service, very nice discovery of small dishes very well kitchens

title: Amazing place
review: Quynh Anh was really nice. Our drinks were a bit sweet, so I recommend to ask for not too much sugar. We let Quynh Anh know and fixed them right away! Overall service was great.

title: Great
review: We had such a nice meal in a beautiful restaurant. Our server Dung was very helpful and friendly. We had several different dishes and all were very good.

title: Delicious!
review:
Lovely experience and delicious food! Quynh was very sweet and helpful for us :)
She recommended the fried eggplant and it was delicious!

title: Lovely lunch
review: A lovely lunch chosen with Huyen’s help at this restaurant. Best spring rolls so far and great chicken and duck dishes. Plus a wonderful ginger honey tea. Thank you!

title: Good experience!
review: We had a very good experience in Chan's restaurant in Hue. Our servant Mo was very kind and helpful. We had a delicous menu of fish and vegetables. We reccomend this restaurant.

title: A treat
review: Excellent address a pleasure for the taste buds. An exceptional menu the dishes are excellent and the service is extra with a unique benevolence. By far the best restaurant we have made in Hue with all the local specialties. A treat!

title: Fabulous food and service
review: Recommended by our hotel we weren’t disappointed, the place itself is beautiful and cozy with gentle jazz music, but the food was fantastic, the best yet in a week of traveling, that we returned for more! And our waitress Huyen was the best, and ao sweet, but also really helpful guiding us in our choice and basically spoiling us rotten! And amazingly she remembered us when we returned though she must serve sooo many people each day. It all made us feel so welcome in our first day in Hue.

title: Super good !
review: food recommendation from Huyene was excellence thank you ! The ice tea was also very fresh and tasty, it was a good choice to come

title: Lovely food and friendly service
review: The restaurant was recommended by our hotel staff and we are so happy we asked, because the food was just wonderful. We were served by Huyen. She is brilliant to tell us what to go for. She is very friendly and sweet! We’ll be back tomorrow again 👍

title: Nice experience
review: A very good address with imune wide variety of dishes. The waiters are attentive and we especially thank Truong who guided us for the accompaniment of each dish with the adapted sauce.

title: Tasty and the service was excellent
review: My friends and I had a long, leisurely dinner last night - it was delightful! Our server, Quynh-Anh, was very accommodating and helpful, guiding our order and acknowledging certain dietary restrictions. We especially enjoyed the whole fish with lemongrass, the omelette, morning glory, soup with vegetables and tofu, and coconut shrimp. The service and food make for an authentic Hue experience - we highly recommend!

title: Lovey food and great service. Very welcoming to UK visitors
review: A lovely experience from start to finish. Exceptional service from the lovely Quynh Anh ❤️ Great food, served promptly and professionally, with advice on trying the two sauces/accompaniments which we really appreciated. This restaurant is busy and now we understand why. Thank you.

title: Fabulous!
review:
What a fabulous find in Hue! This restaurant was so welcoming, a gorgeous atmosphere and friendly staff. My waitress, Quynh Anh, was lovely. She spoke great English and was very helpful. I ordered lemongrass tofu and stir fried greens, both off the vegan menu, and they were delicious. Big portions, and the drinks options were interesting and delicious too.
Would definitely come again when back in Hue!

title: Great food and excellent service in Hue!
review: We came here 2 times during our stay at Hue and we had a great experience. Two times Huyen took excellent care of us! Food was delicious ane really well presented. Drinks are coffee were really good too. We reccommend :)

title: Excellent Service, Special Thanks to Dung
review:
I ate at Chan twice and really enjoyed the experience. The service was excellent, especially thanks to Dung, who took great care of us and made us feel very welcome throughout the meal.

The food was very good overall. However, I didn’t really enjoy the fish dish, as it contained far too many bones for my taste.

I also appreciated the lovely gesture at the end of the meal: a complimentary plate of fresh fruit or a rice-based dessert, which was a nice surprise.

Many thanks again to Dung ♥️👌

title: Lovely dinner, great food, friendly service
review: Delicious food! Everything was great - highlights are the fried eggplant in fish sauce, morning glory with garlic, and the chicken ! Also shout out the perfectly cooked rice. The service from Huyen was super friendly, welcoming and great English which made the whole experience that much better.

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review: Large and varied menu in Vietnamese and English with photos . Fabulous fresh food and delicious flavours - smiley and efficient service from Huyen. Nice environment for a tasty meal . We came in the evening and it’s really lovely

title: Vietnamese cuisine in its most pure and refined form.
review:
I have eaten in many great restaurants in my life, including Michelin-starred ones, and Chan in Huế truly stood out.

The restaurant is traditional in both its atmosphere and flavors. The food was absolutely delicious and possibly the best we had during our stay in Vietnam. The flavors were beautifully balanced and really came to life on the plate.

We were also warmly and sincerely welcomed by Ms. Nocen, which made the experience even more special.

Highly recommended.

With love from the Netherlands,
Victor & Suus

title: Great host & meal

title: Delicious food and lovely staff
review: This restaurant was recommended to me and was a great last meal in Hue. ThBott was very attentive and walked me through the extensive menu. I will be back!

title: Lunch in Hue
review: Local very welcoming and nice, we were served by Huyen who proved very attentive and helpful. The menu also includes vegetarian option, much appreciated! Everything we ordered was very good, very generous portions (watch out!). Recommended!

title: My best food experience
review: We went there for dinner and were immediately seated for three people in a wonderful atmosphere without a reservation. While we browsed the food and drink menus, we were brought small samples to our table, which tasted delicious. Our waitress, Huyen, was very friendly and took great care of us, giving us excellent recommendations, including for my brother, who is vegetarian. The drinks and food were superb and beautifully presented. During the meal, we were brought two more small bowls of the initial samples and additional hot sauce. I thoroughly enjoyed the meal; it was the most delicious culinary experience I had in Vietnam, and Huyen did a fantastic job. I felt completely at ease and can absolutely recommend it.

title: It was a great shop.
review:
I enjoyed home cooking in Hue.
The atmosphere of the shop was very good
ThBott's service was amazing.

title: Totally recommended
review: Great food and greqt service! Huyen was very attentive and we really enjoyed our dinner! Everything was very delicious!

title: Delicious food, friendly service
review: The food tasted very good to us, especially the fried eggplant in garlic fish sauce. Super friendly and competent service by Ms. Huyen. The restaurant is highly recommended.

title: Amazing food for a reasonable price!
review:
Amazing food for a reasonable price!
We ordered various dishes and everything was delicious. Staff was friendly and very attentive as well

title: Best vegan food I’ve ever eaten
review:
As a vegetarian, it can sometimes be difficult to find really good places to eat, but the food we had here was absolutely unbelievable. We chose the vegan set menu and had a couple of beers, and honestly couldn’t fault a single dish.

The variety was incredible, with so many different tastes and flavours. I actually had to double-check that one of the dishes was vegan because the mushrooms tasted so much like chicken — it was insanely good. Hands down the best vegan food I’ve ever eaten, topped off with fantastic service from Th Bott 10/10

title: Favorite restaurant in Vietnam so far!!
review: So good that we came back twice (and we’re Asian so we’re picky). There is such a variety of traditional foods, far beyond the typical selection. Our favorites were the sour fish soup, the special duck platter, and the vegan salad. The complimentary rice flour mung bean dessert was also delicious. The waiting staff and our waitress Huyen were all so so kind, explaining what our dishes (and other tables interesting dishes) were. The restaurant also has a good mix of tourists and locals, which is always a good sign.

title: Delicious food with lovely staff.
review: The food was delicious the two times we visited, and Huyen is a fantastic waitress. She is very kind, has good English and was so welcoming when we came back and sat in her section. We tried lots of different food and it was all yum! Would visit again.

title: Great food, service and decor!
review: We had a great experience! Our waitress Vi gave us the best service. Very considerate and patient with our questions and requests. Highly recommend the place!

review: Had the duck set and it was excellent. Also had some braised ribs that were tasty. Great service too. Huyen is a great server.

title: Not bad, though...
review: Despite arriving 15 minutes from the kitchen closure we were welcomed by young and kind waiters and served us immediately. The food was great. However the bathroom was very dirty. A shame when the premises get lost in not paying attention especially to the cleanliness of the bathrooms because this could make you think of the lack of cleanliness in the kitchens

title: A place chosen by instinct that turned out to be a wonderful surprise
review:
We dined at this restaurant on New Year’s Eve 2026, not because there was a special celebration planned in the locatio, but simply because we were drawn in by the many smiling guests enjoying their meals.

As soon as we sat down, we understood why. The service was excellent —attentive, warm and genuinely welcoming. We were especially well looked after by Houng, a truly lovely girl who gave us great suggestions and made us feel right at home. The food was very good, well prepared and full of flavor.

Therefore, because of the great service, tasty food and the welcoming atmosphere, would happily return and recommend it to anyone looking for a pleasant dining experience.

title: Awesome service!

Location: central, near hotel area

Atmosphere: clean but traditional, the staff (Huyen) was very nice

Food: didn’t expect the food to be as delicious, I loved every dish we tried, some of the best food we tried in Vietnam. The drinks were very good as well!

Good price-value, it wasn’t the cheapest food we ate in Vietnam, mas for the quality of what was served, totally worth it and still cheap.

Didn’t wait very long, the food was freshly made!

Loved it!

title: Excellent meal

title: Great food amazing service
review: The food was so tasty and felt very authentic. Vi was a really great server and we felt very welcome. The location is very central!

title: Kissing on the lips at Chan
review: Me and my partner had a lovely time at this place. Vi was a very supportive server and ally. Delicious pork belly. My girlfriend loved it (and I love her) I’m going to propose soon! So nervous #newlyweds #hopefully #hopeidontmessitup #thirdwife

title: Very good restaurant

title: Incredible
review: From the interior design of the place to the very kind and professional staff, Chan is definitely the place to eat when you are in Hue (and I haven’t even mentioned the food yet). This establishment serves some of the best Vietnamese cuisine since I began traveling here only a few months ago. Our server Huyen was incredibly hospitable and made sure we received everything we needed and ordered at a convenient pace with nothing feeling rushed. The People at Chan are Dedicated to Quality and you won’t regret the experience.

Great service

We sincerely recommend
A boutique corner, beautiful decoration
Martine

title: Fully belly with Vietnamese food
review:
We had a fantastic experience having an amazing dinner at Chan.
This restaurant is located in the center of Hue, and the atmosphere is authentic and lively. The food is traditional from this region of Vietnam.

We chose the second set menu for two people and ended the meal with happily full stomachs.
Vi provided excellent service and suggested a great alternative when one of the dishes was unavailable. The attention was thoughtful, and she always kept an eye on us to make sure everything was perfect.

I highly recommend this place if you want to taste local cuisine

title: Great food and great service
review: The place is very nicely decorated. The food was amazing and Huyen was so friendly and took good care of me and was so kind.

title: Very good restaurant, good music, cuisine, very fine and typical and in addition the staff is very friendly

I myself had octopus in sweet and sour sauce, was just delicious.

We were served by T. Huong friendly and also the food from my friend as well as the common starter (spring rolls) was very delicious.

The ambience of the restaurant was also pleasant.

In short : I highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Delicious food and beautiful atmosphere!
review:
The food was absolutely incredible, one of the best in our trip! We got a beef soup with vegetables and a ginger tea (absolutely delicious). Very quick with cooking as well, we waited almost no time!

The restaurant has a very cozy atmosphere and out waitress Huyen was super friendly was absolutely lovely, explaining every dish and also bringing some complementary watermelon and sticky roce cakes.

100% recommended if you're in Hue!!

title: Warm welcome and delicious duck.

The food was tasty Vietnamese cuisine and excellent value. I had the signature duck plate (or rather half-plate which Huyen rightly assured me would be plenty for me) with a variety of dipping sauces. Delicious. The service enthusiastic and attentive. The atmosphere was bustling but relaxing with a gentle piano accompaniment. Would recommend highly.

She helped us with our food choices and when the food came she talked us through the sauces, of which there were many. The food was absolutely delicious. The whole experience felt like a top Restaurant and the entire meal with a beer was $14! aud.. Unbelievable value is a lovely restaurant and top service.
Definitely going again.....

In conclusion, you can come and enjoy a meal in this restaurant:).

review: Wonderful restaurant, with friendly service from Vi. Not speaking very good English, but in the end no inconvenience encountered. Got here through Tripadvisor. Food was very tasty and good quality! All expectations fulfilled.

review: We enjoyed an excellent dinner here, with excellent Service. Our waitress, Trinh, made sure we didn't lack anything. She was super friendly. The food was cheap and very tasty.

review: Greatest food experience of our Vietnam holiday. The range of foods was amazing. The table had plenty of food so a lot of sharing made for a great range of flavours and selections. Arrived at 1 pm when the rush was over so had a lovely time. Service was great as the rush had finished. Upstairs and great surroundings

title: Recommended
review:
Friendly and helpful staff, especially Huyen. Local clean and specially decorated with many plants! Extensive menu with few vegetarian choices, although there are two vegan tasting menus.
Restaurant near the pedestrian area of Hue.

title: Don’t bother looking anywhere else just go here…set menu fantastic value and quality.
review:
Been in Vietnam a week and been a bit underwhelmed by food so far. This place certainly made up for that…to be honest ended up on the wrong street looking for another place to eat and saw this restaurant with loads of locals going in which is always a great sign. Anyway ventured in and was amazed…we opted for a set menu for 2 (we thought it was £20 each but turned out to be £20 for both of us ! And that was with 2 cocktails included 😳). Menu in English so clearly knew what we were ordering. What really helped was our server (Huyen) spoke fantastic English so explained every sauce, dip and dish. She was fantastic… food was sublime and being a tasting menu challenged us to try different stuff we wouldn’t have normally ordered.

My only regret is I found this place on the last night in Hue otherwise I’d go every night.

title: Best of Vietnam
review: Had such a great time at Restaurant! The vibe was super chill, the food hit the spot, and Huyen, our server, was just awesome—friendly, on top of everything, and made us feel right at home. Would totally come back just for her service alone. Check this place out if you want good food and even better service

title: Excellent food / great service!

title: Dinner in Hue
review: Food is amazing. Our server was Huyen. She was very attentive. Everything was brought in fast and together. Food tasted great. Highly recommend!!

The restaurant interior features clay and wood, which is a lovely environment to eat in. The service was brilliant and every single dish we ordered was outstanding. It was a great price too. No flaws!

Great atmosphere,

The service was the best service we have ever had. Sally had great food recommendations and made us feel taken care of. Overall it was a great experience, we will be back!

Thank you T Ruong and Chan-19 for such a pleasurable meal.

review: The food was really good. Welcoming very nice and Service performed by Huyen was perfect! They are helpful and always smile.

title: Nice setting, friendly service & good food!
review: Was very tasty! T. Huong is very nice & thought along in the dishes we could choose. Highly recommended for a good price!

title: Wonderful food in Hue
review: We had a group of 6 and happened upon the restaurant. We ordered 2 of the special menus, and it was delicious. Nhi did a great job as our server and we were well fed!

title: Superb last meal in Huế
review: Superb! The mixed plates are so good! My wife and I ate here on our last night in Huế. We were not disappointed. The service was great and the food was lovely. The hardest part was choosing what to have.

title: Great restaurant and great service
review: Fancy viatbamesusch food with all facets - our service Truong was super nice accommodating and helpful. the food super authentic

title: Great food and atmosphere
review:
Beautiful restaurant
We had a great meal and a lovely atmosphere.
Our waiter was fantastic, thanks Trliong.
Will recommend to eat here

title: A nice choice
review: This restaurant had great food and a very nice atmosphere. Huyen was a very friendly server! I will come back again soon!

title: Good food good mood
review: Good food, we ordered several dishes like spring rolls, pork ribs, veggies etc. Tasted really fresh and good. nice service from Vi. When we finished we got some watermelon.

title: NICE PLACE TO GIVE A TRY
review:
We have been to this restaurant several times. The food here is really fantastic. I am impressed about the traditional food and the ưay the serve the food.
Nice place and the the staffs are very friendly.
Especially, Huyen is a very nice girl, really take care about us, whenever she knows we are here
Highly recommend this restaurant

title: Chan Restaurant
review: Excellent Experience, Very Good Food and Great Service, Highly Recommended Squid, Our Very Attentive and Friendly Trliong Waiter.

title: Best place Hue local food
review: Best food experience in vietnam. Local food very tasty and fresh made. The calamari was perfect. Nice place. Thanks Truong for the good job and recommendation.

title: Best food of our trip!
review: We had coffee at Chan every morning during our stay in Hue, but only ate dinner here on our last night. What a surprise! It was the best dinner of our trip to Vietnam. Trinh was a great server, and she gave us a few recommendations. So we took her advice, and everything was delicious!

title: Tried the menu set, totally recommended!
review: We tried Set menu with duck and snakehead! Every dish was delicious, but the snakehead was something new! T. Huong showed us how to eat it with ricepaper, mango, and coriander!! Delicious 😋

title: Authentic Hue Food Experience
review: We went to CHAN because of the good reviews on google maps and we were not disappointed at all. The food came quickly, warm and delicious and their drinks are just as good and refreshing. Service was very helpful (we got served by T. Huong). You can go ahead and order their set meals to try out, we came here for the com nhien (speciality in Hue). The set for 2 was actually enough for 4 people (ate the whole day) + a few side dishes to make us full. Very good to share like a typical viet family meal.

title: Very good
review: A super nice place, it was fresh, and the food is very good 😀, our waitress T.Huung very friendly attended us and 3n taught how to eat each dish and sauce. Very good!!!

title: I recommend!
review:
Very good restaurant. The food was very good!
In addition, we had a wonderful Welcoming and accompaniment throughout our meal with Sally:)

title: Amazing restaurant with great food from Hué
review: Amazing food and fantastic service! Truong was phenomenal in explaining dishes and added extra spice as per my liking.

title: Authentic local food with wonderful people!
review: Awesome little place to eat in Huê, we popped in for some breakfast before catching a bus to Hoi An. My Husband had a Vietnamese breakfast plate for 110k VND (about £3), it included soup, rice, egg, meats, shrimps, and some amazing garlic dipping sauce. My son and I just had a yoghurt each and a drink, but they were delicious too. We were served by a lovely lady called Huyen, who couldn't do enough to help us and spoke amazing English. Would recommend to anyone passing through the area!

title: Amazing dinner
review: Modern and colorful restaurant, populated by young local customers. Very wide menu, possibility to make tastings or simply to choose between the various compound dishes proposed. Exceptional quality and clearly low prices, as in the rest of Vietnam.

title: Vero Nice
review:
We had our first coffee here in Hue, which was excellent. Lunch, the welcome, and the kindness were truly superb. Recommended.
Our waitress Huyen

title: Top level dining experience.
review: Excellent place. This one really sticks out. From food to service everything is top notch. Sally was an absolute charm.

title: Never two without three?
review:
Second time we make this restaurant in 48 hours, it is how perfect everything is.
The products are fresh, the dishes are balanced and the atmosphere is great.
Yesterday I put a special mention for pork with caramel, tonight is the omelet!
A priori simple but PERFECT!
A big thank you to Vi who took care of us with attention and kindness!

title: Perfect dinner!
review:
Excellent cuisine, Quality Service a friendly and dedicated team... what better to ask for! Go with your eyes closed!
Special dedication to Vi for his thoughtfulness and delicacy. ☺️

title: Great food, drinks, and a chill place to cool down in a hot day.
review: Hearty tasty food that comforts my hungry stomach and suits my palate. The servers, especially T. Huong, are hospitable and helpful. Highly recommended :)

title: Fantastic!
review: It is a delicious restaurant, you can go there with your eyes closed and a big thank you to the waiter Truong who made us taste Vietnamese specialties. Service team is very friendly.

title: Perfect!
review: I had a wonderful lunch in Hue! The roasted duck was delicious and the service was excellent. Special thanks to Vi for her kindness and great attention.

title: Loved the food
review: I loved the service of Truong :) and the food was amazing thank u! Also the location is great and the restaurant looks nice!

title: Everything perfect!
review:
It's delicious!
The friendly Huyen welcomed us in this wonderful restaurant.

We ate typical Vietnamese dishes.
They also have several vegetarian/vegan options.

It was all exquisite, the staff very kind, the location beautiful.

Super recommended!

title: To try
review:
Great place, really wonderful food.
Particular praise to the kindness of Huyen who made us feel at home. Different options for vegans.

title: Great place
review: Great food and wonderful service from Huyen!!!!!! We will definitely be back before we leave hue. Thank you so much!!!!

title: Yummy with good service
review: Delicious meal at beautiful venue with lots of vegetarian options! We were looked after well by Huygen 😊 would definitely come back

title: Good dinner
review:
The setting is very nice. The kitchen is delicious. Service, perfect, especially with the kindness and sympathy of Huyen.
Thanks to her especially.

title: Tasty food and good service!
review: Tasty food with generous portions. Service was very good and quick. Trliong our server was very helpful and friendly. He explained the menu well and helped us pick. Definitely recommend coming here for some food or just a drink.

title: Trendy restaurant
review: Trendy restaurant in the center of Hue. The food is delicious. Thanks to Huyen for the advice, explanations and quality of Service.

title: Best meal in Vietnam
review: I’ve been traveling in Vietnam for three weeks, and I can tell that this was one of the meals I’ve ever tried here. I really advise to try the salt fried chicken and the ginger and brown sugar hot tea. Sally was such amazing and cute person. Don’t miss out on Chan, you will regret it 🫰🏻🇻🇳

title: Tourist but discreet
review: Discreet restaurant with very affable Service , decent cuisine but nothing unforgettable. But it's not bad at all.

title: Tasting menu, thanks Sally
review:
Very good food, with a very good and hearty tasting menu for two.
We were served by Sally, who was lovely.
Also, very well located.

title: Good address
review:
We had dinner with family at this restaurant.

Smiling and warm Welcoming, we feasted (especially with caramel pork ribs).

We were lucky enough to be served by Sally! Kind, welcoming, smiling and attentive with us, we had a pleasant time!

I recommend this address

title: Good food and excellent service
review: Vietnamese food restaurant with many dishes and also combos that are very good price and also allow you to try various options. We were attended by Quynh Anh lovely, like all her companions who were aware of our needs and explained all the dishes. They have outdoor terrace, lower and upper floor.

title: All great!
review: Very cozy and nice place. We had several dishes and all very good. They were very quick to serve us and our waitress Quynh Anh was lovely to us. Highly recommended!

title: A good place
review: Any place, suitable for those who want to eat something good for a cheap price. Good vegetables, the rest edible. Courteous Service, dramatic wine list.

title: Great Restaurant with High Quality Service
review:
We ate here 4 times during our stay. The food was delicious, nicely served.
Service was absolutely adorable, especially by Huyen. She was very professional and both very friendly, good advice. Thank you very much!

title: Very delicious and top service. Thanks Sally
review: We visited Chan for dinner. Chose Set 04, which was very delicious. For 2 was more than enough. We enjoyed our dinner and the atmosphere here. Sally was very kind to explain how to eat and very nice. Thanks to her our dinner was very delicious and enjoyable.

title: A satisfying and delicious meal
review: The food was delicious and had plenty of vegan and gluten free options. Our server Huyen was really helpful in helping me find options that fit my dietary restrictions.

title: Great culinary expérience
review: The expérience was very amazing and Huyen was very kindly with her happy face. Great waitress and great restaurant in Hué.

title: Recomendable
review:
Very good place
We
Huyen attended and the treatment and kindness was unbeatable.
Food is good and prices tb.I recommend it

title: Good restaurant
review: We took our lunch at noon. Service was perfect, fast and friendly. The dishes chosen were excellent.

title: Excellent Vietnamese cuisine
review: Extensive menu of both meat, fish and vegetarian. We tasted the mixed dish of duck and fried chicken, both delicious. Very nice and kind Quang Anh who served us.

title: Amazing
review: So amazing! Huyen is a fantastic advisor of fabulous meals!!!! Wonderful traditional dishes and a simple, traditional eland funny location!

title: Simply amazing
review: Simply amazing. In my opinion it is one of the most beautiful restaurant in Hué. Everything was special and refined in each particular. The staff and in particular Huyen was very helpful and funny. I really suggest you to go there.

title: Delicious wine and food
review: I'm just saying he brought me wine, so everything's fine. Really great food one of the best Vietnamese restaurants tried at various stages. Huyen is the best.

title: Amazing food
review:
The food and location are delicious and awesome! The girl Huyen helped us with the menu, portions and food explaining in a professional way!
I really suggest to come over here

title: Dinner with family
review: We got food extremeky fast. Everything was delicious. Our waitress Sally was charming and really helpful, first restaurant where staff knew english. The atmosphere was amazing. I would recomend this place to my family and friends.

title: Amazing service from Vi and team
review: Amazing service from Vi and team!! Loved it!!! Would highly recommend vegan sausage! Very quick service!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

title: Nice typical Hue’s cusine restaurant
review: Very nice restaurant to feel a typical Hue’s atmosphere! Mr. Trulong was very kind and professional! A pleasure have a dinner here!

title: Great restaurant
review: Our taxi driver's golden tip: food like the locals. Fantastic food in a cozy restaurant, which was indeed largely full of Vietnamese. Great food, very affordable, great service (tribute to Truong!) - incredible recommended

title: Nice and tastfull!
review: My server was Huyen, very very nice and helpfull. She helped us to choose from a tastefull menu and all our group was very happy. We had a great dinner for a reasonable price!!

title: “Flavours of Hue: A Culinary Journey to the Heart of Vietnam”
review: Very good! We ended up here after reading the reviews and we can confirm that everything is great, we tried other places for high reviews and instead they were always disappointing, this is the first restaurant we really enjoyed! Huyen, who served us was really nice and friendly! Absolutely recommend!!

title: Good Vegetarian Options
review: Good options for vegetarians! We had a Vegi-Set Menu, which was a bit much for 2 people (rather for 3-4) but still very tasty. Great Service from Trinh, who was very nice and welcoming. Would visit again!

title: Hue trip amazing people, very relaxing place and good food
review:
Amazing foods, highly recommend if you are looking for Authentic Hue foods. Very reasonable price too..

Very cozy vibrant and nice food presentation.

High star to Ms. Huyen service & to the rest of the staff and specially to all the Chef behind.🥰

title: Very good.
review: Amazing restaurant! The food was delicious and the atmosphere cozy. Special thanks to Vi for her outstanding, friendly service. Highly recommended!

title: Great lunch with the Kids
review: It was super good and our waitress #Huyen too nice!! Thank you we highly recommend this restaurant it was very good and the place very nice and authentic

title: Hue dining out- recommendation/experience
review: An exceptional experience in terms of Service, quality, Welcoming, taste, good prices and professionalism. I like to award 7 stars and more! Just go there! Thanks Huyen for the great Service!

title: Good
review: Very good and delicious food. The restaurant vibe is very welcoming. Staff very friendly, especially Huyen. Thank you.

title: Restaurant
review:
We ordered beef and both dishes were good. Service by Huyen was very good.
Lychee tea is super good

title: Very good restaurant
review: Many choices. Excellent food. Very reasonable price. Fast and efficient Service. We will be back soon

title: Great place with great waiter / tress
review: Excellent meal in this restaurant. Ducky was a really good waiter. my wife choose a plate for her for tasting. Ducky said maybe it was too much for her and he was right. She chose a half size plate and it was perfect. A really good advice that we don t see everywhere. Thanks

title: First culinary experience in Hue
review:
The dishes are beautiful and full of flavors. It’s really delicious. We tasted 6 different dishes all as good as each other.
The small things to eat as an “apéritif” are also very good but very very pungent 😨🤣

title: Great Vietnamese typical food in nice ambience
review: Great Vietnamese typical food and ambience in the heart of Hue’s foodie district. Huong’s kindness was sincerely appreciated as she helped me pick the beat dishes! Definitely recommend

title: Great dinner in Hue
review: Very good variety of vietnamise food, we tried rolls with duck, stuffed calamari and braised fish. Dung was a very nice and welcoming waitress. Very recommended!

title: Delicious dining in Hue
review:
We could choose from different dishes
Huyen is a friendly lady who helped us make a choice.
The food was delicious as was the special ginger tea.

Highly recommended for when you want to eat special local dishes
They also have on the menu a kind of varied tasting dinner for 2 including wine
The very best restaurant in Hue

title: A meal in HUE
review:
A fun time for a shared meal in a busy part of Hue

Lots of dishes are offered in packs for 2 with drinks included (wine glasses or coltail) or à la carte of your choice

At the end we are offered some good fruits

title: Great dinner.
review:
Food was amazing. Not expensive at all. Atmosphere was relaxed and service was proper.

Shout out to my waitress Huyen who took good care of me!

title: Eat local Hue food with style.
review: Great food and atmosfere. Our esiterà Quynh Anh was very attentive especially when we told her we had to catch the train. A highly recommended experience. Perhaps our best meal in Vietnam so far.

title: Taste a regional speciality
review:
Huyen was excellent advice to choose a typical dish of the region. The dishes are very good and surprising.
The decoration is well chosen. The prices are soft.

title: Amazing dinner with family in Hue
review: Great vibe, extremely kind waitresses Huyen who was ready to help you out with anything. Food looked amazing, with a lot of available options, and was absolutely delicious. Would definitely recommend this restaurant for anyone!

title: Great start of my trip
review:
Amazing food and staff, beautiful ambiance. Great start of my trip in Vietnam, thanks Huyen!!!! Will come here again
😀😀😀

title: It is the best shop I experienced in Vietnam trip
review:
I was introduced to Meriavim Paal Hue staff and visited for dinner on 7/30.
Mr. TRLIONG served us.
When I asked about the restaurant's recommendations, they told me about vegetable-based dishes such as this, tofu, chicken, and fish.
I ordered 3 dishes from them, all of which are very delicious and have a good herb, but I found them very easy for Japanese to eat.
I had the best experience in Hue.
When we asked them to take the rest back to the hotel, they were very gracious and even put chopsticks and spoons on it.
It was the perfect response to everything. If you are visiting Hue, please visit it once.

title: Great food and warm service
review: Shuhen provided excellent service from start to end. Helped us choose the plates, explained the meals and sauces, was attentive. The food was great, really enjoyed the calamari with tomato and pineapple (surprising but super good following her advice)

title: An amazing evening
review: Dung did everything to ensure we could have an amazing evening. The menus we ordered were absolutely delicious. But it really was her kind hospitality that made the difference. Chan is warmly recommended!

title: wonderful experience
review: Typical dishes delicious and for all tastes. Very smiling and professional staff, I highly recommend

title: Very good restaurant
review: Succulent dishes and lots of choices, prompt Service and attentive waiters. Thanks to Trliong for his Service!

title: Chan restaurant perfect dinung
review: Great place to eat traditional Vietnam food, atmosphere is perfect. Duc served us, But the service was overall really good.

title: Really good place to go !
review:
I had a really great experience at this restaurant !
The food was amazing and the service by T.Huong was perfect ! She was really nice and caring.
Was recommended by a local to us. Great food & service. Vi was wonderful to us. We ordered a variation of food ranging from family style, Hue specialty, mussel salad .

Great food, great atmosphere. Authentic Vietnamese dishes. Especially miss Huong, she took great care of us.
Do not miss this restaurant.

title: Nice restaurant with tasting menus to try
review:
Nice, slightly more upscale restaurant with nice atmosphere!
Tasting menus (pre-assembled menus) are a great idea for guests who like to taste different things or don't want to decide.
We ate the Tasting Menu No. 1, where we were impressed by the fish! Tea No. 3 (Tra hoa gao chay) was my absolute favorite!
The staff, in our case Huyen, is also very friendly!
The cocktails were fine, but not a highlight. It is worth taking a vest with you, as the fans are set very strongly.

title: Eat in the center of Hue
review: We went to eat at the Chan after visiting the Hue mausoleums and were hungry. We found the food excellent. Although we had been in town for several days, we were able to try new dishes from traditional cuisine. Everything was very well cooked. Truong and his colleagues were very professional in their care.

title: You have to eat here yes or yes
review: Try the caramelized pork and order white rice. Mix it and enjoy. The spring rolls are also spectacular and Hueen serves everything with lots of love. Un 10
Great dinner here tonight and lovely service (thank you Trliong!). I have to eat gluten free and he helped me with choices which is greatly appreciated)

title: All right.
review: Excellent restaurant: good Vietnamese cuisine in a lively area of Hue. Our waitress Li was perfect for Service.

title: Great dinner in Huè
review: Really good food. Quality price excellent. Very attentive and precise Service. We were followed by Huong who was really very kind and professional. If you are in Huè, stop by, you will not regret it!

During our trip to Vietnam we discovered this cozy restaurant, where we enjoyed one of the best meals of our stay. The coconut prawns were simply delicious: crispy on the outside, soft and fragrant on the inside, with a perfect balance between sweetness and sea flavour. The fried fish was also cooked to perfection, with a light, golden fry.

A special thanks goes to the waitress Huyen, who proved to be very kind and very attentive to our needs. She not only advised us politely, but also personally cleaned the fish at the table, making the experience even more enjoyable.

At the end of the meal we were also offered desserts, a welcome surprise that ended a perfect evening.
Highly recommended to those looking for good food, authentic hospitality and a touch of extra care.

title: Recommended for both Service and Food. Very good
review: Great food we ate several dishes and all were good. We had the lacale beer and it was very good. Great Service our waitress was Huyen and was great

title: Fantastic food and staff
review: We had a lovely lunch here. A short wait for a table. We had the caramelised pork belly, duck mixed platter (1/2 portion), 2 beers and some rice. The staff were great. Duc looked after us really well and helped us. Highly recommended.

title: Amazing Vietnamese cuisine
review: Delicious food. Staff very helpful especially our waiter Truong who helped me work out what dishes were gluten free. Would highly recommend coming here.
Thanks to Truong for the Service which is excellent as well as the food really a great place in Hue I recommend!:)

title: Coconut Coffee & Great meal
review: Great meal & service. I’ve gone past this restaurant a few times it’s always very busy so decided to come back and try. It has many locals in here and nice atmosphere and air-conditioning also got a coconut coffee today here and it was the best I’ve had in a long time.

title: Lovely dinner
review: We had a wonderful dinner at the restaurant! The food was really good, we had a lot of small, delicious meals to share. Also, the staff was super friendly and we especially enjoyed ‘S Huyen’s service! Thanks for the nice dinner 😊

title: Great Tasty & Delicious
review: The food was outstanding and so delicious, thank you Nguyen. We loved the Caramilised Pork and the Squid with Sweet&Sour.

title: Good food and nice place
review:
It is a really good place and delicious. I’m highly recommended ☺️ A place in Hué to have a great time!
A menu with many dishes, prices are Okay and typical vietnamese food.

title: Amazing experience in Hue
review: We arrived quite late for dinner but Truong gently welcomed us. We ordered tasting menus and the food was amazing, especially the peanut fried tofu (I usually dislike tofu, but I would gladly eat this dish every day). Don’t hesitate and treat yourself by paying Chan a visit if you are in Hue, you will not be disappointed.

title: A delicious diner in Hué
review: The diner was excellent ! Truong welcomed the six of us nicely though it was late and the dishes were delicious! I recommend

title: Chan dinner
review: Food was amazing and our waiter was so lovely and friendly. Great service from Nhan. Will definitely be coming back here in the future!

title: Amazing food and staff
review: Amazing restaurant, we enjoyed a lot our meal here. The staff is really friendly and nice. The food is absolutely delicious. Highly recommended!

title: Favourite Place in Hue to eat!
review:
Very delicious fresh authentic Vietnamese food!
The staff was very kind and helpful. It didnt take much time for our food to arrive. I can definitely recommend it and i would eat here again!

title: Wonderful food in a wonderful ambience
review: This place was advised by a Hue citizen in the plane for diner, it was beyond expectations, I have eaten here twice for diner, I came back because the menu was to good and the first time I couldn’t order everything I could possible have eaten. The food is fantastic, the atmosphere also, almost no tourists, only Vietnamese customers. When you visit Hue and want a real food experience this is a must stop!

title: Tasty food, amazing staff.
review: The food was delicious and very well priced. The staff were amazing and very helpful. We were served by Truong who was very helpful and made the experience a pleasure. Definitely recommend!

title: Typical and delicious
review: Beautiful discovery, frequented by locals sign that it is a reference. We confirm: we have chosen the pork cooked with coconut milk and the pieces of chicken cooked with salt, all accompanied by an excellent rice in pot. A big thank you to My Tam for his kindness about our satisfaction and efficiency.

title: Great dinner with lots of options
review: Great dinner with lots of options! My Tam was a wonderful server and the atmosphere inside the restaurant was lovely. I also ordered the coconut matcha from the coffee shop area earlier in the day and it was fantastic as well.

title: A must visit!
review: Huyen was a very attentive host, and the meal was delicious! Would definitely come again. A very good vegan menu that satisfied!

title: Thanks Truong <3
review: This spot is really good if you want to eat real vietnamese specialities , really good services if you want to enjoy it on a dinner night and the employees are really kind

title: Good Dinner
review: Even on a busy Friday night we were sat immediately. Food here was amazing and the menu is extremely authentic, ranging from soups and meat dishes to more vegetarian options. Even though they were busy we got our food quick. I highly recommend eating here and Thanh H. was such an amazing server!!

title: Delicious, good service
review: We chose the Set Menu 2 and it was delicious, lots of really nice food! Huyen was a very attentive waitress! Would highly recommend!

title: Nice place in Hue
review:
Nice place for good food. Great plate with duck and springrolls. Delicious sauce.
Also the staff is very friendly (we got helped by N.Trinh)

title: Very nice!
review: The meal was absolutely delicious. We went with Tasting Menu 3, which came with a great selection of condiments and a complimentary watermelon dessert. Everything was cooked to perfection, and our waitress, Thanh Huong, was wonderful so friendly and attentive. Highly recommend this place.❤️❤️❤️

title: Excellent!!!
review: The food was excellent!!! It was such a wonderful experience that we came here again the following day. This is special for our select palate. We loved the variety of flavours, the extremely varied menu and the deliciously prepared food. The friendly staff was overwhelming. Truong in particular was particularly accommodating and immediately recognized us on the second evening and served us politely.

title: wonderful experience
review:
everything was delicious, and the waiterTruong was very helpfull and friendly.
I would definitely recommand visiting CHAN

title: The sauce is crazy.
review: In the hostel where I was staying, he asked me to pick up restaurants with high Google ratings, so he cautiously recommended this restaurant. It's not a special food that's handled in such restaurants, it's a routine food that comes from bread and snacks, and it's easy to eat, so you like it personally. During peak hours, we had a long wait line and ate, and then went every day during our stay. Clean and delicious. If you come back later, you will hear it again.

title: Great food and great service.
review: Fantastic food and fantastic service. Huyen served us, she explained the dishes for us (in very good English), and was very attentive. A great place to eat during our visit to Hué!

title: Excellent!!
review:
Excellent restaurant with traditional cuisine!
Compound menus allow you to taste dishes that you would not have thought of or dared. Everything is very, very good!
The staff is very smiling and very professional, especially Truong (lovely!!) ... who served white wine on demand to keep it cool!
Went there twice in 2 days!:D
We highly recommend this address!

title: Service
review: It’s so delicious…. And the staff specially huyen… she speaks to me nice…. So i love this place…

title: suitable for local Vietnamese palates
review:
Huyen was our waitress, she is wonderful in doing her job, well spoken English and recommending some dishes to us.
we were recommended by Melia V to come to Chan restaurant, Melia thought we were chinese and missed chinese food, in-fact we were looking for authentic Vietnamese cuisine.

Chan cuisine is only suitable for local vietnamese palates not for majority Chinese from other countries.

That’s my opinion, my background is chinese 2nd generation from Medan, Sumatra Indonesia, but lived in California for over 45 years.

title: Great lunch spot
review: Great spot, tasty food, and helpful servers for people who don’t speak Vietnamese (thanks Thanh for the help!) would definitely recommend

title: Delicious
review: This spot was delicious, beautifully decorated, and very reasonably priced. Huyen was a wonderful server and made sure our favorite sauce was topped up. Thank you!

title: I recommend!
review: Very good restaurant in Hue, with quality food and staff with great care. Fast and efficient service. Special mention to Sally for her kindness and smile.

title: Very good restaurant, go with your eyes closed
review:
Very nice and welcoming setting with air conditioning and fan to be cool while enjoying delicious dishes served quickly.
Thanks to Sally for her kindness and quality of service.
I highly recommend!

title: Great food and service
review: Had an amazing lunch here, would highly recommend the salt roasted chicken, duck platter and the pork belly. Had great service from Thanh Huong, thank you!

title: An all-round great experience (taste and friendliness)
review: Our service "Huyen" was super friendly. The food was Hue-typical and very delicious, got a traditional dessert! Would definitely come back.

title: Delicious and great service!
review: Delicious food… second time we came here to try new dishes. The lemongrass tofu and braised fish are 100/100 recommend. We are still dreaming 😇 great service from Nhan 🤍

title: Excellent food and service
review: The meal was absolutely delicious, we had a beef in lemongrass sauce and a squid dish, with some condiments, and complimentary watermelon as dessert. Everything was cooked to perfection and our waitress Nhan was gorgeous. Highly recommended!

title: Good food and friendly staff
review: Very nice restaurant with good atmosphere and delicious food. They have set menus for people who have difficulty choosing, which I really liked. I was served by Ly, who was very kind to me.

title: Tasty food and drinks!
review: Popped in for a meal here as our hotel was nearby. Thought we would give it a try as it always looked busy and had a fun vibe. The food was super tasty with a huge range of vegetarian options! Drinks were so good! Awesome service by Nhan too :)

title: Delightful vibe and great flavours
review:
Amazing find in Hue. We stumbled upon Chan and were not disappointed. Food was great - salted chicken, pork belly and bok Choy with minced pork! Great flavours (though struggled to eat the fried shaved lemongrass which looked so good!).
Atmosphere is really nice with wooden furniture and yellow/terracotta colours. Was a really nice place to sit and eat. Looks on to what was a nice quiet- ish street. Thanh Huong our waitress was lovely- animated, friendly and helpful with explaining the dishes! Will have to come back and try daytime/salted coffee tomorrow!

title: A great find!
review: Beautiful styled restaurant. Great atmosphere, reasonable prices, and quick service. Thanh H was an excellent waitress and very helpful with explaining dishes and suggestions. We will return and recommend, the food was delicious especially the pork belly! Thank you!

title: Local food - good vibes
review:
Thanh Huong was very nice and helpfull.
Amazing service and lokal food. Busy with locals and foreigners at the same time.
Nice Atmosphere. :)

title: Lovely dinner in Hue
review: We had an absolutely delicious dinner here. The team were exceptionally friendly and attentive, especially Trliong. We would absolutely love to eat here again and would recommend it to anyone looking for a delicious meal in Hue.

title: Recommended
review: Very accommodating nice service. Read all the wishes off our lips. We can only recommend the restaurant.

title: Don’t miss this lovely restaurant in Hue
review: We loved Chan. The food was so so good - especially the braised fish and the aubergine, and the atmosphere was friendly and warm. Huong looked after us and made us feel very welcome even though the day we went it was super busy because of the freedom anniversary and Chan’s was full of Vietnamese families celebrating. Thank you Huong and Chan - my son and his partner are in Hue next week and will definitely visit.

title: Delicious locally inspired set menu
review: Delicious set menu with pork ribs, spring rolls and calamari with a beautiful red wine. Our waitress Nhan was very kind and warm and made us feel very welcome. The rice in the clay pot and the fresh fruit served were the perfect contribution.

title: Very good address
review:
Super discovery of tasting menus to discover impeccable service with seriousness and smile.....
Good products, dishes well explained by the staff

title: A satisfying dinner in Hue
review: The staff kindly recommended the restaurant's menu items and I enjoyed a very satisfying meal. Thank you LY! Thanks for the fruit service

title: Quynh Anh
review: Thank you so much, this was an amazing experience! They made space for us even though it was crowded but it was worth every penny!

title: Great dinner time!
review:
The food here is really good and tasty. The staff is also very kind and professional, specially Quynh Anh which did everything to make our experience perfect!
We highly recommend this place!

title: Thank you Quynh Anh
review: Quynh Anh was our waitress tonight and she was wonderful !! So attentive with excellent service. The food was such a delicious taste of hue cuisine. Can’t recommend enough :)

title: Amazing Vegan food
review: The service was amazing and the vegan food delicious and very tasty. Thanks to Tam Bao for his smile and dedication. A very good address in Hué

title: Good restaurant in a casual setting with excellent Vietnamese cuisine
review: Great dinner, authentic Vietnamese flavors in a casual setting. There were 6 of us, we took various dishes to share (there was really plenty of choice) and we also spent 35 euros in 6 with drinks.

title: Simply delicious
review: It was a super delicious meal for little money. Our waitress MINH TAM took good care of our well-being. If we were in Hue any longer, we would go back to eating there.

title: Great time
review: Came on advice from my hotel, I was not disappointed! The food is very very good and allows you to discover Hue specialties. In addition the staff is very nice and smiling

title: Amazing lunch at Chan!
review: We had such a great meal at Chan. We asked Truong about the Hue’s specialties and he so kindly advised us two delicious dishes and even offered desert. Highly recommend!

title: Insane taste explosion
review: Amazing cuisine. The tastiest regret, tasteful cuisine of the 3 weeks we have been in Vietnam. Affordable and super tasty. Highly recommended.

title: Great family evening
review: Excellent restaurant, each dish is an explosion of flavors. The waiters speak English and Quy was attentive from start to finish. There are many vegetarian options. I'll come back to eat here!

title: Great Dinner Experience at Chạn
review:
Had a great dinner here with my family.
The staff were very kind and attentive, and always had a smile on their faces.
Menu was comprehensive and the dishes we had were fresh, flavourful and interesting.
I would definitely return to try other dishes on the menu.
Overall great experience and Mr.Thang gave us some delicious vietnanese desserts called Banh Gai, we loved those.
Thanks very much for an enjoyable experience.

title: Highly recommended if you are looking for good food, in Hue.
review:
We just had an authentic Vietnamese dining experience @Chan’s with perfectly balanced spiciness that brought out the flavors. Generous portions and exceptional service by Minh Tam, who was sweet, gentle, prompt, and attentive. Thank you Minh Tam.
We'll definitely return if we're ever in the area again!

title: Great restaurant
review: Wonderful meal, we were in Hue for 3 nights & ate here twice. Staff are so kind & helpful, My Tam was our waitress on the second evening & gave us advice about the menu. We would highly recommend it.

title: Great food!
review: Really tasty food! We had the stewed duck with bamboo shoots - can recommend 👍🏻 Nhan was very sweet and helped us wonderfully!

title: Great food and atmosphere
review: Lovely food and atmosphere, all the locals eat here. Would definitely recommend if come to hue!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

title: Authentic Vietnamese Flavors in a Cozy Setting
review: Great Vietnamese restaurant with authentic food and super friendly service! The clay pot rice (Cơm niêu) was a real highlight – crispy, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. Fresh ingredients, fair prices, and a nice, cozy atmosphere. Highly recommended for anyone who loves Vietnamese cuisine!

title: Great staff and delicious food
review: Na me Cuong is a courteous and very friendly waiter who fulfilled every wish. The restaurant is super modern and the food just really delicious

title: Perfect
review: Amazing food very delicious and tasty food with a little modern twist, staff are very friendly and more than happy to help with any questions.

title: Amazing food, delicate flavours and very attentive service
review: Very delicate flavours to this lovely restaurant. Attentive service by Cuong. The atmosphere and ambience of the restaurant was a lovely escape from the busy streets.

title: Amazing food and staff
review: Great an food and staff, especially My Tam who was absolutely lovely. We got a feeling of the variety of the Hue food culture

title: Must eat here!!!
review:
Another delicious meal from Chan Hur Traditional Restaurant!
The aubergine with pork mince is one of my favourite all time dishes.
Thank you Huyen for your friendly and attentive service ❤️

title: Amazing food and great staff
review: By coincidence we found this place. Amazing food, sweet staff and a beautiful restaurant. It’s that simple. Thanks Nhan!

title: Dinner at Chan
review: Excellent place to come with your partner for a bottle of wine and some delicious food on a Friday night. Waiter Nguyen was very attentive.

title: Nice
review:
Perfect service, perfect food, but a little bit long to wait for free table.
Thanks to Huyen experience was awesome!…..

title: Make it more than a pitstop!
review:
No sleep, 6 hours on a bike and dragging luggage in tow, they took us in with hauntingly wonderful food.

While ordering we received a call that our bus schedule had been pushed up and that we'd have to leave almost immediately. Our server Nhan understood the assignment perfectly. We got small taster plate and a beverage and they came out in no time at all. First taste and we immediately considered missing our bus. Every aspect of the sample we got was magical. Then two little dumplings to tie it all together and send us on our way.

Going to be thinking of that quick snack for the rest of the trip. So sad we didn't get to experience more of their menu!

title: Great restaurant
review: Great venue, fantastic food and immaculate service from Huong. Strongly recommend if you visit Hue…fish in particular is excellent

title: Excellent surprises
review: Great ambience with delicious good, good coffee, drinks; attentive staff and friendly boss. Price was also affordable for such great tasting food. Server: Quy & Dung

title: Tasty Vietnamese food
review:
Came here for dinner with the family. Amazing food and experience.
Staff is quick and attentionate.
Will be coming back here.

title: The food is good
review: The Truong was very usefull and kind. The food is delicion. It is verry nice place.😀😀😀😀😀😀😃😃😀😃🙃😀😀😀😀😀😀😀

title: Great atmosphere, food and service
review: Thanh Huong was the perfect hostess and server to introduce me to the wonders of Chang’s menu. She was lovely, patient and had a welcoming smile. I see why Chan is so popular. I will be coming back!

title: Best experience at Chan restaurant
review: Wonderful restaurant, lovely service by Thanh Huong , very good food with great presentation. Also vey nice atmosphere . This is my second time here, will come backk again

title: Great
review:
Excelent. Amazing. One of the best.
Great food. Excelent service.
God relation food / price.
Clean, with good vibes, typical food.
Note 100%.

title: Without hesitation
review:
Excellent restaurant away from the noise of karaoke. Explicit map, attentive service by Huyen❤️.
Excellent meal. The frame is neat!

title: Unmissable in Hue
review:
A real delight 😋
10th day in Vietnam and since 3 or 4 days we can no longer get enough of rice and others, we opt for European cuisine.
Today we go to this restaurant, to take over the local cuisine, carefully chosen according to notes and reviews.
And now, what a joy to reconcile to Vietnamese cuisine!
We ask our waitress Huyen for advice on typical Hue dishes.
All happiness and flavors... um... for the proposals made.
In addition very beautiful setting and a note more than incredible (25€ to 2 with a bottle of wine included) => No hesitation 👍

title: Excellent in every way!
review:
Fast, excellent, reasonable in price and a very varied menu with a service (made by NHAN) that is on top!!!!
To do it all over again!

title: Great food and ambience
review: I didn't know what to order since the menu is huge. I asked Huyen for recommendations and she was spot on! I've tried the fried fish with mango and fish sauce and it was delicious. There are many sides you can order, in my case I knew morning glory so I ordered that.

title: Great and quiet restaurant
review: Excellent restaurant with average prices for Western tourists. Quiet compared to the average of nearby premises. Very kind and competent M.ss Trang,

title: Very Good!!
review: We were very well received and very quickly tabled while we did not have a reservation! We were three and each tasted a different dish and different summers and we liked it a lot! We thank our waitress Huyen very much:)

title: Nice restaurant
review:
We saw this restaurant yesterday and decided to go here tonight because it looked nice and the music they were playing was not the same terrible music the others bars and restaurants in the tourist zone were playing.
There is a lot of food choice, we were a bit lost but in the end we ate well and a lot 😂

Huyen, our waitress, was very nice and kind. Thank you!

title: Wow!!
review: One of the best meals we had in our entire time in Vietnam!! The garlic duck.. wow. Service was friendly, and the meal was just great. Would highly recommend!

title: Very good
review:
Really good food and service was perfect , we went with our family twice and we enjoyed both times.

nhan she was very nice

Thank you

title: Tasty food
review: Busy and noisy atmosphere, in a good way. Lots of locals eat here which is also a good sign. We liked our food and thanks Nhan

title: Lunch at Chan’s
review: Amazing food, delicious iced tea, and excellent service. Ask for waitress Trang, she is wonderful and will ensure your meal is a delight to the senses!

title: Great dining experience!
review: Chan is a great Hue neighborhood restaurant. The food and service are wonderful and we highly recommend this great dining spot. Huong was our server and she was kind and attentive to our timing.

title: A fun and tasty evening at Chan and My Tam
review: We were served by My Tam. Friendly very helpful and followed the order well. This is very worth repeating. Hopefully we'll see My Tam again then.

title: Highly recommend this restaurant in Huế
review: We ordered the set meal number 4 and it was great. The braised pork was sweet and tender, the soup was tasty, morning glory, and best of all was the fried fish and rice paper pancakes. This was served with fresh watermelon juice and finished with fresh fruit and the subtly delicious dessert. Our waitress was Huyen and she was friendly, spoke very good English and answered our questions about the dishes with enthusiasm. Highly recommended

title: Best place that vegans
review:
For vegans the best place in Vietnam.
Cozy atmosphere, nice interior, super friendly, very nice presentation of the food.
We were a group of 10. The dishes and bowls were so beautiful. I had Jack fruit.
And definitely try the ginger tea.

title: Exellent restaurant
review:
The first time in this restaurant. We will come back in november with a new group. I chose the porc and it was exellent
Served by Huong

title: Recommended
review: Original, tasty, beautiful discovery, interesting dishes, nice service, we like to come back to this place

title: Perfect
review: Omg! Best place to eat. From the service to the food to the drinks! Everyone there met us with a smile and serviced with a smile. The food was unbelievable can’t wait to come back tomorrow night. Big shout out to Nhan, great customer service, professional and friendly. Everything was perfect!

title: For good Vietnamese cuisine.
review:
Good quality general and staff friendly and observant.
Busy with locals so assuming it's okay.
Turned out to be true.

title: Top!!!
review: Nice and friendly setting, excellent and refined cuisine, with many dishesour waitress Nhan was great, I recommend to spend a pleasant time.

title: Yummy, yummy, in my tummy!
review: I enjoyed the nice atmosphere of the restaurant. I couldn’t believe how quickly the food came out after we ordered it. The food was delicious, service was excellent, and extra small bonus dishes and desert they brought out was much appreciated. I really enjoy my order of steamed silken tofu & passion fruit sauce.

title: 10/10 food
review: Food was 10/10, traditional dishes up to standard. Left with full bellies. Thanh Huong helped with our services and was very attentive.

title: Not the best
review:
Unfortunately food was not the best we have had this far it was tough and overcooked Broccoli and garlic was very yummy though
Perhaps we went bit too late for the fresh food
But saying that it was very inexpensive

title: Great food and service.
review:
The food tasted great and the service was excellent. Huyen was my waitress and she advised me on the menu and helped explain how to best eat the dish I’d ordered. I had the snakehead fish with mango accompanied with rice and garlic Bok Choi. You put it in a rice paper and dip it in the sauce.
I’d recommend this restaurant

title: Hue on a Plate
review: My wife and I just arrived in Hue, and after my wife’s obligatory massage we wanted to taste what Hue had to offer……and Chan hit the spot for me. Being such a nice setting made me think it would be designed for the untrained westerner, but the whole experience was amazing. I love a condiment, and the three free local Hue sauces were amazing and went so well with everything we hade which was the pork prawn and tofu, fried chicken and the Hue tasting plate. It was genuinely Hue on a plate with excellent care, timing and service. Thank you Huyen and the team for making it a brilliant first night in Hue!

title: Tasty!
review:
Mega delicious eaten a compilation of different rolls and great pineapple juice
Our service NGAN was mega friendly and fast. Thank you💓

title: Traditional food
review: The food here is delicious and local, similar to the food at home. I like it very much. I recommend you come and try it.thank you.

title: Very good food for vegan people
review: Very good, we will come back. Food is very very good, Service is very friendly. Special good for vegan people. We feel we’ll.

title: Quyen was the best waitress!
review: Wonderful lunch stop on our day trip to Hue! Quyen was our waitress and she was so sweet in helpful us order. Large menu, would definitely recommend for anyone looking for a delicious meal in Hue.

title: Delicious food in a relaxed atmosphere
review:
Very delicious food, we could hardly decide and definitely ordered too much. My favorite was the roasted chicken and the eggplant.
Very attentive staff with helpful tips.
Highly recommended!

title: Review
review: Creme brulee coffee was delicious. Nhan was very helpful with good English to explain the dishes. Also a Great atmosphere.

title: Excellent experience
review: Great Food: Fish, chicken and vegan dishes were exzellent. A highlight of our day. Moreover, the staff was really friendly and helpful.

title: Great time
review:
I was having great time with my friends Ela
Everything was so good
I think i could go here twice
The decorations were amazing

title: Brilliant highly recommend
review: Great food, great service. Checked we had no allergies. Asked how spicy I liked my food. The staff were very attentive, friendly and happy. The atmosphere was lovely and we will certainly go back if we are in Hue again

title: Give this place a try - food and service is very good
review: Great food and service - our waitress Huyen very helpful and polite. She gave us some complementary sauces that were just delicious. Will come back next time I am in Hue

title: Great food, awesome staff
review: The menu is massive the food is tasty and we had a hard time deciding. Can’t thank Huyen enough for the tips she gave us. You should definitely try one of the set menus. It’s an adventure through vietnamese cuisine.

title: Culinary experience
review:
The attention was excellent, as was the food. We tried some food we never had before, with excellent flavours. I have never seen my mife eat as much before. =)
Lars and Damy/Sweden

title: A very nice taste experience
review: Excellent restaurant, tasty dishes. Very well placed. The staff is friendly. We were served by Huyen: she is adorable and very professional.

title: Fantastic!
review: Very good food and best service from Thu Trinh! We are here with friends and found this nice restaurant! Would definitely go again here!

title: Good food
review: Very delicious food, and good service. The complimentary watermelon slices for dessert where a nice touch. Nhan was my server and she was very kind.

title: Amazing tasting menu
review:
We had a lovely experience at Chan. We had a set menu and every dish was delicious. Thanh Huong gave us excellent service.
Thank you

title: Traditional Vietnamese restaurant in a great ambience
review: Since food was fantastic, the ambience exceptional! A traditional Vietnamese restaurant, not touristy. Our service Quy was very nice and fun and rounded off the evening perfectly! Highly recommended!!!

title: Go again and again
review:
Absolutely amazing!! Top food for great value. Really worth it, made it onto the very short list of real recommendations.
Thanh Huong, thank you for your service!!

title: Fantastic food in Hue
review: I came with my family and enjoyed very much everything! Ngoc Anh was a fantastic waitress and advised perfect meals. It’s also an artistic space to visit.

title: Great.
review: Thanks to Huyen and the whole team. We had a pleasant time with family and we ate very well! Pleasure

title: Tasty introduction to authentic Vietnamese cuisine
review:
Very friendly service, very tasty Vietnamese food. A lot of choice... a little too much for someone who doesn't know this kitchen. The portions are very spacious.
No wine except Vietnamese, which we didn't really like. This one wasn't charged either.
A little more knowledge of the English language would also be nice.

title: Fantastic dinner in an beautiful ambience
review: Excellent dinner. Highly recommended. Our waitress Nhi is absolutely fantastic. Manager Nhan also did wonder. Dishes are top notch. Best meal in hue.

title: Excellent food and service
review: Great food! The tomato tofu is amazing. They are very accommodating and easy to follow the menu! Nhan was great server as well.

title: Good food selection and great staff
review: Lots of selection of affordable dishes. The waiter name Ngoc Anh was very helpful. All of their staff are very attentive and always ready to attend to their customers.

title: Good
review:
Nhan was the table host, very kind person.
Food was great, got the salted chicken, a local dish. And a lot of local people there.

title: Good traditional food and very nice service
review:
Delicious food and nice atmosphere. We were very well advised by Sally to make our choice of food easier.
The service is ever so friendly

title: Great experience
review: Great experience, well done all the dishes, nice staff Ms Huyen. The atmosphere was good as well . Thank you for your service!

title: Very pleasant experience with happy stomach 😉
review: Good tasty food, good portions. Good experience with the smile and kindness of our waitress DIEU THANH. The menu is very elaborated. A good stop for lunch or dinner

title: Great local restaurant in Hue
review: I had the braised red tilapia with lemon grass and it was amazing!! The service from Nhan was also really good. Thank you!

title: Very nice local cuisine!
review: Good location, nice place, big variety of local dishes. Very helpful and kind service done by Quy. Definitely the place to try it!

title: Thank you
review: Thank you for great food and Thanh Huong’s suggestion and perfect service. Very good local food with good prices. Strongly suggested.

title: Hue Chan’s
review: We walked in and had no booking. The place was nearly full but they found us a seat. The food was great and the service was excellent.

title: Happy bustling restaurant
review: Friendly service from Quy. Lots of different food options for everyone. Families tourists and locals. Happy busting place

title: Topp
review:
Dieu Thanm helped us with the food order very much and super advise about the specialties.
Fantastic also the food at a good price

title: Excellent
review: Excellent, really excellent. The best restaurant in 15 days of Vietnam. The whole family is delighted. I recommend this address

title: Do not miss in Hue
review:
A setting, cuisine and impeccable service.
We knew nothing about Vietnamese cuisine, but the waitress MINH TAM accompanied us and advised us throughout the meal.
Not to be missed

title: Great
review: I was here for dinner. Huyen was really nice and the food was delicious, even vegan options! Definitely would come again!

title: Nice restaurant
review:
Good food fine service, no unpleasant surprises in terms of meat etc.
Maybe not really Vietnamese cuisine but okay

title: Must to if you are in Hue!
review:
this restaurant is a must to if you are visiting hue.

Highly recommend checking the end of the menu where u can find multiple plates together. Delicious.

Special thanks to Dieu Thanh, she was so helpful and made the experience way better.

title: All right!
review:
Excellent, impeccable service by Diêu Thanh.
Typical Vietnamese dishes in general and Hue in particular.
To be done again.

title: Highly recommend
review:
We have eaten three nights in a row. We had different meals each night and we enjoyed them all. Fish seafood meat. All fresh. All well priced. There is so much choice and diverse choice too. We were given complimentary side dishes of spices and advised by our waitress to try mixing in the rice. These were absolutely delicious and a great way to try the flavours of this fantastic menu. There is a great vegan range. I love vegetarian too but noticed the extensive choice.
Dieu Than was our waitress. She understood how we liked our food and all the food came out timely. They ask if you have finished eating to clear the tables. Great service and complimentary watermelon at the end!

title: Lunch
review: It was delicious. The service was also very nice! Huyen , who was in charge, was also very kind!!

title: Huge Menu Bigger Hospitality
review: Great food even better service. They noticed we weren’t looking at one of our dishes and offered to remake it. So delicious highly recommend

title: Casual dinner at Chan
review: Just went for a casual dinner around town and was pleasantly surprised with a couple of good sampling platters and a tofu lemongrass dish I need to have again. Our server Ngoc Anh was excellent and made the experience extra special. Definitely recommend.

title: First night in Hue
review: Really nice meal, fast and efficient service from lovely waitress My Tam, 2 course and couple of beers for around £16, excellent value

title: A “must” if you want to eat locally.
review: Excellent restaurant with very tasty local, typical Vietnamese cuisine. You will really eat there among the locals in a popular entertainment district. The interior is also very basic but quite cozy. Highly recommended!

title: Good menu and great staff
review: Stopped for a quick drink and ended up staying for dinner. The food was very good and reasonably priced. Our waitress Thank Huong was very good and answered a lot of our questions. The restaurant was busy with local people which is always a good sign. We would definitely recommend it.

title: Very nice Restaurant
review: We went there for dinner. The food tasted very authentic. Thanh Huong gave us excellent advice and service. We would come back again.

title: Clean restaurant with very good service
review: Restaurant looked neat. The service was very good and we were surprised by the good recommendations. We were helped by ngoc trinh. She was very sharp and kept a close eye on our table to see if everything was going well after ordering. The food tasted great to us!

title: Best restaurant in Hue, Vietnam!!
review: 5 STARS!!!! My wife and I stumbled upon this place by accident just walking down the street looking for a coffee shop and what a surprise! They are more than just a coffee shop! The food here is amazing! We came back 4 days in a row, Yes 4 days in a row. It was that good. We ordered the Bok Choy Soup, Fried Spring Rolls, Beef with Onion, Roasted Chicken and Garlic Prawns. It was the perfect amount and the flavors were outstanding! I will travel to Hue just for this cafe/restaurant! Ask for Thanh Huong when you visit. Her and the whole staff are attentive and polite. I’m sad to go back home and not have this restaurant close by. You will not regret it if you stop by here.

title: Must visit for food lovers
review: Greatest food I had in Vietnam! Thanks Thanh Huong for the great service :) We are coming again tomorrow! We heard Hue was a great city for foodies and Chan proved it.

title: Amazing food
review: Amazing food - best we've had in Vietnam so far! Would recommend the duck set plate and fish dishes. Friendly and attentive service by T. Bao.

title: Great food and service
review:
We chose this restaurant after seeing it on Tripadvisor and I’m so pleased we went.

The food was delicious. We shared beef and lemongrass, caramelised pork belly and the tofu and lemongrass. We were also given three local dipping sauces to try. This was plenty of food as they were all good size portions.

The staff were lovely from when we first checked it out in the afternoon and when we actually went to eat. Our server Hoa was great. She was very friendly and attentive.
