The restaurant had a nice atmosphere to it.

Thank you for lovely food and a great evening.

title: Lovely local food..
review: Excellent food, great service....very very good...well worth a visit. Close to Hue centre, easy access...enjoy your visit..

title: Num num
review: Fantastic service. Fantastic food. Came in and had their set menu. The pork in particular was a stand out. .............

title: Best tufu salad
review: The food was absolutely brilliant, I had a vegan dish and there is a very comprehensive menu, partner had a beef dish. Ngocj Trinh was the waitress who looked after us and she was so helpful and friendly.

title: Best place to try local Hue food
review: Food is excellent. We are served by Thanh Huong who is very helpful. Recommended to try Hue local food, price is reasonable and good ambience too 👍

title: Perfect.
review: Delicious! We were able to taste local specialties, the choice is very varied and everything was very good. We were even offered dessert which was delicious too. The staff is very nice and the service fast. We'll try to get back!

title: Worth a Visit
review: Fantastic views in an Air-condition modern building, Food and service was excellent with great food presentation and quality. Our waitress M Nhi was very efficient and provided wonderful service.

title: Worth a visit to “Rolf top bar”
review: We went there and had a drink. Quiet and nice environment and very good drinks. The staff were very friendly and helpful. But if you just want to order a drink, you understood.

title: Sunset
review: Great views. Highly recommend for sunset drinks. Well priced , my wife even had a martini

title: Great weekend dinner.
review: This is my first experience at this restaurant. What impressed me was the romantic space under the sunset and the delicious dinner. You should try local food here.

title: Overrated
review: Disappointing wagyu pho. Location great

title: Very worth experiencing.
review: Good food, spacious space, enthusiastic service.

title: Recommended!
review: Enormously good food here! Choice of Vietnamese but also Western dishes, so something for everyone to choose! Also the location is hugely cozy, beautiful on the water and top service. Definitely recommended if you want to dine / eat something more luxurious.

title: Fantastic dinner!
review:
A beautiful location , the view is fantastic , especially on the roof top for the sunset
At the restaurant , the food is very good , tasty and fresh . The service is very professional : waitress Lan , was particularly attentive . Thank you

title: On holiday in Hue and had drinks and a meal at Le Cercle. Have to mention Yen Nhi for her great service and also her collegues.
review: A great time at Le Cercle Cafe!

title: Fantastic!
review: Great food and service, our waiter was Q.NHU and she was wonderful! 10/10 recommend

title: Amazing place in Hue
review: Nhu was a fantastic server, excellent place to visit

title: Great views
review: Premium location, specially in the evenings (afternoon might be a bit hot but still gets nice breeze from the river). The food is tasty albeit pricey. The menu lists allergens on each item, yet is all wrong. Says no soja and plate comes with soja bean sprouts , says no peanuts and dish comes with crushed peanuts. We were attended by a number of waiters, most of the time our waiter was Q Nhu which was very attentive and well trained. They accept credit cards.

title: Perfect sunset spot with awesome service
review:
We rolled in just wanting a drink to catch the sunset, but we were having such a good time we ended up staying for dinner. All in all we spent a solid four hours of our time in Hue just hanging out here.

Service was excellent the whole way through, super friendly and on point. The food was legit good, hands down the best we had in Hue. Whether you're just grabbing a sunset drink or settling in for a meal, this place is a total win.

title: perfect experience and very pleasant service thanks to Hue who was very good advice and pleasant
review: perfect experience and very pleasant service thanks to Hue who was very good advice and pleasant

title: Great space for an evening in Hue!!
review: Had a lovely cocktail on the rooftop bar and then had our meal downstairs on the outside deck. Server was Hue, who was sweet, kind and very efficient. The view was perfect and the meal equally as good. A lovely spot for an evening in Hue!!

title: Really good restaurant
review:
The food and the service were perfect ! Thank you to Nau for her kindness.
I recommend !

title: Nice place
review:
Thank you Nhi, perfect hospitality
Vert good méat
I will come back

title: Good dinner on the terrace by the river
review: Very good address , it's good and the service is very neat; we were served by Nhli and Hue who are very professional , plus the very nice and romantic setting

title: Outstanding
review: The Food and the service by our waitriss Hue was outstanding.

title: Fantastic view of the water at night / sunset
review: Lovely food with a fantastic view. Our waitress Hue was very kind and helpful.

title: Early evening dinner
review:
Lovely dinner overlooking the Perfume River. The food & service was great.
The waitress was very attentive.
We had a lovely time.

title: A lovely place to eat by the river
review: The food here is excellent and the service warm and friendly. Particularly Nihu made our experience fantastic

title: Lovely building
review: We had great experience with my family at Le cercle restaurant.Great location in Hue, good food with different choice Vn and International. Staff very friendly,warm welcome. Everything was perfect. We will come back.

title: Amazing
review:
Best meal so far and we've not had a bad meal in 10 days in Vietnam.

Service was amazing, view was fantastic at sunset and the food was to die for.

Our waitress Lan could not do enough for us. 20 out of 10.

title: Le Cercle
review: The food and service was awesome - Hoang our waitress was super friendly

title: Lovely dinner
review: Great food and drink in a fabulous location on the river. Lovely service from Nhu and other members of staff. Was more expensive than typical meals in Vietnam but worth. Highly recommend.

title: Great riverside lunch
review: We had a great lunch at this place. The Pho was the most delicious we tried so far. The presenting by Yen Nhi was a great ceremony and she was so attentive and kind. We also loved the coffee, especially the salted one, which was presented beautifully and tasted delicous.

title: Great upstairs bar with a view
review:
‘Dropped in’ to the upstairs bar for a couple of drinks after wandering around Hue late afternoon. We had the place to ourselves until about 5pm when other tourists dropped by.

Staff were super friendly and welcoming. Drinks were good and very good value given the setting (many good cocktails).

Great views across the ‘perfume river’ from the tables positioned outside - there is under cover seating too.

Well worth a visit.

title: Lovely
review: Lovely resultant with great food and service. Hoang and Bich were such a lovely servers. Definitely recommend, loved sitting in the waterside

title: Gift for the senses
review:
The customer service is so exquisite that it is difficult to find in the West.
I can only think of praise for all the staff of this restaurant.
The location, exceptional in itself, accompanies this magnificent experience.
Special mention for Miss. Nhi.

Thanks for this great evening.
Marcos García

title: Great food, service and location
review: Nhu was wonderful and helpful when choosing our food! Would definitely come again 😊

title: Lovely food both Vietnamese and international selections. The sharing meat platter was delicious. Great service
review: Great service from Mo, Dong and Nhu. Thank you.

title: Memorable!
review: Closing in on 68 yrs old. Travelled the World, and can honestly say this was a memorable meal. Loved the food and the presentation. Our server, Lan, was wonderful. Highly recommend this place.

title: Very good
review:
Great location, food is excellent. Very clean.
Hoang was a wonderful waitress

title: Beautiful food and lovely people
review:
Excellent food, wine, view and service. We loved everything about it!
Our waitresses, Bich & Nhu were really sweet 🥰🥰
Thank you!!!

title: Perfect.
review: Perfect and thank you HUE for the service

title: Good
review: Great food, lovely atmosphere, and excellent service. Special thanks to Hue for her friendly and attentive care.Highly recommended.

title: Highly recommended
review: Excellent meal with top-notch service. Our server, Lan last night her name is LAN, was very helpful and helped make the experience quite nice.

title: Amazing
review: Absolutely amazing experience, perfect in every way! The food, service (Nhu) and ambience were all top class. We had three beers, a cocktail and a mocktail plus two meals for AUD $36

title: Review 26 feb
review: Had a great experience with hué se was really helpful. Beatifull view at the bridge.

title: Great experience
review: Food was delicious and beautifully presented. Staff were very attentive. Great view when seated outside over the river with the bridge lit up. Pricy, but a nice treat

title: Great View
review: Hai is a great server. He is very kind and mindful of guests. He deserves a raise.

title: Good relaxation around a typical meal
review: We were very well received by Mo. The meal was delicious. The setting is exceptional. We hope to return to this good address.

title: The best meal we’ve had here. And we’ve had a lot!!
review:
The best meal we’ve had in two weeks in Vietnam - and we’ve eaten a lot!!
Amazing seafood and waygu noodles, followed by incredible desserts and accompanied by amazing cocktails. Thanks especially to our waitress Nhu who was delightful.

title: Great restaurant!!
review: Lovely restaurant overlooking the Perfume River with a roof top bar above. The food was amazing, the rib eye steak was the best I have eaten. The service is top notch. Highly recommend

title: Delicious food in an beautiful atmosphere
review:
Excellent food - very delicious and
nicely decorated. Very friendly stuff, especially Mhu 😀. Beautiful atmosphere, when sitting outside beside the perfume river.

title: Excellent restaurant in Hue, right at the river
review:
Tonight we had dinner at Le Cercle.
Everything was excellent, location, food, service. Especially our waitress Hue was sweet and very attentive.
We had a very nice evening in an excellent restaurant. Highly recommended.

title: Fantastic all around!
review: The food is amazing , the view is great, staff are lovely, I highly reccomend and would come back for every meal 😆

title: Great Eat!
review: We googled a restaurant reasonably close to our hotel (Indochine Palace Hotel) and this turned out to be a great choice and walking distance. It was right on the river and we were able to sit outside. Staff were attentive and obliging and our meal was delicious.

title: Wagyu and mango sticky rice
review: Nhu is amazing waiter!!! We had wagyu and was very good, we highly reccomend going here. The Atmosphere is nice and peaceful

title: Good restaurant
review:
Sitting next to the river is very relaxing. Temperature 20 degrees.
No ageessive music in the background.
The Wssen tasted very good (crunshi pasta with vegetables and shrimp. The soup was delicious and the main courses exquisite. Delicious just delicious!

title: Great Wagiu Pho
review:
An elegant restaurant near the river and old citadel in Hue. The service was amazing, Thuy was attentive and professional, the starters were good, and after a bit of wait we got the main course the Wagiu Pho and was AMAZING, right now the best we have tried.
Compared to other pho places is a bit pricey, but worth every penny.

title: Perfect spot and service ❤️
review: Perfect spot for a very cold beer. Ambience, location and the staff wonderful. Great service provided by Hoang, Nhuan and Thao very welcoming, attentive just the right amount and kind. Thank you.

title: Great restaurant with locally sourced oysters and lovely river view.
review: We were attended to by M Nhi. We ordered the local oysters and Australian ribeye. Both were excellent and great value for money. The oyster s are farmed nearby and were extremely reasonably priced. Highly recommended also for the great river view at sunset.

title: Excellent dining experience
review: The 3 courses were really excellent, spent a very time on the terrace with the promenade and deck illuminated it is even better.

title: Amazing Food and customer service
review: Excellent quality of food and superb customer service by Dong and Nhu. This is the best Pho I’ve had in Vietnam. I will definitely come again.

title: Great evening at Le Cercle.
review: Great experience at Le Cercle. Had a drink at the rooftop bar and then had dinner at the main restaurant. The food was exceptional as was the service. Nhu our waitress was very good indeed. She was very helpful and always with a smile on her face.

title: Great, not one of the usual tourist restaurants
review:
Great restaurant located along the river bank. It offers both Vietnamese and international dishes, but that doesn't mean international Vietnamese dishes are invalid!
We opted for the pho of the house and the pork skewers, everything was really great. It's quality cuisine, not one of the classic tourist restaurants (very common in Hue, especially in the walking streets!). Also impeccable service: our waiters, Hoang and Thao, were very kind. I also recommend hot Vietnamese coffee at the end of the meal (never tasted so good!).

title: Superb location, very good food, top class. Very sweet and good service, including by Hue. Highly recommended for everyone
review: Top restaurant with super food and service. Stunning view out over the walkway in colors and in the background the large bridge also in color

title: Best food and service
review:
Not only was it delicious, but the service was amazing.
Since I was not good at English, he paraphrased it in an easy-to-understand manner and dealt with it attentively.
All the food was really good, so now I want to go again with multiple people instead of one!
Mr. LAN and Mr. NHi served us!

title: Good service.
review:
Food and service and the atmosphere were good
Especially good service from O NHU staff!
If you come to Hohe, I recommend you take a meal overlooking the river.

title: Dinner at the Circle of Hue
review:
Beautiful setting by the river of perfumes.
Choice of drinks and various dishes.
Very high quality service (Thanks to Q.NHU and NHU).

title: Great food, very helpful staff, great views
review:
We visited during the afternoon, and asked for a table for 6 in the evening by the window. Before we had left the restaurant, the tables were being moved in preparation.
When we arrived, the table was as expected, next to the windows, which were open and gave great views of the river. The staff were very attentive, with Hue being our primary waitress- nothing was too much trouble, and she was always there to refresh our beers. We ordered a variety of food, and I had fried noodles and sea food - when it was brought to me, it was explained that the dish would need the sauce adding, and the whole thing mixed up ( I might have dipped my noodles in the sauce, so I learnt something!)
We had a great evening, and the price was very reasonable. I recommend you try it ….

title: Wonderful lunch
review:
Just arrived in Hue today walking along river and decided to try for lunch, so happy we did
Service outstanding so friendly, lovely mango smoothie, iced tea & lunch was beautifully presented and so tasty.
Our servers Nhii & Lan couldn’t have done more for us thank you

title: Cocktail with view
review: Very good place to enjoy a cocktail overlooking the river. Thanks to Hoang and Nguyen Duc for their kindness and impeccable service, it was great!

title: Lovely rooftop bar with great views and ambience
review:
Lovely art deco style rooftop bar, with excellent views and nice ambience. Enjoyed a nice beer and club sandwich

Hoang and Duc looked after us well.

title: Perfect evening dining experience.
review: We had a wonderful dining experience at Le Cercle and would recommend a visit or two during you stay in Hue. The building’s exterior and interior had a wonderful at deco style environment. We enjoyed a dinner for two inside as the evenings were getting cooler. Great to see people walking outside on the boardwalk. Hue, our server, was fantastic, sweet, and friendly. We enjoyed a pork dish and a seafood dish along with a couple glasses of wine. The service was great and the staff attentive to our needs.

title: Outstanding experience!
review: I found this restaurant specifically for my husband. After 4 weeks of traveling and no red meat, it was his night. I'm ambivalent about beef, but I must say the wagyu beef we shared (250 grams =8 + ounces) was second only to the Kobe beef we had in Kobe Japan! Service was excellent!! The presentation of cooking the beef was just beautiful! Highly recommend this gem!

title: Top location in Hue
review:
Delicious atmosphere in a special style and delicious meal... top!
Beautiful setting on the wide water and a long bridge with slow traffic ... Great location.
Place to be, now and later.

title: Colombians in Vietnam
review: Great location , Amazing view , delicious food , excellent attention by the crew staff.

title: Excellent
review: Very nice place, very good food and very good view 👍🏽

title: Very nice
review:
Great food, great service, great view. I recommend coming to this place if you show up in Hue
Nhi was our waitress and she was awesome.

title: Beautiful dinner at Le Cercle Sportif
review:
We just had our delicious Vietnamese set dinner along with a fantastic hibiscus, aperol and cider cocktail, just beautiful. Our server Nhi was so helpful and delightful. The food was very good and it was nice to try many dishes at once. Highly recommend the dish for two. You can’t beat the setting right along the river all lite up as we watched everyone stroll by below us. We even had fireworks to make it a perfect evening.

Don’t miss it and ask for Nih for your hostess.

title: Good restaurant with terrace on the river of perfumes
review:
A beautiful view of the river of perfumes, and a nice terrace.
We went there in the evening and in the morning for breakfast.
The person is very attentive and the service relentless

title: Finally dinner
review:
The place is really very nice, quiet and with a very nice view! The food surprised us definitely in the positive! All very good from salmon appetizers and grilled fish. Desserts just as good! Super detailed and meticulous plating.
Excellent attention from all the waiters especially that of Mo who made everything spectacular and sympathetic!

title: To try
review: The restaurant very nice, elegant and quiet. The food very good and super quality. Excellent service and especially to the waitress MO who made our dinner a wonderful memory.

title: Great customer service
review: Q NHU gave excellent customer service friendly and attentive to our needs. Fodd was good. Try the mango smoothie.

title: Excellent food and excellent service.
review: After reading all the good reviews about Le Cercle, my wife and I decided to give it a try. True enough, the food were excellent. My wife had a seafood platter and I had a beef steak, well done, but still tender and juicy. The only small issue we had initially was someone at a table next to us was smoking. But the manager quickly changed us to another outdoor area with no one smoking. This is first class service. Everyone was happy.

title: Great service great food
review: Nhi is an amazing waitress! 10/10 will come back, the food incredible as well. Please get the rice with lotus

title: Well maintained restaurant in Hue
review: Excellent food, great views of the river, very well maintained atmosphere – clear recommendation! I'd love to come back.

title: Very nice place to enjoy a refined Vietnamese meal
review: Very good food and very good table service from Nhu. Calm and soothing atmosphere, with very reasonable prices. Recommended!

title: Amazing.
review:
We came to boo with the aim of visiting and discovering the local specialties, and as we walked along the river of perfume we discovered the restaurant the circle, equipped with a sublime setting
On the first night we tried the local specialties and were seduced by the restaurant and the service provided by Nhi and Nhu , two fantastic waitresses.
The next day we came back to test the tomahawk always accompanied by our two favorite waitresses! That was great.
Thanks again, especially to the chef (Tuan) who came to prepare the meat before our eyes in a cooking demonstration

title: 10/10 would recommend
review: Absolutely incredible food and drinks, everything was delicious and very reasonably priced, service was fantastic and got a great view of the river to top it off. Definitely one of the best meals I have had while I am here in Vietnam. 10/10 would recommend

title: Amazing.
review:
Perfect, impeccable service and top food
An incredible view of boo and the river with the fragrance, filled with night color
I recommend!

title: Really very good
review: It was amazing, the food was delicious, the drinks were incredible and the service was fantastic. Hue was a delightful host it was a great meal

title: A real treat
review:
Delicious food with a very interesting menu. As well as Vietnamese food it offers their own twist on other cuisine. The staff were wonderful - polite , attentive and making every effort to serve us always with a lovely smile. Nhu deserves a special mention.

We sat on the terrace overlooking the river and bridge beautifully lit - all felt a special treat,

title: Amazing experience
review:
Every thing very good and staff very very kind, specially Mo.
The quality of food is very good
We enjoy a lot.

title: Great dining experience
review: Excellent service by Q. Nhu and Cong, excellent food, great setting. Not cheap, but well worth the cost!

title: Fantastic food and wine! The PHO is awesome!
review: Incredible food and service! Pretty restaurant on the water and wait staff was amazing!! Great French wine too. Highly recommend!

title: Wonderful restaurant
review: We had a beautiful lunch here to celebrate our daughter’s birthday. Wonderful food, a stunning environment and kind service from all the staff including Mo, who organised a special dessert and candle for my daughter. Highly recommended!

title: Very good address
review:
We ate very well and the service was perfect , Hoang and Qnhu were adorable and very professional.
We gotta go.

title: 5 🌟 service 5 🌟 food 🍜 I’ll be back . My hubby’s steak and sauce and mash simply
review: 5 🌟Service from Hue and the The food simply divine . Well presented service impeccable venue ultra cool very romantic. 💕 best meal we’ve had . First time I’ve tried Wagu Beef Pho 🍜 I’ll be back . My hubby’s steak and sauce and mash simply incredible. They know their flavours . Chef deserves highest praise

title: Stunning food
review:
Superb service , I had the set menu , the Caesar salad , veg soup and steak with mushroom sauce and ice cream for desert , perfection , tasty value for money , attentive service and a great meal for my wife and I
11 out 10 🙏🏼🙏🏼

title: Lovely place to relax and take in the view of the Perfume River
review:
What a gem of a place to find when you were just looking for a place to have a drink and a toilet break.

After jumping off our bus and before walking to the Imperial City we needed a drink and toilet stop. We downed a couple of hydrating drinks used the very clean toilets before heading to the Imperial City.

We were so impressed with the bistro,we decided to have lunch after our walk in the old city.

We had a mix of western and Vietnamese food and lubricated with some local cocktails. The food service, prices, location and drinks were all amazing. A special shout out to Bich Lan who looked after us with amazing hospitality.

title: Excellent food and service
review: Ms. Hue and her colleagues took very well care of us during our dinner the first evening in Hue and gave us an excellent service. She introduced us to the different dishes and how to eat them. We ordered two kinds of spring roll dishes as starters, both very delicious, and then a composed main course, including different smaller dishes, with pork, fish and vegetarian soup. Very good. We finished with a mango fruit dessert with sticky rice. Also this was very good.

title: Excellent Food - Incredible Service - Great Atmosphere
review:
Excellent Food - Amazing Service - Great View

Nhi is an amazing server in a restaurant that offers some of the best food we have had in Vietnam.

I highly recommend this place.

title: Wonderful food
review:
The food was excellent.
The waiters are very polite and attentive.
The environment is modern and cozy,, next to fo river.

title: Dinner on the bank of the Perfume River
review:
Awesome decor and a well appointed restaurant. Attentive staff. Both our dishes were very tasty and flavorful.
Excellent service from Nhu and T. Nhi.

title: Lovely riverside dining in Hue
review: A lovely evening with excellent food, wine and service. He had, fried pork/shrimp spring rolls, I had the veggie versions. Then he had the Wagyu beef special and u had a Vietnamese version of Paella! Both delicious.

title: Excellent
review:
The place is beautiful, the staff is loving and the food is excellent.

He highlighted Thuy Hoang Bich MnHi Toi's attention... it's loving and pure sympathy.

We absolutely recommend!

title: Amazing visit
review: It was a amazing a wonderful place nearby river,nice view of the bridge especially during the evening. Stuff in this restaurant were so polite,we had nice nice a very polite waitress named NHU. She took care about us very good. In this restaurant I ate amazing Pho with Wagyu beef and that was absolutely awesome. We highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Wonderful New Year’s Eve dinner
review:
Beautiful restaurant on the river in Hue. We went for the New Year’s Eve dinner; fabulous, six courses of wonderful food. They also had a vegetarian option, which my wife enjoyed.

Good wine and good friends.

We highly recommend this beautiful restaurant.

Excellent and attentive service, Dong was our great server.

title: Magnificent meal
review: Great location - very quiet as not many people dining however that didn’t take away from the culinary experience. Nhu and Lan were our waitresses and they were fabulous. So polite, professional and attentive. Would give this restaurant 10/10

title: Fantastic food, service and ambiance
review:
The food and drinks were fantastic, the service was friendly and efficient, and the river view was really relaxing.

Highly recommend!

title: The best Pho of Hue
review: Magnificent evening , aperitif on the rooftop cool with the nice view of the river, meal on the ground floor in the restaurant with tasting of Pho at Waygu, a real delight, to try absolutely. Top service.

title: Loved it!
review: What a fabulous place! Beautiful river location, fabulous food, great value & excellent service, especially Yen Nhi - thanks for a great evening.

title: Excellent food and drinks
review: Excellent food and service. Staff was super friendly and helpful. Our host was yen nhi, she helpes us a lot! Even though it was more expensive, it was worth every penny.

title: Beautiful Location
review:
Amazing service, beautiful waterfront location and the Wagu beef pho was the best yet.
Would recommend this restaurant.

title: Super recommended
review: Super recommended. Very good food and quality. Hoang & T. Nhu was social, always super careful not to miss anything at our table.

title: Good food, nice staff
review: Good food, great service, Lan our waitress was very nice and kind and friendly, I recommend this place, great location by the river

title: Very good
review:
We had a truly wonderful early Christmas Eve dinner. The food was absolutely exceptional — beautifully presented and bursting with flavor, a real feast for both the eyes and the palate.

A very special thank you goes to Hue, our lovely waitress. She was very thoughtful and welcoming to my wife and me, which was wonderful.

title: Christmas Meal
review: I spent my Christmas eve at Le Cercle Hue. The atmosphere was pleasant and the music and performances really created an authentic feeling of Christmas. Food was excellent and the waiters were polite and quick to notice if I was in a need of something.

title: Nice food with good view and service!!
review: Delicious food and the best service from Nhi. Would deffinetly recommend for a nice lunch with a view over the cities lake ☺️

title: Coffee on the river
review: Very interesting experience, I recommend drinking Salt Coffee. The girl who served us, My Nhi, amazing, kind and efficient!

title: Super restaurant
review: The restaurant is magnificent, Mo and Hoang very kind and nice. The food is really delicious, the menu very rich, we will be back!!

title: Meal
review:
W had a very good expérience with Nhi ! Thank you.
All of our plates were very good and the view on the river was beautiful..

title: Beautiful spot by the river
review: Beautiful and more elegant place by the river. Very quality food and attentive service Mrs Qnhu. Had a nice relaxing lunch

title: Exceptional Dining Experience
review:
I had an incredible dining experience at the Le Cercle overlooking the Perfume River. The atmosphere alone makes it worth a visit—the views are serene, elegant, and the perfect backdrop for a memorable meal, especially the Wagyu beef phở.

The service was exceptional - Hoang and Bich made our visit so special. The cocktails were just as impressive, especially the blue pea one. It was vibrant and refreshing.

title: Perfect
review: Food was good, service by Hue was top notch, thank you! Highly recommend the wagyu pho. The atmosphere was quiet and lovely

title: Top restaurant in Hue
review:
Great food and very friendly staff.
For little money.
We had 2.5 hours of delicious dining by the water.
We were a group of 12 people from the Netherlands

title: Date night in Hue!
review: My wife and I went out for an amazing meal and experience at Le Cercle. The flavours and presentation of the meals were incredible. The service from the staff was excellent. Overall one of the best meal experiences of our trip to Vietnam.

title: Excellent food and service from thu and ngoc
review: A lovely meal at the rooftop bar at Le Cercle. We ate off both the bar and the restaurant menus whilst looking over the Perfume river. The food was delicious and the staff were really accommodating and helpful. Special shout out to Thu and Ngoc

title: Very good food
review: Very good food and good service. Hoang was very helpful. It has a nice view over the river and is close to the bridge. Recommend

title: Thoroughly recommend
review: Awesome food. Sesame cracker with mini clam / crispy pancake starters both delicious. Wagu pho main was also delicious. Thanks to Thu for great service

title: A magníficent and tasteful evening on the Parfum river
review: Excellent location on the Parfum river ! Wonderful art deco atmosphere, decor and design . Exquisite “from the Land “ menu , with magnificent beef and churros / passion fruit ice cream dessert . Te service was first class , with special mention to our waitress Ms Hoang . Excellent !!

title: Clean place very good service and excellent food
review: Very good experience, Attention from all the excellent staff, super polite and helpful Nie, very good food , we enjoyed very much

title: Great Service
review: Had a fantastic meal here. Staff were lovely. Q. Nhu, Nhu and Nguyen looked after us very well. One of the best meals we have had so far in Vietnam

title: Le cerle hue November 2025
review:
We stopped here for a drink and a snack.
First of all this is a lovely building on the side of the river.
It is immaculate inside and there is incense burning in the toilets.
The food and drink were lovely, top quality.
The staff were excellent.
It’s about 40k a drink and is worth a visit.

title: Good
review: We visited this restaurant and it was truly a wonderful place. We had the daily set menu and found it delicious. Our server Huệ was very attentive and thoughtful, and she had such a warm smile. Absolutely amazing!

title: Delicious Meal + Friendly Service
review:
My husband and I came for dinner this evening and it’s was incredible!
We were served by Thu who was attentive and lovely ☺️
We loved the Hue Pancake and beef vermicelli noodles - the green chilli sauce with our calamari was to die for!
We would definitely dine here again, lovely service, great atmosphere and priced well with great food

title: Great food and service
review: Excellent food and Hoang was an amazing server! Enjoyed the fried pork and rice. I also had the mango sticky rice which was lovely.

title: Top service from the newbie
review: Very, very nice service from Nhu (who had her first day here today !). You didn't notice that at all, but the service was already very professional. I am sure Nhu will get the job and wish her all the best.

title: Great location, great food, great everything.
review:
Great location, fabulous service and delicious Vietnamese food. It’s in a great setting right next to the Perfumed river. Everyone in Vietnam is ridiculously and genuinely friendly, but they really were outstanding here. We had a young waiter called Long who was as charming as the most charming man in charming land !
Great value too. Enjoy

title: Very good
review: Such a lovely place! The food was full of flavor and beautifully presented. Ms Hue were warm and attentive without being overbearing. I genuinely enjoyed every moment here. Five stars!

title: Excellent lunch!
review: We absolutely loved our lunch: lovely and complex flavors. Every dish was delicious! Excellent service by Thu. Sat next to river.

title: Luxury place
review: Nice location in hue and friendly staff.We enjoyed very much with speciality Salted Coffee and Wagyu Pho.Definitely recommend this place

title: Great service and food!
review:
We arrived on a rainy day, the mood was a little heavy by the bad weather.

But we were welcomed by great smiling servants... and then the mood got better.

We got a table towards the river.

So we ordered food.

Pancakes with fish
Fried vegetables
Nuts with seafood
Spring rolls

Everything was homemade and tasted great.

And our servants Hoang & Nhu just did it yet.

Try it, you won't regret it.

title: A special culinary experience
review: We had an excellent seafood platter and previously a country-specific, clear soup with excellent beef. The quality of the food is really excellent, and the kindness of the staff deserves great praise. Especially the very young employee, who has only been here for a year, accompanied us wonderfully through the evening – a real asset for the team! If we would stay longer in this city, we would definitely like to come back.

title: Outstanding Drinks and dinner!
review: What an outstanding drinks and dinner. We started outside upstairs for drinks which were great! Then, on to dinner which was outstanding. The service was exceptional! My wife and I had the best time and lived the food! Would highly recommend and We would come again.

title: It’s a must
review: The view on to the Perfume River set the scene for the lovely rooftop bar, to your right is the bridge designed by Eiffel and beautifully illuminated…and relax! Dinner was really nice as well, we were really impressed with Mo’s excellent service and help with our food allergies! We absolutely loved it!

title: Great food and lovely views
review: Thiu was wonderful and gave us great service. She was very Fri and attentively and we will definitely recommend this restaurant. Thanks 😊

title: Great
review: My Nhi was a great waitress and the food was delicious! The view was amazing. Wait time was under 5 minutes. Drinks were delicious

title: Pleasant with good food
review:
Good food and a nice atmosphere
Service was excellent and Nhi & Nhu were excellent with their help and service
The selection of wine was good and was very tasteful
Only suggest was to cook the duck to pink

title: Very good
review:
The experience was very nice I can only recommend it.
From Service to food everything very good☺️
We thank Nhi &Nhu you were super friendly

title: really good
review: Really good food and really good service from Hue, she was really friendly and attentive. I ate the salmon and it tastes excellent.

title: Very nice experience.
review:
Excellent Service.
Very well restored place.
Excellent food.
Location by the river with scents with splendid views.

title: Location and Food Top
review: Very pleasant restaurant in fine Mood, great location, right on the river. Lots of choice in eating and also draft beer.

title: French food and drink in Vietnam: it's possible!!
review: A lovely place on the banks of the Perfume River. Beautiful menu with wide choice of local and international dishes. And quite a good wine list with wines from the old and the new world. Very good service by Lady Nhi: friendly, accurate and informative. Good English is spoken! Highly recommended if you are in Hué!!

title: Lovely views of the Perfume River
review: Lovely chic spot on the river - clean and modern amenities. Great fresh orange juice and coffee! Our waitress Hue was incredibly sweet and spoke good English 🙏

title: Very relaxed and super nice
review:
It was wonderful! The music is very relaxed and the view is breathtaking!! Can only recommend coming here. Just for the vibe it is worth it:)

I ate the waffles with vanilla and a delicious salted coffee. Wonderful combination.

Duy & Mo are also very accommodating and always have tips ready where to go. I will definitely come back 🫶🏿

title: Nice Location
review: We had a great dinner here. The food was amazing, beautiful space. The staff, Toi, Nhu, Hue, very friendly and professional.

title: Great food, great ambiance!
review: Great experience, great food, stunning views over perfume river and the floodlit bridge. Service very friendly. Highly recommended!

title: Beautiful location
review: Beautiful location right by the Perfume River. Service was great and the food good. We enjoyed our evening here and will highly recommend for an unforgettable experience.

title: a destination idea at the Perfume River
review:
I discovered this place on tiktok and I must say that the images do not do it justice, in reality, the setting is even more splendid in real life! The view is breathtaking, perfect for enjoying a peaceful moment while enjoying an excellent meal.
The dishes are refined, full of flavors and beautifully presented. Mood, both relaxed and elegant, makes you want to stay for hours. An experience that largely deserves its reputation!

title: Excellent Night out in Hue
review:
The venue was excellent with great view of the river
The food was excellent and service was really good
Prices were very reasonable

title: Great dinner by the river
review: Very nice atmosphere with a view of the river. They have great food and excellent service. It is an affordable luxury experience!

title: Just do it
review: Great place for cocktails on Rooftop Bar, then downstairs for exquisite food. Dined their twice on our Hue holiday. The ambiance and food is excellent.

title: Try the Pho!
review: Really nice restaurant with good food. I would definitely recommend the Wagyu beef Pho! The service is excellent and the location next to the river really adds to the athmosphere.

title: Lovely place in Hue
review: We had a great meal here, good service by Hue. A super place on the water, where you have a great view over the Perfume River

title: Visiting Hua
review: The service, the ambiance, the presentation and the food where just perfect. The waiter (Nhu Mo) was very kindly, informed us very well and did a very good job.

title: Best meal in Hue with great view and wonderful staff. Top class service
review: Had an excellent meal and drinks. The food was amazing, the seafood was great. The staff, Duy, Nhu, Hue, Linh and Huyen were amazing, very friendly and professional. The oyster share plate was terrific.

title: Beautiful evening on the terrace
review: A very pleasant setting on the terrace by the water, with a very attentive Service - without being burdensome - from our waiter Long, always smiling and considerate. We chose the Vietnamese Family Sharing set for two, consisting of pork, shrimp fish and rice, it was really delicious. The setting is a bit chic, the tables are well spaced whether inside or on the terrace overlooking the river of perfumes. Very good restaurant, which has a history, with friends or as a couple for an evening in Hue.

title: Great
review: Great views, staff, food and cocktails. A good spot for travellers and locals alike. Aussie beef burger was a highlight for my partner.

title: Phenomenal
review: Great, amazing food, great price and exquisite service. Great location. 100% recommended. Lan the cool waitress!

title: Fantastic lunch experience
review: This was a fantastic experience. The staff was extremely polite and helpful from the moment we walked in. The restaurant was not busy, but had a lovely calm ambience from the heat and chaos outside. The decor was lovely, and nicely spaced seats. We had a Wagyu Pho and some seafood croquettes. The Pho was delicious and reminded us of sukiyaki in Japan with the Wagyu cooked in the hot broth! And the croquettes were perfectly deep fried, not overly hard, and clearly done in fresh oil. The bread was also lovely, and a great choice of drinks. If we ever come back to Hue, we'd certainly return. Great place.

title: Wonderful
review: Toi and Nguyen were pur hosts and it was delightful 😀. Theo helped us in every way and were super Kind. Would recommend it everyone

title: Laughing
review: Had lunch here. Friendly received. Restaurant is on the river you can sit outside or inside. Food is good to taste

title: Great restaurant on the river
review: Excellent food and service. Nhu and Hue looked after us very well. Highly recommended. Lovely setting on the river with a rooftop bar.

title: Very good dining experience
review: The meals were incredible as the dining experience was a traditional vietnamese cuisine with a modern twist to it. The staff deserves special apreciation aswell for their kind and professional service.

title: High-level Vietnamese cuisine culture and flavors of traditional and innovative tastes to make the taste experience excels
review: Trying to discover traditional Vietnamese tastes and flavors the experience at Le Cercle undoubtedly met every expectation. Great food well presented, great Service, discreet and professional staff, clean and elegant local. Definitely positive experience.

title: Beautiful views and wonderful food
review: Beautiful rooftop bar we shared small plates with lots of delicious flavours and then an amazing dessert. Stunning presentation. The staff were wonderful, Hoang created a very special evening with her infectious personality.

title: Excellent dinner by the river of perfumes
review: Excellent meal on the terrace of the sports club. The setting is beautiful and the Service adorable. Thank you to Mrs NHU for her kindness and professionalism.

title: Food and views!
review: Beautiful restaurant with views over the Pearl river. Our waitress Thu was delightful and service was excellent. Food options are varied - we had the Vietnamese set for two and everything was delicious.

title: Recomendable
review: The restaurant is very nice and has an excellent location, very helpful staff (we were served by Hue) and very rich food.

title: Refreshment place for a delicious lunch
review: Lovely place by the river , attentive and courteous Service , well served and cooked dishes and absolutely honest prices . All good not only for those who want to try Vietnamese cuisine. Also great coffee and cocktails and smoothies.

title: A delightful place
review: A lovely place, by the river; attentive and courteous Service; well cooked Vietnamese dishes with some international proposal. Overall I think it is a more suitable place for a lunch than a dinner.

title: very good
review: We received a warm and friendly welcome. The dishes were beautifully presented and absolutely delicious. We had a wonderful time.

title: Great food in lovely setting.
review: Great food in a lovely setting. Super friendly service, Nhu was responsible for our table, quite pleasant experience. Highly recommended!

title: Good a5 Waguy
review: We start with a cocktail atvthe rooftop bar with a nice view. We had a very good diner. We ordered a5 waguy. They made it at our table. Our waiter Long dis a very good job.

title: Delicious!
review: This was a lovely romantic evening on the river with delicious food and drinks. The staff are so attentive and we had a great time. Highly recommend walking on the boardwalk after your meal!

title: Wagyu Pho Heaven
review: I stumbled upon this restaurant on YouTube and was thrilled to try their Wagyu Pho. The dish exceeded my expectations - the flavors were rich and savory, and the Wagyu beef was tender and delicious. The complimentary bread was a lovely touch, perfect for snacking while I waited for my meal. But what really stole the show were the desserts and appetizers - the Tiramisu was creamy and divine, and the Caesar Salad was fresh and tangy. Overall, I had an amazing dining experience and can't wait to go back again soon! Highly recommend!

title: Dinner in a superb setting, by the river of perfumes
review:
Dinner with family in a modern and clean setting. The cuisine is good (international and Vietnamese) we enjoyed a very good platter of grilled seafood (gambas , fish, mussels, oysters, squid).
Attentive Service but a little long.

title: Best Pho I've had in Vietnam, the Wagyu was amazing and for a great price
review: Food and drink was amazing, the service was amazing, highly recommend, we were greeted on entry and had constant service for our requirements. Perfect

title: Proper good place
review: Really good meal for a really good price. Out waiter was Hue she was very good and the service was rapid would definitely recommend

title: Just fabulous. We are on a tour and came here just the two of us. Amazing roof top bar then restaurant for dinner
review: Fabulous location. Fabulous food. Cocktails at the roof top bar then dinner in the restaurant. Excellent service particularly from Long.

title: Le Cercle Dinner in Hue
review: We very much enjoyed the relaxed feel of Le Cercle. A great location by the river. We both had the fish of the day which was well presented and explained. The fish tasted amazing with the rice paper and accompaniments. The staff were friendly with real care from Nhi, Nhu and Duy. Would recommend this restaurant highly

title: Great experience!
review:
Fine restaurant with views of the river of perfumes, the promenade and the illuminated bridges of Hue.
Superb choice table with local and international specialties.
Service is simply remarkable with a special mention to Ruby who accompanied us all evening but in complete discretion.

title: On the banks of the river a nice art deco restaurant. Excellent
review:
This place is excellent, the staff is very welcoming and attentive to our tastes.
The restaurant is very nice on the banks of the river.
The cocktail circle couple milk tea is worth a visit.

title: Perfect
review: We had a great time at “Le Cercle”. The staff was amazing: they were caring and the chef was always here to make sure the dishes and drinks were just how we liked them. The food was delicious and we had a beautiful view from our table. Overall, it was a great experience.

title: Beautiful evening
review:
We had a very nice evening, first we were to eat at the bistro. The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive and the food really fresh and delicious.
After that we were still on the roof terrace. The Mood there is very nice and you have a great view of the river. The cocktails tasted great!

title: Excellent food in beautiful river Mood
review: We ate excellent food and benefited from a wonderful Service. Thu was attentive and served us well. Especially recommended is the Pho with Wagyu Beef🤩

title: Superb meal in a beautiful setting
review:
The service was courteous and polite and patient. We were allowed to sit outside with our drinks with a good view of Perfume river and its lit up bridges.

We went indoors for our meal - also keeping a good view of the river at night. It consisted of crispy fish spring balls and clam and quinoa with crispy fried biscuit and then a grilled fish- deliciously cooked and presented with various fresh vegetables which were explained to me how to roll into a pancake/ burrito by the very helpful waitress, The others had a very good pizza and seafood meze on noodles.

It was a superb meal- memorable and in a great setting

title: The food here is so delicious & in such an elegant setting with the nicest, most thoughtful service from Y Nhi.
review: The cocktails are also delicious & during the day it would be a great place to spend time over coffee. Hoang was also very lovely and even kindly taught me some Vietnamese

title: Really good
review: Insanely delicious food, and really good service. Really nice restaurant. everything was absolutely perfect. Experience 10/10

title: Top service, top location and top food
review: We had a fantastic evening at Le Cercle Hué. The location is superb (right on the Perfume River), you dine in a beautiful building, and above all: the dishes are above average in taste, presentation, and variety. We also had excellent service: Nhu and Thu completely pampered us. So polite, so loving, and nothing was too much trouble. Superb! That made the evening an unforgettable experience for us!

title: Fantastic Good Food and Excellent Service!
review: Was a Great Service, Duy was an excellent host! Explained to us all about the food and the restaurant. The homemade bread was delicious and the high quality dishes! Even the cook came to the table to receive our compliments. It's that we're going to travel again tomorrow, otherwise we'd probably have eaten there again. Highly recommended in Hue!

title: Great restaurant
review: Had a lovely meal at the Circle with great service from Nhu. The pho was excellent and a really nice way of presenting it. Topped it off with a great salted coffee. All in all, a wonderful experience!

title: Beautiful setting and great food
review: Dropped in for dinner with no reservation. Lovely meal looking out over the river. Thoroughly recommend the Australian rib-eye steak and the Cercle Sunset cocktail. Good varied menu with something for everyone. My daughter loved her pizza. Lovely experience

title: Gracious service staff
review: Had a lovely evening at Le Cercle. Ms Mo and her team . .. Nhu, Thu, Nhi Sup and Ngoc where so gracious and gave outstanding service during a delicious Seafood dinner. The nice sommelier gave me a great wine and educated me on nice Chilean wines. I highly recommend a visit to their Art Deco classic restaurant with beautiful view of the Perfume River. My thanks to all who made my evening memorable.

title: Eaten romantically in a super nice place.
review:
A night out with my husband and it could be a bit more. Nice food for about 35 euros per person. Aperitif, starter, main course and a nice bottle of wine from France.
Nguyen provided cooling on the roof terrace for the aperitif. Nhu pampered us downstairs in the restaurant. Perceptive, quiet and yet present! Super!

title: Nice place with good food
review: Great food, god service, and nice atmosphere. The location by the river is beautiful. Recommend this restaurant for families.

title: Great riverside restaurant
review: We visited Le Cercle Twice during our stay in Hue. The location is perfect, next to the river, the food is great - both tasty and nicely presented - and the staff very helpful, with thanks to Nhu, Hoang and Linh.

title: Highly recommended in Hue!
review:
Top helped by Lan! The Food and Service were very, very good! But huge portions also the appetizers. The wine was a bit overpriced but very good!
Highly recommended in Hue!
Idyllic setting. Perfect server named Long. Excellent food. A more than perfect moment. An impeccable staff

title: Delicious drinks
review: The place made fantastic drinks at a good price. We were served by Nhi bar, Ngoc and Toi, who gave us an unforgettable evening

title: Good location and good drinks
review: Delicious drinks and really sweet and skilled servants (Nhi Bar, Ngoc and Toi). Perfect quiet evening with good views and relaxed atmosphere.

title: Very good experience
review:
Good food and Hue is so sweet.
The service is very welcoming and the restaurant is luxurious and well air-conditioned. I recommend it.

title: Enjoy a delicious meal.
review:
After enjoying the river, it is a place where you can have dinner with people watching wonderful fun. After having lunch here, we looked around after the bridge and crossed the bridge again.
It's a pity to know this restaurant for the last day of your stay.
The most memorable restaurant of your trip to Vietnam.
Interiors and food, music, scenery, and ton and manner are the perfect place to catch.
Numerous steps of style, a stubborn manager helped make a comfortable meal.
I'll see you later. 👍👍👍👍👍

title: Chic restaurant in Hue
review: Great food at Le Cercle in Hue. The quality is very good and the bar is high. That goes for the Food, Presentation, Service and Service. The service is very attentive and nice. Highly recommended.

title: Excellent
review: A modern place with traditional food prepared with lots of class and in a delicious way. A Bo Pho wayu delicious and the rolls very good. The care of 10

title: Exceptional lunch at Le Cercle
review:
We had the best lunch at Le Cercle today.

The food is the best we have had so far in Vietnam. Grilled pork, pork lemongrass skewers and wagyu beef noodles.

The building is stunning art deco. The staff were lovely.

Can’t fault a thing. Don’t understand why it wasn’t packed!!

title: Eat in style
review: Very good restaurant by the river. Mood, quality of food and Service (Special thanks to Hue) are really first class.

title: Very nice spot for a beutiful date night
review: It was a very nice experience. Ngoc and Lan were super cute and helpful. 10/10 would recommend for a beautiful date night.

title: Relaxed, great service great food
review:
The service was amazing could not ask for more especially from Cong he’s in a league of his own.

As for the food all I can say is GO HERE! you won’t regret it.

title: Beautiful & delicious!
review:
Beautiful restaurant, super good food, great wine, fantastic service by Duy.
For us a 10/10, we enjoyed it!

title: perfect evening
review: our waitress Hue was fantastic, the food was lovely and the view with sunset was perfect!! Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting a special night!

title: What a great surprise! Delicious dinner and impeccable service
review:
We had dinner here by chance and it was a great success.
Dinner was amazing - we especially recommend the crispy noodles, they were delicious! Duy's service was exquisite, always attentive and very kind.
The price-performance ratio is excellent, especially considering the quality of the place. We definitely recommend it.

title: The place to be
review: Fantastic place, very good food, friendly service by Hue, and the price is more than acceptable! Highly recommended.

title: Elegant dining and great value!
review: What a beautiful riverside location for fine dining! A sophisticated but friendly experience ideal for any occasion. The food was excellent and our server, Long, certainly was highly trained and very knowledgeable. He was so lovely and friendly too. Wine was especially good. Great value. Highly recommend, congratulations Le Cercle Hue!

title: AMAZING!!!
review: We had the most amazing food of our trip here and was served by the amazing Cong who made our night very enjoyable! We definitely recommend coming here!!

title: Beautiful restaurant but bland meal
review: Very nice restaurant, great rooftop. Unfortunately, very disappointed by the meal, which did not at all live up to our expectations for such an establishment.

title: Classy spot overlooking the river with great food, drinks and service
review: Rooftop bar overlooks the river and is perfect for sunset. The restaurant was beautiful, great for a classy dinner. The food and drinks were great, and service was amazing, Mo was a wonderful server!

title: Good to come back to this place
review: Great location with the river view, very good food and very considerate service (Ngoc Nhu was extremely helpful). First we had a very nice lunch here and decided to come back for a dinner

title: Great restaurant right on the river
review:
Excellent service. Great wine selection and food was delicious

Duy and Nhu were exceptionally welcoming and helpful in explaining a out Vitnamese food and customs

Right on the river bank - great views if the boats passing by.. great modern atmosphere with Virtnamese and continental food choices.

title: Delicious and beautiful
review: Beautiful amazing view!!! Fantastic drinks and yummy dinner very nice people and fairly vast menu, absolutely recommend

title: Good food with a pretty view!
review: Beautiful restaurant with a lovely view! I ordered the Wagyu pho, which was so tasty and rich. Huong and Long helped me and were so sweet! I had dinner solo with a view of the sunset on the river. I also ordered a couple glasses of wine that went nicely with my food.

title: Best in Hue
review:
This was such an amazing experience!
We were serves by Thu, she did such an amazing job of taking care of any needs we had. Also the chef was such an amazing person and gave us so much informstion. This is a MUST do when in Hue!!
Amazing!

title: Amazing food & experience.
review: Absolutely amazing. The food was so good, the wagyu was excellent and I have never tasted it like this before. It’s extremely cheap to eat here. Definitely try out the coffee! Such great service by Thu

title: Relaxing dinner on the Huong river.
review: Great work from Nhi tonight to lead the staff and serve well and efficiently. Ordered the beef pho and ginger tea with lime and a slice of orange.

title: Lovely restaurant
review: Amazing food, amazing drinks and amazing staff. The view of the river is absolutely stunning and the lights from the bridge are easily viable and look very beautiful. 10/10 would go again.

title: Great view excellent service
review:
Food was delicious, we tried pork flat pancakes, lemongrass skewers and beef salad all where exceptional so tasty and flavoursome, Long our waiter was very friendly attentive and understood English quite well so it was easy to communicate and have fun with him. The view was perfect over the perfume river and beautiful at night with the bridge lit up, we booked a table and was seated at the window in the nice air-condition.
Highly recommended.

title: Delicious food
review: Hospitality was the best! Super nice manager, very attentive and Thu our waitress was great. Food was delicious and the presentation made me feel we were royalty.

title: Delicious food & very attentive
review: We loved this restaurant. The food was delicious and the server, Duy was very attentive. They do a great job introducing you to the local cuisine. Thank you. We will come back for sure!

title: Views on views
review: Amazing service, amazing food, nice music backdrop, views on views, what else do you need. Thank you for this experience.

title: Wonderful Meal!
review: Amazing food; fabulous service from Long and Nhu. Such a lovely setting. Delicious food. We will definitely be back!!!!

title: Great choice!
review: Fantastic dinner nearby the river, I couldn't get enough of the creamy soup, so delicious! Btw, thanks Nhi and Ngoc for a helpful service today, will be back asap.

title: Nice
review:
First time here — but definitely not the last!
The food was delicious, beautifully presented, and full of flavor. I was especially impressed by here. The atmosphere was cozy and welcoming, making it a great place to relax and enjoy a meal.

A big thank you to the staffs Nguyen, for being so friendly and attentive — you made the experience even better. I’ll definitely be coming back!

title: Review for Le Cercle Hue
review:
Le Cercle in Hue was an absolute highlight of my trip. From the moment I arrived, I was blown away by the stunning panoramic views—perfectly showcasing the charm and natural beauty of Hue. Whether you’re there for a relaxing drink or a full meal, the setting alone is worth the visit.

But it’s not just the view that impresses. The service was outstanding—friendly, attentive, and genuinely welcoming. The staff especially Mo and Ngoc made the entire experience feel relaxed and special.

And the food? Incredible. Every dish was flavorful, beautifully presented, and surprisingly affordable. For the quality you get—both in taste and ambiance—the prices are more than fair. It’s rare to find a place that delivers this level of experience without breaking the bank.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting Hue. Le Cercle is a gem!

title: Riverside elegance
review:
The restaurant occupies a beautiful, elegant art deco building by the river. We made our reservation through the restaurant's website but didn't realise until we arrived that Le Cercle is part of the same group that owns the hotel we were staying in, Azerai La Residence. The hotel and restaurant are a few minutes walk from each other. We enjoyed our first meal so much that we returned two nights later for our last dinner before leaving Hue.

The menu was varied with dishes to suit local and Western tastes. The service was faultless. The food was beautifully presented and tasted just as good as it looked...delicious and full of flavour.

After dinner on the first evening, we were taken to a table in the rooftop bar to finish our wine with great views of the river. It was just a perfect evening. Sadly, on the second evening, rain prevented us from sitting again in the rooftop bar. It did not detract from the evening which was just as memorable as the first one. Special thanks to Mo Nhi and the ever-smiling Mr Long who looked after us with so much care and attention.

Le Cercle is definitely worthy of the custom of anyone visiting Hue. As a treat, combine it with a stay at the Azerai La Residence and it will be a holiday to remember for all the right reasons.

title: An exceptional dinner in an Art Deco venu.
review:
We visited Le Cercle on our first night in Hue. The food was so wonderful we dicided to go back again. It turned out our return visit was also our last night in Hue.The food and service here is exceptional along with the presentation and quality of food. It has an interesting menu with a lot of fusion dishes. On our first visit our mains was the Share platter of meats. Perfectly cooked ostritch, pork, beef and lamb, all served with mashed potatoe and steamed vegetables. On our return visit we settled for the 4 course special.
The prices here are higher than your usual vietnem restaurant though this is not one of those retaurants. It sits on the banks of the river in a magnificent Art Deco builing. Expect to pay between $60 (AU) and $80 (AU) per couple for the dinner including drinks. Its well worth the money.
The staff are amazing the service is 5 star.

title: Yummy!
review: Lovely location and menu options were great. We had the Wagyu pho and the roast pork with rice cakes - fresh and used local produce. Staff were patient and spoke good English. The team went above and beyond by handling our luggage, which we really appreciated. Highly recommend :)

title: The best restaurant on the river!
review: Beautiful restaurant on the river. Great for watching sunsets as there is also a rooftop bar. The food is amazing and the service is impeccable. We were in Hue for 3 nights and ate there twice. Absolutely delicious!

title: A treat in Hue
review: Superb meal, excellent service and superb surroundings. We had a drink on the roof top prior to an evening meal. The ambience on the rooftop was great, watching the people walking past as the sun set. Followed by a really amazing meal. Recommended

title: Very conscious of gluten free requirements. Fantastic food and view.
review: An absolutely fantastic spot on the roof top bar to enjoy the river and the light show on the bridges and walkways. The service was exceptional. Took the greatest care with gluten free meal options. And the head supervisor followed up and then again to ensure satisfaction and spent 20mins chatting about the city , the building history etc. Our waiter Hai was very good.
Great cocktails, beautiful view, attentive and friendly service. Very pleased! Our server, Hoang, was the sweetest!

title: Excellent place - maybe best in Hue for a Westerner
review: The service is absolutely 5 star - and the food is really good. We walked in early (6ish) and were given the best table in the house! With other tables reserved around us. The menu is huge - Vietnamese and Western food. It's not cheap (well it is by western prices). Decent wine selection and many beers (including on tap). The main restauarant is on ground floor (art-deco place) and there's a bar upstairs (didn't look there). Might go back tonight!

title: Great surprise
review:
Amazing atmosphere
Great food
Better staff
Great view in the night
Highly recommended
…
…..
……
…………, …..
……
…………, …..
……
…………,

title: Incredible flavors!
review:
fine food and exceptionally well presented.
Incredible architecture, nostalgia for art deco 1930shas been skillfully preserved by modern design
The staff is lovely: special mentions to Nhi and Long who took the time to ensure our satisfaction and us to exchange with us on Vietnam, France.
We came for lunch... and conquered went back for dinner

title: Circle Hue
review: The food is amazing and the staff is lovely. Nhi gave us very good advice. I recommend the Pho Wagyu in particular!

title: Fantastic food
review: Absolutely fantastic food. Thu was very attentive and provided a fun demonstration of how to create Vietnamese pancakes. Love this place.

title: Wonderful evening in Hue.
review: Food, service and atmosphere was amazing. First class restaurant with lovely views of the river. Definitely worth a visit.

title: Fantastic food in a great environment superbly hosted by Duy.
review: Excellent food and service. The staff took time to explain the dishes and the regional specialty. When the food came we were shown to correct and traditional way to eat the dishes

title: A tribute to the cuisine of eHué and a nod to the history of the French sports circle
review:
A chic place with a very nice decoration.
The chef's suggestions are exceptional.
Very nice discoveries with fragrant and delicious dishes.
The attention of the butler is very fantastic
A great place to discover the cuisine of Hue

title: Birthday
review: The food and service (LAN) were excellent. It was a birthday dinner, for which we chose something special and got it.

title: Experience in Hue.
review: Extraordinary location by the Perfume River and great views..., service by Nhi and other unbeatable companions..., exquisite cuisine and presentation of the dishes exceptional... If we had to go back to Hue... we'd definitely repeat.

title: Best restaurant of Hue
review: Amazing restaurant, the staff was really helpful! The food was amazing, when we doubted about dessert our waiter suggested the salt coffee it originated from Hue. Everything was amazing, felt very welcome :)

title: I recommend
review: A very charming place, very well received. The food is excellent. Unbeatable level quality price. I highly recommend

title: Dining in Huè... als Europeanen
review:
After a long day we decided to close of the night at Le Cercle Café & Bistro. We were welcomed by Hue, a lovely waitress wo works with a big smile. She made sure we had our drinks and food in no time! Her service was very great!

So when in Huè, make sure to have diner at Le Cercle Café & Bistro... It was an awesome experience!

title: Discovery to be repeated
review: starting from apperitive at the top floot terrace to meal in the restaurant with a group of friends we have but possitive words for the food, the service and the quality,

title: Definitely Recommend!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
review: As it was me and my families first time in Vietnam, we were astonished from their amazing customer service and their delicious food and drinks. I definitely recommend LE CERE SPORTIF!

title: Beautiful food in a stunning setting
review: Beautifully presented, delicious food in a stunning setting overlooking the Perfume River. The staff were excellent, and the menu was varied and had something for everyone.

title: Delicious!
review: Gorgeous restaurant along the Perfume River. The food a Le Cercle was 10/10 - we loved our entire meal! Such a lovely experience thanks to our server Hue! She really made the meal extra special - thank you!

title: Great food near Hue city center
review:
Tonight with my family enjoyed a great dinner in a beautiful setting near the water: started with a nice and tasty ‘cercle by night’ as an aperitif, followed by tasty apetizers and as main course the ‘pho with Wagyu beef’ is highly recommended. For dessert I have the famous ‘salt coffee’.
The service led by Duy was very professional and welcoming.
Overall a must as far as I'm concerned

title: Nice place!!!
review: Great place for a date, so romantic, the view of the Perfume River is beautiful, so gorgeous!!! I will come here on my next vacation.

title: Great and ideal location
review: beautiful view, great sightseeing next to the Perfume River, enthusiastic and cheerful staff, delicious food, come and enjoy

title: Great place and service
review: The location of the Restaurant in the best in Hue, you can see the Huong river. Diverse menu, especially Hue dishes are very good and delicious. Enthusiastic and friendly staff. I will you come back hope to see you all. Thank you ❤️❤️❤️

title: Nice view
review: The restaurant has a super beautiful sunset view, their local food is impressive, the drinks are great, the staff are enthusiastic and helpful. I will be back

title: Great restaurant, wonderful food and service.
review: I had a wonderful dining experience at this restaurant. The riverside location was beautiful and peaceful, perfect for a relaxing meal. The beef steak was cooked perfectly—tender, flavorful, and well-seasoned. What made the experience even better was the service. The staff who served me, was incredibly kind and attentive. They made me feel very welcome and comfortable. I’ll definitely come back next time I’m in Hue!

title: 5 stars
review: 5 stars for a classy and luxurious restaurant with bold French architecture in Hue. With a location next to the beautiful Perfume River, diverse dishes from Hue specialties and international dishes, with beautiful and meticulous presentation. In addition, the staff is enthusiastic and friendly, always ready to support when needed. It's great to come here to enjoy the food and enjoy the moment with your loved ones.

title: Excellent place...just to try
review:
The restaurant is housed in a beautiful building, perhaps from the colonial era, which is hard not to notice. The interior is airy and there is a terrace overlooking the Perfume River, beautiful views and utmost privacy, unlike the rowdy area of Phu Hoi.
Extensive menu, both Vietnamese and Western. Freshly prepared dishes with clear expertise, including homemade bread.
A special thanks to Duy for the impeccable service and sympathy, he also prepared me one of the best coffee I have ever drunk, including Italy.
Recommended without a doubt.

title: Nice place in Hue
review: We had a lovely dinner here. Great for special occasions, lovely view over the river and very relaxed atmosphere. Great service from our staff.

title: Incredible food and amazing service!
review:
I had an unforgettable experience at this restaurant in Hue! From the moment we arrived, our waitress Hue greeted us with a warm, friendly smile and made us feel right at home. Her recommendations were spot on, and her kind, attentive service truly elevated our evening.

I had the best pho I’ve tasted in Vietnam so far — full of flavor, perfectly balanced, and incredibly comforting. The salted coffee was also a delightful surprise — rich, smooth, and absolutely delicious.

Everything about this place made the visit special. I highly recommend this restaurant to anyone passing through Hue. Five stars without hesitation!

title: Luxurious restaurant, diverse dishes, especially Hue dishes, enthusiastic and cute service staff, very beautiful view to
review: Luxurious restaurant, diverse dishes, especially Hue dishes, enthusiastic and cute service staff, very beautiful view to the sunset in Hue, will come back more times

title: Best View and service
review: Good experience in this restaurant. One of the best views by the riverside .Traditional Viet and International food well made.

title: Amazing.
review: Great dinner with us lastnight, a perfect service from all staffs : friendly and enthusiastic. A good cocktail from the Rooftop bar with a romantic view Hue at night before dinner. Thanks to All.

title: Best location, beautifull restaurant
review: I came here at lunch, recommendation by hotel staff. So impression the food quality, cocktaiks also very good. Staff was helpfull.Good recommend place

title: A pretty place
review: Relaxing with a beautiful view at night beside Perfume river.we had our favorite cocktail and food very tasty.Staff was attentive.

title: Best thing lace to eat
review: Our tour guide suggested this venue and WOW what a winner. The meal was exceptional and the service was next level - Nguyen was our waitress. It’s a must-do eatery!!

title: Fabulous food. Fantastic location. Don’t hesitate to try it
review:
Fabulous food in a beautiful place!

Our best meal in 8 days in Vietnam. Next to the river with a great bar on the rooftop & lovely restaurant below.

Lam our server & Mo the manager looked after us very well.

title: Nice place in Hue!!
review:
Nice view and wonderful dish!!
We enjoyed both Vietnamese and Western cuisine.
River view and sunset was so beautiful. Our waiter Long were so kind and also gave us some interesting information about Hue and Vietnam.

title: The best had in Vietnam to date!
review:
Excellent super fresh tasty wholesome food. It was a treat to be in such a lovely restaurant clean and friendly staff. Food was exceptional!
I totally recommend eating here. Beautiful view too!

title: Good experience
review: Good experience in this restaurant. Duy and his whole team are taking great care to serve you. Traditional Viet and International food well made.

title: Great food with a view!
review: Great restaurant. One of the best views by the riverside. Our waiter Duy helped us select two dishes from the menu. We were not familiar with the food, but he showed us how to eat it, enjoy different ways to eat it, and how it is unique to only Hue. Highly recommend.

title: Dinner
review:
A fantastic evening. Just what we were looking for. Have loved doing the street food scene, but needed something away from the hustle and bustle.
The food was fabulous as was the setting.
Hue, was our waitress and was so welcoming and friendly. This restaurant may be expensive for Vietnam but it's incredibly good value for us. And fabulous views over the river as well.
Highly recommend it.

title: Nice place in Hue
review: Nice dinner on the river side, the best meal I had in hue, the food was nice presentation and really tasty.Warm welcome from staff, good recommendation.

title: Excellent!!!
review:
Excellent staff, delicious food, very good location, everything we ate was delicious. We preferred Vietnamese dishes that were all ingenious
In addition to the store the cleanliness of all spaces !!!

title: All through fantastic experience.
review:
It was a coincidence that we walked the trail along the river and fell over this restaurant. It looked both cozy and radiated “atmosphere and elegance”.
We had the most delicious dinner and were spoiled with an unusual service. Guy, who was our servant, was over us immediately, something was missing - without being intrusive. He was really sweet and polite.
It was a fantastic experience to be spoiled. Thanks for great food.
It can be clearly recommended

title: Good food, good service, beautiful view on the river
review: Very good food, very good service from Nhi and beautiful view on River of Perfumes. I recommend. They gave us the best table on the roof top. Very warm and welcoming atmosphere.

title: A great venue
review: Fantastic position on the river. Great deco architecture. Very friendly staff and excellent food albeit quite pricey by local standards. Well worth a busy

title: All right.
review: Extremely friendly! Top. Waitresses Nhu, Linh and Mo are at our service. The food was refined. We ate there with friends and are delighted

title: Exceptional dinner
review:
Outstanding service
Exquisite and exceptional dishes
Thank you very much to Mhu and Linh for their exceptional service
Thank you we will be back

title: Charming place
review:
A place with a very nice setting and quality staff. Welcoming, caring and professional people.
Very good map with good value for money. I took the "Pho Bo Wagyu", it was delicious and the dish itself was beautiful and well served.
I recommend this place.

title: We love it!
review: We had Seafood Tower Mo was very nice to us and made us feel very special the food is delicious and the location and atmosphere are the best!

title: Highly recommend
review: Good place to enjoy your dinner and good service from Hue and Mo. Highly recommend this place. Amazing food and beside the Perfume river!

title: Lovely place!
review:
Lovely food and location and also great service from Long.
We would highly recommend this restaurant in this great city

title: Classy, elegant, and top-notch services
review: We heard about this historical building in Hue, it used to be a famous sport club (swimming, rowing boat, tennis, etc.) during the French colonial era. Now it’s a high-end restaurant aptly named Le Cercle Hue. We had dinner here on our first night in Hue. Impressive interior with high ceiling, elegant wooden French doors leading to an outdoor terrace overlooking the Perfume River. Relaxing atmosphere, romantic setting with white table cloth, red rose, candle on every table. The napkin on each plate was folded into the shape of a white tuxedo jacket! We enjoyed our fabulous dinner, especially the traditional Cơm Âm Phủ ( Hell’s rice) and Bánh cuốn thịt nướng (rice crepe with grilled pork skewers). Our waiter Lộc suggested an excellent French white wine to pair with the dishes. He also happily showed us how to fold a napkin into a tuxedo when we told him we loved the look of it. Many thanks also to our waitress Ngọc who recommended the fantastic hibiscus lime ice tea (hibiscus infusion with lime juice and ginger-kumquat syrup). Such unusual, complex flavors yet so refreshing! Highly recommend this place.

title: Great restaurant, wonderful food and service
review:
Lovely restaurant on the Perfume River. We went here for dinner after a couple of days of cool, we weather. We were warmly welcomed and had a window table. We had cocktails and beer before ordering a meal.
