We wanted more of a western feel after a couple of weeks enjoying wonderful Vietnamese cuisine. In the end we opted for Asian food served in a slightly western style. Waghu beef noodles and grilled pork shoulder with leaves and rice “cake”. Along with a decent bottle of red wine we enjoyed the whole experience.

title: Memorable dinner in Hue
review: We were warmly welcomed by the staff. Duy, our waiter took time to explain the dishes and advise. The food was delicious and beautifully presented. The hostess, Mo, was very attentive, ensuring we had a very enjoyable evening. The restaurant is in a lovely position on the bank of the river. All in all, a very memorable last night in Hue. Well done to the team.

title: Great place
review: We came late to Hue and we were desperate to find something to eat. We found the place while walking across the river. The spot was excellent with a great view. Luxurious, cosy and peaceful with a nice music. The food was delicious, after hanging around for several days in HCMC and Siem Reap it was by far the best, closer to our 'european' taste. And Duy, provided an excellent service making everything simpler for us. Moreover, it was my first time ever that I was able to finish my food with chopsticks. Thanks to this guy and his patience. I would definitely recommend this place.

title: Great food & excellent service.
review: Great food, nice location and excellent staff. We enjoyed an evening meal on the terrace facing the bridge. Special attention was paid to my seafood allergy with the team going the extra mile to prepare my dish without the fish sauce marinade. I passed my thanks to the chef, who came out to see us personally. A lovely meal made very special by the kind team at Cercle. Thanks guys.

title: Don’t miss it
review:
Went in for a very late lunch and had their signature Waygu stone pot Pho with two other dishes, one being the famous omelette Hue pancake and a salad. All were super delicious. Their drinks were also very good. They had an ice tea blue pea concoction that was interesting. When it came to the table, it tasted even better than it looked!.
Service staff was “A” one and all speak, or at least understood, English.
The cost of the entire meal for two pax-USD$30!

It really was a very nice dinner in an excellent environment, with great views
And very good staff DUY Always there
The best!!!!

title: Lovely lunch
review: Amazing food and lovely staff. Hue was very friendly and gave us good recommendations of the menu. I would definetely come back again

title: Trip to Vietnam
review: A beautiful establishment by the Perfume River. Pleasant terrace for lunch or dinner overlooking the illuminated deck "Truong Tiên" The cocktails are good, the dishes well executed, the staff friendly and smiling.

title: Best Experience
review:
The staff at the restaurant were so friendly and welcoming. Duy was so helpful, friendly and also provided us with local knowledge. The food and the setting were fantastic. A must go to while you stay in Hue.
Shaz and Baz

title: Eating with french charm
review: Very nice restaurent by the river with a lot of colonial french charm. Excellent food options and assertive staff. This is my favourite place in Hue

title: Very good place to have lunch.
review: Today we went to this place for the third time for lunch. For me one of the most important things is the continuity of flavors in different meals and different days. From more or less elaborate dishes, each dish must contain the essence of the place, that makes the place have its own seal. For me, they've made it. Careful attention. Value for money just right. Good atmosphere next to the Perfume River.

title: Meals in Hue
review: Excellent restaurant with very professional service. The waiter Duy even advised us on how to eat Vietnamese dishes and products used. Great view of the river of perfumes and the citadel.

title: Fantastic experience
review:
Walking along the Wooden Bridge and it came to my attention that there are some couples were having dinner on the patio of a building above me and my friend, we decided to stop by and we were really impressed! The waitor walked us to the table and recommend some signature dishes. He is so friendly and told us a lot about the history of the building.
Great location, food was so delicous, the service was excellent! Not to miss place to eat, highly recommend!

title: Top stuff.
review: I am from Switzerland and was here in February ‘25 with my family and we ordered the wagyu, at Dyu’s recommendation, among others. Everything was top notch: the food, the service, the location. Special thanks to Dyu and the chef. Also, the price-quality ratio made it totally worth it. I usually do not write reviews, yet, I was impressed by this restaurant.

title: Hue dinner by the river
review: Lovely staff, very relaxed location by the river. Very good fried spring rolls, prawn Caesar salad and salted coffee. People could not be more helpful.

title: Excellent Restaurant
review: delicious restaurant with beautiful terrace at the top. the food is very good full of flavors. the waiters are smiling and kind. Thank you very much!

title: Perfect place
review: So nice location with river view,Im feel very relaxing when seating here coffee has price resonable only 25.000vnd to get good espresso.Staff is professional and friendly 5*.Food very tasty,nice presentation.Good place

title: Experience at Le Cercle
review: The space is very beautiful, the staff is very enthusiastic and especially the food is very delicious, the feeling of enjoying the food on the Hương River is wonderful

title: Best location, great experience
review: I know this place when passed by.It's so nice restaurants beside Perfume river.I had good cocktails at Rooftop, dinner was amazing with Wagyu pho I've ever had before and pancake fresh ingredients.Staff was dedicated and very polite, take care well our allergies.Great experience in Hue.I will come back!

title: very good!
review: Very careful about allergies, very kind staff, and delicious food. The sea bass and squash soup was so so good. fruit was very fresh!

title: Things to do during a stay in Hue
review: A beautiful culinary experience and impeccable service from Duy ...with service. In addition the setting with the view of the river is very nice.

title: Great Place, Friendly and Great Service!!!
review:
Le Cercle Restaurant is a nicest place that's I have been in Hue City!
The location of the restaurant is the best I trust, you can see the Huong river, Hue Citadel. It's beautiful view from 1&2nd floor.
The Service was great, staffs are friendly and courteous! Ms. Mo is a very nice lady, she alway keep an eyes and offer help to her team and my self during my time there!
And I will never forget Duy, who is the best of the service, nice smiles, helfull and comfortable!
Sure, I will come back hope to see you all!
Thank you 🤝🌻🍾🥂

title: Amazing food and experience
review: Amazing food especially the wayagu beef pho was delicious. The mango desert was from another world. The service was the best I had in Vietnam. Its a beautifulrestaurant, would highly recommend it!!

title: Vietnamese food on the waterfront
review: Very nice place for a romantic dinner. The staff is very attentive and the food is really good. Great value for money. Thank you!!

title: A gem
review: We came across this restaurant by chance as we crossed the bridge from the citadel and gave it a go, not knowing about its history or having read any reviews. We were delighted with our meal and drinks, the location and the history of the restaurant explained to us by the staff - including a display of evocative photos of the building before and after the war. A real ‘find’ - so glad we did. Thank you to all the staff - front of house and kitchen.

title: Great food and excellent service by Long. Lovely atmosphere by the river
review: Great place. Excellent food and wonderful service by Long. Great location by the river. We would recommend you coming here

title: Super sted ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
review:
Super service and food 👍
Lovely beautiful place and cute friendly staff who were very attentive
We can only give our best recommendation
Hue servant, was in strange class

title: Disappointing
review: We had high expectations after all the positive reviews, but it was slightly disappointing. We ordered an appetiser, followed by two mains. Unfortunately it all came at once so we were completely rushed, and could not enjoy the appetiser. That is fine if all listed under one menu, but not if listed as a starter. My husband’s beef burger was good, but chips were almost cold when they arrived. We had a much better experience at a local restaurant the night before for 1/4 of the price.

title: Great food, service and location
review: Great food and service. Had the wagyu beef burger and the wagyu beef pizza- both delicious. Very polite and friendly staff.

title: Restaurant with a great view and delicious food!
review: The food here is really great! Everything we ordered here was very tasty and Duy assisted us with more details about each dish...the salt coffee I tried was top notch and the pho was outstanding...Must visit place for a fantastic food and a nice view by the river!

title: Excellent meal
review: This restaurant was recommended to us by our beautiful guide Tam and it surpassed all our expectations--we had four different main courses and all were excellent. Plus the service from our waiter Long was attentive and efficient without being intrusive ! 5 stars !!

title: Stylish and delicious
review: Exquisite food at a reasonable price in a super stylish setting. A really memorable experience. Staff are all very nice and attentive. Nice riverside setting. Great options for vegetarians.

title: Fabulous and Captivated Destination
review: Amazing, Our service was extraodinary and be a story teller about Hue cuisine. Must try Wagyu A5 steak combine with trolley service.

title: Best choice of Hue
review: A perfect restaurant to savor the wonderful local food. The location is unbeatable, with magnificent river views. On the menu you can find international dishes but it would be a pity to leave aside local dishes. The dessert and wine list are varied and serve good cocktails. The staff is wonderful and very attentive. The best alternative dn Hue.

title: Perfume River-side restaurant
review: Perfume River-side restaurant: the food was delicious as well as healthy. The staff was charming - especially the knowledgeable conversation of Leon, and Long’s skillful how-to-wrap demonstration! My introduction to salt coffee was a delight! We’ll be back soon

title: Must-see, fabulous
review: Beautiful restaurant, excellent food, great view , perfect service with special mention for Long of extreme kindness and great professionalism.

title: Amazing place by the river
review:
Excellent restaurant located on the river. The dining room provides amazing views of the river and bridges.
The food and staff were first class, everything was cooked to perfection and the team were attentive to our needs.
I had the Wagyu pho which was beautiful, served with an assortment of flavors.
I cannot recommend this place enough

title: Ambience, location, food!
review: Excellent dinner, great ambience and awesome food! Recommend the oysters! A nice dinner spot, not to be missed when in Hue. Overlooks perfume river.

title: Excellent a must on the river.
review:
This is the most beautiful restaurant. We called in for a coffee firt but booked a table dow later.
Excellent food. Tasty local food. Western food if you want it too. Staff and service were amazing

title: Believe everything you hear about this place.
review: Great food, well presented in a great atmosphere. Fine dining that doesn’t break the budget. “Long” was a great waiter, if he recommends something, listen to him.

title: Lovely service, quiet evening
review:
We were literally the only ones in the restaurant on this rainy evening but it didn’t matter.
Service was excellent as you can imagine but the food was also great, reasonably priced and tasty.
A good place to go looking over the river in the daytime.

title: Great afternoon
review: Places that I will definitely never miss when coming to Hue. This time it was with our family. A fun and quiet lunch enjoying the meal. My daughter loves the juice.

title: Great restaurant in Vietnam
review:
The food was excellent and the service too! All great.
We ordered dishes from Vietnam. One of the best restaurants we've been to in Vietnam.

title: best restaurant in vietnam!
review: This restaurant was incredible! The pho was the best we have had so far and the deserts were delicious. The staff were lovely and bathrooms were nice and clean. Also had a lovely atmosphere and view.

title: Great experience
review: Great experience for us in Hue! We found this place by accident and decided to try it. Super recommended experience, great food and presentation, intimate and romantic location on the perfume river and friendly and helpful staff.

title: Worth the visit; delicious & good value!
review:
An absolute treat. The restaurant looks very high end, but it was great value for money. The food was great and the service from our waitress, Nguyen, was superb.

We sat outside overlooking the river.

title: Amazing Vietnamese Cuisine with a Stunning View and Exceptional Service
review:
We had an incredible dining experience at this Vietnamese restaurant. The food was authentic, flavorful, and beautifully presented, offering a true taste of Vietnam. The restaurant’s location provides a stunning view, making the atmosphere even more enjoyable.

A special shoutout to Long, our server, who went above and beyond to accommodate our extra requests. His attentiveness, friendly demeanor, and dedication to ensuring we had a perfect meal truly stood out.

If you’re looking for delicious Vietnamese food paired with excellent service and a breathtaking setting, this place is a must-visit. Highly recommended!

title: Beautiful dinner with a view
review: Beautiful dinner and duy was a great server for us! Would recommend to anyone staying in Hue. Table right by the window with a view of the river which was lovely

title: Really friendly waitress Lena made it extra special
review:
We had a really tasty meal at Vi Hue Restaurant. Very extensive menu, I had the crispy pancakes and my husband had the chicken curry. But what made it so memorable was the lovely Lena who served us. She was super friendly and attentive making sure everything was ok and made us feel really welcome.

Would definitely recommend.

title: This place is money
review: Mr. Galvin was amazing. The service was impeccable the food was out of this world. We ate such yummy food and Mr. Galvin was the perfect guide for this culinary journey. The cocktails were also incredible. We loved our culinary experience at Vi Hue.

title: Total gem!
review: Total GEM! The service was amazing, TRAMM is great. The food is outstanding, the drinks, and the restaurant very pretty. A Must!

title: Everything was a party in our mouths, service was fabulous.
review: This service and food was next level. We highly recommend ordering the chefs recommendations, they were all mind blowing! Lona looked after us beautifully, lovely, friendly, helpful and great English.

title: Dinners in Hue
review: Great restaurant for family dinner during our Vietnam tour. I chose noodles with vegetables and seafood. Very good. Very kind staff, especially Darwin

title: Food and service are just great
review: I had a very pleasant experience at this restaurant. The atmosphere is clean and cozy. The food is delicious and nicely arranged. The prices are a bit high, but it is worth it and fits very well to my taste. The service person named Trâmm was very friendly, attentive and helpful. She took good care of the guests from start to finish, which made the experience even more beautiful.

title: Gourmet food at modest price
review: Food was excellent, as is so much in Vietnam in general. We had a nice bottle of wine more food than we deserved for a very modest price.

title: Wonderful Vietnamese food
review: Great cuisine, very nice ambience and super friendly service. Amy did everything she could to make us feel comfortable.

title: Amazing coffee and delicious pasta. The menu suits every taste. Waiter Galvin was very attentive and friendly.
review: Amazing coffee and delicious pasta. The menu suits every taste. Waiter Galvin was very attentive and friendly.

title: The restaurant left a pretty nice impression.
review: Great restaurant with a pleasant atmosphere and delicious, neatly served food. I want to mention Galvin's waiter separately - polite, attentive and made the service really comfortable.

title: Very good restaurant
review: Restaurant very good, we feasted. Amy's been in care for us. I recommend ++ if you are making a getaway to Hue

title: Excellent food!
review: Excellent food with great recommendations by the amazing Mong. The braised chicken was plentiful and so delicious. The seafood over noodles was also excellent. Will definitely come back to try more dishes next time in Hue.

title: A very fine restaurant in Hue
review:
Discovered by chance with Google. We ate delicious food, presented with care and originality.
Galvin was very helpful and with colleagues they worked to make us live a pleasant experience in a relaxing atmosphere. We enjoyed the duck cooked at low temperature, the noodles with fish and shrimp and other apetizers.
We will keep this place of taste in our hearts and memories of this trip to Hue.

title: Nice restaurant in central Hue
review: Spacious restaurant in central location. Nice atmosphere with waitresses in traditional costume and ours, Dream was charming. Food was tasty and nicely presented. Recommend the coffee esp the Hue coffee with salted cream. Our lunch was part of our Vietnam tour so not sure of cost.

title: Great restaurant experience in Hue
review: This is the second time I have returned to the restaurant to enjoy fried chicken and grilled chicken. Both dishes are excellent and worth trying. The restaurant space is formal and sophisticated, the staff is enthusiastic and welcoming. Thank you Dream for your hospitality and enthusiasm. A restaurant you should visit when coming to Hue

title: Delicious
review: Food was delicious and excellent service from Amy

title: Very good hospitality 🌿
review: Twice again. Thank you Mr. Mui and Mr. Huy for their attentive reception and service. 10 Points Service

title: Refined place but with very decent prices
review: Very nice and quiet place. Thanks to Galvin for his 5/5 service. We ate deliciously well. Vegetarians served with pleasure.

title: Delicious Restaurants in Hue
review: The ambiance is classic and the modern mix is eye-catching, the food is pretty impressive with a stew and the stew is quite normal. The Lina staff is quite helpful and friendly. A place to experience in Hue

title: Excellent food and service
review: The restaurant is warm and friendly. The service excellent with good English and very good food. Priced to suit the western pocket very good value.

title: Style over substance
review:
Two out of three dishes chosen were not available. Braised chicken was chewy chunks of meat which weren’t tender from being braised. Tacos crispy but greasy and filling was minimal,
Service was a bit chaotic.
Felt the place was more style over substance.

title: All right.
review:
We ate very well. Nhii, our waitress, was adorable.
We recommend

title: Great restaurant and service
review: Tasty meal with wonderful service from NHii.

title: Definitive recommendation
review: Fantastic, authentic and very creative food with an excellent service by Galvin (I hope I noted the name correctly). Be sure to try!!

title: Perfect late night dinner after massage
review:
We had such a lovely dinner at Vị Huế Restaurant & Café. Every dish was full of flavor and clearly made with care — honestly, every bite was a joy. The atmosphere was cozy and calm, exactly what we were hoping for, with beautiful interior design that makes you want to stay longer.

A special thank you to Galvin, our waiter, whose friendly and attentive service really made the evening feel personal. One of our favorite meals in Huế — highly recommend

title: Excellent food and service
review: I celebrated my birthday here whilst on holiday with Way to go and the service from Andrew was excellent along with the delicious food making it a very special evening xx

title: Tasty and challenging food with a super service
review:
Dinner tonight at Vi Hue.
What a beautiful and cozy restaurant with a very good service. Our waitress Amy took the time to properly explain what it was. Very good service really top . But the very best was the taste. We had the dumplings and steak-tartar beforehand. Really delicious flavors. Then had the chicken and a salad with Vietnamese beef. That salad was delicious in a word. I haven't enjoyed dinner this much in a long time. Really a very nice combination of flavors.

title: Vietnamese food for the West
review: A nice meal, but overall we felt this food was Vietnamese for a western audience. We had heard good reviews, but overall we felt this wasn’t really on par with other meals we have had in the city and across Vietnam. Not an awful meal, but not our favourite either.

title: Amazing dinner.
review: Amazing dinner in a beautiful and refined location. Exquisite appetizers and excellent service. Special thanks to Na who took care of us with great professionalism and courtesy. 5 stars to Na and restaurant.

title: Just okay for me
review:
The restaurant’s atmosphere was really nice. I visited with a group of about 10 people.

Although there were a lot of options on the menu, nothing much appealed to me. I ordered the Banh Beo. It just didn’t have a lot of flavor or texture. I was expecting the fried shallots and garlic to give a contrast to the steamed rice cake base but they were not crunchy.

Perhaps I just chose the wrong thing. Others in the group mostly liked what they had.

title: An amazing experience!!!
review:
Located near the end of the street, the restaurant is often fully booked, so you should make a reservation in advance at this time (luckily, we were able to get a table for seven).
The tasting menu is truly a masterpiece of freshness — I highly recommend trying the sea bass at least once.The ambiance is soft and elegant, perfectly complemented by attentive service; special thanks to Lina for her friendliness and professionalism.Finally, the prices are very reasonable for the quality and overall experience, which I truly appreciate.

title: Amazing evening and great service
review:
The table we had couldn’t have been in a better location, on the edge of the first floor balcony overlooking the river and all the boats with their lanterns. The food was good and the staff busy but very helpful (we ate local specialties and Nnhi was very helpful in telling us what went with what and the best way to eat it!).
A lot of the boats stop at 9:30pm and it was amazing to see the whole flotilla heading for home. Great evening and a very good restaurant

title: Vi Hue Restaurant
review: Food was excellent, lovely atmosphere in the restaurant & Galvim was very helpful - would strongly recommend if staying in Hue

title: Tasteful and beautiful ambiance
review: Galvin our Wauters was very Nice, The Food and cocktails were lovely

title: Great experience - we loved it
review: Very nice evening, delicious cuisine and impeccable service - we recommend

title: Very good and professional!
review: Nhii's service was excellent and very professional, our meal was delicious and served quickly, thank you

title: Amazing
review: Great place and amazing food. Galvin made the whole experience even better, great service and very friendly! Would 100% recommend. Thank you

title: Just fantastic!
review: It was exceptionally tasty, the aperitif, the starter, the main course slow-cooked pork, to lick the fingers of! And a delicious egg coffee. Lina, the sweetest, friendliest girl I met in Vietnam, was able to answer all our questions and spoke English very well. She did her job very professionally, but personally. Highly recommended!

title: Excellent staff make all the difference.
review: Just had a lovely evening at this fab restaurant. Food was great and beautifully presented. Our server Nhii was very professional and attentive. She made our visit extra special. A real credit to the restaurant.

title: Great service, lovely food and a good atmosphere
review: We had a very enjoyable meal for two in this restaurant with super friendly service from Mrs Dream. The food was high quality traditional Vietnamese, with delicate tastes and high quality ingredients. Highly recommended.

title: Highly recommended!
review: Food is delicious and the service by Mong was excellent 👍

title: Great food
review: Great food, the duck was amazing, Galvin was super nice

title: Exceptionally good food for small money
review: It is a very appealing restaurant. Stylishly decorated, but not posh. The kitchen is worth a Michelin recommendation in my opinion. We were there twice. Fine cuisine for small money. The service is very good. We were very accommodating by Nhii. The duck sousvid is exceptionally delicious. All other dishes, too. A must when you're in town.

title: Excellent Vietnamese cuisine and excellent service
review:
Excellent Vietnamese cuisine and excellent service
I had a wonderful evening at Vi Hue Restaurant & Café. The food was excellent – the Vietnamese cuisine is creatively interpreted and prepared with great attention to detail. Each dish was tastefully balanced and beautifully presented.
I would particularly like to highlight my service Amy, who was extremely friendly and professional.
Absolutely recommended for anyone who wants to enjoy authentic Vietnamese cuisine with a modern touch!​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

title: Highly Recommend
review: Excellent food which is different to the menu in most restaurants. service was excellent and dishes explained. I would recommend this restaurant if you are visiting Hue.

title: Great dinner
review: Excellent dinner. Our server Nnhi was great.

title: Very good, highly recommended
review: The restaurant is excellent, both food and service is excellent. We had an extraordinary dining experience. Our service person Dream accompanied us very professionally and charmingly. Thank you for that.

title: Experience repeated twice because very satisfied.
review: We followed Google's advice and did not regret it. We even went back the next day. We liked the atmosphere, the service, the dishes and even the spaced tables that also show the quality of the service. This is a restaurant where everything is spotless, you can go there with your eyes closed. Just one table outside, but inside everything looks open and airy (and it's warmer in the evening). A little cuckoo from France to Mei who served us the second evening.

title: A fantastic dinner at Vi Hue! Excellent food and service
review:
Vi Hue was convenient from our hotel and after looking at its rating (4.9/5) decided to give it a try as a special anniversary dinner… we were NOT disappointed!! The service from NNHI (host and server) was fantastic. She took care to ask about our allergies and our tolerance to very spicy food. She made recommendations and all of them were spot on. We ate: Banh Beo, Cha Gio Nhan Thit Ken Hat Sen Hue ( pork & Hue lotus seed crispy spring rolls) Ga Nuong ONG Tre Xoi Gac ( grilled chicken in bamboo served with cochinchin sticky rice - amazing)
and finished off with their banana flambé with raisin rum ice cream!!
It was a delight and would highly recommend it

title: Fine dining in Vietnamese
review:
This was the best Vietnamese food we have enjoyed so far. Fine dining! The higher prices are justified.
Very attentive, friendly and competent service (mong). Stylish and clean ambience.
Not to mention the fantastic cocktails!

title: Recommended for good food and atmosphere
review: Good menu selection, great food and friendly service ANH our waitress was lovely . We were quite a large group, but they managed our orders well and were very acommodating. They even supplied and served a fabulous cake for my Birthday. Many Thanks Hayley

title: Perfect
review: As expected, the food was amazing. The beef was super soft and the sauce more tasty than you can imagine. Also the flamber banana... my god. We don´t have bananas like that in Europe. Our waitres was Dream, and yes, she was a dream. Too good to be true!

title: Nice discovery.
review:
Nice atmosphere. Our waiter Galvin was very kind and professional. Nice restaurant.
The tacos were delicious.
Thank you😊

title: 🫶 Best meals, and service!
review: What a wonderful surprise to find in Hue. The food was spectacular as were the drinks - as was Andrew, both nights that he took care of my family and I. That's right: with all the resto options available, we came back twice for dinner! Don't hesitate to have an amazing evening and dinner at Vi Hue.

title: High quality restaurant
review: High quality food and service. Good wine and cocktails too. I think ask for a table outside though as it was very warm inside and the people watching outside was great.

title: Galvin Crack
review: Galvin gave us a spectacular service, very helpful and friendly, thank you for making this meal very enjoyable, Thank you!!

title: Very good restaurant in Hue
review: Very good food, well cooked and with very good presentation. Rosa's taken care of us. Very friendly with your recommendations

title: Lunch
review:
We ate with my sister in this restaurant and we were superbly received and accompanied by Galvin.
Galvin speaks a little French and is very helpful.
The meal was very good and specific mention for egg coffee which has a little extra stuff.
I recommend

title: Restaurant
review: Very good restaurant! We were served by Galvin who was very welcoming and caring! I highly recommend!

title: Great service, excellent beer and a lovely pizza.
review: Great service, excellent beer and a lovely pizza. Highly recommend!!!?!!!!!!!!!!!!!!?!!!!!!!! Irritating character minimum here for reviews. Hasn't ta gone to pot?

title: Great place snd excellent food
review: Love this place and the food is fantastic!! The staff are super friendly and helpful! Dreamm was very sweet and kind along with all her colleagues

title: Highly recommended!
review:
Fantastic food and super friendly service.
Especially Bach was very helpful

title: Incredible food
review: An incredible restaurant with the most amazing food. Beautiful, thoughtfully presented and delicious food with the kindest of staff. Particular mention to Lona who looked after us so well. Going back for a return visit tomorrow evening as doubt this can be beaten. Thank you x

title: Good value and menu choice.
review: Good menu choices, very fresh food. Ms Tramm very helpful and knowledgeable on menu. Located in good part of city with bars restaurants and shops. Great value for money.

title: EXCELLENTISM
review:
Upon arrival we were charmed by the elegant setting of the restaurant
The service by Nhii, smiling, gracious, and concerned for our well-being throughout the meal, was much appreciated
The dishes were nicely presented and excellent
We went back a second time to taste other dishes, just as good
Restaurant to recommend without hesitation as very reasonable considering the culinary services, setting, atmosphere and service
A thank you to the kitchen team and especially to Nhii ✨🤗🙏

title: Lunch in vi hue
review: This restaurant has a nice and clean atmosphere. The food is good and tasty. Galvin service is friendly and fast

title: Very good restaurant with excellent hospitality
review:
Everything was perfect from start to finish, the setting, the decoration, the cozy atmosphere. The dishes are delicious, nicely prepared and the service is impeccable. All the staff are very attentive to ensure we have a very pleasant time. A special mention to Nhii who is charming and very attentive.
We'll be right back.

title: Fantastic dinner
review: We happened by chance in front of this restaurant and seeing the movement and the reviews we immediately knew we were in the right place. Not having booked they were kind enough to find us a makeshift table. We ate very well, the service is fantastic and the dishes made with great products for the really low price we paid ..

title: Loved every bite!
review: Excellent vietnamese food. This was our first real experience with vietnamese food on our trip and we were not disappointed. We loved every bite!

title: Pleasant environment. We were very well received. great service and huge sympathy from Nhii. The chef's suggestions very good.
review: Good environment, excellent cuisine, exceptional service. Nhii was always very attentive and very sympathetic. We really liked

title: Great choice for dinner in Hue
review:
The food was excellent! The service is fantastic! We were treated by Nhii which is a sympathy!
I highly recommend for a European experience in Vietnam!

title: First meal in Hue
review: Nhii was very professional and attentive to our requests, she is very kind. The meal was delicious we feasted thanks again for this meal

title: Perfect.
review: The reception and perfect, the staff very kind with many small attentions, we were recommended by Tramm thank you very much, the restaurant very nice and very chic, with a magnificent decoration you feel really good, the cocktails well prepared and very tasty, the delicious and well prepared dishes, thanks 👍

title: Good choice for lunch or dinner
review: Perfect service. Excellent food, authentic and some good choices for people with a tender tummy. Good price. Tramm treated us like royalty. No regrets! Thank you

title: Great service and lovely meal
review:
We had a lovely meal at Vie Hue Restaurant & Cafe. The service from Bach was fantastic from the moment we walked through the door — welcoming, attentive and genuinely kind throughout the evening.
The food was delicious, with the Bánh Bèo steamed rice cakes being the standout dish for us — delicate, flavourful and beautifully prepared.
Thank you, Bach, for such a lovely evening. We’d happily return and recommend Vie Hue to others visiting Hue.

title: Elegant and very high quality
review:
Fantastic food, fantastic location, fantastic service, especially through Dream. She gave us fantastic recommendations.
A culinary experience rarely found outside Europe. Every course was at the highest level. Clearly Michelin star-worthy for me – hopefully this will soon be officially recognized.

title: Great dinner ad hue
review:
I am on holiday ad hue and tonight I decided to have dinner in this restaurant because recommended by friends.
The place is very welcoming and the staff is lovely. As soon as I arrived I was entrusted to the care of NNI, a sweet girl who was concerned to best meet my dietary needs.
I had a duck fillet accompanied by two great sauces and a sweet potato flan. The dish was exquisite and the combinations heavenly. Even the cooking was perfect.
If you are passing through for hue recommend going to this restaurant and if you do give a greeting to NNI for me.

title: Great meal and friendly staff
review:
I highly recommend Vi Hue for your authentic food. Got recommendation from their sister business in Hoian. Their food, setup, and staff are great. Located in the centre of Hue city.
Should not miss when you here.

title: A place not to be missed
review: Very nice place and satisfactory food, very interesting vegetarian proposal , excellent fresh spring rolls

title: Great food, excellent service
review: Fantastic place to eat, food was delicious and very reasonably priced. Excellent menu choices, special shout out to Mong who really made us feel at home and helped out with selections!

title: Great Vietnamese restaurant in Hue
review:
We had lunch in this restaurant found casually because it was close to our hotel.
We were initially impressed by the very welcoming place and relaxing atmosphere (our waiter Bach was attentive and kind and pampered us throughout lunch).

As soon as the dishes arrived, the protagonists became them. Excellent proposals, abundant and refined tastes.

We absolutely recommend eating here 🫶

title: Top authentic food and high-end restaurant
review: I highly recommend Duck breast , they are tasty and prepared with fresh ingredients. It was a great choice! The service was also impeccable, thanks to Terexa for making our dinner so enjoyable. We will definitely be back!

title: Impeccable service
review: Restaurant with a nice decor, refined typical dishes and very well presented. A server named BACH perfect!

title: Amazing Experience
review: Came here with my family and had the most wonderful service. Nhi was incredible. So accommodating and provided great service. Can’t wait to come back we had a delightful evening

title: Lovely spot for dinner
review: Lovely restaurant, lovely food, lovely waiters! We weren’t rushed at all, Bach our waiter was great, he recommended dishes, gave us lots of time to look at the menu etc. The menu has a wide range of options for everyone, and the food arrived super quick. The seafood noodles were packed with seafood and the claypot chicken was super yummy, definitely worth a visit

title: Very attentive service thank Mr Bach :)
review: We were very spontaneous guests on New Year's Eve and had a wonderful evening! Our table was very cozy and the food excellent!!! We ate so well and our condition called Bach was mega accommodating and Attentive. Everything was perfect 👍

title: Good food, but more importantly, wine!
review: If you’re looking for upscale Vietnamese (or Vietnamese fusion?) cuisine with a solid wine list and fun cocktails, Vi Hue is a great place to check out. We stopped by here for a bottle of wine and appetizers during our first night in Hue and decided to come back for a full dinner later in the week! The service is great, and our server Andrew was attentive and helpful. Sit outside for great people watching and ambiance, but the inside of the restaurant is lovely too.

title: Best food in Vietnam! Amazing service! Thoroughly recommend!!
review: Service was absolutely incredible from Lona - very attentive. This was the best food we have had in Vietnam, seriously recommend! A lovely relaxed atmosphere in a hustle and bustle location.

title: VI Hué Hué
review: A nice restaurant and nice staff especially Andrew, as our host. Definitely recommended. For anyone who has the opportunity to visit this restaurant.

title: Great food, great service.
review: Great servis as well as great food. We have six different meals and they were excellent. And service by Mr. Bach (Easy to remember because I am big fan of classical music) had no mistake. Totally recommended. Only to listen every 10 minutes jazz variation of “Santa Claus is coming to Town” could be a little bit boring.

title: Excellent food and outstanding service
review:
Great experience at Vi Hue a Hue. Delicious, authentic dishes made with fresh ingredients, in a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
Special thanks to Bach, our waiter, who was extremely kind, attentive, and always smiling — truly excellent service.
Highly recommended if you’re in Hue!

title: Recommended
review: Speaking of restaurants for tourists, yes, but they are delicious and clean, so you can eat with peace of mind. Hugeon cuisine rather than kote-kote Vietnamese cuisine.The waiters are also polite and feel good about the distance. Thank you, Mr. Bach. It was a good memory of the last night in Hue.

title: Great drinks
review: Our hotel was basically next door, so we stopped here for a drink after the overnight train from Hanoi to Hue. At that point (December 2024), I think the restaurant / cafe was brand new as only part of it was open. The staff were all really friendly and helpful, and we had a good selection of drinks prepared very quickly, which were good value. Great to see from photos how the place has developed further.

title: Great service
review: Great traditional plates, and exceptional service with Nhi! Recommended. I’m not sure why this was not long enough as a review , but TripAdvisor says so.

title: Perfect dinner
review: A delicious meal in the middle of Hue. Relaxed atmosphere inside and excellent service at the hands of Bach, one of his waiters. I'm sure we'll repeat.

title: Découverte culinaire au Vi Hue
review: The place is very beautiful. I ve tried a signature cocktail Nui Ngu which was very perfect and then I took appetizers "Banh beo"and pasta My y sot rau mui and that was so good! Theresa was my guide in the restaurant, her service was perfect and she is very helpful. Many thanks to the chief, and to the crew. ❤️

title: Exceptional place to dine in Hue
review: Beautiful restaurant, food was outstanding and service excellent. Our waitress Rosa took great care of our group and we had a wonderful evening.

title: Great experience
review:
Nice and relaxing place. No rush. Nice food. Service is friendly thanks to Tuong Vi.
If you wish to spend a quiet evening dinner, this is a place to be.

title: Good food, bad cocktail
review: Note 5 for our 2 courses (Bun Bo Hue & Taco Banh Xeo) but zero for the cocktail (rum, coconut juice, lime, mint, lemongrass: none of the ingredients are found in the taste).

title: Thumbs up! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
review: The place is super cool. The food is really great. The service is excellent. Food arrives on time. Thanks to the service of Rosa and Marie. The price of the food, reasonable. Thumbs up!

title: Fresh, delicious and quality
review: Located in an eatery mile. Food was very fresh and delicious. Service was fast and efficient. Quality food for the price. Clean and well maintained. Definitely to be recommended.

title: Great visit and lovely food.
review: Lovely restaurant. Served by Bailey who was friendly and knowledgable. Food was well presented and really enjoyed it. We would eat at this restaurant again.

title: A wonderful evening for us – thanks to TRÂM
review: Tonight we had a really wonderful experience at the restaurant. As soon as we arrived, the warm and pleasant atmosphere put us at ease. We would particularly like to compliment the waitress TRAMM, who made our evening even more perfect. She was always smiling, enthusiastic and very attentive, whether it was introducing us to each dish, suggesting choices adapted to our tastes or helping us throughout the meal. The kindness and benevolence of TRAM made us feel sincerely welcome.

title: Everything was perfect!
review:
Everything was perfect!
Attentive service, worthy of the most beautiful tables; refined dishes, carefully worked and a peaceful setting, ideal to enjoy the moment.

Special thanks to our waitress, Amy, whose kindness, availability and attention to detail made this lunch even more enjoyable.

title: Incredible!
review: Incredible dining experience! Amazing food and cocktails, and well priced considering how high-end it is. My server, Nhi, was absolutely amazing too. Attentive, friendly, and welcoming. (All staff I spoke to had perfect English also!)

title: Attentive service and great food
review: We really just wanted to stop by for a coffee, but then stayed much longer – and for good reason. The service was extremely attentive and friendly. The atmosphere is pleasant and welcoming, so you feel right at home. Finally, we also tasted some food and were absolutely delighted: everything was fresh, delicious and lovingly prepared. There is a clear recommendation from me!

title: Beautiful restaurant and excellent food. Excellent service by mrs Tram.
review: Beautiful restaurant. A variety of interesting dishes. Excellent food and beautifully prepared. Excellent service by mrs Tram.

title: Excellent and friendly
review: We had very good food, the dishes were excellent, the setting is nice, it is clean, the quality is good and our waiter Bach was very friendly, he even spoke a few words of French.

title: Good Hue food and nice service
review: Very good expérience and food, with spécialties from Hue, for instance caramelized steamed Fish in banana leave, hue coffee… with a spécial mention to Mong, sweet and very attentive

title: Lunch in Hue
review: Great lunch. During Hue's visit we stopped for lunch at this restaurant. Very cozy, comfortable and quaint. We ate excellent dishes, presented very well and described in detail by the waiter Bach who also explained the characteristic of the beer we took. Even the dessert surprised you very favorably!

title: We recommend strongly!
review: Excellent food and plate presentation. Great experience. I had the duck which was really tasty and tender. The service by Mr. Bach was great!

title: Delicious! I recommend!!!
review:
A very nice experience!! Delicious. Ecstatic pork cheek with every bite!!😊
Perfect service offered by our Bach server.

We were 3 and had loved it!

title: Great dinner
review: Friendly atmosphere, very friendly staff and really great food. Recommended! I will definitely return as soon as possible.

title: The best of the best
review: Definitely the best Vietnamese food restaurant in Hanoi!! As an Italian I tell you the top of the top! Then if you will be served by Andrew it will be even better.... Good polite and professional !! ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ x you 🙏🏻

title: Gastronomy in Vietnam
review: We were helped very well by Bach, even with some words dutch, the food was excellent! Can without a doubt match good restaurants in Belgium. 10/10 and 5 star rating 👌🏻

title: Wonderful. Just wonderful.
review: We tried this restaurant on a chance and were delighted with the graciousness and superior service. Bailey is a wonderful server and very knowledgeable and friendly. Highly recommend you try for lunch or dinner. Give it a try.

title: First meal in Hué
review:
Bach was who served us, very, friendly, helpful and attentive.
It was 5 stars. The food was quite and very pleasant.

title: highly recommended !!!!!!!
review: Exquisite dishes, delicate, excellent attention from Bach , a very pleasant atmosphere really super recommended!!!!!!

title: Great find
review: Amazing restaurant with great food and atmosphere. Good variety on the menu and also lots of vegetarian options too which was great. Staff were very attentive, especially Dream and Theresa. Coming back tomorrow!

title: Great staff and good food
review: Good food and lovely staff. Came across this restaurant by chance and decided to book for dinner, very pleased that we did. Dream served us and was amazing.

title: Great place
review:
Very nice place, cocktail, delicious. Thanks to the beautiful waitress Nhi
Very professional and who gave us very good advice

title: A charming restaurant
review:
Charming setting and rather refined cuisine. Some amazing teas. Careful personnel.
Quiet place. I highly recommend it.

title: Modern and sober.
review: Modern restaurant, sober decoration. Young and very attentive service. Classic and good meal. Vietnamese coffee served is strong!

title: Great lunch with friends
review: Very nice quality food in a super friendly atmosphere. Amy, our waiter, was very attentive and professional. 100% recommended.

title: Redefining Food Enjoyment - INCREDIBLE GEM
review:
Vi Hue has everything i need in a proper fine meal, including delicious food, balanced and suitable drinks, beautiful and quiet space, friendly and enthusiastic service.

If you are not sure what to choose or have allergies or vegetarians, the hosts will help you choose the menu. i tried the mocktails (without alcohol) Qilin and Phoenix which were delicious that i decide to come back tomorrow night for some alcoholic drinks.

i recommend the pasta and protein dishes (Duck and Beef slow cooked ) here. really good

title: Delicious dishes and a wonderful team !
review:
We had a wonderful time at the restaurant! The dishes were absolutely excellent, carefully prepared and full of flavor. We were welcomed by Terexa, who was truly delightful from start to finish. Always smiling, friendly, and very professional, she really made our experience even more enjoyable.
It’s such a pleasure to see young people who are so dynamic, motivated, and passionate about their work !
Well done to the whole team !

title: Great food and great value.
review: Excellent food in an engaging atmosphere. Bach provided top-notch service too. We had two appetizers and chicken entrees and everything was wonderful.

title: Recommend! Delicious local food and great service
review: Delicious local food and incredible cocktails related to Vietnamese culture. Definitely recommend! The staff is polite, friendly and lovely. Nhi in particular was exceptionally skilled and delightfully friendly. Thank you for serving our family Nhi and making this night lovely.

title: Culinary Delight with Outstanding Hospitality
review: We had a wonderful time at this restaurant! The food was delicious and the atmosphere very pleasant. A big thank you to our waitress TRAM, who was friendly, attentive, and professional — she truly made our evening even more enjoyable. We’ll definitely be back!

title: A Hidden Gem in Hue — Best Meal of Our Trip
review:
We stumbled upon Vị Huế Restaurant by pure luck while strolling around downtown Hue, and it turned out to be the best meal my wife and I had during our entire trip to Vietnam — which says a lot given how amazing the food is across the country.

We were warmly welcomed by Bailey (Mỹ), who did a fantastic job guiding us through the menu and explaining how to properly enjoy each dish. Her kindness and attention really made the experience special.

We ordered three dishes: Bánh Bèo, Bún Bò Huế, and Mì Xào Bò — all of them were outstanding in flavor and presentation.

If you’re visiting Hue, we highly recommend stopping by this restaurant for its delicious food, authentic dishes, and genuinely friendly service.

title: Great dinner
review: The staff, especially Bach very kind and knowledgeable, the food was the best I have tasted here in Vietnam. I highly recommend it.

title: Great meal great service!
review:
Food superb. Hue cuisine with international bent.
Cocktails well imagined. Balanced with YinYang.
Service impeccable!
Thank you Andrew!

title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Loved my lunch at Vi Hue Restaurant and Cafe!
review: Everything was so fresh and tasty — the spring rolls, Quang noodles with seafood, and pineapple juice were all perfect. The salted cream Hue coffee to go was amazing too! Darwin and Miss Rose were so friendly and made the experience even better. Highly recommend!

title: Outstanding Vietnamese food and service
review: Excellent, genuinely Vietnamese food catering for all tastes, including vegetarians, and a wide range of cocktails including alcohol free cocktails. We got warm and efficient service from waitresses Lana and Dream

title: Best restaurant in Hue
review: Such a wonderful experience when i come at here from the service to the food. All the things that i can say about this restaurant by 1 word: excellent. That the reason i write this review, i extremely recommend guys should come there for that. If you be served by Vi + Nhi, you can’t fault their service

title: Beautiful and good!
review: A very nice discovery of Vietnamese cuisine. Beautiful presentation, delicious and kind Service from Marie!

title: Must visit for Vietnamese food in Hue
review: We ate at the Vi Hue Restaurant during our tour group stay in Hue. The atmosphere was great and relaxed. But what was even better was the food. It is very tasty Vietnamese food and I'm sure anything you pick on the menu would be a solid choice. I didn't take pictures of the food I had because I was so keen to eat it. The staff who served us, Tram and Mong were very kind and helpful. Overall I would definitely visit this restaurant again if I return to Hue. Check it out!

title: Lovely restaurant and a little more special
review:
Great fusion Vietnamese-European food with full range of alcoholic and non alcoholic drinks. I’ve returned 4 times as can always guarantee a delicious meal. I especially enjoyed the shrimps and fish dishes.
Lovely staff: very friendly and courteous. Tram, Bach and Lona have all been great servers. Bach is outstanding in his attentiveness.
Credit cards accepted. More expensive than some restaurants but significantly cheaper than the UK unless you’re a wine drinker; bottles cost similar to UK. Drinking beers and one course it was 800,000 dong for 2 people - around £23.
3 courses with 3 gin and tonics cost £17 including a tip.

title: Great restaurant with delicious food and awesome staff, especially Nhi
review:
Nhi was our waitress for the evening and she was fantastic. Nhi was so attentive and made sure that everything was ok for our family, double checking orders and always keeping a close eye in case we required anything. The food was lovely, especially the seafood and the spring rolls. The drinks were very reasonably priced as was the food. Overall we had a great experience and Nhi translated our very poor Vietnamese very well and spoke good English. We would love to return but unfortunately our only in Hue for 24 hours. Thanks for a great dinner.
(The guy that tried to eat the banana leaf!!!)

title: Quality restaurant
review:
Beautiful discovery, excellent meals but pity that they are not plentiful.
Service (Amy) was very careful throughout the meal.

title: One of the best restaurants we tried in Vietnam
review: We went there twice so good and refined the food. The Bach waiter was very friendly and attentive.

title: Excellent lunch
review: I had an excellent lunch today at this restaurant. I can't eat spicy food and they managed to do the dish without spices. Yay! And you can pay by card. Good atmosphere, nice people, especially Tram and Mong

title: Fantastic food in gorgeous setting
review: Fantastic food with amazing presentation, great vale for money in a beautiful, tranquil setting. Excellent service from Bach who spoke excellent English and had obviously trained in silver service. A good selection for pescatarians.

title: The coffee smothies we rich
review:
Very nice place with very good food.
Mong served us very efficiently,
Coffees and smothues were very good brewed

title: Food was excellent and Amy was the best waiter.
review: The food was everything you would want and The staff were so kind and helpful. Amy was especially helpful and charming. Great spot!

title: Ting Hoa Co Do restaurant
review: We loved the food especially the 14 hr beef short ribs. A Italian couple recommended the beef tartare. We loved watching the cocktails being made (true art form). Bach or waiter was so attentive and informative.

title: Highly recommended!
review: One of the best restaurants we stayed in Vietnam with great food in a nice atmosphere and very attentive service! Highly recommended

title: Great lunch spot
review: Great spot! Stopped in for lunch and tried banh beo for the first time here, did not disappoint! Definitely drop in if you’re in the area.

title: Vi Hue One of a Kind Vietnamese Cuisine
review: Exquisite chef level restaurant reasonably priced and a super authentic atmosphere. We ordered 3 typical appetizers of the local area. The Pomelot salad with tofu, Chicken cooked in ceramic and dessert. All the dishes were specially flavored and excellently presented. Dont forget to order the apple tea it's out of this world. Our waiter Bach was really attentive and knowledgeable, it's worth listening to his suggestions. Highly recommend Vi Hue for anyone that enjoys fine cuisine.

title: Beautiful Restaurant
review: We kept going back to this quaint restaurant. It is so beautifully appointed but the coffees and juices are superb. Our very friendly host was Tram, she was so lovely and very attentive. The food menu looks great but we only stopped for drinks.

title: Recommended!
review: It is a delicious restaurant with a varied menu of Vietnamese dishes from Huế and Western cuisine. Our waitress Bailey helped us all evening, we were not short. Definitely recommended!

title: Viet delight
review:
After several days traveling through Vietnam, for me, so far the best place I have eaten. Customer service, dishes, presentation, super tasty quality... Excellent Service.
Lona gave you an excellent Service... I hope to come back tomorrow!!!

title: Evening meal in Hue
review: Fantastic meal and excellent ginger tea! Very reasonably priced deliciously a la carts meal . Thank you so much for your service.

title: Appetising for the eye and the stomach
review: Not only did the food look great, but it also tasted amazing. Vietnamese cuisine with an elevated taste and look to it. The staff is very attentive and caters for your needs! I have quite a few allergies and our lovely waitress Amy made sure that our food was safe for me to eat. If you’re in Hue, definitely worth a visit!

title: Don’t miss this place!
review: This restaurant is a gem! Staff, particularly Lona, were very helpful, making sure we knew how eat the local cuisine! I returned for a second time for the pomelo and calamari salad! Beautiful flavours across all that we ordered! Hope to return on a future visit!

title: Unbeatable experience
review: Excellent food... very well prepared..unbeatable presentation.. I have to highlight Bach's attention that was watching us at all times..

title: Great!!!!
review: Highly recommended place. Food and drink , presentation, quality and excellent service especially from our waiter Bach.

title: Special night out
review: It was really nice to spoil ourselves but still feel like we were eating local Vietnamese flavours. We were well looked after by Bach and I had a really lovely experience

title: Nice restaurant with great Mood
review: Very nice restaurant with a great Mood. The food was super delicious and it went very fast. Our waitress Ms. Tram was very nice and accommodating. Would come back any time:)

title: Tasty food, attentive service
review:
We came by upon the recommendation of our hotel, and were very pleased with the entire experience. The food was wonderful – one of the best meals we have had in our month-long trip to Vietnam. In particular, we enjoyed the pomelo salad, Bún bò Huế and the grilled chicken with laksa leaf sauce.

Darwin was our waiter and he was great; the service was attentive but not intrusive, and he was very helpful with recommendations. We were stuck here for a while due to the typhoon but didn’t mind at all; we just spent the afternoon drinking cocktails :) Highly recommended!

title: I'd come back.
review: Very nice place, delicious food and high quality drinks. Waiter Darwin's attention is second to none

title: Superior Service
review:
We have been traveling throughout Vietnam for 3 weeks now and we have eaten in some amazing restaurants and tasted lots of delicious food. The dining experience at Vi Hue has to be one of the highlights, mainly because of the outstanding service from My (Bailey).
She made us feel welcome right from the start and she looked after us as if we were the most important people in her world. We would go back and dine there just for her service. It was a real bonus that the food there was exceptional. Lots of flavors, superb presentation and a good range to choose from.

title: Beautiful greeting, options given for inside or outside dinning. Fan given. Drinks and food delivered promptly. Asked if satisf
review: Beautiful young lady served us- exceptional service by My /Bailey! Highly recommend this restaurant, friendly staff , thanks My.

title: Dinner, attentive
review: We visited the restaurant for dinner and really enjoyed the atmosphere and food. The place is clean, pleasant and relaxing. Thank you to Bach for the amazing and attentive service!

title: Highly recommended !!
review:
Very good food; especially vegetarian. Lotus flower salad, vegetarian spring rolls ; all fresh with good dip. Good service

Thanks to Darwin and the team

title: Very good quality and reasonable prices
review:
Perfect dinner. The dishes are fine and the Service is impeccable.
Dinner on the terrace with the Mood of the busy street

title: Mocktail lover
review: Very well. Slightly more pricey than most Vietnamese restaurants, but it's really worth it. Recommended: the 4 mocktails (turtle, phoenix, qilin, tarragon). I drank them all, super tasty 😋.

title: Lovely place, great local food, exceptional service!
review:
A cozy place with a really good interior which looks quite stylish.

The indoor area is cooled (not too much but was just about right, they also have ventilators).

We had a course dinner and it was amazing. I forgot to count the courses but it was quite a few. If you like Vietnamese cuisine then you're in the right place here!

Bathrooms are little bit limited (one toilet per gender).

The staff was outstanding! They were lovely dressed, fitted well to the style of the restaurant. You immediately notice this place is not simply another restaurant but a place that appreciates and services you as a guest. You get greeted at the entrance as well as when you leave. During our stay staff members have been highly attentive, far above average but without giving you the feeling it is getting too much. We were served by Nhi and Rosa who were super kind and courteous!

If you like viatnemese cusinie, a nice ambiente/immersion and an amazing service you should put this restaurant on your list in Hue!

title: Great dinner
review: Good food and great service from our server Nhi. Will be back again for another meal while we are here. Would recommend to anyone

title: It's delicious!
review:
Quality food, typical Vietnamese cuisine but with very good particularities. Vast menu is excellent value for money.
Ella, served us exceptionally, always with delicacy and with a smile!

title: Worth it!!!!
review: I had reserved for the birthday for my husband, very attentive staff, very good food, Vietnamese but more refined, nicely presented, well seasoned, very good service of Darwin, spoke very good English, Service very well, also very nice dessert, definitely recommended!!!

title: Dinner in Vi Hue
review: Our Dinner was very good. Andrew was very nice and we enjoyed time here. The Atmosphere and the staff was perfect for a last evening in Hue.

title: Fabulous food, great service, top notch!
review: We decided to go to Vi Hue for dinner while staying in the city and we were not disappointed. The food was excellent and our server Lona was fantastic. We got the duck and pork mains. The portion sizes were great and the flavours were well balanced and delicious. I would highly recommend coming here for lunch or dinner.

title: Good restaurant
review:
Nice and stylish place, in the Mood area
Exquisite food with good preparation
Highly recommended
Very attentive Service

title: Dinner
review: We stopped for dinner, we ate very well. Fast and friendly Service. Thanks to Mrs. Dream, she was very professional and kind.

title: Amazing breakfast
review: The service is spotless and the food is great. Very good value for money. Breakfast was great and the juices delicious

title: Fantastic Restaurant in Hue
review: Restaurant was recommended by our hotel indochine Palace. We went on our 2nd night and regretted not going on our 1st. We had wine starters mains and dessert and all were outstanding. Great atmosphere, high end and the food and presentation was 1st class. Our waitress Lona was so helpful and smiley. Would highly recommend

title: I would repeat
review: We ate super well and Amy has been very attentive throughout. Quiet place and highly recommended to eat typical food.

title: Very well.
review: Very good food, it is rather fine dining but at very good price. We work well and quickly served by Andrew. Definitely recommended!

title: A pleasant discovery
review: Beautiful restaurant in the center of Hue. The food is excellent, with high-quality dishes. The service was excellent; we had a great time, and for that, we thank Dat, who was very professional and kind. Highly recommended.

title: Great experience!
review: The food had a great presentation and was very tasty! We were served by Marie, she was very friendly and helpful! I would definitely recommend eating here!

title: Happy Hour mocktails
review: Great atmosphere, great mocktails, exceptional customer service and staff eager to please. Menu provided a variety of options - also gluten free options

title: Great lunch after sightseeing
review:
Great lunch, well-kept room and excellent cleaning.
Precise Service and very friendly Bach was very nice and attentive in Service.
The food was really good starting from the salad with chicken shrimp in bamboo with a delicious sauce, too bad I didn’t eat the desserts that looked great, but the portions are plentiful!

title: Phenomenal food and vibes
review: Vị Huế Restaurant is absolutely phenomenal food and aesthetic! I expect this place to be on the Michelin guide in the future as it checks all the boxes. Our server, Dream, was very sweet and helpful in serving us. I got the Ga Nuong (grilled chicken) served with their special sauce and it was a life changing experience. Highly recommend stopping here in Hue.

title: A Perfect Lunch in Hué
review:
We went here for lunch and it turned into a truly unforgettable experience.
Our waiter, Bach, was simply perfect – so kind, attentive, and genuinely caring, making us feel special from the very first moment.
The food was absolutely delicious, full of authentic flavors, and the cocktails were not only beautiful but also delightful to taste.

A place where every detail feels taken care of, creating the perfect atmosphere for a memorable lunch in Hué. Highly recommended.

title: Good food, quiet place and good treatment
review: The food was delicious and a great deal, Dream is the girl who served me and was very friendly. The place is very quiet with Mood music and is beautifully decorated.

title: Exceptional breakfast
review:
Amy fantastic. Helpful explaining dishes and striving to speak in English. A 10 person. The place cozy, clean, quiet.
Highly recommended indeed.

title: Very good food and great service!
review: Our server, Dat was very attentive and provided great service. I had the chicken curry which was delicious! My husband had a chicken dish cooked sous vide and he enjoyed that as well.

title: A fine dining experience in Hue
review:
We had early dinner meals at Vi Hue and we had a very pleasant experience from start to finish. Everything was great, the food, ambiance and service. Dat was our server and he was very attentive, polite and courteous. We will definitely go back there whenever we go back to Hue.
Again, much to the staff especially to Dat.

title: Vi hue restaurant and cafe experience
review:
DAT was our server and was very attentive to our needs the moment we arrived.
Food was outstanding!
Price was good.
Service, fabulous!

title: Elegance and good treatment
review:
The place is very cozy, with very nice decor and really relaxing music. The staff were very friendly and helpful.

We were attended by My, which was super friendly and helpful. It made us have a nice evening.

As for the very very good food, although we expected more of certain dishes.

title: Excellent food, environment and staff
review: The food is excellent, the environment very beautiful and careful. It plays very beautiful and relaxing music. The staff is very helpful. Specifically, I was served by the Tram and I was completely satisfied. I will definitely go again!

title: Unbeatable food experience
review:
If you are looking for a super reasonably priced dining experience, this is where it happens!
Both the dishes (including the delicious coconut sous-vide chicken) were exquisite and matched only by the kind, attentive and impeccable Service of Dream, our waitress tonight. We'll be back for sure!

title: Excellent choice
review: Amazing food and terrific service. Dat was a great host and we couldn't be more pleased with the restaurant. Highly recommend this restaurant if you're in the area.

title: Thank you Bach!
review:
Cute dining and very good food! We had 2 different noodles and a dessert and loved everything! Great value for money.
Added value our waiter, Bach, was extremely kind and nice!

title: Amazing dinner
review: Me and my girlfriend had an amazing dinner here: food was very good and My helped us in choosing the best dishes. Her service has been very kind and professional. We will be back for sure

title: Go there...you won't regret it!!!
review: Very good viet food very nice and cooperative assistant AMY she was always ready to make us comfortable with food and service

title: Delicious Vietnamese cuisine in Hue, Vietnam.
review: Excellent dining experience. The food was delicious, well presented and served with exceptional hospitality. Our warmest thanks to Balley for her sincere customer service.

title: Perfect!
review: We had a lovely meal at Vị Huế Restaurant & Café. The grilled chicken and stir-fried rice were flavorful and well-prepared. Our waitress Nhi was very friendly and attentive, making the experience even better.

title: Nice place
review: Modern and elegant restaurant, a small oasis of peace where you can take refuge from the noise of the surrounding streets. Good food and friendly staff (Very nice Bach)

title: Top notch restaurant with a great ambiance
review: The food was excellent, comparable to high-end restaurant quality. The mocktails were very good, and the dark lager beer is a must-try. Darwin explained each dish in great detail, which was impressive. Lovely ambiance and an overall great experience.

title: Fine, atmospheric and good food
review:
The food is refined and the Mood is very pleasant. NHI did the service and is very polite and nice.
Delicious food!
Highly recommended if you are here.

title: Highly recommended
review: Very good and high standard, average prices. Recommended, the staff is very helpful and attentive. Extraordinary coffee.

title: Best restaurant in Vietnam
review: After a week of dining around Vietnam, I consider this restaurant to be the best! Great atmosphere, excellent food, and fantastic service! A special mention to Mrs. Dream for the remarkable care they took of us! Definitely worth a try, you won't regret it.

title: Great food and fantastic service
review: The food was delicious and the service we received from our waitress, Nhi, was absolutely first class. Lovely calming restaurant in quite a hectic area of town. Highly recommended

title: To try
review: We had lunch in this place on the advice of our hotel... very nice and welcoming, friendly and helpful staff: our waiter DAT WAS CUTE! I don't know if by mistake we or Dat ordered a dessert instead of noodles, dessert eaten at the end of lunch and was very good ... we would not have ordered it if there had not been the mistake! they do not have plastic bottles of water but only glass (a plus?) advice because good food

title: Excellent address
review: An excellent address. Quality food in a quiet street. Exceptional Service with a staff with great care. I highly recommend

title: Very nice experience
review:
Great experience in this restaurant!
The food was delicious and the Service perfect. Many thanks to our waiter Bach, very smiling and professional.
I highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Must do dining experience in Hue.
review: We’ve been in Vietnam for nearly 2 weeks and have been looking for great authentic food experiences, and Vi Hue fit the bill perfectly, best on trip so far. Also our host Alex, was the most attentive host we have experienced in a long time, he seemed to be able to anticipate everything we needed and delivered it on cue. We enjoyed a starter and main each, a couple of beers and a couple of Spicy Margaritas, all for under $80 AUD, so not only exceptional food and service, but also exceptional value as well. Needless to say, we highly recommend this place! Thnx to Alex and the team in the kitchen & bar, for an extraordinary 10/10 experience!

title: Best meal in Vietnam
review: One of the best meals we had in Vietnam. The food was excellent, atmosphere was great and Dream our waitress was so generous and kind. She gave us everything we asked for including moving our table upon request - thank you Dream!

title: Absolutely brilliant!
review:
Really excellent service, everyone was so helpful and polite. The food was delicious, but special mention to the drinks. I had one of the cocktails (Earth) and my friend had a ginger tea, which came with all the trimmings and then some. Absolutely outstanding.

Lona was our waitress and she was great - thank you!

title: Good food, friendly Service
review: The dishes have all tasted very good and the Service from DAT was very accommodating and nice. But we felt very comfortable overall. As is often the case in Asia, it is not always easy to separate the starter and main course but otherwise everything fit. We would visit the place again and can recommend it.

title: Thanks Andrew
review: Thank you Andrew for being such a great host! Yummy yummy food. Beef tartare was the best I've ever had (and I've had lots!) 🤤🤤🤤

title: Duck heaven
review: Food was excellent. The duck quacked its way to 5 * and the melon was impeccable. Our service was top notch with our server Amy being outstanding. Really made it’s a great first night in Hue.

title: Eaten very well local tourist but very nice with exceptional local food. Nhi was very kind helpful
review: Local food even if the restaurant is frequented only by tourists. Great value for money. Friendly staff and staff

title: A corner of tranquility with great food and also cared for in the presentation. Try it for those who pass by Huè!
review: Delicious and well presented food, kindness and helpfulness of the staff. Quiet place (we were there for lunch) and it was a refreshing break!

title: Fabulous atmosphere in beautiful Hue
review: Fabulous restaurant with lovely decor and ambience. Mr Bach our waiter was superb. So gracious and helpful with excellent English.

title: Excellent experience.
review:
We went to Vi Hue looking to try a combination between authentic Vietnamese food and some more international. It exceeded all our expectations. The Quality of food is simply excellent. We ordered Chicken Curry and Chef’s Pasta, and both dishes were perfectly prepared, full of flavor and fresh ingredients.

The price is very reasonable for the high quality they offer, which is a plus.

But what really made our visit special was the attention. We want to make special mention of Bach, an exceptional waiter. Their kindness, professionalism and excellent Service made us feel at home.

Without a doubt, Vi Hue is a place I 100% recommend to anyone visiting the city.

title: Delicious lunch at rest
review: Hugely enjoyed the Service of Dream in the restaurant. A calm, peaceful setting in busy Hué. The food is great, as are the mocktails.

title: Couples dinner in Hue
review: I went to this restaurant with my partner, we ordered banh, grilled chicken and soup with crab and meatballs. The food was very good, the waiter Dat was impeccable. Highly recommended!

title: Nice and chic restaurant
review:
We had a very pleasant evening.
Cocktails and dishes are very good in a cosy Mood with neat Service thanks to our Tan server

title: Highly recommended
review: We stayed at Vi Hue today and we are thrilled. As soon as you enter, you are warmly welcomed, and the atmosphere is pleasantly warm and welcoming. The food was great and wonderfully arranged. The Service (Darwin) was attentive, friendly and always on hand with a smile. He explained the finer points with the ingredients for the ginger tea and the food. We will definitely come back.

title: Awesome
review:
Amazing food .
Dassy the hostess was very helpful , friendly staff. receptionist good.
I'll go to Hanoi and siagon restaurant too and try salty coffee ☕

title: Put a dinner in Hue
review:
Restaurant searched by chance on the Internet for a dinner in Hue. Cozy and warm place, food beyond expectations, delicious cocktails too.
Friendly and helpful staff especially Daisy.
Highly recommended for those who want a special and refined dinner but not dear to Hue.

title: A nice discovery
review:
We chose this restaurant looking at reviews on the internet.
reality exceeded expectations. dishes and details, fast Service friendly staff. definitely worth trying.

title: Excellent service and top quality food.
review:
Perfect restaurant. Really enjoyed the delicious meal. A modern twist on Vietnamese cuisine the meat was perfectly cooked. Loved the wine and the choice of dishes.
We loved the pork cheek and the duck dishes. Will return during our stay and Bach provided excellent service, with his recommendations and great service.

title: Lovely & tasty food
review: Such a lovely restaurant in Hue! The food was absolutely delicious, especially the pork spring rolls. Staff were very attentive and helpful. Highly recommend

title: Delicious
review: Restaurant very very nice dishes and very good, maitre Amy very courteous and good. Pleasant background music.

title: Centrally located restaurant serving local dishes
review: Very good noodle soup, fine drinks and Ms Amy was accommodating and very attentive. Very centrally located restaurant.

title: Highly recommended restaurants
review: Sophisticated and elegant. Great food and interesting local selection. Unique cocktails made with passion. Impeccable Service and attentive to any need. Bach our waiter stood out for politeness and considerable attention! Very good!

title: Excellent in every respect
review:
Very nice discovery.
Typical dishes succulent, with a nice wine list.
The setting is very nice, with charming and efficient staff.
Anyway, I enjoyed it.

title: Michelin star restaurant
review:
The best restaurant after a week in Vietnam, the street food category we leave elsewhere, there will be others in a month of travel but this will undoubtedly be in the top3.
Young, friendly, precise, excellent cuisine, innovative and abundant typical dishes.
Surely when you enter this restaurant you have to venture and choose the dishes without thinking about the particular pairings for a European, it will be a huge surprise to discover new tastes perfectly balanced. We shared many dishes in 4 and all excellent, including desserts.

title: Must-try restaurant in Hue
review:
Absolutely the best dining experience of our entire trip in Vietnam! The food here is simply divine – every dish was bursting with flavor and perfectly balanced. A special mention goes to our waiter, Bach, whose kindness and readiness to recommend the best dishes made the evening even more memorable.

The signature cocktail “hên islet” was the perfect side combination to the meal.

The dessert “Banana flambé” was an absolute must-try: a delightful combination of flavors, beautifully balanced and truly unforgettable. This place is not to be missed if you’re in Hue!

title: Dinner at Vi
review:
My friends and I had an amazing experience here, the food was amazing and they had a good variety of dishes that satisfied everyone, vegetarians included.
Our waiter was also amazing, I suggested some local things to try and learned some italian words to make us feel more welcome!
Strongly suggested.

title: Restaurant WOW
review:
Lovely place, impeccable Service, very kind waiters but above all delicious food.
There is a vast amount of Vietnamese dishes with special combinations to try. High quality ingredients and dishes presented very well.
Fair prices.
Highly recommended restaurant, the best so far in Vietnam.

title: Dinner with friends
