review: Cute and nice place. Very kind staff and the two girls who served us, Tran and Nhi, speak very good English. Great food and average price.

title: Recommended
review: Very good food! We could enjoy an extensive choices and very friendly staff. We were served by Bach who did this excellently and kindly with here and there Dutch words. In addition, there was cozy background music!

title: Alla scoperta di Hue
review: We stayed in Hue for two night and we room dinner both evening here. They serve typical food cooked very well (both fish and steek). The service is perfect (our waitress Lola is kind and professional). I savored the real Vietnam flavours

title: Wonderful dinner
review: Such a beautiful place with romance atmosphere for our dinner. We have unexpected meanwhile impressed with the place, foods, beverages and staff so friendly and look after us all the time. Hopefully i will come back to Hue soon.

title: A very nice restaurant
review:
As soon as you arrive in front of the restaurant, the Welcoming is charming.
Upon entering, you discover a sober and warm decoration: you feel good there.
Our waitress, Lona, was very attentive throughout the meal.
The dishes are excellent and very nicely presented.

title: A fantastic dinner
review:
Fantastic food, amazing location, friendly and extremely helpful staff. In particular Dream cradled and delighted us with his courtesy.
I highly recommend trying it!

title: Great experience
review: Had a great expierence here! Rosa was a really good waitress! She helped us a lot and was so friendly! Only the portions are not that much!

title: Vi Hue
review: Very tasty and authentic menu and the service from Dream was very attentive. We would certainly recommend this, although not cheap, we thought it was fairly priced.

title: Excellent food and service
review:
The food is delicious. Very fine tastes and nice combination of herbs and other local flavours.
The service from our waiter Bach was also excellent. He was very kind. So this made it a perfect evening.

title: Restaurants in Hue
review:
Restaurant very nice and very good.
Wok with delicious mushrooms, as well as chicken presented on a bamboo.
Very well received and served by Lona.
Restaurant to discover.

title: 4 August 2025
review:
Welcoming by Lona perfect, well detailed menu, divine dishes.
I recommend the mushroom wok...
Many thanks to the whole team

title: Tastefull and good service
review: My family and I had 4 delicious tastefull meals here. Our server Daisy was amazing and very attentive to making the meal flow and to meeting our wants and needs

title: A must-see in Hue
review:
Best culinary experience in Vietnam. The dishes are exquisite with quality Service provided by Bach.
To be warmly recommended for anyone who wishes to try excellent cuisine from Hue.

title: Nice, cozy good service
review:
Nice Place, Super Service from Mrs Dream.
Slightly more expensive (but what is expensive in Vietnam:)) but well worth it! The important thing is it's really tasty.

title: Hidden dinning gem
review: Friendly forthcoming welcome on arrival. Decor relaxing & inviting. Bach’s in-depth knowledge of the menu and dishes made for a fantastic dinning experience.

title: Very rich
review:
Exceptional Food and Service. Tram has taken care of us very well, and has been very attentive to us at all times.
The place very well decorated and clean. Highly recommended if you are in the area and looking for a restaurant to drink.

title: Veg good idea 💡
review: Refined place courteous staff, especially Alex really very present to attentive to every request. 1-star michelin cuisine, which mixes typical oriental flavors, westernizing them but in a refined way. Really a great choice on the first day here ad hue co gliatissimo. Even the barlady who prepared the drinks really prepared and refined. Top

title: Delicious food and amazing Hue Coffee
review:
Thank you Daisy for recommending the Hue coffee and the lovely service!
We had a delicious family lunch, really fresh and tasty. The service was so good we had to come back for the amazing ‘Hue Coffee (coffee with salted cream). A must try when you’re in Hue!

title: Fine restaurant
review: We had a great meal here. Pre-spring rolls, then fish and dessert fruit. With it a bottle of wine. Friendly service by Bach.

title: Calm enjoyable meal
review: This restaurant is a lovely classy place with excellent service and food. We were greeted with a lovely warm welcome and the staff were extremely attentive. The food and atmosphere truly were incredible with a selection of amazing dishes. This was complimented amazingly by our server Bach who was very knowledgeable and kind. Would 100% recommend to anybody in the area!

title: Good food and friendly service
review: The food was very good, and the service was quick, attentive and very friendly, by Mrs. Dream. Very good experience overall.

title: Customer service high level
review: Very nice experience at very good price ! Our waiter Sam very customer oriented and comunicate in good English He gave good advise

title: Beautiful experience
review: Lona served us with grace and kindness, attentive and prompt. The food was delicious and well presented, almost like being in a starry one.

title: Mrs Dream
review:
Food was excellent and the servants were very helpful. We feel very convenient. That’s why we are here. Feel happy because You are on holiday.

Our waitress mrs DREAM is really a dream. She was so nice and very friendly.

title: Very nice food, mocktails and Service!
review:
We had good food, and very tasty mocktails and good service by our waiter Darwin. Well-kept restaurant. There was a cozy, chic Mood.
Would love to go back!

title: Awesome experience!
review: Great location, can absolutely recommend! Amy served us very well - she’s very friendly and precise. Thank you for the great experience!

title: Good food, good Service
review:
Delicious food, good Service from Amy!
A recommendation for anyone who comes to Hue and wants to eat a bit more upscale!

title: Highly recommended in Hue!
review:
Quality of food, quality of service and how the restaurant looks is fantastic! Fresh, clean and fantastic preparations. Also the toilet is very neat and clean.
Highly recommended!
Great experience in Hue. There was excelent food and perfect service. Special thanks to Alex for his service. We have couple dinner and it was very nice atmosphere. Thank you

title: Great food
review: A lovely dinner. Bach was a kind waiter who explained the dishes to us and provided useful recommendations. Presentation was superb and the sous vide duck was the star of the show.

title: Great place to visit! Don’t miss this whilst you’re in Hue
review:
Lovely vibe, attentive welcoming staff and good food.
The staff speak good English, are pleased to welcome you in and are keen to tell you about specific, unique parts of your meal. We were served by a lovely young chap called Bach, who did a brilliant job of serving us - one of the better waiters I’ve come across in Vietnam.

Unlike some other restaurants, this place has a refined menu rather than pages and pages to pick from. Each choice is interesting and we wish we could have tried more.

That being said, some aspects of each of our meal could have been improved. The meats were great (chicken & duck) but the sides ( rice and potato gratin) were colder than desired.
Great vibe here! Great menu and we had a delicious banh my hue! We were served by Huy - awesome service 😁😁 Would definitely come back and highly recommend!

title: Around perfect
review: It was a very delicious authentic Vietnamese food. Daisy advised us well and we felt very comfortable.

title: Good choice!
review: Service was great. Huy was a perfect waiter with a sense of service. The spring rolls and the wine were great! The rest of the food was fine; not spectacular but good food. In short: definitely a good choice, and ask for Huy!
Very nice place, kind of fancy. It’s cheaper than we expected at first. Lona was our waitress and she vas very nice and helpful.

title: Amazing food, service and location
review: Absolutely amazing food, service and location! we were looked after by Alex the waiter and he genuinely cared about our experience. Highly recommend to any foreigner or local coming to HUE, be sure to say hi to Alex he’s a good lad.

title: Good restaurant with world food
review:
Very good dinner, perfect for europeans looking for world good.
And a very spécial thank to Mong who was very nice with us.

title: Perfect lunch
review: Thank you for this lunch, very good Vietnamese dishes with exceptional service from Huy (speaks perfectly English btw). ☺️
Delicious food and nice, and friendly atmosphere. We were served by Bach who was very helpful and willing to give us additional information about the city and country.

title: Good vegetarian dishes
review: Delicious and nicely crafted food in the center of Hue. We arrived here by chance and were pleasantly surprised. Great vegetarian dishes (especially the pomelo salad with tofu) and mocktails. Cosy decor and very attentive staff - great thanks to Dream for a great experience.

title: Excellent food and outstanding service – Mr. Bach made it a perfect evening!
review: Not only was the food more than excellent, the service was outstanding as well. Mr. Bach was our waiter and he was extremely helpful, advising us on the choices we could make. We had a really lovely evening.

title: Great food and service from Amy.
review: The food was delicious, the atmosphere was cozy and relaxed, and most importantly, Amy provided outstanding service — friendly, attentive, and always with a smile.

title: Great food
review: The food was great and the service was excellent. Our waitress Amy was also great! A little bit in the more pricy side but the food and service made it worth it.

title: Great food in a relaxed atmosphere
review: Very good and nicely decorated food served in a nice and relaxed atmosphere. Marie was a very good waitress. Highly recommendable.

title: Very nice discovery
review: Very good restaurant with a varied choice that allowed us to discover beautiful flavors. Thanks again to Lina who took good care of us

title: Amazing service from Bach
review: I ordered the grilled chicken in bambo served with fruit rice and laska leaves sauce. It was amazing. The service from Bach was great

title: Amazing
review: Amazing restaurant, fantastic food and wonderfully attentive service by our waiter Bach. Highly recommend the duck!

title: Perfect service!
review:
Better place than I expected 🥺 Thank you Amy - the high level of service! I’m a vegetarian, but I’ve found the best restaurant for myself in Hue.
Oatmeal, egg coffee and vegetable rolls - all was very good, seriously. The place is clean and comfortable - it’s important to me.

title: Delicious!
review: Super nice atmosphere and unwise good food, friendly staff very helpful helped by Bach. Really a nice hide out in the hustle and warmth of Hué

title: Tasty and delicious food
review: We visited on our first night in Hue. I had the rice cake selection and my other half had spring rolls followed by prawns and squid. Simply delicious. The service was excellent too. Highly recommend

title: Good food, comfy and attentive
review: Very nice dinner with good food and great service from Dream. We wanted some comfy place and a bit of rest and this dinner was better than expected!

title: Excellent service and food.
review: Our waiter - Bach - made us feel so welcome and looked after us excellently throughout the meal. We had the Grilled prawn salad with beetroot pickle, Braised chicken and grilled chicken in bamboo. All were excellent. Highly recommended.

title: Vi hue restaurant - delicious food great service
review: We arrived on a very hot day to cooled flannels, delicious food and friendly helpful service. Alex was a great waiter and looked after us very well .

title: Lovely place for delicious food & attentive service
review: We’ve just had the most amazing breakfast at Vi Hue, a lovely place with beautiful decor & relaxed vibe. The staff were incredibly attentive, particularly Daisy & Mrs Dream & the food was unreal. We ordered the international breakfast which was cooked perfectly with delicious fresh ingredients. The Apple salad had so many different vegetables, salad & fruits with a delicious fresh dressing & perfect poached egg, the sautéed beef & coconut bowls were also unbelievably fresh & tasty as were the egg coffee, iced jasmine tea & juices. We can highly recommend Vi Hue for the incredible food & quiet attentive service. We are leaving Hue this morning, otherwise we would definitely have revisited for a lunch or dinner. Thank you so much 🙏🏻

title: Great food and service.
review: Very good coffee, food and service. The atmosphere is relaxing, not crowded. Recommended 100%. Don't forget to order the coffee with salted cream, is delicious 😊. Our waitress Tram was amazing.

title: Best in Hue
review: Truly the best food we’ve had for a very long time. The service from Mr Bach was exceptional - he really knows his stuff!! We were made to feel welcome immediately and our food and wine was amazing. Do not miss out on this restaurant - it’s the best in Hue!!

title: DELICIOUS!!!
review: Absolutely delicious dinner! Went on my last night in Hue with 4 other friends. Service was fantastic, drinks SO unique and incredible, and the food was divine! Had the bun bo hue - def recommend!

title: Strong coffee
review: We were served by Bach who is full of good advice, very friendly and professional. We chose a savoury coffee, typical of Hue and delicious, and an egg coffee subtly raised with a hint of rum. On top of that the place is very nice!

title: Definitely recommend if you're in Hue!
review: Ate here as a family with our two children and all loved our meals! Spring rolls, king prawns with sour & spicy sauce and the duck breast with beetroot puree and sweet potato gratin the highlights - tho the chefs spaghetti was awesome too! Special shout out to our waiter Bach who was so attentive and gave great service! Would definitely recommend!

title: A very welcoming atmosphere, attentive staff and excellent food. Not to be missed if visiting Hue.
review: We visited this excellent restaurant three times during our short stay in Hue. Our first visit was just for drinks after dinner on a busy saturday night. The staff were very attentive and despite our lack of vietnamese, ensured we received just what we needed on a very hot evening. The service was so pleasant that we did not hesitate to repeat the experience the next night. The following day we decided to have an early dinner at the restaurant before our departure to Hanoi. We were very warmly welcomed back by the staff, in particular, Amy and Ba Ch. The food and service were both excellent, leaving our group with a special memory of our visit to Hue.

title: Excellent Vietnamese food and service
review: The food and service were exceptional! We came for dinner and were so impressed that we returned for lunch the next day. The dishes offer a beautiful Vietnamese flavor with a refined modern twist. Thank you, Tram, for the great service on both days—you made our experience even more memorable. Highly recommended

title: Highly recommend
review: Thank you for a great meal, nice restaurant and fantastic service from Dream and Lona. Very accommodating. Thank you for a nice visit!!

title: Great food
review: Beautiful food at a reasonable price, got a group of 14 in with only a few minutes notice. Exceptional service, well deserved five stars

title: A vibrant taste of Huế!
review: This restaurant beautifully captures the essence of Huế cuisine — colorful, delicate, and full of character. Each dish felt like a tribute to tradition, especially when paired with their house-made sour drink, a perfect blend of voda infil tea, apricot liquor,cinnamon, and dried jujube. Refreshing and unexpected!

title: Highly recommended
review: Amazing place. Fabulous food and our waiter Bach was very knowledgeable about the food and his recommendations were delicious

title: Amazing All Around
review: Beautiful food, decor, and wonderful staff. Tram was excellent and made sure we were taken care of, never missing a single detail. Would highly recommend!

title: Great experience, great food, great restaurant
review: Our great experience started with extremely friendly staff (our waiter was Bach, always helpful, always making sure that we are doing well), and ended with really excellent food, beautifully arranged and delicious. Follow the recommendations, and dive into the Vietnamese cuisine.

title: Cocktails and Local favourites
review: We had an excellent meal here, one of the best in Vietnam so far ! The cocktails were particularly good and great service as well.

title: Lunch at Hue
review: The food was very good! The restaurant had a very nice aesthetic and our server Amy was really nice. Definitely recommend!

title: Excellent place for dinner
review: Beautiful setting and food. Wonderful wait service from Lons & Dream. I can highly recommend. Traditional Vietnamese food.

title: Top Vietnamese cuisine for the pampered and tasteful European palate!
review:
Extremely good and creative food at the highest level.
Hygienically safe!

The restaurant is well maintained and the food is especially (even) if you eat vegetarian or vegan the perfect address.

We couldn't let it go and even visited the restaurant 2 times during our 2 day stay in Hue.

Also, the friendly service staff (Lona 😘) should not go unmentioned.

One last point: you can also eat here well-kept on the terrace! Highly recommended!

title: Exceptional all round service and food in Hue
review: Very professional presentation and spacious seating. Food is next level with exceptional table service by Rosa. Above and beyond all round. Definitely highly recommend this venue when I Hue

title: Delicious food and great experience
review:
I had an incredible dining experience at this beautiful restaurant in Vietnam. The atmosphere was absolutely stunning — a perfect blend of elegance and charm that made the whole evening feel special.

The service was outstanding from start to finish. The host was warm, welcoming, and incredibly friendly. What really stood out was how accommodating they were to my special request — it was handled with such care and without hesitation, which made the experience even more memorable.

If you're looking for a place with delicious food, excellent service, and a genuine sense of hospitality, I highly recommend this gem.

title: Highly recommended
review: The cocktails are absolutely amazing, utilizing local ingredients, best we've had in Southeast Asia. Food was delicious and the staff were so nice. We were in Hue 2 nights and went there for dinner both nights, very reasonable price for the quality.

title: Bit pricier but totally worth it!
review:
Super delicious, clean and nice restaurant.

The food was 5/5, the drinks were 5/5 and the service of Bach was 5/5!.

title: Great place
review: Great food. Great service. Came to restaurant with a tour group. We’re able to accommodate my Gluten Free diet. Quick service. Marie was a great waitress.

title: Dream & Rosa were the best!
review: Dream and Rosa did an amazing job! The service and food was great and highly recommend! The entire staff worked together to ensure our group left satisfied.

title: Outstanding culinary & fantastic service
review:
I’m truly wanna share ‘bout this restaurant so freakin much. Cuz this’s my very first time to have a experience like this. Food with fusion style based on Vietnamese cuisine and culture was a terrific combination, highly recommend u guys all the Curry’s dishes”, the “Lang Co seafood linguine” and the “Chef’s flavor spaghetti”.
In addition, signature cocktails/mocktails gonna blow your mouth with the savoury mixture and a charming inspirational about VietNam and this Old Imperial City.
Last but not least staff are genuinely hospitality, thanks to that we’re completely immerse into the whole experience. Grateful for that🙏🏻.

title: Good food
review: Really nice place with good food and great atmosphere. Bach helped us very well. The local food was great! Try the bun Bo Hue!

title: Good food and service
review:
We had a great meal at Vi Hue,
friendly staff and very helpful. Definitely recommended😋👍
It's that we're passing through or we would have eaten here again.

title: Perfect
review: Thank you very much Marie & Mong for the excellent service! The food was delicious, the cocktails were surprisingly. The setting was perfect. ❤️😁

title: Finest dining in Hue
review: Fantastic tastes of fusion finest Vietnamese dishes. Thandi Mr bach of being our host and serving us like kings and queens. Definitely the place to go in Hue. 😋😋😋😋

title: Great service
review: The restaurant offers a luxurious yet cozy ambiance, with a smart layout that makes you feel completely at ease. The service was impressive—fast, professional, and always accompanied by a warm smile. Despite our late arrival, food and drinks were served promptly, with no long wait. Our server, Mong, kindly recommended the Grilled Chicken, which turned out to be a highlight—the sauce was absolutely delicious. Big thanks to Mong for such a pleasant dining experience!

title: Table for Mr John
review: Recommended by our Guide whilst staying in Hue. We decided to pop in and make a reservation whilst walking around the Town and we were even invited to select where we would prefer to sit. Upon arrival at our reservation time a table sign with our Name on was a nice touch. Restaurant decor was lovely, the 3 course meal with drinks and coffee was amazing and the Staff, especially Huy & Marie were absolutely FANTASTIC. In fact all the Staff were FANTASTIC - would definitely recommend.

title: Vi Hue
review: Very cosy place. Pleasant athmosphere and good customer service from Amy and her colleagues! Quality food also. Thank you

title: beautiful, stylishly furnished restaurant
review: very nice restaurant with stylish decor. With the type of table setting and background music, it is emphasized that here can be more stylish. Mong was very friendly and offered us a great service. The breakfast portions were not the largest but very delicious. We were satisfied.

title: A class apart
review: Are real gem. The food, the service and the ambience are all top drawer and the same incredible Vietnam value. The signature cocktails taste and look fantastic. What sets Vi Hue restaurant out from other local peer group venues is that this restaurant would not look out of place in London or other major UK city. A real find.

title: Great place for delicious food in Hue
review: Great food, great atmosphere and good location in Hue. We were served by Tram who was fantastic. Well priced and delicious food, would recommend!

title: Quality
review: Excellent food, very attentive service from Huy. The place is also very nice; I recommend! Thank you.

title: Great place in a busy neighborhood
review: The Bun Bo Hué was so good! Very cozy atmosphere, amazing local menu. Also, the staff is so welcoming and nice. Thank you Trâm for a great night and great dining experience.

title: Great new restaurant!
review: I had the slow stewed beef off the breakfast menu, and it was excellent! Bach, our waiter was super attentive and really took care of us, with water refills and activity recommendations in Hue! The drinks menu looked great, I might have to come back here last 7:30am to sample some! The restaurant is gorgeous, service is stellar, I 100% recommend this place for any time of day!!

title: 25th anniversary and couldn't of asked for anything more
review:
Attended for a 25th anniversary . We we welcomed by Lona who showed us to our table and despite not having a reservation was warm and friendly.
Our waiter was Bach who was extremely attentive and friendly not intrusive but explained what we needed to know around our choice of food.
The food was excellent and Overall a really positive and enjoyable experience.
Thankyou for being warm and friendly

title: Great restaurant
review:
Great experience at this restaurant with Huy who was very kind and helpful for our trip 😁
The food was very nice and tasty, I recommand

title: A must try spot
review:
OMB, I am very happy to having breakfast here,
Continental breakfast is amazing , coffee’s best in all Vietnamese, our waiter Bach’s exceptional
Recommend you to come for relaxing morning here,
We will come back for sure

title: Great breakfast with
review: Great especially Bach who was very good I had a great breakfast the place is very nice and the atmosphere is special is located on the main street of Hue

title: Lovely food
review: Lovely place to eat. Nice decor and lovely food! Spring rolls were amazing! Staff were really lovely, massive thanks to Dat and Lona

title: Great restaurant and atmosphere
review: Great restaurant and atmosphere. Came in to escape the heat, the aircon was perfect temperature and we were well served by waiter Bach and bartender Danny. The food was fresh and tasted great. Definitely recommend

title: Delicious food
review:
Such a lovely restaurant - with numerous vegetarian options - all beautifully presented and delicious.
The team are attentive and so helpful - and informative, particularly Bach. Thank you for a lovely time.

title: Great restaurant.
review: We came in by chance and it was a great success. Wonderful restaurant with a wide menu, mixes traditional food and new recipes. Bartender Bach has been very friendly and his recommendations exquisite. We've eaten 2 people for 23€, the best restaurant in 10 days we've seen in Vietnam

title: All right.
review: The food was very good and the staff excellent, both Lona and Rosa have been our waitresses and have been very attentive throughout.

title: Wonderful
review: Wonderful ambience with amazing service. All the food was tasty with well explained dishes and a variety of options. Bach was excellent. Highly recommend!

title: Great!
review: Mr Huy was so helpful. Great restaurant with a fabulous vibe.. lovely cocktails and delicious food... very busy with locals and tourists alike.

title: No tasteful food
review: Based on the TripAdvisor reviews we have been there. The food was average, rather little taste. There's a lot better in Hue. All in all, a disappointment.

title: Lovely lunch in this air conditioned restaurant
review: Had lunch here today. The staff, Bach particularly, were attentive and the food was great. Service was fast, would definitely recommend.

title: Very good experience
review:
Great place, very good smiling staff
Thank you Bach for the quality of the service!
Delicious dishes and starters also

title: Breakfast like a king
review: We came here for breakfast and were greeted with a regal kindness. The staff was extremely friendly and attentive, a warm greeting to Tram and Danny. We tried a delicious bánh mì and a mixed breakfast with eggs and local specialties: everything was prepared with care and authentic flavors. The tea, in particular, was surprisingly good. A truly enjoyable experience in every respect. If we were to find ourselves in the area again, we would return without hesitation.

title: Fantastic
review: Fabulous restaurant brilliant food the duck was absolutely delicious as was the ice cream. Lona mong was one of our servers she’s was excellent 5 stars

title: Lovely meal
review: Tasty food, beautifully presented.. great service. Fabulous experience, thank you. I had the chicken in banana leaf .

title: A delicious and informative lunch at Vi Hue.
review: Had a great lunch at Vi Hue. Bach, the gentleman who served us was most friendly, telling us interesting facts about the drinks and food that we ordered. The soup and stirred fried noodles we had was delicious.

title: Hue’s Gem
review: Huy is the STAR of an incredible restaurant! The service from him and his colleagues is incredible and befitting of the beautiful restaurant decor and not to forget the food! The handmade noodles are the best I’ve had in Vietnam, thick and soft with the right amount of texture and bite

title: Great food and top served by our waitress Mong
review: This was for us the best restaurant in Hue where we ate. The restaurant was attractive and neatly decorated. The dishes were just a little more special, the flavors subtler and the service was very friendly, helpful and professional. Our waitress Mong was great, alert, very friendly and also spoke good english. She helped us make our choices, and in the meantime also taught us some Vietnamese words. Overall a great dinner, definitely worth a visit.

title: Very good
review:
Very good food, Lona was very smiling and very kind... amazing noodles
Absolutely recommended, one of the best in Hue

title: Excellent, I definitely recommend!
review: Great restaurant. Environment, food and service. Our table was accompanied by Huy who was extremely friendly and super efficient. I definitely recommend.

title: Great food
review:
If you are looking for something a little bit different then this place is for you. The food is fantastic, and is so tasty. Our server Bach looked after us and recommended the best dishes to have. And they didn’t disappoint.

Would highly recommend if you are looking for something a little bit different.

title: Great food in Vietnam
review: The food was very surprising and tasty. Also, the waitresses were very friendly. Thao (our waitress) recommended us delicious food and was also very welcoming. Definitely recommended to eat here!!

title: Great coffee
review: Fantastic service from Bach. He explained to us all the different coffee types. The coffee and service were excellent.

title: Egg coffee highlight
review: First time trying egg coffee and would definitely now go back for more. Such care and attention in explaining the process of making it. Bach our server was friendly and informative.

title: Dinner at Vi Hue
review: We really enjoyed our experience at the restaurant. The local cuisine, expertly prepared, was absolutely delicious. I also want to highlight the exceptional service; it truly exceeded our expectations. A special thank you to Bach for making our evening memorable!

title: Great restaurant!
review: Wonderful restaurant and stuff. The food was authentic and had a lot of choices. Highly recommend. Thank you Lona and Bach for your hospitality.

title: Great restaurant in the center of Hué!
review:
Great restaurant in the center of Hué. The staff is very kind, always smiling and helpful. Especially Rosa who served us! The menu is very varied and there are also great options for vegetarians.
The cuisine is very refined and attention to detail in the presentation. The quality of the food is very good. We would definitely stay again.

title: Perfect restaurant
review: Great experience at Vi Hue! We were well served by Rosa and Mei! Good continuation to the whole team. We will return to this restaurant with pleasure.

title: Incredible food
review: Amazing food, amazing cocktails. I'm coeliac - staff has had allergy training and are very knowledgeable so felt very safe! Cannot recommend highly enough! Also, the service (specifically Mr Bach) is exceptional

title: Amazing dinner and service from Bach.
review:
Amazing restaurant. A large group of 16 of us went for dinner. Our waiter Bach was extremely friendly with a great smile and love for his job. The food was delicious and vibe was great, highly recommend to visit if you have a chance.

Matt

title: Best lunch in Hue
review: As soon as we arrived in Hue, we stopped for lunch and couldn’t have made a better choice! The place was new and well-kept, the food was delicious, and the service was perfect: Tram was super sweet and gave us excellent recommendations.

title: Restaurant Review
review: We had a lovely dinner with friends, the service was excellent and we thoroughly enjoyed the evening sharing several different dishes.

title: Wonderful service
review: Such a beautifully curated atmosphere and lovely restaurant! We had the warmest welcome, the restaurant played relaxing music and had a really great vibe. The food was delicious and surprisingly affordable given its quality and fast service. Our waiter Bach was so helpful and informative about the city and gave us ideas of things to do and places to visit during our stay.

title: A Cozy Central‑Vietnamese Gem with Warm Hospitality
review:
I had a wonderful lunch here with my friends. Mr. Phương, the owner, is exceptionally friendly and attentive, which made us feel right at home. If you’re looking for a cozy spot that serves richly flavored Central‑Vietnamese dishes, this place is a gem—definitely worth a visit!

Thank you Huyền and Nguyễn

title: Great experience and staff
review: Lovely atmosphere and super friendly waiter named Bach. Great coffee and opportunity to try different types of Vietnamese coffee. I had a ‘Pho’ coffee! Ice in drinks is safe for tourists we have been assured.

title: Exquisite, surprising, perfect.
review: Exquisite experience from start to finish. Mong, our waitress, had the warmest smile and made us feel at home. The food was amazing, each dish surprised us with a different, subtle taste. We had the lotus salad, duck, linguine, rice noodles as well as the flambéed banana and sweet soup for dessert. The interior design was gorgeous. This restaurant was Perfection in all aspects. We paid 22 dollars per person (without wine) for what felt like a Michelin meal.

title: Naturally elegant restaurant
review:
Excellent experience of Vietnamese food. It has a very good atmosphere. The service with excellent sympathy and professionalism (we were served by Thang Mong.
I still found nothing expensive.
In the end the owner of the restaurant came to the table to know the opinion. Gostei
I highly recommend 🙏🏻

title: Great food, top service
review: What a great experience we had at this restaurant. Everything checked out! The springrolls were crisp, the main course was delicious in taste and the dessert was delicious. This together with the hospitable service and good explanation of Bach made it a top experience. Don't hesitate but enjoy this beautiful and tasteful restaurant.

title: Nice experience.
review:
Very pleasant, intimate atmosphere. The very friendly staff especially Bach who was very caring for us.
The dishes are delicious, well presented on beautiful plates.
We recommend!!

title: No doubt one of the best in Hue. Excellent cuisine and service
review:
Fine vietnamese cuisine and excellent service by Ming and Mei. Wonderful ladies !
I highly recommend this restaurant in Hue

title: Spoil yourself
review: Vi is a great choice for a fancier night out on Hue. It's a bit more expensive than most, but still good value. Everything we had was absolutely delicious - cocktails, dumplings, rice cakes, pasta and noodles. Thanks to Huy for looking after us - he is an attentive and friendly host.

title: Welcoming restaurant
review: The food was delicious and Bach the server offered recommendations and information about the dishes. The menu makes local references and Bach also explained that. He was accommodating to our family’s dietary needs.

title: Excellent Service, food and nice ambience
review: We went for a quick lunch after a tour into Hue old city and the Citadel. We ordered pomello salad and a beef dish along with coconut coffee and local beer,Huda. Our server, Bach, toik care of us very well. He eplained all the food in quite detail and suggested few dishes. as well as explaining how and what the Huda name means. Location also in the center of the city. Overall, it's a nice experience and highly recommended.

title: Well worth a visit as the food was delicious and service excellent.
review: We would actually rate this restaurant at 4.5 as meals quality and flavour was beautiful but could have been a fraction larger in serving. Physical atmosphere very relaxing and spotless. Staff especially Rosa attended to us so promptly at all times without hovering. She kept a keen eye on us as needed. Service was very quick and professional.

title: Review
review: Great food and music, excellent service (by Hong in particular) and ambience, would recommend to visitors of hue ……. :)

title: Lovely experience
review: Lovely service by staff and tasty food! Definitely recommend it. Thanks to Lona and Marie for their kind and professional service.

title: GAdventures
review:
Fabulous restaurant in a great location
Brilliant service and exceptional food
Will be back
Thanks Rosa and Viga and all staff

title: Group visit 12/4/25
review: We had an incredible meal here as a group of ten. We ate three courses and everyone was delighted with the quality of their food which was beautifully presented. Wine and cocktails were also excellent and the service was superb from Mong and Tram. The total price was excellent value for money. Well worth a visit!

title: PERFECT INTERACTION OF SERVICE AND FOOD
review: I received the best service I have ever experienced in my life this evening. In addition, the cocktail and food were equally excellent.

title: Fantastic experience!
review:
Pleasantly surprised in a beautiful interior with friendly service by Mong and Tram.
The food was fantastic! Very nice to dine there and the toilets were very neat!

title: Elegant restaurant
review: Lovely elegant restaurant with beautiful food and attentive staff. Particular thanks to Huy and the other servers for their help and advice .

title: Great family friendly restaurant
review: We had a great meal. Our waiter, Bach, was so friendly and helpful. They even had a kids section on the menu so everyone could have what they wanted. I’d highly recommend for families

title: Authentic Huế Cuisine in a Warm, Welcoming Sp
review: Vị Huế is truly an ideal spot for those who love the authentic taste of Huế cuisine. The space is cozy, beautifully decorated with traditional touches that create a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Every dish is carefully prepared and full of flavor, all are delicious and beautifully presented. The flavors are delicate yet rich, staying true to the essence of Huế. The staff is friendly, attentive, and always ready with a smile. Prices are reasonable for the quality and ambiance offered. The menu is diverse, with options for both vegetarians and non-vegetarians. Vị Huế really brings the spirit of Huế closer to every diner. I’ll definitely come back and recommend it to my friends. A truly memorable dining experience!

title: Cozy, quality, good service in Hue city center
review: Very cozy place, with delicious local food and very well served by Mei and Lona. Very good price quality in the center of Hue

title: Spectacular! 10/10
review: Wow. This place is incredible! The food is immaculate and the service is even better. Bach was the sweetest and very attentive. Super recommend for a lovely date night if you are in Hue. The rooftop balcony is breathtaking.

title: To be recommended
review: Nice setting, excellent food and service, it's worth mentioning Mr Huy for his helpfulness and excellent English and Miss Mei's kindness.

title: Nice restaurant in quiet atmosphere
review: Very nice restaurant, nice and quiet (not the classic place besieged by mass tourism). Attentive and friendly staff, good food. Recommended!!

title: Delicious food in a beautiful space
review: Lovely place, delicious food, very well maintained place. The attention of all exceptional staff. Lona attended us with great kindness and professionalism. Best place in Hue. Don't miss it.

title: Perfect place to enjoy a good meal.
review:
Excellent food and even better service from tarpaulin and the rest of the staff.
Definitely the best quality place in all Hue.✨🥢!!️

title: Intimate dinner
review:
Great time, on the terrace, in 1 very cozy small living room
Friendly and relaxed welcome
Thao has been in good care throughout our meal
Very good dishes, refined
We highly recommend

title: Would stay again!
review:
Local located in the pedestrian area (walking street) of Huè.modern style, cozy and elegant.not expensive given the level.
Traditional food, and not only, good and refined presentation.
Young and professional staff. a special thanks to Lona and Mei who served us carefully and with a smile.

title: Best restaurant in Walking Street!
review: Excellent service from Huy & Thao and the lunch was outstanding. Have booked again for dinner to enjoy the ambiance of Walking Street at night.

title: Excellent!
review:
One of the highlights of my trip to Vietnam!
The egg coffee here is simply spectacular — rich, creamy, and perfectly balanced. It’s more than a drink; it’s an experience. A special thank you to Mr. Quy for his kindness and outstanding service. He made me feel truly welcome and added a warm personal touch to the visit. Highly recommended!

title: Excellent experience in Hue
review: Great service and super quality on the plate. Fine and refined cuisine... local cuisine revisited. Modern presentation. Thank you to Tghao for his smile and sympathy.

title: Vi Hue
review: Stopped here for breakfast. Between us we had a variety of dishes; some traditional Vietnamese breakfasts, an international breakfast, & a fruit/yogurt bowl. All were delicious. The service from Bach was amazing but also genuine. We loved it that much we reserved a table for dinner that evening.

title: Best in Hue
review: Very nice! Rosa was very attentive :) Food was amazing. I will come back. It’s definitely worth a visit and the atmosphere is great

title: Great food and service
review: Great spot for yummy food and wine selection. Mong was wonderful. A western crowd more than locals though. Services is great

title: Top restaurant! Don't forget to make a reservation
review: What an incredibly good restaurant with a warm atmosphere. We were warmly received and the food was exquisite. A Michelin star worthy. The service by Rosa was at its best. Thank you for this delicious dinner.

title: A wonderful and welcome treat
review: What a treat. I love street food, I really do, but a dinner without too-small plastic chairs and tables was a luxury even before our delectable dinner arrived. We were served by Mong and Marie, both of whom were beautifully attentive. This was a most welcome posh and peaceful night out.

title: Superb restaurant in Hue
review: Lovely evening at Vi Hue. We enjoyed the beautiful and original cocktails and the food was amazing. Presentation was excellent. Special mention to Mr Bach who looked after us in a friendly and professional way. Highly recommend to anyone visiting Hue.

title: A fabulous evening meal in Hué.
review: We had an excellent evening at the Vi Hué restaurant. The food was exquisite and the service from Tram and Mei was outstanding. We asked Tram for her menu recommendation and were not disappointed. Thank you for a great evening.

title: Good food,
review: Attractive restaurant. We had a nice meal have a nice experience. We are observant by the host Bach and he has passion for his profession. However, we also noticed the company clothing nice to see. Be sure to check it out

title: Excellent food and service
review: Wonderful food beautifully presented, and excellent service from Bach who explained all the food and drinks and made our whole group feel very welcome. I highly recommend visiting.

title: Fine cuisine
review: Fine cuisine, excellent food, fresh produce. The service is discreet and efficient. Thank you Lona for your pleasant welcome.

title: Don't miss thus one !
review: Really smart but relaxed restaurant, service by Lona was exceptionall. Enjoyed a great cocktail on terrace before eating an enjoyable meal in an informal but smart restaurant.

title: Gorgeous Gorgeous food ,wonderful service . Excellent presentation. Thanks for good experience. Thanks lona
review: Gorgeous food ,wonderful service . Excellent presentation. Thanks for good experience. Thanks lona very much, I " ll come back next years

title: Excellent
review: Great food and beautiful restaurant. Mrs Dream and Marie were exceptional, attentive to the customer, ready to advise and present the dish in every detail. Excellent service

title: Very good food and great service
review:
The food was exceptionally good and I would be served by Mong. She is very helpful and loving.
Next time I'm in Hue, I'll definitely come by!

title: Very nice
review:
Very nice service

Mong was very nice to me and the food was also good
Beautiful restaurant
Also in the middle of the city
Thank you

title: Great Group Night Out
review: Whilst travelling thru Vietnam, our group visited this restaurant for a Dinner with Music - what a great night - the food was excellent - the music (band and singers) was exceptional and the service provided by Mong, Rosa & Marie was second to none - if you are in the area, visit, you will not be disappointed

title: Great dinner option in Hue
review: Great food with lots of options for food. Amazing service from Rosa. Highly recommend trying this restaurant when your in Hue.

title: Highly recommend
review: The most delicious food. Our bill was divided without asking and the services by our waitress Rosa was second to none. Highly recommended..

title: Welcome and perfect service
review: We were served by Bach who is very attentive and extremely kind. Thank you for this good time and this good food everything was delicious

title: Excellent case
review: This place is amazing. Our waiter was Quy, who was very enthusiastic and friendly and has explained our cafes. I had a vi hue pho coffee, based on the national dish of Vietnam, a super tasty ice cream cafe with star anise, cinnamon and cardamom. We also had a super tasty curry and oatmeal. The bag has a very nice interior and cool toilets. Everything is taken care of to perfection. Very good value for money.

title: A lucky find
review:
Discovered this little gem whilst out on a Saturday night the restaurant stands out because it looks really upmarket

We were looked after by Lorna who was exceptionally helpful and spoke perfect English

The food was very good and arrived quickly

It was a Saturday night and we sat outside and were entertained by the locals on a Saturday night out

title: Incredible meal and service
review: My sister and I had an incredible meal at Vi Hue during a lunch stop organized by my tour operator. The service, provided by Mei and Quy, was top-notch, and we were treated like VIPs. The restaurant was spotless and beautifully designed, creating a great atmosphere. The shakes we ordered were absolutely delicious. I highly recommend making a stop here if you're in the area!

title: Bach is the best.
review: My vegetarian dinner was absolutely amazing and the service by our waiter Bach was top notch. I highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Vietnom trip 2025
review: Our waiter Bach did an outstanding job. The food was really good. The chicken in clay pot was amazing. Try a Huda beer as well.

title: Elegant Vietnamese food
review: Very elegant restaurant with impeccable service. Food was extremely tasty and well presented. Shout out to Bach who provided us with excellent service and a great smile.

title: Wonderful, delightful experience and delicious food.
review:
Our group ordered a variety of dishes and they were all excellent. From cobia fish dish to seafood linguini and beef bun hue soup. The banana flambé was a delight and went well with rum and raisin ice cream.

The staff were attentive especially Mong and Mary. They listen and cater for our requests.

title: Good restaurant
review: Rosa Mei has served us just perfect and the food was great. Try the sweet soup and any of the cocktails. The air conditioner is working well.

title: Very good food.
review: Excellent food! Very nice and good cocktails and mocktails. The rice and seafood noodles were excellent as was the banana flamingo. We had excellent service by Mary

title: Great breakfast, great service
review: Delicious breakfast, open early which was great as we had just arrived in Hue. Lovely egg coffee made by Mong and great service, thanks Khanh.

title: A great night out
review: Very polite staff, looked after us very well. Food was nice and well presented. Also had a lovely show with traditional Vietnamese music and singing. Would recommend.

title: Not to be missed
review:
Great place, the cuisine is refined and the service is impeccable.
The professionalism and kindness of the waiters and especially BACH, ensures you have a great time.
I would definitely recommend this restaurant.
Dominique

title: Evening out in Hue
review: Excellent food and service exceptional with brilliant entertainment great night out and would highly recommend thank you so much

title: Beautiful discovery
review:
Delicious dinner at this establishment.
Mocktails to fall! With fresh produce, without syrup!
Our waiter Mr Bach was very attentive and gave us explanations about the dishes. Thank you all!

Plates are not too big, be careful for heavy eaters.

title: Excellent restaurant not to be missed
review:
Very elegant restaurant and inventive cuisine. The dishes I chose were delicious and very well presented. Vietnamese cuisine of high standard for relatively wise prices. The staff , multilingual is very welcoming and with little care especially Mr.Bach who was very attentive and took care to explain each dish in French! The decor is successful and relaxing. Do not forget to have a cocktail 🍸🍹 they are well made and original. I will definitely return during my stay.
Patrick

title: Spoilt my last night in Hue
review: We booked the outside table on the night we arrived for the following night - it wasn’t busy but we liked that table. We arrived and were seated then we were told the table was double booked and could we move - we said no. Our starters arrived before our drinks and our main arrived whilst my husband was still eating his starter. Starters were good but my rice was a solid cold lump.

title: Quiet restaurant in hue, tourist area
review: Enjoyed the famous Bún bò Huế noodle dish, in a modern Vietnamese setting, a bright and airy restaurant, my waiter Bach was very helpful with recommendations for a traveller with laryngitis, a ginger honey tea to takeaway was well received, enjoyed the lunch, went back for dinner, highly recommend stunning food presentation.

title: Wonderful
review: I went for the breakfast. On entry some peaceful jazz music was playing. The restaurant had amazing ambience and amazingly attentive staff. I was served by Bach. Bach was very kind and a great conversationalist. The food was great and I'd definitely come back again.

title: Chilled oasis
review: Excellent chilled meal in the heart of a bustling city. Attentive staff (especially Lona), great tasting food all in a quiet oasis.

title: Nouveau cuisine- Vietnamese style
review: Food good but a bit more nouveau cuisine than solid Vietnamese. Located in Old Quarter Lucker passed a very noisy " beer street" our terminology. Felt not particularly good value for money and found elsewhere for pudding stop. Nothing essentially wrong and food tasty but not on our list to revisit.

title: Amazing dinner at Vi Hue, hosted by Mr Bach.
review:
We have been amazingly welcomed by Mr Bach our waiter for the night. He was attentive to all details and made sure we had a great experience. The food is succulent and we wish we can come back again.
Highly recommended the Banh it Man Vi Hue and the Nong Heo a Luoi… you won’t regret it !

title: Excellent food!
review:
Okay, prices may be slightly higher compared to other restaurants in the area but the quality of food is also better: it is excellent!
Next to that it is presented in a great way. Friendly staff, great location, we booked it two days in a row.

title: Amazing food and hospitality
review: This restaurant has only been recently opened. The owner is a very friendly gentleman who checked in on us and made sure everything was to our expectations. One of his young staff Bach looked after us and explained the menu and how to eat certain dishes. His hospitality was nothing short of wonderful. Yes the food is slightly more expensive than on the streets but well worth the experience. The presentation of food was impeccable and the flavours matched.

title: Wonderful dinner and final cocktail!
review: Good evening! I have just returned from a beautiful trip to Vietnam, also visiting the town of Hue and had dinner, in this elegant and well-kept restaurant with great attention to detail, atmosphere, beauty and welcoming guests. I was served by Rosa and Mong wonderful. Congratulations to all the staff. Sara.

title: Best place in Hue
review: Very good food, great atmosphere and amazing service by Bach! Would definitely recommend eating here, so much that we'll go back tomorrow for another dinner here!

title: Highly recommended
review: We ate fantastic food there and enjoyed beautiful dishes made with great taste and dedication. Very friendly and good serving staff, who give good explanations , even how to best prepare and drink the tea with ingredients. Especially Mong who helped us.

title: Extraordinary cuisine with attention to detail and high quality service .
review:
From the moment I stepped into the restaurant I realised we were in for a special treat . It was our first night as a group of 6 on an Intrepid tour for dinner in Hue .

We were greeted warmly and professionally and seated at our table . The menu was amazing and our drinks and meal orders were taken by Bach and attended to promptly. Drinks arrived first, and soon after all our meals arrived at the same time . My seafood linguine was delicious.

We were never rushed at all, and when ready we placed our dessert order. I was so impressed with the service and the meal and offered compliments to the chef . We were asked if we would like to meet him and it was so nice to personally thank him and the manager, as well as our waiter Bach.

I would highly recommend this restaurant to anyone wanting to enjoy a high quality restaurant in Hue .

title: Good restaurant
review: Very good restaurant - good traditionelle vietnamesian food and very good service special our waiter Balm😊 We loved it.

title: When the ambience of a place “gets you” as soon as you walk in, you know you’re in for a treat. We were not disappointed
review: What a lovely find in Hue! Very tasteful decor make it a very comfortable setting for a lovely meal. Private rooms are available for small groups. The staff are proud of their establishment. Bach showed us around the 2 floor restaurant, adding bits of history and cultural norms. We were very impressed by him and will surely return!!

title: Give it a go.
review:
Great find in Hue, Mong really helped us through the menu and told us quite a lot about Hue, thank you.

There are so many places to choose in Hue, but give Vi Hue a go, it’s really good.

title: Great meal, our waiter steered me in the right direction as to what food was best.
review: Food was excellent, and Bach, our waiter made two fantastic food recommendations that I otherwise wouldn’t have tried: the steamed hue dumpling and the bun bo hue. The beef tar tar was also fantastic as were the cocktails.

title: Delicious dinner at Vi Hue
review: Excellent dinner at Vi Hue. Our server Bach was brilliant, very helpful and knowledgeable about the dishes. All of the food was delicious and the mocktails were great too.

title: Delicious food
review:
Great food
This is a wonderful restaurant with lovely staff. The food is delicious and beautifully presented. Bach explained dishes very clearly. A delicious authentic experience
Jill

title: Quality food
review:
Excelent food, so different compared to the other restaurant...whole staff was very welcoming...Lana and Mong were also very kind...
I reccomend to try it...

title: Perfect experience
review: Impeccable service and delicious cuisine. Perfect to please yourself with reasonable prices. I highly recommend!

title: Excellent everything
review: Excellent Food!! Service was great. English spoken staff helped with the menu and choice of foods. Loved it all. Bac Xio (iced coffee) was the best

title: I highly recommend!
review:
We went breakfast in Vi Hue with friends, the place is very nice.
We had the international breakfast which was delicious! Thanks to Huy for the service

title: Delicious
review:
Delicious!!! Top service and excellent breakfasts. I recommend without hesitation.
In the center of Hue.
Thanks again for everything.

title: For a cosy getaway
review: Recommended restaurant, delicious dishes and desserts, nice cozy framework, very friendly and conscientious service.

title: Excellent Restaurant
review: We had lunch here as part of a 16 person tour group. Excellent food and service, very happy with the choice and would recommend to all. Very well served by the friendly Lona and Bach who could not have made us more welcome.

title: Vi Hue😋
review:
Fantastic food,nice setting,waitress Tran very attentive without being pushy,definitely recommend for dinner.Washed down with 3 local beers all for princely sum of £21gbp.
Come you won’t be disappointed.

title: Excellent food and service
review: We had a delicious lunch yesterday, service was excellent. We enjoyed it so much that we decided to return for an evening meal which was superb!

title: Great fusion food
review:
Great atmosphere, amazing service and over the top food.
Special mention yo Rosa and the rest of the staff tjat waited on us tonight

title: First day in Hue
review:
Just had a wonderful light lunch .
Absolutely delicious food and the staff were so friendly and informative.
Excellent 😊
Bach and Marie fantastic!

title: Lovely lunch, great service
review:
We visited Vi Hue for lunch today S part of a group. We were made very welcome. The food was fabulous. We had a mixture of Vietnamese and my husband requested a fusion between European food and Vietnamese and they couldn’t have been any more accommodating.
We decided to come back later that afternoon and again we were made very welcome. Our waiter, Bach, was very helpful and even brought us a fan as we were so hot. Would definitely recommend

title: Ideal restaurant
review: Had really good food the service was second to none. It was a comfortable relaxed atmosphere and if I’m ever in Hue again I will be heading there

title: Sophisticated Hue flavor 🥰
review: It is a Michelin Guide-starred restaurant. Every plate was wonderful, with refined seasoning and presentation of Hue's unique cuisine. I'm glad that the wine and cocktails are good and the staff are courteous and helpful!

title: Excellent Vietnamese restaurant
review: We were served by Bach & Quy for breakfast. The service was excellent - served quickly, including details about the egg coffee, which was a really nice touch. The food was delicious! The decor is beautiful. Highly recommend

title: Excellent
review:
Very good fine cuisine. Perfect Marie Mong service, she was very kind to our 3 year old son.
The kitchen is made with local products.

title: Great food and service
review:
Great service from Bach and Lona.
Great food, good vegetables noodles qbs the sweet soup is delicious!
Strong recommendation and good price

title: A beautiful experience
review: Good food and not plentiful. Very good and attentive service, appreciable also the kindness of the waitress who followed us (Lona). Pleasant environment with music in the background!

title: South East Asia Tour
review: Excellent food and good service, very clean restaurant our group was treated well, especially from our friendly waiter, Mr Bach....

title: Perfect for a good evening!
review: Very good restaurant with new decor and with very good service, especially from Mong and Mei. We were a group of ten people.

title: Great place to eat
review: We had a wonderful experience here. It's clearly only recently opened and the staff are very keen to make it work. The food was great and the service was excellent. We had a strict vegan with us and he was fully cateredfor with no problem. And it was really good value would recommend it to anyone.

title: Excellent service and delicious food
review: Excellent service by Quy, delicious, fresh food, beautifully presented, tasteful ambience, authentic and oriented to a Western clientele.

title: Relaxed Vietnamese dining
review: Lovely traditional Vietnamese food and good service. Recommend chicken in bamboo and the chicken curry. Great service from Lona.
Delicious food and really nice atmosphere. The restaurant feels really clean and Mei was very helpful and looked after us really well. I would definitely come back here.

title: Great discovery !
review:
What a beautiful, luxurious, clean, affordable restaurant with a young, knowledgeable, jovial, and kind waiter named Bach. Young academic who loves his City and promotes it and who wants to make it known.
He made me taste a local beer while explaining to me the origin of the name of this beer, how it was made, etc. very knowledgeable and interesting to talk to him. And it's reciprocal, he is interested in the customers. Great discovery!

title: Excellent service and good food!!
review: The perfect place in Hue for a good American style lunch! Eggs, bacon, sausages... it's all there, even hot chocolate for the kids. The service is excellent and the meals are delicious. Special mention to our Bach server, super professional and attentive. We all loved this different restaurant which offers a nice gourmet break.

title: Best place to eat in Hue
review:
Great place! Very deep approach to food taste. Traditional local soup was delicious.
Duck is outstanding.
Our waiter Bach very knowledgeable and friendly

title: Excellent discovery
review:
We had dinner on the evening of February 22nd!
A very successful dinner, and our friends were also charmed by this nice restaurant! The staff is very friendly and very caring with the customer.
The starter, main course and dessert, everything was perfect 👍.
And a big thank you to MONG who embellished our evening with perfect service and always with a smile!
A huge thank you.
We recommend this restaurant without hesitation.
Congratulations to the whole team!

title: Hue Restaurant
review: Beautiful restaurant with great food and service. Huy and Rosa provided fantastic attentive service and would recommend a visit

title: Vietnam experience
review: The best meal we have had in Vietnam and also the best service.Mai and Dream were very attentive and looked after us very well.

title: Highly recommended
review: Great food, pleasant environment, very kind and professional staff, we will gladly return. Highly recommended

title: Worth to try
review:
Very good and interesting food in a friendly environment. Service was great and the location was very convenient.

Highly recommend

title: Delicious food
review: Recently visited this wonderful restaurant. We had one of the best vegetarian Vietnamese meals ever. The service was excellent and it’s a great addition to the local area. Mei was the waitress that served us and provided us with excellent recommendations and service.

title: Great food
review: This place is really beautiful and clean, the food was really good and the staff, especially Rosa, were really kind and attentive

title: All right.
review:
Typical restaurant
Perfect and hearty breakfast
Bach's service is impeccable.
I highly recommend

title: Meal at Vi Hue
review:
Excellent meal at this restaurant. Service was fantastic, staff were very efficient, attentive, polite and helpful.

Rosa served us and was delightful!

Food was fresh, good quality ingredients, delicious!

Excellent value for money. Thanks for a lovely evening. 👏👏👏😊

title: Great service and delicious fresh food
review: We came here for lunch and the food was exceptional. I had the lotus salad and steamed dumplings and phoenix mocktail. The food was so fresh and full of flavour. We were served by Bach and he was very friendly and accomodating. Highly recommend coming here for a meal with friends or family and sitting on the rooftop.

title: Great for vegetarians!
review: Fantastic restaurant with good choices for vegetarian food. Really helpful for checking gluten intolerance as well. Lovely service from Bach. Overall great place!

title: Delicious food - I highly recommend!
review: Delicious food, I had the tofu with rice noodles and veggies - amazing sauce, so fresh and tasty. Staff super friendly 🤗🪷

title: The best man was there at this hour
review:
The menu shows us an exquisite classed restaurant, they have a wide choice to choose for your meal.
Trust our waiter BACH. Great guy, easily takes your menu & discussion if you need a change of your plate ie: I don’t want mushrooms. But mushrooms are great too.

title: Good restaurant in Hue
review: Foods good, staffs are so helpful and restaurant is decorate so beautiful and friendly especially Mr Bach, we will come back.

title: Excellent coffee and very friendly service from Bach and Harry.
review: Had a very good morning latte coffee sitting on a very nice verandah . Harry and Bach were very friendly and provided excellent service. A very well finished restaurant in a quiet relaxed area.

title: Would recommend
review: Food was great, service was great and price was reasonable. Our server Luna was great too, would recommend if you're in town

title: Huy
review: Best food I had in vietnam so far. Staff was amazing and very attentive about allergies and my gluten free problem:) come here if you wanna have a propper time and dinner

title: Excellent food, great location, friendly staff
review: The food was excellent as was the service. Our two waitresses Tu and Mong were friendly, helpful and professional. Would highly recommend.

title: Great dinner in Hue
review: We had an excellent meal and exceptional service. Tli and Nong gave us wonderful service and looked after us beautifully. Highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Very nice, surprisingly high end experience!
review: Really nice, gourmet meal in a delightful setting. Special thanks to Lino our excellent, patient and knowledgeable waitress.

title: Beautiful, tasty Vietnam food.
review:
The food and service was lovely. Lona was very attentive.

Recommendations, anything Vietnamese was delicious and beautifully presented. The seafood linguini was underwhelming in comparison. It just didn't have the taste.

The restaurant is beautiful with gentle music. The banana famblè with rum and raisins icecream was wonderful. Definately go but don't have the seafood linguini.

title: We all had a lovely time and meal was great
review: It was very lovely. Thank you Lona for your lovely service and beautiful smile. We all had a lovely time and meal was great .

title: Delightful
review: We had a 3 course meal and all of the dishes were delicious but the best part was the service which was lovely! The staff was super attentive and accommodative of our food preferences. Highly recommend the place!

title: Lovely restaurant!!
review: The restaurant was exceptional! Our server Bach, who speaks excellent English, made communication effortless. He provided detailed explanations about the menu and recommended the best options for us. The food is absolutely a must-try! The restaurant maintains high cleanliness standards, and the relaxing jazz music creates a wonderful atmosphere. Overall, my experience was amazing, and I will definitely return.

title: Very good restaurant in Hue!
review:
I recommend 100% this restaurant!
It is a new restaurant that has just opened in Hue, well placed, and very well decorated! It feels good!
Very good mocktails, dishes and desert.
Good value for money.
The waiters are kind and very helpful, especially for Huy and bach.
We will be back in a few days, thank you;)

title: Super local
review: Great ambience, food very delicious and fantastically served. And unknown cocktails that have top healthy 👍just tip

title: So Happy
review: Every thing was so lovely great service so happy MONG is so lovely. she is so friendly and goes bring to provide great service. This restaurant is such a good restaurant and I’m so happy that I came here and had a meal thank you.MONG Take care

title: A Hidden Gem in Hue
review: Located in the vibrant area of the city, Vi Hue is a hidden gem that need to be more famous. Surprised by the enthusiastic welcome and the beautiful, cozy space. The service is exceptional, friendly, and happy to offer us recommendations. Ms Dream and Vi, they suggested me delicious dish when i’m allergic to seafood. The food is very delicious and beautifully presented, I tried Turtle and that was a wonderful experience. I really like lotus salad, beef and duck breast. A “must place” when you come to Hue

title: Well worth a visit
review: Lovely restaurant with great food. Warm welcome and amazing service from Tu and Mong. Menu is varied and every single thing we had was delicious. We had coffees and teas in the am - best coffee in Vietnam so far. Later we also had a multi course dinner which was fantastic and the best cocktails … loved it

title: Fabulous diner in Hue
review:
I went for a lovely diner at my last night in Hue…
We had the pleasure of being served by Tu and Mong and can‘t fault the experience. Every dish that we had was incredible. We will be back.

title: Wonderful Experience
review: If you’re looking for a cozy restaurant with excellent service, Vi Hue is a must-visit. The service is prompt and attentive without being intrusive. The ambiance is charming, with soft lighting and a relaxed vibe that makes you feel at home. The menu offers a wide range of dishes, and each plate is a masterpiece in flavor and presentation. I highly recommend their signature Sous vide duck breast, which is perfectly cooked and rich in taste. And I’m really impressive with good service of Mrs.Dream and Mrs.Vi.

title: Very good
review:
Very good food very professional
Great cocktails and mocktails
Very good service highly recommend you visit for dinner very reasonable price
Really good value

title: Great place for vegetarians and omnivores
review:
This newly opened restaurant is well worth a visit. The restaurant is very nicely decorated, the service is top notch and the food is fantastic. The presentation of each dish during our visit was photo worthy. This restaurant is one of the first Vietnamese restaurants that we’ve come across that had a menu using the commonly accepted green leaf symbol identifying vegan or vegetarian options. We greatly appreciated the full page of vegetarian choices. The vegetarian curry, the vegetarian noodles and the vegetarian lotus salad were delicious. The fruit drinks were a work of art, beautifully garnished.
Thank you to Vi and Huyen for your wonderful service and your beautiful smiles. You made our evening special.

title: When my group and I have arrived at the restaurant we were warmly welcomed by the staffs with smiling faces.
review: Convenient location, very chilling atmosphere with friendly staffs (Huy) and delicious foods and best selected cocktails, wine and dessert.

title: Nice newly opened restaurant!
review: Newly opened place. Cozy environment. Very nice and friendly staff. Well made cocktails and good coffee. We're coming back!

title: Beautiful newly opened restaurant
review: Arrived in Hue and found this lovely newly opened restaurant. Egg coffee tried for the first time. Delicious! Congratulations to Khanh (bartender)

title: Vi Huẽ Restaurant, a beautiful find in Hue
review: Beautiful food served by really helpful and friendly staff. Great experience and a really nice restaurant . A different take from the usual menu

title: Well worth a visit
review: This is a great restaurant - beautiful food and lovely service. Mong looked after us so well and Harry can make you a wonderful cocktail or cocktail. This is refined food in a spacious and comfortable setting.

title: Excellent food great service!
review: Fantastic food excellent service. Bach looked after us really well! Thoroughly enjoyed the whole 3 course meal. Thank you to all the staff for making out evening one to remember!

title: Great place for dinner
review:
Great food and service. Nice ambience. Staff were very friendly.
Thank you Lona.
The Spicy cocktail is excellent. Would love to have again.

title: Recommended
review: Super good food, the pasta with pesto was highly recommended and the dessert too! Mong was very friendly and sweet. Must visit when you are in Hue!

title: Lovely and charming restaurant!
review:
We were immediately impressed with how charming and beautiful the restaurant was, and Mong and Harry were wonderful with great customer service. The food was delicious, I also tried the “cafe pho” which is only available here and that was a cool experience! My mom loved the salted coffee (cafe Hue) which was so tasty, she ordered a second one.

Highly recommend and will come again next time I’m in Hue!

title: Underrated gem in Huè
review: Food amazing and well presented! Service excellent and cocktails are excellent. Even ordered dessert! Must try when in Huè

title: Caters well for veggies
review: Lovely ambience, great food and attentive staff. Highly recommended for a visit. We attended with a group of 10. We all left feeling very pleased 👍

title: A gem in Hue
review:
A beautiful restaurant with a really cool ambience.
As a vegetarian, I am usually limited to food choices. However, this restaurant offered some great alternatives. I opted for vegetarian spring rolls and vegetable curry. Both exceeded my expectations.
Also, I had ice cream for desert, which was tasty.
Everything was well presented.
I was travelling with a big group of people who all agreed that this is a superb place to eat.

title: When in Hue......a step up in the Night Walking Street.
review:
We visited this lovely restaurant and were more than pleased. My husband had the duck which was done to perfection. I had the pork jowls which were not only done to perfection but seasoned creatively.
Our appetizers were beautifully presented.
The servers were attentive and efficient.

All in all a delightful evening.

title: Very nice
review: very nice people, awesome food, lovely ambiente. Nhan is a very good bartender, the apple tea ist very nice. Mong made a very awesome service

title: Calm, healthy, delicious food extravaganza.
review: Loved this restaurant. Amazing presentation. Delicious interesting healthy food. Lovely attentive staff (Mrs Dream). Very clean. Safe food. Try it!!

title: At VJ Hué Restaurant & Cafe you will be treated like a king
review: During my holiday I visited VJ Hué Restaurant & Cafe twice and had a great meal. Especially the fresh Springrolls beforehand and the Hanoi Egg Coffee afterwards are great. In this restaurant, you're treated like a king.

title: A great new restaurat in Hue
review:
Great option for a finer dining experience. Beautiful deco and a great menu of both local delicacies and national and international dishes. Staff are excellent so sweet and chatty and helpful when choosing. We were served by Mong who was very welcoming and taught us some local phrases.

Highly recommend as a new restaurant in Hue.

title: Perfect dinner date!
review: This place is newly opened and a must try for Hue fusion food. The staff are very attentive and accommodating, our hostess Mong took care of our every need with great recommendations for the food and drinks, and what dishes were local to the area. Food is of a fine dining standard and in a nice quiet side street. Perfect for a dinner date

title: Extremely nice and courteous service & very pleasant armosphere.
review: The food was very good & fresh - also very much vegetarian and flexible in the composition. only recommended!

title: Great choice
review: On the advice of the guide we chose Vi Hue for dinner: it was great advice. Vietnamese dishes of excellent workmanship and with presentation of elegant refinement. The staff was friendly and helpful. Unique flavors and affordable prices: to recommend.

title: Terrific experience
review:
I’m truly wanna share ‘bout this restaurant so freakin much. Cuz this’s my very first time to have a experience like this. Food with fusion style based on Vietnamese cuisine and culture was a terrific combination, highly recommend u guys all the Curry’s dishes”, the “Lang Co seafood linguine” and the “Chef’s flavor spaghetti”.
In addition, signature cocktails/mocktails gonna blow your mouth with the savoury mixture and a charming inspirational about VietNam and this Old Imperial City.
Last but not least staff are genuinely hospitality, thanks to that we’re completely immerse into the whole experience. Grateful for that🙏🏻. Gracias!

title: Afternoon lunch
review: Food was excellent and staff were very friendly. Good value. Ambience in the restraunt was very good. All meals were well presented and extremely tasty

title: Excellent variety and taste
review: Food was excellent and there were a ton of options to choose from. Our group was in the mood for different types of things, and the menu here was extensive. We were very pleasantly surprised at how well they did each dish—usually when restaurants generalize, they don’t do each dish well. We were impressed!

title: Wow….
review: What a place…..Great food, Great service. I will definitely recommend to any of my friends who are travelling in Vietnam

title: I recommend
review: It's delicious and very affordable. We liked it, came back here for dinner.

title: Delicious and speedy service
review: Fantastic food, really comforting and very quick service despite being very busy.

title: Avoid - cold food
review: Cold food and a big queue. Staff are nice, but food arrived cold and concerned it had been sitting there for a long time. I would not recommend this place, perhaps it’s better on a weeknight when there’s no queue meaning they might make food fresh and deliver it whilst still hot.

title: Lovely meal
review:
We stopped here for dinner and had their hue speciality bamboo tray. It was beautifully presented and our server suggested how it should be eaten using the rice paper and veggies.
The restaurant is very popular so go early if you can.

title: A beautiful address in Hue
review: A must-see address in Hue, so I was a little afraid that his good score on Tripadvisor was overrated but not at all! All the specialties are tasty, the staff is adorable and the atmosphere rather quiet compared to the surrounding bards and restaurants. A classic worth a visit!

title: Best food in Hue
review: Loved this restaurant…we went back a second time. Loved the craziness. Both times we queued and waited less than 15 mins. Fabulous food. The crispy pancakes were amazing. Wine was very expensive but the food was very economical. Loved it!

title: Yesterday and today 12-3 -‘26 delicious food, good service, friendly service
review: There are so many delicious dishes from traditional to dishes with fries. Wouldn't recommend as the local food is delicious

title: Perfect, fast, friendly server good value for money
review:
A little wait, (about 10 min around 9pm) but the wait is worth it
Quick service
We took a set of specialties from the city.

title: Wish I hadn’t eaten there
review: There was a long queue to get into the restaurant so we took this s a good sign. Waited perhaps 25 mins for a table. The menu promised good Hue style food. The pork on lemongrass skewers were delicious, we rolled them up with salad in rice paper. Other entrees were less exciting. We then had two bowls of soup which had fish cake and beef in them with fresh salad vegetables on the side. The beef was so tough it was inedible.
