We finished off with a complimentary passionfruit half. Five hours later I was struck down with severe food poisoning and two days on am still suffering. The staff at our hotel who were then looking after me mentioned that busy isn’t always good when it comes to restaurants as food hygiene can drop during these times and I suspect that was the case with our meal

title: No wonder it’s so highly rated in Hue city
review:
Recommended by our guide we booked and were not disappointed. Huge queue outside of diners with no reservation so we went straight in - make sure you book otherwise you need to wait but will probably eventually get in.
Very busy but food was like most Vietnamese restaurants quickly brought out and very filling it was
Lovely food, good drinks and all in all,quite reasonable

title: Nice dining experience but not in the dining room
review:
A very famous nice restaurant in Huė , international clientele because prices are a bit high for Vietnam
The food is very good and we can eat specialties from Huė but the service is suck we take care of you at the beginning and then no one comes to see you table not rid of , no dessert proposal , forced to ask for the bill
Too bad.

title: The worst night in Hue
review:
夫とレストランを訪れ、フエ料理の特製バンブートレイ メット・ダック・サン（特製プラッター）（22万ドン）を2名分注文しました。この料理は、バインコアイ（クリスピーライスパンケーキ）を含む10種類のフエ料理を楽しめるものです。ところが、出てきたのは白い陶器の皿に盛られたバインコアイ（クリスピーライスパンケーキ）2切れだけでした。「これは注文したものとは違う」と言うと、店員はメニューを見せながら「これはこの料理の一部ですよ」と言い張りました。それを食べ終えた後、残りの料理がまだ来ていないと言うと、「それだけです」と言い張りました。夫は何かおかしいと伝えましたが、店員は夫の言っていることが理解できないと言い、納得のいく対応をしませんでした。夫がメニューを指差して怒鳴り散らした後、ようやく最初の注文が運ばれてきました。到着してから1時間半も経過していました。私たちは出された料理を断りました。後になって分かったのですが、最初に出されたのはフエ・スペシャルティ・フードのバイン・コアイ（詰め物をしたクリスピーライスパンケーキ）で、価格は68,000ドンでした。もし大声で抗議する代わりに店員の言うことを聞いていたら、68,000ドンの料理に220,000ドンも払っていたかもしれないと思うと、ぞっとしました。あの夜は、フエ旅行で最悪の夜として記憶に残るでしょう。
My husband and I visited the restaurant and ordered the HUE SPECIALTY BAMBOO TRAY MET DAC SAN (SPECIALTY PLATTER)(220,000VND) for two. This dish allows you to enjoy 10 different Hue dishes, including BANH KHOAI (STUFFED CRISPY RICE PANCAKE). However, all that was served was two slices of BANH KHOAI (STUFFED CRISPY RICE PANCAKE) on a white ceramic plate. When we said that this wasn't what we ordered, the waiter showed us the menu and insisted, "This is part of this dish. I'm sure." After we ate that, we said that the rest of the dishes hadn't arrived, and he insisted, "That's all."
My husband told them that something was wrong, but they didn't respond in a satisfactory manner, citing that they couldn't understand what my husband was saying.After my husband yelled and pointed at the menu, our original order was finally brought out.At this point, an hour and a half had passed since we arrived. We declined the food that was offered to us.  I later found out that the first dish served was BANH KHOAI (STUFFED CRISPY RICE PANCAKE) from HUE SPECIALTY FOOD, priced at 68,000 VND. I was horrified to think that if we had listened to what the waiter said instead of protesting loudly, we would have ended up paying 220,000 VND for a 68,000 VND dish. That night will remain in my memory as the worst night of my trip to Hue.

title: The worst night in Hue
review:
メニューの写真を指差して22万ドンのセットメニューを注文した。ところが、メニューの写真と違って、竹のトレーではなく、白い皿に盛られた6万8千ドンの単品料理が運ばれてきた。私は抗議したが、店員はセットメニューの一部であり間違いではないと言い張った。残りの料理は結局運ばれず、店員はさらにこれが最後の料理だと言い張った。私が怒鳴り散らした後、ようやく最初に注文したセットメニューが運ばれてきた。この時点で、レストランに入ってから1時間半が経過していた。私は料理を食べることを拒否した。もし店員の言うことを鵜呑みにしていたら、6万8千ドンの料理に22万ドンも払っていたかもしれないと思うと、ゾッとした。フエ旅行で最悪の夜となった。

I pointed to the picture on the menu and ordered a 220,000 VND set meal. However, unlike the picture on the menu, a 68,000 VND single dish arrived, not on a bamboo tray, but on a plain white plate. I protested, but the waiter insisted it was part of the set menu and there was no mistake. The remaining dishes never arrived. The waiter further insisted that this was the last dish. After I yelled at him, the set meal I had originally ordered finally arrived. At this point, an hour and a half had passed since I had been in the restaurant. I refused to eat the food. I shivered at the thought that if I had just accepted the waiter's advice without protesting, I might have ended up paying 220,000 VND for a 68,000 VND dish. It was the worst night of my trip to Hue.

title: Very good
review: Located in an area full of nightlife. Offers Vietnamese cuisine. We chose the most complete menu, the 220K dong one. Very varied and plentiful. But it is not easy to understand how to pair each dish with its sauce. We paid by card, without commission. They have some great local beer on tap, Hudo, for only 45 euros. Average prices, i.e. low for Italy.

title: Correct but no more. Hesitant service, cocktails refused before closing. Disappointing after Hanoi and Halong Bay
review:
We have just arrived in Hue after spending four days in Hanoi and Halong Bay, where we discovered very tasty and sometimes refined Vietnamese cuisine. We therefore had certain expectations in choosing this restaurant, relying on the excellent online reviews.

Unfortunately, the experience was not exceptional.

The kitchen is fine, no more. The dishes are good, but there is no real research in flavors or special care in the presentation. It’s simple and effective, but it doesn’t stand out. After our beautiful previous culinary experiences, we expected more finesse.

The service is provided by young students, probably friendly and motivated, but this remains fairly approximate. There were some oversights, little advice and limited English.

We arrived at 21:40 and were informed that the restaurant closed at 22:30, which we accepted. We ordered three starters and two courses, as well as two cocktails (a gin and tonic and a whisky sour). At 10:10 p.m., when we wanted to recommend cocktails, we were told that it was no longer possible to order them and that only beer remained available. It is quite surprising when the restaurant was not yet closed.

Another negative: the table was sticky and the street is quite noisy, which does not help make the experience particularly pleasant.

In short, it is a decent restaurant, but no more. If you’re just looking for basic Vietnamese cuisine on a busy street, this may be suitable. But if you’re looking for a warmer, neater and more refined experience, you’ll probably find better in Hue.

title: Great food and great staff. Thank you Hannah
review:
What a lovely restuarant
Hannah was amazing and really chatty and helpful
The food was superb and the price very reasonable
Will be back there tomorrow night for more delicious food
Thank-you so much xxx

title: Best Restaurant in Hûe
review: The Food is soooo good and the people who work there are very friendly also the owner of the restaurant!! We liked it a lot!

title: don’t stop in!
review: It's bad. The staff is low. The service is low. Nobody's listening! THE food is low, the price is high!

title: Especially for tourists
review: Local in the crowded walking street looking inviting. Mediocre food with above average prices and inattentive service. Some of our vegetarian tasting menus didn’t even measure up to the similar ones you can find along the streets, at much lower prices. Also, although the menu included a dessert, this was not served to us or given a justification for it, perhaps thinking that we would not notice. Only at our request was a much more banal passion fruit proposed to us,

title: We won't be recommending here
review:
We had been recommended a visit here by our hotel and taxi driver. We were looking forward to a taste of Vietnam but sadly we were disappointed.
The venue was clean, and the staff team was excellent, which is why I gave three stars instead of two.
The restaurant appears to be targeting European/ Western travellers.
The food was delivered too quickly, which makes you believe it hasn't been freshly cooked.
It was bland with very little flavour and the portion size was very small. A lot of the plate was bumped up with lettuce leaves.
Unfortunately, we won't be passing on a recommendation and did pass this on to our hotel.
Try some street food if you really want great flavours (and half the price)

title: Real tourist trap
review: Real tourist trap. Food was poor with no real flavour. The service was really slow, took over an hour to get all three dishes, even payment took ages.

title: Ok place, fine service. Bland food
review: The place was ok in itself but the food was very bland. Not the explosion if flavours I am used to from Vietnamese quisine. Will not visit again. On the plus side is the price

title: Exceptional
review:
Wonderful. I ordered the tasting menu for 1 person. Exceptional and advised me how to take it. Hap the manager was always attentive to everything and had the detail to give fruit for dessert.
I recommend it 100

review:
After reading the rave reviews about this restaurant, I was keen to try it.
We were seated inside and it was extremely noisy.
We ordered the set menu and most of it was fine except for the pancake which was thick and doughy.
I felt sorry for two of our party who waited ages before being served their pancake. I felt sorry for them as they had no idea what a decent Vietnamese pancake tastes taste like.
You can see by the photos that it was definitely not crisp and light.

title: Amazing place!
review: I don’t usually leave reviews, and I have to say that many restaurants in Vietnam ask you to leave a positive one. They didn’t ask us for anything, but they absolutely deserve a genuinely positive review. We ate here twice and had a great experience both times. The food was excellent and the staff was incredibly friendly. Highly recommended — probably one of the best restaurants we visited during our two-week trip in Vietnam.

review: Went here for food but they had no cocktails. Good food nicely presented, service was good as the owner Madame Thu was present and she kept a tight rein on her staff.

title: The best

We loved the beef stir-fry and chicken noodles
Not to mention the fresh spring rolls
Everything was perfect

title: Without infamy and without praise
review: Nice location and in the center. Food in the norm, as well as service. Higher-than-average prices that in my opinion are not justified by food.

title: Friendly staff, good food
review: Selected this restaurant after reading reviews and it didn’t disappoint. We were in Hue for one night as part of a tour through Vietnam and Cambodia. Good selection of food and very reasonably priced. What really made our visit though was our kind waitress Hannah. She was chatty and helpful. She took time to explain our selected dish and how it should be eaten …. Part of it needed wrapping in a banana leaf and other elements were to be wrapped in rice paper. Very confusing to a novice westerner 😂

We opted for the mix dish where you taste a bit of everything and a vegetarian one. Staff who give you advice on how to eat individual dishes and how to pair them with sauces.

review: Had a great stop at Madam Thu after a morning walking around the imperial city. May was a very kind and helpful host who took us through the best way to tackle the set menu which was a great an tasty experience.

title: A festive masterpiece of taste and elegance!

While we eagerly anticipate the debut of the upcoming culinary selections, the cocktails we sampled offered a stellar preview of the creativity to come; they were, quite simply, superb. Bill acted as the consummate host, providing such insightful guidance. Savoring the sumptuous rice dishes paired with fine wine under the warm, yuletide glow of the restaurant was pure magic. The service was so seamless and attentive that it allowed us to fully immerse ourselves in the festive spirit!

title: Ask for Mr Khoi
review:
Mr Khoi at Mme Thu 2

We booked Madame Thu after a recommendation from Instagram. We were a mixed party of six and were shown to our inside table.
From the menus, with limited choice we were unsure what to order. Our waiter Mr Khoi was ever attentive and guided us through our choices.
A popular dish was the ‘tasting menu’ for a sampling of Vietnamese favourites, however we all opted for individual choices.
The spring rolls were voted by our table as the best they had ever had, anywhere in the world!
Beef and pineapple, fish in tomato sauce another winner, also shrimp in passion fruit sauce.
After the meal, we asked to be introduced to Madame Thu, who was on the premises and readily agreed to have her photo taken with us all.
Mr Khoi was a great server and made our experience a memorable one. Madame Thu also operates a cooking school and has a second restaurant in this busy thriving area of Hue.

Highly recommended.

title: Food and friendly service
review: Today we have been dining and it has been a very satisfying experience, very good food, great quality price, fast and friendly Service especially by Nhu who was especially attentive. Thank you.

title: Waiter Long is the best
review: We came on October 14th for dinner. The staff were very attentive and helpful, especially our waiter Long. He took time to explain the menu.

review: Fantastic meal at this place. Food was fresh, tasty and delicious. Service provided by Hannanh was friendly and attentive. Definitely recommend

title: Lovely food and great service
review: Lovely food and a calm atmosphere at this restaurant. Also great service from Ngoc, she was very patient and polite. Will be back, thank you :)

title: Delicious food
review: We dined the tasting menu of the typical Hue dishes and it was a success, Khoa kindly explained how to have them and helped us with several questions we had about the city. Good price and good Service, highly recommended.

title: Fresh produce, an incredible Welcoming
review: We made the restaurant Mme Thu our nursery rhyme during our stay. The products are incredibly fresh and good. I recommend all spring roll based starters, which you can consume sound like tapas. Welcoming is especially exceptional, everyone is delighted to see you. Even the manager comes to tell you a little. Thank you, special to Khoi who to please you speak in French.

title: Tasty specialties from Hue
review: Food was great! My friend ordered a menu of Hue specialties. Got a good explanation of Khôi how to eat everything. The manager also came to say hello. This restaurant was recommended from our hotel!

title: smiles you never forget
review: We shared fresh fruit and a banana pancake, a real treat full of freshness. Mood was cheerful and relaxed, thanks to candy, he always smiling and attentive. His good humor made the meal even more pleasant!

title: Perfect Service from Candy
review: This is my first successful visit, I love ultra fresh seasonal fruits here, very very tasty. Candy, very friendly and attentive, made the experience even better. Madam Thu has a relaxed Mood, ideal for a sweet break.

title: Top restaurant.!
review: In this restaurant I had the best lunch in Vietnam. A plate with many different dishes with custom sauce. Highly recommended! Our waiter Khoi was super friendly with lots of explanations to the dishes.

title: Very good

Would recommend!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

title: Good restaurant

review:
I tried Hue's cake specialties at Madam Thu's, and it's a delight! I ordered the tray of bánh beo, nam, loc: they were hot, fluffy and the flavors of Hue were incredibly authentic.
In addition to this treat, I must mention Khoi's Extraordinary Service. He took the time to help me with my upcoming travel plans, giving me valuable and personalized advice with great kindness. It was a really thoughtful Service and beyond expectations!

title: Amazing

A great waitress named TUE.
Highly recommended.

Not to miss.

title: Good food!
review:
The food was great, also the service by Rose was great!

Free wifi and great ambiance!

title: Excellent local food, best service.
review: Awesome Hue food experience. Ngoc provided the best service. Have been experiencing vietnamese cuisine for a few days traveling south from Hanoi and this place certainly was a step above. Will recommend to anyone in Hue.

Tue and Ngoc are really kind and help me to choice the best dishes.

title: Good experience

title: Food and service par excellence!
review: Thoroughly enjoyed the food, ambience, air con and service which was beyond excellent. Great service with a smile to complement such flavoursome food. Two special mentions. The fried spring rolls for one and Hannah or giving us a memorable meal on our all too brief visit to this wonderful country.

title: Great food in Hue.
review: We ordered the fixed menu. Hanna explained each item and the sauces. The order came out quickly and was excellent. Great experience.

title: Tasty meal and great outdoor seating
review: Tam was a wonderful server and our food was amazing! Highly recommend! The spring rolls were very tasty and the lemongrass pork dish was really good. And they brought us complementary passionfruit for dessert. Amazing!

title: Good food, good food
review: Delicious food! The tasting plate was very diverse. Friendly staff who speak very good English. Especially Dui.

review:
The food is very good here and the service was wonderful the staff are friendly overall restaurant ranking is very good h. Highly recommended restaurant, very pleasant to sit in

title: A hidden treasure in Hue
review: A real little treasure in the heart of Hue! I discovered dishes I had never tasted before. And thanks to Khoi, always attentive and smiling, who also helped us to enrich our travel checklist!

title: Great dinner spot
review: Tri was our waiter and service was wonderful. Gave us great suggestions for dinner and they were delicious. Would definitely come back again.

title: Ideal for eating in Hue
review: Tam is wonderful! He served us great, the food very good, cheap and the Service great! If you are in the City I recommend it, you will not regret it.

title: Delicious
review: Tam was an excellent server. Food was excellent, everything on the tasting platter was delicious. Would come back again!

title: A real crush on Madame Thu!
review:
A real favorite for Madame Thu! 🌸
We had a great time at this restaurant in Huế. The cuisine is tasty, typical and generous, but what made the experience truly unique was the Welcoming.

Many thanks to Tri, who was an exceptional person from beginning to end. We had great pleasure in sharing with him Vietnam, its history and culture. His kindness and professionalism made this meal even more memorable.

I recommend this restaurant with your eyes closed: you will find not only delicious dishes, but also a real human warmth. Thank you again, Tri, for this beautiful moment! 🙏

title: Delicious meals. Lovely service.
review: Su, our waitress, was attentive, friendly and helpful with the menu. The meals were delicious - especially the rice cakes with diced shrimp.

title: A must visit restaurant in Hue
review: My wife and I went for dinner and everything was incredible. The service was amazing, particularly from our servers Tri and Thien. We both had the set menu and the food was brilliant, our best meal in Vietnam so far. Well worth a visit, you won't be disappointed. Thanks again to all who work there.

title: Dinner
review: Tri was exceptional with his service & friendliness! Also had great communication skills in English & we talked a lot about history & local knowledge. Thanks Tri, very good night!

title: 100% recommend!!
review: Absolutely wonderful restaurant. Beautiful food & such a great menu. We loved how we were able to try a selection of Hue’s famous dishes. The atmosphere is excellent & the staff go above & beyond to ensure you enjoy your meal & time. Special mention Loan & Khoi, friendly, helpful & attentive staff.

title: Great place super friendly
review: Great food and service with Hana being especially helpful and friendly. Highly recommended we tried the mixed plate which gave us a taste of different foods. Great value

title: Fabulous
review: Amazing food and brilliant service by Gon. We had the Bún Bò Hue (beef noodle soup) and the Nem Lui (lemongrass grilled pork). We were given some delicious free passion fruit too!

title: Highly recommend
review: Great food and brilliant service by Thien. Very reasonable prices. Crepes for desert were lovely too! Would recommend.

title: Hué kitchen
review:
Very good food with Hué specialities. English explanation and advice.
Locals come here too, always a good sign.
A special thanks to waitress Tran who was very friendly and helpful.

title: Highly recommended
review: The food here is sooo good – fresh, tasty, and full of flavour. Every dish we tried was delicious. Big shoutout to Khoa, who was super friendly and helpful the whole time. He made the experience even better with his great service and positive vibe. Highly recommend if you’re craving authentic Vietnamese food!

title: Great Hue cooking experience
review: A restaurant in Hue that I researched and visited in Japan. There is also a set menu where you can enjoy various flavors on one plate so that you can do it alone. Hana, who loves Japanese anime, tried her hand at Japanese. They will teach you how to wrap ingredients in rice paper and eat them. Khoa will honestly tell you which beer is better for you, can or bottle. I ordered more bumbohue because I came to Hue. The set menu was also bumbo hue, both of which were wonderfully delicious, and I finished it. The passion fruit served at the service was also delicious. Thanks for the meal. If you come to Hue, I will come again!

title: Good choice in Hué
review:
Very delicious food in Hué with friendly Service! Danke an Ngoc!
Indoor (AC) and outdoor seating. We stayed here twice during our stay.

title: Great food and experience
review: We had a great dinner here. Didn't like any of the options on the street then stumbled upon this place and loved the look of the set menu. It was amazing food and a taster of the best foods Hue/Vietnam has to offer. And a good amount of food as well. But beware the chilli was spicy! Our server Hannanh was lovely as well and did warn us about the spice.

title: Perfect food
review:
Hannah was an exceptional host.
The food was exquisite. We took Set menu and were taught how to eat it.
We'd be back if we went back to Hue.

title: Great discovery. Very good khoa, tri, na
review: Great restaurant in the central area, great food, very kind staff, large veranda. Highly recommended!!!!!!!

title: Memorable Madame Thu 2 and Tri's service
review:
This is a wonderful restaurant in downtown Hue in Viet Nam. Hue was VN's capital in the 1800s to mid 1900s and has that look in terms of Buddhism and temples, and the first emperor's mausoleum. Madam Thu's was worth visiting. Its informal light atmosphere yet meticulous service, proper cutlery, bright lights and attention of staff made it a worthwhile experience.
Tri served us. A young University student fluent in English and knowledgeable of the world and of particular countries and able to converse in fluent English with meticulous service made it a delightful experience. The cost of the food was very acceptable and the dumplings in banana leaf and the steamed Tilapia fish were delectable. Huda, the local beer called for a second bottle! Certainly worth a visit when you are in Hue.

title: Unbeatable food and service
review: We loved all the food Tam has recommended, he has been very friendly and has served us great, we will come back!! It was our first restaurant in Hue and we couldn't choose better!

title: Excellent service from Tri. Helpful and very friendly. It was great to chat with him.
review: We really enjoyed our evening and the service from Tri was excellent. He was very helpful and we enjoyed chatting to him. The food was excellent too. Highly recommend a visit.

title: Excellent authentic Hue specialties
review: A great choice of restaurant. Very authentic. I recommend the set menu taste of 10 hue specialties for 190000 or 12 aussie dollars. Then decide what you want to add. I loved the grilled prawns in a passion fruit sauce with rice. The whole bill with 3 beers and a fruit juice was 500.000 or 30 odd aussie.lovely staff especially Loan who helped us with the menu . Highly recommended.

title: good lunch
review: stumble upon this place randomly. the place was nice and clean. the food was great and Ngoc was very lovely serving us…..

title: Come to madam thu for your meal
review: I really loved it and am very satisfied with the cuisine in Hue. The flavors of this restaurant offer a different feel from other places, perhaps even the best. And besides, Khoi’s warm Welcoming is worth mentioning: without him, we would have probably eaten the leaf by mistake, hhh. Thank you very much!

title: TO TRY IN HUE: typical and quality dishes!
review:
We ate at this restaurant during our stay in Hue for lunch on the advice of our guide, everything was excellent! in fact we returned the same day for dinner too!

The staff is friendly and kind, the waiter Thien was very kind in explaining the typical Hue dish!

Simple and quality dishes, to try absolutely!!

Highly recommended!

title: Dinner for 2
review:
We stopped into this restaurant randomly.
We had a set menu, with some bites of different dishes, and they were all good.
The waiter, Tri, spoke fluent English, explained us the sequence of the meal and how it was composed.
100% recommended

title: Best food in Hue
review: Hue gem! Amazing food and excellent service. We highly recommend this place! Tam gave us great service. We’ll be back!!

title: Unforgettable experience in Hue!
review: I had a wonderful trip to Vietnam and today was my first day in Hue. The hotel recommended me this restaurant and proved even more amazing than I expected. The food was simply indescribable — absolutely delicious. What really made the experience special was the Service. My desk maid, Tran, was incredibly friendly, attentive and took care of me with a lot of affection. She even talked to me about my trip and gave me great suggestions for exploring the city. I highly recommend this place!!

title: Amazing restaurant
review: Nhu was amazing! Friendly, attentive, and professional service. She made my experience truly enjoyable. Highly recommend!

title: Great dinner in Hue
review: We dined super well, the portions very plentiful and the price great. The waiters are super friendly, especially Khoi. He spent a good time talking to us and gave us recommendations on what to visit in the city. Super recommended!

title: Nice place and staff
review:
Very Nice Food and staff is very Kind and welcoming. Khoa was very Nice with me!
I would recommend this place without any hésitation

title: Great menu and service !
review: After our visit to Hue we ended our day by eating delicious food at Madam Thu. We ordered the set menu (dish with all of Hue’s specialities food) Great option if you’re not sure what to eat but you still want to experience local food. Service was super and Tri was kind and friendly - he also explained how to eat properly some dishes. :)

title: Perfect.
review: The food was perfect and the Service unbeatable. Gon advised us and explained all the dishes in detail to have an unbeatable experience!

title: A great night at Madame Tu
review: Madame Tu was such a lovely place and the food was amazing. We had a really good time and the conversation was very lively. Best of all, Koi was very enthusiastic about the local cuisine of Hue and gave me a great hospitality. He's really the best.

title: Best restaurant in Huè
review:
Lovely restaurant and delicious food.
Khoi our waiter was so friendly and efficient!!! Best authentic Vietnamese restaurant in Hue!

title: Amazing service and food
review: Hannah was amazing, very helpful and friendly. Food was superb, flavours were plentiful combined with a very efficient service. All for a very good price.

title: Very good
review:
Everything really good, we took a mixed appetizer menu where everything was delicious and the very kind waiter explained how it was best to do to enjoy everything at its best. We then had rice with shrimp in passion fruit sauce really good and tasty. At the end of the meal we were offered passion fruit appreciated. Special thanks to
Hannah who followed us and had a chat, very kind and nice. Local super recommended.

title: Good value excellent local food
review: Fantastic local food. Thien looked after us but all the staff were excellent. The pork skewers on lemongrass were the highlight and if you like spicy, the chilli sauce with the shrimp salad rolls is fabulous. Good value and would return.

title: Authentic experience
review: We had dinner and everything was very good. Nhu was very friendly and treated us wonderfully. I even sloshed some Spanish!!

title: Tasty and friendly
review: Great experience here, server Thien was very friendly and accommodated us for our entire meal. Would recommend to those visiting Hue.

title: Fantastic evening meal
review: Food was fantastic. I had the local 10 dish platter which was extremely tasty. Our server Thien was very helpful in explaining all of the dishes and looking after us.

title: Great place for good local food
review: We had a wonderful dinner at the madam thu restaurant. The food is outstanding, very delicious and Tri was a great waiter. Tri showed us how to prepare the food in the correct Vietnamese style. He was really friendly and attentive. Thank you!

title: Highly recommend restaurants
review: MadamThu restaurant offers authentic Hue flavors with set menu soft, and rich, flavorful bun. Tam, the server, is very friendly, attentive, and helpful, making the dining experience even more enjoyable.

title: Higly recommend restaurants and food
review: Madam Thu is a treat in Hue, with incredible food and excellent service. Our waiter for the evening, gave us all the best recommendations! Tam explain each dish, and ensured we enjoyed every meal. I highly recommend this place

title: Great restaurant!
review:
Thank you very much Tri!
The food is excellent and the Service great! We had a hard time deciding because we wanted to taste everything but Tri gave us good advice!

See you next time!

title: Great food...
review: Very friendly, very good food Thien and Tri were very friendly, the place was a place with good ventilation, good price, advisable

title: Incredible experience
review: Incredible place and incredible food , Tri was our waiter and he was very close to us, super kind and he explained very well and also recommended us what to choose and how to eat. If you plan to stay at Hue please do not think twice and go there

title: Great food and very friendly Service.
review: The food is very good Service was fast and very friendly. Thanks to Thien who took care of us wonderfully. They didn't serve very fast the food is perfect.

title: Bom Bastic Fantastic
review:
Went for late night food the best way to try traditional food to Hue

Bom was really helpful showing us what to order the mince pork on lemon grass is a game changer can't get enough

title: Great Food and Impeccable Service, Thanks to Bom!
review:
We stayed at Madame Thu and had a great time! The food was delicious, authentic and served with care. The atmosphere of the restaurant is welcoming and pleasant, perfect for enjoying typical Vietnamese cuisine.

Special thanks go to the waiter Bom, nice and super helpful: he recommended the best dishes, explaining them carefully, and was always smiling and attentive to our needs. It made the experience even more enjoyable.

I absolutely recommend this restaurant to anyone passing through Huế: great food, impeccable Service and a homey atmosphere!

title: Madame Thu 2 but 5 stars
review: Top class food and great service. The restaurant is centrally located within Hue city and the food is to die for and great value.

title: Dinner in Hue
review:
Bom is very nice and friendly. The cuisine is very good and very fast. We had great time here! If you would like to eat the taste of hue you need to come here for sure.
Very recommended

title: It is recommended
review:
While traveling to Hue, we had dinner at Madame Thu on the recommendation of our hotel manager. And we were not disappointed! The spring rolls are very good, as well as their specialties. We were able to try the noodle and beef soup, a specialty of the city.
Service was very good and Thien, our waiter, very kind and caring.
We recommend.

title: The best rolls of Vietnam!!!
review: We had dinner the first night in Huè. Cute place and especially very kind and smiling staff!. All good and well presented. I would have continued to eat endlessly to try everything! (and I eat little and get full right away). Unforgettable rolls. Go there!!!

title: Good experience
review: All very well, especially the waitress Nhu who attended us great and also spoke Spanish very well. Thanks Nhu

title: Great experience
review:
I was very well received by Khoi
I tasted Hue’s specialties it was delicious I recommend this typical restaurant and very Good Mood

title: Nice foods

title: Nice shop
review:
They were a kind and gentle staff!
He even taught me how to eat and explain the products.
Thank you for letting me know that I don't speak English!
I want to go again. There is also a menu for one person, so I think it is very easy to go.
Credit cards are also accepted.

title: Good food and Good Service.
review:
Nin took care of us very kindly. Service was quick and the restaurant very central.
One of the waitresses speaks good Spanish and is very helpful.

title: Good experience
review: We had a great time here thanks to Nhu. Thanks to her, we tried amazing local food. Highly recommend both the restaurant and Nhu.😘

title: Quick Service Unique Attention Excellent Food
review: Fantastic restaurants of authentic Vietnamese food attended us Nhu a super friendly Girl who speaks a bit Spanish unique experience

title: Excellent
review:
Fabulous experience
Fantastic customer service
Waitress Nhu very friendly
He explained how to eat each of Huế’s dishes and spoke Spanish words

title: Warm welcome and delicious food
review: The food was really delicious and the Service very fast and attentive. Especially Khoi was friendly and helpful. I will recommend my friends to visit this wonderful place during their vacation. We would love to come back anytime

title: Put this place on your “must do “ list; you won’t be disappointed.
review: We had a fabulous night. The food and service were great and we enjoyed the conversation with the enthusiastic young Tri and his manager, Hanna. We had an excellent bottle of French red wine and a tasting plate, which allowed us to sample a variety of local dishes.

title: Excellent Hue restaurant
review: We had a wonderful meal here. Hanna and Thi were excellent in their service and we highly recommend this restaurant. We can definitely recommend the tasting plate

title: A great restaurant in Hue
review: The restaurant has a very pleasant atmosphere and the food was really delicious. The service was attentive and gave helpful advice on enjoying the dishes. We would particularly like to highlight Khoi, who explained the food to us in detail and enriched the evening with his friendly nature. It was really a nice memory.

title: Best food in vietnam so far will be back tomorrow to try different things on the menu.
review: We have been in Vietnam for 12 days and this is the best food we have had. Nin is the best waiter and most polite, excellent service will be back tomorrow night to sample more of the menu.

title: Great food, great service
review: Tri was very good, he was fantastic with great service and helpful with explaining the food, he was always ready to help with anything we asked him

title: Good food, excellent service…a place where you can happily taste the Vietnamese food…a great experience I hope to repeat
review: Great experience I shred with my group. We are Italians and we love the great and good food. The food was excellent, and the service was great

title: Nice restaurant with very delicious food
review: Cosy restaurant with very delicious food. The waiters are very attentive and give tips on how to eat certain foods. The waiter Khoi explained and detailed the contents and compilations of the food and was very friendly. We would come back any time.

title: Hué wonderful experience
review:
The food is great, young and very kind guys. Cozy atmosphere.
We were served by Thien, young and nice guy, with attention and courtesy!

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review:
We had a great time efficient staff and very nice and considerate. Especially Thien who served us carefully.
Great food
Definitely to recommend and return.
Thanks again Thien

title: Very good
review: Excellent food and very kind staff, particularly Thien !!! Very good food .. all kinds of Vietnamese food ! Fair prices .

title: Wonderful!!
review: The place is cozy and the food is really good. You eat local dishes that are served in a short time and to us they looked great. We ate in many places in Vietnam and this was one of the best. Also Thien is a polite and kind waiter. It struck me very much that for every dish the guys in the restaurant donate 2,000 dong to Hue's children. At the end of dinner we were even offered fruit and called a taxi to return to the hotel. Super approved!

title: Welcome to madam thu Hue
review:
The food was pretty good and tasty.
The only downside was the presentation of the dessert, which seemed a bit messy and lacked elegance (the whole remained very nice hhh). At the end of the meal, Khoi shared his travel experience with us at quy nhon.
He recommended several places to discover, as well as other destinations in Vietnam for our next stay. This little exchange made our evening even more pleasant and memorable ^^ thank you bcp!!

title: NHU waitress TOP!!
review:
Nhu was our waitress, tried to speak Spanish and passed with a 10.
Thank you for your smile and for treating us immensely well.

title: Tri super nice. We ordered a menu and very rich. Good price.
review: Tri super nice, very attentive. He explains how to eat the different dishes. We ordered a menu and it was delicious. Watermelon dessert. Good price.

title: Tri
review: Tri is an exceptional waiter, we loved the dinner and attention. Vietnamese food at a very good price. Super recommended.

title: A delicious dinner with a special touch thanks to Thien
review:
A great experience at Madam Thu Restaurant!

Today I had a very good experience at Madam Thu Restaurant. The food was delicious, but what really made my dinner special was waiter Thien. What a kind person! Thien was very attentive throughout the meal. He explained the dishes very patiently and always with a smile. He even encouraged us to practice some Spanish with us, which was super fun and made us feel very welcome.

I'll definitely be back soon. Thank you Thien for making our night so enjoyable!

title: Best food experience in Vietnam!
review: My partner and me love to eat and travelled extensively in Asia. We had heard Hue has the best food in Vietnam, so we got a late train to try food in Hue and we were suggested this restaurant. It has been the best food experience in Vietnam until today. We were in a hurry so it’s a pity we couldn’t enjoy the food more, but there were a lot of different plates compared to other places in Vietnam, and all with really delicate and refined different tastes. The plate to try all Hue best is really suggested to get a glimpse, but all we tried was really good. A special mention to our waiter Khoi, he was really amazing, helping us choose the best and to prepare us a packed meal for our train ride. Absolutely recommended!

title: Tam was the best!!!
review: She is the waitress that served me and she was fantastic. Always polite and helpful. The food was great and she taught me how to eat it properly. I will come back again for sure.

title: Very enjoyable
review: Delicious authentic Vietnamese food, attentive service, and homely vibes. Special thanks to Xee for her excellent service.

title: A delicious traditional snack I met later – Madam Thu 2
review:
A delicious traditional snack I met later – Madam Thu 2

In July 2025, I went to Huế and visited Madam Thu 2 - Hue Restaurant. A place where you can taste the traditional cuisine of central Vietnam, it was one of the most memorable restaurants I have met during the trip.

The menus ordered today are Bánh xèo, Bánh bèo and Nem lụi.
Each of the dishes had its local flavours alive, and especially the chelane was really delicious with the silver-filled scent of the charcoal with its appalling taste.

Most impressed was the service. The female servant personally showed a sample and explained how to eat, so that even the first meal was more delicious and comfortable. Thanks to that careful care, I felt good throughout the meal.

There was nothing unlikely, and I think it's a place to be alone, family, friends, lovers or anyone else.

If you are looking for a traditional food tasting afterwards, we recommend it with confidence!

title: A treat and impeccable Service!
review:
The food was very good, Service impeccable and we were served by Xee who was perfect at her job!
I highly recommend for your stay in Hue

title: If you’re in Hue, you must come here!
review: We came here for dinner and the food was absolutely amazing!!! Such amazing value for what you get and despite being such a popular restaurant, the service is incredible. We were served by the lovely Yinnie who was so lovely and so good at her job! she made sure we were always enjoying our meal. the whole experience really exceeded our already high expectations! thank you! also the bun bo hue was unreal !

title: Wonderful food and service from Tam
review:
We wandered past this restaurant during the day, when all was quiet and hot. We decided to return for dinner. We had amazing local Hue specialties including rice pancake, grilled pork skewers and fresh rice paper rolls. Our waitress Tam was very friendly and helped with selections, making sure to check we were happy.

Highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Great value for money
review: Excellent, impeccable Service. Very delicious and quality food, as well as cheap. Xee lovely and super attentive. I'm sure we'll repeat!

title: Great food and service
review: Great food and service. Nhat was fantastic, taking the time to explain how to eat the various dishes. I would recommend anyone to eat here

title: Best Service in Vietnam and great food
review:
I have been to madam thu 1, years ago and was impressed by their cooking.
Today madam thu 1 was full, so i went to madam thu 2.

I can confidently state that its as good as the other location and the best location in hue in general, as a matter of fact on of the best locations in vietnam.

The staff is well trained, friendly, hardworking and super motivated. They have a friendly smile while doing thier quite hard work. Tonight especially Nin and Tran stood out with their careful advise and insanely good service. I dont think i ever experiences better.

Despite the location being quite full, the waiting time was minimal. Not in the least because Tran and Nin are so fast to carry all the food and of course the cooks that are the unsung heroes.

The food itself is delicious and the prices are fair. I especially recommend the shirmp in passionfruit juice.

The location is nice, with a good ambience and a good part of it is airconditioned (a necessaty in this heat. the only downside in terms of ambiance is that its always crowded.

title: Lovely food, great staff
review: Super service from Nhat. Recommend the tasting selection - haven't had so much fun eating for ages. The best of Vietnamese food in a very lovely city

review:
Great restaurant in the heart of Walking Street. Just a few hundred yards from the original establishment.
It was mostly empty when we were there, but it appeared to be more populated other nights from our view over the road at Mew Secret.
Chicken minced pork skewers, Beef Noodles, 2 beers and a Madam Thu Special - 10 dishes which included 3 different Spring Rolls, Chicken Minced Pork Skewers, Shrimp Crepe, Rice Cake and Melon. There were some gelatinous dishes I didn’t care for.
Total damage 336,500 VND £9.64.

title: Great eating experience. Tasty food friendly staff.

review:
Had a greta experience at Madame Thu 2. Food was delicious and extremely well priced. After hearing about this place by many locals, and arriving to the restaurant filled with locals, we knew we made a great choice. A family of 4 Americans who “over ordered” by Vietnamese standards (but ate every last bite and left empty plates) only spent 1,000,000VND, including 6 beers. That’s 1 dish back home in Miami.

Our server, Nin, was very helpful and hospitable. We would come back again, easily. Highly recommend! Well worth a visit.

review:

title: Excellent

title: Amazing
review: We had a fantastic time. The food was absolutely delicious here, and the service was amazing our waiter explained exactly how to eat everything on our platter and which ingredients f the sauces to use. Very please with our experience here

title: Terrible
review: You can't always trust the Tripadvisor bubbles. This was our one and only terrible dining experience in Vietnam. My husband's platter/combination was various rubbery, inedible things. I'm writing this a month later, and now can't remember what I had (something vegetarian) but know it too was bland. We couldn't get out of there quick enough.

title: Lovely time but unfortunately got food poisoning
review: The restaurant was a lovely place to be and the service was wonderful from the very nice staff. Unfortunately however later on in the evening my partner suffered from food poisoning. I had bbq pork noodles and spring rolls. She had the mixed plate option for one. So would be difficult to say what it could have been. We enjoyed the food at the time and we were in early (around 6pm) when there was only a couple of tables in. If not for the food poisoning it would have been great. Could have been a one off. But we did enjoy it and can see why it’s popular.

title: Very nice restaurant and great staff

title: Very enjoyable meal

Highly recommend.

title: Comfortable and tasty

title: Great food and value

Recommended by our guide so took advice and booked . When booking be aware there are two so check what you have booked I’m sure both are good
The one we went was big full menu had pictures so clear to understand and order
When the starter came the waitress explained what to do
The starters were delicious as was the chicken main
2 starters 3 mains 3 beers 1 glass wine large water all for under £24 excellent value
Food was delicious staff great
Good place to eat in Hue

title: Lovely dinner - local Hue specialties

title: All smoke, very little roast!
review: The place is really nice, if I had to evaluate only furniture and environment I would give maximum points. It is unquestionably a refined place. But make sure you come in with your wallet and belly full. Because the feeling is to eat little and pay a lot. Which can happen if you go to luxurious places where tasting makes a difference and you perceive the search for traditional taste along with tradition. Modestly here we eat in a rather banal way and the price is not justified, neither by the quality nor by the portions.

title: Good to visit in Hue

Breakfast is satisfying, dinners are memorable, and the service feels personal without being intrusive. Location is convenient for exploring nearby attractions, yet quiet enough for rest. Overall, this hotel and restaurant deliver excellent value, comfort, and dining quality, making it a place I would happily return to and recommend to friends, family, and colleagues seeking dependable hospitality always.

title: Great food, great service
review:
We didn't book, but were welcomed with open arms when we walked in. The food was delicious - we had a shared platter for 2 to start (spring rolls were the highlight), mixed wild mushrooms with rice, and fish with turmeric and galangal. Ice-cream to finish. We were given a palate cleanser of royal tea, and a pineapple aperitif. All of it great, and served by Ann who was so kind and charming. The restaurant had a nice atmosphere for a quiet dinner. Total bill including drinks came to about 900,000 VND which is about £30 with a tip.
Would definitely recommend.

Too bad the evening was disturbed by a family of Italian tourists who were noisy. Obviously this family does not know how to live and respect other guests, and the staff did not recall respect for the calm.

title: High-end Vietnamese cuisine

A top-notch restaurant, it offers classic Vietnamese cuisine with a Western twist.
We came for lunch and we replied for dinner. Different dishes: meat soups, fish spring rolls, pancakes with sausage and shrimp, prawns in batter, the spicy appetizer with 4 typical Hue dishes. All perfect.
The very kind and professional stirrups.
Bill € 20 per person including one beer per person.
Congratulations to the chef and staff.

title: Exceptional Dining at Alma & Outstanding Service from Marta
review:
Alma Restaurant delivered an exceptional dining experience from start to finish. From the moment we walked in, we were warmly welcomed and made to feel genuinely valued as guests.
I chose the gourmet burger, and it was outstanding—perfectly cooked, beautifully presented, and packed with rich, balanced flavors. Every bite was a reminder of how satisfying a truly well-crafted burger can be. My husband opted for the tender steak, and it was cooked to perfection—succulent, flavorful, and expertly prepared. It’s clear the kitchen takes great pride in quality ingredients and precise execution.
What truly elevated our evening, though, was the service. Marta looked after us with such warmth, professionalism, and effortless charm. She was attentive without being intrusive, knowledgeable about the menu, and made us feel completely at ease. Her friendly manner and genuine care added a personal touch that made the experience even more special. She is an absolute credit to the team.
Exceptional food, wonderful atmosphere, and outstanding service—highly recommended

title: Successful evening
review:
We had the 6-course menu and were totally thrilled. Every course was super creative, really delicious and great served – you can tell that the cooking here is done with a lot of love.

An extra thank you to Dillan! He looked after us perfectly all evening – super friendly, attentive and with just the right amount of looseness.

Value for money? Just great. For what you get, absolutely fair.

title: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent 6-course menu at the Alma!
review:
We had the great pleasure of enjoying the 6-course menu at Alma – and it was an all-round perfect experience from start to finish. Each course was a small work of art, perfectly coordinated and arranged with great attention to detail. The combination of creative aromas, fresh ingredients and modern presentation absolutely thrilled us.

We would like to emphasize the excellent Service: Dillan looked after us throughout the evening and with his friendly, attentive nature provided a relaxed and at the same time professional atmosphere. He explained the dishes in a knowledgeable manner, made appropriate recommendations and was always on hand at just the right moment – without ever seeming intrusive.

The Price quality ratio also convinced us: The menu is more than fairly calculated for the quality, portions and first-class Service offered.

There is an issue with using the f&b credit. Somehow, it wasn't captured in the system even though the reservation department confirmed the credit via email. It was quite confusing, but Dillen did helped to sort it with the front desk. Thank you.

review:
As a photographer who’s pretty picky about views, I can honestly say Alma blew me away.
From the 33rd floor, you get a breathtaking panoramic view over the whole city — it’s a dream spot, especially around sunset and into the night.
The steak? Next-level good — juicy, tender, cooked exactly how I wanted (which almost never happens!).
And the staff? Absolute stars — so friendly, thoughtful, and made the whole evening feel special without being too formal.
The vibe is super relaxed but everything feels polished and five-star.
Highly, HIGHLY recommend — especially if you love great food and incredible city views. I’d give them 6 stars if I could!

title: Not good.
review:
The BBQ ribs were just bad—dry, chewy, and bland. They tasted like they were pulled out of a soup, and they forgot to grill them. The meat quality was also poor for ribs; you’d use something like this to make a good soup, not good BBQ ribs. Considering the price (three times more expensive than any other place in Hue), this is unacceptable.

The view was nice, and the staff was pleasant, but they clearly have no clue how to make BBQ ribs. Additionally, given that they offer around ten different main course options (which I appreciate—a dense menu), all of your dishes should be crafted to perfection. I've had better ribs that were literally pulled out of a soup.

This dish is absolutely delightful, offering a perfect balance of rich and well-seasoned flavors that truly stand out. The use of fresh, high-quality ingredients enhances its taste, making every bite a pleasure. Moreover, the beautiful presentation showcases great attention to detail, reflecting the artistry and craftsmanship behind its creation. It’s not just a meal; it’s a true culinary masterpiece that excites both the palate and the eyes.

title: So good we went twice - unreal Bún bò for £1.50
review:
This place was recommended by our hotel (Scarlett Boutique), and we ended up going twice during our 3-day stay which says it all.

We first went on a Saturday evening (the hotel booked it for us), but there was no wait time so we probably could’ve walked in. I get why they suggest reservations it gets busy in this area - the main strip of Hue.

We ordered Bún bò both times… yum-myyyy. It’s packed with flavour, super comforting, and only 50,000 VND (around £1.50!) which is insane value. The staff are super on it and attentive also down to help you with the menu if you're unsure on what to try.

On our second visit, we also grabbed a Bánh mì to take away for our train to Hội An. We don’t eat pork, so asked to swap for beef and they were more than happy to accommodate.

Only downside for us it’s quite loud, especially outside, as there’s a lot going on. You can sit outdoors or indoors for air con though.

Definitely recommend for authentic, affordable Huế food.

Seems to be suited for groups who hopefully get better service but he environment is certainly not as cosy as the sit let you believe it is. Other people just left without finishing their drinks upset, of not getting served

title: Top!!!
review:
It is beautiful refined delicious!
Quality service
The hotel is also great as well as the Spa

title: Restaurant of the hotel Old house
review:
We stayed two nights and dined both evenings in this restaurant offering fine dining and very warm service.
As we were smokers they offered us a table outside.
Careful attention!
Meals of fish nems cooked in a leaf of duck bananas and squirrels with just crunchy vegetables and rice but what I want to highlight are the magnificent sculptures of pumpkins, carrots, radish in the shape of lotuses, dragons or phoenix.
Of all beauty and great art!
Discover

title: Unique Experience in the ancient city of Hue
review:
Kim Long restaurant at the Ancient Hue Garden houses and French Villas offers you a right royal experience.
Dressed in ancient costume and accompanied by traditional musicians and singers we tasted the royal cuisine of the past.
Each dish was decorated with intricate carved vegetables.
The dishes were a delicate balance of flavours.
We learnt a lot about local customs.
Many thanks!

title: Fantastic
review:
The best restaurant in Hue both in quality and service. Unmissable place for lunch or dinner with a sumptuous decor.

title: A royal experience with friends

title: A Cultural Experience Gem!
review: This was an incredibly special dinner and musical experience! The traditional Vietnamese music was beautiful, with 5 professional musicians entertaining us. The food was exception - the best we have had in Viet nam. The service was impeccable. This is a wonderful way to really immerse yourself in Vietnamese culture for a special evening. title: Kim Long Fine Dining was a great location for our small tour group.
review: Great Service. Fine dining. Dining room had a great ambience. Nhi was very helpful and provided insight into the menu ingredients.

review:

Fantastic food and excellent hospitality in very special surroundings.
We thoroughly recommend a visit on any stay in Hue.

title: Exceptional evening

What a memorable evening, fun dressing up, beautiful food, excellent service, amazing music - exceptional!
I would definitely recommend

title: Unforgettable

title: Amazing meal - Best we have had on our trip
review: We had a wonderul meal and service here. On our 5th day of our trip this was the best food, atmosphere and service and we had no issues with any other restuaraunt. This one was just exquisite. The food we had included chicken, fish, and squid in lemongrass and sweet and sour recipes.

title: Royal food package with wine

title: Highlight of Hue
review: Wonderful fun night. Food was delicious and presented beautifully. Staff were friendly and helpful. Would highly recommend the experience. They dressed us in traditional outfits and the private room was superb.

review: We had a royal menu and ate in fine costumes. Good food was served nice - fine wine card. Service professional. Good evening.

review: I wasn't staying here but was really glad I made the detour for dinner, as it was great. The building is stunning and very atmospheric. Add to that delicious, beautifully presented food, lovely staff - who also sorted out a taxi for me, and very reasonable prices. Good choice of wine and other drinks too. It was just a shame the weather was so awful as I'd have liked to wander a bit around the surrounding area.

title: Great experience
review: I thought it was the usual restaurant for tourists, the classic catch, instead very nice environment and location immersed in a tropical garden very elegant restaurant. We made imperial dinner menu, they dressed us in emperor clothes. Vietnamese food was excellent quality and tasty and cooked very well. Great experience

title: Amazing 5/5
review: Celebrated our anniversary here with my fiance. The food is great and the staff were so nice! They speak good English as well. Definitely recommend. The scenery is so beautiful, even better than in the photos. This restaurant is really special.

title: Le parfum is a gem
review:
Wonderful boutique hotel. Hidden way in a back street in amongst the chaos. Would definitely recommend.

There is a rooftop cafe which we went into every night just to get a breather great little gem.

The rooms I were serviced and great.

Excellent value for money.

title: Great Thai cuisine experience.
review: The food has a thick Thai taste, especially tom yum and thai pads are delicious, delicious. Cosy space, beautifully decorated, suitable for both family and friends. The staff is friendly, quick. I will definitely come back next time!

title: Banyan Tree is luxurious and private with excellent service; saffron adds a refined, memorable touch.
review: Banyan Tree is luxurious and private with excellent service; saffron adds a refined, memorable touch.

title: Great.
review:
Saffron Restaurant & Lounge is one of the famous high-end Thai restaurants, especially attracting tourists by the combination of refined cuisine and luxury space.

The space at Saffron has a strong traditional Thai but still modern, usually located on high so there is a beautiful view, especially at sunset. The open, vibrant design and warm yellow lights create a romantic and relaxing feeling, very suitable for special evenings.

In terms of cuisine, the restaurant stands out with Thai dishes that are elevated both in taste and presentation. Dishes such as Tom Yum, green curry or Pad Thai are all finely processed but more refined, fresh and carefully selected. In particular, the plating is very beautiful, artistically high, fine dining.

The service at Saffron is also a big plus. Professional, friendly staff, good communication in English and always ready to advise dishes to suit the taste of the guest.

However, the price here is quite high compared to the general flat, more suitable for tourists or special occasions. But in return, experiences from space, food to service are all worthwhile.

title: A Must-Visit for Authentic Thai Flavors
review:
Saffron restaurant is absolutely beautiful, with a lovely atmosphere that makes the whole dining experience even more special. The Thai dishes were incredibly tasty and full of flavor — I enjoyed it so much that I went twice during my stay.
The service was excellent, with staff who were very attentive, kind, and welcoming throughout the evening.
Highly recommended if you’re looking for delicious Thai food in a beautiful setting.

title: A Luxurious Taste of Tradition
review: Such an elegant place at Saffron Restaurant. The food was exceptional—absolutely authentic and beautifully prepared. The entire dining experience felt luxurious, with a lovely touch of tradition that made it even more special. The price is reasonable for the experience!

title: Saffron
review: We had a romantic evening in Saffron. The staff was very attentive, we had handwashed and the food was very good, I've been back many times and the staff remembered us. I feel very appreciated.

review: The restaurant is typical for Thai, and the welcome dishes are also well-appointed. The menu is diverse and the taste is strong and beautiful.

Overall experience was made even better with the excellent service from An. She took the extra mile to make sure we are well taken care of. Provided us with a memorable dinner.

title: Magnificent villa with interesting Vietnamese menu proposals
review:
The restaurant is in a magnificent private villa with very suggestive gardens, dotted with ponds with carp and frogs. Suggestive local restaurant.
They offer seven menus already organized in addition to the à la carte.
We tried menu number 7, which is quite varied and complete and I would say perfect for a great Vietnamese dinner. Even the Chilean wine proposed was not bad. Recommended.

title: Excellent restaurant
review: Excellent restaurant. Everything was perfect, the welcome, the fabulous cuisine, the setting. The menus very hearty and extremely well presented

title: Delicious
review:
Very good Vietnamese restaurant with beautiful discovery menus. Excellent value for money
Watch out for mosquitoes!

title: A Stunning Setting Undone by a Tourist-Driven Experience
review:
Y Thao Garden has an undeniably captivating setting. Tucked within the ancient walled Hue Imperial City and housed inside a former estate, the restaurant instantly evokes the atmosphere of imperial-era dining. The grand dining room is designed to replicate the elegance of an imperial residence, and the menu is built around that theme.

Unfortunately, that’s where the authenticity begins to fade.

While the dishes offer an introductory glimpse into Hue’s cuisine, the overall execution feels more like a tourist checklist than a true cultural experience. The food is fine, but lacks the depth and care you’d expect from a place promising an imperial dining journey.

Service mirrors this sentiment—indifferent, rushed, and clearly structured around turning over tour groups throughout the day. It removes any sense of ceremony or warmth that could have elevated the meal.

Y Thao Garden is also one of the more expensive dining options in Hue. I’m more than willing to pay for a thoughtfully crafted experience, especially in such a historic setting, but the service and execution simply didn’t meet the promise.

Beautiful to look at, but ultimately a miss if you're seeking genuine hospitality and a memorable culinary experience. I would've skipped this stop if I had a do over.

title: Best authentic food in the most amazing setting
review: We recommend this restaurant by our tour guide Minh. We asked for good authentic Vietnamese cuisine. That is just what we got! So tasty, presentation was amazing, creating birds out of vegetables. We got in a grab from the hotel, no idea where we were going. We were taken out of the bustling city to a what appeared to be a private homestead. Inside the gardens was the most beautiful restaurant with a beautifully laid table., The whole experience was amazing. 3 course meal with wine $57… highly recommended

title: Fantastic place!
review: Recommended by our local guide, we came for dinner and never advice was fairer! High-end restaurant, in an old house surrounded by a charming garden. You eat in a refined and romantic environment lulled by pleasant music. Wide choice of dishes, although I recommend choosing the tasting menus (7 different proposals) whose courses can be shared and exchanged among diners to expand the tasting of food. The dishes are elegantly and artistically composed and explained by the waiter. Although I had already tasted many dishes elsewhere, I must say that here they are more refined, delicate and well cooked with high quality raw materials. A little 'poor choice of drinks that does not include a wine list, excellent and reserved of course the Service. A place not only for the body but also for the spirit: fantastic evening.

title: Great Food
review: The house is beautiful and has a lot of history. The food was incredible. We came here as part of a tour, so I'm not sure about the cost or if we were served a multi course meal. The food was served very artistically. There was a lot of food and it was very good.

title: Excellent cuisine in Hue Vietnam
review: Excellent quiet restaurant with traditional Vietnamese decor links Imperial city of hue. It has a very diverse menu and value for money Excellent. We were attended by several waitresses as they have many personal therapies and attentive tables very well dressed and traditional china dishes. It was a very nice meal

title: Very nice setting in the old town.
review: Menus with 5 to 8 different dishes of Vietnamese cuisine between 12 and 20€. Fast and almost nickel service. Nice presentation of the dishes. A good address in a beautiful setting. I recommend.

title: Estraordinary.
review: A completely unique experience in Vietnam. This couple have made Hue their home once again after living in Europe for decades. They bring a reverence for Vietnamese music, art, design, and cuisine and have built the most extraordinary home and venue to showcase them. Mme Camille is a multi-faceted artist who has built it seemingly from the ground-up, yet it feels as if it has stood for centuries. It is impossible to describe the complete experience but in our case it began with a very personal concert by highly trained musical scholars, with vocal accompaniment by Madame. We then went into a beautiful, multi-course dinner. They make you feel as if you are their close personal friends. This is not an experience for everybody. It is elegant, refined, and utterly unique. It feels like a once-in-a-lifetime evening.

title: Exceptional and hospitable couple . You can't get to know Hue more personally.
review: Mr Truong and his wife Camille are hearty and exceptional hosts. We were their guests for 4 hours and have been able to get great insights into Vietnamese art and culture. Through their lives in Europe and Vietnam, they connect and unite cultures . This couple makes us think of Hue with positive thoughts after a long time.

title: A Beautiful and Unforgettable Cultural Experience at a Hidden Gem in Hue
review:
We had the pleasure of discovering this hidden gem during our visit to Hue. From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the owner of this beautiful riverside home. He gave us a private tour and shared the story behind the house. The atmosphere was serene, and we immediately felt calm and at peace.

We then met Mrs Camille, the incredibly talented co-owner who designed the house, created the beautiful paintings displayed inside, and later performed as the vocalist alongside three wonderful musicians during the musical experience. Before the performance, they kindly served us tea and sweets, which made us feel truly cared for.

The performance was intimate, emotional and interactive. We were invited to read the English translations of the lyrics before each song, which helped us connect even more with the music. Mrs Camille is so sweet and humble, and the couple are genuinely kind and passionate about what they do. Their love and respect for art, especially music and culture, really shine through as they welcome others with warmth, host charitable events and generously share their home, art and stories.

This experience was a highlight of our trip and something we will never forget. Highly recommended for anyone who appreciates art and meaningful cultural experiences.

title: Flavour, Presentation & Service Impeccable
review:
Absolutely fabulous restaurant at the Anhill Hotel, breakfast was superb with a great range of food all fresh and full of flavour.
We eat there 2 nights of our 3 night stay, and would highly recommend, presentation and flavour the best so far on our holiday.
The service was also impeccable, they can’t do enough for you.

title: Tranquil experience at Anhill/Ama restaurant
review: We stayed at the Anhill Boutique and ate at the Ama restaurant and we would definitely recommend a visit if you’re in Hue. The restaurant is situated in the tranquil surroundings of the Hotel grounds. Dinner was accompanied by the gentle sound of water and the occasional frog call - it is a wonderful setting. We had a range of Vietnamese dishes - all of which were delicious. The cocktails were top class. But above all the service was amongst the best we have received in Vietnam. The staff are amazingly friendly, quietly efficient and nothing is any trouble for them. Definitely recommend

review:
Great Bun Thit Nuong! We ate at this restaurant 3/6 days for breakfast as it was that good. My husband ordered something else & then tried my dish & ended up ordering the Bun Thit Nuong next visit. It was perfection!!! Also, ordered juices, various coffees & hubby ordered the beer. Good variety of dishes in a nice environment! Our server Trang recognized us daily & she & the team provided us with the best service! Such a kind & sweet team & Trang was awesome❤️❤️❤️. I had a knee brace on & every day she kindly told me to be careful of the steps & she watched out for me.
My only regret is that I should have purchased some things at the boutique next door which was really cool & you could see their wares in the restaurant. I think that the restaurant runs the store too?. Bahn Gahn was one of the nicer establishments in the neighborhood. Loved the food & team there!!!

review:
I had an amazing meal here. The food was fresh, full of flavor, and truly represents authentic Vietnamese cooking. The portions were generous, the prices very fair, and everything came out quickly. The staff were friendly and welcoming, and the atmosphere felt warm and local.

If you want real Hue cuisine with great taste and great service, this is the perfect spot. Highly recommended!

title: Excelent food and service.
review: Food was really great! Service was amazing too. Pho, our waiter, explained really well and was good at giving us advices on what to eat and where to go after.

title: One of many very good restaurants in Hue
review: The restaurant was recommended to us. We can continue to do this without restriction. The food was great and quickly served. Greetings to Pho our waiter!

title: Thanks chef and PHO
review: Great food and nice ambiance. Congratulations to the chef. Highly recommended the deep fried eggplant with fish sauce. Great and attentive service from PHO. Recommended

title: Amazing service and food!
review: We had an amazing experience at Banh Ganh. We saw how amazing the food looked on Tik Tok. It lived up to the hype! The service was what made it so special. We had 3 girls serving us. They were amazing. So friendly, kind and accommodating. They even gave us recommendations of places to visit in Hue. A great experience overall!

title: Lovely restaurant with yummy food
review: Our hotel recommended this place to taste authentic hue food. The place was delightful and the food was delicious. Our waiter, Pho and his colleagues were all very friendly and happy to help us on our trying to speak Vietnamese journey. Lots of laughs. Thank you for a lovely introduction to Hue. We will return.

title: amazing! :)
review: we had an amazing time here! the food is amazing and came so quickly, and the girls working here are so chatty and friendly! highly recommend <3

title: Hue local flavors with friendly service and fare prices.
review: Bahn Ganh was recommended to us by our tour guide as a good choice for an authentic Hue style meal. The meal was very tasty with a wide selection of choices of local cuisine. The decor was tasteful and the service excellent with polite and attentive staff. The value was exceptional.

title: Very nice experience
review:
It was very delicious food and very nice staff. Our waiter Quang was very nice and took good care of us :)
Come here for a good diner in Hue
Very friendly staff. We sat on the first floor, great Mood and delicious Vietnamese food. Recommended if you want to try local food.

title: Great restaurant in Huè!!
review: We had dinner trying different Vietnamese dishes, each dish was great, well presented and plentiful. The staff is really friendly and super welcoming and gave us lots of explanations on how to eat some dishes. We would stay again soon.

title: Bad night
review:
Unfortunately we did not like anything, touristy and banal.
We only went for the positive reviews and we were disappointed that they are significantly positive requests from the waiters with the excuse that is needed because so his boss continues to give them work... They ask you to do it directly at the table in front of them with a lot of qrcode... I'm sorry but it is right that you really evaluate the restaurant without pressure.... Attention is becoming a custom in Hue and Hanoi

title: Very Good Option
review:
Very good food, and attention from the staff, especially Trang, who was very friendly throughout.

Highly recommended, good prices and quality food.

All perfect!

title: Modern Vietnamese locale with great food and fast and very courteous Service
review: Small room (and not a bad quality, indeed!), simple but characteristic furnishings, nice and clean environment. Very good Vietnamese food, with simple and light dishes. Very fast Service. They also have freshly squeezed juices. Would stay again!

title: Super Vietnamese cuisine!
review: The Vietnamese food was just great. The staff very nice and helpful. The Mood on the first floor is also very nice.

title: Good food and service
review:
The restaurant had nice food. There were lots of options on the menu, it was not overly priced and the service was good
…..

title: Amazing lunch in Hue
review: Incredible experience in Hue.The food is amazing, we strongly recommend it. Trang’s service has been really nice. We will come back!
Extraordinary!!! Many Vietnamese come to eat there and frankly it will remain an incredible experience in Vietnam

title: A good option on Hue
review:
Attentive, helpful staff.
Good fairly authentic seeming Vietnamese food served to a mixture of foreigners and locals.
View over the pedestrianised street.

title: Great place
review: Catfish is sensational, best fish meal in Vietnam. Aubergine/eggplant is not to be missed. Wonderful seafood. Curry delicious. Really worth a visit. Great service

title: Good value. Good food.
review: Had three very good meals here. Reasonably priced. Plenty of variety. Very clean and with good service. The waiters were friendly. It was in the first floor so not a place for those with mobility issues.

title: Average experience
review: Service was nice, food was rather average. Pleasant atmosphere, very traditional. House wine is not for winelovers. Overall 4/5

title: Bravo
review: It was amazing! The food was super tasty though a bit spicy. The service was very sweet and everything went very smoothly.

title: Excellent Vietnamese food
review:
Excellent food and service!

Highly recommend!

I had the banana leaf salad and spring rolls!

My girlfriend had a noodle dish with beef.

title: Delicious local food
review: This was our favourite restaurant during our Vietnam travels so far- go with the recommendations made for some local, delicious dishes. My daughter loved the Bò Nhúng (beef noodle soup), other hits included the pork + lemongrass skewers (rolled in rice paper with salad and delicious peanut sauce) and the chicken clay pot. Passionfruit mojito was very tasty. Highly recommended.

title: A beautiful discovery
review: Many thanks to Trang for his kindness, his warm welcome. Kitchen with delicate and refined taste. A peaceful place to settle there quickly becomes a ritual before walking the streets of Huê. Anne and Christian

title: Great Meal at Bánh Gánh
review: We were served by Trang, who was excellent and helped explain the correct way to eat pork with rice paper appertiser, which was delicious. We also had tofu with lemon grass with rice (excellent) and a vegetarian pancake (also excellent). Staff were attentive, very friendly. We tried Vietnamese white wine, which is an acquired taste, but worth experiencing. When visiting Hue, eating downtown, especially for those with dietary requirements (one of us is strict vegetarian), but wanting to try local faire, Bánh Gánh is an excellent place to enjoy a Vietnamese meal. Bánh Gánh also accepts credit cards and is reasonably priced (our whole meal including wine and a beer) was under $NZ 30.

title: Great Restaurant in Huế
review:
Absolutely satisfied! Tasty food, beautifully presented, cozy and clean space. The staff were super friendly and welcoming.

Special thanks to Mymy, the manager – she was lovely, professional, and really attentive. You can tell she truly cares about her customers. It felt like being personally taken care of!

Will definitely come back and recommend to friends!

title: Disappointing
review:
Very disappointed with the service .. well there wasn’t any.
I think they were busy upstairs but downstairs we were the only table.
One waiter who was too busy outside talking to the girls next door.
We had to get him for drinks & when he bought our food it was cold, obviously sitting in the kitchen for too long.

title: Quick, tasty, and satisfying meal
review: The food was absolutely delicious, the service was outstanding, and the atmosphere made the whole experience unforgettable.

title: Great food and service
review: Banh Gang was absolutely fantastic. Lovely cool restaurant, very clean. Wonderful traditional Vietnamese food, beautifully presented and so tasty. Trang was our server, who was so welcoming, friendly and helpful. Highly recommended for a great meal.

title: We were happy😋
review:
Good tasty Food and Friends helpful waiters. Typical viatnamese Style Food. We will come back soon.
Tanks it was nice😋😀

title: Here you try good food
review: Amazing place with a great ambience and a real taste of hue’s dishes. The staff was very helpful and friendly, explaining the dishes and how to try them

title: Holidays in Vietnam
