review: We went to dinner a few couple of friends who were on vacation.Very good service and very cold draught beer.Very good food.I recommend it

title: Great food
review:
Great food, great prices, lovely staff.
We had the traditional Hue meal, recommended by staff and it was fantastic. Fresh beautiful food

title: Nice restaurant in Hue!
review: Very nice restaurant in Hue! We tried both the menu and the noodle soup with beef and crabcake and both were delicious. Pho was a great host, also giving us local recommendations! Definitely recommend visiting here if you are in Hue!

title: Try this place
review: Everything really good and very clean. Open kitchen, run by very clean staff. Super recommended. Excellent Bahn Beo and Bahn bot loc

title: WELL WORTH A VISIT,SO CHEAP FOR WHAT YOU CAN EAT,BOOK ON WEEKENDS
review: We targeted coming here through TA reviews and it did not disappoint on a Saturday night.We were the only westerners dining all locals and about 90-100 busy busy,having said that service was quick and the owners are supervising.A bottle of house red wine Dalat(okay) and two course each was 525,000 dong about £17…fantastical value,I recommend the shrimp noodle dish

title: Shaw’s Set Menu Challenge
review:
The food experience here was incredible! The staff were lovely and the food was extremely tasty!

I recommend anyone in Hue to come to Bánh Gánh! I challenge anyone to eat two of the 7 meal set menus themselves, like our food friend David Shaw!

title: Good meal here
review:
We had a lovely meal out here. We ordered a selection of dishes and to be honest they all came up the size of 1 dinner plate so we definitely over ordered.
Good food and a reasonable price.

I'd rate this a high 7 or low 8/10

title: Great experimce in Hue
review:
Our waiter Pho was great he advised us on what to order and everything was spot on we ordered the combination menu so you get a taste of all the best things they have
Great experience

title: Great spot in Hue.
review: We ate here on our first night in Hue after receiving a recommendation. I would happily pass on the recommendation to others as the food and service were exceptional and full of local dishes. Received great recommendations from our waiter Pho and he took great care in making sure we had a fantastic meal and experience.

title: Best Nems ever - everything delicious. White wine available by the glass!
review: The upstairs area is lovely, cool and breezy in the heat, with an authentic, not plastic, ambience.. The staff are delightful. Food excellent and priced for locals (also eating here), though menu is also with pix and English. Especially recommend the nems - order the x4 with the red star. Come with DIY, wrap it in rice paper and pull out the lemon grass middle. Never had these like this before - quite delicious. Sit at the front, overlooking the busy street below and revel in the Vietnamese world going on below. I’ll come again tomorrow! P.s. they do have white wine by the glass (rare in Vietnam). Order the Chilean Chardonnay (not over oaked) and deffo better than the other house white!

title: Amazing food
review:
The restaurant was amazing! Really cute atmosphere and delicious local food with traditional hue meals!

Also our waitress Vi was very friendly and gave us advises about Hoi An!

We enjoyed !

title: Friendly and attentive staff
review: Peaceful lovely environment with air conditioning. Staff were friendly and attentive and explained our food when it arrived. Delicious meal of tasting plate, beef noodle soup and seafood fried rice, all of which were delightful- would recommend

title: Great find, ideal location.
review: Very authentic local cuisine, good value and fresh tasting food. Great location, just off walking street. Really good service and friendly team, especially the young man Khsnh. Recommended.

title: Very special in Hue
review: Very good restaurant in Hue. We ordered shrimp tempura twice, very delicious! Also noodles with seafood was very tasty.

title: Highly recommended!
review: Excellent Vietnamese food, very well priced. Recommended this place by others before we arrived. Vi showed us great hospitality.

title: Unimpressive
review: Food was quite good, although we had better in several restaurants during our stay in Vietnam. Service wasn't great at all.

title: Very Tasty Meal
review: Would highly recommend the Banh Ganh restaurant. Very pleasant upper floor seating area and food was very good. Great service from Aha and Pho

title: Dinner at banh ganh
review: Delicious authentic Vietnamese food, super friendly service and extremely cheap for the quality. Highly recommended!

title: Excellent
review:
Excellent restaurant, the food is fine and the taste is perfect. The team is very attentive to explain how to taste the dishes.
All for about twenty euros, rather hearty

title: Couple visit
review:
Another very good address in Hue. The dishes are delicious and change from the traditional Pho soup. The spices are delicately dosed and the team is very pleasant.
We took a dish of sautéed shrimp and sweet sour pork and a dish of squid savory sauce. Obviously it is more expensive than street restaurants but for 6€ per person we are really not disappointed.
I'd advise you.

title: Lunch and dinner great!
review: I really recommend this restaurant, the dishes are delicious, the service super and fast, the staff very welcoming! We went back for dinner because really satisfied it was excellent!

title: Such a great culinary experience with the best staff!
review: The food was so delicious and the staff helped us with how we should eat traditional Vietnamese food. Quang was such a nice and genuine guy, can't recommend this place enough! Thank you for a great experience!

title: Beautiful typical Vietnamese culinary experience
review: Beautiful setting in an ideal location to observe street life. Staff caring for the client. Various menu and especially Vietnamese dishes. Fine cuisine. Loved the 3 Banh rice. Thanks to Mymy for the impeccable service.

title: Local and cool
review: This place has a great variety of local food and the atmosphere is very chilled. We came for a fast lunch and loved it! Service was very good, special mention to Sy for the nice treatment

title: Excellent restaurant, tasty food and great value
review:
We thought the food at Banh Ganh was the best food we had eaten in Vietnam (in the 8 days we have been there).
Friendly staff, food well presented and very good value.
Really tasty and fresh food.
Highly recommended.

title: High quality Vietnamese food with great staff and lovely setting
review: Delicious local Vietnamese food. We sat upstairs which was nice and open above street level. The staff were very attentive and keen to engage in conversation in order to practice their English. In particular we had an interesting chat with a waitress called Hang who was lovely and very helpful in assisting with our ordering. Would highly recommend.

title: You won’t be disappointed. One of the best in Hue
review: This is a great little restaurant just outside the main hub the serves delicious food and good service for a reasonable price. I have been searching Hue for my favourite spicy Hue style noodle soup and on our last day we found it at this restaurant. We have found that most of the restaurants in Vietnam don’t serve spicy and you have to ask. If you don’t like spicy then most of the menu is just great tasting Vietnamese food. Worth a visit when in Hue.

title: Don’t miss this restaurant
review: What a fantastic restaurant. We have been on hue for the last week and I’ve been searching for spicy hue noodle soup for finally I found and it was great. My wife and I had a great night out with fantastic food. Very enjoyable to restaurants and a great Australian wine , highly recommended.

title: Great specialties from Hue
review: The restaurant is located in the middle of the old town. The neighborhood is very lively, many students create a good atmosphere. On the terrace on the raised ground floor we enjoyed very delicious food. We love the spicy sauces and the tasty curry.

title: Nice dining experience with friends.
review:
Local typical clean, great food with open kitchen on the first floor. The staff is very friendly, they do everything to put you at ease in the choice of dishes. We opted for three à la carte dishes for three people and a set menu dish for four people at 160 Dong each.
portions are satisfactory.

title: Lovely restaurant
review: We were recommended this place by the driver of one of our tours. Such a lovely clean restaurant and the food is amazing and the staff were so nice. Would highly recommend if you want to try good Vietnamese food.

title: Good
review: Good, also as a location, certainly not a super restaurant, but for what it offers at those great prices. We didn't eat much but those few dishes we ordered were good

title: Banh Ganh well worth a visit
review:
Had a great night. Looked after by My My and all the staff very well. Food was excellent and the local beer was a great accompaniment.
Thanks for a great night in Hue!

title: Delicious and friendly
review: We probably wouldn't have gone in at all if we hadn't read the positive reviews. On the ground floor was still empty and a proactive approach would not have drawn me to the restaurant. But then on the first floor (terrace/conservatory) we had got the last table. The food was very delicious, e.g. fancy with lemongrass and chili. And everything, - including the appetizer specialties from Hue - were explained very friendly. We travel on, otherwise we would love to come back!

title: Great food at great value
review:
We have spent the last couple of day’s sightseeing in Hue and have eaten at Banh Ganh on both evenings.
What a delight.
Delicious food and excellent customer service (PHuong was very helpful with menu choices), all at very competitive prices.
I would strongly recommend this restaurant

title: Best food best staff
review: Great place. Exquisite food and service, excellent, in the center of the city, close to the river. The server we had was called mymy, and she was very nice and helpful.

title: Popular with locals and tourists alike
review:
We visited for dinner and sat on the second floor so we could people watch from the large windows upstairs.

The food was delicious and so well priced. Our waiter was friendly and suggested reducing our order as he felt we wouldn’t be able to eat it all…and he was right!

We ordered the local speciality beef soup to share and a main course each with rice , plus a beer and glass of wine and spent around £16 in total which was great!

There were loads of prawns in my stir fry prawns and vegetable stir fry and the pak choi, okra, carrots and cabbage were very tasty in a light spicy sauce.

title: Great treat!
review: Certainly one of the best dinners we had in Hué! Tried a lot of different dishes, everything was well balanced and interesting.

title: Fantastic
review: We had read the wonderful reviews of this restaurant and we were definitely not disappointed. Had an amazing dinner where we tried some local dishes and the staff helped us on how to eat them when we had doubts. Very friendly staff and great atmosphere.

title: Hue Lunch
review:
Great balcony, lunchtime food fantastic and Triang, our waitress, very helpful. Proper taste of Viet Nam.
Would happily return, however, tour continues to Hoi An in the morning.

title: On top!
review: The service was fast and comprehensive. The cuisine was great, we could taste local specialties very well!

title: Super nice restaurant in good location!
review: We were on the 1st floor overlooking walking street. The menu is not very extensive, but the dishes are very tasty. We were extremely friendly welcomed and served by Hang. She speaks good English and said she wanted to know how to speak even better. She is very nice and we had a nice conversation. A top waitress!

title: Outstanding food and service
review: Staff are very welcoming and friendly, they gave us good recommendations and explained how to eat it. Got to taste some local Hue dishes. Highly recommend it

title: Another great venue in Hue, delicious food and the great Hang to serve you 🙂
review: Delicious local curry one chicken on veggie. Great location upstairs to eat and watch people go by. Served by Hang who was very attentive and friendly and wanting to improve her English so if you speak to her she would love to have a conversation with you

title: Fantastic food
review:
Servers were very attentive and informative. The food was fresh and came out in a timely manner.

I had the Bun Bo Hue which is the local dish here. Typically, it’s too salty for me but this was just right! The meat was tendered and flavorful.

My husband got a My Xao which had a nice kick to it but it was an explosion of flavor.

The flan was delicious. It was so soft and not too sweet.

We’ll definitely be back!

title: Not to be missed 💯
review:
We had dinner in this typical Vietnamese restaurant to taste the flavors and tastes of the place.
We had a great time immediately.
Friendly and helpful staff to our needs.
The food then wonderful.
Both meat and fish dishes.
The soup then was the icing on the cake.
Tasty , light, tasty , round on the palate .
Perfect!
Congratulations
Keep it up.
Stra stra recommended

title: Good and authentic food. English spoken
review: Located just off the noisy busy bar streets the upper floor is a good place to find authentic Vietnamese food. Everyone spoke good English so no confusion over choices. Super reasonable prices… the equivalent of £12 for two course and two drinks. What’s not to like! Tasty food too.

title: Yummy 😋
review:
Bok choy with garlic. Yum!
Spring rolls. Yum!
Puffy tofu. Yummy!
S&S pork. So good!
All of it was delicious.

Could have served the drinks a bit quicker. The food came out so fast.

title: Perfect ambience
review: Amazing cozy spot! We tried several signature dishes and spring rolls and loved everything! Great flavors and wonderful staff!

title: The food was delicious with a great vibe
review: This restaurant was amazing with a great vibe and a awesome upstairs area. The food was amazing and we had delicious meals and a great time.

title: Nice restaurant!
review: Small restaurant in the lively neighborhood. Upstairs. Very good, simple, smile, correct prices, nice frame. Nothing wrong. Good address!

title: cute but nothing exciting
review:
nothing special but the banh beo chen are AMAZING!!
very nice location, we ate upstairs, also good and fast service, friendly staff

title: Small terrace upstairs quick service and with a smile
review:
We ate very well with a friendly welcome by mimi!!!
We opted for tasting trays to share with 4!
Try the local dishes with soup and dessert included!
Hosting large tables of more than 8

title: Delicious
review: Went for a very late lunch after exploring the citadel. Had a really delicious banh mi heo and beef noodles. Very large portions and staff very polite. Would return.

title: Good dinner
review:
Nice place in the heart of Hue.
Very nice and helpful staff.
All the dishes tried were very good.
Chosen starters (combo 2 loai) very special for a Western palate but very good. Outstanding fruit.
We were unable to book online and accept credit cards.

Lovely place in the heart of Hue.
Very helpful and friendly staff.
All the dishes we tried were very good.
The appetizers we chose (2 loai combo) were very unusual for a Western palate but very good. The fruit was exceptional.
We couldn't book online and they accept credit cards.

title: Local traditions
review: Restaurant just a stone's throw from the Imperial Citadel in the center of Hue , pedestrian area alive and full of clubs for all tastes . We had dinner in this place from the typical Vietnamese menu and with Hue specialties. Dinner very well, extremely kind staff. Recommended

title: Fantastic food.
review: One of the best meals we had in Vietnam delightful Flavors, great ambiance, wonderful service. our server Phung was great! Also the meals were very reasonably priced.

title: Would highly recommend
review: Great food at a very good price. Service by Phuong was excellent. Would highly recommend. Located right in the heart of the city with loads of good vibes and other places to explore afterwards

title: local food
review: Great restaurant with great food for very little money, can only recommend this 👌🏽

title: Very popular
review:
We used this place on our visit to Hue.on arrival it was
very busy with locals and tourists alike service quick
food very nice and very reasonable in price all in all
a fantastic choice by our guide to eat here

title: Absolutely Superb choice and excellent value for money. This restaurant was recommended by two unrelated tour operators
review: I have been fortunate enough to travel the Far East previously on business but this was up amongst the best in terms of flavour but by far the best in terms of value for money ! I strongly recommend this restaurant to anyone whatsoever your budget ! One final tip follow their recommendations in terms of selection,

title: Add to your list!
review: Excellent food, fast service. We ate here several times as the food was fresh, authentic and several sugar free options. Head waiter very helpful in showing us how to roll up wraps, which herbs and sauce to use. Some favourites - pork skewered on lemongrass, rice flour pancake with shrimp, all the dumplings, beef and vegetable stir fry. You must go!

title: A place to experience the best of Hue
review: Delicious food. Light but filling and healthy.

title: Best flavors ever
review: The best flavors we have experienced in Da Nang or Hue. Sauces are so flavorful especiallytheir special peanut sauce. I will definitely recommend this to family and friends

title: An amazing meal
review:
We went there as it was in the Rough Guide of Vietnam.
The food was amazing, on the head waiters advice we tried the Banh beo and the Banh nam, he kindly showed us how to eat the dishes, using teaspoons and the dipping sauce.
We also tried the pork skewers with the nut dipping sauce and stir fried veg, tofu with noodles.
The restaurant was packed when we arrived at 730pm, mainly with Vietnamese and a few Europeans. The head waiter said that most of the Vietnamese diners ate the Banh nam and Bamh beo.
We really enjoyed the food there.

title: Amazing!
review: Amazing! Was super easy to find using Google Maps. The food offered some of Hue’s delicacies the best part was the server took the time when bringing out each meal to explain how to eat it to enhance the flavors apart from the amazing food the server stood out made this a excelled and informative experience. Recommend to all that are looking for great food whilst in Hue.

title: Incredible food!!!!
review:
We had the set menu where you could try multiple dishes. The food was incredible! The steamed rice bowls and the lemongrass pork were fantastic. We were taken through how to eat each of the dishes which really helped.
The staff are lovely. We will definitely be eating here again!

title: Lunch in Hué
review: We had lunch at this lovely place downtown. The staff was friendly and helpful. Great choice of typical dishes. Gluten-free options available. I recommend it!

title: Casual and great place to stop
review: We really enjoyed the "how to eat a dish" that a waitress showed us when she brought it. Excellent local dishes. To praise the staff. They do not accept credit card

title: Nice food
review:
Very delicious food 🇻🇳
Servants are very friendly and showed us how to eat the food 😊🥗🥦
We got the food very fast and with a smile

title: Vietnamese food
review: Nice place, rich and clean food. Large portions and good price. Local food fully recommended the tasting menu.

title: Vietnamese lunch
review: Casual place great for enjoying Vietnamese cuisine. Wide range of dishes, very friendly staff who also illustrates to guests how to eat some dishes or sauces pairing each dish.

title: Great food and service
review: Great food and service. Food really tasty and fresh. We had the grilled lemongrass pork skewers and Vietnamese fried spring rolls. Great choice, highly recommended. Staff happy to show you how to build your pork skewer wraps.

title: Delicious, helpful and value for money
review:
We ordered two of the individual tasting platters because it offered a great range of food and exceptional value.

Everything was delicious!

Also, as clueless foreigners it was incredible to have the staff show us the way that each dish is supposed to be eaten.

title: Dinner
review: Great Food and Service. They explained how to eat everything. It was a great experience, plus super cheap compared to other places

title: Delicious local Hue cuisine
review: What a fantastic place. Recommended by our earlier local guide on the Imperial Palace tour, Nhien recommended for delicious, authentic Hue food. We had the set menu and some extra specialty dishes including banh khoai (shrimp pancake), banh bed (amazing rice cakes) and steamed shrimp dumplings. The desserts were amazing, too. Staff were very friendly and helpful showing us how to eat some of the dishes. Very inexpensive, would highly recommend.

title: Eating local dishes excellent
review:
Advisor by our duke guide listed in the backpacker guide
I highly recommend this address
The dishes are excellent

title: Okay
review: We ate there after our tour. The food was delicious and it's cheap, however, you don't feel very welcome. The Service was not rude but also not really bothered. No need to know if you want anything else or if it tasted good. In, eat, go. Too bad!

title: Not to be missed!
review: A beautiful discovery by pure chance. The world at the table attracted us. And we did well! We chose the 160,000 dong menu that offers 5-6 local dishes. The boss came to explain how and in what order to eat. Very good!

title: To be tested absolutely!
review: An address recommended by Le routard and what an address! We took the tasting menu, it's the treat! The boss comes to explain the dishes and especially how to taste them. There is even a vegetarian option.

title: Superb local tasting
review: A fast, friendly and efficient Service. A waiter speaks French and comes to present each dish and how to taste it. The tourist menu allows you to taste homemade local specialties at a very affordable price. We really loved it.

title: Best lunch in Hue
review: Amazing food, great service and very helpful tips on best way to eat the food. Best lunch we have had in Hue. Been here twice it is sooo good 😋

title: Local cuisine
review: Absolutely worth trying! I recommend the tasting dish, especially for those who are in Hue’ for the first time! You can try all the local specialties with this dish! (with explanations for how to compose the dishes)

title: Very friendly/helpful excellent service.
review: Very friendly/helpful excellent service. The male proprietor spoke excellent English and showed us how to eat each separate dish on their well-renowned sharing platter - spoon, chopsticks and hand. The food variety and quality was excellent. The platter is priced cheaply at 160k Dong per head. Huda beer is 20k Dong per 330ml can.

title: One of the best Vietnamese dinners on our trip. Obliged.
review: We had recommended a friend who traveled in Hue that we come to dinner here. Magnificent advice, a very popular place where we had an excellent Vietnamese dinner. The waiters helped us with the dishes and, if not, it was the neighbors Lis who helped us and, in passing, invited us to some shots of the rice liquor made by them. A wonderful new Vietnamese experience

title: Very good restaurant to discover the cuisine of Hue
review:
I don't know if we arrived in the middle of a rush or if the restaurant saw its notoriety grow well, but there were people at the entrance, both locals and tourists. That said, the staff handled the influx very well and we were seated in less than 10 minutes and we did not wait to order or receive our dishes.
We came to the restaurant for its menu which allows to taste a good amount of local specialties. The menu repelled us and we were able to test 5 different dishes and all very good.
I can only advise him!

title: Typical Vietnamese dishes
review:
Incroyable! Excellent food, welcome, competitive price.
Nice atmosphere, typical Vietnamese dishes.
We recommend.

title: Great fast lunch, good food.
review: Great for lunch, good food, fast service. We were wanting a good place for a Vietnamese lunch and tried Quan Huan. The service was quick, the food good and we left feeling satisfied to continue on our Hue visit .

title: Very good restaurant
review:
This restaurant is in the lively corner of Hue
Lots of people but it’s big, a little wait to be served
The dishes were very good

title: Our canteen in Hue
review:
Restaurant really very good, very reasonable price and servers at the top.
We've been there three times!
I highly recommend it.

title: Must-see
review:
Recommended by our driver, this restaurant is a pure wonder, both by the welcome and the cuisine.
A tasting menu showing specialties and explained in French. Thank you for this culinary discovery.

title: Recommended
review:
Great Food, great service, good price.
We have been there my wife and I and our 2 kids. We ordered 2 menus and we just had enough to feel comfortable ordering some desserts.
The kids also enjoyed admiring all the collection of super-Heroes of the owner.

title: Good food and service
review:
Not sure what to order so we asked the waiter who recommended several dishes, on the first arrival he showed us how to prepare then eat and so on with rest of the dishes on arrival.
The food was excellent as was the service.
Highly recommended.

title: Delicious Local Classics
review: My husband and I usually steer clear of establishments like these that cater to large tour groups, but we were recommended to give this place a try by our hotel and the Lonely Planet. What a nice surprise! Service was friendly and super fast. The food was actually authentic, instead of being simplified for foreigners. Make sure to taste the "bun thit nuong" (rice vermicelli w/ grilled pork), we came back for it 3 times during our stay in Hue!

title: Excellent lunch/dinner restaurant in Hue!
review: Great food! Fast service and friendly helpful staff speaking french and English. Excellent value! We ate here for dinner last night and came back for lunch to try other dishes on the menu!😄

title: Interesting, to see
review:
Discover this restaurant by reading reviews about our hotel. Crowded restaurant on weekends (when we were there), as many foreigners as Vietnamese.
A discovery menu for 6 euros allows you to taste several specialties. The boss speaks a little French and explains how to taste the different dishes. Interessant

title: Taste discoveries.
review:
Discover Vietnamese specialties from Hue, a delight, varied, tasty...
Very professional service and a description in French, thank you for the excellent welcome.

title: Everything great
review:
Excellent service and great food.
The waiters explained how to eat and advised us in choosing.
We took the full room and left the room largely satisfied.

title: Great food at cheap price
review: Very popular and we can see why. The food was all great and pretty cheap. Would definitely recommend. We had the crispy pancakes, spring rolls, vegetables in garlic. All very nice

title: To taste specialities
review: A very complete menu full of specialties to taste (a menu allows you to taste almost everything!). Everything is tasty. Service efficient and smiling.

title: Great value - delicious fresh food
review: Crispy pancake with shrimp and prawns are divine!! And also come with a big salad - such great value and so tasty! Great 😊 🤗

title: Medium setting but very good cuisine
review: The setting is basic but this restaurant serves tasty local dishes. Efficient service that explains each dish (in French). Good value for money

title: A great canteen
review: This is not a gourmet restaurant, but a place where you can enjoy everyday Vietnamese cuisine for a small fee. And it's okay.

title: Fabulous Hue set menu
review: Great simple set menu with fresh ingredients and flavorful sauces. Attentive staff who are willing to show how to eat the local specialties.

title: Restaurant to try
review: Nice friendly restaurant. We were very well received and waiters who speak English advised us on typical dishes of the region to try. We enjoyed it.

title: Clean and very tasty food
review: Lunch here was a delight, very fresh vegetables, plenty of selection and the kitchen was clean. The service was quick and efficient.

title: Vietnamese cuisine
review: Super delicious Vietnamese cuisine. The guests are mostly locals. The service very attentive and friendly. Thank you again.

title: Morning done right in The Nook Eatery.
review:
Hotel breakfast wasn’t cutting it… so we went looking and found a little winner in The Nook Eatery.

Homemade granola, fresh tropical fruit, creamy yogurt, freshly squeezed orange juice and a seriously good coffee. Clean, fresh, and exactly what you want in this heat.

And the service… our waiter was an absolute joy. Just two days into the job and already smashing it. Friendly, attentive, and genuinely made the whole experience.

title: What a joy
review: Great food, traditional flavour, nice staff

title: Calm oasis!
review: Absolutely amazing! A calm, relaxing resturant out the way of things. Had a delicious burger followed by a fruit bowl. Amazing flavour and great portion. Couldn’t recommend enough!

title: Soggy
review: Had dessert there, so can't comment on the rest of the food, had churros and a waffle with ice cream. The taste was okay, but nothing to write home about, however the crispiness was lacking so was a little disappointed.

title: Delicious breakfast
review: Breakfast at the top, each dish was delicious! From homemade to top! Perfect for breakfast or brunch! Thank you to Anh for his service at the top!

title: A pleasurable nip to The Nook Eatery 💕
review: The service was very prompt and the staff were friendly. The food was exceptional as were the smoothies. We ordered quesadillas and pad thai, both delicious. A very relaxing and PLEASURABLE NIP TO THE NOOK!! HIGHLY RECOMMEND if you're in Hue. 💕

title: We nipped to the 'Nook eatery'
review: Great place off the beaten track...nice and quiet...great chicken pad Thai, chicken quesadillas and smoothies...good staff.

title: Amazing!
review: We ate delicious burgers and avocado and poached egg sandwiches. What's more, the sandwich was prepared for me at 6 p.m., even though the breakfast menu is open until 5 p.m. The service was wonderful, especially the lady named Min. She was incredibly kind, the food arrived very quickly, and I'd go so far as to say it was the best food we've had in Vietnam. It even surpassed European standards.

title: Good place for brunch and lovely staff.
review: Very nice place hidden away off the street. Lovely atmosphere with good food and rapid service. Our waitress Anh was lovely and made nice conversation.

title: Great value for money, excellent food - great choice
review: Excellent food, and the waitress Min was just fabulous! We had a broad range of food from Vietnamese to western food - all great! Thank you

title: A hidden corner of goodness
review: During our trip to Hue we had dinner for two consecutive nights in this cozy and well-kept restaurant, which our hotel suggested. The dishes were prepared with quality ingredients, visually beautiful and offered at a truly honest price. Some recipes were revisited in a modern key, not entirely traditional, but still tasty and interesting. The staff was extremely kind and attentive, helping to make the two evenings very enjoyable. A great choice for those looking for good food, courtesy and a pleasant environment

title: Great interlude from Vietnamese cuisine
review: Quiet place with an offer ranging from brunch to dinner to European breakfast. Great for those who need a break from Vietnamese cuisine. I tasted Pad Thai and I must say very good

title: Highly recommend!!!
review: Such a hidden gem, went back twice (once for lunch and once for dinner) and service was amazing both times. Good range was awesome, with a mix of Vietnamese and western (highly recommend claypot caramel pork). Ambience was also great with fun and cool vibe.

title: A quiet and secluded restaurant ...
review: A quiet place out of time with offbeat decoration. The food is excellent and the staff is super welcoming and very friendly. We recommend you

title: Scrumptious breakfast options
review:
We had breakfast here a few times and it was always scrumptious - we loved the fruit smoothie and muesli bowls as they were fresh and plentiful wirh toppings (yogurt, granola and passionfruit) that were deliciously healthy and nutritious. I tried the egg coffee for the first time and am a convert now!
There are plenty of western style cooked breakfast options if you are needing a change from Vietnamese breakfasts. Staff are great - very friendly and helpful.

title: Great food - Great prices
review: Friendly service with really good food. I got the pad thai and my partner got a burger. They were both very nice. They serve a range of breakfast options too like omelettes which looked good but we didn’t try those.

title: fabulous lunch
review: had lunch upstairs at Nook and it was incredible! ordered multiple drinks, entree, mains and dessert and it was all delicious. table service was brilliant. there were pedestal fans which were fabulous as well. looking forward to lunch at the Nook again tomorrow. we had the ‘tuna melt’ which was just as good as home in melb, Australia. and the ‘bun thit nuong’. smoothies and iced salt coffee were also delicious

title: Cosy restaurant, delicious burgers
review:
Cute and cosy restaurant with a relaxed atmosphere.
Staff friendly and service attentive.
We were crazing burgers and Nook did not disappoint.

title: Excellent food, lovely venue
review: We are here twice which is very unusual for us as we like variety. This place is great because we had one western meal and one local meal. The staff are very friendly and give a good service. We had burgers one day (one meat and one veggie burger) then we had local food the other meal. We enjoyed all 4 meals and they were very reasonably priced. It’s a good location which is away from the Main Street but is well signposted from the road.

title: Great hamburger
review: Colorful place on two floors, in the narrow alleys of Huè. I chose to enjoy their double double Burger. Very good although slightly dry meat. Good fries with paprika. Recommended if you want a break from Vietnamese cuisine.

title: A lovely place to dine.
review: This is the sister/brother waterway to Mingle (my all time favourite). We came here for dinner. The upstairs area is lovely. And the food as good as I expected it to be.

title: Hue has so much more than this
review: I have no idea why this is highly rated. The worst meal we’ve had in Vietnam by a mile. Staff were disorganised and didn’t seem to have a manager so quickly forgot orders and the food was average. Hygiene questionable. Avoid - there are far better options in Hue.

title: Decent food but staff could be more welcoming and friendly.
review: Decent food but staff could be more welcoming and friendly. Arriving at this restaurant we did not get the impression of being welcome.

title: Lovely setting, friendly staff, below par food
review:
Just to start with the positives, the staff we spoke with in Nook were very friendly and welcoming. The setting was also nice, I can see why it is popular on TikTok. The iced coffee and juice were also great. The prices were in line with any trendy and more western focused eatery you may find in Vietnam and were not unreasonable.

When it came to the food however we were both quite disappointed. The breakfast burrito ratios were all wrong in my opinion, there was not enough scrambled egg, the bacon was very sparse and cut into small chunks. It felt predominantly like a spinach and vegetable wrap as the vegetables were all cut quite rustically. I was expecting maybe some kind of Mexican flavours given it was a breakfast burrito, typically you can taste a bit of lime, lemon, cilantro, salt, chilli? It was sadly devoid of any flavour really and that was disappointing. It also unfortunately arrived a bit tepid.

My partner had the poached eggs on avocado toast and she said the same for the avocado, it had no seasoning or at least no seasoning that you could taste, the avocado was perhaps a bit overripe when looking at the colour, and unfortunately the poached eggs were poached hard, not runny.

We did not want to kick up a fuss or complain and just told the friendly waitress it was not to our taste, she did apologise. I am sure if I complained they might have offered to re-make it or refund as it seems a nice establishment but we did not want to do that.

However I thought it would only be right to leave an honest review of the taste and the flavours, there are a lot of positive reviews and TikTok’s which we saw and were why we came but the point of trip advisor is to give your opinion. Maybe we just caught it on a bad day but I just wanted to give my honest feedback on the food, as I can’t fault the staff or the vibe.

title: Good lunch spot in Hue
review:
We went here on arrival in Hue, as it was not far from our hotel, and they offered a wide menu which appealed to us having dietary restrictions.
The place is quite rustic, down a side lane, it was busy for lunch but service was quite efficient. We all enjoyed what we ordered.

title: Moderate Service
review:
Nice place, but very very uninterested staff.
The white wine that was served was 35 degrees, we got up to 3x food that was meant for another table and the waiter preferred to sit on his own phone.

The burgers ordered were okay in itself, but that this restaurant would be number 1 in Hue did not live up to it at all tonight

title: Great relaxed place
review:
Great food with lots of choice. Nice relaxed location after the hustle, bustle and loud music of walking street.
Would avoid the house white wine as very sweet

title: We fell "nook" from you! ❤
review: Exceptional restaurant, everything is excellent at a more than reasonable price in a very nice setting with very welcoming young waiters! We taste it, we come back to it, we end up knowing all the dishes!

title: Sensational in Every Way
review: This was a sensational experience in every way. Turning off a busy road in Hue, you come across a quiet little alley way that is home to Nook Eatery. Its ambience is lovely, the staff welcoming and efficient, and the food is simply fabulous. I highly recommend this place.

title: Good food,
review: A super nice tent in an unexpected place. Perfect for those who want something different from noodles and spring rolls. Friendly staff and friendly staff

title: Excellent cuisine in a relaxing atmosphere
review: Friendly and welcoming local, great non-trivial food with plenty of choice including vegetarian options, very attentive staff. A special thanks to Moon, who guided us in the choices. Highly recommended!

title: Good
review: Restaurant a little 'hidden, environment cared for hearty and good dishes at honest prices. Choice varied friendly staff! Recommended!

title: Lovely breakfast
review: I had such a nice breakfast there: French toast served with a fruit salad and a smoothie! So nice :) The athmosphere is great and the staff very caring.

title: Great choice of menu. CHIP BUTTY 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
review:
Delicious menu, SO much choice! I was totally sold when I saw “Chip butty” iykyk 👀 (can’t take a girl out of Manchester). Staff are very friendly and welcoming, very decent price. We came here twice in our 2 day stay in Hue, I would highly recommend Nooks.

Pics below show an Acai bowl, Chia pudding, Cookie ice blend, veggie Pad Thai, Chip butty.

title: Good food, friendly staff
review: Nice cozy spot with good food. Staff was friendly and accomodated our longer stay as we were using this place as a waiting center until our room was available.

title: Hidden gems in Hue…
review:
Everything exceeded our expectations, amazing food, lovely location and very friendly staff.
Everything we tried was just perfect.
A hidden gem in Hue.
Highly recommended!!

title: Lovely time
review: Had a lovely time at Nook. Very chilled vibe, good music, lovely food and the service from Moon was amazing. It's so good we came here twice!

title: Burger Heaven
review: Great dinner, great spot. We have been eating Vietnamese food for ages and I had their burger and it rivals anything I could get home in Canada. Fantastic meal.

title: Lovely restaurant in Huè
review:
Very nice and lovely restaurant with a terrasse at the 2nd floor.
Simple but good food at very raisonnable price.
Excellent service by Moon.
I recommend

title: Yum!
review: We are staying across the lane way and found this little gem. The food is outstanding, and so are the cocktails. Would definitely recommend if you want all choices to suit all taste and the finest quality food.

title: Well worth a visit!
review: What an amazing place. Tucked away down a little side street, it's well worth your while to find it. Set on two levels, the ambience is calm and most enjoyable. The food is fabulous, I had the Pad Thai with Chicken and my friend had the Thai Coconut Curry. We both shared a starter of delicious vegetables Spring Rolls. The staff were attentive and pleasant. We will definitely be back. Thank you to you all.

title: Tucked away amazing food and service with the biggest smile for Moon
review:
Food and service was so good we returned and they didn’t disappoint another amazing meal with fantastic service. Moon is such a delight and lights up a room with her smile
This restaurant is tucked away so you will need to look for signs to find.
You won’t regret it and say hi too moon for me

title: Great food, quiet location
review:
Tucked away in a quiet alley away just off Walking Street. Had nice lunch and tasty dinner on two separate occasions.
Would definitely come back if I was in Hue. Service by Moon was great.

title: Great vibes!
review: This place is great! The vibe is really nice, the food is delicious - especially the aubergine and lemongrass hotpot. There are also great cocktails. Moon served us and she was very lovely and sweet and was working very hard!

title: Good restaurant for vegetarians
review:
As a vegetarian, I can only review the vegetarian food.

The food is fresh, tasty and the portion are big.

There is a good atmophere in the restaurant.

The service was great.
Moon is very kind and did a great job let the customers feeling welcomed.

title: Nice little restaurant tucked away a bit
review:
Very good restaurant. Though a little off the beaten track there are signs directing you to Nooks.
The menu is arguably quite limited and a fair amount of it is "Western" but there are enough Vietnamese dishes to keep your taste buds tingling.
Nice friendly service.

title: Great dinner amidst great vibes
review: I have to mention that I had a great experience at this restaurant. Such friendly staffs and I specially want to mention about CANDY she is a very lovely girl and she took care about our food and I must say food was also great.

title: Great food !! Will be coming back
review: Such great food and great service - Moon was super lovely and friendly :) would 100% recommend. So much variety on the menu !!

title: Great food and service
review: Excellent service from Moon! Food and drinks were delicious, I recommend the nook burger! We also came here for breakfast and it was brilliant too. Cool, trendy vibe, and good location off the busy streets!

title: Dinner
review: Great food. Thai green curry and pad Thai were lovely. Moon was a sweetie and a great waitress. Very helpful and thoughtful

title: Great food, lovely staff
review: Great place, fab food. The burgers were really tasty. Moon, our waitress was lovely. I would definitely recommend coming here.

title: Nice restaurant
review: The food was really great and our server Moon was so friendly and helpful. Also the restaurant is very pretty! I would recommend.

title: Amazing place with great food
review: This is a lovely place to relax and chill. Staff is extremely friendly. Today we've been served by Moon who is just amazing. The vegan soups and the blended fruit juices come highly recommended. Other meals are great, too. We were just chilling here before taking the night train.

title: Lovely food and frozen margaritas!
review:
A lovely little gem of a place tucked away in a back lane off the main strip.

We had read about Nook before we arrived in Hue so decided to give it a try and it was well worth the effort.

Frozen margaritas and great food served in a lovely, peaceful courtyard.

A great place to eat.

title: Excellent
review: Moon, was wonderful for us, she understood english and served us very kindly. The food was very good, churos worth mentioned. Good espresso also.

title: Lovely place!
review: Lovely place with a funky vibe and look. We had the granola bowl with almond butter and it was incredible. Our waitress Candy was lovely and helpful, service was great! Would definitely come back and would recommend!

title: Good food and service
review: Lovely food, would definitely recommend. Services was great, our waitress Moon was so kind and attentive. Overall great experience.

title: Best Burgers in Hué
review: Something hidden but of course easy to find via sat nav. Excellent burgers with frieze. Toller Service. Very attentive staff. Thank you Moon😉!

title: Great food and coffee
review: My girlfriend and I enjoyed our coconut coffee and avocado toast for breakfast served by our pleasant waitress moon. The food was great and so was the coffee! I recommend coming here.

title: Hidden, calm, delicious food for the weary Aussie traveller
review:
A hidden little treat for two weary Australian travellers not sure what they wanted to eat. Nook was perfect and delicious with a wide variety of Vietnamese and western food. “Moon” was our 5 star staff member and treated us with the best patience and care.

Atmosphere was calm for this lovely couple. Hidden up a small alleyway and stairs with relaxing decor to suit our mood.

An excellent break from our frenetic pace since landing in Hanoi 4 days ago.

Highly recommended, would do again.

title: Nice meeting
review:
Perfect and quiet
The waitress Moon very nice, good advice.
Good cuisine, relaxing setting
Thank you for the good times of exchange

title: Great place to spend some relaxing time
review:
We were recommended Nook as it was virtually next door to our hotel.
The location is quirky and warm, very laid-back.
Cocktails were delicious.
We had a wonderful meal, mixture of traditional Vietnamese (spring roll, salad) and an awesome burger.
Moon our server was so friendly and so accommodating.
You must try Nook Eatery.

title: Excellent
review: My absolute favorite restaurant in Huẽ! It is nicely decorated and a pleasant atmosphere. I was served by "Moon", she is very friendly and accommodating. Can only recommend this place!

title: very good!
review: very good food, both western and vietnamese! Moon served us and was delightful and sweet. everything very reasonably priced. a little difficult to find but just follow the signs!

title: Nice place with good food!
review:
Very nice place with good food and drinks. I was here for dinner but it has great breakfast options as well.
Moon was very nice and helpful!

title: We will come back!
review: Everything was fine. The food was delicious and the staff very accommodating. The waitress "Moon" served us and heeded our extra wishes. We will come back!

title: Breakfast for dinner 😍
review:
The food Is very tasty.
All day breakfast and the service by the nice and kind Moon was very efficient!
Thanks for the perfect dinner!

title: Great restaurant!
review: We loved the rooftop dining area and atmosphere at the Nook! Our server Moon was excellent and the bun bo hue and cheeseburger bomb.

title: Great Breakfast
review: We had a great breakfast (toast with avocado and poached egg and crêpes) with a amazing cup of tea. The Service from Moon was really Nice!! Thank you!

title: Great spot and friendly service!
review: Such a lovely spot, great atmosphere and great service from Moon! She recommended us the best dishes and always with a smile on her face. The food is good, we loved the green curry and the Vietnamese salad.

title: Great dinner
review: The place is nice and nice. The staff is very friendly and our waitress Moon was very helpful in advising and explaining the various dishes. The food is excellent, with plenty of options for vegetarians too! Absolutely recommended.

title: An amazing feed
review: The food here is delicious. The restaurant is in a tiny backstreet and away from the hustle and bustle. Moon provided us with wonderful service. Definitely recommend visiting this restaurant if you are travelling through Hue.

title: Calm place hidden away from the main street
review: We visited this place to have a lunch. The staff (waitress Moon) was super friendly. We ordered Bun Bo Nam Bo and vegetarian yellow curry. Both were delicious. The place was very calm and hidden from the busy street. We strongly recommend this place.

title: Good food and friendly people
review: I eat the vegetarian burger and I was suprised how good it was. Moon the server was realy friendly. I recommend this restaurant! Nice place to sit on the roof.

title: Wonderful spot, fantastic food and service.
review: Such a great quirky spot with amazing food and exceptional service from Moon. The ice lime margaritas were divine and burgers delicious.

title: Best Burger in Huê
review: After a long walk sightseeing the imperial citadel, had e lunch break in this lovely spot. Good burger and great service by Moon! Definitely recommended.

title: A nice, friendly place
review: I ordered Hue noodle soup with vegetables and avocado toast, and for dessert, I tried banana tapioca cake with ice cream. Everything was delicious, the portions were generous, and Moon was incredibly hospitable and attentive. Thank you so much! ☺️🙏Highly recommend!

title: Great breakfast!
review: Excellent breakfast. We feasted on waffles and acai bawls. The setting is splendid and it is really nice to stop and eat in this place. Anh treated us extremely well and was very kind!

title: Great brunch spot!
review: Lovely brunch spot had an amazing iced coffee and yummy pancakes. Service was amazing and Moon was so lovely and helpful.

title: Dream place!
review: The best breakfast I had in whole Vietnam! Lovely place, good prices and soooo soooo friendly staff!! Especially Moon with the great name and beautiful energy! Quantity and quality in food and beverage! I had a salt hue coffee and muffin spinach eggs… oh myyyy…🤤 it was so good that I ordered another coffee (this time coconut coffee) for take away! Too bad I am only for one day in Hue..nice to meet you!

title: Lovely service
review: Really good food and great service from Moon. The place is decorated nicely and the menu has a great range. Would definitely come back to try more dishes.

title: Can recommend
review: Nice food and selection. Lots of Western Food to choose from was a also nice for a change :) Moon was really friendly and Sweet ☺️

title: Amazing food and chill atmosphere
review: Wasn't feeling to great before hand but the Pho and Ginger Tea is great here, and cured me and great service from moon! Chill atmosphere able to read a book and drink Tea while the world goes by

title: Great!
review: Great food! Loved the spring rolls as well! Moon was also great at helping me out and giving me good suggestions. She served me very well!

title: Fab food, service and atmosphere
review: Serviced friendly, attentive and swift; food excellent (best we’ve had so far in Vietnam (after one week) and good vibe

title: Brilliant
review: Delicious food. Me and my friends came here twice during our stay in Hue and absolutely loved it. Lily was a lovely server!

title: Excellent food and service. Highly recommend
review:
Very cool little restaurant down an alley way.
As soon as you enter you are greeted with warm smiles from all the staff members.
The food is incredible too, very tasty, fast service and great value for money.
I had a lovely interaction with one of the staff members, her name was Moon and she took the time to ask where I've been and where I'm going and wished me well on my travels.
Highly recommend this place. Will be back tomorrow to try the breakfast 💪🏻🙏🏻

title: Delicious food
review: Lovely food and the service was great! Lovely atmosphere and very peaceful. Our servers Moon And Cloudy were great and very attentive.

title: Burger et Smoothie Bowl
review: We had a vegetarian burger and a smoothie bowl both excellent. Very nice place and the staff is very kind!!

title: Great service
review: Good food and a great space to have breakfast or lunch. and Moon helped us out very well, definitely would recommend!!!!

title: Very friendly and delicious
review: Moon was great and very friendly. We ate the Vietnamese food and everything was delicious. Would recommend coming here.
Food is great and it has a lovely atmosphere, our server moon was lovely. It has great selection of food, I'd really recommend the beef Pho and ground pork rolls on lemongrass.

title: Pricier than local food but amazing
review:
The food and drinks were amazing - Moon did great service and was a great waiter 😘
Went there three times and keep coming back for more

title: A hidden foodies’s treasure
review: Nook is a special place - a very pretty restaurant with lovely staff who really care about their customers (thank you, Moon ☺️). And of course the food 🤤🤤🤤 - our favorites were the Pad Thai, the Burgers and the Hué Style vegetarian soup… don’t miss out on the waffles 🥰 👑

title: nice atmosphere, huge variety of (even western) foods and friendly staff! :)
review: a huge variety of (even western if you‘re feeling a little homesick hehe) food :) i can very much recommend the avo toast as well as the buddha bowl. the salt coffee, a local speciality, was good as well (bonus for the cute little latte art- face(?) ) ! cute rooftop and very friendly staff; big thanks especially to Moon, you were the sweetest <3

title: Lovely breakfast
review: Very nice breakfast spot. The location is super cute. Moon was the best service we could get! She was very polite and cared good for us :)

title: Nice brunch in the rain
review: Great food and really nice staff moon really was caring for our best experience and well being. Would recommend it for any tourist with a craving of a little western style food

title: Clear recommendation
review: Lovely food filled with good taste and beautifully served. We have now eaten here 2 times - got bowls, sandwich, vege food and beegstew. All super delicious. Moon was the sweetest hostess who made it a great experience

title: Great service and food
review: Great service by Moon, breakfast was good as well and they have coffee with oat milk which is great and the prices are totally fine

title: Nice experience
review: Delicious food, lovely waitress. Her name was Moon and she was very helpful. We sat upstairs where there was a refreshing breeze .

title: Good Food. Good athmosphere. Good service.
review: Really good burgers (we tried double double and vegetaristien) and service by Moon and other staff was excellent. We would be happy to come again.

title: Great food and service
review: Lots of food and drink options. Food is great and so is the staff. Our waitress Lily was very helpful and friendly. Will definitely come back!

title: Delicious dinner ❤️❤️ and fantastic service.
review: We enjoyed two delicious wraps—one vegetarian and one with meat. The waitress, Moon, was incredibly kind and attentive, making our experience even better.

title: Good times
review: Moon was a great server! Very attentive and sweet. Got us everything we needed. Highly recommend. Good time. Good vegetarian options

title: Lovely dinner in peaceful surroundings
review: We had the tacos and cheeseburger and they were fantastic. The tacos came with pork, beef and chicken and each tasted different in a good way! Our waitress Moon was very attentive and even provided me with bug spray!

title: Italian Restaurants in Hue
review: We ate u spaghetthi bolognese and a caesar salad.it was just delicious. A very good service received by Mrs. Ta in a beautiful atmosphere.

title: Unreal pizza
review: One of the best pizzas I ever had, the dough was unreal! Also enjoyed the Chilean wine. We were served by Daniel who was very friend and the service was good quality.

title: Good Italian pizza nice atmosphere
review: We enjoyed our pizza at this restaurant it was really good and the waiter Tam Phuc was our favourite. She was so nice , so cute and talked to us in English with her beautiful smile. Everyone of the staff anyway was very very nice. Highly recommended

title: Experiences to Try
review:
A great experience at Pizz Asia , too , our group went with a very normal mindset and didn 't expect much , but our Staff team here gave us a lot of Surprises from Food to Drink , plus enthusiasm and hospitality.
We found the pizza here to be delicious with its thin and crispy pan , and the salad is also good for its soft and fatty sour taste. Especially you should try the cream here, which is home-made, so the cream is always very greasy and rich in rice, so I highly recommend the rice creamy.
To Pizzas I was advised that the Haft could be Fish with Cheese or Seafood with Cheese and I listened , it was a good decision to follow the person who went before .
Besides, there is the enthusiasm and hospitality of your fellow Staff, to mention Yuen, who was very helpful and photographed to help us even though you were very busy, but listening and supporting us.

title: Italian-style pizza in Hue
review: After 1 week in Vietnam I missed pizza so much and I found this beautiful place: very cozy atmosphere, lovely staff and tasty food ♥️ I'll come back here if I have the chance!

title: 10 out of 10
review: Food was absolutely to die for!! Some interesting & unique options for the pizza and being able to do half & half to try as much as possible was lovely. The pizza base was soft but crispy and each slice maintained structural integrity when being picked up (didn’t flop over). The pasta was cooked to perfection and the sauce was well seasoned and flavourful. The staff were very kind and we received warm attentive service from Daniel and the rest of the team. Couldn’t recommend it more 🫶🏻

title: Loved it, would visit again
review: Great food, lovely servers, loved it would visit this restaurant again. Location was also really accessible and walkable too

title: Great Great
review:
Great Restaurant
Great food
Greta service by Mellin
Everything was perfect. The food and the people were top. Loved it. Top

title: A very nice experience
review: This is a place I would recommend going to! I went there this evening, and although it doesn't look the most appetising from the outside, don't underestimate it. The pizza and spagetti were delicious, the service was exceptionally fast(10 mins for the pizza to come) and a lovely experience overall.

title: The best four cheese pizza!
review: This was hands down the best four cheese pizza I have ever had. I am always seeking the perfect crust with the right blend of cheese. Daniel helped make our experience as special as possible. I would highly recommend this place to anyone.

title: Italy in Vietnam!
review: We loved the food, the ingredients were fresh and tasty, very well prepared. A trip to Italy. ✈️Daniel was fantastic, very professional and friendly. I recommend it😋!

title: Fabulous food and service!
review: The food and service was amazing! Special shoutout to Vy our waitress who went above and beyond! Highly recommend a visit!

title: Great dinner spot
review: We had a great meal here! Daniel was a fabulous waiter always on hand for anything we wanted, food was great I highly recommend visiting if you’re in Hue!

title: Welcoming, relaxed and good food
review: The food was very good and the staff was nice! We enjoyed a delicious carbonara pene and pizza 4 cheeses.

title: PIZZ.A for dinner
review:
A welcome respite from the rain.
Food and drink all good. Very attentive service from Daniel and his colleagues.
Would recommend.

title: Good service great food!
review: We had a great meal here. The staff was super helpful and went the extra mile with all the local food to explain. They are delicious Italian dishes mixed with Vietnamese ingredients. Definitely worth a visit! And Daniel was a really excellent host.

title: Excellent all round
review:
Very attentive service from all staff, in particular, Daniel.
Pizzas were very tasty and a lovely bottle of Cabernet Sauvignon to match.

title: Best pizza in Hue
review: Excellent service especially the daniel boy who served me very well, and what to say about the food, so far the best pizza in Vietnam ‘congrats’

title: A touch of Italy in the heart of Hue
review: Very good pizza and very kind staff! If you come to Hue and want to try a pizza to feel at home stop by this pizzeria!

title: Great experience
review: We shared the family menu for two and it was great. Price is super fair, portions not too big make that all the more in taste away. Each dish was fabulous in taste. Service was at least as good. Can only recommend it

title: Very good service and food
review: The service was excellent and very accommodating! The food very tasty and authentic Italian, therefore a clear recommendation for anyone who visits Hué!

title: Pizza Hue
review: We had a very lovely meal and Tii was a great host and waiter. Thank you so much. Food was great, I would really recommend. HHHHHHHHHHHHHHHJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJ

title: Highly recommended!
review: Excellent food, fast and super friendly service (TA). Anytime again. Attention: always well booked!

title: Amazing pizza
review: Daniel was great and very helpful accommodating me despite the language barrier. I’m from New York so I know good pizza and this one was definitely a thumbs up in my book!

title: We had a wonderful experience
review:
We had a wonderful experience — Quinn made the service exceptional!
We ordered 2 pizzas, both full of flavor and served piping hot.
There’s an impressive range of beverages to choose from soft drinks.
The place feels comfortable and welcoming, always clean and pleasant no matter the weather outside.

title: The service was excellent
review:
The service was excellent, thanks to Quinn.
We ordered one Calang pizza and one Four Cheese pizza — both were wonderful and served hot.
There’s a wide variety of drinks including cocktails, wine, beer, and soft drinks.
The atmosphere is cozy, the environment is clean, and it’s unaffected by the weather.
Parking is available at the hotel and the café.

title: Good food, great atmosphere and incredible staff
review: The food was incredible and the service was great. Both pizza and pasta were delicious, as was the starter. Our server - Quinn - was very helpful and cheerful. The staff really care about giving customers a good 10/10 experience.

title: Pizza
review: Oh my gosh, this place is incredibly cute! The food is delicious, the Service is a bit slow but the waiters are extremely nice, absolutely lovely 🥰. I was served by Ta, who took care of my table with great dedication. 10/10, I will definitely come back to try other dishes.

title: Delicious Italian in Hue
review: We had a hankering for Italian food and found this place on Google - and we are so glad we did! As soon as we arrived we were quickly shown to a table. Our waiter Daniel was so friendly and attentive - the definition of service with a smile! The food was served quickly, hot and was delicious. We had the grilled vegetable pizza, carbonara and fish and chips small plate to share between 2 and it was a hearty and very tasty meal. With a beer and soft drink it came to a grand total of £12 but of the kind of quality the bill would be £40-60 back in the UK. Can recommended for delicious Italian food and great service when in Hue!

title: Authentic Italian
review: We had a fantastic meal at Pizz.a. Felt like we were in Italy! Daniel was an excellent host and served us very well and always with a smile on his face.

title: Amazing food and amazing service!!
review:
This food is amazing!!!!
We got the family deal between two of us and it was perfect.
Quin, our waiter, was so lovely and made sure everything was great.
The food was out quickly and was so fresh.
The Caesar salad and spicy seafood pizza was particularly good.
10/10 - highly recommend

title: Excellent Italian Restaurant
review: The restaurant delicious pizza and potatoes sliced and super well served by Quynh. Do not hesitate to come, it is a pleasant experience to change the taste of Vietnamese food a lot

title: Great pizza in Vietnam!
review: Great pizza! Quinn made sure we had the best service! We had the parmaham pizza and the four cheeses pizza! Thank you!!!!!

title: Pizza
review: Good pizza, nice atmosphere in the restaurant. Very good value, easy to talk with some nice chill music playing in the background, definitely reccommmend

title: Staff are very attentive
review: Food was lovely, staff are very attentive and helpful especially Daniel who was there to open the door for us as soon as we arrived!

title: Great food!
review: My friend and I stopped in for a late lunch everyone was super friendly we got the pizza tung lo mo which was a perfect was to merge vietnamese and italian cuisines together and also tried their new truffle fettuccine! It was amazing, highly recommend bith dishes. Daniel in particular was very nice, will come back when we next stop by Hue!

title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A Heartfelt Italian Dining Experience in Hue
review:
Though I arrived at the very last minute before their final order, Daniel and all the team welcomed me with genuine warmth and kindness. Their hospitality turned my stay in Hue into a truly wonderful and unforgettable memory.

Their signature pizza and Seafood Aglio Olio pasta were absolutely delightful — a creative harmony of multiple flavors beautifully assembled on one plate. Each ingredient, from the fresh octopus to the perfectly baked and brothed shrimp, played its role in creating a balanced and satisfying dish.

The Huda beer and glass of wine Daniel personally paired for me were the perfect companions, enhancing every bite and lifting my appetite even more.

I’ll never miss this place on my next visit.
Highly, highly recommended!!

title: Saturday night
review: Daniel is a good host and very forthcoming, food came quickly (although the restaurant was packed) and was very delicious! Would come again

title: Pizza outside Vietnamese food
review: Good pizza to eat every day from Vietnamese cuisine. Prices somewhat more expensive than local food, but being from Spain is still accessible and cheap.

title: Would definitely come back!
review: The pizza Margherita and vegetarian spaghetti were very delicious. Daniel was very accommodating from the beginning and we felt comfortable here.

title: Fantastic
review: Delicious food, good wine and amazing service. Van and Huy were extremely hospitable and friendly. Would reccomend highly

title: Very nice personel and good food
review: Daniel was a very kind server and he made the expercience very good. The food was delicious. We had 2 premium pizza's and the banana icecream. We recommend this place for a more luxorious place in town.

title: Food
review: Quinn served very well, and the food very great pizza very good. I will come back again. We would recommend the restaurant anytime!

title: Thank you Quinn for this delicious meal!
review: Excellent food! And an exceptional treatment by Quinn, who attended us first moment super well and attentive all the time! Yesterday we came and today we came back! Thanks for everything.

title: Perfect
review: Great food and atmosphere! Bonus: the choice of music is a bonus! Daniel was very welcoming and helpful, we enjoyed his service!

title: Amazing
review: Quynh my waitress was really kind and attentive and on point with everything couldn’t ask for a better service probably the best I’ve had in hue and the food was really fresh and good highly recommend

title: Amazing restaurant
review:
The service is above and beyond especially with Daniel who he took care of us like we are visiting his house. Thank you.
Regarding the food I can say without doubt that this restaurant has the most fresh food that I had here in Hue.

title: A lovely meal in Hue
review: Lovely pizza, Daniel accommodated us despite it being a busy night in Hue. Service was exceptional, food was delicious and a complimentary seasonal treat really topped off our experience. Would recommend a visit here on your visit to Hue.

title: Italian restaurant to disconnect from Vietnamese food
review: A perfect Italian restaurant to combine with traditional Vietnamese food, full of rice and vegetables. Service of 10, very fast and great attention from Daniel and the rest of the staff. We repeat twice during our stay in Hue

title: Daniel the waiter for the win!
review:
Good pizza, great atmosphere! Really nice waiter!

Great option if you need a break from Vietnamese food! Price is a little more expensive than rest of town. But still very affordable

title: Family dinner in hue
review: We had a lovely dinner. Thanks to Win our server. The pasta and pizza were great. The restaurant staff are very attentive.

title: Good Pizza & good ambiente
review: Very good pizza and good Mood:) our waitress Ta was super friendly. We would come back anytime!!!!

title: Super great pizza and pasta!
review:
Very nice restaurant. Good ambiance and delicious food. Great service from TA as well!
We love our food. We had pizza and pasta!

title: Great food, great service, great vibes
review: The beautiful Thao served us here and it was genuinely a delicious meal with a great atmosphere. We were at the point in our trip where we were missing some Italian flavours and this suited us perfectly. Great service, great food, clean and modern atmosphere, and a very decent price. We paid 650.000 VND, for a pizza, pasta, salad, side and dessert. All of which met or exceeded expectations. The restaurant hosts 3 gas pizza ovens and (based on our experience) is very “Instagramable” lots of people taking photos!

title: Great Pizza!
review: Great Pizza and really Good service. The greek salat was really delicous. Tu was a great waitress. Would recommend it!!

title: Highly recommend
review: I am very satisfied with the Restaurant Service! The employee Thao was extremely considerate, friendly and attentive. The pizza is delicious and the atmosphere very welcoming. I will definitely return

title: Great italian restaurant
review: Real italian food, decent prices and great service. I ordered an pizza and a pre dish. The pizza was freshly made in the oven

title: Absolutely fantastic
review: Genuinely one of the best pizzas I’ve ever had and service couldn’t have been any better, 100% recommend and will be back

title: Pizza
review: We had a wonderful experience here.The staff were very friendly, especially Thao who was so kind and attentive. The pizza was absolutely delicious , one of the best I’ve had. Highly recommend this place!

title: Fantastico! 👌
review: We spontaneously decided to go out for Italian food. With the Pizz.a restaurant we made a good choice. The staff was friendly, the atmosphere pleasant and the food great. Thao served us very warmly and friendly, thank you very much. Perfetto e era buono, as they say in Italian.

title: Great pizza
review: Nice clean restaurant. Really nice pizza and Pasta . Would recommend to anyone visiting Hue walking street. Friendly staff and relaxing atmosphere.

title: Pizza
review: Lovely place, perfect for a date. Prices are reasonable. Honestly the best pizza I’ve tried in Hue. Special thanks to Thao – she’s sweet and very attentive

title: Daniel is the sunshine
review: Very good pizza, very good atmosphere, very good staff..., Daniele is the sunshine of this place! Great! Strongly recommended!

title: Good pizza and good staff!!
review: We have come to have dinner and have a relax time with friends. There was a good pizza (the margarita was great) and good staff. Thanks to Daniel!!

title: Pizza lunch
review: The restaurant is super nice and nicely decorated. The food is very tasty and fine. There is also a lot of choice: pizza, pasta, meat. Thao was super friendly!

title: Amazing Experience! ✨
review:
We tried a bit of everything: the meat, pasta, carbonara, pizza, burrata, and ice cream… everything was simply delicious! 😍
The staff was incredibly kind and attentive from start to finish. And we can say this as Italians, who know good food.

A special mention to Daniel, our waiter, who was truly excellent: friendly, helpful, and very professional. 👏

Highly recommended!

title: He's in!
review:
We Italians know, we miss home food. Sometimes, while abroad, we give in to the temptation of a pizza, just to fill a gap, but most of the time it is a terrible mistake.
Well, not this time. The pizza is satisfactory, ingredients good flavors right. Service is very friendly and Daniel is very kind.
I would tell you to stay on Margherita and Salame Milano.
If you happen to not resist anymore, this is the place!

title: Varm anbefaling
review:
Very nice food! Danial was our waiter, and he did a really good job making us feel very welcome!

I warmly recommend the place.

title: For an evening feel in Italy at the table
review: Nice restaurant on the second floor of a building in the middle of Hue's nightlife. For one evening, a great alternative to Vietnamese specialties. Pizza and spaghetti very good. Thao's Service, attentive and kind, made our evening at Pizza really enjoyable. We recommend it!

title: Discreet pizza to be in Vietnam
review: We had dinner with daisy square here to break with Vietnamese food. The dough is digestible (I write a few days later), the cheese is stringy but not too much. The tomato maybe a little too sweet (also in other pizzerias it was so). Excellent gin and tonic for 3 euros

title: Really good italian restaurant in Hue
review: Really really good italian restaurant in Hue and excelent attention. I had carbonara spaguetti and it was like in Italy.

title: Great pizza!
review: I had the Tung Lo Mo pizza which was amazing and a great fusion of Italian and Vietnamese cuisines. Great service and lovely venue. Would love to come back!

title: Good pizza in Vietnam
review: Considering that we are in Vietnam the pizza is really good, with all the characteristics of an Italian pizza. We also tried a ‘fusion’ pizza with typical flavors of Vietnamese cuisine based on pizza margherita. There are also pasta dishes and Vietnamese dishes but we haven't tasted them.

title: Maravilloso
review: Huong was very friendly and professional and the food with lots of flavor and lots of quality products... a highly recommended experience in Hue

title: To visit absolutely
review:
Superb restaurant
Delicious Caesar Salad
Carbonara better than in Italy
Amazing pizza
Service top
A must-have
We took a family menu which is a great deal

title: Never again!
review:
That was nothing, very poor Service ! Two meals were missing and were forgotten or taken to other tables . The ladies of Service are completely overwhelmed and have no overview . You worked more as photographers for other tables!
The food was mediocre , the salad bad!

title: Extremely tasty and high quality
review: Very tasty and high quality food. Caesar salad was excellent and so was the new salami pizza. Even the tomato sauce tastes fresh and home made. Pasta’s looked excellent too. Highly reccommend when seeking a change from the delicious Vietnamese Food or just when you fancy Italian.

title: West in the East
review: The food and the atmosphere was great. Thao, who was our waitress, did an amazing job. Definitely a keeper! One fab discovery in Hue.

title: Best taste experience in years
review: Most delicious food. Pizza, pasta with fine, exquisit taste. This was the best taste in Vietnam for us. Our favorite: the mushroom pizza, de pasta with razor clams and the pasta carbonara. The desert: pina colada ice cream was amazing. A full taste experience. The cruchy caramel and dried pineapple on topping , gave the perfect bite and taste explosion

title: Yummy food
review: The spaghetti bolognese was amazing, the restaurant felt like a little slice of home. The staff is super nice and also attentive. I will definitely be eating here again while on vacation in Hue!

title: Great pizza in good central location
review: Delicious pizza in a great central location - staff were helpful and service was quick. Very effective air con which is a definite plus !

title: Great Everything
review:
We've had a Great experience here.
The food we ordered impresed us very much, but the staff's attention was the best we had since we're on Vietnam.

title: Great pizza far from Italy
review: All very good, even the Service and atmosphere very pleasant. Very friendly staff, fresh and young environment. congratulations

title: Delicious food!
review: Super friendly service. Nice case. We have eaten the pasta carbonara and the grilled duck, it is definitely worth its money and highly recommended! Also the Long Island Iced Tea is the best we have had so far.

title: Nice discovery!
review: Great food at a great price in a lovely location. The carbonara was out of this world. Staff is super friendly and open to customer feedback. I definitely recommend this place!

title: Diner Pizzá
review: Very nice location in the heart of Hué where you can enjoy a nice Italian dinner. Very good and friendly service from Tri.

title: A nice Italian restaurant in Center of Hue
review: We are a family of 4 and went to PizzA on a Saturday night. The kids tried the new Pizza’s with salami and chorizo and another with Parma ham. They were really big and tasteful. We went for the pasta’s with seafood and another with mushrooms and truffle. The ice cream dessert was very special and nice. The staff is very friendly. A real gem in the center of Hue.

title: Definitely worth a visit
review: Really delicious food. We tried their truffle paste from their new menu, and woow it was good. The pizza was also very good. All in all delicious food at a cheap price!

title: Tasty!
review: Super nice place on 2nd floor apart from the bustle of the city. Delicious food: fresh pizza, fries, nice wine and neat service. Nice place to be, out of the heat. En even wat anders qua eten.

title: Nice dinner in Hue
review: What a lovely place! Delicious Italian pizzas in Hue. We had some great ice cream, even ice cream with sweet potatoes. Definitely recommended!

title: Italian Dinner in Hue
review: Really good Italian food! Amazing pizza and the staff were lovely and attentive. Highly recommend for western/ Italian food in Hue

title: Dinner in Hue
review: very good italian food, spaghetti bolognese was very authentic and delicious. fried garlic chicken was also a highlight

title: The pizza and pasta (vegetarian) were amazing! They gifted us with a dessert that was the cherry on top!!
