review: I came here with my friend to have a nice dinner and we were amazed by the food and its people. Everything was delicious and the waiters very nice and kind. Highly recommend it!

title: The food was delicious and the staff couldn’t be nicer. I higly recommend it
review: The pizza we asked for very nice and the staff (the waitress, specially Tri) were very nice. I’ll come back with not doubt

title: Fantastic.
review: Well-kept place, great reception very good food, super salads and ice cream is great to try! Excellent selection of wines from all over the world.

title: A very nice alternative if you no longer feel like eating Asian food permanently in Hue !
review:
Delicious pizza from the stone oven ! A very nice restaurant!
Very nice staff!
Clean. accommodating. Leckere Pizza !

title: Delicious pizza!
review:
Here you can eat a very delicious pizza! Especially if you don't feel like eating Vietnamese food :D
Very nice staff!

title: Authentic italian Pizza
review: Good authentic italian Pizza and very friendly Staff. We also good purple sweet potato ice cream for dessert which was also delicious! We Loved this place for a good Dinner!

title: 5* Aubergine Pizza !!!
review: We really enjoyed our pizza, would highly recommend when in Hue, Great value for money, service was great and the e manager was a smashing guy. We would return again happily .

title: Delicious and different Pizza restaurant 👍
review: Great pizza restaurant. Very modern furnished, cute staff and a smaller but exciting pizza and pasta menu card. We finally got a purple ice cream made of sweet potatoes. Different but super delicious! Worth a visit.

title: Yummy food
review: Very tasty food! Lovely staff. Pleasant vibe. I recommend the greek salad with burrata. Would definitely come here again

title: A lovely dinner, would go again!
review: This was a delectable dinner. I had a Margherita pizza and a Mojito. Both were lovely and deliciously fresh. Lovely staff and very quick service. Would recommend to anyone wanting good Italian food in Hue!!

title: An air of Italy in Vietnam
review: Very good restaurant we were 9 people, on the menu lasagna, pizzas, Milanese cutlets but also excellent Vietnamese dishes. I recommend Suzette pancakes for dessert. Everyone was delighted.

title: Impeccable pizza and customer service
review: The service and the pizza at Pizz.Á are amazing. We came in at 9:30, fully expecting to only have 30 minutes to finish our meal before the restaurant closed. But to our surprise, Mr. Tri, the customer relation manager, reassured us that we could stay as long as we like to enjoy the food. ‘It’s important to us that every guest who came here got the best experience and meal they deserve, even if they came in right before the closing’ he said. And honestly, after a long day touring Hue, hearing that was such a nice thing to hear. Oh and the margarita pizzas we ordered. It was so good that we came back for another one. It’s such a pleasant experience and definitely a highlight of our short 2-day trip in Hue. Highly recommended

title: Delicious Pizza and great service!
review: Straight from the start you could tell the service was top level, the staff were extremely attentive and the restaurant was very well presented and clean. I had the Tung Lò Mò Pizza and it was absolutely delicious!

title: Amazing
review:
Had a lovely dinner here !
Myself and my partner both tried the pepperoni pizza - we loved that we got told where the pepperoni was sourced, it gave such a nice story to the meal.
We also tried the rice ice cream and it was amazing.

So delicious I was have way through the pizza before I remembered to take a picture

title: Great taste of food with super friendly staff
review: First of all, super friendly service from the staff and the very nice guest relation guy, with good advise and suggestions. And second, but as important of all, great taste of food. Salad, pizza and the special ice Cream we good taste. First time in Hué and did not expected this here. You deserve it Guys….

title: Tasty pizza
review: We had a very nice pizza here, the service was very friendly and it is very clean. Location is right in the center so is easily accessible

title: Delicious pizza and fabulous service!
review: We had both margarita and the Tung Lo pizza - both delicious. Such friendly and attentive staff also. Definitely recommend 😀

title: Excellent Italian style restaurant with a few surprises.
review:
What an excellent dining experience. Loved the mushroom pizza and an amazing Greek salad.
A true gem of a restaurant.
Lovely vibe and everyone is full of energy.

title: Genial
review:
We tried a couple of pizzas and ice cream. We loved everything.
The waiters' treatment, impeccable. Very attentive and polite. The place also very clean and nice

title: A lovely evening meal with a friend
review: We were staying at a nearby hotel here in Hue and saw this restaurant highly recommended and well reviewed. After a busy day travelling my friend and I shared a pizza and also had the carbonara and spaghetti bolognaise- both dishes were lovely. Would highly recommend for a nice italian in Hue. Lovely service.

title: Excellent
review: Absolutely lovely food. Really great service, very friendly and helpful. Spoke very good English. Would definitely recommend.

title: Baked pizzas
review: It's been a pleasure to have dinner, leaving a little Vietnamese food. The place is very nice and relaxing, from the first moment you enter they attend you with a smile, letting you choose place and being attentive at all times. Both my partner and I have tried some pizzas that make you pastry and baked pizza. Pizzas really good and highly recommended. You can see the affection they put!!

title: A very rich experience
review:
We wanted to get out of the ordinary here in Vietnam and saw by TripAdvisor this restaurant. We had seen good reviews, but there is nothing better than trying it for yourself. The treatment was exceptional from minute 1 they open the door and are very attentive. About the pizzas, they were delicious, we were curious to see how they would be and I was pleasantly surprised.
Without a doubt, if you want to leave the typical Vietnamese, stop by!

title: Fantastic experience
review: Had our light dinner today at pizza restaurant..we had an amazing time with Tri..thank you so much. We ordered fish and chips and fried chicken, the waiter and the chef give us an ice cream ( sweet potatoes)...which is very very nice. The waiter Tri is very helpful, speak english....and friendly.

title: Delicious pizza!
review: Amazing neopolitan pizza in a city with amazing food! The staff were so friendly and helpful. The restaurant is really beautiful!

title: Friendly staff and tasty pizza
review: We ordered a Margarita and Vegetariana Pizza. We dined around 8 pm, it wasn’t too busy and pizza came in reasonable time. You can watch the chefs make them! Pizza was very thin, and tasted really good. Would recommend. Staff was very friendly

title: Delicious!
review: Beautiful atmosphere, delicious Italian style food and friendly staff. I recommend this restaurant to any families traveling in the area who need respite from Vietnamese cuisine.

title: Nice and quiet and good food!
review: Good stone oven pizza, delicious beer and really sweet and attentive servants. The Greek salad with Burrata tasted super. Good red wine too.

title: Emma
review: Amazing food, amazing service and great value for money! They were also very accommodating when changing items on the menu, I would definitely recommend!

title: Friendly, good service and great pizza
review: A comfortable and modern Italian restaurant with a relaxing atmosphere. Friendly, attentive service and great pizza.

title: Vietnamese italian restaurant
review: Very nice and cosy place for dinner. Vietnamese pizza was so good ! Great staff and a special mention to Quynh best waitress !

title: Excellent
review: Good amount of food very well waiters very attentive and local clean and welcoming Tuan the waiter who attended us very friendly and attentive.

title: Best pizza
review: The restuarant is on the walking street of Hue so it was easy to get there. The pizza was incredible. We loved the food there so much the staff was sweet and helpful. The chef walked to greet us at our table that was so lovely. Definitely go back there when we visit Hue again.

title: Perfect way to treat yourself after a long day!
review:
Spacious, quiet, clean restaurant/pizzeria on the upper floor of a building on a street that's mostly pedestrian in the evening.
The waitresses and waiters are extremely nice, going above and beyond to make sure you have everything you need.
The food itself... *sigh. I ate here twice in three days. Pizza Margherita first, delicious dough, fresh and tasty ingredients. Then pasta the second time, the vegetable lover spaghetti: the mixed vegetable sauce brought me straight to summer back in Italy, all the flavours were there and just right.
Also appreciated the potato wedges or French fries, as the menu says, and the complimentary (thank you!) miso ice-cream was interesting with that spicy mix on top, and itself fresh and good and a nice texture.
Were I staying longer in Hue, I'd likely return a third time!

title: Fantastic Vietnamese fusion pizza in Hue!!
review: Everything is made in house from scratch…sauces, dough, even the hot chili oil. Highly recommend trying their Hue specialty (mackerel), with their hot chili oil. Also very much enjoyed the Greek salad (Vietnamese burrata was very excellent!!) and four cheese pizza with honey. We will be back 🙌

title: A must-see restaurant in Hue
review:
Excellent revitalizer. The staff at the top. A very nice setting. Pizza and spaghetti very good. I highly recommend.
A real treat.

title: Great Pizza
review: This a very nice restaurant. We ordered Pizza and Ceasar salat. All were great! Friendly staff. Dining in a nice atmosphere.

title: Best italian restaurant in Hue
review: A very nice restaurant with really good pizza's and a delicious desert. Nice ambiance and very friendly staff. The pizza's are really good prepared.

title: Very pleasant
review: Delicious food and great service. Would definitely recommend! We had a great experience here and would absolutely go again!

title: Go there with your eyes closed
review: I highly recommend this restaurant with very good pizza 🍕🍕 4 very nice waiter cheese listening to customers with proposals

title: Good alcoholic drinks and western style pizza
review: Great pizza, nice mix of western and Vietnamese. Nicely made alcoholic drinks, lots of gin in them. Great service, very quick

title: Pizza in Hue
review:
The pizzas were a great adaptation of italian food with vietnamese ingredients, delicious!
The waiters are also very welcoming and the service was perfect.

title: Very pleasant and a nice break from Vietnamese food.
review: Excellent pizza with lovely thin base . My husband and I visited on a rainy night and staff very welcoming. We also shared a bottle of red wine which was very nice and competitively priced though the staff did struggle to open it with a corkscrew 🤭. A very nice evening.

title: Excellent pizza friendly staff
review: We had a tasty dinner here. The staff are so welcoming and attentive. We had delicious food. Tasty Caesar Salad and excellent chips with sauce. Really served hot too. The vegetable pizza , plenty of vegetables and cheese, well seasoned. The pizza calang was really full of flavour too! Definitely recommend a visit!

title: 10/10 great food - great price
review: Fantastic food and even better staff. Such a welcoming experience and we will come back again! We will be coming back again.

title: Give it a go!
review: Lovely staff. Good food. Quick service. Can thoroughly recommend. We were a large group and everyone enjoyed their food.

title: Great service, delicious food.
review: Food was very fresh and tasted delicious - can recommend the pizza and fries. Staff were so friendly and attentive - must give Auong a special mention . Would definitely recommend.

title: Pizza in Hue 👍🏻👍🏻
review: Very nice place... Huong is a really sweet waitress and available to advise you all Vietnamese cuisine dishes... for all Italians passing by Hue I highly recommend it!

title: Great pizza
review: The pizza was very delicious, I enjoyed the wine as well, the staff is super courteous and kind, would definitely come back!

title: Very good pizza
review: Very good pizza if you are tired of Vietnamese food and want a break. Good fresh French fries. Super nice people and good service.

title: Worth a visit.
review: Lovely quiet restaurant out of the bustle of the traffic. Pizza with a Vietnamese twist. Lovely flavours of food and friendly service. The ice cream is a must try.

title: Great Pizza in Hue
review: Great atmosphere in this central location attached to the Rosaleen Hotel which was also a perfect experience. The pizza was tremendous. Unique Cesar salad and the service was perfect!

title: Pizz.A, Hue
review: Great service amazing pizza. Really nice surroundings and atmosphere. Really good value for money. Would definitely come back to this place again. Oh did I forget to mention the nice and friendly waiters. If there was one thing to comment on it would be the IGers. (People who take photos for instagram or any other) but overall amazing. As a family and individual it was brilliant. My 10 year old daughter thought it was the best pizza place she had ever been to.

title: Our best comfort place to go eat in Hue
review: One of the best restaurant in Vietnam. The food was spectacular, especially the spaghetti. Pizza was also really good, we tried the Vietnam toppings it was a new and awesome experience for us. We were there 5 days and had 2 meals there already. Service was awesome, staff speaks good english.

title: Delicious and new type of experience
review: Food are delicious and creative. I would call it fusion rather than pizza pizza cause it’s new type of fusion that mixed with Hue’s popular ingredients or dishes. Highly recommended to go.

title: Delicious food
review: Very delicious menus in affordable prices. We had pizza, fish and chips, and bolognese pasta, which were lovely. Would love to try the other menus too!

title: A go to spot for pizza and pasta
review: Exceptional and friendly service. Ordered the 4 mushroom pizza and pasta with veggies marinara. I thought I was going to take some to go, but I ended up eating everything. Fresh and delicious. I highly recommend this place.

title: Excellent address
review: Very very good lunch in an impeccable restaurant run by lovely people. I hope to go back 💖

title: Dinner
review:
Wow. What a great little restaurant.
Accommodated our group 10 people over 2 tables without any issues.
Great range of food and vegetarian options.
Great prices, cold beer, quick service, we went back there again for dinner very nice.

title: Lovely local restaurant
review:
Stayed two nights in Hue (March 2026) and ate here both evenings.

The restaurant is tucked down a side street, although a sign at the side street entrance helps you easily find it.

Food is freshly cooked and very tasty - Korean fried chicken and grilled prawns were really good. It is great value food that is well prepared and presented. Staff are very warm and friendly too.

Well worth a visit.

title: Não perca em sua visita a Hue
review: Very good food. Very good service. Fair price and excelent location. Good música

title: The best food in Hue
review: It was more than we expected! Great service, pleasent and smily stuff, excellent food. Highly highly recommended

title: Fabulous meal at hidden laneway gem
review: Found this wonderful small cozy restaurant down a laneway in Hue. Food was amazing, so fresh and tasty, authentic and a very extensive menu on offer. Staff were really lovely and helpful, we cant wait to return.

title: Excellent
review: The meal was delicious the fresh Spring Roll vegetables were fantastic and the sauce was a treat. We also ate a vegetable salad which was excellent. People next to us ate the rice popping which was delicious too.

title: Highly recommended
review: Amazing food and great staff. We even got pannacotta for desert as a gift. Highly recommended!

title: Fabulous.
review: Place that does not look fabulous from the outside, but, Impeccable service. Very tasty dishes. Very pleasant atmosphere. I highly recommend you will not be disappointed. Vietnamese food is excellent. Thanks to the staff.

title: Delicious fresh food at great prices
review: Just the most delicious fresh food, great produce at amazing prices. Clean, comfortable environment and great service. Thank you

title: Hidden Gem!
review: Very friendly and great service. We had the pork spring rolls and Bun Bo Hue. Best food we’ve had in our almost 2 weeks in Vietnam and all the food we’ve had so far has been good. My wife also had lemon, ginger and lemongrass tea. It was all natural and delicious. Highly recommend!

title: Good address
review: Good address to Hue, too bad we discovered it for our last night in the city. Very reasonable prices, nice service. Special mention for the burger, size proportional to the price but very good!

title: Older couple but well traveled
review:
We were a little daunted walking down a poorly lit back alleyway but it was well worth it.
Excellent food, very friendly staff and a great menu, we were a little older than most of the other customers but all were seemingly enjoying their food and the atmosphere.
A good down to earth cafe / restaurant with great food and extremely well priced.
Will be returning.

title: Don't be discouraged by the location, great food and good service
review: If there had not been reviews on trip adviser , I would not have even seen .The restaurant is at the end of a dark alley and the decor is essential; the food however is delicious, a harmony of flavors that leaves you satisfied from the first to the last bite ; we took a single dish that left us very satisfied ; the service was fast, we were provided with forks without having to ask, they even offered a small dessert at the end of the meal ... and the bill was a surprise ... you spent less than 500vfd in 4 adults.

title: It surprised us
review:
The kitchen is the real strength: excellent, tasty and carefully made dishes, generous portions and quality ingredients. Each course has that authentic flavor that makes you understand that here we care about substance, not appearance. You eat with taste and satisfaction, as in places that know their craft well.
The service is friendly and genuine, without unnecessary formalities, and helps to create a relaxed and familiar atmosphere.
If you're looking for a fancy restaurant, maybe it's not the right place, but if you're looking for good food, honest prices and cuisine that doesn't disappoint, Cozi is a good choice. A simple place where you come out happy... and with a full stomach.

title: My best pho so far
review: The restaurant was. Recommended by some new, friends, and it didn't disappoint. I had the beef pho, which was amazing, and they also offered me a little dessert which was divine. The service is quick and attentive, the atmosphere is chilled and warm. I wish I stayed longer in Hue so I could come back.

title: Cozy Restaurant is a perfect spot to enjoy a tasty meal and relax in a peaceful corner of Hue..
review: Tucked down an alley off a busy street in Hue, you will find an oasis. The darling restaurant is indeed cozy. The friendly staff answered questions about the various dishes. They served us delicious local favorites that featured fresh ingredients. Our meal was topped off with yummy flan. We highly recommend Cozy Restaurant.

title: Local food
review: Really excellent food and service. The price was very good. The staff very helpful and friendly.
Fantastic little restaurant down an alley so keep an eye out for the sign on the main footpath. Wonderful food, the 2 young ladies were both lovely hosts. Very much recommend.

title: Fusionfood Asia Europe for finger licking
review: Great fussionsfood that brings you close to Asian cuisine but takes into consideration the European palate!! Coriander is hardly used. Fresh and delicious! Say no chili, makes it more digestible and if necessary you order it extra to season. Very friendly boss and staff!! Been there several times, no stomach/intestinal problems! So nothing like the dark little alley!!

title: Our favourite meal so far
review: Our best meal to date in Vietnam. Amazing clean tasty dishes, great service and great price. The pork skewers are so good I've been googling the recipe all evening so I can re create back home.

title: Must-see
review:
Lost in a small street, this restaurant is authentic.
Welcoming, the staff is charming and the service is fast. We all loved our food!

title: Great discovery great Cozy
review:
12 typical dishes one better than the other! Super fast service!!
We ate in 6 with 950 vnd.... About 35€!! A spectacle
Ps don't let me be intimidated by the narrow vehicle!! They are top!! Super nice....

title: Well worth the visit. Can be recommended.
review: Very good food, can recommend eating here, although the smug in was dark and scary, it was worth the visit. The caramel pudding at the end was the dot over the i’en 🙂

title: Small restaurant on the back street but incredibly good food and friendly staff.
review: A small place on a narrow back street, looks almost a bit weird but inside the restaurant itself it is super nice. Clean and tidy and nice staff and incredibly good food. We were 5 people who ate different dishes and everyone was satisfied.

title: Excellent Vietnamese food at a good price
review:
Excellent typical Vietnamese food.
We loved chicken and veal noddles.
More than reasonable price for the quality they offer.
It is quite close to the historic center.

title: COZY and DELICIOUS.
review: Well deserved TripAdvisor Choice winner. Like the name implies the restaurant is quite cosy with no fuss vibes. Our group of 6 were seated straight away with menu that are in English. The staff were super friendly and helpful. The food was absolutely delicious. The staff are happy to show you how to eat some of the meals properly as well. They also gave us caramel pudding as complementary which was a surprise and very lovely of the restaurant. Highly recommend if you are in Hue and want a friendly, cosy, great service with delicious food restaurant.

title: great service and great food
review: The best meal I've had in Vietnam yet. Nodle bowl with pork, salad, peanut and sauce. 😋 The service was very friendly too.

title: Small, welcoming, authentic, well priced family restaurant in Hue
review: Small, clean, authentic, friendly and well priced. A welcome break from the craziness of walking street and worth the walk. Tucked away, family run, tasty food. What’s not to love? Crème caramel was a great finishing touch. Thanks Hang!

title: Super price quality ratio
review: We had a great meal here together for a very reasonable price. It was also very clean and the service was super friendly.

title: This is a must visit Resturant if you are anywhere near. The food is simply delicious! Lovely staff as well!
review:
Cozy was recommended by our tour guide and we are very thankful to him for it. The restaurant is down a poorly lite lane however do not let that put you off. The restaurant is dress clean and welcoming. It’s small but that’s the way and actually is a benefit in our experience.

The food we had was the best we have had in Vietnam . Super fresh and so full of flavor. We hade squid with ginger - you have to get this, yellow curry, morning glory and rice. Perfect when washed down with two bottles of Huda. We were given complimentary cream caramel and caramel based dishes is a speciality which will go back and try.

The staff are also a special part of this restaurant. All super friendly with great English and happy to put up with your attempts to use Vietnamese to order!

The Resturant also does cooking courses which to our mind is a sure sign of authenticity and skills in the kitchen.

We loved Cozy and intend to go back and try more from their menu.

title: Super delicious and inexpensive
review: There were three of us on a rainy day in Hue looking for dinner and were able to eat super good and inexpensive here.

title: A very pleasant surprise!!
review:
Highly recommended experience!!
Excellent food and great courtesy!!! The eggplants were amazing..
Highly recommended!!!

title: Amazing!
review: 5/5 we went two nights in a row, so affordable, great service and even better service. The manager also recognised us from the night before. The hue veg pancake is unreal and the chicken spring rolls are a must! We also tried the Korean chicken and it was fab!

title: Perfect "Cozy"
review:
We stayed here twice food and each time very satisfying food and Service. Thank you.
Great offer also vegetarian 👍😋

title: A must visit if you are in Hue
review: It is a small restaurant in a small alley from the main road, you will come to eat here only if you find it in google reviews as it is hidden. I found it trough google reviews and i will recommend it to anyone looking for truly local food in a familiar ambiance. Great food and the waitress is really nice. Yellow curry and fried eggplant are great same as bbq pork with rice noodles. The prices are also inexpensive and they deserve all the credit for the effort they are putting in their business. 10/10 highly recommend

title: Very good,
review:
Very good, a bit difficult to find because it is in an alley.
Very kind and excellent food.
You're welcome back.

title: Hidden gem
review: Excellent dinner at Cozy Restaurant. Hidden down a dark, but well signed, laneway, the outside doesn’t do justice to the authentic food and attentive service we enjoyed. Well worth the effort.

title: We were in Hanoi and went to Hue we didn't know where to dine and the hanoi norñs guide recommend this place... perfect
review: Excellent Food Fast Service Good Food in Hue Awesome Good Quality Dishes Thanks To Them We Dined Very Well

title: Average
review: Staff very friendly and food reasonably priced with lots of options, but I didn’t massively enjoy my meal sadly. Vegan and vegetarian options available.

title: Super Tip
review: Very very tasty, friendly welcome, great dishes, great atmosphere and extremely delicious and an extremely friendly staff.Visited by both tourists and locals. At the end we had dessert Flan on the house 😘

title: Great!
review: The restaurant is located in an alley that if we had not read the reviews we would have definitely discarded. Instead the food is very good and the girls in the room very nice, the expense is really low. Excellent salad with chicken and also delicious chicken curry and soup always with chicken. They also offered us a small crème caramel.

title: Typical cuisine
review: Great food, fair prices. Family management. Absolutely to go. We were 4 and had dinner twice. Remarkable bun bo hue

title: Incroyable
review: Excellent restaurant hidden at the back of a courtyard and close to our hotel. Warm welcome. We ate very well. Excellent cuisine and very affordable. Special mention to the blank that is offered at the end of the meal. We highly recommend

title: Beautifully rustic
review: Hidden in an alley, little gem. Very extensive menu, very good food. Courteous but good Service: they serve drinks without a glass and for beer they bring you the corkscrew... ridiculous price (less than 5 euros each).

title: Typical restaurant
review:
Very good restaurant. Perfect Welcoming
Great location, right next to Hotel Melia. Very good price for quality. The little plus a free crème brûlée.
Address to recommend.

title: Good food, but only cash transaction’s accepted.
review: Good food. Interesting interpretation of cosy. Air conditioning was just fans - a wall unit was spotted out of use on exit. Really important that customers know in advance when cash only is accepted - we barely had enough to pay for our meals.

title: Cosy, charming and delicious!
review: Tucked away from the main road, this little restaurant is a complete gem! The atmosphere is great, the menu is varied, the food fabulous and the staff are lovely!!! I’d never tried egg soup before, but I will again! So glad we stumbled upon this place, right next to our homestay!!!

title: Excellent restaurant
review: It is an excellent place , very delicious food both local and western, excellent Service and very well priced 100% recommended

title: Authentic restaurant with welcoming staff
review: Looked for a local restaurant and fell over Cozy Restaurant on TripAdvisor and I can only give them our best recommendations. Don't be fooled by the location for the food is super delicious

title: Nice discovery!
review: Nice discovery! A small secluded restaurant, a simple and smiling Welcoming, burgers and perfectly prepared chicken nems. Thanks to the team! ❤️

title: To advise.... 👌
review:
Good family cuisine, nice Service, we ate very well in a very reasonable budget.
Small attention at the end of the meal ....
Without hesitation to eat there 👍

title: What a find in Hue!
review: What a find! The most delicious bun thit nuong (rice noodles with fresh vegetables, lettuce, pork with a peanut sauce you pour over) at a very reasonable price. Service was exceptional with a free crème caramel for dessert. Clean bathroom. Wish we had time to go back!

title: Delicious cuisine very good value for money
review: The food is excellent, we couldn't resist going back. Exquisite and cheap cuisine. Very warm welcome. You can taste everything with your eyes closed We recommend 200%!

title: Great food!
review: Fantastic food, super friendly service, and very good prices. Great variety of food as well. This was one, if not the best meal we’ve had in Vietnam, highly recommend having a meal here.

title: Delicious
review: We were twice at the Cozy restaurant, the welcome is warm and very good advice. The dishes are delicious and cheap. Special mention for bún thit nuong, and its vegetarian variant!

title: Cozy
review:
Amazing restaurant.
The welcome, the food , the service, the staff, everything was amazing.
They taught us to eat with 🥢
I highly recommend it.
Lorie and Adrien

title: Excellent option
review: Very good restaurant with very good value for money, located at the entrance of a street near a shopping center that has a supermarket with very good assortment. There are Vietnamese cooking classes.

title: Amazing surprise
review: We tried it because it was next door to our guesthouse. We totally loved it! Amazing food, the place is cute, in a quiet alley, and the staff was great.

title: Small and fine, good and tasty
review: The restaurant is hard to find in a back street near Melia hotel. Inside it is cozy and with friendly service. Menu is simple, yet something for everyone. Finely prepared, and very affordable. The two days in Hue we have been there. Good luck with your business!

title: Best meal in Vietnam?
review: Absolutely delicious! Nice little restaurant, not expensive and food was amazing. Nem Luí we’re super tasty, but we enjoyed all of our dishes.

title: Good local jaunt.
review: I have to admit I wasn’t expecting much as we walked down an alley to the restaurant. I was less so when I looked in and saw a long narrow restaurant with a very basic set-up. But, boy was I surprised. We had a great time. The food was really good. The service was terrific. It’s obviously a small, family run place working it hard on a low budget. My hats off to them. It was an unexpected treat.

title: Great food, friendly staff, local prices.
review:
Fabulous family owned restaurant, serving a variety of local and some western food.
We ate here several times during our stay in Hué and it was delicious.
Friendly staff, fast service and budget friendly.
We ordered local Hué specialty dishes and they did not disappoint!
100% recommend this restaurant.

title: Delicious food and friendly service. You should go here!
review:
This place was so good we went back a 2nd night. The service was very friendly however the food was amazing!
We had spring rolls with a tasty dip, I had the Korean chicken, hubby had a chicken clay pot. Everything tasted freshly prepared and was delicious.
Good drink selection and they made a wonderful gin and tonic. We jumped in a Grab and got taken to the door.
You have to try here. I think the best food we tasted while in all of Vietnam.

title: Favourite restaurant of our visit to Hue
review: Spent 4 nights in Hue and this was my favourite restaurant. Tucked away off a Main Street. Fabulous food and great value for money. Party of 4 and we all loved our food. The staff spoke very good English and we couldn’t believe the value for money. We even got a complimentary dessert. It featured at around number 33 of Trip Advisors best restaurants in Hue but for me it was No. 1.

title: Evening meal
review:
This small family lead resturant was outstanding.
The food was fantastic and the price brilliant.
The staff were helpful and welcoming.
I would definitely recommend.

title: Quiet tucked away restaurant off the main path yet close to action and hotels
review: Super clean, friendly authentic and last but not least, “cozy “. Steps off the main road through a little winding alley path to a quiet cozy spot. Just an an amazing place. Menu was also in English which was quite helpful. Loved the food

title: Did not disappoint!
review: Came here last night and was so good that we had dinner here tonight again. Service was great! Authentic meals and very good prices for the size meals. Very tasty spring rolls and the Korean chicken dish was fabulous! Hide down a small alley and definitely off the Main Street so no noisy traffic. Must visit here if you’re in Hue!

title: Great little restaurant
review:
Lovely restaurant picked after reading reviews on TripAdvisor, not the closest to our hotel but the choices were just what we wanted. Lovely interesting interior - modern but quaint- antique typewriter provoked discussion - vietnamese use the qwerty keyboard.
Food tasty and flavourful and of course excellent value.

Throughly recommended

title: Lovely meal
review: A quaint, tiny restaurant down an alley. Friendly service. Lovely food - fresh, tasty and generous. We had the Stir fried tofu with vegetables and the Beef with lemongrass and capsicum, and both were delicious.

title: Delicious Vietnamese cuisine!
review: The restaurant was right next to our homestay and it was very delicious! Super nice service and typical Vietnamese cuisine. Highly recommended!

title: Mandatory visit if passing by Hue
review:
Restaurant located in the streets of Hue,
Great reception! Eat typical cured and very good! Welcome is hospitality of the highest level!!!
If you are passing through this area I highly recommend it.

title: Excellent
review: Tasty dishes and subtle tastes, warm welcome. We went back because it was really good. Do not hesitate to take Vietnamese red wine, it is very correct. Of course I recommend

title: Lovely local restaurant
review: Very nice local restaurant with friendly staff. Food was delicious and worth a visit when in Hue. Just down a little side alley but easy to find.

title: Great address in Hue
review:
This is a very nice address in Hue. This little restaurant is definitely worth a visit. The welcome is nice, the dishes (at least the ones we tasted) are delicious, and the note is more than sweet (8.50 euros for 2 people with drinks, starter, dishes and dessert is offered).
Our best restaurant since we arrived in Vietnam.
Do not hesitate, you will not be disappointed, and at worst you will only have lost a little ten euros.....

title: Delicious food in small local restaurant.
review: Delicious food in local restaurant. Down a side alley so not easy to find but totally worth it for simple but tasty Vietnamese dishes. And incredible value!

title: A restaurant as we like them
review: Kitchen on top! Great welcome! Real professionals in the restaurant industry which is rare. We highly recommend.

title: Fresh, delicious and very reasonably priced. Great for solo travelers.
review: I was in Hue for 2 nights and had dinner at Cozy Restaurant both nights. The food was so fresh, tasty and delicious. I had the banana fruit shake, fresh vegetarian spring rolls, fried morning glory, and bun bo hue (beef noodle soup) over both dinners. The banana fruit shake was thick and clearly freshly made. I have been in Southeast Asia (Thailand, Cambodia and now Vietnam) for 2 months and having this drink very often. This was the best of them all! The spring rolls were tasty alone but the sauce it came with was homemade and amazing. I usually am not a sauce person but I definitely was at Cozy! The 2 mains were large portions and hearty meals after full days of travel one day and touring on the other day. To top it all off, at the end of the meal I was presented with a complimentary flan for dessert. Just a perfect ending to a wonderful meal. The entire staff at Cozy are also so kind and attentive. I’m a solo female traveler and the restaurant vibe was so calm and inviting, not awkward at all for eating alone. Thanks so much, Cozy Restaurant! I hope to see you again should I travel to Hue once more!

title: Excellent local cuisine
review: We ate 3 times here during our stay in Huè, great food especially the typical Huè specialties recommended on the menu. Really modest prices, despite the very high quality.

title: Delicious
review: So Good. We went on TripAdvisor recommendation and really we are not disappointed. The welcome is nice and the meal delicious. We had a great time. I recommend 100%

title: Glutenfree
review:
Great food and great attention to allergies and food preferences (I have to eat glutenfree).
The staff was very friendly.
Tip, if you are in Hue.

title: Fantastic food at very reasonable prices
review: We got there quite early and glad we did because by the time we’d finished our meal there was a quest outside. The food was authentic Vietnamese and great quality. I had a chicken stir fry and my wife had chicken with onions and capsicum. Both were really good and we had three tiger beers. The total came to 270000 Dong which is around £7.50. Would highly recommend

title: Great cheap find in Hue
review: Great small restaurant slightly off the beaten track (down an alley but signposted). Good choice of food inc Western at unbelievable prices.

title: Super recommended
review: I returned to this restaurant after six years: I confirm my previous judgment, excellent food and very honest prices. Recommended

title: Good place to eat
review: A good place to eat. The taste and preparation was good, although not surprising. The right portion. Variety of menu quite a lot. I think on some occasions they are rather extensive. The simple environment without pretension. The cost benefit good.

title: Great food at fantastic prices
review: We've been in Vietnam for about 5 weeks this trip, and this is the best food we've had so far! The food is very flavourful, the service is great, and the prices are very reasonable. We ate here twice in three days. I would HIGHLY recommend this restaurant. The free creme brûlée for dessert was the icing on the cake.And close to the Imperial City. Loved it!!!

title: Delicious
review:
We find This restaurant at Tripadvisor and we went there because it has good reviews.
The food is delicious. After our main dish we received a desert.
We will come back.

title: Best Lunch Place in Hue
review: It is one of the best maybe the best lunch place we have eaten. Very cheap and super delicious. Cute staff and a little dessert at the end from the restaurant side☺️👍

title: Great find!
review: Delicious (and very filling) meal in this lovely restaurant, which lives up to its name. It’s tucked down a little alley but well worth hunting out. Lots of veggie options as well as meat.

title: Top quality and unbeatable price
review: Excellent little restaurant 2 steps from the melia, we had chosen chicken nems (without coriander) made by the minute, a burger, and grilled chicken, 1 mojito ( €2.44) and 1 beer (0.75), in addition a delicious homemade caramel cream was offered to us, perfect Valentine's Day, an addition of 11 €, just incredible for the quality , really top!

title: On top!
review:
Perfect, well cooked, cheap, really good, I recommend.
The price for quality is amazing, the place is not exceptional with simple tables, but the cuisine is very tasty, the staff very friendly, the price is very accessible, we loved it.

title: decent food in a cozy setting
review: The atmosphere was warm and inviting, but the food was just okay. I had high hopes, but the flavors didn't stand out. Service was friendly enough, though it took a while to get our meals. Overall, it’s decent for a casual meal, but nothing to write home about!

title: Great for food, value and service
review: This is a hidden gem which we were fortunate to find. It has won accolades for good reason. Our food was excellent quality, inexpensive and the service was very friendly and efficient. If visiting Hue, don't miss this place.

title: Good for lunch or dinner
review: Very nice and friendly restaurant. We enjoyed a lunch and a dinner, at good value prices. Definitely worth a visit if you are staying nearby.

title: Fabulous- highly recommended
review:
Fabulous food and service. Location is opposite the Pilgrimage Resort and an area with several Kings Tombs.
We visited twice in our 3 night stay and on each occasion the food was delicious. The service extremely helpful.

Highly recommended

title: Yummy food and top service.
review:
We arrived in Hue to walk out of our hotel to here. It was such fresh, yummy flavours and the service was very friendly. We had a lovely young girl who was a university student service us.

Highly recommend.

title: Excellent restaurant, we stopped there on the return from the visit of the tombs, Bo our waiter was great!
review: Excellent food a must-see stop!

title: Delicious and cheap food
review: Really delicious restaurant at very reasonable prices.

title: Fab meal in Hue!
review:
Fab food, good service. Lovely restaurant.
Staff can't do enough for you. Amazing experience.

title: Eco is the best. Lots of Veg options
review: Awesomeeee food and hospitality by Bo. God bless them. Will visit again

title: Fresh
review: Wonderful food and great service by Bo. We will be back. Thank you Bo!

title: Great Local Restaurant!
review: We ate here twice during our stay at Pilgrimage Village across the street. The prices were very reasonable, especially considering the great service and the great food. We met the lady who was the proprietor of the establishment and she was very nice. She has a lot of family involved in the operation. The setting was very typical and open air. We had two great experiences here and recommend it highly!

title: Delicious!
review: The food was very good and the staff were very friendly and accommodating. The eggplants were to be emphasized.

title: Great affordable spot for kids and adults alike!
review: Very tasty and diverse menu for adults and kids a like. Staff are great and the restaurant is nestled in a beautiful garden.

title: Great value, food and service
review: We went to this restaurant across from our hotel based on a recommendation from our guide, Lee from Ann Tours. Food, drinks and service were all great. We especially liked the beef hot pot which was a great experience. Prices were excellent and affordable.

title: Best restaurant in Hue
review: Excellent place will have a wonderful service. We only spent a day in Hue and super recommend this place

title: Lovely fresh food at a great price
review: No our host was lovely. Food is super fresh and great quality

title: Love Nina’s
review: Love Nina’s. Great place. Best food in hue!

title: Excellent little restaurant, great menu, tasty food and friendly staff. Highly recommend.
review: Great little find. Fantastic food, tasty, good portion size. The menu was extensive lots of food to choose from. The staff were excellent, friendly and knowledgeable. We loved this place so much that we at here twice. I Definitely recommend this place.

title: Thanks chat GPT
review: Funnily enough chatGPT is how I found the recommendation for this cafe - and I'm so glad it did because I wouldn't have found it otherwise! The service and the vibe were outstanding and the food was absolutely beautiful and fresh and so yummy! We had beautiful servers called Su, Lee & Hoa - lovely lovely girls xx We went yesterday and if we get time we would love to go back again!

title: Coffee & Waitperson Moon
review: Salt and Vietnamese coffee was excellent with milk on the side. Moon who served us was friendly and professional and spoke excellent English.

title: Two quality meals and relaxed atmosphere
review:
I went twice to eat in this restaurant a little bit away but it is definitely worth it.
A very good menu of local cuisine, food and drink at the top!
In addition, the atmosphere is relaxed and the service perfect.... Special mention to Lee la
First time , which made me come back the next day , this time with two young girls , Moon and Cabbage , perfect again . An address to really recommend.

title: Hidden pearl
review: In a quiet side street is nina's cafe hidden. Nice cozy restaurant with super friendly service. Moon hoa and Chau served us in perfect English of a delicious meal with fresh ingredients. Various menu options as well as separate dishes from the menu. Definitely recommended!

title: Small and fine - absolutely stop by!
review:
A small, cosy café/restaurant in an inconspicuous side street in the centre of Hué. We were there with seven people for dinner - and felt comfortable right away.

Perfect, very friendly service, courteous, prudent and competent. Very wide selection of different dishes at moderate prices. Authentic Vietnamese cuisine: There is something for every taste.

The food was super delicious! Everything freshly prepared, crisp vegetables, tasty sauces, tender meat! Every individual order request (with or without garlic, coriander, meat, mild or hot seasoned, etc.) was taken into account and implemented correctly. From the starter to the main course to the dessert, everything was great - huge compliments to the kitchen! And thanks to the whole team for the nice evening.

We can recommend this restaurant without restriction. Those who are in Hué for a few days should definitely stop by here. It's worth it!

title: A True Culinary Highlight in Hue!
review:
If you are looking for the absolute best food in Vietnam, look no further than Nina’s Cafe. We came in for a late brunch that effortlessly turned into a long, delicious lunch—and honestly, we didn’t want to leave. After three weeks of traveling through the country, this was hands-down the best food and selection we’ve encountered.
​The atmosphere is incredibly relaxing and cozy, providing the perfect escape from the bustle of the city. However, what truly elevates this experience from a great meal to an unforgettable one is the hospitality. Our host, Ms. Lotus, was perfection. Her English is impeccable, and she is so much more than just a host; she is a cultural ambassador. She took the time to sit with us and educate us on the traditional way to prepare and eat each dish, adding a layer of depth to the meal that you just don't find elsewhere.
​We will be back again for sure. If you’re in Hue, do yourself a favor and find this hidden gem!

title: Best meal I’ve had in Vietnam so far
review: Food was amazing with lots of vegetarian options. The food came quickly and the service was great. Moon and Su made us feel at home. You should definitely come here if you find yourself in Hue!

title: Hidden Hue gem
review: Found this little gem down a side street. Only had a snack of spring rolls but seriously amazing. Very clean and Lee and Moon are lovely. Can't wait to go back and try some more food off the menu.

title: Not bad.
review: We found this restaurant thanks to TripAdvisor. We were received by Y. The aperitif was extraordinary. On the other hand, the pork Noodles dish didn’t taste much compared to the other restaurants we did before. So a little disappointed by the quality of this dish in terms of flavors.

title: A relaxing restaurant
review: We had a lovely evening at Nina’s café. The food was nice and flavorful and our two waitresses, Lotus and Lee were very helpful and very friendly. Their English was also excellent, which was an added bonus since neither of us speak any Vietnamese. The restaurant is tucked away in an alley and it made for a peaceful and relaxing evening at the end of the day.

title: Perfect.
review:
Arriving at the end of the day as a solo traveler in Hue after a long bus ride, I went to eat tonight at this restaurant recommended by the backpacker near my hotel.

I enjoyed it. The waitresses Lotus and Su were in the care. The room is nice, quiet, in a small street, far from the hustle and bustle of modern Hue. Everything was excellent.

title: Another Great find in hue thank you TA
review:
We attempted this restaurant after we read TripAdvisor's reviews and we really enjoyed the place which was simple Vietnamies cafe very clean good atmosphere and had few art work on the walls which I found them interesting, the staffs were welcoming and helpful, Y &Su helpt us to choose from the Menu and served us with beautiful smiles nothing was too much for them . The food was delicious, and very generous portions, we had rice roll filled with prawns and fresh herbs as well as the fried spring rolls and grilled fish which came with rice and garnished with salad, everything was delicious.
We also had bottled bear and water.

title: Nina's cafe - Hue. Must go.
review:
Hidden off the main road down an alley and another alley you'll find Nina's cafe. Moon will welcome you and give you tips on the best way to enjoy the lovely local food prepared a stone's throw away from the tables. Menu is diverse and well priced with something for everyone. They serve breakfast too! We had a few noodles dishes that were super tasty using fresh ingredients. I've been told the traditional rice pancake is excellent. The complimentary biscotti that accompanied my jasmine tea was a delightful gesture and absolutely delicious.
Don't be put off by the alleyway - Nina's is an unexpected surprise at the end!

title: A hidden gem
review: A hidden gem. Delicious food. The chicken curry was divine. So are the fried spring rolls. The staff Miss Moon, was attentive and friendly. It’s worth the visit. 4 of us totally enjoyed our dinner.

title: Simply fantastic
review: I discovered this restaurant by chance. I had a great time, the staff who welcomed us, Mrs.Moon, was very kind and immediately put us at ease; she explained each dish to us and we were able to order easily. The food was delicious, and I can say that in the four days we've been in the city, it's the first time we've eaten truly well. I recommend everyone to visit this restaurant. Thank you, Mrs. Moon, and thanks also to the chef. We'll be back for sure.

title: Great food and service at a good price
review: Great food which is very reasonably priced.Fantastic service from Moon and the cafe was away in a back alley so very peaceful. Would definitely go back!

title: Tasty food in bright, welcoming surroundings.
review: Tucked out of the way but easy enough to find. Had the chicken in honey which was really good. My wife had the Vietnamese chicken Curry which she enjoyed. Service attentive and friendly. We went early so the restaurant was very quiet but filled up as time went on and is clearly popular. Would thoroughly recommend.

title: Charming restaurant
review: Lovely little restaurant in a quiet street - lots of charm. Our waitress - Y - was really helpful and very friendly. I had chicken in honey with steamed rice, OH had egg fried rice with chicken - both delicious! For dessert I had their sweet soup - which I highly recommend.

title: Beautiful discovery
review:
Great little restaurant at the end of an alley! Good food and nice atmosphere! We were served with a smile by Y.
I recommend .

title: Local Food
review: Really good food, excellent. We went from a family recommendation and it didn’t disappoint. Great value and helpful staff

title: Super experience Vietnamese cuisine
review: Great food and the service was superb. Thanks to Moon and C.A.

title: Exceptional restaurant
review: Excellent restaurant. Decor remarkable atmosphere. Our young waitress there (that's her name) was exceptionally kind. Go ahead with your eyes closed.

title: Recommended!
review: Delicious food here. Highly recommended if you are Hue. We are super well helped and advised by Moon. Thank you so much!

title: Great food
review: This was a great place for a meal. The food was very tasty and the service was excellent. Moon looked after us and was very attentive 😃

title: Very happy
review: Outstanding meal with very warm service from Moon. Would recommend Nina's to anyone visiting Hue. We will come back before we leave the area.

title: Excellent Food
review: The food in Nina's Cafe was excellent. Very fresh and very tasty, with local specialities and some more unusual options (such as the caramel chicken in a clay pot, which was delicious). Reasonably priced, and with very good service from Moon. We also had a bottle of nice Vietnamese white wine.

title: Super tasty, nice staff, cozy place!
review:
Nice staff who were concerned about us and the food. Clean and tidy and homely.
The food was super good, we ate different dishes and all were good (we were 7 people).

title: Parfait
review: Our best meal in Vietnam. Food perfect we have tested the Hue local dishes and have followed their recommendation. Great service by Lotus and Anh. Friendly discussion. Very clean

title: Highly recommended!
review: Delicious food! Will definitely come back when we are here again. Very friendly and helpful staff. Highly recommended in Hue!

title: Amazing restaurant with veggie options
review:
We came here for lunch and it was amazing! The restaurant itself is easy to miss, being down one of the side streets off the main road, but just look for the signs. They had great vegetarian options (Ban Khaoi Pancake is a must try!) and the prices are extremely reasonable. Food was delicious and cooked fresh. Fresh spring rolls were also amazing. The toilets were very clean and the decor in the restaurant was lovely. We felt very comfortable sitting in.

The service was fantastic. Our waitress, Moon, was incredibly friendly, attentive and professional. Would highly recommend!

title: Excellent traditional restaurant
review:
We had dinner at Nina’s cafe, we were very well received by Lee who is very kind. We took a menu at 180 000 which corresponds to 6 euros: starter, salad, main course and dessert: we chose the specialties of Hue and we are feasted:very good fresh and healthy cuisine
I really recommend this restaurant and again thank Lee for welcoming us so well

title: Great Salt Coffee
review:
Best salt coffee we had on our trip! The staff was very nice as well. The breakfast was only so so, but the coffee made the trip worth it.

The pancakes were pretty dry and a little burnt, but the pho was good.

title: Couple dinner
review: We had dinner and I must say that he ate very well. Lee the waitress was always very fast. The menu with various tastings and excellent

title: Great spot
review: This was a great restaurant tucked away off a Main Street in Hue - we tried a few of the dishes and loved every one, particularly the bun thit nuong. Lotus and Lee were great helping us choose the dishes and giving us local insights and suggestions for the rest of our trip - thanks for the lovely experience!

title: Delicious dinner in Hue!!
review: Nina’s cafe had great food and wonderful service! We ordered a few dishes from their list of hue specialties, and servers Lotus and Lee taught us the proper way to eat them. They also gave us great recommendations for the rest of our stay in Vietnam. We couldn’t have asked for a better place to start our adventures in Hue!

title: Best food in Hué!
review:
This was a fantastic address: cozy sitting, super good food and good service!

We ate the Bun Bo Hue (noodle soup) and the Bun Thit Nuong (bbq pork noodles), 2 typical Vietnamese dishes. We already had some experience with Vietnamese cuisine in the meantime, we could add this restaurant to the better experiences during our trip. All flavors were great, right down to the Salt coffee.

We were helped there by Moon, a student who did a fantastic job. She was very friendly, gave explanations where necessary and could speak good English.

We even wanted to eat back here the following night, but unfortunately it was closed.

title: Original, fresh, friendly, helpfull
review: Very good original Vietnamees food. Very fresh and original recipies. Served by miss Lee, very friendly and helpfull and speaks English very well. Highly recommended place2eat.

title: Great all-day restaurant in Hue
review: Moon served great, all food tasted great, everything was very clean! Thank you! We felt very comfortable:)

title: Hidden gen
review: A little place tucked away, not that easy to find, but worth the hunt. The staff are amazing, the vibe is awesome and the food is excellent.

title: Quiet spot with great Vietnamese dishes.
review: Food and staff were great in this restaurant- we were there for dinner. Moon and Lee were very helpful and friendly. We had the Vietnamese curry and bbq pork with noodles and these were both delicious.

title: Go ahead, it’s Top!
review:
Excellent small restaurant located at the bottom of a small driveway. We were welcomed by Lotus and Lee who were very friendly.We took a formula “discovery” of local specialties as well as a menu”5”.
Everything was really delicious with special mention to the Nems. I ended with a very good salty coffee.
Excellent value for money, I recommend without reservation!

title: Great!
review: An incredible culinary experience, dishes served quickly and especially with a smile, Nhuy our young waitress was available and very welcoming! Special mention for salted coffee!

title: Really good food - Good value
review: Brilliant food with great service. We got spring roles for a starter (portions were big, we were almost full after this) then we shared pork with 2 portions of rice. Would eat here again.

title: AMAZING EXPERIENCE
review: The food, the service and the ambiance were amazing. Every single plate was delicious. We ordered pork spring rolls, banana leaves pork & shrimp salad, caramel clay chicken, for dessert steamed banana cake with coconut ice cream and salted coffee and coffee coconut. Thank you Lee for all the delicious recommendations.

title: Hidden gem
review: Awesome cocktails not watered down very tasty beautiful deserts Main food dishes, generous, colourful and very tasty

title: Cute, boutique, quirky setting, with kai 10/10
review: Amazing food! Beautifully presented, freshly cooked, and divine taste. Caramelized pork in a clay pot, chicken and vegetables, with rice. Lived up to expectations

title: Great breakfast
review:
We went there with three friends for lunch and it was so nice.

We were served by Y who was very friendly!!

Thank you very much ☺️

title: Delicious food!
review:
Very good food and lovely English speaking people! It's a bit hindsight but is easy to find.
Good Service by Moon!

title: Little oasis
review: Nina’s blends Viet nam classics with a twist of western appeal. We enjoyed the charismatic charm of the décor alongside the friendly service. We wished we found Nina’s earlier in our culinary adventures. That said its off beat location made it all the more worth while. All the best.

title: Good value meals
review: We were looking for something that offered local Hue dishes, away from the busy streets . The portions were generous and well priced. We ordered a Banana Flower salad with pork and shrimp and the BBQ pork noodles. I have never tried this salad before and it was a good flavor but a little course in texture. Not sure if this is normal. The BBQ pork dish was tasty. The staff are very friendly and Moon was very helpful explaining how to pronounce the Vietnamese phrases. We enjoyed the welcoming atmosphere and cold drinks.

title: Our fave so far!
review:
Nina Cafe is amazing!
Our favourite meal so far in Vietnam, so so delicious. The service from Lotus and Ly was so friendly and efficient, they stood and chatted with us for ages with such amazing English!
10/10 - highly recommend!!!

title: Top we recommend
review:
Very good restaurant we recommend!
Moon was very kind and informed us well about specialities!
We recommend the super bbq pork noodles!

title: Highly recommended
review: Wonderful food, excellent service, highly recommended- worth finding this tucked away gem ----------------------

title: Chicken? Not like any Chicken i‘ve ever seen.
review: Not sure where all the good reviews come from. Probably one of the worst meals i had on my trip in Vietnam. Ordered Chicken with fried Rice and got an inedible fried bone or something that resembled a fried bone. I couldn’t even tell you what it was. Better to go in a restaurant where locals eat, not this tourist trap.

title: Great hidden place
review: Good morning I do not write reviews but this small restaurant in a tiny street really deserves a great review. I have been many days in Vietnam but here I really eat well in a local but clean environment. Thanks to you

title: Friendly place ,clean tasty food
review: Nina’s cafe provided tasty food and atmosphere. Wonderful service and a safe and quiet hideaway. Certainly recommend 👌

title: NGON
review:
What an amazing hidden gem Nina's cafe in Hue is. We ate delicious, freshly prepared and served by the friendly and cheerful girls Y and Thao. They speak good English and taught us en passant Vietnamese words.
The food was ngon, cam um Y and Thau and tam beet.

title: Hidden gem in Hue
review:
We're a couple from Italy in Hue just for one night, and I'm super happy I've found this restaurant cause we spend and awesome evening! Delicious food in a special place, also have too thank Y Thao because she improved the atmosphere with her very fluent English, kindness and beautiful smile!
I'll definitely mention this place if I find anyone heading to Hue.

title: Having dinner at somebody’s home, very relax with great food. Thanks Y
review: Thanks Y for your great service and interest to have a short talk with us about our holiday. The food was great too and thanks to you Y and Nina’s cafe as if you are having dinner at somebody’s home we had a true moment of peace on a busy day from Hoian - Hue to Ninh Binh. Thanks, Kim and Menno

title: GREAT PLACE.
review: Excellent food place, for its treatment its good food and Mood. We had dinner three nights in a row and it was a good thing. We've tried quite a few plates of food and their cold beer. Don't forget to try your desserts. Highly recommended. Greetings to Y + Thao.

title: A nice little restaurant
review: In a quiet little street , a friendly restaurant that offers simple but good quality dishes with a contained price

title: Loved it!
review: Down a side alley but easy to find once you see the sign. Fantastic meal here. I had the yellow pork curry which was absolutely delicious. Family also really enjoyed their food. Moon and Thao were really friendly and helpful. Definitely recommend this place.

title: Best food and service in Hue!!!
review: Every meal was amazing! And the service from Y was just as good. Highly recommend coming here. We will be back next time we are in the area.

title: Amazing dinner!!
review: The food was incredible, and the service by Y and Ly was amazing, they were really kind and accommodating when taking orders and delivering there food. 😃

title: It's worth the money.
review: The food was very tasty, it was quite busy in the evening but the food was served quickly. Y and Ly have served us very well.

title: Good menus
review: In the back of an alley you will find this cool place, where they serve tasty 'suggested' menus for a soft price. The service is also friendly and helpful.

title: Great find
review: This was a great find for lunch. The food was home cooked and delicious, especially the caramel chicken. Our waitress Moon was kind and attentive and showed us how to eat the food the proper way! Highly recommendable!
A lovely place. It feels like eating at tou are dining in a home of a Vietnamese family. Food was delicious. We were served by Moon and Thao. Both were very friendly

title: Top, highly recommended!
review:
Super nice experience !!!
Very good food, large portions highly recommended!
Staff is super friendly, we were served by Y, a very sympathetic girl who speaks very good English and with whom we had a nice conversation.
If you are in Hué definitely stop by, the restaurant is nicely decorated, smooth service, Air conditioning available and good value for money.
Great!

title: Yum food and friendly service
review: Cute spot down an alleyway. Food was yum and the service super friendly. Was served by Lotus who had really great English

title: Nice.
review:
Nice, at the bottom of a small dead end not far from the citadel!
Very friendly staff
Excellent varied dishes at very sweet prices!

title: Excellent family restaurant
review:
A very good family restaurant.
Lots of choice at great prices and the service is excellent. Thanks to Lotus who served us so kindly and patiently.

title: Caffé!
review: Great coffee. Impeccable service. Relaxing atmosphere. No waiting time. She served Moon twice and was very kind. We never ate you but we stopped several times for coffee as it was close to our hotel. A little hidden but deserves: a small corner of serenity.

title: Breakfast and Coffee
review:
Very good coffee, especially Salt Coffee.
Staff helpful and very kind. We had breakfast twice and the food was great and was brought quickly. They gave us a very nice business card with the main courtesy phrases in English and Vietnamese with relative pronunciation. I recommend it.

title: Great coffee and breakfast
review: We tried this lovely cafe because it was close to our hotel, and we kept coming! Great coffee (also served in a classic Vietnamese way, with the filter on the glass). The breakfast sandwich was also great, the pineapple juice was freshly squeezed. Chicca: they gave us a card with the most common terms in Vietnamese, and its pronunciation .. precious!

title: Great food, great food
review: The food was very original and super delicious. The operation friendly and fixed. Moon and LG were great. A beautiful evening!

title: Warm and delicious
review:
The food was super good and the produce fresh:)
With quality service, I recommend it. The place is nice and very quiet with friendly atmosphere music. A big thank you to Lotus for its welcome!

title: Excellent address, extra cuisine
review: My mom and I have had dinner twice at this restaurant. The two waitresses who took care of us, Moon and another, were in the care of the little ones. The place is charming, the cuisine is excellent and the prices very small.

title: Small hidden treasure
review: Without the recommendation in a travel guide, we probably wouldn’t have discovered this pretty little bohemian bistro with a relaxed atmosphere, hidden at the bottom of a peaceful dead end. It was so good that we went back! Specialties of the region with a personal touch, hat to the kitchen! And thank you to Lotus, Ly and Y for the service and cultural exchange discussions in English, dotted with Vietnamese and French!

title: Lovely food and lovely service
review:
Our servers, Lotus and Ly, were excellent at making us feel comfortable and helping us order with ease. They were very polite and attentive, making sure every customer was attended to but also not making anyone feel they waited too long for service.
The food was delicious, I was with two others and we shared three plates, grilled fish with tomato, caramel chicken with rice and beef fried noodles. All very well prepared.
This is a cosy little restaurant with pictures hanging around that you can purchase as well which brightened up the room.
We were also struggling with pronouncing and remembering Vietnamese words which Ly heard us and gave us business cards with English to Vietnamese translation.
Overall, very impressed and would come back when I’m Hue again.

title: Fabulous food and great value for money
review: Fabulous small family run cafe/restaurant with fresh home made food. Much preferred this to the top recommended restaurants. Staff were super helpful and spoke good English. Food was excellent and great value for money. Thank you for a great experience

title: Brilliant food, amazing prices and fantastic staff. Just go!!
review:
A little bit off the main street and down an alley, you will see a neon sign pointing the way.
Lovely little restaurant. We had just got to Hue that day and wanted to try some Vietnamese food. We made the right choice. We were served by Lotus and Lily who had excellent English. We chose all from Nina’s recommendations and all were amazing. We had veggie spring rolls, beef noodle soup, shrimp curry and clay pot caramel chicken.
We liked it so much we are going back tomorrow to have some other items. Some other customers had grilled fish and it looked fab!
Can’t wait to go back! Lotus and Lily had a good chat with us and were brilliant all the way through.

title: Tasty dinner in cozy ambiance
review: Good food in an attractively decorated restaurant. It filled up fast. Moon explained well why certain dishes were recommended. The service was very friendly.

title: Superb Little Hidden Restaurant in Hue
review: What a wonderful little restaurant. The food was delicious (one of the best of our trip). Moon was our waitress and she couldn’t have been more helpful and had extremely good English. Definitely worth a visit when in Hue.

title: Must go. no buts.
review:
Little Gem, offering great tasting traditional food at a budget price. Great service. Moon served us today and was very accommodating.
Must try if in Hue

title: Recommend
review:
Cozy atmosphere surrounded by local textile products charming room at the back of an alley

Fine local cuisine based on fresh produce

Thank you to Ly Moon for his welcome
Recommend

title: Delicious food, lovely setting
review: Y served us and was extremely friendly, she gave us help with our Vietnamese and chatted to us about our travels. We had some delicious fried rice, a salt coffee and the yummy steamed banana cake. We haven’t tried anything like that before - it was so good. A lovely meal in a pretty setting, highly recommended.

title: Excellence in Hue!
review:
On 4 days spent in Hue, we have lunch once and dinner twice at Nina's cafe. After traveling a bit in Vietnam, tasting different cuisines depending on whether you are in the north or south or in the center, Hué remains undoubtedly the city at the top level cuisine, and Nina(s Café wins the palm.
While most dishes are based on traditional recipes, the realization of each is exceptional. It is both light and very tasty.
And the service is commensurate with this quality.
Do not miss this restaurant if you go to Hue!!

title: Delicious Hue specialities
review: Absolutely excellent dinner with a wide selection of local specialties. Everything was delicious and the spring rolls were by far the best we’ve had so far. Moon and Ly gave brilliant service. A stand out experience all round. Very highly recommended

title: Great vietnamese kitchen
review: We were here for dinner, the food was amazing and service as well. Thanks a lot to Ly and Moon, they did an outstanding job hosting us!

title: Really Nice Discover !
review: This spot is perfect for lunch. It’s hidden in a street and it’s really calm. The food is delicious and the service was really nice. Y was our waitress and she was so kind and likeable. I really recommend this spot if you are in Hue.

title: Excellent food with great service
review: We were for dinner and tasted some local specialties. All six dishes were excellent. Also noteworthy is the service of Lotus and Moon, who took excellent care of us. An absolute recommendation.

title: Nice place with typical flavours
review: Nice place to taste the typical flavours of Hue! Also the dessert (banana tapioca cake), it really worths it. Lovely welcome and great service by Moon

title: Go here for great food and wonderful experience.
review:
Eat here!!! We had such a great dinner and experience here: Beautiful, calm, charming, amazing food, great prices, lovely and sweet staff.

Lotus and Li offered great food recommendations (bbq pork noodles and a local Vietnamese rice appetizer) that were beyond yummy. We learned a few new words in Vietnamese as well (they helped us with our pronunciation).

Can’t recommend enough!!!

title: Wee gem
review:
Gem of a restaurant. Beautiful food. We had the Caramel chicken and a Vietamese chicken curry .
Thanks so much to our lovely servers Moon and Ly for their help and attention
Worth a visit

title: Delicious food in hidden gem
review: Absolutely delicious food, enjoyed every bite. Worth exploring down the alley to this hidden gem. The staff are very friendly and helpful, definitely worth a visit if you are here in Hue

title: Delicious Vietnamese food
review: We had a very pleasant evening at Nina's. We had Shrimps caramel in Claypot. Wonderful. Also the service by Moon and Ly was very friendly and good. Thank you!

title: Superb food!
review: Absolutely fabulous home made food, we all loved our meal choices, real personal service! Thank you to L and Ly! Excellent Pina Colada too!

title: Best chicken in Hue 😉
review: Thank you for the amazing dinner and the fantastic service. Chicken curry and a chicken claypot Fisch in a welcoming atmosphere made the evening fly by. Highly recommended - we will be back 😊

title: Nina Cafe and rest. : a nice place
review: The food was excellent. The service by the sisters Y and Ly was very pleasant. A nice experience in Hué that I recommend. Thank ou the « Guide du routard »

title: must try in Hué
review:
Very good restaurant, you might be afraid to go in this small street but it worth it, 100% safe, 100% tasty.

Especially a big thanks to Y and Ly for their warm welcome and explanation about the meals. A must try!

title: A real treat!
review: Sisters Y and Ly welcomed us very well! Very smiling, they explained to us how to eat typical dishes of Hue. We feasted!! We recommend!

title: Enjoyable meal and friendly service
review: Had a lovely meal at Nina’s with great service from Lotus. It is situated in an alley so not a place you would discover by chance. We went based on reviews and were not disappointed.

title: Fantastic dinner
review: Outstanding food, very nice staff especially when all tables are occupied and great value for money. 😊

title: Delicious chicken and tasty local beer
review: We had a great meal in this cute cafe. We were just in time because it was quite busy. But that just showed that it was very popular. Moon and Ly have served us wonderfully. We had some nice tender chicken and drank local beers. I even bought a small painting by a local artist that they had hanging in the restaurant. All in all top experience!

title: Small paradise well hidden
review: Small paradise cafe restaurant where we have lunch and dinner we feasted very welcome we had lunch with coffee smooties pankakes bananas and mango with honey and in the evening: spring rolls and another very good dish for dessert banana cake and fruit salad c was perfect served by very smiling MOON

title: Nice
review: We got pretty good food at a pretty good price in a pretty cozy place with absolutely good service from Y 😍 We were here for lunch

title: Very good Restaurant in Hue with very friendly service
review:
We have been eating in Nina café & Restaurant today.
In one word: fantastisch.
Verry friendly service by Lotus and Ly.
The food was excellent.
My wife had a vegetariër meal(Mi xào rau),
I myself had Chicken Vietnamese curry
(Gà Cari).
To drink we had one water and one gin-tonic.
We had to pay for everything together €8.49
Wenn you are staying in Hue We can recomment this restaurant

title: Recommend without hesitation
review: Place to discover absolutely outside the frenetic chaos of the city's scooters and cars. At the end of a dead end , this pretty little restaurant seduced us with its location, decoration, service and food. Thanks to LY Moon for the impeccable and efficient service.

title: Nina cafe
review: Great little place just off a main road, wonderful food, service and atmosphere, Moon & Ly who looked after us were great and so helpful 👍

title: Great food and service
review:
Found this place in yhe lonely planet guide book and it was great!
The service from Y was fantastic and the food arrived promptly and was delicious. I had Shrimp yellow curry and my partner had Tofu and vegetable curry. If in Hue check this place out. It was just five minutes walk from our hotel the TTC Imperial.

title: Dinner in Hue. Small and neat restaurant where you will be surprised by the many choices of Vietnamese cuisine.
review: Good help from Moon. Until now, the food here was the best we have had in Vietnam. Compliments to the cook and the rest of the staff.

title: A small island of quality and local tradition.
review:
A small informal place that has the advantage of excelling in the quality of traditional dishes, in the friendliness of the welcome and in the low cost.
To go there, I recommend following Google Maps as the restaurant is in an alley and can be difficult to find.

title: Good breakfast
review: Perfect for breakfast. Western and Asian choices. Good service by Moon. And great coffee. Good atmosphere and very reasonable prices

title: Good breakfast experience
review: Perfect sausage and bacon breakfast with toast. Attentive service by charming waitress Moon. Many other choices on menu. Oh, good coffee 😀☕️

title: Excellent foodplace in Hue
review: This restaurant was excellent. The food was very good and tasty: the service was friendly and knowledgeable. A big thank you to waiter which name is Y, who had excellent knowledge of English and served us kindly. We will definitely come again!

title: A typical restaurant in Hue warmly recommends after a recent visit Feb 2025
review: This typical restaurant serves gourmet and specific dishes from Hue. Flavor and presentation are at the rendezvous with correct prices. You will be welcomed in the room by Y and Ly, 2 sisters very nice and who have a sense of welcome. We recommend all visitors to Hue.

title: A place not to be missed in Hue!!!!
review:
Excellent welcome with Moon at the controls , very friendly, very friendly and a particularly hearty breakfast (150 000 dongs / pers, we were 2!) and very high quality!
Moon’s perfect command of the English language is a commercial plus.
The classification made by the Guide Du Routard is not usurped at all!
If you are staying in Hue, make the detour to “Nina ́s café”!!!!

title: Nina's Cafe
review: Friendly service and very good eating. Fried rice with chicken seemed a bit simple, but was really excellent. Nina's Cafe is a nice place to eat.

title: Simple, fresh , tasty food
review: This restaurant is minutes from the Melia Vinpearl hotel and serves simple, fresh tasty food at exceptionally good prices . Service was good despite it being very busy

title: Incroyable
