The dishes were beautifully presented and full of flavor 🍽️✨. What truly stood out was the exceptional service — especially Ms. Hang, whose kindness and attention made the experience even more memorable 💖🌟.
A perfect introduction to Hue’s culinary charm and hospitality 🌿🌺. Highly recommended ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️✨

title: The hotel made my stay wonderful. The atmosphere was peaceful, the rooms impeccable and neat. The person
review: The hotel made my stay wonderful. The atmosphere was peaceful, the rooms impeccable and neat. The staff, including Ty and Hoai, were professional and enthusiastic, and put the guests at ease. Breakfast was varied, offering a wide choice to satisfy Asian and European palates. The location of the hotel was ideal, allowing easy access to the most popular tourist attractions. I was fully satisfied with the service and found the value for money excellent. I can't wait to get back.

title: Great local and Western cuisine.
review:
We stay at the Thanh Lich hotel so we decided to try this restaurant in the last day after check out. We truly regret that we didn't eat here earlier.

At first we didn't have high expectations for the local cuisine here, as the restaurant look like they cater for foreigners. However, the local dishes here were so good and tasted exactly like home. Among several restaurants (both finedining and local streetfood), this restaurant offer the most authentic and comfortable experience. Price is between $5-$10 per dish, with the most expensive one we ordered was the $10 grilled fish (highly recommend). With temperature at 35 Celsius (95F) outside, it's a very cheap price for high quality local cuisine.

Ms. Hong took care of us and we really appreciated her efforts to help with our kid. Due to hot weather our kid tend to skip lunch but she ate a lot this time.

Didn't take many pictures of the food, but here is the shrimp and vegetable "soup" that looke exactly what my mother cooked at home. Will definitely be back next time we visit.

title: excellent place and food
review:

A great dinner after a weary day. 😊

title: Excellent Food and Service in Hue
review: Huong Ngu Restaurant was one of the best dining experiences we’ve had in Vietnam! The food selection was incredible — easily the widest and most impressive variety we’ve seen during our trip. Every dish was fresh, full of flavour, and beautifully prepared. The service was excellent from start to finish — a big thank you to Ty and Thuy, who looked after us so well and made the evening extra special with their friendly and attentive care. A must-visit spot if you’re in the area!

review:

title: Congratulation to KHOA and his team!!!
review: Just a while ago, we had breakfast at the Huong Ngu Restaurant. The variety was excellent, as was the view! However, what impressed us the most was the service and kindness of the staff, especially KHOA, the restaurant manager. The level of service he offered was something we have never experienced before in our 30 years of traveling. Warm congratulations to him and his team!!!

review: The stay, breakfast, dinner, rooms, service. Everything is perfectly arranged. It's a relief to be in a hotel like that.

title: Very good restaurant in a very good hotel.
review: A great restaurant in a great hotel. Food was really good and reasonably priced. Very good choice of Vietnamese and European. Thuy was a very good waitress and couldn’t do enough for us. We’ll eat here again. Great spot in the city.

title: Dinner
review: A very nice rooftop restaurant at Thanh Lich Botique Hotel. The price-performance ratio is right and especially the staff is very attentive and accommodating, especially Ms. Truc. Thank you.

title: Fine dining with incredible views of Hue!
review: We enjoyed the buffet breakfast that came with our stay at Thanh Lịch Hotel where this restaurant is located. We also had lunch and dinner here on two different days when it was pouring rain outside, too messy to walk around trying to find a place to eat! This review is for our lunch and dinner. Delicious food! We tried traditional bún bò Hue noodle, grilled chicken wrapped in lemongrass leaves, braised soft tofu with mushroom, súp măng cua crab asparagus soup. Outstanding service, all the waitstaff were very attentive, kind, and super sweet! And the incredible views from the 12th floor, thanked to the enormous windows surrounding the entire dinning room! On the night we had dinner here, there was a birthday party on the next table, so fun to watch the young, beautiful, stylish Hue locals enjoying themselves! Apparently you don’t have to be a guest at the hotel to dine at this amazing restaurant. Highly recommend.

title: Excellent cocktail with a beautiful view
review: Excellent cocktail with a great view, Ms Hang s team was very efficient. We'll try the rooftop in the next few days.

title: Breakfast very good
review:
The perfect place for breakfast
Very complete, very good.
And the staff very nice even from 06:00 in the morning!
On top

title: Great Restaurant Dinner Experience in Hue
review: We were looking for a decent dinner place in Hui. Trying a couple of other places, but it was late enough that other restaurants would not take customers anymore. Anyway, found that the restaurant was at the rooftop of our hotel…Great and friendly service, wonderful food (ordered the Hue Specialties among other things) and had a great experience overall.

title: Great !
review: Our server Hang was great! Was patient as we learnt the local language, food was great, same with cocktails! Would recommend for anyone staying close by

review: Vegetarian dinner-good options for vegetarians to try out Vietnamese cuisine. Food and service very good. Good ambience

title: A delight
review: Very nice house tastefully decorated, great photos. Welcome and quality service by very caring young women and dinner without fault , excellent quality / price ratio. I strongly advise successful evening assured.

title: Very good food in a warm setting
review: We enjoyed a friendly welcome in a very nice place. The menu was delicious, choice of Vietnamese specialties, each more fragrant than the last. We highly recommend this address in Hue to taste Vietnamese cuisine.

title: Lovely lunch spot in Hue Old Town
review: This is a lovely spot for lunch and the food was really good. Had the set menu and the food quality was delicious with plenty of variety. The service was really good and the staff very friendly. Would highly recommend if you visit Hue.

title: Great restaurant to visit
review: We had great service and wonderful food. All very fresh all very well presented. The service was quick and very efficient. I would definitely recommend this restaurant when you are in Hue.

title: Pretty rich in a nice place
review: This was the restaurant that our guide took us to during the visit to Hue and the truth is that we liked it a lot, despite being the typical menu prefix. We had the richest mango salad of the trip, some fried rolls that were not bad at all, finally tasted the rice crepes and continued enjoying the stir fry.

title: Most enjoyable
review: Went with my tour group. We had a set menu. Everything was delicious. The place was packed with tourists, us included, but the food and service were great.

title: This restaurant is a wonder!
review: This restaurant appears in all the guides and is recommended by all the attendants, but the reality is beyond what we expected. Of course the important thing is what is on the plate but here both the setting (old colonial house tastefully restored), the welcome, the service, the food and the addition are perfect. What more can be said than that it is the “address” that every gourmet is waiting for to enjoy a good meal in a city renowned for its gastronomy. A treat!

title: Lovely atmosphere
review: Wonderful atmosphere in this restaurant. The staff are very kind and more than happy to recommend some local dishes. I tried the green mango squid salad and the local pork dish. Both were incredibly tasty and quite affordable. My wife ordered the vegetable soup and the salmon, and those dishes were just as delicious.

title: Quality food and service.
review:
Advised by an acquaintance, we visited this restaurant by reservation and opted for a tourist menu, a comfortable formula to know a varied sample of its cuisine. Upon arrival, we were immediately accommodated at a good table on the terrace, a pleasant and quiet space.
From the very beginning, the service was quick and well organized: the drinks arrived quickly and the pace between courses proved very successful, without unnecessary waits or rushes. The food stood out for the quality of the product, careful cooking and a good combination of flavors, all served with friendliness and efficiency.
Of the dishes we tried, the spring rolls stood out especially, the green salad of mango, fresh and very balanced and the chicken stewed with chilli pepper, tasty but without being excessively spicy. For dessert, a passion fruit ice cream ball added a refreshing touch at the end of the meal. Despite the presence of some local customers, the public was mostly tourist, a fact that does not detract from a well-executed and highly recommended proposal to enjoy Vietnamese cuisine cared for in a pleasant environment.

title: Authentic Flavors, Excellent Service
review:
We’re currently traveling through Vietnam and came here on the recommendation of our private guide—and we’re so glad we did. While the restaurant may be more geared toward non-residents, the food was truly exceptional and beautifully authentic.

The service from Duong was phenomenal—warm, attentive, and genuinely passionate about ensuring we had a great experience. Portion sizes were perfectly balanced, and the variety and quality of the food and wine selection was honestly impressive—far more extensive than anything else we’ve encountered in Vietnam.

This was a standout dining experience and one we would happily return to. Highly recommend adding this restaurant to your list

title: Authentic and very good
review: A Vietnamese friend recommended this, and it was great. We went early and didn’t need a reservation. Got a few Vietnamese specialties to share.

title: The charm of a colonial house
review:

title: Outstanding dinner in Hue
review: Food and service were excellent. I had the goat cheese salad and penne bolognese and my husband had the imperial seafood multi-course dinner. Shared a bottle of red and large water and walked away for around $80. Can’t do that in the USA!! We would highly recommend.

title: Original flavours
review:
For now the best Nems of our journey
The dishes are excellent and the flavors are subtle
Our group recommends this very good Vietnamese restaurant
PS Reception and service are attentive but this is almost always the case in Vietnam

title: 6 stars!
review:
It is the absolute best restaurant at all points I have visited in Vietnam, and I have visited one the also with Michelin recommendation.
Absolutely greatest recommendation!

We had a 5-course menu and everything was delicious crab soup ,mango salad,spring roll, grilled pork with vegetables and rice,passion fruit ice cream.The comfort and service were perfect.

title: Very poor finish
review: Nice place. Good service. Acceptable food. When it comes to paying, we are told that the machine is not working. Nice scam. Why not say so at the outset and risk that the customer cannot pay in cash. Anyway, very bad finish. It seemed programmed. You can either look elsewhere or have cash for a buy a decent supper, no more.

review: Nice and atmospheric restaurant. Quick and friendly service, but the food was nothing special. Good fresh juices. A bit for the tourist and European to my taste, but clean and nice. I don't quite understand the high review here.

title: Refreshing lunch - Best place
review: Very nice environment, very large menu for everybody, service very nice and professional. AIRCO very important after visiting Hue, best place to be with very good balance price/quality

title: Very good restaurant for cheap
review: The restaurant has an à la carte section and menus. We have tried two of the menus and are very satisfied; they are hearty and offer a good diversity of dishes. The presentation is particularly neat and the taste is good, as are the cocktails.

title: Visited this restaurant upon arrival in Hue
review: It's delicious. Incredibly delicious food, very polite and attentive staff. Also really enjoyed the atmosphere.

title: Great restaurant
review: Great restaurant. Stopped here on the way to Da Nang. Food was delicious, service was great. The atmosphere was amazing!

title: Lunch near the citadel
review:
Situated close to Hue’s Imperial Citadel, this restaurant is an ideal option for a romantic dinner or dining experience mixing Vietnamese traditions with French influences.

title: Good alternative to Vietnamese restaurants
review: Nice restaurant in a nice colonial house. French and Vietnamese inspired cuisine, reasonable price. Not bad without being great.

title: Disappointment
review: A choice of French dishes a card in French but not a great success in our choice of dishes, a pizza with a very greasy bread dough, an oigon soup bof bof.., a frozen lemon sorbet only the crème brûlée takes its pin out of the game

I strongly advise

Possibility to eat on the terrace.

Various and mouthwatering menu 👍
My spouse working in the restaurant industry, was blown away by the avocado salad and lemon pie!

We recommend! 👍👍👍

review: Very tasty and great service. Prices are fully ok. Wine is also great, there is nothing to complain about. Highly recommended, I will come back.

title: Great Vietnamese and French food. Don’t miss if visiting Royal Palace Complex
review: Excellent place within the Royal Palace Complex. Our tour guide took us there. Great vegetarian options as well. Vietnamese’s and French food plus wide selection of beverages.

title: Old French villa
review: an old French colonial villa in Hue. We had the menu with our group. Beautiful old interior style. Food was catered for and good.

title: Succulent relaxation in the gardens of the carambola
review:
Restaurant located near the royal citadel. Quiet area, terrace tables.
I enjoyed the lunch menu.
Mango salad, vegetarian nems, caramel shrimp with sweet potato fries (normally rice) and an excellent scoop of homemade vanilla ice cream and a mango smoothie. A treat. I really recommend trying.

A little oasis of calm and excellent food. Great value, amazing staff. Dinner or lunch, as it is close to the Imperial Palace you need to book for lunch.
We went twice it's so good.

title: decent restaurant, but don't make a detour to get there
review: The place is beautiful, but the food was not up to our expectations. It lacked flavor and balance in the plates. The service is excellent. We found our meal expensive... in short, too expensive for quality.

review:

That said the set menu was very tasty and showed off the cuisine very well . Green mango salad was the winner
Staff friendly and showed us how to eat some of the dishes

title: Outdoor and Indoor Dining. Western and Vietnamese. Old Building. Charming.
review: Wide menu, well prepared. Friendly service. Decent English. We had a lovely lunch here. Quiet street. A strong choice for a meal in Hue. It’s friendly to Western food but still has a strong Vietnamese vibe.

title: Dinner with Vietnamese dishes
review: French restaurant, they gave us bread and butter (on our tour was the second time we found bread) a fabulous pumpkin past, then rolls and various other Vietnamese dishes, good banana dessert. Friendly and prompt service.

title: A nice surprise in Hue
review: Very nice place, refined. The service is very neat. The dishes are gourmet. The restaurant is in a French colonial house. Everything is pretty and very flowery.

title: Very good restaurant.
review: We had lunch at this restaurant indicated by our guide. Excellent food, fast service and very nice environment. Prices are fair. Stay in the Citadel right at the exit of the Imperial Palace. It's worth it.

title: The tasting garden
review:
A rich menu, varied menus including several allowing you to discover the culinary specialties of Hue. A charming home in the Imperial City near the Forbidden City.
What to discover when arriving in Hue

title: A nice change
review: In a lovely colonial style house that we wouldn't have found if it hadn't been recommended to us as tucked down a side street. A varied mainly French style menu with some good salad options. We went there for lunch before visiting the imperial palace. A nice change.

title: Lovely meal at a French Bistro in Hue (if you need a change from Vietnamese food)
review: Although we knew this was a French bistro we ended up ordering a pizza and salad to share. It was all very nice, well cooked and tasty. The service was also lovely and friendly and a nice ambience in the restaurant. An extensive menu but we were just a bit fooded-out (if that’s a word!?) by the time we ordered. Would recommend a visit though as some of the dishes looked lovely and would visit again if we return to Hue.

title: Excellent f&b
review:
Located inside the Citadel, this beautiful restaurant was the perfect spot for a romantic Valentine's Day meal. The wine was delicious and complimented the multi-course meal perfectly. We thoroughly enjoyed every course. And everything was freshly prepared, authentic Vietnamese cuisine.

The only downside is the popularity of this restaurant. Numerous tour groups (of 8 to 20 people) dined here, and it kept the wait staff overly busy. Our server apologized profusely (each time she came to our table) for the slow service and lack of attention.

Regardless, we had a wonderful meal here and would highly recommend. Probably best to come at 'off hours' so you don't have to fight the crowds -- and you absolutely MUST make a reservation!!!!!

Unfortunately we were the only guests because there is little going on right now, so don't let it deter us and definitely go!:)

title: Simply Succulent
review:
2 months since I left France and today I fundamentally needed to stick with the house... a good meat already made me salivated in the afternoon.
If I take the trouble to write this sweet story believe me it is that the establishment and the work done in the kitchen are up to standard.
Unexpectedly I come across a rather gastro map that seduces me from the start.
I bet on a tender Wagyu beefsteak, a piece that keeps all its promises served with its homemade puree and fresh vegetables.
How to tell you that the one who does not like this cuisine simply does not like French cuisine.
Moreover, the service offered by Mrs NGAN and her colleagues were really above my expectations.
The council was rather careful about the choice of food, I do not regret having crossed the level quite the contrary.
To tell you the truth, I am even writing this account before the addition, as I am so captivated by this past moment.
You will have understood it is not me that will make you flee the place, on the contrary, come to please yourself, personally I have Feasted and I wish you this same moment of ecstasy.
Ps I have goose bumps

title: Good alternative to Vietnamese cuisine
review: After two weeks in Vietnam, we wanted a changé from Vietnamese cuisine. La Paix was an excellent alternative. Steak for me and salmon for my wife. We were well looked after by Ngan and Van Anh. Three courses, beer and a Sangria for €30 for two. Good value.

title: Delicious Steak & Excellent Service
review:

Special thanks to Vananh for the excellent service — very attentive, friendly, and professional. She really made our evening special. Highly recommended!

I absolutely recommend .
The dishes are neat and delicious.
Thank you to Van Anh for his welcome and advice.

title: European cuisine under Vietnamese influence! Service with a smile!
review:
We ate some Western dishes but revisited with an Eastern influence! This passion fruit sauce to accompany salmon is excellent for example!
Service is of high quality thanks to Van Anh and his team and their unlimited kindness.
Thank you for your work!

title: Oustanding restaurant! 5-star good and service!
review: Prime location excellent food, outstanding service very reasonable price. I strongly recommend it. This is a very elegant upscale restaurant. You should visit it if you can. Van Anh and Van photos were extremely funny and knowledgeable. They introduced me to all the great dishes the restaurant offered

title: Surprising.
review:
Great food in we. cozy restaurant with super friendly service; thnx to Ngan.
Would definitely recommend this. We are happy to come back

title: Superbe
review:
Madame Ngan and Hoai are very friendly and smiling
Excellent food!!
Prices are affordable and try to learn some French words
I recommend

title: Great Italian in Hue! Five star food!! Great time!
review: Ván Anh and Ngân helped as and they were amazing! I have allergies and they double checked everything for me, they also checked in and taught me some Vietnamese. Stop by when you get a chance, their carbonara is the best in Hue.

title: Great food!
review: Food and service was great! Location was great. Ngan and Van Anh were fantastic and food came out wonderfully. We were craving Italian food in Hue and this has been the best spot so far. Atmosphere is very nice and romantic. Highly recommend!

title: Breakfast at hotel
review: The staff are super friendly, the service is fabulous and the waitresses can’t do enough to help. Ha and Van in the restaurant were very attentive

title: Lovely restaurant with French Taste!
review: I came here at night with 3 frs and we had a birthday celebration. The service was so good and also the staff were lovely and supportive. Waitress Ngan and Van Anh are the best, they helped us with taking photos and serving , cleaning bla bla... super nice!! Also, the food is affordable price and delicious!!! Lovely place for everyone!!

title: LaPaix restaurant was sensational
review:
The 2 occasions we visited food was excellent unbelievably good and staff Ngan & Hoai were the friendliest and most attentive staff we have had the pleasure of being served by in Vietnam @ Hue …
We will be back for 10Day stay in Hue 2026

title: Pleasantly surprised
review: Great! Quiet environment, the desserts are very good, even the tiramisu! (it's not like the Italian al buto cream was very good). The best thing about the place are the waitresses , Ngan and Tinhi very nice and always available, they make you feel at home!

title: A Memorable Experience
review: Delicious food with rich flavors, attentive service, and staff Vân Anh and Hoài were truly kind, thoughtful, and caring.

title: Amazing bistro, great service and yum food
review: We loved the ambience and service by Van Ank. The coconut coffee and iced latte complimented our burger + sandwich beautifully. Happy to have found this lovely bistro during our Hue trip

title: Top staff and very good food
review: The waitresses Van Anh and Hoai are very helpful kind and also nice!! They also speak good English, the food has a great quality we ate grilled meat and we loved it! Great Price Quality Ratio

title: La paix
review: Great dinner and excellent service especially in the people of van anh and Nhi. Excellent meat. I will return if I have the opportunity to return to Hue.

title: Super experience of this hotel.
review:
Excellent hotel. Bedrooms very spacious with tea/coffee and complimentary water daily refreshed. Bathroom toiletries also included.
A wide choice for breakfast with very helpful staff (Tha, Ha Tha& Can Nhi) who could speak some English and cook a very light omelette.

title: Thank you very much!
review:
Great! Cam on!
Thank you Mrs Phuong, Mrs Ngan, Mrs Van Anh!
The dishes are beautiful and the decorations are just amazing. The music that accompanies is beautiful! 😻😻😻
Thank you!!

title: Exquisite Wagyu and professional staff
review: Excellent restaurant! The staff very friendly and professional, plus one of the waitresses spoke English very well. The food was delicious, especially the wagyu steak, exquisite and at a very affordable price.

title: Dinner in Vietnam
review:
Very nice and tasteful dinner
Very well served by Vãn, with hardly any English or Vietnamese we were very well served. It's worth getting lost and finding the place

title: Best waitress in Hue!
review: We had the best time with the best waitress Vân and Tnhi, they are the sweetest persons we’ve met so far and it was delicious. 100% recommend!! 🩷🩷

title: Amazing !!
review: We spent two nights at the hotel connected to the restaurant, so we ate 2 breakfast and one supper that we got delivered in our room. The food was great and the service was impeccable. Van Anh Nhi took care of everything. The second breakfast, she knew what we wanted to eat, so she brang it to us directly, she's even the one who brang the food to our room. She was great and always there to help us.

It's a great place and you should
Vietnam is highly recommended
♥️ van Anh and ngan
They are amazing and greet you with a big smile
Mvh Solvejg and Peter
Fine restaurant. Nice french bistro atmosphere with a Vietnamese touch. Good food and very friendly staff. Excellent service.

title: Delicious fine food in Hue
review:
The lovely facade drew us into La Paix Bistro, we were spoiled with rustic baguette, duck liver pate and a sweet fruit jam. Our waiter was friendly and polite serving our meals with care - hot plates!!

The steak options were very good and of high quality

title: Francis and Linda
review: Had a lovely meal here tonight great food a beautifully presented in comfortable surroundings special mention to VA’N who was very pleasant .Would strongly recommend

title: Wonderful decoration and Food
review: This restaurant is really beautiful from decoration and attitude of staffs. Moreover, Friendly Behavior of manager and employees like Thao Nhi and Van Anh.

review: Our meal was great and are very grateful for the wonderful staff they have. They assist us a lot of times and were so warm and lovely. Thank you Hoai Van Anh, Ha Van and team for giving us an ultimate service!

title: GREAT PEOPLE! Delicious food!
review:
Spectacular treatment! Very good food
Van Ah and Thao Nhi have been very good to us! Very good people……………:::::::

title: Delighted!
review: The breakfast buffet selection was excellent; the best we have had in Vietnam so far. Everything very fresh and tasty. Captain Van Anh and Ngan very friendly and helpful. Would stay at this hotel again based on the breakfast buffet selection alone!

title: Breakfast
review:
Good service
Staff:friendly and polite..clean and good food and drinks serve for clients

title: Breakfast
review: Very good food, nice services, the staff T. NHí and V.ANH is very hospitality and friendly, see you again, hope to visit this place again.

title: Excellent food and service
review: We had a wonderfull diner at La paix bistro. From the starter to the desert , everything was delicious. The waygu beef was excellent. It beats some european restaurants on the food quality.The staff, Ngan and Vanh gave a great service and made you feel like a Vip.

title: Yum!
review: We loved all the combo deals for couples and the kids. This restaurant provides a tasty break from the local cuisine. Yum!

title: Restaurang
review:
This restarant have exelent service. The food was great both the western and vietnamese food.
Breakfast was great as a 5 star hotel. We could have all what we needed.
I can recomend this hotel and restaurang. We will come back

title: Thanh Lich Hotel Hue
review: We had excellent service, the food was very good, Van Anh Ngan was very helpful, we enjoyed our breakfast, especially the Pho,

title: Delicious food
review: Delicious food :) nice staff and beautiful restaurant inside. Good location. Steak platter was yummy and the tea. Hoai Vananh made good tea

title: Quality service and hospitality
review: Very welcome. Van An Nhi is smiling and very friendly. It takes into account the needs of customers.Quality service Recommendation +++++ . Thanks.

title: good food and staff
review: thank you staff . Friendly service, Good food . the wagyu beef and pasta was amazing.You should try th food. I will come back lapaix

title: Fantastic Service
review: Van anh and Ngan was excellent. Such good service…very friendly. Food was excellent and wonderful people. Would highly recommend!

title: Meals in Hue
review: Perfect welcome, good meal with assortment of dishes and nice place. I recommend for a meal with family or friends.

title: Very good food and lovely waitress
review: Very good steaks, tender and well accompanied. A French paranthese in Vietnam. Various choices and good flavor. The waitress is really adorable. I also recommend salted coffee.

title: Very nice restaurant!
review:
It is a very nice restaurant and we ate well. The service is very good, we were served by Van Anh and Hoai who were caring for us and our children.
We recommend!

title: Amazing dinner experience
review:
Staff are so friendly and the service was fantastic.

Great combo deals. Really good value and super tasty food. (Paid 25 USD for 7 dishes - still cant believe how cheap it was)

Definitely would go back.

title: Great European Dinner in Hué
review: Vananh made the experience positive. Great food and impeccable service! We tried the meat and it was delicious.

title: Very nice
review: Good food and good staff. Beef steak delicious and Very special drinking water I think you should try. I will come back by lapaix Bistro

title: An absolute must
review: Beautiful interior, extensive menu of snacks to full dinners. And they have super delicious wines! The service is very friendly and personal, you feel among friends even though it was the first time we went there. Especially Van Anh is doing perfectly. Too bad we don't stay in Hue any longer otherwise we definitely came back. Highly recommended!!

title: A perfect fusion of local and French flavours
review: We took the whole family to La Paix Bistro and were impressed by the professional and experienced chef who created extraordinary dishes. The fusion of Vietnamese and French cuisine is simply delicious! The kids loved the desserts. The only drawback: the service is a bit slow during peak hours. Despite this, we will definitely come back to taste other dishes of their innovative menu.

title: Excellent restaurant with great choices. Worth coming back for when you have some time to relax and enjoy the ambience.
review: Van anh and van very good service and meal exceptional. We had aussie steak cooked to perfection and desert lovely too. Recommended

title: A romantic corner with French charm!
review: The authentic French urban style transported us directly to Paris. The subdued lighting, soft music and low-key service created the perfect setting for an unforgettable evening. The dishes were works of art and the wine, exquisite. A magical place in Hue!

title: Stay Hue
review: The staff is very friendly. The food is delicious, Vananh and Hoai are very friendly. The place is very quiet. I recommend.

title: A haven of peace in the heart of Hue
review: We discovered this little gem during our stay in Hue. La Paix Bistro really offers a serene and peaceful setting in the heart of the city. After an intense day of sightseeing, what a joy to relax in this quiet place! The terrace is particularly nice to enjoy a romantic meal. The discreet but attentive staff met all our expectations. A real haven of peace!

title: Innovative cuisine made from local ingredients
review: The chef perfectly combined Vietnamese ingredients and French recipes. Especially the steak dishes were really delicious! The price was reasonable and affordable, so it was good to visit as a family trip. Reservation is required on weekends. You will be sure to listen to it after your next visit.

title: Enthusiastic staff 👌
review: A serene and inviting spot that exudes warmth, offering the perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of daily life. The atmosphere is calm and soothing, making it an ideal place to unwind and relax. Nhang, a delightful and cheerful young woman, took care of us with a genuine smile and a positive attitude. Her friendly demeanor and attentive service added a special touch to our experience, making us feel truly welcomed and well-cared for.

title: Excellent Restaurant in Hue, Vietnam with a wide selection of Vietnamese and European dishes.
review:
Excellent Restaurant in Hue, Vietnam with a wide selection of Vietnamese and European dishes. Friendly staff and reasonably priced.

Vañ Anh Ngān looked after us today and ensured we had a great dining experience.

Food was lovely

title: Very good restaurant
review: Very welcome, refined and good cuisine. Very Good experience in Hue I advise you strongly in a neighborhood that is very lively.

title: Visit of Hue to Vietnam
review: Very welcome, very nice service. Careful. Nice meal. Good quality Vietnamese dishes and staff speak French and English.

title: Peace bistro restaurant and Bistro
review: The service is excellent and the people are extremely kind! We ate well with a good atmosphere. We will come back on our next visit. Van anh and van are very friendly.

title: Taste sensation
review: Beautiful food and very friendly staff. Many thanks to Supervisor Ngan for her advice and excellent humour- and thanks to Assistant V Anh

title: Good food and good staff
review: The food was very good and the staff was very nice! Had a great time here! Van Anh, Van were so nice! we would definetly recommend!

title: All right.
review: Oh, good. Nice atmosphere but the food could be better. Great service staff. I hope I do. Tam biet

title: Excellent Dining Experience!
review:
Excellent Dining Experience!

The restaurant at this hotel offers outstanding service and a diverse selection of dishes. The staff is welcoming, professional, and attentive, ensuring a pleasant dining experience. The food is well-prepared, fresh, and beautifully presented, catering to a variety of tastes.

The ambiance is elegant and comfortable, making it an ideal place for both casual meals and special occasions. A special thank you to Van Anh & Hoai for their exceptional service, and to all the staff for their warm hospitality. They truly made my dining experience even more enjoyable.

Overall, a great choice for quality dining with excellent service. Highly recommended!

03/03/2025

title: Don’t go unless you want to be forced to write a 5 star review
review: The food wasn’t too terrible, but not great either. I wouldn’t recommend. Also, when you go there they will insist you write a 5 star review on the spot, and will stand over your shoulder till you press done. Now that I am not there, I can freely speak on how I feel.

title: Excellent service, fun location, good food
review:
Very good food, both Vietnamese and International. Wine served.
The service was very good - attentive, concerned that we should enjoy our meal.
Both of our waitresses went the extra mile to ensure our satisfaction.
Many thanks to Van Anh and Hoai for their attention - both are excellent staff.

title: Good food.
review:
Food is excellent, good service and fine athmosphere.
The staff is good. Ngan,Van Anh
Ve recomend the food. We are all vert pleased.

title: Good food and staff
review:
Good food and prices
Had my first gold steak haaa was great
Very good service van anh, Nhi don’t leave you waiting very quick and friendly

title: Once there food is enough !
review:
The food portions are a mockery of size. Children's plates are big against it. I ate a steak with potato puree.
It wasn't bad taste. The staff is temporarily overwhelmed.

title: One morning in Hue at La Paix bistro. With Phuong and Van Anh.
review:
A pleasant welcome, the meal served for breakfast was excellent.
We recommend the property. Moreover the setting is charming.

title: Lunch before overnight train to Hanoi
review:
This bistro is perfect for a tasty lunch.
Our waitress, Van, could not have been friendlier and kinder. Our salmon pizza was just what we needed before embarking on a long journey to Hanoi.

title: Great little find
review: Did a walk in at this restaurant late afternoon. The choice of food was vast and had western, eastern and vegetarian choices. We can recommend the beef Bao- amazing. The staff were fantastic - Ngan and Hoai being very attentive.

title: Great dinning experience
review:
We visited the restaurant twice on our time in Hue. The staff and manager were very friendly, attentive and efficient. The food was delicious and well presented. Nothing was too much trouble, even though they had a big group of diners in, the service was exceptional.
A happy well fed couple from Ireland.

title: Thank you van t.nhi q.nhi for the good humor
review:
Restaurant very nice, with adorable waitresses, especially van y.nhi q.nhi, she was so kind to us, always smiling!

The dishes were good (pumpkin soup + Margarita pizza)

title: Great experience
review:
I was very well received by the staff: van Anh and hoai and Ngan.
Very good restaurant that I recommend!
We have a small welcome dish (free)

title: A romantic corner in Hue
review: The combination of French cuisine with Vietnamese touches left us fascinated. The welcoming atmosphere, soft music and attentive service created the perfect evening. Prices are reasonable for the quality they offer. We'll definitely be back!

title: An oasis of European flavours
review: We found this gastronomic jewel by accident. The elegant atmosphere, dishes prepared with fresh local ingredients and impeccable service won us over. The Franco-Vietnamese fusion menu is a real treat. The outdoor terrace is just lovely.

title: Friendly waitress
review:
The quality of the meal was very good and for a very democratic price.
The staff is very welcoming and smiling.
Thank you.

title: A magical evening in Hue
review: We were charmed by the authentically French atmosphere. The chef has a perfect grasp of the classics, and the wine list is remarkable. Attentive service and romantic atmosphere make it the perfect place for a romantic dinner. A real little corner of France in Vietnam.

title: Charming bistro
review: The authentic French atmosphere and soft lighting created the perfect ambiance. Their wine selection is impressive, and the steak was cooked to perfection. The outdoor seating area under the stars made our evening magical. Truly a hidden gem for couples!

title: Great Service
review: Shout out to Quynh Nhi, Van, Hoai, and Thao Nhi for amazing service! Friendly welcome from the staff, great place to pass the time.

title: Very good local cuisine
review: Excellent food, very good value for money

title: Average opinion
review:
We were disappointed. Unfortunately, dishes too fat. We tasted: nems , soup and the dish with the yellow rice cake, and it did not convince us. Side sauce with little taste.
However, the price remains very interesting. I'm not going back.

title: Excellent food and drinks
review: Excellent food at very reasonable prices!

title: Delicious cuisine and very sweet price
review:
Excellent experience at Maison Trang Hue restaurant. The cuisine was really tasty, with tasteful dishes and very democratic prices.

We were served very quickly and the atmosphere was very pleasant.

Special mention also for fresh fruit juices, absolutely delicious.

An address we highly recommend to Hue!

title: Delicious local cuisine
review: I recommend the meal combo, a delight!

title: Disappointing Meal!
review:
Read the reviews for this restaurant and 3 of us went. Very, very disappointed. Food was ok at best. Price was cheap but you get what you pay for. We had a much, much better meal for lunch at Madame Thu!
I'd turn back if I were you.

title: Vegetarian
review: Great vegetarian food, delicious spring rolls!

title: Meals bof
review: Restaurant recommended but we were disappointed with the meal. Not that it’s bad but it’s just ordinary despite the rating. Value for money comes a bit to save the day but you will find better elsewhere

title: Very good address
review: I recommend this address to Hue to eat local dishes. The dishes are tasty and nicely served, the prices cheap. The place is nice, quiet.

title: Best food in Vietnam
review: An amazing hidden place! Lovely staff and the best food I have ever tasted in Vietnam!!

title: Perfect.
review:
We took the tasting menu and it was very very hearty and excellent.
The service is perfect and fast.
Go ahead with your eyes closed

title: Favourite find so far
review:
Such a beautiful hidden gem. Staff are lovely and accommodating. There is real pride in this business they run and the food they serve.
The food did not disappoint. It's been a favourite for myself in Hue.
Highly recommend.

title: Great local experience!
review:
We ate here two nights always trying different dishes that we really enjoyed. It was very nice to have dinner in a homely and local environment.
The reception is great, the prices low and the portions abundant.

Try it for an authentic experience outside the city's restaurants!

title: Delicious lunch in Hue! Must visit!
review: Absolutely delicious! Authentic Hue cuisine, very friendly staff and diverse menu! Everything we tried we loved! Highly recommend!

title: It's delicious!
review: We found this place near our hotel, where we ate typical dishes, cooked well and of excellent quality.

title: Excelente
review: Food amazing and abundant for a very good price. The waitress was very kind. Seem to be family owned. Good atmosphere. :)

title: Miam
review:
A family restaurant lost at the end of a dead end. A simple but warm environment with mother and daughter. A simple service but people with a big heart and helpful.
We took 2 menus. Delicious. Value for money unbeatable.
Go ahead with your eyes closed!

title: An absolute MUST TRY when in Hue. Friendly staff 😊
review: An absolute pleasure to have eaten here. Food was amazingly delicious. Service was great. A definite must try.😋😍!!!!!

title: Food with soul and good treatment
review: We loved the food from this place, the treatment they gave us wonderful, they took the trouble to explain how to eat each dish. Food with a great taste and soul. The atmosphere is nice. Family business run by several women who can be seen to like what they do. We'll be back tomorrow.

title: Must-see restaurant in Hue
review:
Attention 10.
A bunch of ladies. Homemade food and everything excellent
There were 4.
Each ordered a unique dish.
I asked for the menu for 1 person that was tasting type.
We got to try them all.
Very welcoming

title: The clothes don't act like monks.
review:
Excellent value for money with generous portions and small touches.
The restaurant is located in an alley set back from the main avenue, do not trust the path, the restaurant is worth it!

title: Delicious food.
review: Delicious food. Had the Bun Chay vegetarian noodle soup and was so good. Full of flavour and veges. Need to walk up an alleyway to find it. Highly recommend.

title: Go there now!
review:
Very yummy local food! It was prepared very fast and tasted amazing. The prices were cheap for two people roughly 200k.
A must go place in hue!

title: Super Bo Bun Hue
review:
Good restaurant at the end of an alley. We went there for dinner with three friends and we feasted.
Special mention for the Bo Bû Hue!!!

Thank you!

title: Excellent food , family business run by two lovely ladies who went out of their way to explain the different dishes
review: Excellent local dishes they offer tasting platters to sample lots of different local delights. Has a sample platter for 160,000 so much food we felt like we were going into a food coma !!!

title: Don't miss it!!!!
review:
Appearances deceive. A place where the food is SPECTACULAR and the price is very affordable.
Very accommodating treatment from staff.

title: Amazing.
review: Amazing food. The best Vietnamese rolls I've ever tasted. It's a little hidden. Family business. Lovely.Price laugh. To go without hesitation

title: Enjoying the food
review: I found the place by searching the internet. Your reviews do justice. Bun Bo Hue was delicious. We also ordered a rice. Drink a lipton tea and a beer. All good, Fast Service, Good Price and with a smile. Recommended!

title: Highly recommended
review: Delicious dinner, very well priced and lovely staff. We ordered some Vietnamese rolls and noodles with pork that were very good.

title: Perfect to die for.
review:
xcellent Restaurant with prepared dish, very natural way, tastes explode in the mouth. everything has been made with love.
Welcoming and the perfect price.

title: Dinner
review:
Very good! Nice time with friends and healthy meals:))
Nice and kind staff, soothing setting. Mood music well chosen.

title: GOOD, NICE AND CHEAP (and very very rich)
review: Wonderful place. Exceptional food and close treatment, very friendly and attentive waitress. Great variety and menus to try a little everything. They explained each dish and how to eat it. A real joy. Finally, unbeatable value for money. Cheap and delicious.

title: Fantastic!
review: Maison Trang restaurent is a really nice place to enjoy your meal. The menu has a lot of vegan and vegetarians options, and the dishes are so affordable. I recommend!

title: Great set menu, generous serving of local dishes, beautifully presented
review: Great set menu of interesting local rice dishes. Soup was fantastic. Beautifully presented and terrific value very popular and quick

title: Simple and extremely good. Must not be missed when visiting Hué
review:
Mega Vietnamese food in authentic Vietnamese homestay.
Extremely good and friendly. Small family business.

title: A must in Hué
review:
Excellent, typical Vietnamese cuisine and very friendly Service.
If you want to get to know the real Vietnamese food, you have to go to Maison Trang. Hidden in the pedestrian zone of Hué is this gem. Highly recommended!

title: The place not to be missed in Hue
review:
Restaurant difficult to find at the bottom of an alley, but which largely a little perseverance.
Outdoor or indoor tables.
I chose a menu combined with all the specialties. A real joy. Different flavours and textures.
Only one disappointment, the pancake which was a little too hard, but that does not change the overall feeling of this restaurant.
Fast, efficient and friendly service.

title: Best spring rolls in vietnam
review: A little bit off the beaten track,compared to the busy street you walk past before hand but truly amazing food. Massive portion size and very cheap. Xx

title: Quick dinner after a long day
review: The food here is fantastic! My friend and I both went for the set meal for 1 (160,000) and were completely stuffed! Each dish was amazing.

title: A little MUST TRY!
review:
Best Dinner in 5 Days of Vietnam!
Friendly staff, GREAT food!
I recommend the test menu with 7 courses (really plentiful!) to taste a bit of everything!
Local slightly hidden but easy to locate.
Away from the chaos of the city.
Absolutely to TRY!😍

title: Maison Trang - fresh and delicious food.
review: A must visit little restaurant, hidden down a lane. Beautiful fresh Vietnamese food, with local specialties. Light, clean and great service. Yum! Definitely our favourite place to eat near our Hotel in Hue.

title: Excellent family restaurant
review:
Very good restaurant.
Family and good price.
Don’t be afraid to enter the small alley that leads to the restaurant, it’s worth it

title: Disappointing and definitely a tourist trap
review: We visited this place after seeing a huge number of good reviews online. When we arrived the restaurant was full of tourists likely following the same reviews we did. We often have found a restaurant with more locals in it has better food and this rang true in this case. The food was ok, not the most flavoursome we have had, and seemed to be bulked out with a lot of a cabbage. The service was a bit hectic given the busyness and we didn’t receive one of the drinks we ordered at all and then it took a while to pay at the end. Overall it was quite disappointing and definitely have had much better food elsewhere in Hue and Vietnam in general.

title: Great local food! 100% recommend a visit.
review: Amazing local food. The Bun Bo Hue was delicious, as was the Nem Lui (Pork with Lemongrass) and the fried spring rolls were the best we’ve had in Vietnam!

title: Must visit
review: Amazing food! A do not miss when in hue. Friendly staff and lovely atmosphere. Highly recommend especially the beef noodles

title: Amazing food, staff and atmosphere
review:
If I could give this place six stars I would. We are here twice. Both times we had amazing foods and the atmosphere and the staff was wonderful. We will definitely come back.
I highly recommend this place.

title: Good food
review: The food was really good and the service was also very nice. It's value for money and is operated by a family. They give you complementary fruit post meal which is great service,

title: Beautiful discovery, exquisite
review:
The dishes are exquisite.
Vietnamese specialities, lots of flavor
Very welcome
Kindness
Explanation of food
Mango juice, excellent
I highly recommend

title: Best place in Hué
review:
Food here is incredibly delicious, at a cheap price and people are sooooo nice.

Plenty of vegan options too.

We ordered :
* 2 drinks
* 1 veggie Bánh Khoái Chay (Stuffed Rice Pancake)
* 1 Bún Bò Hué (Hue Beef Noodles)

for only 150k dong and everything was EXCELLENT !

We recommend it 100%

title: Very enjoyable casual spot
review: Great casual small restaurant. Delicious and copious meals, friendly staff and fellow customers. We are more than happy to recommend it

title: Family atmosphere, genuine local cuisine
review: Hidden in narrow streets a real surprise! A friendly and warm atmosphere for a family and authentic local cuisine. Delicious vegetarian options, we tasted fried tofu and many other veg plates. Greatly recommend!

title: Very much recommended
review: So far the best Vietnamese food I had in Hue, highly recommended! Service was also great, I went for lunch and it was not very crowded.

title: Maison Trang Excellent !
review: Very nice food, local. Waiter shows you how to eat the dishes as it is very spécial, especially delicious. I recommend strongly.

title: Perfect, healthy and tasty at good price
review:
Informal place down a side alley, friendly and inviting and with excellent and non vegetarian cuisine.

Serene recommended us not to have 2 set menus as it would be too much and the set vegetarian was perfect; we took home the cold pork rolls we also ordered.

Everything was delicious and textural, clean and healthy as a bonus.

With 2 large beers VND 265k was really good value.

Best meal in Hue we have had.

title: Hidden Gem
review: Delicious spot hidden behind a busy street - a true treasure! The beef noodles were so fresh and the spring rolls were some of the best we’ve had in Vietnam👌🏼

title: Great place
review: A place to repeat. Great noodles and rolls. They brought us gift watermelon for dessert. Very good everything.

title: Excellent food and welcoming staff
review: Delicious Vietnamese meals. Warm professional service. We ate three times here and loved every single one of our choices. Our favourite in Hue. Thank you Maison Trang!

title: Great food, great service and great value.
review: We are staying in a hotel around the corner and came here to eat having read some online reviews, we are so glad that we did, the food is delicious and the service and atmosphere was excellent, yet another 5 star review for this fabulous place.

title: Best dinner in Hue
review:
What a beautiful experience, from the welcome to the end everything has been absolutely amazing. All the dishes are flavorful and absolutely outstanding, Banh beo, Nem lui, Nem Ran and the Vietnamese fried rice… everything was delicious….
Very hidden gem in Hue, at the end of a “mistery” Halley… walking distance from the busy night area… love the place!!
Thank you for the amazing dinner.

title: That's great!
review: I'm traveling Vietnam from north to south and, so far, this was by far the best lunch I've ever had! Exquisite food, super friendly staff, hidden enough to be a little hard to find but undoubtedly super authentic and away from the most touristic streets. Super recommended!

title: Don’t miss out on this great restaurant !
review: This was such a great find when searching for local Vietnamese restaurants. The food was delicious and the atmosphere was warm and friendly. There were a couple of smaller tables but most people sit on a big table together so very social. If you’re in Hue definitely make sure you check it out!

title: Fantastic
review:
Fantastic food and staff.
Quantities are very generous and food was delicious
We tried the set menus to give a try to different dishes and were not disappointed about anything
1000 % recommended

title: Wonderful
review:
Just wonderful, clean, nice excellent cuisine
Unmissable address!!!!
It changes tourist restaurants

title: Another good experience in Hue
review: Excellent experience. Found this place exploring restaurants for local food bun bo. The place is inside a dark tiny street. Take off your shoes and enjoy thé food. Really good the bun bo Hue beef noodles and the bun chay vegetarian noodles were just amazing. Stuff had been very kind and they found us a place even if it was almost full. Try it!

title: Excellent. Eaten.
review:
It's a very good family restaurant,
Nice service and very good local food.
I would recommend to anyone. It can be reached by corridors, but is well given.

title: Amazing place, what a gem of a find!
review: We were recommended to go here and cannot believe the high quality and generous quantities of the really tasty food! Very very reasonable prices too!!

title: Good food
review: I liked the place. I had a good dinner, it was well presented and good. I took a dish that changed from what I had already eaten elsewhere, based on eggplants. The service was good. Good value for money

title: Very pleasant experience
review:
Very good experience. Very friendly staff and very good food. Restaurant in a dead end, step forward without hesitation.
We highly recommend

title: Excellent traditional Vietnamese food
review: Excellent traditional Vietnamese food, very well served, with great quality, variety and very wide in quantity, very good value for money. 100% recommended

title: Maison Tang is a must(ang)
review: OMG! We had two set menus for one (husband has shellfish allergy), beer…. Food was excellent, so tasty, and cheap. Less than £10. Go, you’ll not be disappointed

title: Great food in a peaceful place - go: you won't regret it!
review: We had a warm welcome and, after a few hiccups in getting all our order, the food was fabulous! It's a shame we're leaving in the morning, as we'd happily go there again.

title: Vietnamese vegetarian restaurants are the best
review:
And the bands keep on playing. Maison Trang is excellent. I had the vegetarian stir-fried noodle...OMG...
My eyes are way bigger than my stomach, and I had to take my fresh tofu rolls to go. Their food portions are generous, and although it is a place for backpackers and the hostel crowd...WOW!!!

title: Very good food at peaceful place.
review: Probably the best overall meal I've had in 11 days in Vietnam. The service cannot be faulted. In short, a pleasant place with good food - just a little out of the way, which is also an advantage.

title: Flavour Manual
review:
This restaurant was very well located, we went there with our eyes closed.
Quite a wait to be able to order but why not if it is to feast.
Except that the dishes that were taken to us really lacked flavors.
I ordered a discovery menu, the only side sauce was said to be peanut but the taste was very light. The other sauce was a chilli concentrate.
Little salad, no mint, no coriander or other spices that are found everywhere else.

title: Great food and service at Maison Trang
review: We each ordered a set meal for one, my husband ordered the vegetarian one. All the food was absolutely delicious. Go hungry!!

title: Great Restaurant with authentic Vietnamese food
review:
This is a delicious authentic Vietnamese restaurant. All the food was delicious. The staff were so sweet, and helpful, and very respectful. We are so glad we found you.
Happy Lunar New Year to you all!

title: Expectations were not met.
review:
Something new for us,which is good but food are lacking in taste.

Mislead us about 30% additional because of TET, what was posted on their wall that we read is that charging 30% starts Jan.29-Feb.4
We ate today which is Jan.28 but still charged us with additional 30%. It was their mistake but never admitted.

Oh well nothing great in Maison Trung.

title: We feasted!!
review:
To find this nugget you will have to follow signs because it is not obvious at first.
To eat in this restaurant you will have to put your shoes off, fun though.
The food is incredibly good, we feasted. Unbeatable value for money. 100% recommend this family restaurant.

title: Maison trang bravo
review:
Very family restaurant the cuisine is excellent
The staff is very welcoming and kind
Thank you for this moment of pleasure

title: Class
review: Food was amazing, £2 for pork, rice, fried egg and veggies. My friends went for the set menu which looked unreal. Very very friendly, would defo recommend.

title: Amazing food
review: This family restaurant offer very nice dishes well prepared… we had steam veggies .. some banana leaf filled with pork which they were amazing.. and then we had a vegetarian pancake which was very tasty… I definitely recommend this place

title: Family environment
review: The cuisine is typical Vietnamese in a familiar and comfortable environment. The staff is extremely friendly and professional, ready to explain each dish and recommend the best combinations of flavors. The restaurant is always full so better to book in advance.

title: Maison Trang
review: Hidden path nestled through the hutong, the food quintessentially Vietnamese with fair price and warmest people. Honesty badge earned! Thought to order 2 set menu but the lady mention one would be sufficient.

title: Great restaurant
review:
Great service, great food. They have a set menu for one person if you wanted to try a sample of food.

The staff knew English.

title: Hue, delicious cuisine
review: A delicious meal. We have been in Vietnam for 4 weeks and visited many regions. This food, a menu, was freshly prepared, of differentiated taste and inexpensive.

title: Coffee is OK
review: Good restaurant serving warm scenery beautiful green and quiet space with a loud cry very chill

title: A fun experiment.
review: Lovely staff looks cool and stable to test.

title: If you have free time, experience.
review: Cool space in fresh green trees and good quality of service

title: Point to Ideal
review: Where to come interesting method of service and service very dedicated and fun clean space

title: Lovely enthusiastic service.
review: Beautiful room, good water, lots of views to take.

title: Experience the quality of the wooden service.
review: Fresh restaurant space, tasteful drink, average water price staff enthusiasticly assessed good

title: Perfect for family and friends on weekends.
review: Customer warmth, good quality of service, stable water price for the general level

title: Good experience, next time we will go to the restaurant.
review: Pretty good experience in the wood, the cf trip is very fun and interesting space quiet and cool, good service enthusiastic service

title: The Wooden Coffee House
review: Cozy spacious restaurant reasonable for group gathering, water is fine, staff very enthusiastic

title: Evaluate the restaurant.
review: Cool space, good quality drinks

title: Introduction to Cf Wood
review: Good water is cheap in Vietnam too good everyone should come

title: Great place.
review: Great staff, friendly staff, price ok.

title: Wood cf 164 spring water good staff enthusiastic
review: Beautiful restaurant, enthusiastic staff, everyone should try.

title: Nice cf in the house must try.
review: Beautiful staff and good drinking water.

title: cf hue
review: The water was good, the trees were cool, and the night was full of music

title: wooden cf
review: Wide cf, ok price, helpful staff

title: Cf Wood
review: Spacious space, ok drinks, friendly staff, with a play area for kids

title: Gourmet Bottles
review: The second time I visited Cui, the experience was still great, more and more plants, more beautiful, airy, good milk tea, reasonable price, well worth trying

title: Beautiful place.
review: It's a very nice atmosphere and a nature-friendly place. Drinks are delicious and where you want to come again? Perfect as a photo spot. I recommend you to visit:)

title: Beautiful and good drinks
review: It was great! I had a good time and the coffee was amazing. The view is also very pleasant I would 100% recommend going there

title: Amazing garden
review: Beautiful scenery if you love serenity and flora! Truly a amazing garden to have a drink. Great coffee and vibe. Staff is very kind and helpful

title: Cui Coffe Hue
review:
Nice view, romantic, chill like a forest. Food and drink are good. Highly recommend!
If you come to Hue, must go and see. Take this moment for your memories.

title: Excellent restaurant
review: Excellent restaurant in downtown Hue. All the dishes had taste, the skewers cooked and seasoned to the point. Discreet and friendly waitresses. The French boss came to talk with us. Restaurant not to be missed if you go to Hue.

title: Lovely surprise
review: Lovely little bistro. Good food and excellent service.

title: Visit weather
review:
Good food good service
Friendly and smiling staff

title: Sure value
review: Excellent Vietnamese cuisine, some French dishes, nice room, staff with little care

title: Excellent restaurant
review:
Restaurant run by a Frenchman.
Very welcome.
Various menu offering local recipes but also dishes with a French note.
Reasonable prices.
We enjoyed it.
We recommend.

title: Nice experience
review:
Advice of our guide we enjoyed this Franco-Vietnamese meeting
Reception and impeccable services
Various cuisine
Presence of the boss « le Marseillelais « 😉😜 who has a little word for each table
What to do if you move to Hue

title: Good food and service
review: Nice and clean restaurant. Vietnamese and European map. Bbq skewers eaten, recommended!

title: A beautiful address
review:
We liked the food so much that we went there 2 times.A menu with Vietnamese but also French specialties. A beautiful restaurant where the staff is pleasant and efficient. Thanks to Christian for his welcome and sharing.
Good value for money

title: Restaurant Bistro La Carambole Hué
review:
Excellent restaurant.
The menu is varied and the dishes are very good and the prices very affordable.
In addition, the dishes are nicely presented.
The service is efficient and the staff always smiling.
The boss is concerned about the satisfaction of his customers.

title: International cuisine in Hue
review: Possibly the best international cuisine restaurant in Hue. They have a very varied menu (meat, fish, pizza, pasta, sandwhich... ) and in Spanish. The quality price is exceptional (20 euros person, including drink and dessert). Maybe the meats.

title: A little bit of France
review:
To do without hesitation the menu includes many Vietnamese specialties but not that.
You can also treat yourself with a hot goat salad or a pancake ham cheese
I recommend without fail

title: Hue Village restaurant
review: Great restaurant, amazing menu & food very delicious - staff & owner very helpful & friendly. All in all & great experience & would definitely recommend.

title: La Carambole Hue
review: Two Ch’ti going through Hue, we had a diner there, experience was great, we felt like home. Food, service on top Don’t miss it if you are passing by Hue

title: Excellent
review:
We had dinner last night at this establishment.
The welcome was delicate and not aggressive like some restaurant.
We were given time to look at the menu.
The choices and rates are very correct for quality.
The beef was extremely tender.
The team takes care and the management takes the time to come and slip you a word.
Very good address

title: Not to be missed
review:
We had dinner at 4 this Sunday, February 22.
Have chosen shrimp skewers, chicken skewers, beef skewers and grilled squid.
Four excellent dishes. Value for money unbeatable. And besides the boss and his teams are very friendly.
Establishment to be attended

title: Great Meal in Hue
review: The food was excellent. I had a breaded pork steak with fries. The dipping sauce that came with the pork was excellent. The french bread was warm and made that day with the butter. The local beer was only $1.25 each USD. My total meal was $9.00 USD. I would go back if I'm ever back in HUE.

title: Andbfales
review: Recommended, good food for all kinds of people. I ate ducks with orange sauce. Nice service and the owner was present and there was a good mood.

title: Great restaurant
review:
Excellent restaurant, the quality of the products and the restaurant's conduct is impeccable. Perfect welcome. I had a great time. I highly recommend you.
Jo.

title: Good.
review:
We had two meals both meals were varied (one French and one Vietnamese)
It was very good.
good address
Recommend

title: Very good Vietnamese dishes
review:
Despite the presence of many Western tourists it is a very good restaurant that offers Vietnamese dishes in addition to more international dishes.
The service is nice and the dishes succulent.

title: A good restaurant
review: This was recommended by our tour guide so we were a little sceptical - however it was excellent. Very pleasant ambience away from the noisy street and good service. We had one of the set menus which was delicious. A lovely taste of French/Vietnam food with different flavours. Definitely worth a visit

title: Pleasant diversion after many meals with local food
review: Great choice for a temporary break with Vietnamese cuisine, although the menu also offers many local dishes. The owner is a nice French gentleman who stopped to have a chat with us tourists.

title: Table not to be missed
review: A recommended address to find good cuisine well from home with tender and excellent beef fillet served either with green pepper cream or mushrooms or with something else delicious. You must come because in addition the atmosphere is nice and relaxing.

title: Lovely restaurant with friendly, attentive staff, good food and prices!
review:
Our second time here during our 5 days in Hue. French onion soup was good, fish soup amazing. Duck in orange with vegetables was very good, chicken with lemongrass and rice was also very good. Lemon tart dessert was great! The house red is recommended, the staff are friendly and attentive, definitely worth a try as the prices are also very good 😁
.

title: One of the best boo addresses
review:
Traditional and refined cuisine attentive staff
With a little air of France in Vietnam
I highly recommend

title: Excellent
review:
Onion soup with fondue better than
World. Wine to review, friendly and friendly owner and staff. I will return

title: Good experience.
review:
Food well prepared and tasty, beautiful and welcoming space, professional and dedicated service.
Good wine card

title: Excellent, really top!
review:
One of the Best Restaurants in Hue!
Everything is super good: the avocado-mango salad is fresh and delicious, the chicken and meat skewers are perfectly cooked, and the milkshakes are excellent. Top-notch desserts

The service is impeccable, the staff is adorable, and the owner is really great, very welcoming and attentive.
You feel good right now.

Frankly, top top, I recommend 100% 👍
Don’t miss out if you are in Hue!

title: Pizza not approved
review: I didn't like the pizza pasta it looked like pie pasta the lemon juice didn't taste. But always have customers think that the other dishes should be good. Attendees attention, clean and organized place

title: Excellent
review: Great cuisine whether French or Vietnamese I tasted both the setting is cozy with French music as at the moment Nogaro as Toulouse happy to hear excellent service the girls are super efficient and charming that happiness to advise strongly

title: Fun meeting of traditional French dishes
review: Fun meeting of traditional French dishes and some Vietnamese arrangements. Hearty and good quality dishes. We were not particularly looking for French cuisine but it was good. Good wine list which is very affordable by local standards.

title: Bout de France in Vietnam
review:
The beaches were very hearty and and super good!
They make excellent BBQ skewers:)
I recommend this restaurant, the staff is very kind and helpful.

title: A must-see address in Hué
review: An unmissable address in Hué in the tourist district. The setting is sumptuous, the Welcoming quality. Vietnamese cuisine rubs shoulders with French cuisine and everything is of very good quality. Christian is a great professional well accompanied by his wife and a nice team. You can go with your eyes closed

title: Great food and something for everyone!
review:
This is highly recommended!!
Great food for a very good price.
Lots of choice in both food and drink. Nice baguette beforehand.
Location is nice and the service very nice. Went to another restaurant in old town too. Much quieter but just as good

title: A must visit restaurant in Hue.
review: Oh my this was definitely a highlight of our visit. The food in Hue us amazing anyway. However we fancied French. It did not disappoint . Fabulous food, service, ambience. We loved it. Also stocked one of my favourite wines from home.

title: Excellent French and Vietnamese just around the corner from Citadel entrance
review: The meal was fantastic! Started with the French cheeses and charcuterie plates along with a beautiful array of sliced fruits. Presentation was lovely! Had the squid, beef and both were excellent! Don’t miss the passion fruit ice cream. Just a short walk to the citadel.

title: Excellent food
review: Nice dinner as a couple. A menu with Vietnamese and international dishes -especially French- welcome and listening.

title: We ate there 3 nights in a row
review: I highly recommend it offers a varied menu between Vietnamese specialties and French dishes for those who prefer. The beef is very good.restaurant very clean and welcoming the boss is French.

title: Advice, to discover and redo
review:
Word of mouth... A restaurant to discover.
An amazing atmosphere because we feel origins of France for naysayers, but a place to discover Asian cuisine, in the broad sense, and Vietnamese to go a little further.
But it does not matter because the welcome, the meal with other neighbors, the choices are there to be comfortable.
The dishes are of a high standard (test the nems in Viet Nam and you will see the differences). For the rest, I'm talking about Asian dishes, RAS. But nostalgics who travel and want to take everything a corner of France, there are solutions.
A great team. The next day, we came back, passing through a neighborhood made for younger than us. But continue on your way and you will have a pleasant surprise, calm and authentic.

title: Very good restaurant with vietname food with french influences
review: We were there 2 days on a row. And we enjoyed it every time. If we still were in Hué we should go there again. Very friendly personal. The food was excellent: very good price-quality rating.

title: Completely successful
review:
Spontaneously we looked in here today, first we noticed the language skills of the ladies positively. The service is perfect and also the food we liked great. We had deep-fried spring rolls, pasta with vegetables and shrimp, and duck in orange sauce.
We definitely recommend.

title: Nice place, but very ill afterwards
review:
A nice restaurant and friendly staff.

Unfortunately my husband got really sick just after dinner. He had steak, is now already ill for a day. Definitely food poisoning.
I had the chicken, I'm good.

title: Cuisine and professional service
review: We went there once and enjoyed our meal so much that we went back on the 3 evenings of our stay in boo: we stayed on the Vietnamese cuisine each time excellent with an interesting wine list and pro service ... be careful, it is better to book for the evening

title: “Cozy Spot for Casual Dining”
review: The ambiance here is cozy, perfect for a casual meal with friends or family. The food is decent but not extraordinary; the flavors could use a bit more oomph. Service was friendly, but the wait for our meal felt a bit long. Overall, it’s a good spot if you’re in the area, though I wouldn’t go out of my way to visit. A solid choice for a quick bite!

title: Excellent food! Great staff
review:
We were recommended to this restaurant by our tour guide. And it didn’t disappoint! The service is excellent. Both of our meals were delicious (can’t find anything to fault them) my husband’s steak was cooked to perfection. This restaurant is good value too.
At the end of the night the staff called us a taxi, and as it was raining they even walked us out to the car under big umbrellas! Definitely worth a visit if you’re visiting Hue

title: Proff restaurant
review: Proff restaurant: the people the food the atmosphere. You should absolute visit when in Hue. And if u do not like gluten they have Corona beer!

title: Discover
review: Very good food. We were very well received. We will surely return before the end of our stay beautiful address

title: Excellent and friendly French food in Hue
review: After 2 weeks in Vietnam eating Vietnamese food La Carambole was a very welcome change to French based food, although one can also eat Vietnamese there. We had excellent grilled tuna and duck. And a nice dessert of panna cotta to finish.

title: Dinner
review:
We went here for dinner.

Quite a big menu, we opted for prawns with French fries and a chicken with lemongrass.

Not sure though why the prawn legs had been removed and sprinkled on top of the prawns.

The service here was good and prompt.

It was a busy restaurant so worth booking at peak times.

title: A good time in an excellent restaurant
review:
Very well received very professional and friendly staff
The owner is French a plus for us
The cuisine is traditional and delicious
Many proposals for those whose French dishes they miss
Thank you for this delicious moment!!

title: Very nice address in Hue for dinner
review:
Excellent meal at Bistrot la Carambole which offers a local menu and some suggestions for French cuisine for those who feel too exotic.
The cuisine was excellent for a very reasonable price: spring rolls, nems, duck, soup, two very good glasses of wine, two glasses of ice cream, all for about 40€.
Decoration sought, location in a lively pedestrian area. Very good address

title: Very good address!
review: Beef pavement with very very good pepper sauce. Perfect barbecue skewers. Service top. Very nice setting. Prices correct. We highly recommend!

title: Very average fare
review: Rather mixed feelings about this place ... we started with spring rolls which were not good at all that surprised me as it is so bog standard. This was followed by a steak which I asked if it would be tender and was told categorically 'yes'. It was terrible, but to be fair they refunded us and agreed how tough it was. Word of warning: do not eat beef in Vietnam unless it is imported as it will be below par.

title: Fantastic!!!
review: Our server Chi was fantastic! Loved the food, very fresh. Definitely will come back!

title: Delicious sushi toko
review: Mega nice food. Better than most sushi tokos I NL. will eat here. We ate ourselves completely full for only €30 eu in total. Chi was a fine waitress

title: Amazing Japanese Cuisine 🥰
review: We ate at Shino Sushi Hue and it was absolutely delicious. The service was outstanding, and Loan was exceptional – very kind, attentive, and professional. Their fresh juice was amazing, we ordered three because we loved it so much. Highly recommended!🥰

title: Oishi
review: Nice place, reasonable prices for sushi. Tried a few different dishes, all tasted really good, yummy. Friendly staff. Came back for a second time, same experience.

title: Great service!
review: Loan was a wonderful server with helpful suggestions. We especially enjoyed the tuna salad! The Bento box is varied with lots of food!

title: A place not to be missed
review: We are pleasantly surprised to have found this restaurant by chance. We were welcomed by Ngân who advised us well and even offered a salad as a welcome starter. The kitchen is excellent, the prices very correct and the decoration pleasant. What more can I ask for 😊

title: Very good for you
review: They gave us a salad as soon as we sat down. We had a set menu sushi and we loved it. I found the prices very good and the tastes very good. Highly recommend.

title: Food with friends
review: We were eating and Loan treated us very lovingly, changed ingredients that we did not like for others and invited us to a delicious salad. Both niguiris and excellent roll trays and super good treatment.

title: Awesome
review:
There were three of us, and we had a very large selection of sushi. Thanks to Ms. Chau's help, ordering was very easy. Ms. Chau remained attentive, friendly, and present throughout the evening.

The sushi was delicious and, by European standards, very reasonably priced, despite the high quality. We highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Superb Service at Shino
review:
We had just arrived in Hue, pouring rain, and were looking for lunch. The reviews looked good for Shino so we checked it out and it was a perfect choice! Tung Chi was our server and she was lovely and attentive. I got ramen; my father did a bento box. The restaurant was charming, the food was fast, and everything was delicious. You can't beat ramen on a cold, rainy day and theirs was superb.

I recommend a seat by the window if you like people watching - lots of activity out on the street.

title: Insane good salmon
review: We had an absolute nice evening in the Shino 22 Nguyen! The salmon was delicious and everything else as well. 100% recommendation. Thanks to Ms Chan!

title: Super excellent:)
review:
Ms Chau and Ms Chi attended us super well, very friendly, attentive and friendly.
The Sushi was exquisite, among the best I have ever tasted.
I would return 1000 more times:)

title: Excellent food. The staff were superb. Ms. Chau welcomed me very well when I arrived and checked after I had eaten.
review: Staff were superb. Ms. Chau welcomed me very well and checked before I left. Food was so tasty. I recommend the spicy salmon and spicy tuna wrap. Also Alamo and avocados rolls are perfect! 10/10

title: The best sushi I've ever tasted
review:
Excellent treatment from kim Thang, was outstanding all night.
Very fast Service. Excellent food, the best sushi of my life
We celebrated my son's birthday and they sang us with the cake.
Thank you all for your kindness.

title: Best food of Asia
review: Amazing food. Travelling since 3 months in Asia and this was the best food of them all. Sushi was perfect, as well as the hot plates like the teriyaki. Staff was very friendly and also funny. Ms Chau from client relations especially was super friendly, welcoming us in her wonderful spot.

title: Recommend for a different food style experience
