review: Excellent fresh food, cold beer and hot sake for very reasonable prices. It is a pleasant alternative for the local dish

title: Rich and cheap food
review: Thi has made our stay much more pleasant as apart from his great friendliness he perfectly controls English and with it, he has helped us to choose the dishes.

title: Great quality Japanese food
review: Excellent meal. Would be happy to have had this in Japan or London. Service from Kim Thanh was exceptional. Thank you!!!

title: Don't miss this in Hue!
review: Best sushi in all of Vietnam! It is fresh, very tasty, lots of choice, very friendly staff, cozy Mood and also good choice for non sushi lovers in your company! Thank you Ms Chau and Ms Ngan for the nice evening!

title: Affordable, very tasty Japanese resto.
review: Very tasty and very affordable Japanese restaurant in Hue. We sat cozy apart in a tatami room (8 people). Very good service by Thanh who spoke fluent English.

title: Operation
review: Very tasty and pleasant service. Thanh was very friendly and helpful. The price wasn't too bad for an extensive order.

title: Great food and very tasty sushi!
review: We had a great meal, really nice to eat here after 2.5 weeks of Vietnamese food. MS Chau and her staff helped us well and made a nice evening of it.

title: Delicious food definitely recommended
review: Very nice restaurant definitely recommended nice staff good food comes quickly lots of air conditioning and outside fans. Recommended!

title: Very nice good and nice service and nice people!
review:
Very nice food and i would reccomend the boats of sushi!
The drinks are also really nice and nice ventilation so it is not too hot in here!

title: Delicious sushi
review: After 2 weeks Vietnamese food delicious to order here with his 5th, 3 sushi boats. Very tasty! Highly recommended that we would like to do to everyone.

title: 11/10 service, food and Japanese vibe
review: An amazing experience from start to finish. The food was absolutely perfect – especially the sushi and kimchi, which were both packed with flavor. Ms. Chau and Ms. Thanh were incredibly friendly and helpful in guiding us to the best dishes. The chefs greeted us with warm smiles both when we arrived and as we left, which made us feel truly welcome. The setting was beautiful, with calming background music that added to the overall relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommended for anyone who appreciates a great meal with a touch of Japanese vibes.

title: Highly recommended! Great food and service.
review: We had a great dinner at Shino and highly recommend this restaurant. It was a very delicious food with very good wuality and service. Thanks to Ms Chau for taling care of us!

title: Super tasty and nice eaten at this small cozy Japanese restaurant.
review: Super fresh sushi. And great priced. A nice change to all the delicious Vietnamese food. After the first time we went back again.

title: Excellent!
review:
Excellent restaurant. We ate very well. Staff friendly and helpful. Excellent food.
Chau was very professional and very friendly.
Extra fresh products and beautiful presentation!

title: Excellent restaurant!
review:
Excellent restaurant with delicious, fresh sushi.
The service was warm and attentive.
Ngoc served us very well and was incredibly friendly.
Highly recommended!

title: Delicious sushi, good service
review:
MS chou and MS ngan have given us excellent service.
The sushi was delicious! Super Fresh and Fast Service and Service.

title: Super tasty
review: We ate super tasty sushi! Good Service and Delicious Sushi Boat! Kids loved it too! Good price too! At ms chau and ms ngan

title: Surprising Sushi find in Hue
review:
Once you’ve had enough of the local Hue specialties, try Shino Sushi at 22 Nguyen Thai Hoc. Wonderful friendly service and great selection of food items.

We had a sushi boat with maki rolls of salmon, prawn, scallops and eel. Great value and delicious.

Beautiful atmosphere and easy walk in without a reservation.

title: Great sushis, great prices.
review: We had a great meal at Shino. The sushi were so fresh and tasty. And the prices were really reasonable. Ngan was especially patient in helping us choose from the very extensive menu.

title: Sushi essential!
review: All the staff and especially Chau were very friendly and helpful, the food was amazing and the price unmatched! We will return without hesitation

title: Super recommended Shushi
review:
Shushi super top! We have come to eat and come back at night too! 🤣
Thank you Ms Chau
It's Shino Shushi number 22, because there's another one!

title: Delightful atmosphere, incredible service and the food is top notch Japanese
review: Shino Sushi 2 lives up to its reviews and more. This is a delightfully cute little restaurant with a buzzing atmosphere but quiet enough to enjoy the conversation at your table. Kimy was our waitress and she was fantastic, literally running around to ensure that everything was perfect. My daughter dropped her fork and before she could even think about asking for another one Kimy was there slipping a fork on the table. The meal was exceptional and the portions are generous. We had to leave a lot of food behind and Kimy kindly offered to box it up for us. The best Japanese food we’ve had in years and a really enjoyable and memorable experience. Thanks Kimy!

title: Outstanding Japanese food and service (at a low price)
review:
The staff were so welcoming. The menu is extensive and each dish we had was outstanding. The kitchen was happy to modify the tofu to leave out the crumb (gluten).
We ate a lot!! and it was very reasonably priced. Go. You won't be disappointed.

title: Amazing food and service
review: We came here for lunch and the food was incredible and the service from Ms. Thanh was amazing, she was very lovely and attentive. Thank you! :)

title: Super!
review: It was really, really good. Ms. Chau served us super well. I would definitely come here for dinner more often. The sushi is of very good quality and the staff is very nice. Recommended!

title: Not to be missed
review:
Quality of service
Freshness of products
Originality of the dishes
Everything was perfect we had a great time

title: yum
review: Lovely decor & ambience. Food was super fresh & menu has so many options. Thi was a wonderful waitress. Highly recommend!

title: I love Thi
review: Tasty food! Sushi was great. Our waiter Thi was really nice too. She made our dinner much more pleasant. Would come back if we stayed in Hue longer

title: Excellent sushi
review: Excellent sushi with a wide selection of different rolls as well as other Japanese dishes. Service was very friendly and accommodating.

title: Great Fresh Sushi at Great Prices
review:
This is a small sushi place with a huge menu. The sushi & sashimi are so fresh, and the values are great. We had a huge Sushi “boat”” for $20 & then ordered yellowtail & tuna. The yellowtail was so fresh, I could cut it with chopsticks, and it melted in my mouth.
Our waitress, Thanh, was constantly keeping an eye on us, & her outgoing friendliness made us feel like we were at home. Cảm ơn, Thanh!

title: Japanese cuisine in perfection
review: A fantastic Japanese restaurant in all respects not far from the city centre. Very attentive service, delicious sushi, great dessert at very fair prices. Special thanks also to LeKim Thanh, excellent service!

title: Restaurants not to be missed in Hue
review: Superb meal in a nice atmosphere and attractive rates, home of Thanh and Loan with a lot of humility and always listening to us, many French restaurateurs should take example , everything was perfect we will return before our departure.

title: Great food great service
review: Great food great service nice little sushi place in hue. Thanh was very friendly and helpful. Highly recommend to anyone looking for some good Japanese cuisine in Hue.

title: Fantastic food and atmosphere with great service from a wonderful young lady Thanh : )
review:
Thanh was an excellent waitress for us today! Very attentive, helpful, friendly, peaceful, polite!!!
I highly recommend this restaurant. Clem x

title: Excellent Japanese restaurant
review: Excellent Japanese restaurant, lovely food, excellent staff and service. Good for vegetarians and the salads are amazing. Ms Loi was very attentive and helpful. A reasonable price for plenty of food, and you can take home what you can't eat.

title: Just a dream 😍
review: We were there for the first time yesterday. We ordered four different sushi dishes and ALL were super delicious. This was the tastiest and freshest sushi the two of us ate so far! Also the design and vibe of the restaurant is super nice😍 A big thank you goes to the service of Phuong Loan! We will definitely come back and recommend it to anyone who fancy sushi!

title: Perfect Vietnamese food
review:
Great location and atmosphere, kind and professional service but the food was divine! Reasonable priced and feel honest, had a fresh coconut water for 39k dong.
They kept our luggage while we visited the citadel what was very kind.

title: The view is beautiful
review: I tried the salted coffee and chocolate crepes. I loved the first time I tried the coffee. I didn’t love the crepe chocolate. If the chairs are a little more comfortable, it’s a super spot.

title: A nice rainy day lunch
review: Wonderful atmosphere, location and service and the meals were all delicious. Lovely young waiter spoke very good English! Thank you 🙏

title: Great lunch before Citadel tour
review: Welcoming and cool upstairs, lovely food! Appreciated the complimentary watermelon as well. Nice river outlook. Recommended!

title: All right.
review: We were attended by a very friendly boy and we ate very well and very cheaply and also stored our bags while we saw the Imperial city

title: Easy great food friendly fast service
review:
So clean friendly and the food was great. We add glutenous rice packages in banana leaf and she showed us how to eat them, etc..
At the end of the meal, she then provided a little search that she had just made
It is her own restaurant and has real character

title: A real discovery
review:
After visiting the Hue Imperial Palace estate with the family, we found this small restaurant by the canal.
Very pleasant time, with sweet music, perfect Service, excellent dishes, and rare kindness.
I recommend 200%
And as a bonus, visit tips for the afternoon

Skipping the first diner you encounter just before the Imperial Palace is a good idea, restaurant N shows. A small, simple business with good and fast food served. Choose the noodle soup side dish. Tasty and particularly cheap. You'll want to tip here. In addition, the owner's niece speaks good English. Very nice and in good spirits then on the site.

title: Hidden gem
review:
Freshly cooked, tasty, food very very reasonably priced. Menu in English and staff were very helpful. They gave us wet wipes to freshen up when we sat down and watermelon at the end of the meal. Really nice touches
Truly a hidden gem in Hue

title: Beautiful Cafe
review: Beautiful spot by the river, looking onto the walls of the ancient city. Menu with English translation, Friendly service & lovely food and drink!

title: Beautiful view and good food
review:
A quiet place at the foot of the Imperial City, a beautiful view, with a warm welcome and good local dishes at very affordable prices.
We made several stops there, even for a breakfast, too good!!

title: Refreshing break next to the Imperial City
review: Excellent cafe for refreshing drinks and wonderful service, right next to the Imperial City. Smoothies, peach iced tea, and the salted coffee were all delicious.

title: Best food place to visit in Hui
review: A family owned restaurant where you can enjoy great local food, coffee and desserts in a clean and cozy mood. I enjoyed Bunbo(beef noodle), Nem Ran(fried spring rolls) and Nem lui(skewed pork) and loved it all. English fluent staffs were very friendly and nice. 👍👍👍👍👍

title: Super good
review:
Really not disappointed with the rating.
It's excellent, we had fries nems and shrimp salad and. Noodles, smothie and salty coffee.
the view of the river very nice and the friendly waitresses.

title: Great coffee stoo
review: Just stopped for a drink before heading into the Imperial City. Great location, friendly staff and nice waterside positio

title: Great food at a great price
review: We spotted this restaurant on the way back from the citadel and went in for lunch. We had two beers, vegan fried rice and a vegan crispy pancake. The food was excellent and a great price with a lovely setting. It was so good we went back the next day!

title: Nice place
review: We were on our way to the imperial city and were a bit hungry, we goin this cafe and stopped for something to eat. The personnel were súper nice, the food was good and the portions were just right to be satisfied. Plus it is right next to the imperial city which makes its location great

title: A treasure!
review: What a delight! Made welcome, chair for our bags, view of the citadel, cold beer with a glass - and then the pure joy of talking with Soobin and her sister Binsoo. And watching baby cousin take his first steps! Such a great little place, lovely family and fully deserving of all the reviews. We will go back!

title: Riquimo
review: Great place and food. Great service. To follow a very exhausting day. The view you have in the place is very nice.

title: Cute restaurant close to the imperial
review: Found this nice cafe while walking. Their almond coffee is so good. Tried banh mi, banh loc and bun bo hue. Service is so nice. I highly recommend to try.

title: Cheap and tasty
review: Very good food and inexpensive. Vi was an excellent waitress.

title: Largest italian menu, lovely extras
review: This spot likely offers Vietnam's largest Italian menu—pasta, pizza, ravioli, lasagna, minestrone, and more. Service is excellent and fast, with complimentary bruschetta and other appetizers as a lovely bonus.

title: Happy hour perfections
review: The pizza and service here are top-tier! We dropped by during happy hour and were pleasantly surprised with a complimentary beer, soda, and some fresh fruit. I’d definitely suggest checking this place out.

title: Good Italian food!
review: Vi looked after us exceptionally well with great service. The pasta dishes were top quality and delicious, the other dishes we had were certainly good but not as good as the pasta! The beer was good but if it was cooler, it would have been great! Overall, this place is fantastic value, I seriously recommend it.

title: Flavorful Pizzas & fresh pasta
review: I visited this Hue restaurant several times last week. The zucchini and eggplant pizza was flavorful and satisfying, and the fresh tagliatelle was delicious—though a touch of semolina could help prevent sticking. The complimentary fresh fruit dessert was a lovely finishing touch.

title: Authentic flavors, gracious service
review: This is a fantastic spot for authentic Italian fare, particularly if you've been craving your favorite meals for a while. The server was incredibly courteous and efficient. They even offer complimentary local beer and juice :) Much appreciated!

title: Southeast Asia’s best pizza 🍕
review: This is undoubtedly the finest pizza we’ve encountered in Southeast Asia! A significant bonus is their availability of gluten-free pasta. Thanks to the team’s incredibly warm and professional service, our experience was absolutely flawless!

title: Good Pizza
review:
Good pizza with free beer!
Our hostess Ruby was awesome

title: Good option for Italian food
review: By chance I had dinner in this not so big simple but nice restaurant. The service very good, good Hani very kind and prepared, good and well cooked spaghetti and thin and crispy pizza good. They always offer a starter and some fruit at the end nice gesture Recommended

title: Exquisite ravioli, delicious fish, and superb service
review: An unexpectedly superb Italian dining experience featuring incredibly flavorful pizza and pasta. The service was equally outstanding! I savored the ravioli made with fresh, house-made pasta, while my boyfriend enjoyed the fish, which was just as exquisite. Many thanks for such a delightful meal!

title: Excellent food and friendly staff
review: This was our second time at Zucca. The tagliatelle is very tasty. The service is very good. Yesterday, I forgot my purse and didn’t realize for an hour. They had my purse behind the counter and everything was intact. What a relief. I highly recommend them for their food and staff.

title: Authentic pizza and cozy atmosphere in Hue
review: Looking for a real pizza, we chose the restaurant Zucca. The atmosphere is welcoming and inviting, complemented by an extensive and varied menu. It is a great option for anyone who wants a quality pizza in Hue. Highly recommended!

title: Top address for pasta
review:
Very good Italian in Hue.
Pasta is homemade and tastes like in Italy.
Our waiter Sky was very helpful and friendly.
Highly recommended.

title: Ha to Zucca when you've had enough of Vietnamese cuisine
review: We were surprised with the free beer and the free bruschetta! The service from Anh was friendly and smooth. The pasta was very tasty and prepared correctly. We had a great night.

title: Perfect viet food in Hue
review: We had local viet food and It was tasty and delicius.We have been served food by a young lady name Vi who was smiling and kind.They also offerend US fresh fruit and some bread with garlic and tomatoes.We absolutely suggest.this Place.Prices absolutely in the average.Kind of food very good with local specialties .

title: Small and quiet but above all good food. Friendly staff, not on a busy street with loud music.
review:
Excellent choices, the food was very good I had a Bánh mì (pork sandwich) and my wife Phở Gà (chicken soup).
It is on a quiet street with good service from Vi.

title: Perfect for families with children!
review:
The food was super delicious and perfectly suited for us as a family from Germany. The adults could try delicious specialties from Hue's regional cuisine and the children could eat pizza and pasta.
The pizza and the Italian-standard noodles were also super delicious. It all tasted really good and the service from Vi was super accommodating and she took great care of us. We love coming back here.

title: Delicious food!
review: We had a great meal. Highly recommended! Vi has served us great 😃

title: Amazing Deal!!!!
review:
Great food with a good deal on- brought a pizza and received free bruschetta , a drink and fruit at the end of the meal.
Vi was really friendly and helpful- thank you!

title: Pizza in hue
review: Great Italian pizzas! Good service, shout out to Vi!

title: Very recommendable
review: The service was very good and our waiter, Sky was very friendly. The food was delicious and we got some free appitizers, which was very nice.

title: Delicious pizza
review: It's a great place to eat. Waitress Vi was friendly and served us well.

title: Pizza
review: Vi is very kindly. Pizza is good. Recommend.

title: Sky
review: Sky at the restaurant was very courteous and helpful and offered a great service. Thank you Sky for being a good person.

title: Authentic Italian Flavors and Attentive Service in Hue
review: Authentic and tasty Italian cuisine awaits you in the heart of Hue. The atmosphere is warm and the service with little care, crowned by a pleasant surprise: a beer offered! Whether for a romantic dinner or a meal with friends, this address offers a memorable dining experience. I recommend it without hesitation to all lovers of good tables and convivial moments.

title: A perfect pasta return
review: A smoothly operated restaurant serving thin-crust pizza exactly to my taste, flawless homemade tagliatelle, and authentic local specialties. The waitresses were delightful—I returned for dinner two nights in a row.

title: A safe, delicious surprise!
review: We found this gem online while seeking safe food after a stomach scare—and were delighted! Tasty traditional dishes (even the backup pizza was great!), friendly staff, and a truly enjoyable meal. Highly recommended—thank you!

title: Quality pizza and impeccable service
review:
I had dinner in this place with my husband and we were pleasantly impressed. Despite being in Vietnam, we succumbed to the temptation of an Italian pizza and it was absolutely worth it: the quality of the ingredients is good and the dough is well executed.
The place is very clean and cozy, but the real added value was the staff. We were accompanied throughout the evening by Anh, who was simply fantastic: attentive to our every little need, professional and very kind.
If you are looking for a nice atmosphere and a great alternative to local cuisine, this is the place!

title: Hue’s best bite – delicious, friendly & free local beer!
review: The food in Hue doesn’t get any better than this—and it’s surprisingly affordable! I absolutely loved every bite. The staff were incredibly warm and welcoming, and they even offered complimentary beer and juice. Truly outstanding!

title: Best Italian food in Hue
review: We came to eat at zucca three times while in Hue. Thee food, atmosphere, location and service were all excellent.. Tam was a brilliant host. Thank you cannot recommend enough

title: A treat to Hue!
review: We ordered two pasta dishes and were treated to a free bruschetta, two free beers and a plate of fruit as a gift. Everything was delicious! Unfortunately, it’s our last day in Hue, otherwise we’d definitely go back! Highly recommend!

title: Zucca is Great!
review: We shared a pizza between two and it was perfect. Our awesome server, Ruby, was friendly, fast and efficient. They threw in some extra bruschetta which was a nice gesture. Atmosphere was fine, music not too loud and street noise was not an issue.

title: Not to be missed in Hue!
review:
Zucca , an impeccable restaurant in the center of Hue.
Staff with little care, as for pizzas and pasta, thunder. This changes after three weeks of travel of delicious local cuisine also present. Thank you for a great time.

title: Delicious and with details!
review: Very rich food; they offer you a free drink depending on the dish you choose and, at the end, they give you a plate of fruit. We were attended by Ri, who is super friendly and lovely.

title: Restaurant in Hue on top!
review:
Restaurant on top! We ate Italian, it was delicious.
We even had an aperitif, fruit for dessert and a beer/water included in the price.
Our waitress Anh was great, kind and very helpful!
We recommend!

title: Soup so good, we returned!
review: Delicious food—especially the mushroom soup (we came back for it!). Great service, free bites & drinks, and super friendly staff. Highly recommend! 🫶🏻

title: Italian gem in Hue
review: Lovely little restaurant, with friendly staff. After travelling around Vietnam we thought we'd give the Italian menu a try. We were not disappointed. The first time we had pasta, spicy spaghetti and ravioli both very good. We returned the next evening for pizza as the Italian diners at a nearby table gave a glowing review. They were both excellent, perect thin crispy base and lovely toppings.

title: Cozy italian gem with big flavors
review: A cozy Italian eatery offering a wide variety of options. The dish was outstanding—flavorful, delicious, and perfectly balanced. Many thanks to the wonderfully kind staff for their excellent service!

title: The best pizza in South East Asia!!!!!
review: Pizzeria and not only fantastic, a low and crispy pizza that I ate a few times in Italy. My wife took dishes with fish even the really good, light and appetizing ones. Lovely Miss Anh who served us at the table. A place I recommend to anyone going to Hue.........thanks for everything!!!!

title: Comfort food with a generous touch!
review: Extremely attentive service—they even offered a complimentary starter, beer, and fruit for dessert! The pasta was delicious too. I’d highly recommend this spot whenever you’re craving some comforting, feel-good food.

title: Everything great
review: The food was very good. There was Bruchetta as an appetizer and fruit as a dessert. Hamei is a very nice service. Thank you!❤️

title: Very good experience
review: Anh the waitress is welcoming and efficient. The food is very good.

title: Great pizza and service
review: Very nice little restaurant, with complimentary beer when ordering food, free "bruschetta" and free fruit for dessert. No wonder I had a second glass of the chilean wine, which was great for the price. This is no first class restaurant, by any means, but first class food and great service from e.g. the super lovely Anh.

title: A must stop by! Wanted to try the Vietnamese dishes as well, we may be back
review:
Ruby was an absolute gem, a free beer with an order of the delicious wood fired
thin crust pizza, and salad was tasty too just what I needed for freshness, and than a free fruit plate for desert, oranges and watermelon slices. Absolutely delish!
Yum yum
Canada to Vietnam baby!

title: Best restaurant in Hue
review:
Delicious pizza with a nice Vietnamese red wine. Excellent service from Anh.
We're already planning to come back for dinner tomorrow

title: A great alternative to local dishes.
review: Definitely recommended if you're looking for something beyond local cuisine. We ordered their homemade pizzas. The pizza and bolognese pasta were fantastic. Special thanks to Ruby for helping us.

title: Pizza Perfection!
review: What an absolutely incredible restaurant—every bite was pure joy, and the service was nothing short of amazing! Honestly, it’s the best pizza in the entire city, and I can’t stop thinking about it! My heart (and stomach) are so happy—I’m already planning my next visit! 🍕

title: Great place
review: We had a great meal. Coming from Belgium and having had Vietnamese menu’s the last few days, Zucca was a very nice change. My wife has Celiac Disease so it’s not that obvious to find an Italian place in Vietnam that serves a wide range of gluten-free items. Anh, the waitress, was very friendly an knowledgeable

title: Italian food in hue
review: Cute place food in the norm .. very kind staff especially Hamei professional and kind

title: Good
review: Delicious food and excellent service. Generous portions at affordable prices. Very good service. The waitress Ruby was very attentive. 100% recommended.

title: Pizzas to taste nice
review: The pizza was good (although it could have had a little more filling). But the bruschetas offered as a starter and the fruit for dessert compensated well. Very courteous service from Ruby.

title: A grand evening
review: The food was nice and the staff were pleasant. Anh was attentive and friendly. The Vietnamese wine was very good. The ice cream wasn't so good, icy with little flavour.

title: Exceptional deep-dish & service
review: The deep-dish pizza was exceptional—robust in flavor, generously layered, and deeply satisfying. Our server provided attentive and polished service, enhancing the overall dining experience. We thoroughly enjoyed our visit and look forward to returning on our next trip to the area.

title: A bit of a find
review: This is a really good restaurant, a bit away from the busier drag but all the better for it. Serves delicious food- I can recommend what I had: deep fried spring rolls and beef noodles ( really tasty noodles) and my wife had the cheese pizza which was also very good. ( obviously freshly made- thin and crispy). Beer and wine also.£650k for the two of us. Came with free bruschetta starter and free fresh fruit to end. Outer waitress was Anh whose utterly charming and delightful

title: Excellent
review:
Very good restaurant with Italian and Vietnamese specialities. Pizzas are really good.
Our waitress Hamei was very friendly;)

title: Italian food oasis
review: Super delicious Italian food with pizza, pasta etc. Hamei took great care of our well-being. Also the Insalata Mista was authentic

title: Great pizza with extras!!
review: Called into this restaurant after a long walk and was delighted with the ham & mushroom pizza I ordered which also came with free Bruschetta & a coke (special offer) The server Anh was very friendly, she checked with the kitchen to make sure that the risotto was Gluten Free for my friend. They do GF pasta here too which is good to know for all you celiacs out there. Great value for money and an all round lovely experience, would definitely recommend xx

title: A pizza night to remember!
review: I’m not usually a pizza fan, but this place really won me over! The pizza portions are generous, the price is just right, and the flavor is genuinely authentic and delicious. The service was excellent—friendly and attentive throughout. All in all, it was a truly wonderful evening! 🍕

title: Homesickness
review:
Very kind staff.
We felt like home and tried this pizza, on par with the good-quality frozen pizzas found in Italy.
They offered us a beer, bruschetta and final fruit.
2 pizzas , water , coke ( plus beer , bruschetta and fruit)
less than EUR 10 in total .
Local clean.
Definitely a place to find a little bit of Italy.

title: Pizza in Hue
review: I wanted pizza and I found this place very nice, the girl who served us was very kind and I liked the pizza. Council

title: A touch of Rome, far away
review: A real (thin, roman-style) pizza thousands of miles away from home! Very good and fresh ingredients. Special thanks to Anh, soo kind and caring during our stay :)

title: Good food, excellent service !
review:
The food was excellent, and the staff clearly take great pride in what they do. We ordered a pizza and a pasta dish, and the restaurant generously treated us to complimentary soft drinks, beer, and appetizers.

We highly recommend this gem in Hue, Vietnam!

title: Excellence in dining & hospitality
review:
An exceptional dining experience. The cuisine was both delicious and thoughtfully priced, reflecting excellent value. Our welcome was warm, courteous, and genuinely hospitable.
It was a true pleasure to dine here, and we recommend this establishment without reservation.

title: A very good dinner
review:
A perfect dinner with a perfect host : Ruby.
Food was delicious for a very honnest price.
Welcome was very kind and smiling.
A pleasure to be there. We recommand without any hesitation.

title: Our first dinner in Hue
review:
Our waitress for tonight was Ruby, she made our late meal very enjoyable. She recomended special Hue dishes, helped explaining how to eat our Vietnamese dinner, step by step.
She improved our experience with her smile.

title: 10/10 Pizza and Pasta
review: The best place to visit if you’re craving a pizza or a pasta. I was only in Hue for 2 nights, and came here for dinner both of them. The pizza has a fantastic crust, and the pasta is cooked perfectly aldente. I would come here again tomorrow if I wasn’t leaving.

title: Pizza & warm smiles 🍕
review: We popped in because our daughter was really craving pizza—and with all the great reviews, we figured, why not? We’re so glad we did! The staff were super warm and professional, making us feel right at home. The restaurant serves a fun mix of Italian and Vietnamese dishes, and the pizza? A total hit—no wonder it’s so popular! 🍕

title: A delicious find just around the corner
review: We absolutely loved it! While staying nearby and searching for a bite to eat, we happened upon this pizzeria—and it was a wonderful find. The staff were incredibly friendly, made a genuine effort to speak English, and served truly delicious pizzas. We ordered takeout, and it was so good we’d gladly go back. If you’re in the area, don’t miss it!

title: Very nice
review: Really nice and cosy restaurant with nice waitresses and good food. We ordered some Vietnamese specials. Really good. We got some bruschetta as a starter and some fruits for dessert.

title: A nice Vietnam restaurant
review: Food was very tasty, The personalyty, especially Anh was very kind. Location was suitable, near our hotel. The atpmopshere was very nice. I reccomend it.

title: Pizza paradise with heart! 🍕
review: The pizza was absolutely fantastic—every bite bursting with flavor! The atmosphere was so warm and inviting, it felt like a big hug, and the staff went above and beyond with their kindness and attention. Honestly, one of the most joyful dining experiences—pure pizza paradise!

title: Pizza, warmth, and perfect evenings!
review: It was an absolutely delightful meal—fresh, flavorful pizza that hit all the right notes, and service so warm and attentive it made the whole evening feel extra special! I wholeheartedly recommend this charming spot for a cozy couple’s night out or a joyful family dinner. 🍕❤️

title: Excellent
review: Excellent Italian restaurant with delicious food. Wonderful service and welcome. Good and cheap food. Bruschetta offers just made the orders. I liked pesto lasagna. My wife had very good pumpkin soup. The pizza margherita confirm the other reviews a little 'rusk. free beer and fresh fruit offered by the house. As a councilman.

title: Authentic flavors, warmly served
review: A genuinely authentic spot that honors its heritage and stays faithful to traditional recipes. Guests are greeted with warmth and treated to delicious, heartfelt dishes—a perfect choice when you’re craving a harmonious blend of local flavors and familiar tastes.

title: Best restaurant we’ve been to in Hue!!
review:
Restaurant is in a great location - far enough from the noise of the street, close enough to have a great atmosphere :)
We tried both vietnamese and european food and both was absolutely delicious. Rich in flavour, great portions, overall amazing! Would definitely come back.
They offered a free appetizer as well as a free dessert (fresh fruits).
We had a great server called Vi :)) thank you for making our stay in Hue that much more enjoyable!

title: Pizza, pasta & perfect service!
review: I visited twice and loved it both times! First, a fantastic pizza; second, mouthwatering pasta—both absolutely delicious. With excellent service and a charming atmosphere, this spot comes highly recommended!

title: Family-favorite pizza with a perfect local brew
review: The pizza is bursting with flavor and generously topped with cheese. Our entire family enjoyed it—every single bite was a hit. Paired with a complimentary cold local beer, it was even more delicious. Highly recommended!

title: A taste of italy, wrapped with care
review: This is the best Italian meal I’ve had in ages—even better than some upscale places in Europe! The cozy, coastal Italian ambiance instantly transported us, and the food was absolutely outstanding. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, and the servers were both friendly and attentive. We loved the pizza so much we couldn’t finish it—and when we asked to take the rest home, it came beautifully boxed with a bow on top. Thank you for such a delightful evening!

title: Super service and pizza!
review: Super delicious food and good service. Our waitress “We” was super for English and the service from her was at the top. Can definitely recommend to anyone who needs something Italian in Vietnam ;)

title: Warm service & complimentary delights!
review: An excellent restaurant with exceptionally warm and attentive service. We were kindly offered complimentary bruschetta and fresh fruit with our meal, and the staff were consistently friendly, welcoming, and eager to assist.

title: Perfect!
review: Very good restaurant found by chance. The staff is very friendly, including Hamzi, the waitress. A little more: for an ordered pizza we did not pay for the drink. We also got fruit as a gift for dessert. Do not hesitate to stop there.

title: Hue’s deep-dish delight!
review: The staff were incredibly welcoming, the vibe was fantastic, and the food—especially the deep-dish pizza with sausage—was absolutely delicious. Hands down one of the best pizza spots in Hue City!

title: Small shop, big flavors—don’t miss it!
review: The food here is incredibly delicious—far better than I imagined! The chef is also wonderfully friendly. Though the place is small, the flavors are bold and vibrant, with everything tasting wonderfully fresh. Don’t just stroll by—otherwise, you’ll miss out on some truly exquisite and flavorful dishes! I’ll definitely be back.

title: The city’s best authentic pizza!
review: If you’re craving authentic pizza, this is the place to go! It’s absolutely delicious—generous, perfectly crispy, and utterly satisfying. The owner is warm and welcoming, and the prices are very reasonable. Hands down the best pizza in the city!

title: Top-quality pizzas & warm service!
review: What an amazing spot with top-notch pizzas! The staff were incredibly friendly and thoughtful, patiently answering all our questions. Despite the rush, they kindly made room for us. The food was delicious—absolutely recommended!

title: Great pizzas, friendly vibes & free drinks!
review: A thoroughly enjoyable experience—delicious pizzas, fair prices, and service that feels warmly familiar. Plus, you get a complimentary soft drink or Huda beer with every pizza! This spot comes highly recommended.

title: Cozy, delicious & impeccably served!
review: Delicious, fresh pasta and pizza, beautifully served in a cozy-modern space. Exceptional, warm service made it unforgettable—highly recommend and will definitely return!

title: Pizza, perks & perfect service!
review:
Outstanding pizzas—nothing less than exceptional! Every order comes with complimentary bruschetta, plus a free soft drink or Huda beer with each pizza. They even served fresh fruit plates to finish.
Highly recommended!

title: Highly recommended
review: Food was mega delicious, restaurant also pretty, very friendly service called Vi, from the house there was free Bruscetta in advance and fruit for dessert. We felt very comfortable!

title: An unexpected Italian delight in Hue!
review: An amazing restaurant! We discovered it by strolling the street, simply out of curiosity. The food was delicious — a real Italian establishment serving exceptional pizzas! The staff is lovely, warm and helpful: they helped us choose our order and offered us impeccable service. I highly recommend it!!

title: Definitely the best
review: My familiar place in Hue. Today I ate a pizza as I requested and it was still the same, still delicious and came with a free bottle of beer. They didn't remember me because it's been more than 3 months since I returned to Hue for work, but I certainly won't forget them because of their kindness.

title: Pizza, focaccia and panna cotta must-see!
review: Delicious pizza to Taglia and focaccia near the pedestrian street! The dough is excellent and the ingredients are of great quality. Desserts, especially panna cotta, are absolutely irresistible!Also, the staff is very friendly and attentive. Don't stop trying this place!

title: Very good evening!
review: Very good bo bun from Hue in this restaurant, thank you to Hamei for his kindness. We were offered fruit for dessert. I recommend!

title: Authentic pizza in Hue – Fresh, delicious & recommended!
review: The food was delicious, freshly prepared and exactly to my taste. The flavors were authentic, and the staff was friendly and attentive. I highly recommend this place if you are looking for good pizza in Hue City!

title: Great pizza & free drinks!
review:
I truly enjoyed the food, and the service was top-notch! We had pizza—specifically a fungi (mushroom) one. The mushrooms themselves were a bit bland, but everything else was delicious. The 27cm pizza is perfect for two if you're not too hungry.
They also offer complimentary local beer 🍻 and juice!
Highly recommend—it’s great value for the quality and location.

title: Perfect quick pizza stop!
review: This spot is amazing! The food is delicious, and the prices are incredibly fair for the quality you receive. The staff is welcoming and speaks English fluently—perfect for a quick pizza fix when you're craving one!

title: Beachside Italian gem with free drinks!
review: Incredible, authentic Italian cuisine! Think fresh pasta, wood-fired pizza, a warm and inviting atmosphere, and super-friendly staff. It’s the ideal beachside dinner spot—and they even offer complimentary local beer and juice! 😘 Highly recommended.

title: Must-try pizzas & pastas!
review: This place offers a fantastic selection of pizzas and pastas—definitely worth sampling! The staff are friendly and full of helpful suggestions. I stopped by at noon when it was pleasantly quiet. Highly recommend giving it a try!

title: Very kind staff, good food!
review: Very kind staff, good food (also have gluten free spagetti options), free local beer tasting for the meals, also gave us appetizers and fruits as dessert.

title: Great pizza, great service!
review: The food was tasty, the prices were fair, and the pizza was especially delicious. The staff were very courteous and spoke excellent English. Highly recommended!

title: Delicious dinner and excellent service
review: We had a delicious dinner at Zucca. I had Italian food and my partner had Vietnamese food. They were both delicious and Vi’s service was excellent.

title: Perfect pizza, fast service, fantastic value!
review: Delicious meals, quick service, and friendly, energetic staff. The pizza is perfectly crispy with a generous amount of rich, flavorful cheese. Great value for the price.

title: To repeat!!
review: Great food. We chose the place for changing a bit of Asian food and heard the beef lasagne and pizza 4 seasons and loved it. The homemade hot sauce (not the tabasco) that they put on your side was brutal. We were attended by Vi and a charm. Also dessert (varied fruits) they put it for free.

title: Unexpected pizzas & warm service
review: It’s a solid restaurant—surprisingly great pizzas (not exactly a Vietnamese staple, but delicious nonetheless)! The waitress was especially friendly and welcoming. Loved the complimentary local beer and fresh fruit plate—always a nice touch. Thank you!

title: Great experience
review:
Bruschetta served before our meal,
Fresh fruit served at the end.

The main course was very nice, I got pizza and my partner got spaghetti pesto.

Will come back again to try the vietnamese food.

title: Do not stay in Hue without going to lunch or dinner at this restaurant, everything is perfect.
review: Perfect, we highly recommend, the dishes are excellent, the staff very kind, cleanliness of the establishment, opening hours.

title: Yam!
review: As always to this day, Vietnam is a land of polite and kind people beyond all expectations. This place offers a Vietnamese and an Italian menu. We had a portion of pesto lasagna and a pizza four seasons. The lasagna was served in a terracotta and was delicious, there is no classic béchamel sauce but pasta and flavor are there! I'd still take them! The pizza, with revisited ingredients, was good and toasted. It was a good variation on the theme from the still excellent local cuisine. Total expense 300k VND including a large water and, complimentary, fruit bruschetta and a beer.

title: Good pizza
review: Good pizza. Ruby very kind and impeccable Service .. fruit at the end of the meal and the bruschetta at the beginning offered by them was a pleasant surprise.

title: Class is recommended
review: Very accommodating. To greet there was for free buscetta & local beer. The Banh Mi chicken was as expected. Crispy baguette with tender meat and vegetables.

title: Very good food
review: Very good food, we ate very well. The place is quiet but close to bars at once. Great Service by Vi the new employee of the restaurant. Thank you very much to her.

title: Good restaurant
review: Excellent compromise despite the continent indicate, I wanted pizza and my wish was granted. The waitress Vi super cute and attentive to our table. For this 5 stars! See you next time!

title: Consistently wonderful
review: The warm welcome, the excellent service, and the cozy atmosphere made our day truly special. It’s rare to find a place that feels so consistently great over time, but this one delivers every single visit. Without a doubt, it’s still on my must-visit list for next time

title: A great dinner
review: Great dinner served by a very nice waiter named Sky. Also offered a tomato bruschetta of excellent workmanship and finally watermelon always offered by the house.

title: He deserves all the fame
review: Great food, warm atmosphere and really superb Service. Every course has been treated in detail and the hospitality of the staff has elevated the experience even more. He definitely deserves the trip and all the fame he has! 😊

title: A Cozy Italian Escape in Hue
review: We had been eating only local food for a week, and we felt like trying something different. We came across this Italian restaurant in Hue, very close to the city center. The place is cozy, the food was delicious and reasonably priced. A special thanks to our waiter “Sky” for his kind and attentive service. Definitely worth a visit if you’re in the area!

title: Cozy
review:
Cozy little restaurant. Extensive menu, pizza, pasta and Vietnamese. I myself had chicken with noodles, my husband a pasta. Both certainly tasty, not too big portions.
Friendly service by Sky. We got a small bite before and fruit for dessert.

title: Amazing service and food
review: Amazing food! We had a stone baked margarita pizza! Service from our waiter sky was amazing! Very kind and tentative to our big group! Thank you SKY!!! Amazing service for your first day!

title: Dinner
review: I found zucca restaurant on google maps and it was phenomenal. Really good prices, good portion of food, and amazing customer service. I was offered a free beer, free appetizer, and free fruit to finish off my meal. The meal I had was hot and the chicken was cooked to perfection. Would definitely recommend coming to this restaurant when you are in Hue.

title: Cheap and delicious 😍😋
review: While strolling through the old town we came across this restaurant. Italienea Essen.....I was curious. And surprisingly positively surprised. The pasta al dente, the ravioli homemade and all at an amazingly reasonable price. As an encore there was still on the house Bruschetta, local beer and passion fruit (dessert). So thumbs up! A recommendation.

title: Address crush
review: This property is ideal for those looking for tranquility and excellent pizza ♥️ We were won over by the Quality of the food and the outstanding Service. An address we will definitely return to.

title: Italian Pizza in Vietnam
review: Quality and varied food with Italian cuisine, the best pizza in Vietnam, very attentive and charming Sky, recommended 100 x 100

title: The place to eat in Hue!
review:
This place is awesome and Ruby is the best!
We order a pizza, and two local dishes and she brought us complimentary local beer, water, bruschette and fruit
Everything was tasty and good and she is very kind and nice
If you come to Hue, this is definitely the place to eat!

title: Nice vibe. Good value
review: Very easy walk-in pizza place. Big pizzas at good value. Ruby was a kind waitress, helping with special promotions. Service was quick.

title: Recommended for spicy and foreigners
review: This is my third time here, and it has always been the best experience — both in terms of hospitality and the delicious food. Mr. Sky provided excellent service and communicates very well in English. As a Malaysian, I usually find food in Huế a little unsatisfying, but at Zucca it was flavorful, fulfilling, and perfectly spicy. Highly recommended!

title: Visit to Zucca from Portugal
review:
Really nice place for families with kids.
You can have the best vietnamite dishs and Italian dishs at the same restaurant.
Staff really friendly.
We were received by co-worker Sky which was really friendly and helpfull.
At the end they surprised us with a dish of really good fruit.
Really recommend it.

title: Dinner experience
review:
We had dinner in Zucca restaurant.
The food is good.
The staff are so friendly and helpful especially Ruby.
We got som fresh fruit and some starter for free too.

title: Excellent without a doubt
review: Excellent Pizza and First Class Service. We very much appreciate the local beer and juice courtesy of the house. We highly recommend this place.

title: The best in Vietnam
review: A delicious dining experience in every aspect, combined with truly impeccable Service, the most brilliant of our trip to Vietnam. The staff was incredibly welcoming, attentive and kind. Moreover, the prices are more than reasonable. We highly recommend it!

title: Good restaurant and good prices. I recommend 100%.
review:
Very good restaurant and very good prices.
Very attentive and friendly waiters. They give you a little plate with fruit for dessert.
Very clean restaurant. We were attended by RUBY and it was all excellent. Very attentive all the time. Thank you very much.

title: Love at first bite!
review: What a great pizza! We took the three cheeses and added another. It was love at first bite! First time here, but it absolutely won't be the last.

title: The right pick ⭐
review: I stumbled upon this restaurant while wandering around town for an early dinner or a late lunch ;-) I was greeted by Ruby, who was extremely professional, always with a smile and in English, throughout my meal. The establishment also offered me a tasting beer. I ordered a Hue beef soup. Very tasty. I was also offered some fruit for dessert. Very pleasant experience, in a charming, centrally located, spacious and open place, which I highly recommend 👍🏼

title: Delicious food, best server
review: The meal was so delicious! We had the best server—super friendly and on top of everything. Cannot recommend this spot enough!

title: A perfect birthday celebration
review: Came here to celebrate my birthday and had an amazing experience. The dishes were fantastic and the staff was wonderful. I'm already looking forward to my next visit!

title: Italians in Vietnam
review: great Service, dishes I would say more than great to be on the other side of the world than Italy. ruby excellent❤️

title: Impeccable in every detail
review: Flawless service and brilliant attention to detail. We loved the amazing atmosphere and the spotless, well-appointed bathrooms.

title: Further Great Hue meal experience. Amazing food in Hue.
review: Thoroughly enjoyed delicious taste of Vietnamese meal with some Italian variation. I normally wouldn't eat raw Capaccio beef whilst travelling but taste is as good as you get at any Italian Restuatant.

title: Exceptional!
review: What a beautiful discovery! Tasty cuisine and Service as fast as efficient. Pizzas are exceptional, as are salads. We highly recommend.

title: OPEN MIND .....
review: we went into this restaurant with an OPEN MIND .. we knew not to find the real Neapolitan / Roman pizza .. but we liked it! “biscuit” dough but it was not bad for being in Vietnam .. mozzarella spinning ... as an appetizer, they brought us small tomato bruschetta and feel the salty ... it was great! Council to those who go with the claim not to find Italian pizza .. DAN our waiter was very kind! And with pizza a free bottle of beer ....

title: Absolutely to try
review: Great pizza with local beer included, clean and well-kept place. Roby was a fantastic waitress, great English. Also good burgers and Vietnamese dishes of excellent quality (I had grilled squid)

title: Best pasta in HUE
review: Amazing food and very nice waitress (Tom). I liked the pork and the pasta carbonara a lot. They invited us to some drinks and some fruit as desert.

title: Great Italian restaurant in Hue.
review: Great culinary experiencie in Zucca at Hue. Tom, who was our waiter was of great help, and gifted us with free local beer, and fruit.

title: Great experience at Zucca Restaurant
review: It was a perfect dinner. Tom, our waitress, was very nice with us. Totally recommended for everyone who wants a special dinner with their friends.

title: Italian pizza in Huế? Yes, thank you!
review: We unexpectedly found an authentic Italian pizza in Huế da Zucca. Light dough, fresh ingredients and a welcoming atmosphere. Highly recommended!

title: Delicious pizzas and free local beer
review: We discovered Zucca Restaurant in Hue and it was a real surprise! The setting is charming and the atmosphere very pleasant. We tasted their “delicious pizzas”, prepared with fresh ingredients and a crisp paste as desired. What really marked us was that they offer a "free local beer" with some dishes – a little more very appreciated! Attentive and smiling Service, perfect for a couple dinner. Must recommend if you move to Hue!

title: Authentic Italian Pizza 🍕🍕🍕, right in Hue
review: At Zucca, the hand-stretched dough and imported Italian flour made all the difference. We loved the fresh toppings and bold flavor layering—especially the gourmet combos. The vibe added charm, and the service was warm and attentive. A hidden gem worth returning to

title: A pizza that looks like a piadina, but not bad for a break from Vietnamese food. The ravioli with spinach not bad! Trying
review: For an Italian who wants a break from Vietnamese food a not bad alternative! Certainly far from our flavors but it could have been much worse!

title: Romantic dinner with a taste of Italy
review: Pumpkin won us over with its artisan pizzas and warm hospitality. A corner of Italy in the heart of Huế. We will definitely be back!

title: Quick, good, friendly, relaxed atmosphere
review: Great and Quick service from Ruby. Food did not disappoint, a quick bite. Delicious lasagne, springrolls with sharing and soup. Bruchetta and fruit on the house!

title: The right place for pizza lovers 🍕
review: Fast Service, great pizza and honest prices. Pumpkin is our new reference for an Italian dinner in Huế. Try it!

title: Fooood
review: Really good food! Nice ambiance and good served by Ruby we take a lunch overheee and we Giessen the Italiaan food Will be also good for diner

title: Our family 's favorite Pizza 🍕 spot
review: Zucca surprised us with its light, airy cornicione and crispy-yet-chewy crust. The kids loved the playful twists on classic toppings, while we enjoyed the tangy-sweet sauce balance. Friendly staff remembered our names, and the spotless setting made us feel right at home. Highly recommend

title: Perfect alternative to local dining
review: Feeling like we needed a change from the amazing local dining, we chose Zucca and were not disappointed! Three of us are vegetarian and the menu was extensive. Everything was piping hot, tasty, fresh and delivered to us by Diego who was brilliant looking after us. Would definitely recommend.

title: Recommended
review: Very good food! We could choose between excellent dishes of Italian and Vietnamese cuisine. The homemade tagliatelle is definitely recommended! Very friendly service with several extras.

title: Lovely restaurant
review: Authentic pizzas—thin, blistered crusts with the perfect cheese-to-sauce ratio. The mozzarella stretched endlessly, and every bite was bursting with umami. The cozy, industrial-chic ambiance. Loved this restaurant.

title: Not bad.
review: Clean, Courteous Service, Ruby very nice like all Vietnamese, decent food, nothing spacey. If you think about eating real Italian pizza, it is not really the place to be.

title: Incredible pizza with variety of toppings
review: Our visit to Zucca Restaurant in Hue was a delicious experience. The best: its wide variety of handmade pizza toppings and authentic Italian cuisine. Every bite of pizza was an explosion of flavor, and the Romantic Mood made it perfect for couples like us. Although we were in Vietnam, we felt in Italy with fresh ingredients and Italian technique. Highly recommended if looking for quality pizza in Hue!

title: Very good!
review: Very good Vietnamese Food.They have also Pizza, Spaghetti and Others Things...We choose the vietnamese Food, it was delicious!

title: Places we cannot miss
review: Once again I have to write this review for Zucca. Our waitress Luci was amazing. Pizza was the best dish for us. Wish every time we come to Hue for work we could stay a little longer.

title: Great dinner!
review: We had a great dinner. Spaghetti aglio e olio was good. The same for pizza. Crispy and thin! We got water, bruchetta and fruit for free from Ruby!

title: For us it was unfortunately nothing 👎🏻
review: We stayed there based on the Tripadvisor recommendations. The staff, Waiting time, prices and facilities were okay. We were just very unhappy with the food. We both had a pizza. Unfortunately, this was sometimes the worst pizza we as Europeans ate. No salt or pizza flour was used for the dough and the dough base was partially raw.

title: Top tent
review:
It's a nice place to have lunch. There is an air conditioning inside and you are well helped by the staff. With us, it was Ruby. The food was delicious and there is something for everyone. They also regularly offered us free extra food or drinks.

All in all a top experience with Good Service.

title: Delicious
review: The pizza and lasanya was delicious, with pizza the drinks (water and soft drinks are free) but for sure the attention or Ruby is at the same level as the food, she has been SO KIND. ❤️ They also Gave us and aperitive and fruit for free...Good value restaurant!!!

title: Pleasant experience....
review:
Pleasant surroundings, great menu selection ,friendly helpful waiters.
A special mention to Lily..spoke excellent English, and was very helpful for us in choosing our meal.

title: Great service and great dessert
review: The food was delicious! The fruit was fresh and the pumpkin ravioli tastes good! The best part was our waitress, Mai! She was so nice!

title: Top tent for pasta and friendly service, Ruby is top!!
review:
Delicious pasta, tasty bruschettas and delicious local beer. Friendly staff, we were served by Ruby, very friendly!!
We got the local beer and bruschettas for free. At the end of our menu we also got fresh watermelon. Super tent if you are tired of Vietnamese food.

title: A treat from start to finish!
review: We ate at this restaurant during our trip to Vietnam and it was a great surprise! Welcoming was warm, with Ruby we were able to have a drink quietly before going to the table. The dishes were delicious, very well presented and generous portions. A real explosion of Vietnamese flavors! A big bravo to the whole team. We will return without hesitation!

title: Worth every carb and then some
review: Zucca delivered the perfect pizza experience—artisan dough, bold flavors, and above-and-beyond service. We couldn’t get enough of the premium pepperoni cups and locally sourced produce. Free beer and juice 😍

title: Great Experience!
review: We had a great experience at Zucca Restaurant! The food was really delicious, and the complimentary fruit and beer were a lovely and much-appreciated touch. Mai, who served us, was extremely kind and professional – she made us feel truly welcome. Highly recommended!

title: Yummy place!
review: Incredible place to eat!! Good people, good food, good location, good wifi! Hehe! Ruby was sooo nice and kind with me, helping to choose the best options of the menú!! Thanks you Ruby!!!!

title: Great
review: Food and service was great. Food was delish. Pizza had loads of toppings and the skewers we great. A1 never had better food

title: Good pizza, friendly staff
review: The staff were friendly, and Ruby was especially kind and spoke English very well. The pizza was tasty, and the complimentary dessert with fresh fruit was delicious. I’d definitely come back!
We had very tasty Vietnamese food, so we enjoyed our visit. Place is very nice in center of Hue. Waitress Mai was very kind 😊⭐️🩷🤩🥳

title: Pizza very good Excellent Service considering being in Vietnam local downtown places both inside and out
review: Local in the center. Really good pizza considering being far from Italy. Free drinks. Very kind Service, really recommend

title: All right.
review: Nice restaurant. Good Vietnamese dishes. The staff is friendly and attentive. The icing on the cake, we were treated to fruit to digest.

title: Tourist Opinion
review: I liked everything, delicious food, great staff, fast service, good atmosphere, and not so expensive, it's a very nice place

title: Pizza in hue city
review: Really great food and service. Pizza was delicious and Quynh is the best , very helpful. I will definitely return. Cam on.

title: Pizza is always good and service is always nice
review: Still as good as before. Nothing more to say. Just good and good. Come here without hesitation. The girls are always smiling and kind

title: Amazing authentic pasta 🍝 dishes
review: Puttanesca pasta and lasagna were so delicious and ingredients were very fresh. Especially the home made pasta 😋 They also served our fave red Dalat wine.

title: Perfect welcome and great service
review: Cozy and quiet place. Quynh was professional and kind. Quick service and varied menu with excellent value for money.

title: Satisfied
review:
For being a pizzeria in Vietnam you take home an honest 4 star. Discreet pizza of 2 possible sizes and various ingredients; also tried a good Banh Mi.
Friendly staff, excellent customer service. Offer starter with bruschetta and final fruit. Also beer included in the pizza menu.

title: Charming restaurant with exceptional food and atmosphere
review: This is a charming and inviting restaurant with a warm and friendly atmosphere. The food is absolutely delicious, prepared with great care and attention to detail. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a delightful dining experience.

title: A perfect fusion of italian and vietnamese flavors
review: They offer a delightful blend of Italian and Vietnamese cuisine, providing a wide variety of dishes to cater to different tastes. The menu is diverse, ensuring there’s something for everyone to enjoy.

title: Delicious and attentive!
review: We ate great! The small appetizers were delicious, and the fruit offered at the end added a fresh and pleasant touch. Beautiful attention that makes you happy!

title: dinner in Zucca, Hie, Vietnam
review: Genial. Pizza, pasta and Vietnamese food. Very good and with free beer and dessert. The spaghetti carbonara was fine. Pizzas are thin dough. Starter tomato bread and dessert fruit. Recommended

title: I’ll be back tomorrow:-)
review: A small restaurant very friendly, quiet but close to other entertainment places. I dined Italian it was delicious. And the bruschetta offered as a starter were perfect!

title: Great pizza in Vietnam!
review: On holiday in Vietnam, I craved carbohydrates and found a pizzeria with a more than satisfactory pizza. Great value for money. Recommended!

title: Delicious food and great extras!
review: We had dinner here with our daughters. The staff was very friendly, the pizzas delicious. During happy hour there were free drinks, a free appetizer and a fruit platter for dessert.

title: Best pasta in central Vietnam
review: Very tasty pasta which is difficult to get in Vietnam. Ended up coming back three times, pleased with affordable prices. Pizza was also good, but not as good as pasta.

title: Excellent pasta and generous welcome!
review: Pasta, especially homemade tagliatelle, is of high quality. The welcome is warm and for every dish ordered, a bruschetta, a drink and fruit are offered. An address I recommend without hesitation.

title: Quiet spot for a good meal
review: Great spot just near our hotel. Waitress Chi was helpful and attentive. Food was yum - calamari skewers and fried pork with noodles. Wine was reasonably priced. Complimentary fruit to finish!

title: Perfect for a European break!
review: Want to change a bit of Vietnamese cuisine and taste more European flavors? This restaurant is perfect! The dishes are super good and affordable. A big thank you to Chi for his service at the top!

title: Well eaten
review:
Very good little restaurant very nice
May the waitress was very kind, we ate delicious tomato spaghetti

title: Exceptional food and service at Zucca!
review: An excellent experience at Zucca. The stuffs provided outstanding service, combining friendliness with attentiveness. The Four Cheese pizza was exceptional, perfectly cooked and rich in flavor. The quality of the food was impressive, making this a place well worth revisiting. Thank you for a memorable evening.

title: The best pizza in Vietnam!
review: The best pizza I've ever had in Vietnam! The formaggi and prosciutto e funghi were delicious. Fresh Bruschettas, excellent fruit, and impeccable service. I recommend!

title: Delicious food, great for family.
review:
We dined here 2 nights in a row with family of 5. Kids aged 4,6,8.

Kids loved the Hawaiian pizza, no surprise ingredients, it's just what it says on the menu. The complimentary bruscetta and complimentary fresh cut fruit at the end was most appreciated.
Thankyou!

title: Delicious pizza, free beer
review: A cute spot with lovely local and Italian style eats. Quynh, my excellent service was so good I relished my meal. Best part: Free local beer and fruit! ♥️

title: A Must-Try in Hue City!
review: I highly recommend this spot for pasta or pizza lovers. The penne with zucchini gratin I ordered was delightful. You'll also appreciate the excellent service and great value.

title: Nice address to keep
review: Nice little restaurant that combines quality and price. It is not a Michelin star but it is simple and effective. Choice for the vegetarian. Pizza for the complicated. The staff is always friendly to the locals

title: Verdict soon!
review: We highly recommend the tasting menu to enjoy all their specialties; all dishes were exceptional. The team is extremely friendly. This is an essential step if you are passing through Hue.

title: What a great food !!
review: We had dinner with 12 people. It was really wonderfull. Pizza, pasta etc. Of was all delicious. Thank you Mai for making our evening just perfect !!

title: Value for money
review: Great tasting food with free bruschetta, beer and tasty fruit platter! Friendly staff. Excellent value for money. Thoroughly impressed

title: Exceptional Quality Price
review: Exceptional food, cheap and rich. Unbeatable attention. We ordered pasta, typical pork snacks and Nuddles. Everything great

title: We ate well
review: We discovered this restaurant in Hue and went back almost every night during our week-long stay. The staff is extremely welcoming, the pizzas are delicious and, with each pizza, they offer a free large beer, bruschetta and some fruit. Amazing value, we recommend it without reservation.

title: Fantastic restaurant
review:
The food is excellent. It was that good we came both nights we were in Hue.
The service is excellent and the prices are amazing.

title: Best pizza in Vietnam
review: Visited this restaurant twice during our stay in Hue. The pizza is delicious with a thin and crispy base and tasty toppings. The service is really good and a special thanks to Tran for looking after us. You also get a free drink, bruschetta and fruit plate. Highly recommend

title: Cozy and good food
review: Mai is the girl who served us with kindness and caring and patient manner. Good pizza and cooked well with excellent gorgonzola. Ungreased and crispy fried prawns

title: We loved the atmosphere!
review: Although they offer Vietnamese and Italian dishes, I found the Vietnamese dishes average. On the other hand, pizza margherita and pasta pesto were a real treat! The entrance offered (first image) was also very good. They also served us fruit afterwards. Service is clearly the strength.

title: Delicious food
review: Great food, beer and bruchetta was good. Nice chilled red wine with the pizza. Helped fine by Mai

title: A good pizza
review:
In a group we chose to dine at crispy pizza but still good, very good Vietnamese dishes.
Recommended

title: Friendly, yummy pizza!
review:
After being in Vietnam for around 11 days now, we just fancied a change! We love Vietnamese food, but overheard others talking about burgers and pizza so had a search and found this place!

You get a few free bits too which is always a win.

Pizza was good - lots to choose from. Glass of Vietnamese wine for 80,000 too, which was nice. Can’t seem to find much wine around.

title: Nice place to eat in Hue
review: Very nice restoraunt. The food very delicious. There were some compliments from restorant such as fruits and Italian appetizer. Mai was really helpful-and kind. Definitely recommend this place!

title: Excellent pizza in the heart of Hue
review: A real find for us. After 10 days of lovely Vietnamese food it was great to have a really good pizza for a change. Mai was a super helpful waitress and we were given free bruschetta and two free beers to start. There is a Vietnamese menu too and the food looked delicious. But if you want a change of pace and an excellent pizza this is your spot!excellent pizza

title: Great restraunt and great service
review: Great Restraunt! Mai was very kind and helpful in food selection. They also gave complementary gift :) We would return here for sure.

title: Our lunch break.
review: We were looking for a place to eat quickly and came across this restaurant. Delicious pizzas, with a thin and crispy dough, and unbeatable prices! A pleasant surprise.

title: We'd go back to Pumpkin, Hue!
review: Fresh and tasty dishes. Crunchy and excellent pizzas. Excellent Vietnamese cuisine. Bruschetta offered as an appetizer and fruit at the end of the meal. Highly recommended!

title: It's delicious!
review: Excellent cuisine! Before the main course we were served free bruschetta and a selection of fruits. The mushroom cream soup was delicious. The pizza with thin dough was also excellent.

title: Great little restaurant
review: Fantastic little find in the Imperial City of Hue, not just Italian although one night I had Pizza which was delicious but also Vietnam food and the seafood is to die for. Offered a free beer each night which makes it great value for money, staff friendly and very polite as always in Vietnam

title: Hue dinner
review: Great meal in the heart of Hue. Excellent service, super value for money and tasty meal. We had a free bruschetta on arrival, ravioli to share as a starter and two pizza's which had an offer of a free beer or soft drink. Finished by complimentary fruit platter. Fantastic experience from a lovely family restaurant.

title: Excellent value for money
review: What an unexpected gem we found in Hue! During our two-day stay, we couldn't resist returning for a second meal. The hospitality was impeccable and the cuisine was absolutely outstanding. The generous complimentary touches really impressed us - they treated us to complimentary beers and served fresh fruit desserts, all delivered with warm, genuine smiles. A truly memorable dining experience!

title: good Italian pasta
review: Superb attention from staff, and their lasagna was absolutely mouthwatering. This Italian/Vietnamese fusion establishment truly impresses. They generously provide a complimentary appetizer, beverage, and fresh fruit platter to finish your meal. The pricing is quite fair considering the quality, and the staff's attentiveness is remarkable throughout the dining experience.

title: Amazing dinner!
review: Absolutely scrumptious meal - we sampled both their pasta and pizza dishes which were fantastic! The team provided outstanding service with genuinely warm attitudes. They also run special promotions, including complimentary beer with our order. A truly delightful dining experience!

title: worth a visit.
review: Charming eatery located close to the pedestrian zone. I sampled Vietnamese cuisine while my spouse opted for Italian dishes, and both meals were absolutely scrumptious. The staff treated us to complimentary tomato and garlic bruschetta along with fruit - a pleasant unexpected extra. The service was welcoming and the costs quite affordable - certainly merits stopping by.

title: Good restaurant
review: Cute little place with excellent service they know how give some extras to make the visit a good experience. The food is tasty I was happy to eat some Italian dishes after two weeks of only eating Vietnamese food.

title: All around good
review: The pizza is good. Thin soil and crispy. Since I can't eat cheese, I put together my pizza individually. The service is excellent. Our drinks with food were free. There was a free welcome bruschetta. And after dinner we had a free fruit plate. The landlady very friendly. We rarely write reviews, but this restaurant deserves it.

title: Top notch pizzas
review: We visited for the second time, and the waitress recognized us right away, which was a lovely touch. The service was attentive and friendly, with a smile always present. The Diavolo pizza was delicious, and I added a pinch of salt and pepper to suit my taste, as I prefer it spicy. They also offered freshly squeezed fruit shakes and included some complimentary treats. When we requested extra ice for the water, it arrived promptly in a large bowl. I highly recommend this place

title: Trying is adopting!
review: A place where Europeans wandering in Asia find a minimum of landmarks. The staff is lovely. We tried and adopted.

title: Beautiful in every way
review: Very kind and helpful staff, they bring you very good welcome bruschetta, excellent food. Clean place, low price. Free local beer and juice 😍

title: Had a great pizza
review: The staff creates a warm, inviting atmosphere complemented by delicious, beautifully presented meals. Offering outstanding value, this spot serves fantastic pizza and a great variety of drinks. An absolute must-visit!

title: Really good taste and very good service
review: This restaurant is truly exceptional - the salad is crisp and fresh while the pizza is absolutely delightful - a hidden treasure worth discovering. The prices offer remarkable quality for what you pay. When visiting Hue, this establishment should definitely be on your itinerary.

title: Finally flavors of home Italy
review: We ate mostly Italian. Bruschetta, pasta and sandwich with burgher and side dish. All very good. Very kind and despite being full he made us sit in 20 minutes (12 people, not easy). Price? Less than 10 euros each.

title: A delightful surprise!
review: The friendly and attentive staff made us feel right at home, greeting us with warm smiles and genuine hospitality. The pizza was a standout—crispy, flavorful, and crafted with care. The cozy ambiance added to the charm, making it a perfect spot for couples. Whether you’re craving Italian classics or just a welcoming vibe, Zucca delivers on all fronts. A must-visit for anyone in Hue!

title: Romantic night with exceptional service
review: Dining at Zucca was one of the highlights of our Hue trip. The staff greeted us warmly and offered great recommendations. We loved the seafood pasta and tiramisu for dessert. The restaurant's cozy vibe, with dim lighting and soft music, set the tone for a romantic evening. It’s a place where food, service, and ambiance come together perfectly.

title: Good restaurant
review: The smoked ham and pineapple were a delightful surprise, especially with the oregano. The restaurant's cozy atmosphere and the staff's friendliness made our evening unforgettable. It's not just pizza; it's an experience. Their fusion of cultures through food is something we'll remember fondly.

title: Hidden gem! 😘
review: Zucca is a hidden gem! We enjoyed the best pizza we’ve had in Vietnam—crispy crust, rich toppings, and full of flavor. The wine selection was small but well-curated, and the staff were attentive without being intrusive. It’s a quaint spot for couples to unwind after exploring Hue. We’ll definitely return on our next visit!

title: Best Pizza in Hue
review: The Pizza Capricciosa with its dry sausage was a standout. We were impressed by how they've integrated Vietnamese ingredients into classic Italian pizzas. The service was top-notch, and the prices were fair for what you get. It's a perfect spot for couples looking for something different and delicious in Hue.

title: A little disappointing.
review: The reviews were fab but we were underwhelmed. Had pastas but both were flavourless and the bolognaise had no discernable meat. Free beer and fruit desert. Pleasant staff.

title: Authentic Italian oasis in Vietnam
review: We were craving Western food after weeks of Vietnamese cuisine, and Zucca delivered beyond expectations! The pizzas reminded us of Naples, and the house-made gelato was heavenly. Staff remembered us from our first visit and even surprised us with complimentary limoncello. Bellissimo!

title: Our go-to anniversary dinner spot
review: We've visited Zucca three times during our two-week stay in Hue. The fusion of Italian cuisine with local ingredients is brilliant! The candlelit setting makes every dinner feel special. Great value for money considering the quality.

title: Charming Italian spot
review: The intimate lighting and cozy atmosphere immediately won us over. The homemade pasta was perfectly al dente, and the tiramisu transported us straight to Italy. Service was attentive without being intrusive. A perfect date night spot in Hue!

title: VIETNAM 2025
review:
A spectacle the tasty dinner consumed with great food and friendliness flawless.
All great and with great quality beer

title: Great food in Hue
review: Italian restaurant and Vietnamese specialities, excellent. Drink and fruit offered Very good value for money.

title: Excellent welcome close to the center
review:
L c good little restaurant that serves Italian and Vietnamese
Pizza and very good pasta just a few steps from the night bars street
They are very welcoming and offered us bruschetta and fruit for dessert 👍

title: A Delicious Surprise in Hue!😋
review: We visited Zucca during our honeymoon and were impressed. The Pizza Napoletana we shared had the perfect balance between mozzarella and anchovies. Prices are reasonable for the quality they offer. We especially loved the thin, crunchy dough. An unforgettable culinary experience for us!

title: A pleasant surprise!
review: We ventured with the Hawii Pizza and it was a sound decision. Fresh pineapple combined with smoked ham created an explosion of flavors that won us over. The 30cm size was perfect for sharing. The romantic atmosphere of the place perfectly complemented our dinner.

title: Interesting Fusion Flavors
review: We tried Pizza Hawaii, a controversial choice for us Italians! But we must admit that the combination of ham and pineapple was surprisingly pleasant. It is not the classic Italian pizza, but it is an interesting mix of local culture and tradition. The dough could be improved.

title: what a delightful surprise!
review: Their Pizza Napoletana was absolutely divine - the perfect balance of salty anchovies and creamy mozzarella made us feel like we were dining in Naples. The intimate atmosphere and attentive service added to our magical evening. The fusion of Italian authenticity with Vietnamese hospitality created an unforgettable dining experience.

title: I would say great
review: After 10 days of local food I said... why not?.... I chose tagliatelle (handmade😳👍) and I have to say that I devoured them ... to be so far from Italy I would say great ... is it not strange that apart from Asian restaurants the only cuisine present (more or less) everywhere is ql Italian? Will there be a true why?

title: A Corner of Italy in the Heart of Hue
review: My wife and I discovered this little paradise during our honeymoon!
