The Neapolitan Pizza was perfect - the mozzarella melted in the mouth and the anchovies gave that authentic flavor that reminded us of home. We didn't expect to find such authentic pizza in Vietnam. The service was impeccable and the atmosphere very romantic.

title: A taste of Italy with Vietnamese charm
review: As pizza enthusiasts, we were skeptical about finding authentic Italian pizza in Hue, but their Pizza Margherita proved us wrong. The simplicity of fresh tomatoes and high-quality mozzarella on their perfectly baked crust was outstanding. The menu's bilingual approach shows their commitment to bridging cultures. A must-visit for pizza lover visting Hue City.

title: Love at first slice
review: The Pizza Al prosciutto e funghi was a game-changer - the smoky ham paired perfectly with fresh mushrooms, and the crust was crispy yet tender. We appreciated how they thoughtfully included Vietnamese descriptions, making us feel more connected to the local culture. The cozy setting and reasonable prices made it our favorite dinner spot in Hue.

title: High prices but worth it
review: We were surprised by the prices initially, but after tasting Pizza Margherita and Pizza Al prosciutto e funghi, we understood why. The ingredients are top quality and the cooking is perfect. The atmosphere is intimate and welcoming, ideal for a romantic evening.

title: A place filled with love
review: I came back here with my family during the holidays. Still the same, good food and very nice staff. Sadly when we arrived, they had no more tables available and we had to wait. The girls arranged for us to have a table outside to wait for a table (which was great) We will come back the days I am here

title: Pleasant evening
review: We were greeted with kindness we were in 8 arranged the tables to make us eat all together, we ordered pizzas brought us in more bruschetta and fruit. Recommended

title: Authentic Italian Flavors in the Heart of Hue
review: We weren't expecting to find such authentic pizza in Vietnam! The marinara sauce tasted just like the ones we had in Naples. The chef clearly knows his craft. While the wait was a bit long, it was worth every minute. The romantic lighting and soft music made our anniversary dinner extra special.

title: Best pizza in Hue!
review: We were impressed by the quality of ingredients and the authentic flavors. The free beer and complimentary fruit were a welcome surprise, making this incredible value for money. Highly recommend seeking this place out!

title: Lunch.
review: Good food, enthusiastic staff.

title: No beautiful space.
review: Comfortable space , experience with reasonable friends .

title: Absolutely satisfied
review: The restaurant was little visited. Have sat excellently under one roof in the otherwise open restaurant. Very large, even a little too large map at more than reasonable prices. The staff was extremely helpful. The food was good but should have been hotter for most of us.

title: Meals with supporters
review:
It was delicious.
The menu varies.

Koreans taste good.
Very friendly service.

title: We ate here twice already…
review: Really yummy, spending the weekend in Hue from Da nang, and will be back for breakfast. Definitely recommend. Great service, well priced. Happy Vegemite’s over here.

title: Great Food, Comfortable Atmosphere, and Good Value
review: The restaurant is cool and comfortable, the food is delicious, and the prices are reasonable. I felt very relaxed dining here.

title: Great lunch
review: Fast services, good food quality and friendly staff. Definitely will come back on my next visit to Hue…………………………………..

title: Very bad
review: Very very bad. Been in Vietnam for a week and this was the worst dinner experience. The inside room's smell is terrible (like pee), there were moquitos on the food, and the food it self was absolutely not satisfying. There also was much trouble to split the bill and could not use the pos for credit card.

title: Delicious, clean shops recommended by Sportsmail for individuals or groups
review: He has great taste in the creation of a high-end shop. And the customer service is excellent. And yet the prices are reasonable. There was a wide variety of menu items, all delicious. The fried rice was especially good. The waitress at Ao Dai was also lovely and answered the food questions with a precise translation app. H’ung, the waiter, also suggested taking a picture and received warm hospitality.

title: Really delicious for a good price
review: It was really delicious and at a reasonable price. Ngan and Hung were really good staff for a lovely evening! Good wine, good food and overall good mood. The service was top and they were very attentive to us.

title: Amazing food!
review: Service was amazing, the food was interesting and delicious. The fruit tea was one of the best teas I have had while in Vietnam. Overall, 10/10 would recommend!

title: Exceptional service and delicious and original menu
review: Excellent and original menu, the food was delicious and refined. We didn’t leave a bite on the plate. Elegant and quiet atmosphere and exceptional service by Tho and Hung, who were extremely attentive to our needs. Highly recommended!

title: Very good place
review: Very good restaurant! Hung is very polite and courteous. Thank you a lot for such a good place to eat and have fun with family.

title: Nice dinner
review: Staff and Hung was very friendly and the food was delicious. The location is fine. The restaurant is really fancy. I recommend you to come here.

title: A feast of taste sensations
review: So good! I ordered several appetizers and it was a feast of taste sensations. Highly recommend. My server was Ngan and Hung - great service and recommendations

review:

title: excellent .
review: Very good food and great service. Seafood. Mr. Hung took care of us personally. Highly recommended. Very good value for money.

title: Recommended for meals in Hue
review: It is a hygienic and beautiful shop. The food is also very good. You can enjoy traditional food in Hue and there is a great variety of food and liquor. The wine in Hue was delicious and it was a good night.

title: Best restaurant in Hue
review: Absolutely loved this restaurant. So clean. Staff very friendly and had the best food we have had so far. Would recommend it

title: April evening in Hue
review: Good food, Pork dish was beautifully cooked and Beef stir fried rice was beautifully prepared. Sukura cocktail was delicious. Very clean including the toilets. ❤️

title: Great food and kind people
review: The food was very delicious. The waitress Nhi and the superviser Hùng were really kind. Would recommend 10/10 great place!!

title: April Lunch
review: Lovely spot, excellent food! Really friendly and helpful staff. Definitely would come here again. And would recommend to anyone

title: Great Food in Hue
review:
Everything perfect... from the food.. the service and the environment.

review: Wonderful and super delicious. I'd love to come back. Great choice and very nice atmosphere and ambience. Service zudem 1 A

review: It is a beautiful restaurant with delicious food. The service we received was also excellent. We highly recommend if you come to Hue.

title: Great burning pork plate
review: Food products, maintain a high standard, especially a pork plate, fresh hot, fresh materials, excellent craftsmanship. Acid fish soup is also a good choice in the spring and cold season, tomatoes, oatmeal, pineapple, bamboo, sour sweet to taste...

title: Hue style restaurant
review: I love the way they decorate the restaurant. Make people feel comfy and luxury when come in. The food is good and the service is the best.

title: Will come back again if have chances for sure!!
review: Food is really good and the staff is well serviced and vegetarian options with huges portions and the vibes of the restaurant feels homie

title: Delicious dinner
review: The food was delicious : we took the shrimp salad, the appetizer mix and bbq ribs. The restaurant is really enjoyable and the staff really attentive to our needs.

Highly recommended, photos say enough

review: Good service and very good food with generous portions. Beautiful ambiance and nice seating. The staff looks very nice

title: Very nice restaurant
review: Food was delicious and inexpensive. The decor is nice, great view outside to the street. We'll be back!

review:
We ate very well here. Recommended at any time!

title: Morning of Hue sightseeing
review: I came for breakfast. We were able to spend time in a calm atmosphere and the rice was delicious. The banana smoothie was also delicious.

title: Nice so amazing pretty
review: Lien was amazing, food was amazing. Lovely interior the best place ever probably I genuinely loved it to such an extreme extent

title: Wonderful coffee
review: The coffee here is a work of art! It was absolutely delicious. Plus staff is extremely friendly. Very nice and relaxed atmosphere.

title: Large delicious portions at a good price and nice ambience
review: Very delicious food and good service. Very large portions whether it is a starter or dessert. And everything fresh and really exceptionally good! We didn’t get the restaurant suggested on Google and are all the happier to sit here now. By the way, ambience is also mega!

title: Great food in a great atmosphere
review:
A nice restaurant with cozy garden and excellent food and very nice staff.
Completely satisfied.

title: Very pleasant moment, in a beautiful setting
review:
The setting is beautiful and the cocktails are delicious.
In addition, the staff is very attentive.
So we stayed to eat and no regrets. Everything was delicious.
This is an address I recommend

title: Excellent
review: Excellent restaurant refined decoration personal with great care and excellent value for money I recommend

title: 5 Sterne Deluxe
review: We loved it. The food is definitely worth 5 stars. Be sure to try, it's worth it. The service is very accommodating.

title: Excellent address, excellent cuisine, very good location, beautiful setting. Recommendable on Hue............
review:
Excellent cuisine, and very hearty dishes
Staff speaks difficult English, but is very pleasant. Recommended.

title: Amazing dining experience!
review: Great service and good. Will come again! Really nice staff and the beef noodle dish was excellent. Plenty of fresh vegetables and a really good mixed juice drink.

title: Khai hoan
review: All very good , courtesy , cleanliness , also the price is good considering that the dishes are excellent , I ate here two days in a row , only two days because then we left the city , I highly recommend , after about three weeks in Vietnam , there were few places that satisfied me , I highly recommend the goose breast, the series of cakes , in conclusion here you will find tradition and courtesy at a great price . Bravo!!!

title: So good we went back the next night
review: This was by far the best food we had the pleasure of eating in Hue. The goose with passionfruit sauce made our taste buds explode, it was so delicious and something we had never eaten before. The tofu in lemongrass was silky and melt in your mouth. The ambience of the restaurant is fresh and inviting and the staff are highly professional with food and drinks arriving together.

title: Thank uou. Lovely experience
review: Great food, professional service. Lovely clean restaurant. Would recommend to any customers. Food and service was excellent

title: Dinner in Hue
review: Great ambiance and food! We ordered the local specialty banh hue as well as the lemongrass chicken, char siu pork, and garlic morning glory. The drinks were refreshing as well.

title: Try this new place in Hue!
review: Very nice restaurant and seems very new. It is large with a main restaurant and banquet rooms in the back. The bathroom facilities are nice. The restaurant has a nice backyard with a pond. My sister and I had the beef and seafood hotpot. We liked the seasoning. There was a lot of broth left over so we ordered another plate of noodles only.

title: Khai hoan
review:
Nice service with beautiful young lady
Good food With many choice food
Beautiful and large restaurant
Clean washroom 😍
We all enjoy this place

title: Excellent choice as arestaurant
review: Very nice place, fantastic atmosphere very polite waitress. Good food. Fair price . Would defined recommend it. You won’t regret it

title: Nice place, food and people
review: Very nice place, very nice people and food. Would definitely recommend it. Local food and good drinks; but one should be wary of the large menu (:

title: Authentic food
review: Good food well prepared and served. We were looking for a decent meal and this place gave us that. Good menu choice and the selections we made were most enjoyable.

title: Amazing
review: Food was delicious - beautiful establishment and table setup. We had the seaweed soup, fish, spring roll and more. Would recommend for anyone visiting!!! 🥰

title: Eating at Khai hoan
review: good looking restaurant, good service and yum food, it has all foods of hue for you to experience and a relaxing and chill environment.

title: heeeeerlijk
review: Heel gezellig! 😍 Very good food and very neat place!!! Plus they’re super fast with their service and everything is very clean!

title: Family trip
review:
This is an excellent restaurant. The food is exceptional. The waitresses are extremely polite and the environment is really warm and welcoming.
Greatly recommended.

title: Easy to use both as a café and a restaurant
review:
I was curious about the lovely-looking restaurant, and I visited it because it was highly rated by Google Review.
He and his wife visited before 8pm on Friday. The interior is spacious, clean and clean. I was not that hungry so I used the meal lightly. The appetizer platter, beef salad, and more are beautifully recommended.
The drink is ginger tea with a good hot drink. It is dry and delicious.

We were looking for a place to use as a cafe and actually visited around 10am. I had Café Coco. Relatively low sweetness and elegant taste. Meals can only be ordered from the brunch menu.
As a restaurant and cafe, I think both are easy to use.

title: Nice experience
review: Very nice culinary experience in a hidden address of Hue. The welcome is perfect, the prices are low and the quality of the food is top. Great menu choices. Family and fresh cuisine. Recommended.

title: Don’t miss this place! Best we tried in Hue
review: Run don’t walk to this wonderful welcoming family home with a clean little cafe upstairs that serves the most delicious bun bo beef noodle soup, aromatic steamed rice cakes wrapped in leaves, crispy pancakes with shrimp, and all kinds of tempting local dishes. So friendly, and such wonderful food.

title: Genuine traditional Vietnamese cuisine
review: It is the best restaurant in Hue city. We have visited Thailand, Cambodia and Vietnam: Genuine Vietnamese cuisine this restaurant is a gem. The warm welcome is always pleasant. Genuine family cooking is traditional. It is an excellent value for money. We ate there morning noon and evening: a treat

title: Delicious& fresh home cooked meal
review: Food was excellent. I ordered vegetable spring rolls in rice wrappers& dipping them in their sauce was delicious. I also ordered chicken with vegetables dish & chicken was very fresh, tender& delicious. Service was impeccable.& my food came quickly, first the spring rolls& then chicken dish..Home cooked to perfection meal. I had a cough& asked for another delicious ginger tea to take back to the hotel. The owner a lovely woman instead sent me away with the ginger in a heart filled container with limes, & tea. They didn’t want to charge me, but I gave a “ tip” I had picked this restaurant out, but my hotel confirmed it was great food& family run. Thank you for a delicious dinner. One of the best in Vietnam& very affordable.

title: Enjoyable food, open over Tet
review:
We arrived during Tet and a few of the bigger restaurants I had ear marked to try out were closed. We had passed this on our first night so decided to see if it was open on our second night (Tet eve) It was, and the food was delicious. We returned the next night unsure if they would still open and thankfully they were.

A lovely friendly lady who runs the place and so glad we got to enjoy her cooking.

title: Food in Hue
review:
Good and varied food. Many tastes. Large portions. You get a lot of food for the money. Cheap!
Oh, we won 10,000 wins at Saigon.
Nice staff.
Oh yes, it's in the home of the hosts.

title: Restaurant perfume and flavor well balanced
review: Excellent varied restaurant for all tastes , hamburger included,. menu for two to share. Very good price and delicious. Perfume and flavor well dosed. To discover.

title: To discover. Very good cuisine of the region
review: A place to discover. The mistress very attentive, very good traditional cuisine I recommend, thank you very much

title: Owner was very friendly, invited us to come in or return later. We returned later and she thank us for coming back.
review: Atmosphere was pleasant. Food and service was very good and plentiful. Location was near the hotel we stayed in and an easy walk to the imperial city.

title: Delicious food, attentive service and good value!
review: This family restaurant in Hue City is delightful in every way. On the 2nd floor of a family home, it is warm and welcoming with its bright decor. The freshly made dishes are delicious. The morning glory is perfectly cooked just the right amount time and beautifully seasoned. The owner helped us make selections and gave us tips for eating the food. The meals are very reasonably priced and an excellent value. I highly recommend Family Home and Restaurant in Hue City.

title: Delicious dinner in a cozy family space. Spotlessly clean.
review: Delicious fresh food in a cozy family atmosphere. We had the fixed menu #6 for 2 people. Every bite was tasty. You walk up the stairs in the family’s house to the restaurant on the floor above. Well worth a special trip. Highly recommend this place! Clean and bright!

title: Amazing food, amazing atmosphere
review: The food was amazing, the service was phenomenal! Loved the atmosphere, would 100% visit again. I highly recommend the morning glory greens with rice. Was absolutely delicious.

title: Nice experience
review:
Excellent restaurant with good Hue specialties. The manager is absolutely charming and explains how to taste the dishes.
I highly recommend this address to the cute setting.

title: Small cosy family restaurant in a quiet narrow alley.
review: Very nice atmosphere and good food and good service. Could have eaten here several times, but is only on the transit. Recommend food, service and atmosphere.

title: Family owned restaurant you have to visit when you’re in Hue
review: What a great place to visit! Friendly owners and very very good food! All fresh, all prepared with family recepis! Try the balcony for the max experience!

title: A very nice surprise
review:
It is a treasure hidden in an alley of Hue. We are very well received, the ladies are charming and do not hesitate to help you choose. I was touched by their kindness and availability to show me their map. The food is excellent, you can go there with your eyes closed as the dishes are appetizing. I even got a tutorial to taste the dishes. I was just thinking about going to dinner but I had a nice human and culinary experience with a sweet bonus at the end of the meal.
Thank you for everything and I highly recommend this place that deserves to have crowded at their entrance!

title: Family Home - The guest feels at home
review: Definitely recommended small restaurant. It's hidden in a small alley. Our table was on the first floor on the balcony. The owner helped us choose the dishes - typical dishes recommended. We shared and enjoyed very delicious food. A rainy day in Hue has a great end to this inexpensive and - as the name suggests - familiar restaurant.

title: A special little spot
review:
Our favorite place so far in Vietnam. Food was awesome, ladies who run it are the best. I really loved the chili oil, so she sent me home with a little container of it! Made fresh by them.
We even got to hear the young boy sing us some karaoke ❤️
Love this little gem.

title: The best spring rolls all over Vietnam
review: Nice little family run restaurant. The owner is very friendly and speaks good English. I had the best spring rolls in all of Vietnam. We would come back anytime and come back to the Family Home Café anytime.

title: Very good cheap food
review:
Super friendly hosts, very good , inexpensive food.
We had a wonderful evening.
We had different dishes that we shared. Along with Vietnamese wine .
Everything was delicious

title: A real house and a real house.
review: If you are looking for a real typical and simple little house in Hue, where a real friendly Vietnamese family lives, and where we serve real authentic family cuisine ... So feel free to enter this narrow alley and cross the threshold of a charming place where you will find upstairs all this and much more! Welcoming, kindness, thoughtfulness, advice, cleanliness, dishes from home or from us and elsewhere "way lives" but in any case always "home" and for more than reasonable rates! Frankly everything is top!

title: Amazing dinner
review: Best meal I have had in Vietnam! Cannot recommend enough, very warm friendly service from everyone. I will be back! Thankyou

title: Top family restaurant!
review: Very delicious food, and super kind service! It was very authentic with a helpful description of the meals. The atmosphere was cozy, and at the end we even got some candy as a gift. We come again!

title: Friendly and Welcoming
review: This is a lovely place. The staff are very friendly and made me feel very welcome. The food is great too! And a convenient location in the centre of the city.

title: Great food, great prices in a cozy atmosphere
review: Great food, great prices, situated on a balcony in a quiet alleyway. We loved our visit for lunch so much that we returned the same day for dinner. Tasty, fresh food. Lovely hosts. Highly recommend.

title: Good food, good price
review: We ate here four nights in a row trying different dishes. They were all delicious and reasonably priced. I highly recommend eating here.

title: Not to be missed!!!!
review:
Family restaurant not to be missed! Quiet Mood in a nice little alley.

The food is excellent, one of the best I could taste in Vietnam! You can enjoy Hue’s specialities with tailor-made menus!

Welcoming is extremely warm!

I highly recommend stopping there!!!

title: A highlight
review:
Very cozy shop in a small alley away from the street noise. Excellent food, four of us had the family pack and everything tasted excellent. Definitv a highlight of our Vietnam trip. Everything is freshly prepared and the operator is extremely attentive and hospitable!
The cocktails are also awesome and have an unbeatable price-performance ratio for 60k.

title: A MUST in Hue
review:
Felt like home!!
Amazing experience overall, the owner and the staff were really nice, the food was the best one i had on my trip (i ate beef soup) and the location was quite, away from the bustling city.

title: Excellent restaurant
review: Great food, honest price and the staff is very nice and helpful. Intimate and particular location. Family management.

title: Excellent restaurant!
review: Warm Welcoming, tasty and beautifully presented dishes, fresh produce and generous portions. Impeccable Service and value for money at the top. An address to recommend without hesitation! 🍽️

title: Delicious
review: This is our second time here. The first time was in 2016. The food it’s still delicious, and the restaurant has a balcony where you can enjoy the meal. We're happy to come back.

title: Friendly address
review: A nice address in this small restaurant with a friendly Welcoming and good local dishes at the right prices

title: Feeling at home (in a real home!)

title: Great and tasty 😉
review: Good tasty Vietnamese food! Lovely staff and great place. I would only advise to make the green salad portions bigger as it wasn’t enough for skewers unfortunately. Thank you 😉

title: Delicious food and very kind staff!!!
review: I highly recommend Family Home if you are in Hue! My family went both nights we stayed in Hue. We arrived for a pretty early dinner around 5pm tired from a long day, and there weren’t any lights on, but staff from the hotel across the street came and took us up to the cozy terrace on the 2nd floor. They took our order and our food was out in no time. I got “Set Menu 2” and I enjoyed every bite of it! It was a Hue style pancake and pork and veggies with rice paper as the appetizer, and then Bun Bo Hue, and yogurt. It was absolutely delicious! This meal has been my favorite meal in Vietnam. The staff is a family and they are all very kind and accommodating. This is a must-try in Hue!

title: To discover absolutely
review: Very friendly Welcoming. Everything is homemade, it's excellent. Favour a table on the 1st floor on the terrace. The value for money is exceptional.

title: Beautiful discovery
review: Very nice discovery in a family setting and full of good humor. I recommend the family pack with 4 that will make you discover typical and delicious dishes

title: Small place with huge flavors
review: This restaurant is located in an alleyway. There are tables on the ground and upper floors. It's a small restaurant. However, they make up for the small size with huge flavors. Very quick and friendly service. Budget friendly too.

title: Definitely the place to go!
review: Beautiful family with amazing quality food. Found it via googling best restaurants in Hue and it did not disappoint. Highly recommend the Bun Bo Hue and the Morning Glory with garlic. Kids well looked after with amazing crepes. The lemon juice was also delicious. The pricing was exceptional. I’d go back in a heartbeat.

title: Sorprendente
review:
It was a great surprise, the food is a delight with very affordable prices.
We have toured all kinds of restaurants in Vietnam and this, simple and no-frills, is the one that surprised us with every dish.
Friendliness and attention are 10.
We ate so well that we have repeated even if the offer in Hue is huge.

title: Wonderful evening, delicious cuisine and warm welcome
review: We spent a wonderful evening at the Family home restaurant. A little surprised initially by the place (a little passage between two buildings, we struggled a little without internet, then we cross the family living room to reach the restaurant on the terrace) we arrive in a little corner of paradise, a very nice quiet terrace, well ventilated, a very warm welcome, and delicious cuisine, very fine. Everything is actually happening with the family, the boss serving, her mom in the kitchen. Menus for 2 or 4 allow neophytes like us to taste local specialties, delicious , but of course you can choose à la carte (menu with photos). A big thank you to the whole team!!!

title: Cozy place with diverse and good food
review: It is a very cozy and nice place to sit. The food is delicious and the menu is very diverse. The owner is friendly. Definitely worth eating here.

At the restaurant, Ms. Phuong was also wonderful: polite, attentive, and warm throughout our meals. Her service added a really nice touch to our stay.

Overall, a lovely resort with great hospitality. We truly appreciated the team’s effort in making our trip enjoyable. Highly recommended!

The prices were quite reasonable and were tremendous values compared to the US. The portions were very generous as we barely finished our meals. For me, two rather than three skewers would have been enough. Our server was Ms. Phuong and I must say she was very attentive, friendly, and pleasant. We thank her for giving us a very wonderful experience for dinner. I highly recommend this restaurant for dinner.

title: Amazing food with great care and service
review:
Pilgrimage Village is already an amazing experience, then restaurant itself is very amazing and serves delicious food with outstanding service.
Our server Phuong catered to all our needs and was very attentive to our sepcial needs which was no nuts in food because of my wifes allergies. All in all food service is great. And resort it self.

title: Great place

The food was fresh and beautifully presented, and my kids couldn’t get enough of the fruit platter — it quickly became their favorite.
The dining room itself is beautiful, with a warm and welcoming atmosphere that makes the experience feel special. What really stood out, though, was the service. Lien and Suong took such great care of us during both visits — they were friendly, attentive, and made us feel right at home. Their thoughtful recommendations and genuine hospitality really added to the experience.
We’ll definitely remember this restaurant as a highlight of our trip and would highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

title: Delicious Dinner!
review:
We enjoyed a lovely evening in the Pilgrimage Village restaurant when visiting Hue.

The Jumrei restaurant offered an extensive selection of options from which to choose from. It was not easy! We opted for a meal each from the vegetarian section and weren't disappointed. The stir fried vegetable noodles dish was packed with flavour, colour and taste. The vegetarian pancake dish was delicious and was beautifully presented on a small tray. The dessert menu was very tempting and had a wide range of options. We couldn't resist! The passion fruit mousse was to die for and the banana pancakes were delicious too!

The service was outstanding. We were looked after by the lovely Lien who looked after our every need. She was friendly and helpful. Food and drink were served promptly and with a lovely smile too!

Thank you for a lovely evening!

title: Great food, serene service
review:
Disclaimer: the restaurant offers a 10% discount if you share your experience on social media. However, this hasn’t influenced the content of this review. Dinner was exceptional. I just never review things normally!

We are a family of 4 (2 adults, 2 tweens) staying at the Pilgrimage Village during our 2-week Vietnam adventure. It’s wonderful here, an oasis that smells of lemongrass and calm, where the staff are kind and welcoming. We’ve come from the hustle and bustle of Hanoi and it’s a real tonic for the soul.

Our dinner at the Junrei Restaurant fit in with the general theme of the place. Delicious food served with good grace and good humour. Highly recommended.

title: A Culinary Gem in Hue – Unforgettable Experience at Junrei
review:
During our week-long stay in Hue, Junrei became our go-to restaurant — and for good reason. The food was consistently outstanding: fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The menu offers a nice balance between traditional Vietnamese dishes and international Cousine, so we always had a nice choice to chose from.

What truly made Junrei unforgettable to us, was the exceptional service.
We would like to highlight Lien, who looked after us with such warmth and care.
Her heartwarming smile, kind presence, and attention to detail made us feel welcome and genuinely cared for every single time. As a family, we felt not only well served but also truly embraced.

Junrei is more than just a place to eat — it’s a place to feel at home. We can’t recommend it highly enough.

title: A lovely dining experience
review: Our first night/dinner at The Pilgrimage Village and we’re off to a great start…. the Passionfruit Juice was punchy & the local beer was a winner (& nicely chilled as it should be!). We opted for the A La Carte (there is a half buffet option with an A La Carte for those with huge appetites) and we shared a starter of minced pork skewers which you wrap in rice paper with salad & peanut sauce - delicious if not a bit messy (though a cold towel is on hand). Then for mains we had the deep fried Red Snapper which you similarly prepare and eat in rice paper, though this time with salad & fresh mango slices, then dip in a chilli sauce and also the Beef Curry which was a stand out winner - mild not spicy and the beef was so tender with not an ounce of fat to be seen! All the waiting staff were super friendly, especially Lien who was so polite & sweet. We were going to eat out in town tomorrow evening but I very much suspect we’ll be back in The Junrei to sample more amazing flavours 😋
