Very nicely decorated.

title: Lovely Meal in Great surroundings
review: A fantastic meal, food excellent, fresh and very tasty. Great experience from start to finish. Great atmosphere, relaxed and friendly, Ms Phuong, who served us, was very friendly and very professional. We would definitely recommend having a meal here.

title: Great food and lovey surroundings
review: Excellent food, beautiful setting and attentive service. Especially from Ms Phuong. Would highly recommend the restaurant and The Pilgrimage Hotel in Hue, Vietnam.

title: Wonderful evening
review:
Great service.

Lovely location and the food choices were varied.

Food was well presented and tasty.

Lien and suong were very attentive serving staff catering for our needs.

We had a lovely evening.

title: Good experience!
review:
Very beautiful and elegant.
The attendees are very cordial.
Excellent food.
And whoever attended us was exceptional, Ms. Phbbng.

title: The staff made our evening and the food was an added bonus!
review: Great service by Lien and Suong we had a lovely anniversary meal with new friends and the setting was just perfect! We would highly recommend.

title: Delicious dining in Hue
review: We have dined twice so far at Junrei restaurant in Pilgrimage Village resort. The food is delicious and the atmosphere welcoming. Best of all is the fantastic service from the staff, especially Ms Lien

title: Very good dinner
review:
We had dinner here very well and were very friendly and courteous served by Lien.
The choice of food was very good, as was the description on the menu. Everything was freshly prepared.
We are very happy to recommend! Bernd and Heidi from Germany.

title: Lovely restaurant, with a great vegetarian offering.
review: Lovely restaurant and excellent staff, the vegetarian menu was fab. A beautiful building set in the gorgeous Pilgrimage Village hotel. Thank you Lien for looking after us!

title: Lovely dining room
review: The dinning room is lovely with soft lighting and distinctive architecture. The staff is personable and efficient. I loved my passion fruit mousse.

title: Excellent visit
review: Beautiful resort and breakfast was amazing. Lien was a super server in the Restaurant. Reception staff were ever so helpful and welcoming

title: Fantastic
review: Excellent restaurant in a beautiful setting. The food is delicious and refined and the service is of high quality. Thanks to Lièn for his kindness, efficiency and smile. We will be happy to come back!

title: Good food in a nice ambience.
review: Very good food and excellent service. Diverse food choices with attentive staff. Many thanks to the team around Lien Nhat.

title: Service and food excellent
review:
Chose the restaurant as we were staying at the hotel and they have an excellent range of food on their menu.
Service was polite and efficient.
Food lived up to high expectation one gets from reading TripAdvisor reviews although that judgement is based on choosing from the a la carte menu. We rejected the buffet as the vegetarian choice did not make it value for money - plenty of vegetarian choice on the a la carte.
Portions were a good size and the food and flavours excellent.
Most important question as always - is would we eat there again and tge answer is an unqualified yes.

title: Wonderful stay at the Pilgrimage
review: We stayed at this wonderful hotel and ate at their restaurant each evening as the food was so good! Highly recommend for attentive staff and relaxing atmosphere. Particular thanks to Claudia, Cristy, Lien, Nhat, the spa therapists and all the team.

title: A special retreat
review: A real oasis! … great atmosphere and excellent food. The service is very good/ polite & the menu extensive - very easy to choose too much though, so didn’t have room for dessert!

title: Excellent dinner
review: A great and good value buffet of local dishes, all of which we enjoyed. Nice dining room and very convenient for those staying at the Pilgrimage Village.

title: Hue evening
review: Lovely food. Beautiful setting and great service from Lien who supported me as a coeliac. My main of the chicken skewers with asparagus spears was very tasty

title: Very good food and very welcome
review: Link is charming and good advice for the choice of dishes. A beautiful taste experience with excellent Vietnamese dishes and an equally excellent welcome.

title: A delicious meal.
review: A very good meal in a pleasant and sophisticated setting. Good Vietnamese cuisine. The staff was friendly and efficient. We will be back with pleasure (and thanks again to Cristy!).

title: Be sure to eat here
review: Very nice ambience, delicious food and a great service from LIEN. Thank you very much. It was a nice evening. Highly recommended.

title: A great choice
review: A lovely calm restaurant for dinner. A great choice for a sophisticated dinner at a reasonable price. Lien was so helpful and sweet. Food was excellent.

title: Fantastic
review: Food was beautiful and the service was fantastic. The clay pot caramelised chicken was excellent. Would definitely come back again.

title: Nice hotel and location!
review: Breakfast at the hotel was very nice with a huge selection of traditional Vietnamese, international options, and delicious fresh fruit! We also ate at the restaurant for dinner. We enjoyed the convenience of the location at the hotel. The facilities at the property are very nice! The staff at the hotel and restaurant are very friendly and attentive.

title: Amazing experience!
review: We visited this restaurant while we were guests in the Pilgrimage Village resort. The food is delicious and fresh. Our waitress Lien super helpful just like the other staff. We definitely recommend coming here for either lunch or dinner. We will be back!

title: Great - anytime again
review: We had such a nice Dinner with amazing food. The Service made this evening Even more Special, esspecially with Lien. She was so Kind and caring.

title: Great food in Hue
review: We ate here twice and each time was stunning. Staff were super attentive. The menu has lots of great Vietnamese options. We love the tiger prawns and the mackerel. Fantastic atmosphere. Excellent and sensibly priced wine list - try the Chilean Chardonnay.

title: Valentinesdinner
review: Great Location for a nice dinner for a special occasion. Especially Lien was very attentive. We can definitely recommend it.

title: Delightful Meal in a delightful restaurant
review: A delightful restaurant with very lovely staff! The meal was delicious. Beef Curry for my husband & Chicken Skewers with asparagus for me. Followed by the biggest ice cream with fresh mango & coconut shavings for pud. Big enough for two!!

title: Excellent
review:
A great welcome
A wide choice of dishes
A very nice quality of cooking
Very attentive and professional staff

title: Pilgrimage Village
review: Junrei restaurant is a beautiful eating place in Hue in central Vietnam. The staff service is of a very high standard and the food is the same. Highly recommended

title: Most beautiful setting and great food
review: Super friendly staff, great food and drink selection. Very beautiful setting. A 5 star experience where you can choose from a la carte or buffet. Buffett had great selection and tasty amazing

title: A very nice evening
review:
The food was excellent and the staff extremely friendly and helpful.
We felt very comfortable and will come back!

title: Delicious dinner with very attentive and nice service from Lien!
review:
The service was very friendly, accommodating and attentive. Special requests were also taken into account and implemented uncomplicatedly. The food was delicious and beautifully decorated.
Our service lady LIEN takes care of us very competent and very friendly! We really enjoyed our visit!

title: Fabulous hotel
review: Excellent hotel, fantastic service and all the food we had was amazing. The yoga class was wonderful and we also enjoyed using the pool.

title: Good location with friendly stuff
review: Everything very good. Stuff offered an excellent service. The pizza could be a little bit more crispy but still ok. Can recommend this place

title: Good quality local dishes in resort style dining.
review: Great spot after a long day, but it does feel like a large resort restaurant (rather than the intimate vibe of the restaurants across the road). The food was good though, and service excellent.

title: Exclusive 5 star service
review: I came to the restaurant for a late lunch after 3 hours of cycling. Thanh Thao attended to me with great kindness and professionalism.

title: Exclusive 5 star service
review: I went to the restaurant for a late lunch after 3 hours cycling. Thanh Thao attended to me in a very kind, attentive and professional way.

title: Great!
review: Great restaurant and amazing service! Lien was so kind to us and we had a very nice evening. We had two Pho‘s and a mango dessert.

title: Good place to stay and relax
review: Beautiful restaurant. Good place to stay and relax. Food is well prepared and employees are attentive. Good menu diversity

title: Delicious food in a delightful atmosphere
review:
We recently visited Junrei Restaurant with our family for some snacks and drinks. The atmosphere was delightful, with a stylish and tastefully decorated interior that made us feel right at home. The staff were exceptionally friendly and attentive, ensuring we had a pleasant experience.

Junrei Restaurant is a fantastic spot for a family outing, offering a great selection of snacks and drinks in a welcoming environment. We highly recommend it!

title: Fantastic dinner!
review: we love the restaurant. the atmosphere is cosy and the food delicious, we chose the shrimp with honey and garlic, fantastic! It is well served and price similar to the restaurants in the city.

title: Everting excellent!!!
review:
A wonderful restaurant, delicious food, excellent presentation.
Our waitress Lien was extremely nice, charming and very professional.
A place we can warmly recommend and may be we come again someday.

title: A very good dining experience. Don't hesitate.
review:
A truly exceptional cuisine with a real sense of customer service. Thank you very much for Lien 🙂.
A wide choice of dishes and everything is very good.

title: Endroit merveilleux
review: Perfect we really enjoy the food and service was perfect we come back ‘ the pancake pandan leaves is amazing and the spécialités from Hue … also

title: Dinner at the Junrei.
review: First night in Hui. Received fantastic service from Lien. Super tasty localfood! We’ll be back in this charming restaurant!

title: Dinner
review:
Stunning decor and ambience. Great food. All the staff were lovely. Lien was delightful. Definitely recommend.

Apparently I need to add more to this review so hoping this brings us to 100 characters

title: Excellent meal
review: What a fab restaurant! One of the best meals we've had in Vietnam. Lien provided great service to our table. Definitely come back!

title: Good service and delicious food
review: Really delicious food in a nice and quiet environment. We have got different things from the menu, and everything has been super delicious and beautifully presented. Here's something for both taste loaves and eyes. In addition, there is really good and attentive service, who do everything they can for a good experience. We were lucky to be served by Ly and Lién, who were both incredibly cute and skilled.

title: Great food in a relaxed setting
review: Great food in a lovely setting. Big portions of traditional Vietnamese food, cooked really well. The setting is tranquil - a great place to relax after a day exploring the hustle and bustle of Hue. The staff are brilliant - very attentive and polite. Would recommend!

title: Junrei Hué
review: Very welcome and very good cuisine all in a pleasant setting highly recommended. We will be back with pleasure!

title: Magnificent!
review:
What a wonderfull place, such great ambience and the high ceiling 🤩
Everything screams quality!
The food i have was delicious and the staff so friendly. If your looking for a place to fall in love with then you have come to the right place 👌👌❤️

title: Enjoying Pilgrimage Village
review: Be sure to ask for Thao, she will give service with a smile and offer advice on the best dishes and the freshest food for dinner.

title: Superb dinner
review:
We ate here on arrival late evening at the resort.
It was excellent. The food and the service were superb.
We would recommend coming here , even if you’re not staying at the hotel.

title: Food so tasty
review:
During our route through Vietnam, when we arrived in Hue, we stayed at the Pilgrimage Village and dined a couple of nights at their restaurant Junrei. The experience was incredible, elaborate and very well presented food. Lots of variety on the menu, including Vietnamese dishes and international cuisine.

We chose several Vietnamese dishes and they were exquisite.

Highly recommended without a doubt.

title: Good food
review: Very good dishes. The dishes had a great taste and were served as they seem to be on the pictures! The service was perfect!

title: Fantastic.
review:
Super good experience. Staff were friendly and good at taking English. The food was absolutely fantastic and the surroundings cozy and nice.
It can be highly recommended - also their European food.

title: A relaxed restaurant with tasty food
review: Very relaxed meal in lovely building, the food was very nice, and they had great service. Would definitely eat here again.

title: Great food, beautiful place and fab service
review: Lovely restaurant with very friendly staff. Super papaya salad and wonderful basket of mixed appetisers. Big shout out to Lien and Nhst for great service and local knowledge. Over and above good service!

title: Discoveries of the dishes of the cuisine of Hue
review:
Superb setting, warm atmosphere, the menu allows you to discover the cuisine of Hue as well as Vietnamese cuisine.
A successful and delicious dinner

title: Friendly and delicious
review: Very friendly service and the food was excellent. The deep fried snapper especially was amazing. Would gladly come back.

title: Good!
review: Our four year old loved the skewers with asparagus, and we loved the mango beef salad! Very good shakes as well :) and sweet staff!

title: A must in Hué
review:
Very sincerely, gorgeous good in a wonderful area with so nice staff members…
Really a must in Hué at reasonnable price.
Please try it and you will be delighted.
We will definitely visit you again !

title: Authentic taste
review: We stayed at Pilgrimage and the hotel is amazing. For my son, I ordered a well served and very delicious Bolognese spaghetti. Already my husband and I ordered spring roll * better than I have eaten so far. Then I ordered a shrimp with a sweet sauce, balance of taste. And my husband ordered a noodle in the well served and tasty Vietnamese style.

title: Great dinner!
review: Great restaurant! Amazing service and an excellent meal 👌! Everything was perfect 👍! Thank you for this very pleasant time!

title: Great food and service
review: Fab food and atmosphere, friendly and prompt service! Our second meal here and cannot fault it. Reasonable prices for the quality recieved!

title: Dinner at Pilgram Village
review: Great selections of foods, friendly staff and a calm and professional atmosphere. Food was presented well and came quite quickly. Definitely recommend if you are in the area

title: 10/10 service and food
review: The food is out of this world, with a wonderful atmosphere created by the friendly staff, great lighting and fab music. Our server Lien was so welcoming and helpful, and was the epitome of service with a smile! 10/10 would recommend 🙂 number one recommendation would be the tiger prawns with honey sauce, they were fantastic

title: Good experience.
review: Really good meal, accommodating to our needs. Good portion size and overall pleasant experience. Defiantly fair value.

title: Recommend!!
review: We highly recommend this restaurant. Staff are attentive and polite. Food was delicious! Wish we were staying longer!

title: A hidden gem, a must stay
review:
Amazing experience at this hotel and restaurant. Food and service of all staff was attentive, professional and very friendly. Top quality products in the restaurant that taste fantastic. The massage therapists are brilliant
Complementary bus in and out of town was an added bonus. Heated pool was so nice in January. we both really enjoyed our stay and will definitely be back again. From Ireland

title: Lunch
review:
Great food, fantastic service.
Best I've had in Vietnam so far.
Fresh ingredients cooked to perfection. Beautiful decor restaurant

title: Great
review:
Good experience, food was good and the service great as well.

Recommend the restautant if your e on the hotel or even if you passing by.

title: Delicious meals at the adorable Pilgrimage resort
review: Excellent local food options, a wonderful selection and great portion sizes. The lotus seed soup dessert was particularly great!

title: A great dinner at Junrei
review:
Guests of Pilgrimage Resort, we opted for the in-house restaurant Junrei which offers an extensive menu, ranging from typical Vietnamese to international cuisine.
To interrupt the routine of Vietnamese food (although present on the menu with many interesting dishes), we chose an Australian beef fillet (perfect cooking and perfectly balanced accompanying sauce) and a salmon fillet with a side of vegetables. The dishes were to our liking and brought us back for an evening to the flavors of home.
To finish a dish with a generous portion of mixed fruit, really sweet.
Among the restaurants in Huè, definitely the first choice to go for sure!

title: Very nice start of our trip in Hue!
review: Very good food in nice ambience and friendly staff! The menu selection is very rich and the quality very fresh.

title: Great experience
review:
Lovely dinner - ordered from the Vietnamese menu and everything was delicious and fresh.

Staff very pleasant and attentive

title: Great place in Hue to experience the local foods
review: The foods were super tasty especially the local signatures. The staffs were very friendly and professional at the services. Highly recommended.

title: Simply perfect and without defects
review: Very nice atmosphere with excellent service and very good quality food. A place to be in Hue. Highly recommended.

title: Experience in Hué
review: A place where you can relax and have tasteful food. The quality was really excellent. Waiters very professional and kind. The best in Hué

title: Perfect stay at Pilgrimage Village
review: What an amazing hotel - super staff, fabulous food and a haven of tranquility. We spent three days here and thoroughly enjoyed it. The biggest bathroom we have ever seen!

title: Disappointed and not satisfied
review: The food was okay, but so far I've eaten better in Vietnam. The service was blind: Not properly exposed, holes in the tablecloth.... And the ambience was not there due to the inappropriate table arrangement

title: Beautiful tranquil restaurant with excellent food.
review:
Excellent meal can cater for gluten free.

Beautiful setting for an evening meal.

Reasonable pricing and lovely staff, well worth a visit. Highly recommend.

title: Food
review: The food was great. We really enjoyed the hot pod

title: Great vegetarian restaurant with exceptional service
review: We were looking for a vegetarian restaurant to eat at and I found Thong Dong via Google Maps. The reviews were accurate, the food is very fresh and amazing tastes. Our waitress Nhi was exceptional and very attentive. Overall a 5 * dinner.

title: Excellent food and better prices
review: It’s cheap and super luxurious it does not seem like it would be this cheap and food is great

title: Fantastic vegetarian food. Lovely atmosphere.
review: What an amazing find. Lovely staff, atmosphere and fantastic food. Had the braised tofu and mushrooms with lemongrass and brown rice. Partner had fig salad and sweet potato fries. For dessert Almond Panna cotta lychee. Delicious. If you are in Hue go!

title: Delicious vegetarian food
review: Lovely staff and amazing food! Very relaxing atmosphere. They have a huge choice of different vegan / vegetarian dishes and very reasonably priced

title: One of the Best Vegetarian Experiences I’ve Had
review: I had a really great experience here. The vegetarian dishes were incredibly flavorful and satisfying. Everything tasted fresh and thoughtfully prepared. The atmosphere was calm and welcoming, making it a perfect place to relax and enjoy your meal. The service was also very good. I would definitely come back and highly recommend it.

title: nice atmosphere and delicious vegan food
review: Everyone was so friendly and helpful. The food was amazing. One of the best vegan dishes we have ever eaten. Nice calming music was very nice. Restaurant was easy to find, location is perfect. And the service was super fast

title: Excellent food, beautifully served and presented.
review: Highly recommended. We were a party of four - 2 veggies and two who like both meat/fish and veggie. We each had a version of the veggie hotpot which was lovely.

title: Delicious, beautiful and varied
review: Vegetarian restaurant with delicious, elaborate and aesthetic cuisine. The welcome is warm. The restaurant is in a street perpendicular to the main street. This makes it a quieter place. I loved my meal. Thank you 🙏🏽

title: Nice food
review: Very nice food, good price with lots of options and our waiter Tung was very fast and friendly!

title: Great place in Hue
review:
Great food, lovely staff.
Fab options for my vegan parents and good enough to satisfy us too

title: Delicious foods, hot.
review: Good food, quiet space in the middle of the western street. The food is high quality, clean, luxurious space is suitable for the reception of guests, teachers, gentlemen.

title: The forest in the street.
review: At thong dong delicious food, beautiful landscape as a forest space in the street, the style serves careful devotions, enjoys river walks and western walks....

title: A sublime setting and a succulent dinner at a just unceasing price for such a service!
review:
Just delicious!!! Home...setting...service and excellent meal!!!
A real reference to remember and not to be missed
Congratulations to this team and the cooks!

title: Delicious food
review: Really delicious vegan and vegetarian food :) service is very friendly!

title: Fresh & Flavorful!
review: Just had the most delicious veggie meal! Super fresh, full of flavor, and the vibe was chill. Staff were awesome too, definitely coming back!

title: Lovely veggie restaurant
review: What a lovely spot for vegetarian food in Hue. Lovely veggie pad Thai, fast service and very clean loos.

title: Delicious!
review: We are not vegetarian, yet we have been to this restaurant three times which is incredibly good! Everything is fresh, well cooked, full of flavors, they adapt all the specialties in veggie version with tofu and mushrooms. The seasonings are delicious. The juices and coffee are also very good. For a reasonable price. The staff is very professional and welcoming, I recommend this restaurant with my eyes closed!

title: wonderful
review: the food was delicious. we really recommend the tofu in lemongrass and chilli. they were so accommodating and kind and we had a wonderful time. we came back 5 times!

title: A Zen spot in the city centre
review: A quiet zone in the city center, serving great vegan brunch, lunch and dinner with the taste of local cuisine. They also have great coffee from local beans.

title: Nice restaurant with good service
review: The restaurant is very centrally located and convinces with a nice, cozy ambience. Particularly noteworthy is the wide selection of vegetarian dishes. The service is extremely friendly and accommodating and assists in the selection of food. The price of the restaurant is slightly higher, but the good service and quality of the food justify the price. It is ideal for a relaxing evening alone or with friends and is also a very good choice for a date.

title: Best vegetarian food
review: I was pleasantly surprised how much flavour was in the dishes I had. There was plenty and I would recommend this restaurant in Hue

title: Excellent restaurant, vegetarian to test, absolutely, even if you are not!
review: Excellent restaurant, vegetarian, offering a wide selection of typical dishes. The dishes are very fine and very welcome. I highly recommend even if we are not vegetarian, we loved all the dishes we took.

title: Awesome foods!
review: Very nice vegetarian dishes in Hue. Unique dishes and good taste. A must try place when you visit Hue.

title: Good local vegetarian dishes
review: Love the foods here so much. I got to try some special local vegetarian dishes in Hue. Totally recommend to try. Price is very reasonable. Will be back.

title: Great eats
review: Very surprised with the food. Vegan yet delicious and full. The decor is simple yet beautiful, luxurious. I'll come back if I get a chance.

title: Very good
review: love the vegetarian food here. Taste is comfy, quality. Comfortable, airy spaces. Just downtown.

title: Essential Cuisine
review: Delicious, hearty food, luxurious, airy ambiance.

title: Highly recommended!
review: Best food I had in Hue. Went there twice, wish I had gone every night. Simple dishes with complex flavours. Loved it. Highly recommended!

title: Relaxation lunch
review:
Very good food both vegetables as the pad thay, great service and very elegant and quiet environment!
We will definitely return

title: Vegetarian Food Hue
review: The food was delicious and very good for people who are vegetarian, the service is great would recommend. Best food I’ve tried since being in Vietnam.

title: Best vegeterian food
review: I visited this vegeterian restaurant a couple times and I really love it. The food taste really good with a fresh ingredients. The staff really friendly and helpful.

title: Great Vegetarian Food and Friendly Staff
review: A lovely vegetarian restaurant with delicious food and a peaceful atmosphere. The dishes are fresh, well-seasoned, and beautifully presented. The staff are friendly and attentive. Highly recommended for anyone looking for healthy and tasty vegetarian food.

title: You will be surprised!
review: Good vegetarian dishes in Night Walking Street! Very good vibes and great services. I love their fruit salads and spaghetti here. Will be back for sure!

title: happy
review: friendly and have many local foods

title: You've got to go while you're in Hue, especially after doing a DMZ tour
review:
Great atmosphere, the staff really look after you and just a really nice place to drink.

The food is good as well, also a good selection of both Vietnamese and Western food.

Love the place, I certainly won't forget it !

title: Decent Bar Food
review: I was on a quick day trip to Hue to see the Forbidden City, Imperial Grounds, Citadel, etc. which has no food available. A friend had told me to give this bar/restaurant so I gave it a try. I was starving and had to find food. DMZ was typical bar food which I seldom use. I had a chicken club sandwich with fries and it was decent. I would not recommend as fine dining but more a place for filling a food void. It was clean and overall fine.

title: Must-visit bar and restaurant in hue
review: Good food, helpful staff (shout-out to van khanh), and epic beverages. I recommend the flaming B52.

title: Great bar
review:
The service was very nice and the food also very good.
A very pleasant and cozy place.

title: Half cold food with 15 minute intervals
review: The food was okay maybe 3 star but little, little taste compared to it is the most expensive place we have eaten in the last 10 days, they also came out with my girlfriend's pasta at least 15 minutes before my pizza, she waited 5-10 minutes until I said it was ok she ate, the pasta was half cold when she ended up eating and she was done when I got my pizza.

title: I recommend.
review: Super nice, nice service.

title: great pub
review: excellent wee place staff are wonderful esp Van who assisted me as I'm disabled would thoroughly recommend food was beautiful 😍

title: Poor food
review:
Beer drinks and starters good main food RUBBISH !

Liked the vibe but eat elsewhere .. maybe we chose badly of the specials menu

title: Excellent service
review: Our waitress was such a star! Such attentive service and she even helped us get a cab back to our hotel. Great fun bar and good food too.

title: GREAT SERVICE BY SERVE TIN
review: First night in Hue and decided to check out DMZ bar. Our serve, Tin, gave great service and was a pleasure. We hope to come back some day!

title: Recommend!!!
review: Great ambience! Thank you to Van Khanh that is such a lovely girl and made our experience extra nice! Good for drinks and some bites!

title: Half a car you must have been in!!
review: Mega enjoyed the cuba Libre and the fine service. We were in half the car and sat here all night. Fantastic!!

title: Great bar
review:
We had a few cocktails and Huda beers after a full day sightseeing
We chatted to the absolutely lovely, friendly, My, Her English was fantastic our Vietnamese is very limited!!

title: Highly recommended
review: Very good food, good atmosphere and very good service. The waitress was very attentive to us. Very nice. Van Khanh is the name. Very friendly

title: Loose and funny
review:
Khanh is friendly and fun staff.
Ok the staff is generally good and helpful.
The food is excellent and the beer anyway

title: Home away from home
review: We had a good dinner. We had a diversion from usual Vietnamese food and it was very good. Tin was prompt and friendly. Helped with dietary requirements, gluten free. Good prices. Excellent fresh produce.

title: Superb experience
review:
My is a very nice person, always smiling and helpful looking forward to coming back with my friends for dinner.
I highly recommend

title: Friendly welcome
review: Friendly welcome. Several bartenders are there to welcome you with a smile and kindness. The place is ideally located

title: Best oysters in town
review: A great place for chill drinks in the afternoon. Meals were great with something for everyone. The evening entertainment was acoustic with a great vibe suitable for all.

title: A drink and a history lesson
review:
Easy to find as it's right on the corner of the main street - you'll see the lights / hear the noise no doubt. That also means it's not the cheapest place to eat or drink, but it's worth a visit. It is a big gimmicky, but the ceiling laying out the DMZ on the roof is quite interesting to see, to understand the geography of it all.

We only had a round of drinks here, but it was easy to order and pay. The staff were all friendly and spoke good English. Worth a visit.

title: Amazing
review: This is my first time coming to this restaurant, but everything here is great, beer is delicious, and the staff are very friendly, especially Kim.

title: Awesome atmosphere!!
review: Great service with very happy staff & the menu has a lot to choose from. Great atmosphere & free pool is definitely a bonus.

title: Great location, great draft beers
review: Great location, and the service out weighs the street noice, as it’s on the main drag and that’s to be expected, but the beer (draft) and service was great, and can’t fault the staff especially Minh, whom ensured that me and the other customers were well catered for, deffo will pop in tomorrow for a beer or two 👍🏾👍🏾

title: Night in Hue city
review: Excellent evening, great service by Kahn , ensuring we were well looked after. Great food and beers went down well while watching the All Blacks beat the Wallabies

title: Top tent with friendly service
review:
Friendly service, speak good English. Menu with lots of choice and controls gives good explanations about the menus. Good food and drinks know for an affordable price.
Definitely recommended

title: DMZ drinks
review:
Great service and friendly people . Great place to sit and have a beer a watch the world go by .
Hoai My is very friendly . Good English speaking and good service

title: Artifacts and interesting drinks
review: Tasty and new types of drinks, albeit on the more expensive side. Nice to have a free pool that worked well and some memorabilia about the war that is interesting to have a look at. Lots of tourists there if that is what you are looking for. They ran out of different types of alcohol which was a bit odd, so we left.

title: Decent but cocktails offer poor
review: Good food & drink but quite expensive for Vietnam. The cocktail offer buy two get 3rd free is pretty rubbish as cocktails on this list are very expensive for Vietnam. Good night out but had better in Vietnam for far less.

title: No, this is not recommended!!
review:
Is very central and looks nice!
Food was not special. I had a steak, and it was really fat.
Cocktails with more syrup than alcohol.
No, you have very nice restaurants. I would skip this one!!
You also pay 8% of the entire bill here

title: Great stop for a meal
review: Good food, welcoming staff, fun atmosphere in a central location. We ate here twice during a recent stay. Very popular with locals and tourists alike.

title: Terrific Experience - Friendly and Courteous Staff
review:
DMZ Bar is a great meeting place.
Food ✅
Service ✅
Sports on TV✅
The DMZ team were fantastic - although they have limited sports they can put on TVs
We asked to see the F1 and they arranged for the IT person to come and arrange as the staff could not set it up
The menu is comprehensive and has lots to choose from
The beer is cold
Pool table is in good condition
These is plenty of war memorabilia to look at and enjoy
Dave - Australia

title: Lovely place
review: Kim was very good, it was the best bar in hue I have been to with very good music and the food was also very good I will be coming back

title: Mrs my is the best
review:
We have been to DMZ several times over the years. We always look forward to being in this special place and we consider some of the long term staff to be friends as well.
We love DMZ. Something for everyone.😀

title: 훌륭한 바 적당한 가격 친절한 직원들.
review:
여기에 2번 방문했습니다. 매우 훌륭한 장소이고 Ms. 미 씨는 아주 작지만 매력적인 여성입니다. 단 3명의 자녀를 가진 엄마입니다.
이 바에서 매우 좋은 시간을 보냈습니다. 맥주 가격도 훌륭합니다.
Fuda 후에 지역맥주 또는 Fuda gold를 추천합니다.

I have been this bar. So good place and Ms. MI is so small and kind. So funny woman.
Nice experience in this bar. And beer’s price is good.
Excellent.
Fuda or Fuda gold is my recommendation.

title: Outstanding
review: Fantastic. Food, drinks, service, football, Formula One, tape, all wonderful. No need to complain, it's worth the hype

title: A good evening at the DMZ table
review: The place is very nice and the staff very welcoming and caring, thanks to Khanh Shaw for her recommendations in choosing the menu and her good mood

title: Very nice bar. Food was also good.
review: Our server was Kim Phuong, and she was very helpful in guiding us through the large selection of food from pasta to Vietnamese. The ambiance is great. Pizza and past were good but I can’t rate the food at 5.

title: Duc
review: Met a great guy called duc and he was amazing set us up with a one championship for us he’s sound as a mf great guy whenever you get the chance to chat to him talk to him he’s lovely and will set us every sporting event you want

title: Beautiful Saturday Night in the middle of Hué
review: Very nice offer, you can order both Vietnamese, food and Western food. The restaurant convinces with very friendly staff, as well as live music

title: Beautiful place
review: Fantastic bar/ restaurant, the food is brilliant and the beer is very cheap what more can you ask for! Hoai MY will sort you out with the best cocktails and Duc knows the best beer, couldn’t recommend more. Duc makes the whole place run, couldn’t recommend it more!

title: 5 star experience
review: Great service, very well designed establishment, enjoyed myself thoroughly. Really liked the theme, epically the map on the ceiling.

title: First time in Hue
review: Very good service, nice staff and good food. Love the service from My- she has super energy! Really enjoy the atmosphere in this place!

title: Good drinks but would not return
review: DMZ has a great range of drinks for all occasions. However I wouldn’t return on the basis that we were lured into the bar with promises of free drinks/2 for 1 deals and then being charged for these at the end and no movement on working it out etc. ended up paying a lot more than what we received

title: Nice Lunch, good food and service.
review: Food was excellent and service by Anh and Quang was great. We can recommend the clam soup and pizza, these were nice dishes.

title: Fun bar for white people
review: This place was really fun - good music. They really pulled us in with the early 2000s rock with Linkin Park, Smash Mouth, Rasmus (randomly). They played a variety of music (not vinahouse which I’m THANKFUL FOR) and also some random YouTube compilation video of people stacking it which I loved. I got the watermelon mojito - if anyone’s ever had a cocktail in this country and immediately winced because the alcohol to other liquids ratio was horrendous, this one was really good. Went down a treat! Mai was a great waitress. Ciao

title: Good casual night out. Great cocktails.
review: Had a great night out with many laughs and lots of banter. Mai was fantastic and really brought the laughs and cocktail recommendations. Great night. Would recommend the upstairs!

title: Great Spot
review: This spot is great, and has a great view with cheap drinks. Multiple floors to the building which makes it that it had a lot of space

title: Great restaurant!
review: The service with Hà was amazing! The food delicious and plenty. Very affordable too. It is Vietnamese food also. We would come back if we were not leaving Hue.

title: Delicious pizza from the brick oven.
review:
Nice pizza and calzone eaten after two weeks of Vietnamese food.
Nice upstairs terrace and friendly service by Minh Ahn .He tried very hard to speak English👍

title: Nice break from local cuisine
review:
Nice, neat, clean. Great service, extensive menu. Hubby and I ordered the calzone and were not disappointed in any way.
I had wanted to get the banana split for dessert, but I ate too much.
If you want a break from “local” food Little Italy should hit the spot as they have steaks and burgers too. Of course you can get local fare also.

title: Good food in a quiet atmosphere
review: Very good food. Attentive and friendly staff; I was served by Hà. Calm atmosphere.

title: Give it a miss
review: Semi raw pizza. Uncooked dough

title: Delicious food Great service
review: Great food, excellent service from mrs. Ha our waitress, good atmosphere, definitely be back. Highly recommend

title: Great ambiance
review: Everyone was very helpful and friendly. The pizza was very good. Thuy Ha was our waitress and she was very nice, thank you

title: Wonderful dinner
review:
We had a wonderful dinner tonight. The service was great. Miss Tran was a wonderful waitress and her English was very good which made it easy to order. All of the food was fresh beautifully cooked and we enjoyed every bite. The Chilean Sauvignon Blanc was very nice also.
We sat upstairs on level three balcony and it was lovely to have the fresh air and ambience. Thank you for a great last night in Hue :)

title: Food.
review: Mr. Phuoc Very amiable, speaks good English and the food in the restaurant must be delicious too

title: Epic Italian restaurants in Hue
review: I’ve eaten here a few times, the quality of the food isn’t too Ace but it’s still good at the price level, the quality of the service is good, I’m not a person who likes cheese-rich dishes, but still loves the furnace and lagsane here most, the taste is delicious and delicious, it’s hard to find one in Hue that has these two dishes as good. During your dining times, you’re served a few times by friend Thúy Ha, and you’re quite enthusiastic, attentive, cute. Will be back again later. A place worth the trip

title: Good pizza in Vietnam
review:
Good pizza in Vietnam!
If like us as an Italian at some point you can not take more noodles and meat this is the restaurant you have to look for.

title: Wood fire pizza and great servicd
review: Just blocks from the river walk. The pizza was great, and the service was excellent. Special shout out to Mr Phuec. He cheerfully answered our many questions about the menu including checking with the kitchen about some dietary restrictions I have. Would go again!

title: Review
review: Very tasty and wonderful staff , Miss Thuy was very nice

title: A miniature Italy in the heart of the city.
review: From our hotel, we spotted an impressive Italian restaurant. Completely covered in bamboo, it featured an inviting pizza oven outside. We decided to have dinner there. Surprisingly, the menu was quite diverse, including pizza, pasta, and Vietnamese dishes. The food was served quickly and piping hot, which was truly impressive. The staff were particularly quick and enthusiastic. We were served by Thuy Ha, a friendly girl who always smiled when talking to us. Everything made our trip wonderful.

title: Good food , and incredibly helpful staff
review:
The restaurant had been recommended by our guide. We went in as one of us wanted to eat, the other didn’t !
We were given a piece of garlic bread and a small shot as a welcome.
One ordered a pizza ( which was lovely), and my partner ordered spring rolls…. U fortunately the rolls that came were the rice powered type, and cold. This was what had been asked for but not what my partner wanted. A member of staff asked what was wrong ( when the first spring roll looked like it had been deconstructed on the plate), and after explaining, the rolls were taken away and replaced by the fried spring rolls. The staff were great at sorting it out ( they could have said that we got what we ordered), and my partner was happy. The service all came with a smile and was great value.
I’d recommend it.

title: Holiday eating
review:
Beautiful food fabulous service.
Ms Thuy Ha was very nice to us and served us very well. Great restaurant in Hue for Italian food

title: Great, we'll be back!
review: The fantastic place, the delicious food we ate on the upper terrace and Viet our waiter attended us great, sure we repeated before continuing with our trip.

title: Visit to Little Italy by an Italian traveler
review: Unespected quality for Italian food in Hue given the variety of effering.. Also the Vietnamese food is of outstanding quality. Thanks to Ms Sang for the kind service and suggestions.

title: Very good food and excellent staff Ms Sang. Massimo
review:
Excellent food.
Ms Sang is very friendly and helpful and satisfy all you requests in a friendly way.
The food is always excellent and enjoyable.
Massimo

title: Amazing
review:
Very friendly
Service was amazing the food was delicious. My whole family had pizzas and it was just wow.
If you love pizzas and pastas please come visit here. The atmosphere is very calm.
The waiting time is not so long i think we waited 15mins for our food.

When had a waitress named Ha.
She is the friendliest person.

title: Excellent choice
review: Delicious food and wonderful service, highly recommended.you won’t be disappointed.great menu and very tasty food.

title: Incredible!
review: Had a lovely experience here, I received incredible and fast service from Sang! Not to mention that the food and atmosphere were so lovely! Would definitely recommend, in a lovely location 💖

title: Cute little restaurant, great service and delicious food
review:
Lovely little restaurant
Upon arrival you are warmly greeted and nice seat given a welcome drink, a vodka caramilk shot.
Then while selecting your menu you are given a piece of garlic bread, it was delicious.
We were after a Aussie type meal. I had the salmon with lemon butter, which was cooked perfectly and hubby had a beef burger again delicious and fresh.
Service was great and staff very accomodating,

title: Great food even better staff!
review: Had a lovely meal (free welcome drink and garlic bread) but the best part was the staff. Ha Xu (apologies if we got your name wrong!) saw us folding our napkins and decided to teach us new designs which made my night. Would definitely go back again!

title: Very good pizzas
review: Great experience! The pizzas were very good, thanks to Tian for his smile and welcome! I highly recommend!

title: Amazing
review: We had pepperoni and 4 cheese pizza and we loved it. They serve garlic bread as a treat. They also served caramelized vodka shot. Highly recommend.

title: Perfect.
review: Perfect the best place to eat in Vietnam. We would need more places like this and the waitress named ( has ) is just perfect and helped us in everything even for services outside the restaurant. If you find yourself ad hue is definitely the best place to go

title: Excellent service and delicious food. Great ambiance.
review:
Excellent service, food was delicious.
Hà , the waitress hostess was very friendly and attentive. Ready to help with whatever you need. If you are in Hue you must go to eat there. You will be cordially received.

title: I would definitely go yumi again
review: excellent service, I really liked it, the staff attentive and very cute by the way, the pizza crisp, hot and to its very tasty point

title: Great service and beautiful food.
review:
The food was lovely and our waitress was wonderful. Her name was Ha'. She was very accommodating. She even gave us separate bills for all of us, which made it very easy to pay. We also received complimentary garlic bread and a "shot' for each of us on arrival. I would highly recommend having dinner there. The waitress made it extra special and was very attentive.
Love the Brown's from Australia.

title: Fabulous
review: Sang was extremely friendly and helpful, beautiful food, third floor, nice breeze, lovely wine, good times. Food was authentic, pasta, pizza and wine was delicious

title: Fabulous food and outstanding service
review: Very good food, the bruschetta was delicious. We all had different main courses, my Fettuccine Con Pollo was very enjoyable. Our friends all enjoyed their meals. The wine was also well priced and delicious. Excellent service with a smile and a special gift for our wedding anniversary.

title: Travel to Vietnam
review: Excellent restaurant. We had lunch on indication of the agency and the lunch was wonderful, typical Vietnamese food. We came back the night to taste the pizza and we loved it! The waitress Ha attended us and exceeded our expectations for sympathy, cordiality and impeccable service. Super Indico

title: Great Meal
review: Lovely food. Great service from Viet. We visited two nights in a row. The pizza was great. Make sure you book It is very busy. Good value for money.

title: Worth a visit
review: Food was very good and our sever Hà was amazing! Would definitely come back again. Nice place for big groups. Next time we’re bringing friends

title: Great lunch restaurant
review: Delicious authentic Vietnamese lunch, great personal service from Ha. Highly recommended for your trip to Hue, Vietnam.

title: Recommended
review:
Delicious pizza from the brick oven, juicy lamb chops. And Viet's service was classy.
No regrets about this choice.
Recommended for Hué.

title: Little Italy, Hue
review:
Had amazing food at Little Italy, Hue. Miss. Sang is a lovely lady who served us and made our experience unforgettable. Her hospitality, along with the team, is really nice. We would love to visit again.

Love, India

title: Great food and atmosphere
review: We had an amazing meal. A nice culinary change from the past few weeks with Sang as our host. Traditional wood fired pizza and pasta was delicious. Great evening,

title: Must place to dine in Hue .
review:
Great place , friendly staff and good atmosphere. Name sounds Italian, but variety of options.
Lots of Vietnamese food . Loved it .
Special thanks to Ha , who looked after us on a busy day even without prior reservations.

title: not recommended
review: I will start my review by highlighting the positives which are the location and service. Apart from that, the portion was so small nit enough to feed a 7 years old kid and the meal had no taste. it was expensive too

title: Pizzas for two
review: Spectacular wood oven pizzas. The attention of Hà and her companions perfect. Quiet place to dine having a good conversation. We also got two vouchers for a free beer at another place they have nearby in the Hue marching area.

title: Great experience at Little Italy al Hue
review: Excellent pizza. Sang gave us a great Service. Nice Mood. Cheap. Close to our hotel (Romance)

title: Perfect Italian Good! Great Service !!
review: Sang made our experience very nice at this FIVE STAR restaurant. I had the chicken parmigiana and it was excellent. Very clean and upbeat place. Very good service by SANG. Ask for her.

title: Great evening for a large group
review:
Had a great time at little Italy, we had the Vietnamese food which was lovely- serving with a good range of dishes.
Lovely staff esp Hà who sorted out our bill !

title: Amazing, dinner was amazing
review: Sang was amazing! Definitely go here if you’re in Hue and looking for a little westerner food! Thank you so much, you guys were amazing❤️‍🔥

title: Beautiful dinner at Little Italy Hue
review: Sang was fantastic, great service, beautiful food, terrific restaurant. Thank you kindly for a wonderful experience.

title: Great food
review: Excellent food, great service by Miss Sano, highly recommend, awesome atmosphere, air con, we'll definitely be back.

title: Would definitely recommend!
review: We enjoyed a really nice lunch on their terrace and very friendly service from Ms. Sang. She was very fast and delivered our drinks and food with a smile.

title: An amazing restaurant
review: Sang provided a wonderful service; they were very attentive and did a great job. The atmosphere was also really cute and charming. I would definitely recommend this place to others!

title: Good Italian
review: Very good little Italian restaurant. Very warm Welcoming of Thuy ha. Les. Pizza are very good. I highly recommend it.

title: Dinner review - 29/09/3025
review: Sang provided an exceptional service tonight for dinner. Very friendly, polite and very helpful. Food was very nice and well priced

title: An oasis in the city
review: While walking around we came across Little Italy. With a welcoming smile from the staff at the front to our seating at the table, this restaurant and the maître d' Mr Viet provides great service and excellent food.

title: Great food, friendly, professional staff and lots to choose from.
review: We thoroughly enjoyed our evening at this restaurant. We were welcomed by staff with a complimentary glass of caramel vodka and garlic bread, and our meal was delicious. The wood-fired pizzas were excellent. The restaurant has an extensive menu of Italian and Vietnamese dishes and is reasonably priced.

title: Great restaurant
review: Our server was very attentive and friendly. She took the time to explain each dish and looked after us very well. The food was delicious and the complementary small juice was so refreshing.

title: Restaurant very neat, very good, Service very sweet and respectful (as in the whole country), our waitress Hà was real
review:
The quality is there, a very affordable price, all with Service worthy of a Michelin-starred restaurant.
Thank you for this great meal

title: The experience with the camera has been very pleasant and we understood very well with it in English
review:
We came to change a little bit of food and bus we finished a pizza place
The pizzas were very good
I recommend it if you are tired of Vietnamese food!!
It's also very rich eh!!!
But sometimes if you're not scostubrad@ to Asian food you may feel like switching thirds.

Ha charming and speaks English very well.
Which makes it easy to understand with her.
Congratulations!!!

title: 5 stars all the way
review:
5 stars all the way....

From last minute take away, which they delivered to hotel, next door.
To dine in, and complimentary tequila shot to complimentary garlic bread and receiving 10% off for next visit
We are going again tonight. This place is amazing.
Do yourself a favour n visit

title: Great meal in Hue
review:
Had a lovely meal here. Pizzas made using a proper pizza oven. The seafood pasta had a good amount of seafood.

Ha, the captain / manager saw that our son was interested in the napkins folded as a crown and spent time showing him how they are folded and taught his more designs! Thank you!

title: Super
review: Today we went to this restaurant to make our children happy. Very good food despite those who say that you should not eat your food abroad. Perfect dishes and wonderful staff. Very fine and well kept.

title: Genial
review: A great restautante highly recommended. Our waitress was lovely. Great experiences is highly recommended

title: Rarely had such bad Italian food!
review:
Rarely had such bad Italian food.
The pasta was bone-dry, the lasagna greasy and so unpleasant we didn’t even eat it. The pizza was far from anything you’d call Italian — just a standard base with some extras thrown on top. Everything lacked flavor and authenticity. Definitely not recommended.

title: Not very italian - avoid
review:
In summary avoid:-
Bruschetta - 4 slices, 2 with tomato & 2 with just cheese! Don’t bother.
Penne arabiata - bland, sauce not very spicy.
Carbonara - ok, although made with cream not eggs.
Veg pizza - very small, bases not homemade & ours wasn’t cooked through (base very doughy)
Bill - 8% added to final bill for government tax (not come across this anywhere else in vietnam).

title: Excellent compromise
review: Good and biscuity pizza, crispy and ungreasy light chips. Great choice of food. Friendly staff. Great price and quality.

title: An authentic Italian gem with excellent Service
review:
We visited this Italian restaurant and were very satisfied with the experience. The food was delicious, with authentic flavors and well presented. We tried pasta and pizza, and both were cooked to perfection.

What really made our visit special was the Service. Miss Thúy Hà attended us with great kindness and professionalism. He was always attentive to what we needed, with a smile and a very cordial attitude. Thanks to it, we felt very welcome and cared for throughout the meal.

The Mood of the place is also very cozy, ideal for both a couple dinner or to come with friends or family.

100% recommended!

title: Great meal with exceptional service
review: Fantastic variety of food & staff were attentive & friendly. The ribs and tomato soup were my favs, but all meals top quality.

title: Very pleasant gastronomic experience. By the way, Vietnamese gastronomy is very rich in variety and presentation.
review:
Interesting place for lunch or dinner.
Simple but welcoming space.
With room for groups.
Very accessible and friendly staff.

title: Nice Italian restaurant in Hue
review: Varied menu menu. Very good Italian wine on the menu. Very friendly service. Pizza from a real oven.

title: Good Pizza
review: All the flavor of a good pizza prepared as it should be. We recommend the salmon one. Price a little higher than average in Vietnam but very decent. Room on the ground floor very noisy but there is a room upstairs.

title: Dining out at Little Italy in Hue, Vietnam
review: The food tastes like home which is great when you want a change from all the delicious Vietnamese food you will indulge in. We were here with friends, visited three nights in a row and upon arrival each night we were given a complimentary vodka caramel drink and a complimentary piece of garlic bread each. The food is great, my husband thought the Pizza Supreme was the best he has had in a while, he had steak another night and thought it was cooked to perfection, I had Spaghetti Bolognese and thought it tasty. Chocolate Mousse for dessert was lovely. The food and drink prices here are really reasonable and our Server, Ha was lovely, friendly and attentive.

title: Vietnamese Italian with growth opportunities?
review: We had set our expectations a bit high, we think, after a week of Vietnamese food, we tried an Italian restaurant as a snack. But unfortunately this was not like in Italy. The soup was tasty, then pizza salami which was good but not to Italian standards. In addition, we were already with a group and after us two more which made the whole noisy. The pizza oven is outside at the entrance I suspect for pick-ups.

title: Highly recommended site
review: The place is great, the food very good and lots of variety. The treatment of the staff was excellent, we were attended by Há and was very friendly and pleasant.

title: Western food available
review: Craving western food we shared a Hawaiian pizza and it was delicious. Our waiter Viet was very attentive and insured we were happy!

title: Wonderful service!
review: Good pizza and lovely service. Thank you to Ha’! Stopped for a lunch break on a hot afternoon. Restaurant was a perfect stop in ancient town area after touring the Hue Imperial City.

title: Great food in a great ambiance!
review:
Little Italy is amazing!
The pasta and pizza are very tasty, upon entering very attentively a small drink with a sandwich on the house.
The decoration is beautiful and the host mr.Viet is very attentive.
Who made sure we could order dessert that wasn't even on the menu.

title: Pizza pasta perfection
review:
Great night out. A nice change from Vietnamese food. We enjoyed bruschetta pasta and pizza
Service from Mr Viet was exceptional

title: Outstandingly Bad service . Outstandingly average food
review: Worst service I’ve had for ages! My wife had finished her pasta before my pizza arrived ! Even my drink arrived about ten minutes after hers !! I asked where my pizza was “ it will be here soon” - it wasn’t ! And not a word of apology ! By the way the food was average .

title: Top 👍
review: Very tasty pizza from the wood oven, great espresso. The service from Hà was first class! We would definitely eat here again!

title: Excellent food and service
review: Excellent food and service. Great value for money with authentic food. Highly recommended. Have the mushroom starter!

title: Excellent choice
review: Little Italy is a very nice restaurant. After several days eating Vietnamese food we were kind of thirsty for a good mass of rsrs and definitely was a super choice. The pizza is very good. Mass of roasted sausage in the oven that is outside the restaurant (just at the entrance). It has an excellent selection of wines, Italian, Chilean and Australian. We liked so much that we repeated three times rsrs I can't help but mention that the service is incredible, everyone is very kind, but I want to leave a special hug for the Hà.

title: Great food and friendly staff
review: It was very good food! We got an advance of the house. Especially the Spaghetti and rice with chicken and vegetables was delicious. The comopoliton cocktail was also well made. We have been helped by Hà, she was very friendly.

title: Great Italian food in Vietnam
review:
Vietnamese food is delicious but a day of eating something different is also delicious.
Delicious Italian food. Friendly service, clean business.

title: Great service & friendly staff , nice food
review:
Thuy ha (waitress) was fabulous, great service & food 😊
Highly recommended this restaurant if your visiting Hue Vietnam 🇻🇳

title: Pizza oven Pizza was amazing to find in Vietnam.wide selection of food and drinks. Friendly staff. Free garlic bread a
review:
Pizza was great
service was prompt
Enjoyed complimentary shots before dinner
Cold rolls delicious with stay sauce
Clean place

title: Good dinner
review:
I went there for dinner time as a solo traveler
I had an absolute warm welcome.
My pizza margarita was good !
I’ll recommend this place

title: Restaurant with very friendly and attentive staff, a small Western bracket.
review: Restaurant with beautiful tables and chairs coated in white that gives it a great style side, you can eat good pizzas but also Vietnamese menus

title: A gift meal
review: Lots of tourists this first March night. It is a travel agency restaurant (we were invited by the travel agency who wanted to make up for mistakes, but we would have better eat at the hotel). The place is poorly soundproofed, not at all ideal for a meal for two. The menu had been chosen by the agency, Vietnamese dishes, not very tasty. On the other hand we enjoyed the local den, the Huda. We left before dessert.

title: Reasonable food restaurant.
review: We had dinner at this restaurant next to our hotel. Nice environment and a bit confusing service. The pizza was medium, neither very good nor bad. Cardboard with Western (Italian) and Vietnamese food options. Prices are fair.

title: Highly recommended,
review: Little Italy restaurant Hue City Vietnam. Food and service was fantastic. Very friendly staff, our waitress Tuyen was very friendly and provided great one on one service. Highly recommended to anyone wanting great value, service and food. Very reasonable prices for both drinks and food. Thankyou!

title: Amazing restaurant and amazing service!
review: Me and my boyfriend had the best time at Little Italy and will be returning! The staff are so respectful and friendly, the food was amazing and so quick even when the restaurant was quite busy! We stumbled up on here while looking for lunch and it did not disappoint! We were looked after by Tuyên and she was fabulous, making sure that everything was perfect! We will definitely miss this gem when we leave Hue!

title: Brilliant food
review:
Amazing food Mr Viet our waiter was just super! Wine was great every dish perfect
We were very well looked after.
I would really recommend this restaurant!

title: Great food, nice place. Highly recommended.
review: Delicious lamb rack eaten. Nice place, very friendly and smooth service, by Mrs. Tuyen. We will definitely go back again to try something different. And the best chardonnay so far in Vietnam.

title: Looking for something western
review:
Very nice place, very good Tuyen care, always attentive and very friendly. There are Italian dishes to nuance with the Vietnamese.
All very rich.

title: Delicious Food and Great Service!
review: The pasta was delicious, and the service was excellent! Tuyen was very friendly and attentive, making sure we had everything we needed. The restaurant also has a cozy and welcoming atmosphere. Highly recommend!

title: Restaurant in Hue' (Vietnam)
review: Beautiful restaurant in the center of Hue, very nice place, cuisine with local dishes of excellent quality. Impeccable service, special thanks to Tuyen for his kindness and professionalism

title: Delicious
review:
The place very well decorated and we received a good reception. During our visit it was very quiet and friendly despite the fever of the New Year all around. Impeccable and very efficient service. Although my dish lacked the ingredient (crab) they swapped for shrimp. Ah!!! How delicious! The sauce well seasoned and not too greasy. It was a delight!
The Italian red wine that accompanied our meal was excellent!

title: Cannot recommend 😔
review:
Dined here January 2025 with a party of 12.

It took well over an hour (and several requests to the staff) between our first diner’s meal arriving and the last two meals. Consequently everyone else had well and truly finished before the last meals were served. This was despite many other customers, who had arrived after us, being served before us.

The manager initially advised that he would not charge for the last two meals, however he later changed this and offered to provide a free drink each instead. He then discounted the cost of the drink off the bill but left the holiday surcharge in place for the free drink!!

We told the waitress we were sharing an entree between two, however the serving size was so small, it was literally only one mouthful between us.

My main course of spaghetti bolognaise was mediocre, cold, and not cooked with chilli as ordered.

We did not receive the free garlic bread advertised on the board out the front and our fellow diners did not receive their free beer offered with the large pizzas.

Quite disappointing and the debacle with being charged a holiday surcharge of 20% on the value of a free drink was unprincipled; the two late meals were sooo late, they should have been free 🤨

Wait staff were lovely.

title: Great service and price!
review: Nice place, with good options on the menu. The onion soup was great. We ordered pizzas and they were reasonable. The highlight of the service was HÀ, very friendly and polite. When I complained that there was a lack of basil in the margarita pizza, she brought several fresh leaves for us. Very attentive!

title: Pizza surprise!
review: My wife and I wanted a pizza while we were in Hue. This restaurant did not disappoint. The pizza was superb. We also had tiramisu which was delicious.

title: Good!
review: Delicious alternative to Vietnamese food. As well as excellent welcome drink, garlic bread and lovely Tuyen our waitress

title: Great
review: Beautiful space, good service by Ha. Delicious food. Great. Really good service, warm and cheerful. She is really friendly and really cute🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗

title: They adapt dishes to gluten-free.
review:
The food was great. I'm celiac and they treated me great, adapted all the dishes so I could eat. They understand the subject because I am very sensitive to cross-contamination, 30 minutes after ingesting I get very bad and I am great after eating. I could taste the Vietnamese rolls, pancake, typical Vietnamese chicken skewers......all delicious. 🤤. I recommend the treatment received from Ny Ny. Thanks for your help.

Greetings from Spain.

title: Good food and suitable for coeliacs.
review: The food was very good. My wife is celiac and they adapted all the dishes she wanted gluten-free, which is very much appreciated. Very nice and fairly economical treatment. The place has air conditioning.

title: Great experience
review: Went two nights in a row because of the gluten free accommodations. Staff was super friendly, especially our server Thao. We sat outside in the front and ordered several dishes to share. Would definitely recommend for those traveling in Hue.

title: Very good food!
review: We dined here eight and it all tasted very good. With Malbec wine from Chile, which was quite passable. I would be happy to come back anytime. It is centrally located! And on the 1st floor it is much quieter and more pleasant!

title: Don’t miss absolute Gem. Loved the food the service and everything it had to offer. We will be back for sure.
review:
Here’s a fantastic review you can use for Golden Rice Restaurant in Hue:

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Golden Rice Restaurant – Hue’s Hidden Gem!

We had an absolutely amazing experience at Golden Rice Restaurant in Hue. From the moment we walked in, we were greeted with warm smiles and genuine hospitality. The atmosphere is cosy and inviting, and you can feel the passion the team has for great food and service.

The dishes were fresh, flavourful, and beautifully presented. Every bite tasted like true Vietnamese home cooking with a modern twist. The standout for us was the authenticity of the flavours—rich broths, perfectly balanced spices, and generous portions. You can really taste the love and pride that goes into every meal.

The staff were exceptional—attentive, friendly, and happy to share recommendations. It felt like dining with family.

If you’re visiting Hue, do yourself a favour and add Golden Rice to your list. It’s one of those places you walk out of thinking, “Wow, that was special.”

We’ll definitely be back! 🌟🍚🥢

title: Nice spot for lunch
review: Stopped here for lunch and would happily come again. The mushrooms & tofu dish really was excellent. Fast and friendly service too.

title: Great time at Golden Rice
review:
The food and service in this restaurant was excellent. Thanks especially to QUVNH who served us. She spoke excellent English and made good recommendations.
Good luck to QUVNH with her studies.
Kath Sheila Linda David Kim & Rick

title: Great experience
review:
Nice restaurant, where we had a nice meal.
For one of us, the food had to be gluten-free
This was no problem at all.
The people at the service were very nice.

title: A delicious lunch (twice!)
review: We were so impressed with the food and the prices at Golden Rice, we went two days in a row. The Bun Bo Hue was delicious as were the fried spring rolls with pork and the fried pancake. We ended our meals with Vietnamese salt coffee. Ny Ny was our friendly waitress who delivered everything with a huge smile. The atmosphere is pleasant and the location is convenient to many tourist hotels—just a five minute walk from our hotel. I’m just sorry I can’t take this Hue jewel home with me!

title: Excellent choice for excellent food and services
review: Super tasty food and excellent service. A real good Vietnamese restaurant middle of an enormous offer of bars and restaurants. Dishes cooked with love and served with a smile by Quynh. Would recommend to everyone!

title: Good Food. Can Do Gluten Free.
review:

Can do Gluten Free.

title: Hue food
review: I wanted a fairly authentic restaurant. You'll definitely find that here. I'm very fond of the noodle soup and it's great again! Relaxed tent. No noise with music. Friendly service by Quinh, not intrusive just friendly. Price quality top! I wouldn't pass this one up in Hue.

title: One of the best of our trip
review: We stayed two weeks in Vietnam and 3 nights in Hue, we ate the first night at this restaurant and we also returned the last night. The staff very friendly and helpful, a special thanks to Quynh who served us. Great food and great value for money. Despite being in the center and close to the local area, it is very quiet. Highly recommended to enjoy local cuisine.

title: It'll make your day! 😀
review:
The food is amazing, I've been traveling Vietnam for long and It was one of the best meals I've eaten here.
The tofu was amazing, the rice was very delicious, the spring rolls were incredible and the lemonade was the exact amount needed for this meal (maybe mix it whit a bit water because it's a little too sweet..☺️).
The waiters are lovely and kind and the chef makes food come quickly dish by dish.
The vibes of the place are amazing and the design of the place makes you feel comfortable and safe.
Quynh was our waitress, so kind, so nice with a big heart!
I truly recommend this restaurant for their hard work and amazing results.
Every penny is worth it!
Well, I think I can talk about it all day, so I'm going to stop now.
But this restaurant would make your day! Go there, really.

title: Great local food and great staff.
review: Quynh was very friendly and welcoming. Food and drink was amazing. Would definitely come back again and recommend to a friend.

title: Don’t hesitate go visit THAO!
review:
We had such a memorable experience at Golden Rice Restaurant thanks to Thao, our incredible server. We came in for lunch, and not only was the food absolutely delicious fresh, flavorful, and perfectly spiced but the service made it feel like home.

To our surprise, we returned for dinner that same evening, and Thao remembered us, our exact order, and even the spice level we liked. She greeted us with the warmest smile and made us feel genuinely welcomed. Her attention to detail and kindness elevated our entire experience.

Golden Rice is a gem amazing food and even better hospitality. We’ll definitely be back, and we hope everyone gets to be lucky enough to have Thao as their server!

title: Authentic Vietnamese restaurant
review: Very good experience at Golden Rice. Good food choices - I had crispy pancake starter - grilled chicken sesame main and deep fried bananas dessert. All courses were very good (loved the banana dessert 👍). Clean, friendly, attentive staff. Well worth a visit.

title: Highly recommended
review:
We had a wonderful meal here and really loved both the presentation and the taste. The dishes are served on banana leaves, which immediately sets a lovely, authentic tone and makes the food feel extra special.

The plates were very well balanced: fluffy white rice in the center, surrounded by fresh herbs, bean sprouts, greens, and flavorful toppings. The eggplant dish was perfectly cooked — soft inside, nicely glazed, and topped with minced meat and sesame seeds. Simple, comforting, and full of flavor. The other plate with turmeric-marinated meat was also delicious, aromatic, and not too heavy.

Everything tasted fresh, light, and thoughtfully prepared, and the dipping sauces complemented the dishes perfectly. We also tried the crispy rolls on the side, which were crunchy and satisfying without being greasy.

Overall, this is a great place if you appreciate beautiful plating, fresh ingredients, and authentic Vietnamese flavors. Calm, enjoyable dining experience — highly recommended! 🌿🍚

title: An Absolute Must-Visit in Huế – Exceptional Food, Impeccable Service
review:
Hands down one of the best dining experiences in Huế.

The food is exceptional – perfectly balanced flavors, beautifully presented, and clearly made with care and skill. Every dish tasted fresh, refined, and authentic without feeling touristy. You can tell this kitchen knows exactly what it’s doing.

Service is next level. Attentive, warm, professional, and genuinely welcoming. You feel taken care of without being hovered over – exactly how it should be.

The atmosphere is calm, elegant, and cozy at the same time. Ideal for a relaxed dinner, a special occasion, or simply enjoying great food without stress or noise.

Value for money is excellent. Quality like this would cost significantly more elsewhere.

If you’re in Huế and skip Maison Trang 2, you’re doing it wrong.
I’d come back without hesitation.

I took the beef soup which really worth it on a rainy day.
They even offered us some watermelon ;)

title: Eaten
review: We ate really well, I recommend. Excellent cuisine in the village of incense. We also took nice pictures

title: A very pleasant lunch
review:
Very welcome and very fresh and tasty food
Nice setting not far from the sites.
I recommend, some tables, quiet atmosphere

title: Great food, nice atmosphere too
review: We actually went to the Madison Trang in Hue and found ourselves near here today and decided to check it out - it was AMAZING! The food is very reasonably priced, the portions were large, and the food was actually good. The Bun Bo Hue + Bun Thit Nuong was really delicious. Highly recommend

title: Lovely food
review: Lovely authentic Vietnamese food. Staff are amazing and very kind. Really filling and great selection of different dishes including vegetarian.

title: Must try!
review: The best food you’ll have in Hue! So simple yet so flavorful. Very friendly staff. Right next to incense village, perfect excursion!

title: Great experience
review: This place is great if you want to have meal after/before visiting Tu Duc tomb. The food is delicious and reasonably priced!

title: Good food
review: One of the best meals we have had here in Vietnam. We all really enjoyed eating here. Recommend eating here with the family

title: Local specialities
review:
Excellent set menus to discover many of Hue's delicacies.

Very friendly English speaking service.

title: Yummy food
review: Good food for family & good service. We enjoyed our lunch here. We will definitely come back here. Thank you & continue serving good food to tourist

title: Lunch at Maison Trang 2
review: Very nice authentic Vietnamese cuisine. There was so much food that we couldn’t finish it all. We tried a lot of different dishes and came out satisfied.

title: A little gem
review: A friendly and nice place with delicious variety of Local cuisine with vegetarian twist, definitely a must try for everyone

title: Good local cuisine
review: Went here recommended by our tour guide. Really good local cuisine. Nice experience too. Friendly staff. Food also tasteful

title: Friendly staff and good food!
review: Staff are so welcoming and friendly, and food was rly nice, they even give you a little bag of ice to cool down from the heat!

title: Great.
review: Great experience! Welcome to the top and very good meal.Tea and bananas offered at the end of the meal

title: The food is excellent, top notch 🔝
review: A friendly, family-like welcome, making us feel right at home. The food is excellent, top notch 🔝

title: best restaurant in Town
review: Very friendly and competent staff, super tasty and cheap food, can highly recommend it right on the canal, as an addition we got bananas and tea.

title: Excellent find
review: Fab little spot on river. Great for breakfast and dinner. Only alcohol was beer but super friendly owner who was tripping over himself to help. So cheap. Ate 3 dishes, 2 beers, 1 sprite and then given bananas and tea. Total of about £9. Following day returned for breakfast... Omelette salad, french stick. It's a definite must if you are in Hue

title: Perfect location, perfect food, perfect price, perfect service
review: Perfectly located overlooking the castle, it is quiet with few cars and offers a wide variety of cuisine. Coconuts wrapped in rice paper with your own vegetables and meat called Hue specialties? I am very satisfied with the food I eat in the sauce. The staff are friendly and helpful. The price is pretty reasonable. I liked it so much that I visited two days in a row.

title: Excellent traditional restaurant!
review: Good traditional food with fantastic service! We have views of the imperial city wall and offered tea and fruit at the end. At the exit it was raining and they gave us a cover for the rain!

title: Amazing food, great hosts and nice location
review: We had a lovely lunch here, really nice food, great location and fantastic hosts/owners. This is a great place to visit for lunch or a casual dinner

title: Very good
review: Highly recommended excellent service and very good food and very reasonable prices excellent location next to the imperial city

title: Great people, great food, must visit ☺️
review:
Awesome approach towards costumers. We are from czech republic and the owner instantly turned old some old czech tunes and greeted us using czech. Great fellow. Super tasty food and drinks, great prices.

🇨🇿 extrémně příjemná a přátelská obsluha. Doporučujeme za celou rodinu. Levná a velice chutná návštěva.

title: Super tasty and not expensive
review:
Super friendly people
Pho and Bahn Mi very tasty
Absolutely recommended!
Cozy along the water and near the old Cite

title: Very rich and very clean.
review: Very tasty and delicious food. Very cheap prices and very clean everything. The bathrooms are very clean. When we sat down they gave wet cloths and small bags with ice to cool us down because it was so hot! They give you free dessert fruit and also a free tea. We ate 3 floors and drank 3 beers and all for 240k gifts. Very cheap.

title: Wow! Great find.
review: Delicious meal, great location and super friendly and helpful staff. Spring rolls and stir fry morning glory…..yum!!!

title: Fabulous!
review: We had wonderful time here! It was so hot outside, but we had our own room with the AC. The service was great - waiters were adorable and helpful. Food was really nice, coffe was great, drinks were lovely!
