title: Very good!!
review:
Very good welcome, staff with little care, delicious food and drinks!! I recommend 100%
Ultra fast Service!!

title: Excellent restaurant near the imperial city
review:
We arrived and are Welcoming with a bag of ice to refresh us!
Also, the prices are very reasonable!
Unparalleled Service! Thank you!!
Such good food for a good price. Very nice servers that like a chat. Definitely recommend having a meal here any time of the day!

title: Relaxed atmosphere, good food, good drinks
review:
small restaurant, good location, friendly Service, the sandwich and smoothie was very good, which is why we went there a second time. You sit comfortably there and we come, if there is time to allow, also third time there.
Thank you, it was very nice of you.

title: A place to feel at home
review:
Everything is perfect. In 40 degrees he immediately gave us wet wipes and ice in a sachet to cool down. The food was delicious, among the best eaten so far in Vietnam and the owner and staff guys are very kind and the prices very honest.
The owner is really nice and, for Italian friends, in the playlist there was a series of great classics of Venditti that made us feel at home overlooking the imperial city.
P.S. if you happen to eat it and Sugar starts playing in the background, thank me.

title: Excellent small restaurant
review: Very nice setting with views of the citadel ramparts. Waiter with little care. Excellent food with lots of choices of Vietnamese specialties. We feasted for a sum that beat all competition. Value for money at the top!!!

title: good place with good food and fair prices
review: Beautiful spot in the evening you can sit in the setting sun. Reasonable prices. It was as good as in other places but 2/3 of the price. We would recommend to eat or to drink here.

title: Everything was perfect!
review:
The ratings correspond to reality! Everything was perfect. The impeccable service. Waiter Ian was in the care. When I told him I was Italian, he put Antonello Venditti on the radio. It was touching.
The amazing bahn mih! We prepared them ourselves how we wished.
I highly recommend!!! I would have given 6 stars if it was possible.
Thank you!

title: A quiet little place with great food
review: Delicious food, friendly owner, cleanliness and great views of the South Gate of the Citadel. We went back for three nights. Great value for money.

title: Tasty and affordable food with friendly service.
review: I had a much needed bite to eat before checking in to my accommodation after arriving on an overnight train. The staff are friendly and professional. Everything is nice and clean. The menu is appealing, I admit to a little food envy on some of the other dishes I saw being delivered to nearby tables. I guess that means I will have to return. Very affordable and nice touches such as a hand refresher, ginger tea and piece of fruit. The setting is also nice beside the water. Highly recommend.

title: Tasty dishes and near citadel entrance
review: Great food and proper cleaning .by the canal of the citadel walls. Quick to serve and kind. Well cooked dishes

title: Little gem ❤️
review:
We walked passed and decided to stay just for drinks and stunning views! It was so pleasant that we decided to have dinner as well. We ordered vegetarian pancake and
shrimp dish with dried noodles. Food was absolutely delicious and service just perfect. 100% reccomended.

title: Good place, really nice people, and great atmosphere. 100% recomend. By the way, is a calm place
review: Nice place, nice views and nice people in charge. Good recomendation! And peaceful place. Terrace with really lovely views.

title: Good food, Staff and view
review: It was a great experience, good food, good staff, also they give us some ginger tea after the meal. They are kind and also know English. Very good place

title: All right.
review:
The place is great , in the shade by the river, good meal and warm welcome.
I recommend without hesitation to all.

title: Very good address
review:
We came across this restaurant by chance the first night. We returned there for all our other meals during the stay. The food is very good and homemade. Banh mi are amazing and consistent.
A small tea with giger is offered as well as a fruit at the end of the meal.
The view of the ramparts is a plus, the alley is quiet.
A great address and prices all defying competition!
I recommend!

title: Delicious traditional food
review: Small family restaurant with delicious food and coffees… we had a vegetarian bahn mi and vegetarian pancakes… the owner is very kind.. at the end of the meal they offer ginger tea and a banana.. definitely reccomend!!

title: Great experience
review: Great food, nice views and great service. They have a lot of details with the client. Must see if you pass through Hue

title: Fantastic
review: Very nice experience. Western breakfast options. Very good Vietnamese vomit. Cold beer. Best them, super wave and speak English

title: A French touch
review: Sandwich with good bread, pastry to match, nice small terrace and smiling and discreet waitresses. To be tested!

title: A bakery?
review: Discovered in the unmissable Guide du Routard, this bakery is surprising because it simply has a French village bakery. Indeed, just by the smell you can smell croissants, the smell of bread and other pastries. This is to be mistaken because moreover, everything is delicious!

title: Great place
review: Excellent tuna sandwich and very friendly service. The baguette was warm and crispy just perfect. Nice seating area with air on and fans. Thank you.

title: warm feeling in Hue
review:
I saw some youtuber reviewed this place and I decided to have some food here. I did not expect that much but, at the moment I stepped into this bakery, the smell was so fascinating. The building's design was cozy and retro style.
The food is good in overall

title: Great breakfast stop
review: Enjoyed yummy pastries and coffee, pain au chocs were delightful, and great to read about the owners efforts to help train and develop opportunities for local people.

title: Definitely worth a visit
review:
I had bread and jam, coffee and a cake - everything was perfect. The selection was really good and the quality excellent.

Fast and friendly service and a nice terrace upstairs. Will deffo be returning during our stay.

title: Crispy warm pain de chocolate and good coffee on the balcony. :-)
review:
Crispy warm pain de chocolate and coffee on the planted balcony was just what I needed. 😋

Tiny front was a little tricky to find but lots of cakes and crusty baguettes available with good coffee and friendly service. Go up the tiny staircase and sit on the upstairs verandah

title: Amazing food
review: I came here to enjoy some pasta by myself. The service was very friendly in particular Qa. She was my server and made sure I was happy with my food and very smiley. Thank you so much !

title: Nice local and Italian food
review:
Great restaurant and good food. We had pizzas, and they were the best we've had on our trip in Asia. Loved their iced ginger tea.
The service from Huong and the other waitresses was amazing and welcoming.

title: Great service from Na
review: Place was very nice, and the servers were very friendly and attentive, particularly server Na. We received a free drink, bruschettas, and fruit, which was very tasty. Food was great and price is quite cheap. Definitely recommend a visit to this place!

title: Excellent cuisine and Huong the wonderful fairy.
review:
Huong. is great , very professional , welcoming smiling, excellent Italian cuisine Al denté , succulent, to be done again with pleasure .
Impeccable service.

title: Delicious food, friendly staff
review: The local bun bon hue was very delicious and huang the waitress was top notch, attentive to our needs and made sure we had a great experience ! Would eat here again

title: Great value, good food
review:
A great quick lunch with a combination of local and Italian dishes ordered for a table of 8.
Great food and waitress QA did an excellent job of keeping everyone happy and well fed.
Very good value and the Happy Hour deal is generous.

title: Qa for president 😉
review: Very good food and friendly manners by Qa. Tasty pizza, tomato mozarello and so much more... Friends of Vietnam

title: Super restaurant
review: Nice discovery near our hotel. The food is delicious and cheap. The staff is very welcoming, pleasant and helpful. It was happy hour and we got bruschettas , beer and a plate of fruit for free... I’ve never seen that! A big Wow for this restaurant as well as all the staff who are very dedicated. I highly recommend this restaurant in the heart of the city 🥰 thank you very much 👌🫶

title: Welcoming Restaurant
review: Found by accident and so glad we did. Vietnamese and Italian/Western options. Happy Hour all day included a free Bruschetta and fruit plate. The staff were so friendly and helpful. I highly recommend a visit if you are looking for a place to eat

title: Quality food and excellent service
review: Restaurant well located, has an excellent service especially from the maid NA. Quality food and lots of options. Very competitive price.

title: Crowd pleaser
review: A great meal at Risotto restaurant where it’s happy hour all day long and there is a great selection of Vietnamese food as well as Italian. Sore to keep the whole family happy. Our waitress Trang made sure we had everything we needed.

title: Pizza boa
review: Good service, good pizza, 1 free beer and fruits, recommend, great cost benefit in Hue.....,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,

title: Super indicated!
review:
We wanted to have a pizza and had a great experience. In addition to the pizza being very tasty, we were gratified with entries, dessert and free beer. There were only positive surprises.
And the service was very courteous and efficient!

title: Small Italian restaurant
review: Very good little restaurant, pizzas are good. Very well served by Trang, very nice and smiling waitress! During the Happy Hour you have small bruschetta offered as well as fruit for dessert, plus a drink! It's really worth it!

title: Amazing!!
review: So much choice on the menu, I had a Caesar salad and it was amazing. My server QA was so lovely and helpful, would really recommend!!

title: Good food
review: Fantastic food super frendly staf. In de center of the town. Pizza fruti di mari excellent. Los if chouse betreden Italianen and Vietnamees food.

title: Good value restaurant
review: Hue Noodle soup had to be tried in Hue. Very nice added bonus free drink. Staff attentive very efficient. Highly recommend

title: Absolutely recommend!
review:
Very well run restaurant.
Really very good pizza/pasta as well as local food. Plus very reasonable prices.
Extremely friendly and generous owner family (delicious fruits as dessert were always free with us for food for two people)!
It is often crowded, but a few minutes wait is worth it here.
Highly recommended!

title: Good food and service
review: Went with my partner, we both ordered tagliatelle, mine with pesto, his with bolognese. Both dishes were great, also they gave us a free beer and soda plus fuit as a dessert. The only observation I had was the wait for the food.

title: Dietary safe relaxed meal
review: They speak English well and cope with vegetarian and gluten free diets. I was surprised that they didn't have any fresh pasta (they are an Italian restaurant?) but enjoyed their risotto even if it was slightly salty. Nice atmosphere with a wide range of options on the menu (we would have tried more, but we weren't super-hungry on our visit - the bruschetta was very tempting).

title: Pizza top
review: Very good pizza 🍕 and dessert kindly offered a nice plate of fruit. Quiet place we recommend. ...

title: Excellent staff, food, menu choices and atmosphere
review: Excellent food and choices for all tastes including Vegan, staff were very friendly, good atmosphere and clean. We had a great meal and will visit again this holiday.

title: A beautiful address in Hue!
review: Very welcome, extremely helpful, the boss is very caring and the pizzas are very good, certainly better than in some pizzerias in Italy.

title: Proper Italian lasagna!
review: Really good authentic lasagna! Free bruschetta drink and fruit with mail meal. Excellent value for money. Family run and very nice staff

title: Pizza in Hue
review: A nice meal. An unbeatable price/price ratio: one drink (including beer) + brucchetta offered for each order + fresh fruit for dessert. A very good compromise if you are short of European food. The impeccable service.

title: Gem of a restaurant
review: Absolute gem of a find in Hue. After a little bit of research we opted to have dinner at Al Risotto and what a fantastic choice we made. Waitress was so kind and helpful and helped with the choice for my wife who has an intolerance to garlic. After choosing our mains we were brought complementary bruschetta with tomatoes as well as a free drink each. When our food arrived it was cooked to perfection. Crispy noodles with chicken was the tastiest meal I’ve had since our arrival in Vietnam almost a week ago. My wife had braised vegetables with rice and we shared a lovely freshly prepared Mediterranean salad which were so tasty. To finish off we had more complimentary fruit served. All in all a great food experience in Hue, we have no hesitation in recommending this place to anyone.

title: A good meal
review: Meal very good! Staff attentive and helpful. Happy day respected despite that we had not understood everything to what was planned to be offered.

title: Good food, cheap, nice service
review: Fine place to eat both Italian and Vietnamese. Snack beforehand and some fruit after from the case. Nice service. Recommended!

title: For Muslims, An Nhien was Recognized as Halal certified Restaurant, and tq Nhien for ur warm Hopitality
review:
Great arrangement by the Tour guide'Such a wonderful place to come n dine here....
Vegetarian menu were fantastic...
Service rendered feels, u've been treated like a "King"

title: Peaceful setting and fantastic Hue specialties
review:
This restaurant was a breath of fresh air. It was so peaceful and had such a wonderful setting, making it the perfect place to relax and enjoy a meal.

The service was very good, and the food was absolutely fantastic. We specifically had the chance to try some typical dishes from Hue, which were prepared beautifully.

My only regret is that we had to leave the following day, as I would have loved to return and try the other options on their menu.

title: Amazing cooking class and lunch
review: We had a cooking class with Nhein, She taught us 2 dishes, which we then ate along with an amazing lunch which was provided.

title: Cooking Class!
review: We had a great day with Nhien at An Nhien Garden Restaurant. We were there for a cooking class and really enjoyed learning about the food we were preparing (and eating). Nhien was a great host and very knowledgeable, not just about food but also the history of Vietnam and it was facinating to find out about her own family history.

title: Serenity and special don't miss!
review: This would warrant a ten star review if it were possible. A place of amazing serenity and beauty. We booked a vegetarian cooking experience and it was amazing. We were tutored by Nhien, one of the two sisters who own the restaurant and she was fascinating, both for the food and her approach based on her upbringing and her beliefs. We then had a meal showcasing what our food should have looked and tasted like. Only sorry that we are moving on tomorrow so can't come back. Don't miss this place it's truly special.

title: Best Ever Vegetarian Restaurant
review: What an amazing feast, an enchanting place, and an amazing experience. Chef Nhien prepared some of the finest vegetarian dishes we ever had. We truly enjoyed the outstanding presentation, flavor / taste were just fantastic. We must say also the teas were very good, the complexities of various flavors were great and truly enjoyed sipping the teas as we ate our dinner. With its amazing history, An Nhien Garden Restaurant is a must for anyone visiting Hue.

title: Lovely way to spend a wet afternoon in Hue
review: Nhien is a charming host and a great teacher. The family home and restaurant is beautiful. The food was delicious. Would thoroughly recommend

title: A must try vegetarian restaurant in Hue
review: Good food, wonderful atmosphere, beautiful garden - very zen and relaxing. We have come a few times and fully enjoyed it. Highly recommend.

title: An exceptional experience...
review: A unique and extraordinary place. Out of time and out of city life. A haven of tranquility with fine vegetarian cuisine. Charming, passionate and caring hosts. The culinary experience with Nhien is a pure moment of happiness and grace. Thank you so much for sharing.

title: Vegetarian exception
review: Very very good vegetarian restaurant without fish or seafood just amazing in flavor the place is out of time and the amazing staff

title: So much more than a cooking class!
review: Fantastic experience. This was so much more than a cooking class and meal. We were met at a market in Hue to buy fresh ingredients and then take to the restaurant and family home. Nhien related her fascinating family history in the wonderful garden of their home. This is a great opportunity to hear a personal account of the impact of the Vietnam War. The cooking experience was relaxed and enjoyable and the meal in the restaurant was excellent. We had a great time and can thoroughly recommend this.

title: Fabulous Food!
review:
We were met at the local market by a member of Nhiem's team who took us around the marketplace. He explained everything about the market and the local produce. We meandered through the labyrinth of stalls that filled the market- quite the sensory overload! We were take to the An Nhien Garden Restaurant and residence of a family.

We were met at the entrance by the lovely Nhien who shared lots of information about the history of the property and her family heritage - all very interesting. We enjoyed lotus tea and a special fruit, grown in the beautiful gardens, whilst chatting together. It was lovely chatting to Nhien, time flew by!

We were shown round the beautiful gardens that is filled with artwork, trees and flowers before taken for a plant based cooking experience. Nhien spent time sharing information about the business and what inspired her to cook using local plant based produce. Her teaching was outstanding, never hurried and beautifully explained. We were very much involved in all aspects of preparation, cooking and consuming!

After our cooking experience, we were taken to the restaurant and served the most amazing lunch. The dishes were beautiful presented and tasted even better than they looked! We had an amazing experience at the An Nhien Garden Restaurant. It's a must when visiting Hue. Thank you to Nhien and her lovely staff! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

title: Must try vegetarian in Hue
review:
I’ve never had such delicious vegetarian food. I didn’t realise Vietnamese people enjoy vegetarian meals. Often times I’ve only had the standard fare of spring rolls and Pho.
The food in An Nhien Garden is such a delectable eye opener. Service was good and food even better. We had the hot pot and my goodness, the broth was out of the world. The lotus fried rice was very good. Food portions were just right and service was excellent; they speak French and English so we were never lost in communication. Ambience was calming and the restaurant is within an old bungalow with a lovely garden. Only thing is the pricing was on the pricier end.

title: A visit to An Nhien is at once the pinnacle epicurean and cultural experience in Vietnam
review:
An evening at An Nhien Garden Vegetarian Cafe is an experience that no matter how long or how far you travel in Vietnam, will likely be the ONE place you just can't get out of your mind.

We had the good fortune to meet Nhien who is the co owner with her sister An (thus the name An Nhien which in English sounds like "Onion"). And just like an onion, a meeting with Nhien is one where the complexity of this very special lady is revealed like the peeling of an onion with each layer revealing yet another side of this extraordinary woman.

This property has been in the family for over 460 years!!! The idea of opening up this concept came about gradually and includes an entrance that begins at the grand gates which once entered is like coming into a magical world out of time and space. Whatever worries you may have experienced before entering, just melt away as you are instantly transported to a lush garden, expertly lit with subtle mood lights, gorgeous antiques and stunning artwork by an amazing buddhist Monk. All of this happens before you even get to the restaurant which is comfortably tucked into the back of the property like a lotus flower which seemingly opens just for you.

Unlike most restaurants, the staff here are not just workers, they are emotionally connected to the purpose of this experience and their joy is as real as their commitment to creating an evening that surpasses your expectations.

The food, the presentation, the attention to detail, the whole experience felt much like a Michelin restaurant.. that is if Michelin restaurants offered food that wasn't just a feast for the eyes and a gift to your waiting pallette but, also served with a love from the heart that can not be trained.

There are sites to see in Vietnam and places to go but however you travel in Vietnam, if you want to experience something that will be a priceless gift to remember your whole life, come to An Nhien to immerse yourself in a timeless epicurean adventure that will leave you satiated both in body and soul!

title: A must do a magical gem in Hue!
review: I visited this remarkable place as part of a tour. We were there for a cooking class but prior to that we got to explore and learn about the grounds, the paintings, the heritage and how this place became what it is today. Our host and the owner was so wonderful and generous with her time and stories. We then embarked on a great cooking class on the art of making spring rolls. A real treat and a must do! This was followed by a veggie lunch filled with so much flavour I could have thought there was meat on the plates. The staff were all so friendly and accommodating. The place is serene and so clean and finally the salt coffee is the best I’ve had in Vietnam so far. I cannot wait to visit again if I am lucky enough to ever return to Hue!

title: Fantastic vegetarian restaurant!
review:
Beautiful vegetarian dishes. Everything, up to and including the dipping sauces, is all homemade. Great food and service. Also typical dishes from the city of Hue. Beautiful location, with a beautiful garden where you can see everything.
Staff speaks great English and is incredibly friendly.
Talked to one of the owners and she told us a lot about the origin of the restaurant and their philosophy about food and behind their dishes.
Anyone who loves really good food and appreciates fine dining should go here.

title: Amazing food in a beautiful location
review: The beautiful setting of this restaurant was only surpassed by the delicious vegetarian lunch we enjoyed. The food was amazing in both taste and presentation. From the unique cocktails to the unique spring rolls, vegetable dishes, pineapple rice and fresh fruits one course was better than the next. After our meal it was wonderful to walk through the gardens enjoying the trees, flowers and beautiful landscaping.

title: Vegetarian restaurant of the highest order.
review:
I was not attuned to a purely vegetarian restaurant. the bigger the surprise how good the food was and how refined the drinks offered. Coffee fig wine is a signature drink. Reminiscent of red wine. Vietnamese springrolls for self-wrapping - also very delicious. All in a beautiful garden full of art. The paintings of a Buddhist monk who is self-taught.
Just a great experience.
The service attentive and helpful. The espresso has it all, so strong was the ...

title: Outstanding vegan food!
review: What a wonderful experience! The set vegan menu was fabulous. The dishes were beautifully presented in a lovely setting. Gorgeous gardens. A favourite memory from my foodie trip in Vietnam. If I had to pick a stand out dish, I'd say the Fig with King Oyster Mushroom Salad - delicious!

title: A Fantasy Meal
review: Excellent cuisine and atmosphere. All courses were well staged and progressed in a very soothing order from a clean (crisp) salad through a soothing dessert. Highlight of king mushroom course.

title: Best Vegetarian Restaurant In Hue!
review: Went here for new years lunch and it was amazing. Great vegetarian dishes with different flavours. Can really recommend this.

title: Not good.
review:
The price is not specified accurately on the menu panel.

Hygiene is not good.

The food is not good.

There are many events. The restaurant is noisy.

title: Super good experience
review: It was perfect. Salmon sashimi were tongue-based, maki were tasty, the restaurant was very quiet with super nice music, and the waitresses/cook was very nice and spoke very good English. Very good evening 🥰

title: Not to be missed
review: Excellent Japanese restaurant where we went three nights in a row tasty food and impeccable freshness a big thank you to tung chi22 which was adorable

title: Great!!!
review: Chi was so very helpfully, food was fantastic!

title: Good sushi restaurant
review: Great food for a fair price. The staff were also very friendly and attentive. Our waitress T.Tien did a great job attending to our needs.

title: Really good Japanese food
review: I really loved the authentic food here s day before Tet 2026. Delicious Tuna salad and beef. Especially I would like to mention the service of Ms. Chi. She is really knowledgeable and knows all about the food and drinks.

title: Great quality. Attentive service (chi was her name). Everything was wonderful. The Tempura sushi roll was awesome. Further
review: Nice shop with a lot of customers. Must be good, then. It was very good! Good prices, top quality, attentive service, no long waiting times.

title: Authentic
review:
Outstanding and authentic restaurant.
We went back there twice as much as we liked.
A special thanks to the professionalism and kindness of Tung and Tuoi.

title: Great food and service. Recommending to everyone in Hue.
review: One of the best restaurants we have been to in the area! The food was amazing and the service impeccable. Loan, amongst with other members of the staff, was so amazing offering impeccable service and being so helpful and accommodating without hovering, providing a comfortable and pleasant atmosphere! She ensured that everything was perfect, even sending one of her teammates on an orange hunt when they have run out of oranges for our orange juice and offering us hot water when the food was spicier than anticipated! Honestly such an amazing experience and the food also looked and tasted amazing, ensuring great value for money. The wait time for the food wasn't very long and we have got our ordered food gradually so we had time to eat everything whilst still hot, unlike other restaurants in the area which would just bring out everything at once. Would recommend!

title: Highly recommended
review: Very good sushi at an unbeatable price in Hue city. We received a quality service from Loan!! I recommend it

title: De-lish !!!!
review: Loan was a great waitress! And the food was so delicious!! I had edamame, gyoza and teriyaki salmon and my tummy is happy and full!!!

title: Good, but not outstanding
review: Unfortunately, our expectations were not met. With a 4.9 we were really looking forward to very delicious sushi, but it was ok but nothing special. Also the proportions did not fit in our opinion. Two large pieces of salmon in a sushi roll were too much, also the quality of the fish did not convince us.

title: Perfect!
review: You have to try this store!! I had spicy salmon inari and spicy tuna sushi, with Gyoza as a starter and ice cream mochi as a dessert. The food was a 10/10, it tasted very fresh, the Service was very friendly and the atmosphere was also nice. All for a ridiculous price! We are just sad that we only discovered the restaurant on the last day:’)

title: Delicious sushi
review: The food was great ! We ate great: four sushi rolls, gyoza, edamame, water, mochis and all this only for 15€ ! And it tasted very delicious and fresh. Tùng Chi was our attentive waitress :)

title: Sushi in Hue
review: Good quality and good price. They serve very fast. Chi was very friendly and attentive. We leave at about 15€ a couple.

title: Sushi in Hue
review:
Top food and top service.
Sushi was very fresh.
Just what I needed on a hot day in Hue.
Ms Chau was very helpfull and friendly

title: Recommended 100%, great product quality
review:
Very nice treatment and exquisite food.
Recomendable 100%.
Very friendly treatment, prompt Service.
Everything very clean and the genre very good

title: Really good and tasty sushi, super top staff! Congratulations!
review: Well stocked sushi restaurant, the sashimi and sushi rolls are really good and tasty, much better than most of our Italian sushi! Waiters very kind and helpful, they also turned off the air because we were cold! Congratulations Service and top food!! Special mention to Mrs. Chau, thank you again

title: Exceptional
review:
Exceptional cuisine, amazing and cheap dishes, extremely good!
Thank you very much to Chi for his Welcoming and kindness!

title: Delicious sushi and friendly service!
review: We had a great meal here 2 nights in a row! The first evening only sushi and the second evening also some other dishes. Everything was equally delicious! The service is also very friendly and the Mood is good. Recommended!

title: Great restaurant
review:
This restaurant was so good we came for lunch two days running.

The food was very good indeed, some of the sashimi I have had but very good all round.

The staff are very charming and helpful and the place is very clean and welcoming.

Prices are reasonable too.

title: Excellent sushi and Japanese specialties
review: Excellent Japanese restaurant. Fine dishes, tasty makis, all nicely served. Avocado shakes are succulent. Not to mention the moshis for dessert. Service at the top of My Ngoc, smiling and attentive. Very reasonable prices.

title: Top experience
review: The sushi is terrific, the best we had in a long time. The sushi is beautifally plated. The service and Hospitality of Miss Chau and colleagues are outstanding.

title: Great experience
review: We had ngoc as our waiter, and service was amazing. Food was cheap and delicious. Really nice restaurant, and a nice atmosphere.

title: Top restaurant for sushi lovers
review:
Incredible Price quality ratio.
All the sushi tested was very good.
Wide choice.
Nice introductions.
Go ahead with your eyes closed!

title: Sushi in Hue
review: The food is delicious and fresh. The decor is fantastical, other worldly. Chau and Thanh, two Vietnamese angels, always make me feel welcomed and cared for. They even have enough patience to help me with my Vietnamese. Only good experiences, highly recommend.

title: One of the Best Sashimi
review: Waouw the quality of sashimi sushi and maki incredible. Nice place and good service. Excellent price versus quality/service

title: Great selection, super tasty, good service
review: Nice family visit tonight. Girls had maki rolls and some tempura, wife had gyoza and noodles and I had sashimi and a teriyaki set. All very well presented and super tasty. Service was good, if a bit quick.

title: Very tasty food
review: Fantastic food. Lots of choice and very reasonably priced. Family of 4 adults cost around 650 Vietnamese dong. Our server Chau looked after us really well. We will definitely be returning

title: Shinzo sushi
review: The food was amazing. Very relaxing atmosphere and great quality sushi, our waitress Kim Y was very friendly and attentive, would highly recommend!

title: Day in Hue
review: Chau is very friendly host and very good food. Good experience. Nice roles and local wine. Good neighborhood to go out and have a good dinner.

title: Nice and good Japanese restaurant, wide choice. Very pleasant service. Recommended, partly due to reasonable prices.
review: Very friendly service, wide choice and delicious dishes. We shared a bento box and had miso soup and several sushi rolls. Also seaweed and side dishes were tasty. Nice restaurant within walking distance of entertainment area. Low prices.

title: Friendly Sushi Hue
review: Lee Kim Thanh was a excellent hostess. Looked after is was super friendly. Sushi was lovely. Nice cosy atmosphere. Good value

title: Great food, atmosphere and staff.
review: Brilliant food very attentive staff. We were looked after by Ms Thanh who were perfect. Would recommend without hesitation!

title: Excellent food and servuce
review: I came to this restaurant last night and it was so good that I came back for lunch today. Both meals were excellent and the atmosphere and staff were great. Thanks to Loan & Thanh for lunch today.

title: Nice place to eat Sushi
review: We had a really nice sushi dinner. Kim Y did a great job by serving us different kinds of sushis. Great service by her! Only recommendable!

title: Treat Yourself
review: Loan provided us great service of great food. Food was not only delicious but beautifully presented. Totally recommend a meal at Shinzo Sushi.

title: Great place, Amazing food
review:
The food was amazing, really good, Loan have us the best service, I recommended 100%

We order sushi and it was really good

title: Yummy!
review: Yummy!!! On the more expensive side of sushi in Hue but it was absolutely delicious and I’d recommend the food. No problems with the raw fish at all

title: A restaurant to start again
review: We had a little trouble finding at night .They would make the anniversary of the opening 4 years ago and finally they invited us to take a seat and served us delicately.we were the only ones but they were very happy and the meal was excellent .their daughter speaks very good English which helped us well. They gave us the digestive. What a conviviality. Great people.

title: Great.
review: Very nice and friendly service a waitress with little care and above all high quality cuisine

title: Holidays in Vietnam 🇻🇳 superb
review: Superb welcome, delicious local lunch, I highly recommend

title: Tasty!
review: So delicious and the staff were really friendly, highly recommend!

title: Typical and good restaurant
review: Located in a small alley opposite the spatel Amman hotel, this restaurant is really nice. Here you can enjoy a menu allowing you to discover the specialties of the region. The staff is nice and serves it an excellent surprise.

title: Nice composite set menu. Great service.
review: Great service at this family restaurant. Good food. Nice composite set menu. We got tips from guide Theo about this place right next to our hotel Spatell d'Annan. We would like to go here several times!

title: Thank
review: Very good moment..very nice menu . Thank you ❤️

title: Not to be missed!
review: An EXCELLENT meal served by very kind women. I highly recommend you. It's worth a visit.

title: Delicious
review:
Typical cuisine of Hue.
Excellent.
Welcoming staff.

title: Cooked with love
review: Let's find out, the restaurant is hidden in an alley next to the cafe opposite hotel Spatel Annam. But no regrets! Set menu taken: every dish was delicious, very subtle flavors, well matched. Very nice people. You want to eat here every day! Very affordable.

title: A delicious quiet spot.
review: We had the set A menu adapted for my allergies (shellfish) and it was delicious. They made a delicious ginger tea. All together a little yummy oasis.

title: Beautiful discovery
review:
Very nice welcome.
Fine and excellent discovery menu.
This menu has the merit of making us taste dishes that we would not have chosen.
Beautiful address to discover.

title: Quality and taste
review:
On holiday in this city we found this restaurant in TrypAdvisor. The good reviews convinced us to try it.
We were really satisfied, local, friendly and discreet staff and what matters most the proposed menu and 'great... highly recommend it to all the next tourists in the area.

title: Quiet dinner in family restaurant
review: The fig salad is excellent and the aubergines a wonder! Nice address off the beaten track. Things to do if you are visiting Hue ✨

title: Very good restaurant
review: Very good and very nice to do and do again without hesitation. The prices are very correct. We have to find him because at the bottom of an alley.

title: Good quality and better service
review: A quiet place with very attentive service. The food was exquisite. We have a menu of fig salad, roasted vegetables, prawns with coconut sauce and grilled pork. Recommended

title: Have a break from the Citadel at this local restaurant
review:
Close to the Imperial City, Ngo Nho is a great spot to have a break and enjoy some tasty and well priced food.
A good selection on the menu, vegetarian dishes available, juices, soft drinks and alcoholic beverages.
The staff are very welcoming.

title: Delicious and friendly staff
review: The food is exquisite, the staff is friendly, I highly recommend! We took the set menus and what more to say, it was a taste discovery of the most beautiful

title: Authentic Vietnamese food
review:
We went with our guide in Spanish, brought us here and surprised us with an authentic Vietnamese menu. Very rich everything and a way to try new things. Taught us how to make rolls
Very friendly, professional and caring treatment.
It's in a very hidden place..

title: Delicious
review: Excellent cuisine served with a delicious smile away from the hustle and bustle I highly recommend hidden at the bottom of an alley

title: Charm and delights
review: A beautiful discovery, a charming and intimate place, refined cuisine. The staff is very welcoming. Vietnamese cuisine in all these refinements.

title: Nice
review:
Food is generally good. Service not too bad too. Quite enjoy.
Too bad they can’t serve pork due to the incident in Vietnam.

title: Lunch in Hue
review:
Really great food, especially recommend noodles with meat and rice with meat and vegetables, tasty and well prepared.
The location is very nice and cared for, the Service attentive and fast.
A place that is definitely worth trying. Recommended!

title: Delicious food, excellent service
review: Lovely restaurant at the end of the alley. Food and service was excellent, all at a very reasonable price. I had the set menu, as recommended by my server. Highly recommend!

title: Nice address
review: Restaurant at the end of an alley. Charming Welcoming. Quality dishes with local specialties. Very reasonable prices.

title: Not to be missed
review: Right in front of our stage hotel the Spatel d'Annam in Hué, at the end of a small alley yet very uninvolving hides THE restaurant! The lights were off and the door closed when we arrived and we thought it was closed at first, but a young man ran to settle us. We were alone and felt like we were being served like kings by a very friendly young girl. A real treat for the eyes as for the taste buds! Don't hesitate. Excellent choice and advice of our guide.

title: Very nice restaurant next to the imperial city of Hue.
review:
We had lunch at this restaurant after visiting the Imperial City. The restaurant is clean, typical and offers very good Vietnamese cuisine. The team is very attentive and welcoming.
As a bonus a personalized dessert in final bouquet!
The children then tried their hand at the art of Vietnamese dessert, a very good memory.

title: Delicious and delicate
review: We took their menus with several dishes that follow each other just as delicate and delicious. And the staff is very attentive.

title: Not to be missed!
review:
Not to be missed!
At the bottom of an alley that does not pay for a mine, do not stop at this first impression especially!. Lovely family and sincere Welcoming in English understood really as it is not always the case in our experience, and cuisine made as you order everything is fresh and delicious at 'Vietnamese' prices and not touristic which are moreover not always guarantee of quality.

title: One. From our best lunches in Vietnam.
review:
We had a great lunch, everything was really very good and the people are incredibly friendly Special mention to Nhat Quang and Nha Phuong especially smiling 😁☀️🙏🧡
One. From the best lunch we spent in Vietnam, we recommend.

title: Excellent restaurant
review: This was a excellent experience. The people are very nice and welcoming. The dish are various and very good. I hightly recommand you this restaurant. Also there is a surprise at the end for the dessert.
Super! Traditional Vietnamese food, super rich and quality!! Excellent treatment very attentive and affectionate, in fact they made us a very cool detail with dessert! I recommend 100%
They brought us on an excursion and very well, kinder people impossible, good food and dessert truth than a surprise. I recommend it 👍

title: Top!
review: That was excellent! Fresh well presented and a surprise for dessert! the place is at the back of a street and is well air conditioned. The 5 stars is deserved!

title: Fantastic tasty!!!
review: It was a bit hidden, but once inside super cozy, very friendly and fantastic good food! They recommend a menu that was super tasty for little money!!!

title: Very good local restaurant
review:
Small local restaurant exceptional! The staff is super welcoming and charming. The food is excellent (special mention in “Menu Set A”).

I highly recommend you to go!!

title: Delicious food
review:
Ideal for eating traditional Vietnamese food. We tried the daily menu and loved it from start to finish.
The waiters were very attentive and very friendly.
I recommend it 100%

title: Hidden Gem
review: This is a little hidden gem just outside of the Hue Imperial City. Its got great food, excellent service, and the waitress spoke English and was very helpful. We had a fixed set menu. I would highly recommend you order a coffee as they can personalize it (see pics).

title: Friendly place to eat
review:
Very friendly place, very quiet, with air conditioning that refreshes us well. Trang really welcomed us, she was listening.
Menu A was super good! Especially the dish with coconut milk!
I recommend 100%

title: Perfect!
review: All perfect, food, atention! I recommended so much!!! Yogurt is a must! You should taste it. When i come to Hue again, i will come again!!

title: A Hidden Surprise
review: Excellent food, great service, good prices, lovely setting. It’s down an alley you probably wouldn’t walk down if you didn’t know there was a restaurant at the end. Well worth it.

title: A beautiful discovery
review: Great place, peaceful and typical, the meal is Succulent! The service just as exceptional, And personalized dessert, very unexpected 👍

title: Great.
review: We ate very well in Vietnam but this restaurant is in our top because after a week in the north it manages to surprise us with new delicious flavors associated with a service and presentation at the top I recommend

title: Excellent
review: Small family-run restaurant with friendly staff and where you can eat for not too much and where the cuisine is excellent.

title: Excelent local food
review: Amazing local food! Great service by the staff! I will come back in the future because i ate some food for a good price! Thank you so much

title: Delicious food down a hidden alleyway
review:
Delicious food. I chose the set menu and everything was great. The waitress even helped make my rice paper rolls in front of me.

The iced chocolate was also very nice and helped cool me down from the searing temperatures outside.

title: Wonderful Lunch
review: The set menu presented different flavors and cuisine styles. Everything was delicious and service was impeccable. The restaurant is tucked away in an an alley but is quite nice, with inside seating, fans, and AC.

title: We tasted 7 delicious dishes
review: Extraordinarily good!!! Very nice Vietnamese culinary experience, thanks to our guide Win and thanks to Vietnamese horizon

title: A MUST GO - MUST EAT !!!
review:
After visiting the IMPERIAL PALACE- we got here - through a very narrow alley- we found an unexpectedly clean and friendly courtyard with heavenly food.
I strongly recommend !

We had the 6 course lunch for 250.000Vnd (= 9.5 eu per person !)
So refined and nice presentation. Delicate tastes matched all so well !

Al together it took us 40 minutes in a nicely ventilated -spotlessly clean and very calm setting.

A MUST GO !
NOT TO MISS !

title: A lantarn will guide you .
review: Fine menu with a lot of different little dishes. Try it , it's really nice and soft prices . In a hurry ? No waiting time !! On top : a fan will keep you cool .

title: Delicious hidden restaurant
review: A charming place hidden in a small alleyway fine cuisine everything we ate was delicious if you don't stop by.

title: A pure treat
review: Excellent, we feasted from start to finish. Very friendly welcome and very quiet setting. We are delighted with our visit.

title: Excellent discovery
review:
The guide introduces us to this small restaurant at the end of an alley. Very good food with local specialties.
Nice discovery, and surprise for dessert.
Very clean establishment. Very attentive staff.

title: Tastes of Hue at its best!
review: Nice welcome and happiness in this restaurant. Especially coconut milk shrimp and nems with the pieces of pork on stick to make yourself are a pure delight! I highly recommend, do not forget to accompany your meal with herbal tea and everything will be perfect!

title: Must visit if in Hue
review: Lovely food in peaceful setting. We had the set menu which was freshly made and promptly brought. The lady showed us how the food should be eaten.

title: Opt for the perfect 250k dong menu and allow you to discover the typical dishes of the country.
review: The perfect place to recharge in peace, exceptional food and friendly, helpful and professional staff

title: Wonderful Hue food
review: We stumbled across this restaurant late at night after arriving in Hue. We were so impressed with the fresh flavours of the food. The menu has helpful background information on all the food and how to eat the dishes. The staff were attentive. We found the food much better than much more expensive restaurants and returned every night.

title: spring rolls all sticky. Weird and bad nems. Banh loc tasted like tea and not refined.
review: Spring rolls all sticky. Weird and bad nems. Banh loc tasted like tea and not refined. Rice ok with 1 shrimp

title: Authentic flavors in a charming corner
review: Local food is delicious, especially Cha Ram. The welcoming Service made us feel at home. Definitely the most recommended place to try the authentic cuisine of Huế. An unforgettable dining experience for couples.

title: Authentic and delicious
review: A fantastic place to enjoy authentic Hue cuisine in a cozy and clean atmosphere. The fresh spring rolls and tasting tray were exquisite, but the highlight was the refreshing peach, orange and lemongrass tea. Highly recommended for a meal in total relaxation.

title: A hat full of flavors
review: Amazing! During our family trip, we came here almost by accident. How lucky! We found tasty dishes that made us travel even further and a staff so courteous that it seemed fake. This is a highly recommended place, a real hidden gem that you absolutely cannot miss. A real explosion of taste!

title: Taste that makes the whole family fall in love!
review: Dishes full of authentic flavor, from bánh mì to homemade phở. The quality is excellent and the price, very fair. Simple but welcoming Mood, ideal for families. Food made with love and perfect seasoning. We will come back without hesitation!

We absolutely loved our meal at Quán Nón Huế! The charming atmosphere made us feel like we were dining in a local’s cozy home . From bún bò Huế to savory pancakes, the wide variety of Huế specialties was impressive and full of bold, authentic flavors .
Highly recommend for food lover !

title: A tongue-in-cheek encounter at the Dou Sai Restaurant in Hue.
review: In the meandering lanes of Hue, we ran into this treasure restaurant named Doosama! From the mellow bottom of the first bite of Hue beef flour to the refreshing shrapnel of a rice roll, every dish is like a traditional dance on the tip of the tongue. The most stunning is the Vietnamese baguette sandwich - a crispy crust with secret prickly meat and sour and sweet pickles hidden under it, a bite full of layers! The boss was as enthusiastic as an old friend and taught us to dip in authentic fish. Even picky boyfriends boast while eating: 'It's definitely worth it.

title: Authentic & Delicious in Huế
review: A great find! The dishes at Quán Nón are very tasty and authentic. The helpful recommendations of the staff helped us to choose. Perfect for us as a couple to experience the local cuisine. Highly recommended

title: A scent-sational hue experience!
review: The mouth-watering aromas from this place stopped us in our tracks! We couldn't believe the affordable prices, especially after tasting the food. You can tell they use high-quality ingredients in everything. It felt like we stumbled upon a hidden gem, a truly authentic taste of Hue. Sharing a meal here was a simple, yet perfect, moment on our trip.

title: Found on a family vacation! The Hidden Jewel of Hue
review: The food here has a solid taste of fresh, high-quality ingredients, and is truly a real Hue flavor. Banh mi in particular was so delicious that the whole family ate it in no time. It's a pleasant surprise that it's so authentic yet affordable. If you come to Hue, this is the best place to definitely stop!

title: Experience the authentic taste and thrill of Hue's quirky cafeteria!
review: The feeling of not being used to tourists was refreshing on the contrary. Take a break from the warmth of the staff. We try our hand at savory dishes that are a specialty. There were unique regional dishes we had never seen before, and to be honest, we were a little worried about whether they would taste good, but that was the best part of the trip! It was an interesting experience, as if I had been touched a little bit by Hue's daily life.

title: Hue's homey taste, the whole family is satisfied
review: It was nice to see that each family member could choose what they wanted to eat, with a wide variety of Hue specialties. The staff was polite and I was able to spend it comfortably. Banh mi was also delicious. It was a good place to casually enjoy local food.

title: A flavorful detour
review: The food was a great introduction to authentic Huế flavors; you could really taste the fresh ingredients used in their dishes. It’s not a fancy place by any means, but it was a perfect, tasty stop for us while wandering through the city. A real, local experience.

title: A taste of Hue's charm
review: The cozy setting was a nice break from the busy streets. We grabbed some "Banh Beo", and the crispy baguettes were a definite highlight. The fillings were based on well-prepared traditional recipes, giving us a real taste of local flavor. A solid spot for a casual, authentic meal.

title: Perfect
review: The food is superb, the staff are friendly. We had a tasting set - had many traditional vietnamise dishes to try and it came with the instructions on how to eat them. It wasn't just a meal, it was a cultural experience.

title: Hue Flavors 😘
review: Pretty sure we got the true taste of Central Vietnam – the food was distinct. And hey, satisfying portion sizes meant fewer snack demands later! Decent enough for a family feed.

title: A cafeteria in Hue that is affordable and has a good atmosphere
review: I stumbled upon it during my trip to Hue. The atmosphere is lively and charming with locals. The food was very affordable and I was able to taste authentic Hue cuisine. Banh mi is also worth a try. It is nice that even tourists can drop in easily.

title: One of the best Hue cuisine
review: Found this spot exploring Huế. Their Bánh Mì was quite good! Loved the crispy baguettes. A delicious Bánh Mì stop and a simple, memorable dining experience for our couples trip. Worth a look if nearby.

title: Addictive Hue Cuisine
review: I got hooked on Hue food – it's incredibly authentic and addictive. Every dish, like the beef noodle soup or grilled spring rolls, bursts with unforgettable flavor. Hue cuisine is truly exciting and a definite must-try if you get the chance!

title: Amazing & authentic Vietnamese
review: Nina's serves amazing, authentic Vietnamese food – delicious, cheap, and well-presented. Worth the short walk from the city center!

title: Loved this restaurant ♥️
review: We loved Hue dishes and will certainly return. The service was a highlight, with the staff providing wonderful guidance on how to savor the authentic Vietnamese cuisine.

title: Delicious local food 🍲
review:
Great place, great food! The highlight was the warm green coconut custard dessert with a coconut milk custard dip.
Reasonable price and friendly staff.
👍

title: Exceptionally delightful
review:
The service is exemplary, as the staff provides insightful guidance on how to appreciate these authentic Vietnamese dishes.
We are certainly looking forward to returning.

title: A variety of signature Vietnamese dishes.
review: Great spot with delicious food! The highlight was a warm green coconut custard with a coconut milk dip—so good, it reminded me of Malaysian desserts!

title: Friendly staff & delicious local cuisine
review: The restaurant is popular with foreigners, serving delicious food like the little Ram dish and stir-fried mussels with rice paper. The owner and staff are very friendly.

title: Best Hue authentic cuisine in the city
review:
The bún chả had tasty grilled pork patties with fresh rice noodles and herbs. The fresh spring rolls, filled deliciously, were perfectly enhanced by the savory fish sauce.
Highly recommend.

title: Best authentic local cuisine in the city
review: This was the best meal I've had so far! I was thrilled with the delicious flavors and the quick service. The staff was friendly. I'll definitely return—10/10!♥️

title: Authentic Hue cuisine!!!
review:
Affordable, delicious, and incredibly tasty. Take a short walk out of the city center to experience this amazing food.
Loved this restaurant in Hue Vietnam♥️

title: Great authentic Hue cuisine
review: The food was delicious, and the restaurant had a charming atmosphere. The kettle-shaped, triangular spring rolls were really tasty, along with the Bun Bo. ♥️

title: An excellent restaurant offering genuine Vietnamese cuisine.
review: ♥️ The restaurant boasts exquisite decor that creates a visually appealing atmosphere, and it offers a delightful selection of delicious food that is sure to please any palate.

title: ♥️ Loved this restaurant
review: Beautiful restaurant with one of the best banh mi sandwiches I've had. Great vegetarian and vegan options, friendly staff, and a clean atmosphere! 😊

title: Loved this restaurant in Hue Vietnam
review: The restaurant has a lovely atmosphere and appealing food presentation. When in Hue, don't miss Non Hue for local specialties. The friendly staff happily fulfilled my request for extra chili vegetables. 🥰 I rate Kim Hien 10/10 and will definitely return if I visit Hue again!

title: Highly recommend! 👍
review: The bánh bèo was delicate and flavorful, and the bún bò Huế was a hearty delight. The restaurant’s dedication to authenticity and the warm, inviting ambiance made our evening special. We also enjoyed dressing up in traditional attire for photos—it was a unique and memorable experience. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Hue!

title: Hue Cuisine
review: Dining at Nón Huế felt like stepping into Hue's culinary history. The nem lụi was smoky and perfectly paired with its peanut sauce, while the bánh nậm had a delicate balance of flavors. We appreciated the cozy atmosphere and the care put into every dish. A must-visit for anyone exploring Hue's food scene!

title: Culinary poetry in every bite
review: The bánh nậm here is simply outstanding - wrapped in dong leaves with the perfect ratio of rice flour to shrimp filling. While some dishes were slightly pricier than street food, the quality justifies the cost. The restaurant's elegant atmosphere and attention to detail create an authentic dining experience worth every penny.

title: Authentic flavors and charming ambiance
review: Each dish was a work of art, bursting with fresh ingredients and prepared with obvious care. We especially loved the bánh bèo and the nem lui, both bursting with flavor. Don't miss this gem!

title: Recommended for Hue lovers
review: Moon did an excellent job of advising my order, which i duly enjoyed. let alone for that price. they serve traditional Hue food, with surprising spunk.

title: Perfect
review: The Bánh Beo, Banh Ram was so delicate and flavorful, a true taste of Hue. The Pork and Shrimp rolls was delicious. KEN was be kind! The free traditional dress for photos was a fun experience. A must-try for anyone visiting Hue. We will be back!

title: Phuong's kitchen!
review: The Bún Bò Huế was a revelation – so much depth of flavor! We also loved the Bánh Bèo, delicate and delicious. They even had free traditional costumes for photos! Such a memorable experience, a true taste of Hue's soul.

title: We loved our meal at Nón Huế!
review: The Bánh Nậm was so delicate and flavorful, a true taste of Hue. The Nem Ram Hue was crispy and delicious. The free traditional dress for photos was a fun experience. The restaurant's story is so touching, and the food reflects the love and care that goes into it. A must-try for anyone visiting Hue. We will be back!

title: A royal feast in the heart of Hue
review: The bún bò Huế here is absolutely divine - the broth rich with lemongrass and perfectly spiced. What made our experience special was trying on traditional Vietnamese costumes for free photos! The owner, Ms. Phuong, shared fascinating stories about each dish's royal heritage. A must-visit for authentic Hue cuisine.

title: A delicate masterpiece
review: Another highlight of our dining experience at Nón Huế was the exquisite Bánh Nậm. Wrapped in fragrant dong leaves, the soft, silky layer of white rice flour enveloped a savory filling of perfectly seasoned minced shrimp. As we savored each bite, the fresh, earthy aroma of the leaves blended seamlessly with the natural sweetness of the rice and shrimp, creating an unforgettable taste experience that truly captured the essence of Hue's culinary artistry.

title: New location, great food!
review: The restaurant just opened in December on this location. Great food and nicely built floor on top of the restaurant. The food is fresh and authentic for Hue cuisine. We enjoyed it a lot.

title: Great restaurant typical Hue cuisine
review: Very good street restaurant, very good price, very good atmosphere, charming owner, she speaks fluent French.

title: Hue Classic
review: The restaurant is convenient in working around the ancient Hue City.… no fuse but solid introduction into Hue traditional cuisines in unpretentious setting... Relaxing…

title: A Piece of Heart
review: A place found by chance an experience that filled not only our belly but also our heart! Loa is a wonderful person who welcomed us with a sympathy and a beautiful smile. we left here a piece of our heart and we hope to return soon. thanks Loa and her wonderful family.

title: Great.
review: Address recommended by the backpacker 2026/2027: no disappointments! The owner is very friendly and delighted to exchange with us, the food is tasty and special mention for grilled pork!

title: A memorable eating and learning experience in Huet at Lac Thiên restaurant
review: Lunch at Lac Thiên was incredible! The food was incredible and the ladies running the restaurant are incredibly nice and welcoming. Beside serving local food and showing you how to properly eat it, they speaks English, French and other languages… At the Meyer Global Group as we are learning about local Real Estate and meeting global Real Estate experts, we also love to explore great restaurants and meet fantastic business owners…

title: Mega delicious-necessary to go
review:
Mega Delicious Typical Local Food- With Super Likeable Owners

Can we only highly recommend-just great

title: 90 days in vietnam, I could never get enough of this place and the great food. Don’t miss out on this opportunity ever!!
review: The food, service, atmosphere was next to none. Enjoyed tremendousl. I would strongly recommend all tourist to stop in and enjoy the good food.

title: Absolutely best food! Cooked fresh right before you and incredible service. Speaks great English to help with food order
review: Loved this place and the friendly great staff. Clean, friendly and so helpful. I want to try all the dishes on the menu to learn more.

title: Fun food and great people
review: Food amazing! Really lovely family feel and great customer service. The best food restaurant in Hue, make sure you stop for some lunch!

title: Amazing Bun Bo Hue experience in Hue 🌶️
review: Friendly welcome and amazing, fresh food - Bun Bo Hue obviously 🫶 very friendly grand daughter now running things, grand parents rebuilt after 1968 and still going strong 🙏

title: Banh Khoai
review: We ate the banh khoai super fried and very good, very spartan place but so much fun! Don't get confused with the ones next door!

title: Variable Mood
review: We came twice in two days, once at lunch and once in the evening. At lunch the restaurant was crowded and the friendly owner was present. In the evening the restaurant is much less frequented and we did not have the same Mood as the lunch. The pancakes are very good and we advise you to order a beer especially if the owner is present....

title: Excellent cuisine
review:
Quoted in the backpacker guide and well rated in trip advisor we decided to test. NOT DISAPPOINTED!! As described the bahn khoai (30000dg) and bahn nam (35000 dg) in particular are excellent and honor the traditional cuisine of HUE..we feasted! The manager is electric and particularly friendly. She manages very well in French, guides you in the correct way to eat her dishes. Reasonable price and surprise regarding personal bottle openers...(surprise..see use).
Brief to test without hesitation!!

title: Excellent
review: The restaurant where I ate the best in Vietnam among the small local addresses, everything was good, for really cheap extra and with a very friendly welcome. The manager speaks in French, which is all the more warm and offers a homemade souvenir bottle opener. I ate most of my meals there during my stay in Hue.

title: Good food!
review:
Absolutely try the Banh Khoai, it is absolutely delicious.

Warning, it is very crunchy, if you do not hold it down as you cut it up, it may fly away from you. This happened to me but the host was so forgiving.

I write this to let you know you good the food is and how welcoming the hosts are.

title: Couple visit in April 2025
review:
Small restaurant on the street at the entrance to the imperial city of Hue. It doesn't pay a lot, but he's known to all guides. The manager speaks French and is very kind. The local cuisine is delicious.
I recommend it to you.

title: local food
review: Very nice service & good , Cheap fresh Vietnamese food - extra wishes are fulfilled- always happy.

title: Family run, fantastic, friendly place
review: This is a fantastic find. Has been in the family for three generations - great food, amazing value and cheery, welcoming, friendly staff. Should definitely visit.

title: Great find, delicious food, friendly staff
review: What a find, the staff were so friendly and helpful, explaining how to prepare the dishes we had ordered and suggesting others (cheaper but better!) than the one we originally chose. Definitely have the Banh Khaoi and Bang Cuon both delicious

title: Happy food
review: Tasty, tasty, tasty according to owner. She's absolutely right. Always with a smile. Delicious cold beer. An eye for detail. Highly recommended

title: Good and reasonable price! Without the mass of tourists!
review:
Reasonable price with very good nems.
The welcome is super nice! you can even leave a souvenir of your stay on the walls!
For 4 people 2 children and 2 adults 280 Dng .
The boss speaks French which facilitates the explanations of the dishes;)

title: Fantastic find
review: Great find, lovely food. Fantastic host that really makes the place! Would highly recommend a visit if around the Citadel area.

title: Indian Food better than India in Vietnam
review: Every dish was mind blowing. Do try Aalo & Onion Kulcha, Kadai Paneer and Dal Makhani

title: Great food
review: Absolutely fantastic food, friendly staff who can not do enough for you, would recommend it to anyone who visits hue.brilliant.

title: Indian restaurant review
review:
Truly the best chicken tikka butter massala I have ever had.
Staff were friendly, food was delicious. Would recommend.

title: Experience Indian cuisine- my first time!
review:
That was my first time trying Indian food with my Indian friends. To be honest, it was quite spicy—probably because I don't eat much spicy food—and the flavors were very new to me. It was an interesting experience. The atmosphere was nice and quiet when we arrived, and my Indian guests seemed to really enjoy it.
Follow me for more interesting updates!

title: Not good
review:
We had looked at the reviews and went to dinner enthusiastically.
It was very disappointing the taste was so not Indian at all, it was missing from every dish the spices and it tasted like warmed up.
The staff does not understand English, complaint is useless.

title: If you are craving Indian…I highly recommend
review: Sensational, and I’ve eaten at hundreds of Indian Restaurant in the past, and this is as good as any. Banana bread and roti were particularly spectacular, and actually huge. I had the Dahl Tadka and the chicken korma and they were fantastic. One stuffed roti and a stuffed nan VND580k / $AUD26….and I left about half (so the above is the price for two. Very clean/hygenic, great service, waiter spoke perfect English…same standard if you would get in a suburban Indian Restaurant in Australia. Highly recommend if you need a break from magnificent Vietnamese food.

title: Avoid very poor food
review:
Really advise against this Indians very poor food
The popadoms were stale, the curry had no taste
Please don’t waste your money

title: Give this a go the food is fresh and full of flavour with great service too
review: We nearly walked by as the place was deserted but I am so glad we didn’t. The service was fast and friendly and the food is fresh and with deep flavours. We had lamb biryani ( medium spice but with a good lamb flavour) and channa masala (one of my personal favorites- ( with good flavour of onion and tomatoes coming through the slice- and it didn’t disappoint) and cumin rice. Hard to comment on atmosphere when you’re almost the only people in a restaurant but I urge you to give it a go. The food is worthy and great value for money.

title: Good Indian meal
review: Great food, ample portions. Rice would be suitable for 2-3 persons (depends how much you each) naan breads were light and huge. Good value for money

title: Best halal food!
review: The food in this restaurant is succulent, rich, freshly cooked and delicious. We came two nights on the trot. The chilli chicken starter is awesome, the chicken is cooked to perfection and the capsicums and onions have just the right crunch. I would recommend this restaurant to all those curry lovers who enjoy authentic food. Rajesh the host is very friendly and helpful.

title: Great Indian Cuisine
review:
Fantastic authentic Indian cuisine. We went after reviewing on Tripadvisor. We were the only ones in as went early in the evening. The staff were great but their grasp of English is limited. We ordered the mixed starter platter, black lentil dahl and a pineapple rice.

The food came quite quickly and it was all superb. The platter came with a garlic naan which was also good. There was more than enough food for two washed down with Tiger beer.

The total bill came to 580000 Dong which we felt was excellent

title: Conflicting food practices
review:
Food was good and later realised that it is all Hindu Gods and OM logo but had Halal board.

It is conflicting practice. Sanathan practice is different.

People visiting be aware of your beleifs.

title: Veg food as very taste
review: The wonderful place and Restaurant is neat and clean. Has sweets and savoury too.and saff and place are very much activities and atmosphere so many come with there one of the finest and very visibility are currently best location i n the haff of the city entraly cool and very precious...

title: Very nice bar with excellent service
review:
We had an excellent service from Dylan, the view from the rooftop bar is breathtaking, Sunset is amazing!
Very good music, happy hours process.

title: Fantastic views and great drinks!
review: Fantastic views across Hue. We enjoyed drinks here and were served by Dung who was very friendly and helpful. A very enjoyable evening.

title: A charming bar on the highest floor in Hue
review:
Beautiful bar and views of Hue. It's a very comfortable place that allows you to have a great time and enjoy a beautiful view of Hue from any vantage point.

HUY was very attentive to us, very friendly and warm, always with a big smile, and very good service from everyone at the bar.

We thoroughly enjoyed dinner here!

- - -

Very nice bar, beautiful views of Hue, is a very comfortable place that allows you to have a great time and have from any point a nice view of Hue.

HUY was very attentive to us, very friendly and warm, always with a big smile, very good service from everyone at the Bar.

We really enjoyed dining here!

title: 34. Stock 👍
review: Very nice Skybar with open glazing, in the 34th floor. Floor of Melia Hotel. See good drinks and snacks. Recommended.

title: A place for a night in Hue City!
review: This place is great for having dinner with your family or going on a date. The food is well served at a reasonable price, and they offer a spectacular view of the city from above. Our waitress, Nga, was extremely friendly and professional. She gave us some really good recommendations. I will come back here when I have a chance!

title: Authentic cuisine, family atmosphere.
review: Here we tasted delicious Vietnamese specialties, in a warm and family atmosphere. The boss speaks perfect French and will explain the composition of the dishes in detail. Excellent value for money, do not miss this step.

title: A nugget not to be missed!
review:
Take away by our guide, we discovered this nugget!
If you want to eat simple and delicious things this is where you should go!
Fig salad is a delight.
And in addition they make the effort to speak a little French.
Not to be missed!

title: Family restaurant at the bottom of a dead end
review:
Our guide directed us to this restaurant after our hue tours
Friendly restaurant of a few tables away from the bustle
Homemade specialties of fig salad, skewers eaten in rice leaves with pineapple carrots, salad and mint and salted shrimp pancakes that are enjoyed in the same way.
Very simple restaurant for family cooking.

title: Family Bistro with delicious food in Hue
review: We only spent one night in Hue and found ourselves by good luck at the entrance of this somewhat hidden, small and quiet Vietnamese "bistro". It was already late, and we were looking for a restaurant in the area, and Chez Mais immediately won us with the beautiful children’s paintings on the walls that created a warm atmosphere. We happened to be the only customers at the time and the family running the Chez Mais treated us like we were relatives.  The dishes were delicious with generous servings, fully confirming the other high reviews on TripAdvisor. We strongly recommend it!

title: To do again without hesitation in Hue
review:
Very good local restaurant
Few tourists
Typical hue
Hearty menu
Tasty dishes
Service available and friendly

title: Local Food Spot
review: Home cooked food. Friendly people. Quiet spot. Away from the hustle and bustle. Passion fruit surprise at the end. Solid local meal.

title: Excellent on all reports
review: Small family restaurant really charming! Sheltered a little hidden but the kitchen is simple but delicious, with generous portions that are pleasing. The owners are adorable, always smiling, and they even speak a few words in French, which makes the welcome even warmer. An authentic and no-fuss address where you can feast at a very good price. We recommend with your eyes closed! 🍽️✨

title: Great stopover
review: Nice family-run restaurant in the center of Hue. Great food at cheap prices. Super recommended!

title: Family restaurant worth a visit
review:
Small restaurant in an alley serving delicious dishes (ah these eggplants and pancakes!)
Service with a beautiful smile.
Lightweight prices for a remarkable value for money.
A delicious memory

title: The best restaurant of our trip
review:
We eat well in Vietnam... but it is in this discreet but authentic restaurant that we tasted the best flavors of our trip!
Made even more friendly by the Little Girls Service, who take the opportunity to show us their learning of French ❤️🧡💛
With a more than adequate value for money.
We recommend!

title: A must try in Hue
review: Excellent food done by friendly and welcoming family. We tried the combo plate that allows you to get a taste of many things. Not disappointed at all, everything was succulent.

title: Exceptional restaurant!
review:
Family restaurant
Exceptional Welcoming with a smile ,
The meal is hearty and fresh

Serving you in less than 10 minutes is impressive ...
At the end of the meal small surprise ... fruits are offered by the house

Speaks French

title: Excellent meal in small family restaurant
review:
This restaurant was recommended by our guide. We spent a very pleasant time in this small family restaurant in peace at the bottom of a downtown alley, where we could talk in French with the boss. The dishes were delicious and hearty as the Vietnamese know how to do.

I recommend to tourists looking for authenticity!

title: Go ahead without hesitation
review:
The restaurant is in a small alley overlooking one of the lively streets of the city, not easy to find.
Restaurant run by a very charming family, the little girls learn French.
Very friendly, efficient service.
The menu is varied and allows you to taste many Vietnamese and local specialties. The nems are tasty and very crispy.
You're entitled to fruit for dessert.

title: Delicious cuisine of Hue
review: If you are looking for a quiet, family-friendly place to eat Hue specialties, this is the right place. Special mention for fig salad and welcome.

title: Good little restaurant
review:
This restaurant is located in an alley
Pleasant welcome in this family restaurant
Bananas and passion fruit served for dessert

title: Lunch break in Hue
review:
Very nice and conscientious staff, great food with great variety of dishes. Great attention to the customer, fruit and final tea offer!.
Recommended!!

title: Very good address!
review:
Very good small traditional restaurant, located in a quiet dead end in the pedestrian district!
We enjoyed it!

title: Very good restaurant in Hue.
review: An excellent address for breakfast in Hue. Warm welcome and delicious dishes. I would definitely recommend.

title: Excellent
review: Small family restaurant bottom of a dead end. The dishes are excellent and hearty. The smiling welcome and fruit are offered for dessert. I recommend

title: Nice dinner spot
review: Nice little family restaurant. Food was nice, fresh and tasty, we enjoyed the food and atmosphere although it was not very busy.

title: Superb
review: Family place of great quality. Excellent food and friendly and helpful people. Not to be missed in Hue. Unique experience

title: A delicious meal and quiet moment
review: A simple and family address but tasty and fragrant. Don't miss it under any circumstances if you are in Hue very good value for moneyp

title: Very nice little restaurant that serves us specialties of Hue. warm welcome. We speak French often! It's worth it.
review: Nice little restaurant a bit away but in the tourist area. They serve an assortment of Hue specialties. Very friendly!!!

title: Small family restaurant with good original cuisine; very friendly welcome
review: Smiling welcome, charming family, original and very good dishes with bonus some fruits offered for dessert; finally very reasonable price We recommend

title: Very good local cuisine
review:
Very good little restaurant. We had lunch there when we came to Hue.
Very good local cuisine, fresh produce...a delicious meal!
Family restaurant to discover, do not hesitate!

title: A delight
review:
Perfect, a real delight.
Very welcome, authentic dishes full of flavors, all products are fresh
I recommend.

title: We will return without hesitation.
review: Very good restaurant with fine family cuisine and quality. We ate at 14 for lunch at dinner, all are unanimous, it is a treat. Thank you, Corn.

title: Excellent small restaurant
review: Very good, original and cheap .. a beautiful discovery in the old district of Hue. Fig salad and nems are tasty.

title: Max and Elizabeth from Martinique
review:
Great food in pure Vietnamese tradition, atmosphere and family decor as at home.
Welcome and smile at the appointment which does not spoil quite the contrary.
A discovery the fig salad I recommend.

title: A friendly time, like at home
review: A charming little restaurant, with a warm and family atmosphere, discreet. The cuisine served there is delicious, made of quality local cuisine, generously hearty. A place where you feel welcomed as friends. A real good time to fully enjoy.

title: Restaurant top
review:
Small family restaurant at the bottom of a dead end a little away from the noisy restaurants in the city center
Welcome in French by a lovely family
Excellent value for money Vietnamese food
We loved this little unpretentious restaurant

title: Very tasty address
review:
You just have to look for that restaurant.
But he's worth it. Very friendly welcome. A varied card. Discovery menu at the top full of flavors. Very honest prices
We went back several times

title: Family and welcoming restaurant
review: Very good family restaurant and welcoming away from the traffic and noise of the city. Good food typical of this region of Vietnam is eaten there

title: Medium
review: Our 2 dishes were not top (my fried rice very fat I even had the tourista 4 hours later in connection with?...) and expensive in quality ratio price ... otherwise we were offered fruit for dessert it was nice. Clean and quiet place

title: Typical and pleasant restaurant
review: Very nice restaurant, located in a small alley, quiet, not far from the bustle and music of the pedestrian street! Vietnamese specialties delicious, fragrant, unspicy and generous dishes. Nems, shrimp passion fruit sauce, eggplants , banana pancakes .... Excellent

title: Very good restaurant
