review: very good food. This family run restaurant serves home made meals. Fresh and tasty food. The springrolls were very crispy. I highly recommend this place. The owner speaks very good french.

title: Unexpectedly delicious
review:
Highly recommended restaurant in Huế!
The Elegant Restaurant surprised us very positively. The food was freshly prepared, very delicious and typical Vietnamese. We particularly liked the fact that the dishes were nicely arranged and tasted authentic.
The service was friendly and fast. You really feel welcome here as a guest. The price-performance ratio is also very good.
The restaurant is clean and pleasantly decorated – ideal for a relaxed dinner in Huế.
We would definitely come back!

title: Pleasing Pancake.
review: The fried pancake was one of the best things I ate in Vietnam. Light, crunchy and filled with goodies. You can get all different meat and seafood fillings. All the food folks had at my table was great - clay pot with red snapper in particular.

title: So good we went back the next day
review: Excellent food. Excellent service. Highest possible standards. Very resasonable price. Toikets facilites are immaculate. The chef even came out and gave us a demo on how to prep the salad into stunning rose shapes. Nice location as its a bit more laid back. Mimi was fantastic!!

title: Amazing Food, Presentation of food, Service and Décor
review:
I enjoyed the Elegant Restaurant so much I went there twice.

High quality all around. The first evening we were a group of ten and we all enjoyed our meals. All of the food is very good and fresh. I had red snapper both times. Prices are very reasonable. The staff is very professional.

title: Can do Gluten Free
review:
Came here with a group for a dinner.
They were able to manage different diets, food was ok, set menu was reasonable price but others items & drinks expensive.
Mix up with paying the bills and was very slow.

title: Great meal and service
review: Great lunch, great friendly service for a large group. Good choice of menu options and excellent service from Mimi. Highly recommend

title: Great staff
review:
Excellent for families - great place to come for a meal. Great drinks and food - very elegant place to dine! Come and enjoy!

Mini served us - give her a pay rise.

title: Good address full center
review: We ate there twice. It was delicious. I really liked the summer spring rolls, the grilled dumplings around a lemongrass stem and the beef in a small cast iron pan. Very Nice Welcoming and French red wine is very good. I'll be right back.

title: Very good
review: It was all delicious, and waitress Duyen looked after us great. Typical food at a good price and with very good treatment. To repeat!

title: Cheap and delicious food in Hue walking street
review: We visited this restaurant with friends on a Sunday night. The food was very delicious and quite cheap. Quite an extensive menu. Good local beer. Very friendly staff and well positioned. Street performers outside the restaurant. Worth a visit.

title: Great restaurant
review:
Great menu highly recommend
Great staff especially Duyen such a lovely young lady goes out of her way to help the menu and drinks fabulous

title: Elegant Restaurant- Hue
review: Just enjoyed one of the nicest meals since arriving in Vietnam. Honey chicken skewers & chicken 5 spice with a side of garlic boo👼k Choy. Our waiter, Alex was very friendly & tended to making sure our meal was perfect. Thank you, highly recommend 👌👌

title: Good food in a pleasant atmosphere
review: We arrived a bit late for the lunch but the attention was superb and the food as well. We had a very nice time! The waitress Duyen was really kind with us.

title: The name of the Restaurand is chosen correctly. ‘Elegant ‘
review:
We were welcomed by Mi Mi very friendly.
The food is freshly prepared for each guest. We were around satisfied

title: Excellent flavours & good food & service in this pleasant restaurant amidst all the hub bun of Hue
review:
Tasty and delicious food with good service.

We had a variety of Vietnamese dishes in this restaurant, the staff were all very helpful and charming, especially Duyen ( see photo ) & the manager Mimi who has good command of English

After some weeks in Vietnam we found we were craving some more vibrant flavours, as some dishes in other restaurants were becoming bland .. in this restaurant the flavours were excellent.. the chicken skewers were cooked to perfection and the slow roasted pork ribs in bbq sauce were tender & very tasty!! 🤤 the grilled prawns in tamarind sauce were absolutely delicious so tasty, our favourite!!

The alcoholic drink is more expensive than some restaurants. A vodka and Diet Coke (40,000) was 135,000 ( £4.10) and a bottle of dalak wine was double at 399,000 .. whereas last night just around the corner we paid 200,000 a bottle !! A big increase!

However the food was good value on the whole we had 4 dishes £18 ( 620,000) .. 2 vodkas one Diet Coke & one huda beer total bill was 885,000 (£26.90)

title: Exceptional
review: Hannah is caring and attentive to customers. Bravo👏👏👏. I recommend this restaurant, the dishes are excellent, a special mention for honey chicken

title: Wonderful Restaurant
review: Wonderful food and great drinks. Hannah was a fantastic server! If you are in Hue, I would highly recommend stopping in for a great time.

title: Wonderful food
review: I take enjoyed my meals at this restaurant. In fact, I returned the times during my stay in Hue. Mimi was a lovely server who was very attentive to my dietary needs. The food was fantastic.

title: Very good service by Hannah. Excellent food. Very good service. I recommend.
review: Great waitress, very nice. Quick service, very good food, I highly recommend this establishment in a very good neighborhood. Congratulations Hannah.

title: Food at Elegant
review: Elegant is a fine restaurant in the tourist center of Hue. The food is exquisite in a good atmosphere. Mini served us a woman who has the trade in her fingers

title: Not very good
review: We chose this place due to all the great reviews but the food was terrible. The service was good but one of the worst meals we had. We both got prawns, one in lemon butter and 1 lemongrass and chili. The sauce was awful on both. Full of a sticky gelatin like substance. The prawns were ok but tasteless. The sauces tasted nothing like the flavours we ordered. We also had fried rice which was Ok but seriously there is much better food in Hue.

title: Good pit stop in Hue
review: I ordered the tofu rice and cashew nuts. The nuts were just put on top but I assumed they would be roasted. Despite this the flavours were yummy and the portion size was more than enough. The juice was great but a little bit thick so can be quite filling. The location and interior inside was very pretty. The waitress working that day offered us so many options which was helpful in making a decision. Very quick service!

title: Restaurant in the center
review: Small restaurant in the center of hue , here too many dishes are naturally gluten free and fortunately are informed on the subject, we chose 4 typical dishes of very tasty local cuisine, recommended.

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review: Great restaurant in the center of Hue City. We ate some excellent noodles recommended by the very nice Mimi ☺️ for us Italians delicious espresso coffee 😘 recommended

title: Good service but food was bad
review: Service by Peter (smiling, flexible, efficient(was great but food was bad. The location is very close to the noisy bars so it might be convenient if you want to party. I am sure they are much better addresses in the neighbourhoods.

title: Fantastic Food
review: Excellent food and great service. Hannah was brilliant and looked after me whilst I visited Elegant Restaurant. Fantastic food is absolutely delicious.

title: Great place to eat in Hue!
review: Very nice restaurant, the food was delicious and nicely presented with excellent service provided, especially by Hannah. Recommend this restaurant for great Vietnamese food!

title: Delicious food
review:
The local food was really delicious.
We had the Hue pancakes and duck with passion fruit sauce. That is highly recommended.

Hannah can help you further!

title: Tasty food and nice staffs
review: It was really tasty. We had the caramelized chicken and the duck with passion fruit. The staff was really nice. And Hannah serve us well. We recommend this place.

title: Dinner at Elegant restaurant Hue.
review: We stumbled across elegant restaurant tonight while looking for somewhere to eat dinner. Peter was very attentive and helpful and the food was AMAZING ! So fresh and the flavours were wonderful. Thank you.

title: To visit absolutely
review:
Hue Youth Restaurant
Beautiful terrace on the pedestrian street
Superb Mood with Music
Service is efficient and very attentive
The menu is wide, the products are fresh and the kitchen is exquisite

title: Best Restaurant & Bar in Hue!
review:
If you're in Hue Ta Vet is not to be missed.
Very busy, very popular, very friendly, great choice of beers.
We're going to Vietnam for the 4th time in March 2025 and we rate this place as No.1 for food and drinks.
Never miss it when we're in Hue.

title: A spot not to be missed!
review: Excellent small local restaurant, an extraordinary welcome, the boss is adorable, I strongly recommend the noddles, we were 4 we tested different preparations, absolutely delicious! Try BBQ too, good products at a price more than content! An extraordinary atmosphere. If you pass in the area do not miss this spot!

title: Vibrant atmosphere created great memories
review: Great atmosphere, full of locals socialising whilst eating and drinking , street food

title: Great food, friendly people
review: Excellent food, we had crispy pork which was amazing and enough for 2, friendly staff, great atmosphere

title: Great evening in Hue!!!
review:
A great experience! Sitting by the pond watching the sunset. Enjoy good food! What more could you want!?
Sure environment is a bit littered but we are not in Germany in Vietnam! Friendly staff! We will come back!

title: Good restaurant for tasty meal
review: Went there for an evening meal on our first night stay in Hue. Very nice location looking out onto the moat and ramparts of the citadel. Food was fresh, good ingredients and well priced as were the drinks. Staff were very attentive and the owner/manager was very friendly and helpful. Highly recommended.

title: Clear recommendation for travelers!
review: The Quán 36 restaurant is located in perfect storage right on the historic Thuong Tu Gate on the wall of Hue Citadel with beautiful views and relaxed atmosphere. The owner has already welcomed us at lunchtime very friendly and accommodating and catering and so we came back in the evening for the barbecue. The food was excellent. We really enjoyed Christmas Eve among many local guests. If we come back to Hue, we will definitely stop by again. The food was excellent and the staff very attentive. Clear recommendation too, and especially for travelers who want to experience authentic hospitality away from the amusement mile.

title: Best food we ate in central Vietnam
review:
We ended up at local 36 by accident as the restaurant we had planned to go to was closed on the Sunday night. A vibey little place right next to the citadel moat full of locals. The manager was very helpful with the menu, and service generally was excellent.
We had a few different dishes but the stand outs were the Hue Salad, the best thing we had eaten in Vietnam until the Clam Soup came out. It had a level of depth to the broth I have never experienced anywhere else.
Very happy we stumbled upon this place and will certainly be returning next time we’re in Hue

title: Fantastic local restaurant and venue next to the water just outside the city walls.
review: Extremely friendly service with excellent local dishes. The Hue special salad was delicious. The staff will come and mix it at your table. The phò was outstanding and nothing was too much trouble.

title: Good food and good prices
review: Amazing food with very nice view of the citadel. Good prices and very good quality, Huang is running this place like a boss!!!

title: Good recommend
review: First time coming to Hue, the food is delicious, the owner is enthusiastic, the space is airy, should visit and experience

title: Best street food in Hue
review: Great food, Extremly delicious and We had a very warm welcome and the food was great and very good value for money. Hoang was out first and he was the best professional. It so so nice sitting at the river and enjoying the food.

title: Excellent food.
review: The food is really excellent. The location near the Imperial City is very convenient, the seats are very cool and airy.. I will comment for my friend.

title: Great food, great atmosphere
review:
Excellent meal on the banks of the moat surrounding the imperial city.
Very good value, great tastes and cold beer.
Please try this joint, you will not regret it 😋

title: Sincere and friendly!Restaurant 36:))
review: This Is a local restaurant!”lingering”! You come here and you will understand why I say that!Actually,this is really my best friend's restaurant,but that's not why I wrote this review, I live in the world's number 1 country, I like the way my friend serves, I spend money and get annoyed, do you understand what I mean? In this country, you will easily encounter such a thing, but believe me! If you pass by here, please come in and enjoy! Good food is beyond discussion, but let's enjoy my best friend's personality! Won't disappoint you! I forgot a little later, the restaurant owner's name is Hoang,a nice guy!good job my best friend! The restaurant is very busy in the evening, so I recommend you to come here at noon,this restaurant is something very "different"!

title: Delicious food
review: We got dinner here with signature food , good service, price affordable, be back when I visit my home town.( hue) . Recommend Chicken feet ( Chan ga sa tác)

title: Very nice address
review: Excellent break by the water and in the shade after visiting the citadel. Very attentive welcome and very appreciated meal. We recommend it with pleasure.

title: Nice experience.
review:
Various menu at acceptable price
Good location close to the citadel
Friendly service to discover at several.

title: Perfect spot, cold beer
review: After a long day slogging around Hue we stumbled on this place heading back to our hotel. We sat in the shade by the moat, drank cold beer, and were looked after royally. Lovely spot run by wonderful people.

title: Nice restaurant at the river next to the royal city
review: Very nice placed restaurant near to the royal city, very cute atmosphere. Good food, we had a Pho and fried noodles. Nice and friendly owner. Had a good time!

title: Yeah, good!
review:
Small typical riverside restaurant after visiting the citadel
Very nice welcome, and tasty cuisine.

title: Really cute find!
review: Great food, even better service! The waiter brought us out complimentary berries which we’d never tried before - they were delicious. The iced salt coffee is a MUST try, although we couldn’t see it on the menu, ask for it!

title: Wonderful place. Friendly staff. Great food
review: We found ourselves here by chance wandering around town, friendly staff, place by the river and really good food, we ate the snails, delicious, and then typical food including bun and ban mi. Highly recommended

title: Nice and friendly
review: Characteristic local, near the river. Very popular. Friendly staff. EXCELLENT FOOD. We had a great time, the staff is very welcoming.

title: So great!!
review: It was extremly delicious and the owner were so friendly and kind. It so so nice sitting at the river and enjoying the food

title: Good
review:
Very nice and location close to the entrance of the imperial city and very nice staff.
The food is a good deal for the price 😊

title: Great beer and lunch spot!
review: We were passing by from the imperial city and came across this little place for lunch. We had a very warm welcome and the food was great and very good value for money. Great spot to sit and have lunch and a beer by the water as well.

title: Very good restaurant
review: An excellent restaurant, very friendly staff and quick service. We had a great time and highly recommend this place!

title: Cửa Thượng Tứ
review: Place just outside the Imperial City, brings Cửa Thượng Tứ , tables for 2 people under the plants, some on the canal that runs along the city. A nice breeze accompanied us during a break on the midday where the thermometer marked 35 degrees. Tried fried spaghetti with tofu, and fried rice. All great and very kind staff. Very recommended.

title: Best street food
review: The best street food in Hue. Really exceptional. We had the crab and the shrimp and many other things. Hoang was out first and he was the best professional.

title: Very nice and authentic local cuisine
review: Located by the river near a gate of the Imperial City. Nice location, the bun bo boo is excellent! Excellent value for money and friendly welcome.

title: A Beautiful French-Inspired Meal in Vietnam
review:
We walked in around 4 PM on a Monday and ended up having a beautiful meal here. The decor is incredibly ornate and classy—you really feel like you’ve been transported to a restaurant in France. When you sit down, they even light a candle at your table, which adds a really nice touch.

The Vietnamese fusion cocktails were creative and full of flavor, and the service was both attentive and genuinely friendly throughout the meal.

Highly recommend the crab gratin, the ribeye, and the mille-feuille. Everything was excellent.

title: fine french bistro vibe in hue
review: this restaurant was an absolute vibe. my friends and i came here on our last night in Hue a bit impromptu for an early dinner. we were enthralled with the gorgeous interior while we waited for our drinks. the food was delicious and service was really attentive and friendly. the crab gratin was my favorite dish

title: An Awful Experience
review: We chose this restaurant for a very special occasion based on previous reviews on tripadvisor. Our hotel told us that it was a very good restaurant. Yes, the setting was nice, the staff were very lovely and helpful but that was where it all ended for us. The food was awful! My husband chose a set menu and was dished up tasteless food trying to pose as French cuisine, it was anything but. My entree of scallop carpaccio was passable but then I was presented with the main dish i had ordered. It was supposed to be 12 hour cooked lamb shoulder which as anyone knows should be soft and falling off the bone with delicious flavour. It was in fact a lamb shank, too tough to eat sitting in a gravy with some peas and carrots. There was no way i could eat it so I sent it back to the kitchen. Interestingly not one of the meals served up had the slightest aroma or flavour one expects from good french cooking. I then ordered a cheese platter which promised four cheeses, at least that should have been something to look forward to, who can resist french cheese? It was insulting to be served a plate with a few cut pieces of swiss cheese, some cheddar and then some processed cheese slices rolled up! Oh, i almost forgot to mention the strawberry. Honestly, our night was ruined. People around us didn’t seem to have the same opinion, these few people were american and european and i think were guests of the resort in which the restaurant is situated. The accomodation complex looks very nice but is well away from the city centre so I guess it’s convenient to eat there. The manager was apologetic about our terrible experience and we were not charged for my main course, which hadn’t been eaten or for the awful cheese. I felt so bad complaining as it’s not something that comes naturally to me but things really were that bad. My advice to the restaurant would be to get a good chef and create real, quality french food that looks, smells and tastes delicious.

title: Great Calming Lunch in Hue
review: Great food. Fantastic service. Perfect ambiance.

title: ROYALTY PERSONIFIED
review: Great experience, lovely 6 course meal. The Colourful costumes, the ambience and service Nguyen n team were very excellent. Music was so cheerful by the local musicians.

title: Great French dining in Hue
review:
My recent dinner at Le Soleil de Huế in Huế was a truly outstanding experience, offering the perfect combination of excellent food and a wonderful, inviting ambient.
Culinary Excellence
The kitchen delivers classic French dishes with skill and flair. We were particularly impressed with the quality of the soups and main courses:
• Appetizers and Soups: The Fish Soup was rich and flavorful, and the Onion Soup was deeply savory and perfectly executed.
• Mains: The Scallops were cooked perfectly, and the Beef was tender and delicious. We also tried and found the Lamb and Chicken options to be well-prepared and enjoyable.
Every dish we tried was proof of the kitchen's commitment to quality.
Outstanding Service by Thao
What elevated the experience even further was the truly exceptional service. Our server, Thao, was a highlight of the evening, providing excellent, thoughtful recommendations that perfectly matched our preferences. Thao's professionalism, warmth, and knowledge of the menu ensured a smooth and highly enjoyable evening.
Highly Recommended! If you are looking for an elegant French dining experience with superb food and service that goes above and beyond in Huế

title: French restaurant
review:
Authentic French restaurant I really missed French gastronomy.
I really recommend this place as the staff and the service were excellent

title: Beautiful dinner for date night in Hue!
review: We had a fabulous experience at this restaurant! The setting is very pleasant and tastefully decorated. Our dinner was delicious. We ordered a duck dish and a fish dish and both were well-cooked and balanced. The staff was excellent and very accommodating, especially Thuý! We will be recommending this restaurant to family and friends!

title: Water-based cocktails.
review:
The setting is very cool, the music is very good, the waitresses are charming, but the cocktails are tasteless, essentially water-based.
When we send them back, we give you others, just as tasteless with a wide smile🥴

title: Not to be missed!! ♥️🙏
review: Beautiful place ♥️, service to the little care +++, cozy setting , top music, shooter, free fruits . I would definitely recommend ♥️♥️♥️

title: Amazing bun in hue
review: Good location beside the street. Lots of freebies free fruit free water and vegies. Service was great very friendly No wait time and worth every penny

title: An unmissable gem for after dinner in Hue
review: This place tucked away in the narrow streets of Hue is a hidden gem you can't miss. An enchanted forest run by friendly and friendly staff. My friends and I loved spending the evening there with perfect rock music and delicious fruity shots!

title: Whaouuuuuu
review:
Just a stone’s throw from the (too?) busy streets of Hue, I found (thanks to previous reviews) this cocktail-filled haven of pleasure.
+ R’n’R music in background, real cocktails (well dosed!) and an exceptional outdoor setting.
+ If you add a team to it with a little care for you, you will understand why we are going back tonight.
Don’t hesitate to spend a day of your evening or even your entire evening in Hue.

title: Not to be missed
review:
A bar with a warm and trendy atmosphere: stylish decor, perfect music, original cocktails at soft prices. The team is welcoming and passionate, always ready to recommend the glass that will make a difference. A place where you have a great evening... and you necessarily want to come back. 🍸✨
The team speaks a few French words and is great advice!
We are not just customers, we quickly become regulars! Thank you.

title: A fun experience
review:
What a fun couple of hours we spent here... the cocktails and shots kept coming. Staff were friendly and entertaining. Great atmosphere and great music 🎶 Also games to keep you entertained.
Shame it was raining as it would have been great to sit in the garden setting.
Highly recommend 🙂

title: Secret Lounge surprise
review: Happened down this lane way and found Secret Lounge. Service was friendly and generous with a good vibe. We had beautiful cocktails and played Jenga while we chatted. It was a good ending to our night.

title: Great.
review: You have to go out of the busy streets to find this unusual place in a poorly lit street. An Amazing Welcoming by a very nice girl who offered us a shot to share with her before our order. The cocktails (very good) were served with fruit, sweets and board games. The playlist is great (Dylan, the Doors, Manu Chao...) the completely baroque decor (even crossed out) on a terrace transformed into a tropical garden. After settling, we left with two bottles of water kindly offered. A great place and the image of the team.

title: Not just drinks... An experience
review: Wow! This place is an absolute find. The staff are probably the most fun and friendly I've come across on my trip so far, and the entertainment was great. It's a bit pricier than a lot of the clubs in Huế, but it seems you are paying for an experience, rather than "just drinks". Three times the team came over with appetisers, shots, and games for us, and we only ordered 2 drinks. Superb night out. If you want to get off the main street and have some fun, get I. Here :)

title: A bit much if you just want a quiet drink
review:
Looked really cute and cosy so we called in for a quiet drink. Straight away, free shots were thrust upon us with the waitresses shouting 'one, two, three, cheers!'. Only then to discover drinks were 3 times the price of anywhere else. While we tried to enjoy our drinks in peace, the staff presented us with many extras... a fruit platter, sweets, lollies, peanuts, a glass of water, bottles of water and more shots.
Great if you're looking for a lively experience, want to do shots and would appreciate the extras, but avoid if you just want a peaceful, reasonably priced drink.

title: A superb experience in Hue!!!
review: A bar that's just amazing. It's all there. Rock/jazz music. Waiters with little care, hyper attentive and very kind. Free shots and great cocktails!!! As a bonus you will find chess games, American billiards, card games. All in a great courtyard with beautiful decorations. In short a great time!! I recommend this bar with my eyes closed!!!!

title: Hidden gem
review: Called in for a cocktail late afternoon - tucked away down one of the side streets but well worth a visit. Drinks were a bit more expensive but worth it for the experience. Great music and free pool table. The hosts were super friendly and provided welcome fruit and free snacks.

title: Great spot for a chill night out
review: This spot has a great atmosphere, amazing presentation, and the staff is very hospitable and friendly. I came here to play pool and get a drink and I received a free shot, fruit, and water.

title: Fabulous
review:
Lovely place and so hospitable. Made you feel right at home and so welcome. Would definitely come back to visit.

Free shots and fruit which was a nice touch but the real gem are the friendly staff. A great place a well worth a visit.

title: Great ambience with great staff !
review: Great ambience with very nice staff! Welcome shots and fruit were served with the cocktails! Just beautiful , music was great too!

title: Drinks and free shots
review:
Very nice outdoor bar in Hue. Not the cheapest, but definitely worth the money.
Something else 😀.

Absolute recommendation 😁

title: Not to be missed
review:
Cocktail bar, great, great atmosphere.
Barely seated comes a shot to share with the hostess.
A nice menu of nice cocktails and a staff with little care for us to have fun.
I went back every night.

title: Not my scene
review:
We called in for beer after a long day on the moped. The lovely waitress brought us a welcome shot and fruit, which was free, and then produced the drinks menu. When I asked if they had.beer she said 'yes, it's the local beer but it's 100k vnd. You're better off having cocktails' (normally the same beer is 20k-30k a bottle anywhere else)
Feeling obliged to order, we took 2 gin and tonics which came with lollies and sweets!!! I used the toilet and in the middle of the garden I saw a cat chained to a post. It was scrawny and meowing sadly.
Went up.pay and they tried to give me a 'free' bottle of water.

Sorry but this was the worst drinking experience I've ever known. Please release the cat from it's hell- at least we could walk away 😫

title: Tourist Trap - profoundly overpriced.
review: The drinks here are stupidly expensive- a cocktail here cost 250k dong, and a beer was 100k dong. The same drinks can easily be had for 115k and the same beer for 15k to 20k (Huda). The staff are lovely and the setting nice enough (the music is cheesy 70s vibe). A free fruit platter and some banter doesn’t justify paying up to 5 times the going rate. Feels like a tourist trap because it is. Go literally anywhere else nearby and enjoy the same experience for a fraction of the cost.

title: Hue local food
review: Trang, our waitress provides excellent services. She is very pleasant and speaks English well. Food is wonderful and very affordable.

title: Where to try a great Bun Bo, Hue specialty
review:
Don't be fooled by the photos in presentation. The place is not called (anymore) Risotto and does not offer Italian cuisine.
But definitely pay us a visit if you want to eat traditional Vietnamese and above all taste a succulent Bun Bo (rice noodle with meat). Casual venue. Friendly, attentive and prompt service of Trang.

title: 1st Bo Bun
review: The restaurant no longer does Italian specialties, remains the Vietnamese menu. Placed at the beginning of the pedestrian street the area is quieter for dinner. We were kindly referred by QA the waitress to choose the dishes because there is no presentation photo on the menu. It is difficult to really evaluate because it was for us a first attempt at Bo Bun that seemed good to us.

title: Sensationally delicious
review: Rather by chance pure as we wanted to eat authentically, what can I say, we were not disappointed. Very delicious both foods at very good prices (2x food and 2x cola for 170,000). Very nice people on site, absolutely recommended

title: A must try in Huè....
review: Beautiful food.... good English and great value for money. 70000VND ($A 4) for a traditional dish full of flavour....a must try... you won't be disappointed and Trang our waitress was amazing!!!!

title: Delicious, authentic and affordable
review:
Authentic Hue food. Very clean, delicious, side dishes (sslat) was 100% fresh with crisp sprouts, mint and strips of
Banana heart. The fresh lemon shake was also of the best quality and very refreshing. At the end we were even provided with a plate of passion fruit and pineapple. Free on the table. Thank you very much we will come back.

title: Authentic and tasty noodle soup
review: Recommended by our guide as we wanted to try local specialty bún bò huê (beef noodle soup). Basic venue (very low stools 😅) but clean and very friendly. Food was amazing value, tasty and very freshly cooked. Highly recommend

title: Delicious and Authentic!
review: If you’re craving authentic Bún bò Huế, this is the place to go! The broth was rich and flavorful, with just the right amount of spice. The portions were generous, and the beef was tender. I loved how fresh the herbs were. They only accept cash and credit cards, so be prepared, but it’s worth it. Great spot for lunch or dinner!

title: Great Spot for Vietnamese Food
review: The menu here is impressive, and everything I tried was delicious. The soup stood out with its incredible depth of flavor and fresh ingredients. This is a must-visit for anyone who loves Vietnamese cuisine.

title: Hidden Gem for Noodle Lovers
review: This spot is a treasure for anyone who loves noodles. The soup was packed with flavor, and the meat was so tender. Delivery was quick and easy, making it a great option for busy days.

title: The pizza was fantastic!
review: The crust was perfectly crispy yet soft inside, the sauce was rich and flavorful, and the toppings were fresh and delicious. The gooey cheese tied everything together beautifully. A must-try for any pizza lover!

title: Top-Notch Vietnamese Cuisine
review: The food here tastes like it’s made with love and care. The balance of spices in the soup was perfect, and the fresh accompaniments were a great touch. This is my new go-to spot for authentic Vietnamese food.

title: So far, best food in Vietnam
review: We were there with the family, excellent food, very appealing, ambience

title: Amazing food!
review: Wonderful restaurant with delicious food. Very kind staff and quick service. Big portions 😁 Will definitely come again!

title: Excellent local cuisine
review:
Excellent local cuisine with quality products. I tried Kho To (braised cobia fish in clay pot), a real treat! And I was happy to drink a good red wine.
The service is provided by a very friendly youth team. Special mention for Sarah, smiling, very attentive and speaking very good English, thank you to her 🙏🏼
I highly recommend this restaurant!

title: Varied menu clean and good service
review: It was well priced nice location and clean restaurant. Friendly staff. I only ordered simple dishes, stir fry vegetables, sticky rice, field crab soup. Healthy and good value.

title: Simply perfect
review: Excellent, well done food, impeccable service, reasonable price, right portions, and friendly atmosphere

title: Delicious & traditional with a modern twist!
review: Absolutely delicious traditional meal in an elegant setting at a great price! We ordered a set menu containing multiple Hue specialities. Our waitress kindly explained how to eat each dish and answered our questions when we forgot. Service was very good. Highly recommend!

title: Best Hue spot
review: We walked almost by chance into this restaurant near the ancient imperial city. The place is pretty, and offers a wide variety of local dishes. We tried the specialties of Hue's cuisine, and were extremely satisfied. Every dish was delicious, like the waitress who lent herself to explain how to consume the dish "correctly". Value for money more than great for the high quality of food.

title: New
review: Culinary experience for me. Perhaps a little dessert would be welcome? Good experience to repeat. I like it.

title: A very good restaurant in the Imperial City district
review:
Very good restaurant, quiet and close to the Imperial City. The cuisine is excellent, the wine is also. The staff is friendly and attentive. The value for money is very good. I highly recommend it.
Note, no dessert card yet...

title: From front to back happy:)
review: We had a great dinner. Everything tasted delicious, the service was very friendly, the atmosphere beautiful and on top of that we got a free dessert. Besides, it was cheap. Can only recommend!!:)

title: Nice restaurant
review: From front to back a nice experience ! Were nicely received, food was good and cheap and at the end there was a free dessert:)

title: Delicious restaurant
review:
Delicious meals and excellent Service from Sarah! Thank you:)
I recommend this restaurant if you are visiting Hue!

title: We came here after visiting the imperial palace. Great food, fantastic service in English and attention to details. Perf
review: We came here after visiting the imperial palace. Great food, fantastic service in English and attention to details. Perfect to taste regional dishes that you won’t find in other cities!

title: Yummie Food!
review: Delicious food - very flexible concerning the order, as I'm not eating pork. Service super friendly, very helpful and accommodating. 5 stars!

title: Food’s delicious , Must try .
review: Food is delicious, they also offer a craft beer , wine & cocktails, and a lot of food choices , Mexican food, Thai Food, European Food , Italian food and Asian food. However when we ready to order food some of the waitress hardly understand basic English so we use google translator to make it clear . Over all we are happy with the food .

title: A Soothing Escape at The Royal Boutique Hotel with Khoa
review:
I recently attended the tea tasting experience hosted by Khoa.

The setting at the Sunrise Lounge is nothing short of spectacular. It offers an incredible view that perfectly complements the calm atmosphere of the hotel.

As for the tea, it was lovely. I opted for the hot ginger lime tea, which was exactly what I needed it was incredibly soothing for my sore throat.

If you're looking for a relaxing experience with great hospitality and a stunning backdrop, I highly recommend booking a session here!

title: Rooftop experience
review: Khoa and his team were fantastic,we had a great afternoon

title: I'm going to get a rat to bung
review: We have a lot of fun, we have a lot of fun, we have a lot of fun.

title: An extraordinary cocktail at a rooftop bar before dinner
review: Excellent house cocktails created by bartender Khoa 🫶🏼

title: Travel to Vietnam
review:
Highly recommend.
Very hearty and varied meals. Very nice staff available.

title: Appraisal
review: Welcome, good service provided by Khoa. Very friendly.

title: Breakfast
review: Khoa is very Nice and kind. He was very helpfull.

title: Great service
review: Khoa was excellent guide during our breakfast. I don’t eat meat and he explained everything for me.

title: Breakfast in the sunrise lounge
review:
We had breakfast in the sunrise lounge.
Wide variety of dish choices.
It was excellent , and manager Khoa was very pleasant.
Unfortunately there was no specific tag to indicate vegetarian food.

title: Beautiful sunset bar in Hue 🙌🏻
review: Lovely bar in Hue, great cocktails and relaxed vibe watching the sunset. Khao the bar manager was very friendly. Would really recommend for couples.

title: Pleasant rooftop
review: Very nice view, pleasant atmosphere, delicious cocktail, thanks to the waiter Khoa and his team

title: Very friendly bar tender !
review: great local tea and beer with some very tasty ginger to munch on. great rooftop and very friendly bar tender Khoi - thank you !

title: Bar me beautiful Aissicht
review: Very good cocktails and a great view...

title: Sky bar you need to visit
review:
Sunrise Lounge is a must-visit sky bar in Hue, perfectly situated on the 15th floor of the Hotel Thanh Lich. It offers a breathtaking panoramic view of the city that should definitely be on your Hue itinerary.
The atmosphere is wonderfully chilled, featuring relaxing music that isn't too loud, making it the perfect spot to unwind and soak in the scenery. The service is exceptional; staff members Hang and Tam are incredibly kind and attentive, taking the time to help you choose a drink tailored to your taste. Whether you are looking for a quiet evening or a great vantage point of the city, this lounge is a top choice.

title: On a Tour - found a gem
review: Thug and Huyen were excellent and very attentive. Food was very good, delivered quickly and reasonably priced . Overall just great value.

title: Cool rooftop bar in Huė
review:
Very nice location, best view over Huė and service by Hãng 👍😎
Will definitely come back 😊
#########

title: Great views, good cocktails and excellent service
review: We were staying at the hotel for a family trip and decided to check out the sky bar. They put some tables together so we could have a better view of the river and city lights. The bar is on the 13th floor with excellent views. The cocktail list was long, with lots of variety. I had a few martinis and the rest of the party had a mix of beer, sangria and highballs. Roasted peanuts were complimentary and delicious. Our server and bartender Hănor and Phaòng were great

title: Staff is very kind and helpful . Especially, Thuy went over the top to serve at the rooftop. View from the top is good.
review: Staff is very kind and helpful . Especially, Thuy went over the top to serve at the rooftop. View from the top is breathtaking as well.

title: Great experience!
review:
We went here to relax after our day exploring Hue and to try the fruit we bought at the market. Our waitress, Hăng, was really sweet and helped us identify what we bought. She also offered to cut the fruit for us!!
Thank you again Hăng! 🫰

title: Excellent service by Hăng
review:
Excellent service and reasonable prices.

We were staying at the hotel and had bought some fruits at the local market. Luckily we were told we could sit and have a drink while also enjoying the fruit.

Hăng was so helpful! She not only got us a plate and cutlery, she helped clean and cut some of the fruit for us and helped explain the tastes and uses of the different ones. 10/10, very helpful.

title: Great service. Highly recommended!
review: Good view. Good service. Hang, our server, was especially good. She was full of smiles and very patient in explaining to us what was on the menu

title: Great restaurant with a great view, top waiters ( thanks especially to Thuy and Hoai who are form
review: Great restaurant with a great view, top waiters (thanks especially to Thuy and Hoai who are great). Very high quality dishes. Thank you for this wonderful time.

title: Nice experience
review:
Hang was very friendly.
And the Lounge was also very nice and cool. We really recommend the Lounge for drinks and the atmosphere !

title: Great experience, good food
review: Thuy helped us with the order. She was very professional and been careful to our requests and needs. Very nice person, careful and a great personality .

title: Fab experience
review: Ly was very kind and was happy not only to recommend dishes but then show us how to prepare and eat them. She clearly takes pleasure in sharing her culture. Thank you !!

title: A great start to our stay in Hue
review: Ly was very kind and helped us understand and enjoy the local cuisine we had ordered, and made us feel very welcome on our first night in Hue. The food was excellent and spending the evening on the rooftop terrace was a pleasure!

title: Ty was fantastic! Served us so well
review: Fantastic service at the sky bar, Ty was so kind and helpful. Made great cocktails and provided lovely service!!!!!!!!

title: Great meal!
review: Delicious meal! We were at the restaurant a little late for lunch but early for dinner & staff were having a break, but they welcomed us in with no hesitation. Food was delicious with a mix of western & Vietnamese food. I would recommend this restaurant.

title: Service very good and very funny
review: The view is very nice, drink and food so good. Bartender is friendly Khoa and the waitress Truc so helpful......see you next time

title: Great time and cosy place to chill
review: I have great time with my 20 family members at Sky Bar. The service staff are extremely friendly providing good service especially Khoa the bartender. I love the drink Pho that is tasty and unique.

title: Great!
review: Excellent drinks and view of the city, great service by Ty and Trinh. I would especially recommend the blue pea flower tea

title: 10/10 banana milkshake
review: 10/10 banana milkshake, lovely staff, quick service and an overall fantastic stay at the place over a few days, no complaints

title: Good views and good staff
review: I stayed at the hotel and had several cocktails at the sky bar. It has good 360 views of the city and the employees are very attentive and helpful, especially Ms Ty. He helped me with various questions I had about transportation and so on.

title: Amazing view and cocktails
review:
Ty was welcoming and lovely. The cocktails were especially good and the view spectacular. The mojitos are especially good after a long hot day.
We also tried a Cinderella virgin cocktail and a pink lady.

title: Very nice
review: Visiting this rooftop after 6PM is highly recommened. The view was breath-taking and the drinks made by Khoa were excellent.

title: Very nice rooter top
review:
Very nice roof top! Very nice view of Hue!

The staff is very nice, and warm,

Hong will be in care!

title: Best buffet and super good service
review: Best buffet and super good service. Amazing food and so many choices. Recommend to everyone to come Hue please check out this hotel and the bar.Thanks Mr. KHOA, Ms. LY and all crews. ❤️❤️❤️❤️

title: Very nice
review: Great aperitif with great Service of the nice Hong. Beautiful view of the city and beautiful sunset visible from the skybar.

title: Great service and food!
review: Diep was fantastic service and food was great he really looked after us this evening. Highly recommend trying this place out.

title: The sky bar is welcoming
review:
The staff was really lovely. Ty and Ly were very welcoming.
The setting is really nice to have a drink.

title: Night in the skybar of the Royal boutique
review:
Hong attended us perfectly very friendly and pleasant.
We have Tiger beer accompanied by peanuts all very rich and pleasant with spectacular views

title: Amazing Service
review: I spent a wonderful afternoon Tea here at the skybar. Hong did everything to fulfill my wishes and even got me more of the candied ginger to enjoy. Just all around a very delightful service experience!!

title: Dep Qua
review: Great view on a lovely evening. Hong was fantastic and spent time teaching my children vietnamese. They lovely it. Dep Qua.

title: Nice View and good drinks
review: Nice drinks and view over the Hue city. The server Diep and the bartender Khoa ara so friendly, make nice drinks and a amazing service and good price for the drinks

title: Lunch !
review:
Good food and wonderful service from Diep. He always has the smile!
In overall, you will have a great experience with the view.

title: Ms Hong is very good
review: Mrs Hong and Mr Khoa were really kind and the service was great. We had plaesure to be there. It was very friendly! It was great!

title: Very nice
review:
We went up to the hotel terrace to have a beer and were served by Hong, who always had a smile on his face and tried to understand my poor English. She was very kind and friendly.
The terrace is very nice and has good views.

title: One night at Sky Bar
review:
Ms Hong and Ms Phuc were really nice and kind. They are smiley and friendly. We had a very good time at sky bar!
The viens is beautifull

title: Early evening drinks
review:
Early evening drinks and the best attentive service from Phùòng and Hăng, thank you.
Cocktails are A+
Food was delicious and came out quickly

title: Great dinner
review: Great food cooked to perfection and with a good choice between Asian and European food! I appreciated the kindness of the staff especially Khoa!

title: Hong and ty is good
review: Hong and ty were very friendly and looked after me very well. Beautiful location and views. Drinks and food were excellent!

title: Hong is very good
review: Hong is very good. She very nice and do her job very well. Drinks were very, very good. She serves nicely and likes to help people.

title: Bright night
review: Nice place to listen to music, enjoy the rain early in the evening and hear Hong stories plus the attention they pay during our stay in Hue.

title: A night in Hue
review:
We really appreciated the conversations with Miss Hong
the kindness and support of the supervisor Miss Hoang Thi Thuy Hang during dinner and breakfast.
Thanks to the receptionists Miss Thu and Miss Giang, very professionals.
Really good experience.
Thanks

title: A very good time
review:
Great breakfast is very varied
Very good quality
And our waiter khong I wrote it well sorry for him
In any case it was very friendly is available

title: Staff is good
review: Trinh and hang has the best staff members I have ever met the best prices and excellent food so accommodating and knowledgeable

title: Sunrise Loung Bar
review: The place is great, giving an overview of the city, a delicious tea and a big thank you to KHOA for its welcome and friendliness.

title: Staff Hong and Hang were very helpful!
review:
Hong and Hang are very good .
We have had a great time here, everything was great, service was spot on! We would definitely come back again!

title: Dinner
review:
The atmosphere was pleasant. The staff was attentive. The food was very good. I recommend!
Special mention for Ms Ty and Ms Ly!

title: Hong was very nice and the service was perfect!
review: Hong was very nice and the service was perfect! The view is magnificent and the drinks were great. Had several good Chardonnay wines.

title: Very nice welcome
review:
Very nice welcome by KHOA HOA.
He was very friendly and advised us on visits to the city.
We had a great time

title: Service very good.
review: Staff and Khoa very accommodating and friendly. Additional fruit was brought. Very thoughtful. Thanks for everything.

title: khoa was very kind and friendly and the breakfast was various and delicious. Also the town view breakfast room very cosy
review: Khoa was very kind and friendly, the breakfast was various and delicious, fresh fruit on demand included ! The breakfast room with a view on the town lovely!

title: Viaggio Vietnam
review: Good experience good quality and quantity spectacular food view on the 12 floor of a clean hotel and a style with the city!

title: Stay in Vietnam
review: Very good, very welcome khoa very friendly. Stunning view of the city. Good value for money. I recommend this address.

title: Why Not? Hue enjoyable visit
review: After two weeks in SE Asia, we needed something simple and familiar to eat. Even though they have plenty of different types of food, we settled on a cheeseburger and a bbq chicken sandwich with crispy fries. Along with Two cold beers, plus familiar music, and friendly staff, we really enjoyed our visit to the Why Not ?restaurant.

title: Friendly, lovely bar
review:
Stumbled across this little bar just having a wander about.
Efficient service, reasonable priced drinks and free pool.
Visited again the night after, had the Mexican menu which was lovely and very tasty!!
Infact so nice we visited again the following evening. We were welcomed like we were locals. Highly recommend for a nice drink, food and people watch

title: It was good
review: We had the clup sandwich and breakfast buritos. We had fresh orange juice. We liked this place. I'll stop by if I come again.

title: Lovely restaurant & bar
review: Amazing, friendly and attentive staff - service was impeccable. The food was delicious with good size portions. Drinks were fantastic.

title: If you are hungry and nearby
review:
If you are in the area and you want a simple western breakfast, like scrambled eggs on toast, an omelette or even a full English then forget Nook and come here.

Way cheaper, way more satisfying. Very friendly and welcoming staff to boot.

The Mexican food also looked really nice too.

title: Why not, indeed?
review:
Our favourite bar in Hue. Very welcoming, great service, great prices. We dined here twice, the first was unintentional as there was torrential rain. The restaurant area at the back is surprisingly cavernous.
Huda Beer was 25,000 VND 72 pence., G&T 80,000 VND £2.30.

title: Variety of food types
review:
Found this place while looking for a coffee and beer for a chill out. Had a mooch through the menu whilst there and saw a few dishes that took our eye. Having eaten nothing but local food since being in Vietnam, we saw nachos and were tempted! They did not disappoint. SO much toppings on them, really lovely and a welcomed change.

Cute environment. We spotted the breakfast menu and will be nipping back for a breaky too before leaving hue.

title: Worth a visit
review: We found this restaurant whilst exploring the area and went back for lunch. We were not disappointed. The meals were a great price, even the western food was reasonable and the kids loved it. We had a mix of western and Vietnamese food, Beer cocktails mocktails and juice and it was all amazing. We ended up back again for dinner because the kids enjoyed it so much and the price was so reasonable

title: Very nice place with friendly staff
review:
The restaurant where we wanted to have lunch was closed due to Lunar new year, so ended up here by chance. Very nice restaurant and the staff was very friendly.

We had some typical Vietnamese dishes for lunch and it was very tasty and delicious.

title: Very welcoming
review:
We went here for a late lunch on New Year's Eve.
Very welcoming staff, and clearly popular with some regular expats/tourists for its pool tables.
An unusual mix of Vietnamese and Mexican food, and we stuck with the Vietnamese food. My choice (beef) was not great, but seemingly just a bad choice; all other members of the group had excellent food.

title: Great restaurant in Hue
review: A must try while in Hue. Food is amazing with a great selection and a wonderful staff. Try the Mexican, you won’t be disappointed.

title: Outstanding Pho
review: It really doesn’t get any better than this. Opposite the train station, make sure you arrive early enough to enjoy a hearty meal of Pho before you depart Hue

title: Perfect Vietnamese hospitality
review:
Our train was delayed. We have had amazing hospitality, food and drink as well as advice on getting the train and the delays. If you are waiting at Hue train station, please wait and spend your money here.
If you need luggage storage also great for this

title: Great experience. Highly recommend
review: Great experience with the luggage storage. We got off the train and had to figure out where to keep our luggage as we were flying later that day and wanted to go explore the sights (citadel etc). At first we were a bit hesitant. But after reading reviews and meeting mr Pho we went for it. He was super helpful. Told us how much grab ride/taxi should be and gave us an itinerary and what time to be back. When we arrived he was literally sitting in front of the luggage and helped us arrange a car to the airport and make sure we didn't pay too much highly recommend.

title: THE SPOT for Luggage Storage & Coffee Hue Station
review: Looking for luggage storage and a place to regroup after that overnight train to Hue? Look no further than Mr Pho’s. The kindest man, sweetest Vietnamese coffee, and most hassle-free luggage storage I’ve experienced at a train station.

title: Huda beer and Bahn Mi Phoma
review: Top bloke. Beer was cold, food was hot and fresh on a rainy day in Hue waiting for the train. Highly recommended. Thank you Mr Pho

title: Lovely Cafe
review:
We found this little cafe through tripadvisor and what a find
We had some lovely meals and the staff was very friendly
We would recommend this cafe to anyone who visits Hue

title: Recommendation!!!!!!!
review: Incredibly friendly hostess with top selection , great 😋 and that at a fair price. Thank you

title: Delicious and relaxed dinner
review: Super delicious food, great music, enchanting service...unfortunately only discovered on the last day 🥴

title: Easy stop off for lunch or a quick dinner away from the crowds
review: Tasty food, well priced, family run & tucked away. A nice little stop off. Claypot chicken and Hue pancakes very good. Ice cold local Huda beer too.

title: Brilliant service
review:
Brilliant food & service, my daughter is a fussy eater & they were very patient with her.

The smoothie bowls were tasty, the fruit was delicious & fresh & my son had a pancake.

title: Club sandwich top
review: We happened by chance looking for a place for lunch and found a perfect place. It has no air conditioning but enough fans to cool down. We felt like “Western” and had a very good club sandwich and cheeseburger, at very honest prices. The most beautiful thing is the mistress, so kind that she dismissed us with even two bananas to close the meal. If you fancy a sandwich it is the ideal place!!

title: Nice authentic local foods
review:
We are so much enjoyed local foods. The tasted really good.
Thank you for your introduce brother drove private car from Hue to Hoi an.

title: Super sweet hostess and great food
review: This is such a place where you feel right at home! Super sweet hostess who speaks good English and shows interest. The food is delicious and there is plenty of choice for both breakfast, lunch and dinner. Highly recommended.

title: Burger and Vietnamese vegan options available:)
review: Had a Huda beer that was awesome for my taste and a vegan burger. Excellent for my taste! Children walking by and saying hi and waving and I also got a small bag og banana to take with me… good service and prices :)

title: Highly recommend
review: Lovely cafe, great food, and very friendly people. Mellow music and tucked away from the main road. Really enjoyed our meals.

title: Great food. Great tour.
review: Food was really good with great options for a variety of dietary needs. Cafe and restrooms were clean and really well cared for. We also organised a tour through the cafe owner which turned out to be awesome.

title: Try this place!
review: Fantastic service and food. Very happy!! Great conversation with the owner and loved her humour. Make sure you come here!

title: Tasty Bites with a Chill Vibe
review: The food truck offers a unique twist on classic dishes, with bold flavors and fresh ingredients. The service is friendly, but sometimes a bit slow during peak hours. Overall, a great spot for a quick bite!

title: Delicious
review: Delicious. Good value. Good service. Had stir friend chicken. Had vegetables. Had soup. Al good. All delicious. Clean bathroom.

title: Cafe on thu wheels
review: Very nice place to eat. Friendly and good service. We had Pad Thai and it was really good! After diner we booked in the restaurant a trip with driver to the most famous temples in Hue.

title: Lovely breakfast at Cafe on Thu Wheels, would highly recommend!
review: We only had a very light breakfast at Cafe on Thu Wheels (a shake each and a croissant to share). The croissant was the best we’ve tasted in Vietnam! Our shakes were freshly made, very tasty and very reasonably priced. Lots of western or Vietnamese options on the menu. What made it for us was that the service was so lovely, the waitress was really friendly and wanted to sit down and chat with us, which we were very happy to do. Would highly recommend a visit and would return if we were staying longer, wish we’d found CTTW sooner!

title: Exceptional restaurant in the center of Hue
review: The service is exceptional, very friendly and fast, make you feel at home. Very good and varied food. I repeated dinner and breakfast. Very good value for money and very well located in the center of Hue.

title: Good food, service price
review:
Went here twice. Nothing fancy. Simple well cooked,
Delicious food served by friendly staff at a reasonable price. What's not to love?

title: Great place to stop for lunch after the Hai Van Pass
review:
We stopped for lunch here after travelling South to North through the Van Hai Pass and would recommend it as a stop for anyone doing similar.
Their spring rolls were fabulously crispy. We also ordered fried rice and noodles which some in our party found a little bland. However, with both soy sauce and chilli sauce on the tables, everyone could tweak seasonings to their taste. The ginger tea was good and the coffee was the best we have had since HCM. And all with a picturesque view of the lagoon across the street. Bravo!

title: Terrible service
review: The place organization is a mess, the waitresses and waiters don’t know who ordered what, I had to lose the money of my order because they didn’t prepare my coffee before my bus had to leave. Terrible system, please avoid this place

title: Really fantastic!
review: Fantastic restaurant at a good price. We have eaten 5 people for 1,500,000 Vnd and everything was great, especially oysters and cheese. Highly recommended

title: Still good and definitely very fresh…
review: The lagoon is certainly picturesque. We stopped at this lagoon side restaurant with a basic menu but specializing in variations of oysters grown locally. It is Vietnam’s # 1 oyster production area. 8-piece oyster plate was served with a spicy sauce and lemon. Although fresh, it lacked the added bite of salt water as these are grown in fresh water. Still good and definitely very fresh…

title: Tastless oysters
review: I had a plate of oysters and not sure what they did to them but - altough they were fresh - they had no taste at all and as well a rather rubbery feeling. Not at all what it should be. As if they were rinced in water before being served.

title: Delicious food with an informative history lesson
review: Absolutely delicious meal in a beautiful traditional home with a history lesson and lovely service. Very beautiful experience that was greatly enjoyed by all!

title: Higher prices for tourists
review: They have a menu for local people and a different one with higher prices for foreigners.

title: Absolutely fantastic.
review:
Absolutely fantastic food at great pricing even though situated at start of Walking Street.
Great spot. Friendly staff.

title: Worth a visit (or several)
review: Really nice food, I had breaded shrimp and the fried spring rolls but they were really good. Lê my server was lovely and she taught me some extra Vietnamese phrases on top of the standard ones. Nice location too. Definitely recommend!

title: Would recommend
review: Delicious fried rice and great service from Huyen! Nice to sit up high overlooking the hustle and bustle. Would visit again

title: In center
review:
Restaurant and Bar right in the middle of walking street, so you get a good feel of the atmosphere, but also a bit noisy because of that. Large menu, but only half of it is translated to English for some reason! But they have free wifi, so with Google translate you can read it.
Tried a couple of dishes, and they were all delicious.
The prices are reasonable compared to the rest of the street.

title: Good experiencie
review: Really good experience, The place is very beautiful and pleasant, the food is very good and the waiters are very nice, Thy gave us excellent service

title: All very good
review: Very good food in one of the streets of restaurants, they have a lot of variety that includes dishes to share. They run away, the waitress very attentive and friendly.

title: A culinary delight in Baga
review: Great experience. Very good atmosphere while eating, and spectacular food. Very good prices and exceptional treatment from Huyen, our waitress. I recommend 100% try Baga

title: Enjoyed this cafe!
review: The best pumpkin soup ever at BAGA! And great service. When in Hue, make sure to check it out! The staff was also very friendly.

title: Great spot for food and “people watching”
review: Good food, great prices, and great spot to sit at the upstairs patio and absorb in the vibe of the street. Excellent service from My.

title: Yum! 😋 go for it!
review: Great place, everything amazing, from the wow 🤩 food to the beautiful service by Huyen always a smile and a nice advice, great location and very designed place.. go for it!

title: Great food, service and drinks
review: Had an awesome time enjoying a meal and drinks with family and friends during a storm. Sy looked after us all evening and couldn't do enough for us. Thanks so much for a fun evening

title: Without hesitation
review: It was a very nice surprise from start to finish despite the few reviews that there were , great servers , very good music . I recommend

title: Diner in family
review:
We had diner with our 2 kids. Thenfood was Ok and our waiter Hoai was very attentive and kind with us.
Music quite loud but it's the deal in this neighborhood!

title: Beautiful setting in a very lively area
review: We had a great evening at the Baga Bar for dinner in this very lively area, served by Duy who was very caring!

title: Great coffee
review: Great coffee, lovely helpful staff who shared great tips about Hue. Would highly recommend, coming back tonight for food and drink.

title: Good food
review: Good food and nice service. Sy was also very nice. The restaurant lies at an intersection and is easily accessable flr everyone.

title: Good choice
review: Good place for beer on terrace while Vietnamese life passes you by. Fast, extremely friendly service, especially host Sy, but all fine and tasty seafood fried rice.

title: Excellent vibe, friendly staff :)
review:
We went here twice during our stay in Hue… once for beers and snacks on the balcony overlooking the bustling walk street below (great vibes), and once for coffee and a delicious freshly squeezed pineapple juice in the morning. Highly recommend! The staff - especially Le and Hoai - were great.
Super friendly place with a cool aesthetic.

title: Good !
review: Sy was perfect and very professional ! Nice place to go, to drink and eat. Well located in a very trendy place in the heart of the city

title: Delicious food
review: Nice cozy place. And very good food. We had a stir fry dish and that was good. Service nice. Sy a friendly man.

title: The beating heart of Hue nightlife - if you’re hungry
review: A late-night dinner at Baga BBQ in Hue turned into a fun, flavorful end to an outgoing evening. The BBQ meats were delicious, spicy, and full of real Vietnamese taste — no fuss, just great quality. Our waiter Sy was stylish and helpful, and the combo dishes are definitely the way to go.

title: 1/ Nice view and good foods: Asian cusines, Western cuisines, Hot pot, Seafoods,... 2/ Staffs are friendly, and helpful
review:
Sy and the staffs are very helpful! Good foods and nice view!
You can have a fresh draugh beer from this place!
However, there should be a separated area for smokers!

title: Hue at night
review: Sy looked after us. Good selection of beers and yummy dinner. Sy got the fans pointing in our direction. Kept us cool. Would stop in for drinks and feed again.

title: Outstanding
review: Sy was a very kind, friendly and gave me great recommendations on the food, bear and the trip I am doing in Vietnam. The food and the coffee I ordered were delicious and the music and the decoration of the place attacked me to seat. The night walking street is a very pleasant place in Hue. I loved Baga Restaurant!

title: Food and drink
review: Had a lovely few drinks and food here, had the prk skewers and spring rolls our waiter was Sy, and he was very attentive, we would recommend it,

title: Very nice place, great food and friendly service!
review:
This was a very nice place for dinner. Love the design of the restaurant with rough walls and just the bricks taken down to make the upstsirs balcony. Sit upstairs with the wiev of the busy street but a bit away. The food was great! We had very good grilled chicken, the Hue beef noodle soup (delicious!!), sallads and more. The service was great, fast and friendly!
Hoai and Duy gave us the best possible service!

title: Bags Restaurant, Hue
review: The food and service from Le and Hoai were both excellent at this restaurant, we enjoyed our visit and we wish them well for the future.

title: Great Restaurant. Great food. Great service.
review:
Have a lovely night in Baga. Food was delightful. Drinks spot on.
Sy was great and made us very welcome. Highly reccomend.

title: Great seafood, spectacular view!
review: Fantastic restaurant by the sea! Everything fresh on your plate! She called it a "simple lunch", but if this is simple..... Delicious, extensively eaten and then a dip in the aqua blue sea. Great!

title: Unique restaurant right on the beach.
review: Generous size meals in unique location - stilt platforms right over the beach sand. Great for a family or group meal where you can share dishes.

title: Amazing🦞lunch
review: Amazing location right on the beach. So relaxing. Delicious lobster🦞in garlic sauce washed down with a Huda🍺Heaven! Would 109% recommend

title: Lovely relaxed bar.
review: Lovely little bar with very friendly staff. Great selection of drinks. We stuck to the Vietnamese beers, which were very good. Lovely relaxed atmosphere. Well worth a visit to sit and watch the world go by.

title: Good beer great friendly atmosphere
review: Not only great beer selection but wine whisky and cocktails, something for everyone. The service was friendly and helpful and the atmosphere was chilled.

title: Great place
review: Great Beer friendly staff. Loved it

title: Tip top
review:
Excellent service, attentive and the ideal atmosphere!!
I recommend if you want to spend a pleasant evening and taste local beers!!!!!

title: We loved it.
review:
We passed twice during our stay in Hue. One
Nice welcome and good beers to enjoy especially in the big heat! Go ahead!!

title: Great find in Hue
review: Excellent bar, great beer and Vietnamese gin. Lovely bar man, would definitely recommend. A lot of the bars are noisy but this is a lovely quiet bar. Loads of beers on tap, I had the hazy, great

title: Great find in Hue
review: Looking for a craft beer bar in Hue and found this one. Fantastic. Good range of local beers. Visited on both nights we spent in Hue. Particularly like the 7 Bridges beers and also the Vietnamese gin.

title: Great views and food
review: Beautiful scenery and delicious food. Viet gave us very good service and accommodated my peanut allergy

title: Beautiful view of the Perfume River and very good cuisine
review:
Very nice experience at Stella Garden Restaurant. The place is ideally located on the banks of the Rivères des Parfums and offers in the evening a magnificent view of the river illuminated and full of colors.

It is very nice to dine outside, in the garden, right by the water. The atmosphere is really charming and relaxing.

We ate very well and prices remain quite moderate. The servers are particularly kind, attentive and very welcoming.

An address we highly recommend to Hue, if only for the superb setting when dining in the garden in the evening.

title: Lovely evening on Perfume river
review: Perfect location on the river. Pleasant atmosphere and great food. Highly recomended. Viet looked after us. Thank you

title: Lunch by the Water
review:
A Nice Cider near the Water and nice air-conditioned rooms:-)

The menu is really wide and gives pride of place to seafood with a choice of cooking and preparation according to your desires (steam, fries...)

A good point also the price which remains accessible and with fairly generous quantities.

Another faith, still astonishing in Vietnam, none of the staff spoke English that day! Still as incomprehensible especially in a vile tourist as Hue.

The Service is therefore more complicated, hesitant and not very fast. They are smiling and helpful but it limits interactions a lot and creates a lot of confusion.

It is not obvious to eat "Fin" in Hue so rather a good address in the end.

title: Nice newly opened spot on the river
review: Great view over the perfume river, very nice food and good service from Viet. Overall very good value and would come again.

title: Surrounded by elegance and serenity, unforgettable dinner
review: A wonderful discovery in Hue. Cuisine brimming with flavors, colors, and wonderful aromas. The presentation of the dishes was elegant. The staff was exquisite, polite, and courteous. Our waiter, Phuong Trinh, was a true professional. The restaurant is located on the Perfume River.

title: I liked it a lot
review: Very nice and elegant restaurant eccellente food and service. Price Washington ok. Phuong Trinh in particolare Washington verso gentleman and good in all sense.

title: Excellent restaurant in Hue
review: Food is amazing and staff are even nicer! They were so helpful and kind - especially Phuong Trinh!! We tried lots of dishes and were too full to finish them so they packed them up for us to go! Beautiful location as well right on the Perfume River

title: 5 star experience
review: Phuong Trinh and Viet we're amazing! Food is 5 star quality. We really enjoyed our date night here! Very fancy experience.

title: The food was good!
review: The view was great! It was so quiet here, and it’s perfect for dating and family meals. I really like it. If I had a chance, I will comeback

title: a new star in Hue
review: Nice and modern new place, opened a month ago, very nice on an islet of Hue. Large spaces with some acoustic problems. It offers a more refined cuisine with a very rich menu. We had beef with pâté, excellent, squid with tamarind sauce, very good, and an appetizer made with shrimp and pork salad that convinced a little less. Very kind and friendly service, excellent premises for a promising future. To try.

title: Tasty Vietnemse Cusine with a Stunning View
review:
This restaurant is such a gem! It’s located on a small island right by the river, which already makes it feel special. The building itself is beautiful, with a cozy and relaxed vibe that makes you want to stay longer. It’s the perfect spot to escape the hustle and just enjoy some quiet time with amazing food.

The menu offers all kind of Vietnamese dishes ranging from multiple choices of protein to vegetable or rice and noodles, and everything we tried was super fresh and full of flavor. The spring rolls were crispy and delicious, and the Beef with pate sauce was one of the best I’ve had. The meat was fresh and tender, the sauce is rich in flavor. You can tell they really care about the quality of their food.

What made it even better was the view. Sitting by the river, especially during sunset, was such a treat. The combination of great food, friendly service, and the view made it one of the most memorable meals I’ve had in Vietnam. If you’re in the area, definitely check this place out.

title: Fab bar
review: Great bar - fab cocktails and craft beers - also super attentive and caring staff!

title: Classy cosy little bar
review:
A beautiful, intimate bar with live piano – a true hidden gem in Hue

We stumbled across BarLab by accident and are so glad we did. It’s an absolutely beautiful space — cosy, comfortable, and calm, with a grown-up, elegant atmosphere that feels quite rare.

The drinks are excellent and thoughtfully made, the service is warm and attentive without being intrusive, and the live piano was simply gorgeous. It created such a relaxed, uplifting mood — the kind of place where you actually want to sit, listen, talk, and linger.

This is not a loud or touristy bar. It’s refined, welcoming, and quietly special — perfect for couples, conversation, or anyone who appreciates good music and a peaceful evening drink.

We were surprised it wasn’t busier, because it truly deserves more customers. If you’re in Hue and want a quality drink in a beautiful setting, this place is a standout.

Highly recommended.

title: Good cocktails and excellent view
review: Had a few cocktails here after a day of travel and sightseeing. Is an expensive bar compared to most in Vietnam but if you can get a seat overlooking the street below it’s well worth a visit to relax and watch the world (and scooters) go by.

title: Lovely bar to sit and take in the world.
review: Wonderful setting up on the roof bar. Was great to still see all the hustle and bustle below but from a delightfully comfortable angle. Excellent introduction to Vietnams craft beer. Excellent presentation of the cocktails.

title: Cocktail teste of Vietnam
review:
What a nice way to end a lovely day - couple of drinks on the roof top
Great service & delicious cocktails that’s how to enjoy holidays 😊

title: Lovely classy and beautiful bar with great cocktails.
review: Really beautiful bar decorated with stunning chandeliers from Venice and France. Lovely Tiffany lamps. Quite stunning. Also…, really great cocktails. The barman certainly knows his stuff. A lovely classy bar. Highly recommend with a great ambience and comfy chairs. Fabulous music too. Soft jazz vibe.

title: After 5 Take Hits
review: I’ve been to Take 5 times, including once on the 2nd floor and was pretty surprised that the food was fresh and crispy, giving it a good taste of Japanese cuisine. But the next few times when I sat back on the first floor it looked like the quality of the food ingredients was going down. I don’t know why I ordered two parts of the 190-priced Raw Sushi, but the two parts are different, and there’s even roasted octopus and rolled butter in the plate, unlike the previous times I’ve dined here. For salmon and tuna, the meat is cheap and open, so the overall meal is unlike the 2nd and 1st-floor meals, when the 2nd-floor chef uses the previously crisply-cut pieces of flyet as shown in the menu. Too disappointing for the last 2 times, and probably never going to Take again. Either way, I’m thrilled to have a previous experience at it, thanking it for giving it a taste of Japan.

title: The right rice.
review: To Huế, you must definitely try rice and Mâm restaurant is an extremely good choice for visitors. The cooked meat of sour shrimp here is delicious and the traditional standard cannot be mixed into. A culinary experience worth a bowl of rice for remote travelers who want to learn the culture of the region.

title: Dedicated and professional service.
review: The food was delicious and not as hot as I originally imagined. Aromatic, smooth nose rice comes with an enthusiastic, agile service team and always smiling with guests. I will definitely come back many times to enjoy the restaurant’s full menu.

title: Always remember the fish.
review: The taste of home rice here makes me feel very warm in the heart of Huế city. Especially the sour fish cabbage combined with melted shrimp cannon makes me remember forever. This is the best quality food address for families who want to look for refinement and purity in every Vietnamese dish.

title: A little disappointed
review: Our relationship was not the best, compared to other experiences. Perhaps the somewhat cold and detached approach of those who served us did not allow us to grasp the positive aspects noted in other reviews.

title: Very rustic local place, average food, I don't like people smoking near us!!!
review: We visited this place in Hue in early March 2025. The place looked better in pictures than in reality. The place was rustic. The décor looked old and dusty. We tried the fried spring rolls and the Mexican sauce with bread. The second dish was quite hot. Yet, all the food was acceptable. The place was extremely hot, with no air conditioning. Also, I tried the strawberry milk. It was like a milk-and-raspberry cordial with sugar syrup. I had to keep watering it down. This place was popular with locals, which highlighted authentic Vietnamese cuisine. The service was prompt. There are heaps of meal and drink options for vegans, which was great. The place was okay, value for money. It was an average visit, but nothing really outstanding. I did not like that the locals were smoking quite close to where we were eating.

title: Delicious sandwich that you can enjoy sitting on stools
review: Exquisite and crispy sandwich heated at the moment, stuffed with whatever you want. I put mixed salad, pork, fried egg, and slightly spicy dressing.... Great! Very low cost.

title: A very “Hue” experience – warmth from both the people and the food
review:
During my trip to Hue, I unfortunately had a small motorbike accident and needed to fix my helmet. While I was feeling quite stressed, I happened to meet the owner of Ba Bu Banh Mi.
