Even though we were complete strangers, he was incredibly kind and offered to take me around to repair it. We went to several places until it was properly fixed.

While waiting, we talked a lot about traveling, life, Hue, and food. It felt very natural and friendly — a perfect example of how warm and genuine people in Hue can be.

After that, I had the chance to try his banh mi, and honestly, it was really delicious. The bread was crispy, the filling was generous, and the flavors were well balanced — you can truly taste the care put into it. The coffee was also very good, strong and flavorful, just what I needed after a long and tiring day.

Ba Bu is not just a place for great banh mi and coffee — it gave me a memorable and heartwarming experience in Hue. If you are visiting the city, I truly recommend stopping by and giving it a try. You might leave with a great story as well 😊

title: Nam
review: Very small eatery, but you can sit on some plastic stools out front. Really good banh mi, especially their char siu pork. Cheap and very attentive and friendly staff.

title: Good cheap banh mi
review: Very tasty very inexpensive friendly staff recommend for quick meal

title: The best banh mi in hue!
review: I was really craving a good banh mi while in Hue and found this restaurant while searching google. So glad we took a chance on this place as it was so so good. The banh mi they sell are served with fresh ingredients, warm bread and delicious. The owner and staff were also very nice. If you want a legit Banh mi that will leave you very satisfied and full you need to come here!

title: Banh I'm so good!
review: Banh mi delicious, fast, cheap, kind and easy to start in English. Super recommended! They even cut our sandwiches so we could share them without any problems

title: Very good, highly recommend
review: Delicious, very good. Highly recommend. I try with groups of friends for lunch. The first time trying and definitely coming back

title: Exceptional Bang
review: Very good experience, they are very clean and always very smiling. The bread is very crisp and the value for money is very good

title: Delicious roll
review: This roll shop in Hue is fantastic! The place is clean and welcoming, the staff are very friendly, and the food is always fresh and delicious. I highly recommend it for anyone looking for a nice meal.”

title: The best in town
review:
I've been in Việt Nam a long time.
This is the best bánh mì I've had in Việt Nam.
I kid you not.
It's perfect.

I recommend the đam mê (passion) combo, it's filling and damn delicious to boot.

title: Warm fresh delicious Banh Mi in Hue
review:
When you think street food, this was the best Banh Mi we’ve had in Vietnam so far. Crusty warm bread roll, fresh coriander, pickled vegetables and a little chilli. Topped with warm char sui pork. Absolutely delicious.

The friendly staff were great helping us to choose our options for fillings. There is street seating and a view. The restaurant was very clean and tidy.

title: Perfect food. Perfect.
review: A simple menu but food is done perfectly. Best Vietnamese pancake ever. A must visit in Hue.

title: Best Bánh Khoái in hue
review: Food was outstanding. Rice pancakes with crispy egg filled with herbs and salad with pork skewers. So tasty. Brilliant service

title: Small menu great food
review: Great rice pancake with shrimp and pork rice paper rolls- simple and tasty! Good beer also and great to sit on street corner and people watch.

title: Perfect!
review: On the way to Da Nang, we stopped by Lang Co and found this restaurant online. The food was very delicious, the seafood was fresh, and the prices were especially affordable. The dishes were served quickly. We will definitely come back next time.

title: Dinner with lake view
review: We were here for dinner. Top eating ,fish and seafood . Servis and price performance are 100% correct. Anytime again.

title: Hidden gem
review:
This is a hidden gem. It is in an alley way and can be easily missed. We were going to go to Nooks eatery just a little further down but instead decided to try this cafe. It was a little noisy as some building work was going on next door.
There is good selection for breakfast and prices are reasonable.

title: Fabulous and peaceful
review:
Great find, in a very peaceful courtyard away from the hustle and hustle.
I had the Green Papaya salad which was the second spiciest meal I've ever had!
Staff were lovely and you can buy wine by the glass.

title: Very nice establishment and fresh produce
review:
Small terrace a little secluded and shaded very nice.
Great breakfast, fresh produce and very good iced coconut coffee,
I recommend this property without problems 👍

title: A worthwhile restaurant.
review: My family really enjoyed the food here, and the presentation was very appealing. The staff were quite lovely and friendly, Sophia.

title: We'll be back!
review: Nice little restaurant in a quiet courtyard with friendly service and wonderful freshly prepared food. Invites you to linger even afterwards.

title: amazing
review: It was a nice atmosphere, not too expensive, good food and very nice staff. Nha who served us was very quick and was very sociable even chatted and asked tips about Hue. I definitely recommend it!

title: Excellent vegetarian restaurant with delicious food
review:
We both had the yellow curry and it was delicious. What a lovely restaurant with fans to keep you cool. I had a mint iced tea and my husband had some wine which were also great.
The restaurant isn’t on the Main Street but is worth the short walk to the back alleyway (a side road basically). It’s well signposted from the road and was easy to find.
Delicious vegetarian food, enjoy!

title: Quaint Cafe
review: Mingle vegetarian Cafe was a clean, quaint and quiet slice of paradise. Wonderful service, juices and food. Well worth visiting!

title: Great veg lunch option in Hue
review: We went for a quick brunch here before leaving Hue. It is rustic and quite hidden, in a back lane but we are glad we found it. The food was excellent.

title: Hidden Gem
review: This is a cute little restaurant/cafe in a busy part of town. Hidden away this is a gem with great food and good service. Would definitely return.

title: Worst coffee in 4 months travelling
review:
Pretty cafe, pretty flat white but the worst coffee we have had in 4 months of travelling. Bitter and tasted of soap. Walked out after 1 mouthful.
Do your homework before coming here for a coffee, we walked around to Pianolab and coffee 200% better, coffees made by qualified baristas who know coffee.
Mingle needs to put staff thru a qualified barista coffee course if they want customers to stay.
i had moon as a waitress and she was sooo nice! The food was amazing and the atmosphere is so cute with all the plants surroundibg you!

title: Great!!
review:
Great time!!
with a menu at the top, the food is really good and Moon our waitress was taking care
Thanks again!

title: A gem in Hue
review: Very cosy and calm spot, perfect if you want to escape the busy streets of Hue! We were taken care of by Moon who was very kind and made sure that everything was to our pleasing. Our food, fresh Vietnamese rolls and Pad Thai, was excellent too.

title: Best dinner in Hue:)
review: This place is excellent, we had a very pleasent dinner. All the food and drinks are 5* and Moon was very nice to us. Thank you! :)

title: Perfect for a light lunch/Perfect for a light lunch
review:
Very nice cafe-restaurant, with many very tasty vegetarian and vegan options. It is located at the end of a small alley just opposite the Serena Palace Hotel. Very friendly service, the owner Moon is very kind and considerate. Great value for money.

Very nice cafe-restaurant, with lots of very tasty vegetarian and vegan options. It is located at the end of a small alley right in front of the Serena Palace Hotel. The service is very friendly, the owner Moon is very kind and thoughtful. Excellent value for money.

title: Awesome place
review: The place was amazing, a lot of plants, a very cosy place far from the noise of the city , the food was very good and moon the waitress was very friendly

title: Hidden oasis
review:
Very nice ambience with great dishes on the menu.
Moon is a great and friendly waitress.
I'd love to come back.

title: For food lovers
review:
It was such a lovely experience to have dinner here.
Absolutely great and fresh served food and 2% is donated to local charity.
And a special thank to Moon for the perfect service!

title: Amazing vegetarian restaurant
review: I had a really nice dinner at Mingle and Moon is an excellent host. A lovely quiet courtyard in the busy tourist area, just like an oasis. Would definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a place to eat in Hue!

title: Tasty
review: Perfectly located in the heart of the city, with exceptional food and outstanding service. Moon ensured everything went seamlessly. I highly recommend it!

title: Nice lunch in a quiet place
review: The pad Thai was delicious and our waitress Moon was super nice. This restaurant is located in a discreet and quite place. If you want to enjoy a quick vegetarian meal in Hue it's a place to go!

title: Amazing
review: Amazing food!!! So many options and at a good price! Lots of vegetarian and vegan options. A calming atmosphere and good service! Thank you Tam 🫶🏻

title: Perfect spot for great veggie food
review: Great vegetarian food, the mingle bowl was delicious! Moon was our server and she was very attentive, would recommend to all looking for some excellent vegetarian/vegan food in Hue!

title: Good vegetarian place for tourists
review:
Cozy place in a hidden alley, good food and menu, especially suited for tourist, not expensive.
Thanks Moon for the excellent service

title: Good.
review: Super cozy restaurant in Hué with good food and sweet service. We have been several times during our trip.

title: Many vegetarian options in a nice backyard
review: Tasty food and super friendly service by Moon. The restaurant has many vegetarian options and is in a quite backyard. Would recommend for sure 👌

title: Feines Vegetarisches Essen
review: recommended, Moon is very friendly and the food is very good. The restaurant has a nice atmosphere. We will definitely come back.

title: Gladly again
review: The food was very delicious, we had avocado toasts. The orange juice was also very good. Price-wise, it's good too. Our service “Moon” was very friendly.

title: Just coming back.
review: Very delicious breakfast, coffee and juices. Breakfast is available until 5 pm, which we liked very much. Our service Moon was very nice.

title: Must-Do!
review:
Very nice location and brilliant food. Our waiter Moon was so polite!
They have a lot of variety in their food and we enjoyed it a lot.

title: Good food
review: Great food, very tasty, big serves. Drinks cold. Service good. We have been here twice this trip.

title: Rubbish
review: This Richard Harvey again responding to the owners response to my earlier review . No I haven't made a mistake I've been coming to Vietnam many years the give away at your restaurant is there was about four people in it and two of them were just drinking it's probably one the worst meals I've ever had in Nam your staff are wonderful but with no manager contact I really think it's a bad show and any of you people I would check your bill thoroughly at the end. Sorry to be honest.

title: You absolutely must try
review: We had dinner in this restaurant on the advice of our guesthouse all simply delicious and presented with care. The guy who runs the place carefully explained how to best enjoy the delicious local specialties. Everything I tried was incredibly delicious.

title: Delicious local food, large atmosphere, open airupstair
review: Local restaurant is located in crowded foreign street. The fresh and tasty food, warmly atmosphere, friendly hostess service. See you next time.

title: MUST TRY
review: Lovely food and amazing staff I had to come twice in a day it was so good, the prices were very reasonable and I would 120% recommend

title: Food in Hue
review: We arrived in Hue from Hanoi and wanted to sample local cuisine and this was the perfect spot. We had a number of dishes to share all typical of this area. Each dish explained by our host and the spice added as required, so hot by choice. Overall amazing food. The local beer was on tap so a proper pint.

title: Dinner time at Thi’sKitchen Aug 2025
review:
Food was very tasty , we sat upstairs and watched the world go by . Was a lot of fun
Duck skewers and chicken skewers an absolute hit . Recommend

title: Nice and cheap Vietnamese restaurant
review: Great and inexpensive food. Good and attentive Service. Eaten on the first floor on terrace with view. Highly recommended! We'll be back!

title: Excellent Food in Hue
review:
We discovered this place by surprise and the food and services were excellent!! The iced coffee was delicious and the pho, the beef and chicken banh were excellent!

Highly recommended to come when you are in Hue!!

title: We stayed in Hue for two days and loved this restaurant so much we visited it three times. Thank you. Helen and Nigel
review: We visited Hue a few days ago and were recommended this restaurant by Hue Sweethouse Homestay. We were not disappointed, Thi’s is a fantastic restaurant. The quality of the food was absolutely superb, cooked on the spot for us and totally fresh. The ingredients used were first class and everything was perfectly seasoned. We can particularly recommend the bamboo skewers and had prawns, squid and duck. It was all totally delicious and there was also a choice of quality wine, as well as local draught beer. We would highly recommend this family run restaurant.

title: A 10 out 10 for fresh sashimi!!
review:
What a wonderful surprise to find a great spot for fresh tasty Japanese sashimi and sushi in Hue. We live in Vancouver, Canada and know our Japanese food pretty well from travel to Japan and our local Japanese restaurants. Kyodai in Hue had exceeded all of our expectations for fresh sashimi in Vietnam. We know Vietnam is great for seafood but hadn’t ventured to a Japanese place over the past three weeks of Vietnam travel here. This was picked on random and could have been a big mistake. It wasn’t!!
We ordered one of their Sushi Platters to start that had a variety of sashimi fish on top that was all fresh, firm texture and tasty, their Tempura Prawns were really big prawn pieces and came with a lovely deep fried tempura batter, the Agadashi Tofu came as expected with a creamy soft tofu texture and the last Tobiko fresh fish small roe dish was crunchy and tasty. All in all, 10 out of 10. We’ll return for a repeat before we leave town in two days!!

review:

review: Very nice place with great food and care. Staff Ngan and Vananh looked after us very well we definitely recommend this place

review: Delicious and plentiful , variety and very good service

review:
Extraordinary room! Very attentive and smiling staff. Breakfast with great choice and delicious!
Attention for my birthday at breakfast, cupcake and little gift! Van particularly nice and smiling!

review: Comfortable hotel, very nice welcome and very attentive and friendly staff. Special thought for Van!

title: Friendly Staff
review: The restaurant is clean and airy, and the varied buffet options include both hot and cold cafes. The staff was funny and the waitstaff was cute. They’re coming next night.

title: Very good breakfast buffet
review:
Very nice and varied and tasty breakfast buffet.
Great bright and nice local, very clean and nice.
Can also sit and eat on the balcony overlooking the street.
Recommended.

title: Would come back anytime...
review: Absolutely the best breakfast in Vietnam. A multifakr of food, incredible. Plus this very nice and helpful staff. A day can't start better.....

title: New buffet breakfast restaurnt
review: Located in Than Lich hotel. Great breakfast buffet very complete. Selection of noodles soups, rice dishes, bread and fruits.

title: Must try absolutely!!!
review: Restaurant off the tourist route so more "true" and genuine. The menu includes only 4 typical dishes all exceptional. The “nem lui” the roasted meat rolls that have to be rolled on the spot with rice paper, vegetables and a tasty sauce are delicious! Fast Service and cheap expense. Must try absolutely!

title: Super yummy lunch
review: Amazing food had lunch here with a new friend. So fresh and yummy can’t say how much I enjoyed my meal here. Simple dishes that are out of this world

title: Wonderful first dining experience in Hue!
review: It was our family’s first time visiting Hue, and we chose this restaurant based on our tour guide’s recommendation. The food was absolutely delicious, especially the fish soup – a must-try! The dishes were served very quickly, and everything was fresh and flavorful. Truly a wonderful experience

title: Run!
review: We asked a taxi driver to take us to a good restaurant. It was a disaster. Not a huge card: 2 people choose grilled salmon. "Sorry, we're out of it. We offer orange salmon...." ????? So everything is frozen or what?? Plus it was gross; undercooked. Wine by the glass: sorry we don't have any more!...??? Unsalted, warm,... tasteless dishes. In disaster! The worst restaurant I've ever eaten in! Run away!!!

title: Evening meal
review: Friendly family restaurant which is good value. Out of season now so wasn’t prepared for visitors and had to rustle up an evening meal at short notice. Very noisy as on main road . Ok for a stop but not recommended for a relaxed evening out!

title: Hidden gem for veggie lovers
review: Lovely hidden gem just outside the city center. Good vegetarian food. We tried many dishes and loved them all. Recommend to go here when you love vegetarian food

title: Exquisite service
review: We loved the Vietnamese food at the Water Court, but even more the lovely staff Ms Dieu and Ms Dung who were so enthusiastic and such exquisite service that we went back 3 days in a row. Truly a heartwarming experience and cannot wait to be back again.

title: Fantastic food
review:
We came here on the recommendation of our tour guide for an evening meal. We had the set menu and didn't quite expect the art-work of food we were about to experience - the menu photo I've uploaded gives an outline of what we had, alongside photos of the different dishes.

As well as looking amazing, they also tasted great - we were all very full by the end. Definitely recommended for somewhere different and a unique experience.

title: Traditional Vietnamese plentiful food
review: Beautiful sight, excellent Vietnamese restaurant. Love the staff! Clean and traditional Vietnamese cuisine... Catered to all even gluten free.

title: Lunch snack and more
review: Good food especially the fig salad is very good. Friendly and fast service and very fair prices for food + drink

title: Not so great....
review: We ended up at this restaurant the day we arrived in Hue and were a bit tired to be walking around. The service was not very good – they were running around even though there were not that many guests. We ordered 2 courses and something to drink. We only received one course and after at having waited for a while we asked about the other course, but the waitress had only noted down one course and we decided not to wait for them to make the one course. Overall, not a great experience.

title: Exceptional food and ambiance in Hue.
review: This was an exceptional evening spent at An Phu Garden in Hue. Presentation, flavour and ambience were in abundance. A must visit when in Hue. Can't be long before Michelin calls.

title: A MUST VISIT FOR FOODIES
review: Wow! Not only is the restaurant itself the previous home of a royal family, the food is fantastic. The depth of flavor is beyond typical vietnamese fair from much of the country. The food was fresh and beautifully sculptured with attractive vegetables as ducks and dragons. This is a MUST visit in Hue.

title: A must try restaurant in Hue
review: We walked passed this restaurant and decided to try. It was amazing. Beautiful garden, inlaid pearl tables. Best meal I have had in Vietnam. Service was outstanding. Every plate was beautifully presented. There was a depth of flavor that made every dish delicious. Fresh veggies, crunchy noodles, tender duck. The owner helped us find the perfect dishes. Wine, appetizer, meals were all delicious. Amazing value for the atmosphere and quality of the evening.

title: Definitely recommended
review: We were two in the restaurant today on the recommendation of our guide and the recommendation has been confirmed 100%. Although we only consumed one small thing, we additionally received a fruit plate.The food was extremely good and very nicely decorated. The service was extremely friendly and accommodating and the prices were very reasonable.

title: Highly recommend
review: Great food, friendly service and beautiful traditional setting. Highly recommend for local and foreign travellers!

title: Setting, food, presentation and service. An Phu Garden has it all!
review: First the restaurant setting is exquisite. Beautifully carved wood, inlaid with mother of pearl in the old Vietnamese/ Chinese style. The squash soup with ice cream was rich and luxurious. The presentation of each dish made for a fun meal and the wish you didn’t need to destroy the creations. Finally the service was personal, warm and friendly. If you are in Hue put this gem on your must go list!

title: Excellent food and service.
review: Lovely restaurant, excellent service by friendly staff and the seafood and vegetarian options were beautifully presented and delicious 😋

title: Perfect Vietnamese dinner.
review: Excellent traditional Vietnamese meal. Very welcome and very good service. The staff is very considerate and friendly.

title: Amazing!!
review: A real experience with loving operation, incredible decoration, originality and variety! Anytime again!

title: Local restaurant
review: We arrived late at night and went there specifically to try local produce. The food was tasty and staff helpful. Ate banh beo & banh ram it.

title: Loved it

title: Keep the momentum
review: Good, perfect cultural experiences

title: Hueritage Cruise
review: Everything is perfect. Highly recommend!!!

title: Good location. Good restaurant
review: good service, Ms Nhàn takes care us super good, The food also taste delicious. I will come back again and suggest it to my friends

title: Lovely experience with great service
review: Wonderful experience with amazing food and outstanding service beautiful scenery and reasonable pricing for our experience 10/10 recommend

title: Amazing experience
review: You can enjoy delicious cuisine with stunning views aboard a Hue Heritage cruise along the beautiful Huong (Perfume) River, while taking in panoramic sights of the city on both riverbanks.

title: A Magical Evening on the Perfume River
review:
Dinner on the Hueritage boat was one of my favorite experiences in Hue. The boat itself is beautiful, with so many little details and the artwork that make it feel special the moment you step on. Cruising slowly along the Perfume River while eating made everything feel calm and a bit magical.

The host taled first in Vietnamese and then in English, which I really appreciated. The food was a real highlight too. The dishes were full of flavor and a little different from anything I’d tried before, and everything tasted so fresh. It was the kind of meal where you just want to take your time and enjoy every bite.

The live music made the night even better. Sitting there with the river views, the lights reflecting on the water, and traditional songs playing in the background was just perfect. It’s an experience I’d tell anyone visiting Hue to try.

title: stunning boat and the view
review: I have been on a boat in Hue couple times but this one is different. Starting with the port I was surprised with their location. I think they have the best spot in the river. Walking to the boat it was stunning not only the outside but the interior and decoration inside the boat was incredible. We love it so much it was perfect for our family dinner. Definitely recommend to anyone who wanna experience boating along the perfume river.

title: You must go!
review: Such a great experience! Beautiful cats that are SO well treated and the staff are amazing to us humans too! Highly recommend!

title: sooo cozyyyy, didn’t expect to stay this longgg
review: just visited Mocha Cat Café and omg the vibe is soooo chilllll 🥺 like you walk in and the cats are just wandering around like “yeah this is our placeee” 😭 there are like 17 of them and every single one is cuteee, the space is warm and quiet so it’s super easy to just sit and relax. I got attached to Long immediately =))) he’s sooo chill, just lying there vibing and minding his own business 😭 while Tet-chan is the total opposite, super clingyyyy and keeps coming over for pets 🥺 literally the cutest combo everrr. I only planned to stop by for a quick drink but ended up staying way longer just playing with the cats 😭 if you’re in Huế and need a soft, cozy spot to unwind… this is definitely the placeee

Ultra reasonable price with delicious drinks...

title: superb experience

review: An memorable trip ! Cats so beautiful and adorable . Drinks is unlimitied you can drink anything you want. Staff always take care guest and make me happy by their love for cats. Love Mocha so much

title: A Purr-fect Oasis Inside Aeon Mall
review: I recently visited Cat Cafe Mocha during my trip to Hue, and it exceeded all my expectations! As a premium Japanese chain, their standards for cleanliness and animal welfare are top-notch. The wooden interior is incredibly cozy and aesthetic, creating a peaceful escape from the busy mall. The cats are healthy, fluffy, and have plenty of high spaces to rest if they want to. Plus, there is absolutely zero pet odor! The drinks were beautifully crafted and delicious. Highly recommend this spot for anyone looking to unwind for a couple of hours

title: Nice experience with lovely cats

If you’re in Huế and need a soft, relaxing spot… this is it fr

A little slice of Japan in Vietnam
"The wooden interior is so relaxing and aesthetic. The drinks are surprisingly tasty for a pet cafe, and the staff is super polite. Loved watching the cats play with their toys. Great vibe to chill for an hour or two

review: We greatly enjoyed our lunch here. We were greeted warmly and asked for something other than a menu that had been pre-ordered for us by our tour. Our host/owner graciously agreed and prepared some Hue specialties for us including the famous steamed rice cakes (Banh Beo). A lovely and peaceful oasis to enjoy a delicious lunch.

title: Good
review: Service was fine, food was fine, prices are fine, that’s pretty much it about it, nothing too special. It’s a decent place for some food.

title: Happily surprised
review: The food and service were on point as well as the price nice atmosphere would recommend will absolutely be returning to this venue

title: A good place to eat.
review: This restaurant served fresh, tasty food. We had the vegetable and shrimp rolls, which were delicious. The service was excellent, and the beer was cold.

title: Excellent!
review: We had a great time thanks to the waitresses who were very kind, all the dishes we tasted were delicious, so much so that we came back. Thank you very much!

title: What a taste journey!!
review: What a discovery!!! We took a set of starters local cuisine (booe). The chef works plants from his “tropical garden”, the room staff - Mrs Vy - introduces us to the garden and the plants used. To do when the crowds at the restaurant allow. Great customer experience - travel in flavors.

title: Evenings at the tropical garden restaurant in Hue.
review: Slightly removed from the main street, a very nice welcome and very fresh local cuisine. We had dinner there two nights in a row. The second evening we were offered a delicious ginger and honey tea. These two evenings will remain in our memories of our trip to Vietnam. These places still exist.

title: Very nice restaurant
review: We ate a very delicious menu for lunch here. The atmosphere was very nice, the food was versatile and very delicious and the staff very friendly and accommodating. Highly recommended!

title: All right.
review: Burritos are fabulous, well seasoned, burgers are perfect in quantity, quality and flavor. The manager is very friendly.

title: Good western food fix in a great location!
review: After a few weeks of eating local food, our kids were ready for something more familiar and we were glad to find this place! Becoming a pedestrianised street in the weekend evenings, we enjoyed sitting upstairs and people watching below as we enjoyed our dinner. The burgers were tasty, a good size and a reasonable price. The chips were a little light on, but the service was good and we were happy to have found it!

title: Dinner with family
review: Cozy place with great burgers and nice atmosphere. Very nice staff! Higly recommended if you want a little break from vietnamise food.

title: Nice place to eat!
review:
Amazing Burgers and Draft Beer in the Heart of Hue

Ngon Burger is hands down the best burger spot in Hue when it comes to both quality and price. The ingredients are fresh, the flavors are spot on, and each burger feels carefully crafted—not something you find everywhere. Whether you’re into the classics or want to try something a bit more unique, there’s something on the menu for everyone.

What really sets Ngon Burger apart, though, is the fact that they serve draft beer—something surprisingly rare in Hue. It’s the perfect pairing with their delicious burgers and adds to the laid-back, welcoming vibe of the place.

If you’re in Hue and craving a great burger (and a cold beer to go with it), Ngon Burger should be your first stop. Highly recommended!

title: Fantastic!
review: Food was excellent. Freshly prepared and so tasty. Great service and the staff were super friendly. Highly recommended

title: Good
review: The hamburgers are delicious, the menu is extensive and it's located on a busy street, the beer is good but a bit expensive compared to the nearby shops.

The service was fast.
We recommend this restaurant

title: Lunch.
review: We ate at this restaurant near the mausoleum and I must say very nice local and also really good food. A pleasant surprise.

title: Quite built and tourist stop
review: Near the tomb of King Tu Duc, nice very large room, in a modern style setting where guides and coaches take their customers. Relaxing environment with a beautiful garden, waterfalls and water features, various outdoor patios and indoor tables. The menu is obviously traditional and the choice is wide facilitated by the usual photo menu. It is good for a group lunch or a quick stop, to relax and refresh even if you stay away from Vietnamese genuineness. A very tourist stop.

title: LOCAL FOOD IN BEAUTIFUL SURROUNDINGS
review:
We had food included in this restaurant as part of our Vietnam tour. The place has a dining room but we assigned a table on the terrace next to the ponds enjoying a quiet and very pleasant Mood.
The food was very good.

title: Beautiful environment
review: Beautiful environment, touristy and not, with typical Vietnamese cuisine and also with French implications. Well spaced tables, air-conditioned environment with fast, kind and courteous service. A good choice.

title: Excellent food, nice ambiance
review: We were with 8 people and they were so quick to arrange a round table for us. Various different dishes and everyone was happy with their food. That is what you are looking for! And be honest at very acceptable prices

title: Such a good Japanese!
review: Such a hidden gem, with delicious food and big range of Japanese foods to choose from. Also super affordable and great ambience and beautiful scenery.
Can definitely be recommended - very delicious food and super service. I will visit the place again next time I visit Hue ....hopefully soon

title: Delicious Japanese
review: Amazing Japanese food in a beautiful atmosphere! Highly recommend this restaurant with so many food options available.

title: Highly recommend!
review: A very nice vibe at this restaurant. Very courteous staff. Nice variety of Japanese dishes. We ordered 8 things and the bill was about $20. Our favorite was the salmon belly - delicious. The server made an error and gave us sashimi instead of nigiri for two dishes (more expensive) but since the cost overall was so reasonable, we didn’t complain.

title: Good food and good service.
review:
Walking around looking g for a place to eat, saw Gem.
T0 make it quick, I looked at the menu and is a nice menu. Ordered edemame and spicy tuna roll. Was impressed. Ordered another one. I really enjoyed it.
The waitress was very pleasant, very quick to take my ordered and very polite. This was yesterday, today I went back and had a shrimp and salmon roll which was delicious. Also had a soft shell crab roll, which pleased my stomach. To drink I had water and all of this for $10.00. The atmosphere was nice considering the restaurant is not too big.
The only drawback was the location. It is located in Nguyễn Hue street ( the walking ) full of bars and loud music. However, the food made up for it.

title: Good restaurant bun bo hue
review:
The restaurant had been recommended to us by a guide and from our limited bun bo boo experience, it was a good recommendation.
The soup is good (although spicy for those who would struggle) and the price, without being level with the ground, is correct.

title: Great local spot for a genuine local feed!
review: Recommended to us by locals, just around corner from our hotel, and it was delicious. Very casual, very quick service, plenty of locals eating in or popping in to pick up takeaway. For three people with several beers dinner came to around 400K Dong so very reasonable and absolutely filling.

title: Best Kombucha made in this class!
review: Our family went to a Kombucha class at the Rice Bar. Our teacher was very friendly and walked us through each step on how to make excellent drinks, much better than those we drink from the bottle. It was an excellent experience. Highly recommend!

title: A pleasant evening
review: The restaurant is beautiful, with traditional architecture inspired by the fishing villages of Huế. The atmosphere is calm and relaxing, and the menu offers a wide variety of choices. It’s a peaceful place, perfect for a gentle, quiet dinner. I really enjoyed all the dishes I tried, the staff were friendly, warm, and always smiling. I’d definitely come back if I have the chance.

title: Outstanding Dining Experience at The Rice Bowl, Angsana Lang Co
review:
We are currently visiting Angsana Lang Co and had the pleasure of dining at The Rice Bowl — it was absolutely fabulous! The food was not only delicious but also served quickly, making the whole experience seamless and enjoyable.

A very special mention goes to Mrs. Anh, who truly elevated our evening. Her kindness, attentiveness, and warm hospitality exemplify first-class service. Having traveled extensively around the world, I can honestly say she represents the very best of genuine, caring service.

Thank you, Angsana and The Rice Bowl team, for such a memorable evening. Highly recommended to anyone visiting Lang Co!

title: Poor and outrageously expensive experience ..
review:
Asian cuisine restaurant of the hotel Angsana ...
I can't believe such a beautiful hotel could have such a mediocre restaurant...

Service is good, even if some do not speak too English ...

The menu represents the specialties of Southeast Asia ...
The quality is at best correct (Mie Goreng) or even disastrous (Spring Roll)
In 2 weeks of travel in Vietnam, this restaurant is the one that served us the most tasteless cuisine of our stay, for record prices (between 10 and 15EUR the dish ...)

The most ridiculous: the children's menu has more than 10EUR (300,000 VND tax free) for 3 dry satay skewers and a scoop of ice cream (with mandatory vanilla fragrance ..)

It is really necessary that the hotel management review its catering offer, which does not correspond in any way to the level of the hotel which is superb ...

title: Rice Bar at Angsana Lang Co - Great sushi in a stylish bar
Don’t eat here
review: The food is stale and old. The hashbrowns are hard and have no fillings whatsoever. The fruits are dry any the soup still has raw egg in it.

title: Wonderful lunch at Moomba with stunning sea view
review: During my stay at Angsana Lang Co Resort in the Laguna complex, I had lunch at Moomba restaurant, which offers a beautiful seaside view. The service was excellent – the staff truly know how to take care of their guests. The food was of great quality, and each dish was served in the right order to ensure the best dining experience. Everything was simply wonderful!

title: Moomba Restaurant at Angsana Lang Co - Very good food with sea views
review:
We stayed 4 nights at Angsana Lang Co Resort and ate dinner twice at Moomba. The Mood is very nice, you have a direct sea view and can sit outside on the terrace or in the air-conditioned restaurant as you like.
The food was consistently great, whether papaya salad, squid or burger.
A clear recommendation from us!

title: Do not eat steak at this restaurant, do not order mohito here if you do not want it alcohol-free!
review:
The staff did not understand English! By touching the menu, a drink and a beer were ordered. We tried to get the staff to understand that we wanted the drink and beer before we ordered the food. It succeeded after 15 minutes.

By showing pictures and that a woman from outside came and took a picture of the difference between rare and blue and that the woman showed it to the chef, the order succeeded.
The meat, blue as ordered, was served on beautiful cast iron dishes.
The meat was sadly chewy! Even though the menu says "tenderloin" oxfilet!
In reality almost as tough outer thigh! Some of the flesh was left behind and some tendons were left behind.
The staff voluntarily cut the price of the dish in half.

As for steak - eat elsewhere.

title: Italian and steak treats.
review: Great food in a friendly establishment. On the outside you can't tell but the small card offers something for everyone. The prices are low. Highly recommended if you want to eat something other than Vietnamese (which is also Delicious😉).

title: Super place for mexican or pizza, great staff.
review:
Really tasty burritos and lovely staff at this small pizza restaurant. Owner so eager to please. Kitchen arrangements are unusual in that they source from various restaurants so our burritos came from
mexican kitchen few doors away. They were hot and delicious snd came with all the usual extras like sour cream etc.
Also had delicious pancakes and icecream.

title: Needed comfort food
review:
Had a long day sat in a minibus looking at sights and noodles and rice weren’t going to cut it and just wanted some comfort food and this place was opposite where we were staying so popped in. As with nearly everywhere in Vietnam the service was friendly and quick and the pizza was amazing !!!!
Garlic bread made from banh mi bread was outstanding. Definitely what we needed, so if you want something tasty that reminds you of home give it a go.

title: Recommended in Hue, just outside center
review: Original Vietnamese dishes, almost all delicious (matter of taste). Service friendly service. Interior could use a lick of paint.

title: Great place to try lots of authentic Hue dishes
review: Following a recommendation from our local host, we visited here for lunch. We tried a combo deal with lots of little dishes, specific to the local cuisine which was good to try and the portion size was decent. Prices were very reasonable and service was good too, restaurant was also nice and cool in the heat. Good place to go to try a variety of Hue dishes when you’re visiting the city.

title: Tourist factory
review:
We dined here as part of a tour package. "Royal costume dinner."
The case is perfectly grounded. We arrive, dressed in "traditional" clothes (not washed for 10 years), photo shoot, photo shoot, installation at the table, orchestra "traditional" (to please us, they perform songs from us!), we send the dishes (varied but without flavor, warmed, small quantity). We can't wait for this to end.
So in summary:
null service except to cash drinks and sell photos
zero food
questionable hygiene
there's only the frame that's pretty

title: Dragon and Phoenix Emperor Party
review: In addition to seeing the monuments of the royal city, you must try to taste the food of the Emperor Nguyen, a fine-tasting vision and taste of the best experience, starting with this (Ancient Royal Restaurant) the world's most respected "Dragon Feng dancing Emperor's banquet". Exquisite dishes, elegant dining environment, in showing the restaurant to give a forever unforgettable banquet, delicious combination with the fruit of the vivid sculptures, this is definitely not the ordinary restaurant can compare! Having not eaten the Emperor's banquet without a dragon-fucking fan dance, is equivalent to not having been harmonized!

title: Excellent!!
review: Facing our hotel, great restaurant! Excellent cuisine and presentation worthy of a star, for a price defying all competition! 2 starters, 2 courses and 2 large beers for..less than 30 €. A very large well decorated room that can accommodate a lot of people but not noisy at all. I really recommend!

title: Super tasty, cozy and cheap
review: We had dinner here on July 26, 2025 with our family of four. The Service was super fast and very friendly! We had a total of 12 dishes (including 3x noodles, 1x rice, 4x fish),+ 4 drinks and 4 desserts – all for only 36 euros! The food was delicious and the restaurant has a cozy and warm Mood. Definitely recommended!

title: Bitter melon soup, wow!
review: This amazing restaurant is only a few minutes walk from our hotel Thanh Lịch. We recently came for dinner on a cold, wet, rainy night! Beautiful, serene setting with carved wood/bamboo furniture, tall beams and columns, waterfall, koi pond, felt like we were dinning in a pagoda! We had grilled pork skewers, beef stir-fry with broccoli, stir-fry morning glory with garlic, and bitter melon soup. All served with ‘cơm niêu’ rice cooked in clay pot. Everything was excellent! But we especially enjoyed the soup: ‘khổ qua’ bitter melon stuffed with pork and mushroom, cooked in a steamy hot broth, topped with green onion and cilantro. Simple yet so delicious, so perfect for a cold rainy night! Wonderful service, the waitresses were super nice, friendly. Highly recommend.

title: Beautiful discovery

title: A tourist trap best avoided
review:
We visited for lunch as our tour guide suggested stopping (probably because they had a free/reduced lunch for guides bringing in tourists). Not my cup of tea personally.

Gaudy interior with Vietnamese costume and hats to put on in the restaurant on a fancy ‘throne’. It was busy with large parties having a set buffet lunch which meant our food was slow to arrive (my meal arrived a good ten minutes after my husbands).

The fish dish was ok, but the pork in a pot was mainly fat. There are better, more authentic, restaurants in town.

title: BUN BO HUE: TALAGA TASTES SO AUTHENTIC!
review: We were told that Bun Bo Hue is a must-try in its hometown, and wow, it did not disappoint! Grabe, the broth is so rich, aromatic, and has that perfect spicy kick—it was a bit intense but so good. The thick noodles, the beef shank, and the pork trotter added so much texture; it’s a bowl bursting with flavor talaga. This dish is the perfect example of authentic Vietnamese comfort food. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Hue!

title: Brilliant authentic vegan Vietnamese food - an unexpected gem - very impressed!!!
review:
Firstly, I am very critical of food places. I have worked in the hospitality industry for over 15 years. However, I was pleasantly impressed. Although this rustic establishment may not appear large, the food is terrific. The chairs are comfortable. The meals came out quickly. The owner was excellent, efficient and helpful. We received generous servings.

Within the menu, we ordered: fried mushrooms and cabbage, hotpot, steamed rice flour rolls, mixed vegetables, fried noodles, and fried mushrooms. The food was delicious. We didn't need any seasoning because it was already perfect. The food was excellent value for money. The highlight was the fried mushroom with vegan mayonnaise. It was so good that we got two serves of this dish.

This lovely place exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this place for healthy, delicious and authentic food. It's wonderful to see how passionate people deliver excellent customer service. After eating a large amount of food, I did not feel bloated. Instead, I was energised. This place was an unexpected vegan paradise. I highly recommend this place.

title: Excellent Vietnamese food
review:
This large, hotel restaurant offers an extensive menu of authentic Vietnamese food, with dishes specifically from Hue noted. We tried 2 entrees and found both of them to be absolutely delicious.

The service was excellent. The wines were wonderful. The food was outstanding. We enjoyed our meal here and would highly recommend.

We also had breakfast here and were very impressed with the extensive buffet, which changed daily. There were so many new things to try, and it was a lovely way to do so -- you only had to take a small portion.

The staff here were very attentive and friendly. We really enjoyed our meals in this restaurant and would recommend to friends.

title: Phō Saigon not to be missed
review: We come there every year, nice and clean place, welcoming and humorous staff. Very frequented by locals for the good reason that the phō is excellent. Broth tastes good because it simmered for a long time with good pieces of meat. The small pluses are the jars of garlic , carrots with shallots that are not found on all tables of restaurants .

title: 👉 "A Must-Visit for True Hue Flavors and Cozy Ambiance"
review:
A Wonderful Hue Culinary Experience at Than Thien Restaurant – Com Niêu Nhà Rường 🌿🍚

During my trip to Hue, I had the chance to dine at Than Thien Restaurant – Com Niêu Nhà Rường, and it was truly a delightful experience.

🔸 Ambiance: I was impressed by the traditional nhà rường (wooden house) architecture, creating a cozy and rustic atmosphere while remaining elegant. The space was quiet and private — perfect for families or groups of friends.

🔸 Food: The clay pot rice (com niêu) was aromatic and tender. Traditional dishes like braised fish, caramelized pork, and sour soup were flavorful and authentically prepared. Ingredients were fresh, and the presentation was appealing.

🔸 Service: Staff were very friendly and attentive, offering helpful recommendations and serving promptly without long waits.

🔸 Pricing: Very reasonable for the quality of food and the dining experience.

👉 If you are looking for a place to enjoy authentic Hue cuisine in a traditional, charming setting, this is definitely a must-visit!
I will definitely return on my next trip to Hue!

title: When you come to Hue, visit Than Thien Restaurant !
