review: We were able to learn how to cook nems and banh nan. Then we had a delicious caramel and ginger fish with black rice steamed in a banana leaf. The restaurant is nice surrounded by rice fields and the owner is nice, plus he speaks French and Spanish.

title: Excellent
review: Excellent cuisine and friendly welcome!

title: Nickel
review: Très bon repas,très bon service

title: Martine Jacky
review:
Great lunch...
Very good and personal at the top
I recommend.
Super and very exotic ......,...👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍

title: Regional tasting
review:
A very good reception of the dishes really typical and very good
Recommended for those who want to discover a different side of Vietnamese cuisine

title: Exceptional
review: Nice discovery, to advise. Very professional welcome with a family spirit. The experience of making love letters yourself.

title: Experience to live
review:
Very nice culinary experience.
Discoveries and refinements! I recommend. We had a pleasant time, quiet. We thank the family for the warm welcome and know-how.

title: An address to remember
review: Delicious dishes, very well presented and very generous. Welcoming, smiling staff. At this same address we took bicycles to walk in the countryside.

title: Lunch
review:
Warm welcome. Very nice, quiet.
Nice setting, surrounded by greenery
Very advantageous prices
I recommend this address

title: Lunch
review:
Very good restaurant in the countryside of Hue quiet. Fine and fragrant kitchen. We had fish, red rice, sautéed vegetables...
Do not hesitate to make the detour.

title: Excellent
review: Very good meal in a neat and original presentation. However small axis of improvement, leave a little more time between each course to enjoy and enjoy each dish. I recommend it without hesitation.👍👍👍

title: Discovered the place by our guide who advised us excellently. We highly recommend this restaurant.
review:
Exceptional and refined cuisine.
To discover absolutely
A real revelation for our taste buds!

title: Great!
review:
Very good food and very friendly welcome
Authentic and perfectly prepared food

I highly recommend

title: To do.
review: Enjoyable experience. Attentive service. Typical dishes. We recommend for a buccolic stop, especially in the rain of Hue

title: Best familial restaurant
review:
small traditional family restaurant, excellent food, welcome and environment. Best meal of the stay.

petit restaurant traditionnel familial, cuisine, accueil et environnement excellent. meilleur repas du séjour

title: Great experience
review:
Very nice experience and beautiful family work for this typical restaurant that goes off the beaten track
Typical and delicious dishes

title: Small traditional restaurant in the countryside of Hue.
review:
Small family restaurant in the middle of the countryside.
This restaurant offers traditional dishes from nearby Hue

title: I highly recommend...
review: Nice place, typical. Very warm Welcoming. The meal was delicious. I had a great time. Thank you very much for this Welcoming and wonderful meal.

title: Just perfect.
review: Excellent food, nothing to say everything was perfect from start to finish. A real treat, do not hesitate to try you will not be disappointed!!!!!

title: Explosion of flavours
review:
Place not to be missed
Simply exceptional
From starter to dessert an explosion of flavors
Very nice and welcoming hosts

title: Vietnam stay
review:
A very nice place
Very good meal with a nice presentation
Very nice staff
Beautiful decoration with soothing music

title: Trip to Vietnam
review:
Very quiet and beautiful place.
We eat very well.
Hosts very welcoming.
Typical and varied cuisine.
To visit..

title: A must-see in the region
review: Beautiful experience off the beaten track in Hue countryside to advise - fish in banana leaf

title: Very good
review:
Small, but with the owner extremely nice and sympathetic lady and with very good local food!
Strategic and convenient location, right near the entrance to the monumental site.
Excellent dry noodles with shrimp!
Good service and acceptable prices!

title: A good restaurant next to the king's tomb
review:
This place is amazing! We just wanted something to fill our bellies after visiting Tu Duc Tonb

But then we saw this menu and ordered a lot! The prices are very good and it's a good way to try local food without any doubt about hygiene.

The staff are super friendly and show you how to eat the dishes properly at your table.

title: Pushing the expensive cocktails ! No draught beer
review: Visited this bar last night pretty disappointing. Looks good from outside but no draught beer and the staff tend to push expensive cocktails on you. Once you have your medicore cocktail they come around and ask for payment. Had one, expensive, drink and left. Lots of better places nearby.

title: Strange Venue
review:
Came here after dinner from tour guide recommendation.
I found it a bit of an eclectic mix, with a dj, dance floor, bar, pool table & tvs.
It was very loud and hard to have a conversation,
Drinks were a bit of a mix, some good & some not.
You did get a free shot on entry, staff were generally friendly & helpful, all speaking English.
Hygienic, delicious food for vegan lovers, friendly staff. In a quiet street. Authentically modernised

title: Amazing Food Highly recommend
review: We recently had one of the best meals we’ve had since arriving in Vietnam at this warm, family‑run gem—ordering five different dishes that were bursting with fresh, vibrant flavors. The coconut “chicken” curry with rice stood out as a true delight. The owners and staff were incredibly welcoming, treating us like old friends and making the evening feel special—a hospitality I’ve often found memorable during travels here (). Plus, the dining area felt comfortably clean without being overly sterile, which gave us extra confidence in the quality of the food and service.

title: Amazing fresh and tasty vegeterian food.
review: We went as a family and ordered 5 different dishes. The service was excellent, seems to be owned by a local family. Very fresh, varied food full of amazing flavours. We preferred the dishes with only vegetables and or vegetables and tofu, rather than substitute soy based meat. Having said that the coconut “chicken” curry with rice was very good. Highly recommend this restaurant.

title: Delicious fresh food - as good as anything we have had in Vietnam
review: Fantastic food- fresh and with so much flavour and a good menu to meet all tastes. A cafe/informa restaurant vibe set back off La Loi Strert with pavement tables and indoor. Can’t say enough about how good the food was. Highly highly recommend.

title: Local cuisine hue
review: Fantastic..both food and service..food from hue..freshly prepared...inexpensive and super delicious...in the center

title: Great hidden gem restaurant
review: Despite the language barrier the experience was very enjoyable. Lots of pictures in the menu to point at and Google translate works . Food was great and staff was doing their best to accommodate the foreigners.

title: Excellent place to taste the imperial (salty) cakes of Hue
review: The restaurant is not the latest fashion but it is certainly one of the best addresses in Hue to taste the famous banh(s) of the imperial cuisine of Hue: banh loc, banh beo, banh khaoi, ran... everything is there and absolutely fresh. It is really the address for the quality of the products and the hospitality. It is a must, a real Vietnamese restaurant without chichi for taste and nothing but taste!

title: Spectacular vegan food
review: This is the best food we've eaten in a long time, and certainly the best since we arrived in Vietnam. An absolute gem and a beautiful authentic experience. Can't recommend this restaurant highly enough. I don't expect to find nicer after this.

title: Yummy food, wonderful
review: Food is fabulous, staff very friendly, pizza and crepe is perfect, yummy, must try. Never regret, top food. Taste of lifetime, thank you.

title: To avoid
review:
Fruit served green, inedible while the market is 100 m away, frozen fries served cold, tasteless cocktails
Nice view but really not worth a break

title: Nice
review: I had a really pleasant evening at this place. The atmosphere is warm and cozy, with soft lighting and a subtle vintage touch that makes it perfect for slowing down after a long day. The wine selection is thoughtfully curated, smooth and well-balanced, paired nicely with delicate, well-prepared food. What I appreciated most was the attentive yet unobtrusive service — warm, genuine, and never overwhelming. A lovely spot to enjoy good wine, meaningful conversations, and a calm, intimate vibe.

title: excellent wine
review: The ambiance of the place is beautifully designed—elegant, warm, and very inviting. The wine selection is well-curated, offering balanced flavors that are enjoyable for both casual drinkers and wine enthusiasts. The food is thoughtfully presented and delicious, pairing exceptionally well with the wine. Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I will definitely be coming back.

title: Great food and service
review: The banh xeo was exquisite and really enjoyed the meat skewers…Will definitely be coming back! Drinks were served cold without the need of ice. Nothing left in my bowl hehe

title: Nice place and good music and good food.
review: Nice music/restaurant/bar with local very good food. Oysters were great. Very pleasant service and good prices.

title: 165k for 1 plate of whole-tail fried chicken with chicken back. A shortage of food(carrot) .
review: The food was bad. Directly reflected, they’ve also picked up, but the results are the same. Taste the food from first-timers.

title: Warm local dining experience
review: Fantastic family owned local Vietnamese dining experience. We truly enjoyed every local dish, especially the pumpkin soup. The staff are welcoming and the atmosphere is quiet and warm, away from the chaotic street.

title: Resto gourmand
review: Charming little restaurant at the bottom of a dead end in Hue that offers excellent dishes very well cooked by a young very talented chef who also gives cooking lessons. Very sweet price for quality. Also recommended for the reception.

title: Pumpkin restaurant cooking class
review: Amazing place, food is delicious and people are really nice! You can eat a 100% homemade food and take a cooking class. I had a great time learning how to cook Hué pancakes, Fried Spring rolls and chicken with lemongrass. You must try

title: Good restaurant on the road to the tombs
review:
We went to this restaurant to avoid tourist traps around Khai Dinh's tomb. It was a nice surprise on the road.
The place is cute, the menu has a good range of dishes that are eaten all right. Prices may be a little high but this is still acceptable.

title: There was a workshop to attend
review: The workshop will teach you how to prepare three famous Vietnamese coffee, but I alone can't absorb three cups of caffeine. (ps review should not be less than 50 words, I don't know what to drink.)

title: Amaizng coffee
review: The egg and salt coffee was incredible, so smooth and tasty! The staff were super friendly and made the experience even better.

title: Get a coffee in Hue
review: Very nice egg coffee and cake. Absolute joy. We were there on holiday and had an after dinner coffee. Please visit them when you can.

title: Great restaurant - so pleased to have found it
review: Beautiful setting around a pond. Lovely food and very friendly staff.we had a great table overlooking the pond. Great place to sit while the heavy rain came down! Easy 10 minute walk along the river from the Thien Mu pagoda.

title: Idyllic setting and delicious dishes
review:
Very nice establishment in an idyllic setting with fish
Delicious meals
Friendly hosts
Between the imperative city and the pagoda of the Heavenly Lady

title: Great fresh authentic Hue foods is here 😍🌸
review:
Very tasty bánh canh.

The soup is cooked fresh in the evening, and all the ingredients are very fresh. You can really taste the care and honesty in the food.

The owner/chef Mrs Ha is lovely — friendly, gentle, and very welcoming, which makes the experience even better.

A simple local place with good food and a warm atmosphere. Highly recommended.

title: Delicious food
review: Very good!!!, Wonderful experience

title: We were poised her
review: We were in this restaurant on 02.07 for lunch. They offered “Imperator lunch”. First we ordered one “Imperator lunch” for 2 person but they gave 2 portions. During this lunch we were poised for 2 days! People don’t use this restaurant if you want to restore your holiday and helf!

title: Amazing udon
review: So so good!!! The found was exceptional and really good value. Lots of choice and everything is truly delicious :) would return

title: Beautiful spot
review: Gorgeous spot a few steps away from the main city. Really modern restaurant situated on a small island over a bridge. Stunning space, delicious food, great service. Phuong Trinh was very helpful recommending some great dishes.

title: Perfect location and good kitchen.
review: This restaurant opened only 3 months ago and is very good positioned near the river. Classy experience and very good kitchen. The service lacks experience but this will get better with time. Overall a very good experience.

title: Top Hot Pot 👌🏻🫕
review: A great experience. The very attentive service employee explained the procedure perfectly to us. The ingredients were excellent and we really enjoyed it.

title: A tiny, cozy café filled with plenty of sunlight.
review: Perfect place to chill and relax. The pasta and eggs benedict were so tasty. The staff was really kind. Would totally recommend!

title: Restaurant with the lovelies pets and people
review:
Delicious food, beautiful space with a very spacious and green garden. The pets are extremely friendly too!
I highly recommend their Kombucha and toasties

title: The best veggie brunch and coffee you can find in Hue !!!
review:
Amazing veggie food and drinks!

We randomly visited this new and hidden cafe. It was super calm and relaxing with a green yard with a dog and 2 cats. The staff were very friendly with excellent English. Everything was surprisingly delicious! We all wondered why they didn't have lots of customers while the quality is the best that we could find in Vietnam, not gonna lie!

Super recommend: smoothie bowl, Mediterranean omelette, French toast, and burnt cheese cake.
And don't forget to try their sweetie cold brew and kombucha. Super refreshing!!!

P/S: don't miss out their cute little notes too!

title: Extremely slow service and 10% charge if paid by credit card
review:
Very nice presentation of the dishes but extremely slow service. We were a group of 12 people and the last member of the group received his dish at least 1 hour after the first.
Very nice location.
Payment by credit card included an additional 10% fee, which is unacceptable. The price is higher than many restaurants in Huè.

title: Quick bite to eat
review:
Attention to detail for the lunch we had ,went here on a tour and had the set menu.
It was delicious, could not fault the lunch and the service.
Lovely quick bite to eat .

title: Excellent!
review:
An extraordinary meal!! A quiet environment in the greenery. We were there with our guide, Duong, and we had a wonderful lunch there.
A reference for us when it comes to restaurants.

title: Excellent food in Hue!
review:
We were taken to this restaurant while on a tour with the Vietnam-based Legend tour company. This place is a gem and the meal was one of the highlights of our tour. First, we sat outdoors and the ambiance was brilliant. The wait staff was so very attentive. The food (we had a vegetarian lunch) included seven dishes including a vegetarian soup, mushrooms tempura, wrapped tofu, salad and a flan desert all wonderfully tasty. Other members of the group told us that the meat dishes were excellent.
I ordered a coconut drink which was a coconut, straw and tiki umbrella. Very retro and spot on!
Do go here!

title: Amazing Hue Specialty Restaurant
review: A unique Hue specialty restaurant where you can try the tasty Banh Khoai (Hue rice pancake). Also should try their duck dishes as those are really good. The duck meat is tender and moist. Owner is super nice as well.

title: Cheap beers @ Mew
review:
Friendly, very good service.

Happy Hour - buy 2 x 450ml bottles of Huda beer (19k Dong each) & get 1 bottle free.

Normal price 1 x 450ml bottle of Huda beer is only 19k Dong, which is cheapest bar/restaurant price we found in Hue during our 2 night stay.

title: Chilled bar
review:
Our first night was a Saturday when Walking Street is pedestrianised. We hotfooted it past all the mayhem to find a wonderful chilled bar.
Great service, good ambiance. We called in for both pre dinner drinks and post drinks.
Tall G&T (double) 100VND £2.87. Hudo beer 19,000 VND 55 pence. We hit Happy Hour a couple of times (before 1930), which was 3 beers for the price of 2. That brought the price down to 37 pence.
What can I add to that?

title: Dave and Gail
review: Wonderful place to come for a drink. Can not comment on food as already eaten but menu looked lovely cocktails were fantastic proper cocktails not just sugar syrup ones. The staff were great and chatty special call out forTrang who served us all evening with a smile. Situated away from the loud music but still full of atmosphere

title: Great night spot for food & cocktail and people watching
review: This is a great spot to enjoy some cocktails/beer & food while looking out over the Hue Night Walking St. we sat upstairs and had a great view of the band on a balcony. Food was fantastic, service was great. They even serve 1L cocktails for those who want a bigger serve. Great cocktail selection.

title: Good cocktail super food
review:
Restaurant in the busiest street of Hue
Much cooler atmosphere than in the bars next door
Very good spicy dishes
Full-bodied cocktail

title: Great lunch at a low price
review: Small family run restaurant. Traditional Vietnamese dishes, quite varied menu with both fish and meat dishes. Noodles with really delicious vegetables and beef. Really low prices.

title: A nice break and a good meal on a busy day
review: Three of my old war buddies and I left Hoi An on a long, all-day tour. Our guide took us here for a late lunch. The food was excellent and the service was quick. It was a pleasant break from our interesting but hectic tour. I wouldn't suggest you fly across the Pacific Ocean just to have lunch here, but if you happen to be in the area, you should give it a try.

title: Great Korean Restaurant in Hue City
review: very authentic korean restaurant in hue city. the restaurant provide korean BBQ, army stew and some other very korean-style foods. the restaurant is in the 2nd floor (actually you should press One-floor in elevator) of TTC Imperial hotel. the atmosphere is clean and not noisy. Price also not expensive and around 80-90k per meal from what I remember. Recommended.

title: Nice service
review: A big thank you to the QA waitress at Risotto restaurant for her warm welcome and constant smile. She was attentive, professional and very kind throughout the meal. His service made our experience even more enjoyable. Bravo and thank you!

title: Everyone will enjoy
review:
The food was fabulous, with a combination of Italian and a Vietnamese menu. The restaurant also provided free appetiser of bruschetta, (so good) , a soft drink or beer and some fruit after our mains.
The waitress Huong was welcoming, polite and attentive which enhanced our first night experience , in Walking Street in Hue.
I would recommend this restaurant to anyone travelling in Hue.

title: Would recommend this place!
review: Really nice staff and the service is great. The coconut icecream is to die for, really delicious! The food came quick. They had some happy hour deals also for the food.

title: Local craft beer
review: Dongba Brewery is a hidden gem in Hue, serving fresh, locally crafted beers with unique flavors. Cozy atmosphere, friendly staff, and a true passion for brewing make every visit memorable. 🍺

title: the best in town
review: Me and my family came here in weekend to have lunch. The restaurant was crowded but still give us a good service. We ordered some Banh beo, banh nam, banh loc and those were great.

title: Great Japanese
review:
Great Japanese food and very friendly staff. Lovely atmosphere and aesthetics
Sat at the bar and watched the sushi chef

title: Mega beautiful bar
review: A nice bar and restaurant at Angsana Resort Lang Co. We ate wonderfully and everything tasted great to us.

title: Fantastic Kombucha Class
review: We took the kombucha class with Quan and it was wonderful. He was so lovely to talk to and the kombucha drinks we made were delicious. I recommend!

title: I enjoyed my dinner at Rice Bowl. Thu made the difference. Thank you.
review:
It's always a pleasure to stay at Angsana Lang Co. And without fail, I'll have at least a meal at the Rice Bowl. Tonight, the service was expectedly excellent. Thu, the wait staff who served me remembered my preference for the drinks. She and her colleagues were attentive to my needs and food was served in a timely order. Besides the excellent and fresh food, it's the little details, such as topping up the drinks and checking in (but not intrusive), that make dining at Rice Bar & Rice Bowl such a pleasure.

Thank you, Thu for making tonight's dinner extra delightful.

title: Such a classy place with amazing food
review: Elegant space, attentive service, and delicious food. One of the best places for desserts, especially the matcha tiramisu is absolutely a MUST TRYYYY 💛

title: Must visit restaurant at Angsana Lăng Cô
review: A Japanese restaurant you must visit when staying at Angsana Lăng Cô. The space is charming and peaceful, with pleasant music and a relaxing atmosphere. The food is fresh and delicious and the desserts are absolutely amazing. I would love to come back to enjoy more dishes here. Thank you for the wonderful experience. Special compliments to the pastry chef Phúc and the team: Mui, Danh, Bach and other talented chefs of the restaurant.

title: Cool little bar down an alleyway
review: Had a couple of great cocktails in this bar. Not the type of place you would stumble across due to location but worth finding. We got a grab here then walked to the main streets for food about 5 mins away.

title: Best bar!
review: Our bartender was incredible he gave great suggestions! All the signature cocktails were created by him which were unique spins on local flavors. Another plus was the ambiance which was perfect for a cocktail. Also got a free cigarette from the bartender which made my night. Would highly recommend for a cocktail in hue

title: Amazing speakeasy bar!
review: Amazing vibe. Great drinks and really friendly staff! Should be in the top 10! Creative and delicious cocktails. Difficult to find but 100% worth it.

title: Super Bun Bo!!
review: Great bun bo ... the top. Nice and authentic place and very kind staff. Super eco-friendly really recommended!!!

title: Authentic food, brilliantly made
review: We found this place almost by accident - but were absolutely delighted to do so. Incredible food! Not just genuinely authentic (unlike many of the flashier places round the corner), but elegant and beautifully made. This kind of food would be getting rave reviews in London, but is going for crazy low prices here. Definite recommendation.

title: Cheap and cheerful
review: Recommended by our hotel for great banh mi and did not disappoint. Cheap as, tasty, friendly staff but little English. Definitely not fancy but the real local Hue experience.

title: Not worth your money OR your time.
review:
Not good at all. Chewy Chicken and watering sause that tasted cooked onion and fluor.
Every streetcorner does better than this! Such disappointment!

title: You must eat here
review: I love this place! Beautiful food and service. Thank you Tri! Best service ever. Thank you we will be back again very soon.

title: Highly recommended
review: Fresh food, rich menu, mainly familiar family dishes. There are a few dishes for vegetarians. Happy and attentive service.

title: Delicious lunch
review: Very delicious and varied food. Service was very accommodating and friendly. We can recommend the restaurant very much.

title: Good food, good service, good location
review:
The food was tasty and filling. Loved all the dishes we tried. We tried a beautifully cooked pork belly and also provided a Hue specialty with pork minced served on lemongrass, to be wrapped by rice paper with salad.

The young ladies running the front of house were attentive to our needs and we got good service. Would definitely come again.

title: Delicious!
review:
Minh and Vy were very welcoming with us. The quality of the products is very good and so is the Service. We were with family and the prices are very attractive. For six people we had only for less than 40th (starter, main course, dessert) with supplements. I really recommend this restaurant we ended up in by chance, and in which we ate three nights to finally affiliate.
Cam on Huê girls!!! See you in Paris😉

title: Very good staff! Delicious food!!! They speak English!!
review: We were served by a girl named Minhk and she was super friendly! The food was very good and they also brought us the shrimp crackers we wanted and sweet and sour sauce. In addition to a dessert made by them. Very friendly and very good!

title: Great restaurant and perfect service from Minh Khanh :)
review:
Great restaurant in a lively and vibrant street at night.
We had wonderful dinner and an amazing service from Minh Khanh! :)

title: Delicious chocolate drinks and bars
review: Just stopped in for some chocolate drinks today. It’s super cute with cool air con on the 2nd floor and many wonderful chocolate bars for sale. I bought quite a few bars as gifts and am hoping they’ll survive my travels in the hot VN summer. Drinks and cheesecake brownie were delicious!

title: So bad
review: The chocolateb is ok but the dough is too sour. Did they put MSG instead of sugar in the dough. Now I know why Doremon is blue all the time.

title: Great
review: Good food, great service, good atmosphere

title: Heavenly beef noodle soup
review:
Fantastic beef noodle soup. Their crab balls is a must try. Their broth-heavenly.
You don’t know what you’re missing if you don’t try.

title: Hidden Gem - fresh and hot deliciousness
review: This is an amazing family run restaurant with super delicious food. Very busy and always open. So friendly and menu is LARGE. Fresh, hot and good portions for great prices!

title: Cheap beer, good music and friendly
review:
Not pushy to get you in the door,

Happy hour is 2 local beers buy one get one free (480ml) and only 18k a beer that’s 3 big beers for only 38k, friendly staff and good music worth checking out

With 3 friends but came here alone

title: LONG wait at Hue Lucky Cafe & fast food.
review:
The Lucky Cafe looked great, had heaps of staff, had limited food selection, great range of drinks and quick order taking.
BUT at the time of visiting at 11.30am, with only 7 customers, it took 25 minutes to get a warm hot chocolate drink drink, and a Cappachino that tasted ok but need to be a lot hotter. We saw other customers return their drinks for a hotter replacement. One asked for their money back because their plane was due to board. Some other customers were served their drinks out of order. Was nationality a problem!! I think so in one case I witnessed.

Strange service for with "fast" in their name.

title: SOOOO GOOD BURGER
review: We came here after a day out. A little tired but we had some great BURGERS. The sauce was rich and flavorful. My kids all loved it. I recommend you try it. It won't disappoint.

title: Normal.
review: Employees are too bad to do.

title: Bad.
review:
Stupid employee.
That's wrong food.
Employees do not listen.
No grass, no grass.

title: Bad.
review: Cooking food long and cooking bad food.

title: Nam Dong - Hue
review:
Amazing…
I came here once in December 2024 after exploring Kazan Waterfall. The restaurant’s food impressed us: grilled chicken, crispy pork fat. I will come back to support the restaurant if I have the chance to visit Hue.
Thank you for the unique durian dish

title: Brilliant food in Hue
review:
This was a fantastic find in Hue quite by accident
On a very hot day in Hue we were looking for a light lunch, walked out of our hotel & right next door this fabulous little Japanese restaurant with the best fried chicken, crumbed prawns, ginger pork .. I could go on as it was so good we went back for dinner.
What a gem in Hue

title: Good rice.
review: Good food, good price. Located right downtown. Employees are very enthusiastic. Worth the experience.

title: Experience Hue Cuisine at Com Que Mu Hai
review: A great homestyle restaurant with delicious, comforting dishes that taste just like home. The food is well-seasoned, prices are reasonable, and the atmosphere is cozy. The staff are friendly and provide quick service. Definitely worth coming back!

title: You should eat rice at this restaurant.
review: Good food, friendly staff. Thank you.

title: Ngon
review: Banh Trang Kep is a popular Vietnamese street snack known for its crispy texture and flavorful toppings. It’s usually grilled with ingredients like egg, dried beef, and green onions, then served with a tasty dipping sauce. Affordable and delicious, it’s a must-try for street food lovers.

title: A lovely place
review:
Nice place , a quaility coffee and matcha.
de b&b house is a hidden gem for coffee lovers in Hue. The espresso is rich and well-balanced, while the matcha is smooth and refreshing. Cozy atmosphere, friendly service, and great attention to quality. Definitely one of the best cafés in the city

title: This town has this kind of coffee shop!
review:
The shop is incredibly warm during this time.
Fairly quiet at the time I was there.
Biggest plus: I ordered an espresso and it didn't disappoint me at all. In fact, it was far better than I would expect.
The staff spoke fluent English! What an odd!

title: Good Trip
review:
This rare beef with noodles is delicious, tender, and not chewy at all.
The price is pretty reasonable for Hue. Plus, the staff is friendly, quick, and really attentive.

title: Good vegetarian food in friendly surroundings.
review:
We had a really enjoyable dinner at this lovely vegetarian restaurant in Hue.

The staff were friendly and the food was freshly cooked, plentiful and delicious. There’s no meat at all on the menu, it’s entirely veggie. They don’t serve alcohol which didn’t bother us.

The place is not ultra luxurious but is clean throughout and comfy enough, also features a large fishpond in the centre of the main room. There were several tables of locals eating there too, which (as tourists) we always take as a good sign.

The staff spoke very little English but there’s free WiFi and they did find a menu in English, so with help from Google Translate and a bit of pointing we were able to order just fine.

If you’re looking for tasty vegetarian food in pleasant surroundings with a family-run atmosphere then this place should fit the bill.

title: ⚠️ Hidden fees and dishonest pricing ⚠️
review:
Be very careful here.
On our first visit we ordered two bánh mì and paid exactly the price listed on the menu. We came back the next day and ordered the same thing — but suddenly there was a 10% extra fee added to the bill. When we asked about it, the staff gave vague answers and couldn’t offer a clear explanation and dismissed it as a standard “practice”.
It feels like the price depends on the day or on who they think won’t question it. That’s not okay.
If you go here, double-check your bill before paying.

title: A wonderful experience at Méw!
review: A wonderful experience at Méw! The atmosphere is cozy with a unique, artistic vibe. The food is delicious, the cocktails are skillfully crafted, and the staff are incredibly friendly and attentive. Every corner here has its own charm—perfect for relaxing or catching up with friends. Definitely coming back!

title: WILL BE COMEBACK
review:
I had a great experience at Domino’s Pizza. The food was delicious – hot, fresh, and just the right amount of toppings. The crust was crispy, and the flavors were well-balanced.

What impressed me the most was the cleanliness of the store. The dining area was tidy, the kitchen looked organized, and the staff followed good hygiene practices.

Overall, great taste and a clean environment. I’d definitely come back again!

title: Great Vietnamese food in Hue
review: Great food at great prices. Banh Beo is delicious! Very friendly staff! Waiter Long was especially nice and friendly and gave us advice on how to prepare the delicious Vietnamese fish sauce at home!

title: Banh mi heaven
review: Casual but the banh mi are to die for service is good and quaint family restaurant very chill atmosphere I will be back again

title: Good and Not so Good....
review: Excellent Vietnamese chicken noodle dish was served with lots of chicken and vegetables, The iced coffee was very good and helped with reducing my core temperature on this very hot day. The service was a little spotty, though, my server was busy chatting up another sole traveller.

title: To be avoided absolutely if foreigners, scammers
review: To be avoided absolutely! The owner (I presume ) charged us 50% more than the price indicated on the menu and despite my demonstrations told a lot of lies thinking we were unwise, I intimated that I would call the police but my boyfriend to avoid wasting time paid the bill, if it were up to me I would have waited for the arrival of the policem. What's more, she asked us how much we had paid for the necklace she had on my boyfriend, indelicate question and I would say out of contention. what never happened before.... avoid going if you are foreigners, horrible person and moreover the girl who served us when I asked her to tell the truth looked down, it was a really bad experience! Bad but bad people

title: Amazing Mixology Class
review: I took a Mixology class here during my stay at the lovely Banyan Tree. During my class, I was given the option of learning to make one of two different drinks. I selected their signature, Xin Chao Vietnam, over the classic Cosmopolitan. My instructor and bartender, Thien, was very prepared and was an incredibly professional, informative, and friendly instructor. He had questions for me at the beginning of class, and I explained needing help in making the foam for a whiskey sour. He went above and beyond the scope of the original class to help me and show me how to make an excellent foam for the whiskey sour. I highly recommend this class and if you don’t need any help or are not interested in Mixology, he is an excellent bartender, and I’m sure any drink he makes will be outstanding! Cheers to you and cheers, Thein!

title: Seen on the side of the road and stopped. Very delicious pizza
review: A really delicious pizza and nice staff

title: Delicious local restaurant
review: Local restaurant recommended by our guide. Delicious traditional dishes full of flavors: nem lui, bahn loc, soups and fried springrolls The sauces are pungent, ask “not spicy” according to your taste!

title: Friendly, homely meal.
review:
Everything we ate was delicious, we tried a number of different dishes, from rice cakes, spring rolls to grilled pork.

The staff were friendly.
